|| R^igvedaH vaidikasvaravirahitaH maNDalaM 1 ||
agnimILe purohitaM yaj~nasya devamR^itvijam |hotAraM ratnadhAtamam || 1.1.1
agniH pUrvebhirR^iShibhirIDyo nUtanairuta |sa devA.N eha vakShati || 1.1.2
agninA rayimashnavatpoShameva divedive |yashasaM vIravattamam || 1.1.3
agne yaM yaj~namadhvaraM vishvataH paribhUrasi |sa iddeveShu gachChati || 1.1.4
agnirhotA kavikratuH satyashchitrashravastamaH |devo devebhirA gamat || 1.1.5
yada~Nga dAshuShe tvamagne bhadraM kariShyasi |tavettatsatyama~NgiraH || 1.1.6
upa tvAgne divedive doShAvastardhiyA vayam |namo bharanta emasi || 1.1.7
rAjantamadhvarANAM gopAmR^itasya dIdivim |vardhamAnaM sve dame || 1.1.8
sa naH piteva sUnave.agne sUpAyano bhava |sachasvA naH svastaye || 1.1.9

vAyavA yAhi darshateme somA araMkR^itAH |teShAM pAhi shrudhI havam || 1.2.1
vAya ukthebhirjarante tvAmachChA jaritAraH |sutasomA aharvidaH || 1.2.2
vAyo tava prapR^i~nchatI dhenA jigAti dAshuShe |urUchI somapItaye || 1.2.3
indravAyU ime sutA upa prayobhirA gatam |indavo vAmushanti hi || 1.2.4
vAyavindrashcha chetathaH sutAnAM vAjinIvasU |tAvA yAtamupa dravat || 1.2.5
vAyavindrashcha sunvata A yAtamupa niShkR^itam |makShvitthA dhiyA narA || 1.2.6
mitraM huve pUtadakShaM varuNaM cha rishAdasam |dhiyaM ghR^itAchIM sAdhantA || 1.2.7
R^itena mitrAvaruNAvR^itAvR^idhAvR^itaspR^ishA |kratuM bR^ihantamAshAthe || 1.2.8
kavI no mitrAvaruNA tuvijAtA urukShayA |dakShaM dadhAte apasam || 1.2.9

ashvinA yajvarIriSho dravatpANI shubhaspatI |purubhujA chanasyatam || 1.3.1
ashvinA purudaMsasA narA shavIrayA dhiyA |dhiShNyA vanataM giraH || 1.3.2
dasrA yuvAkavaH sutA nAsatyA vR^iktabarhiShaH |A yAtaM rudravartanI || 1.3.3
indrA yAhi chitrabhAno sutA ime tvAyavaH |aNvIbhistanA pUtAsaH || 1.3.4
indrA yAhi dhiyeShito viprajUtaH sutAvataH |upa brahmANi vAghataH || 1.3.5
indrA yAhi tUtujAna upa brahmANi harivaH |sute dadhiShva nashchanaH || 1.3.6
omAsashcharShaNIdhR^ito vishve devAsa A gata |dAshvAMso dAshuShaH sutam || 1.3.7
vishve devAso apturaH sutamA ganta tUrNayaH |usrA iva svasarANi || 1.3.8
vishve devAso asridha ehimAyAso adruhaH |medhaM juShanta vahnayaH || 1.3.9
pAvakA naH sarasvatI vAjebhirvAjinIvatI |yaj~naM vaShTu dhiyAvasuH || 1.3.10
chodayitrI sUnR^itAnAM chetantI sumatInAm |yaj~naM dadhe sarasvatI || 1.3.11
maho arNaH sarasvatI pra chetayati ketunA |dhiyo vishvA vi rAjati || 1.3.12

surUpakR^itnumUtaye sudughAmiva goduhe |juhUmasi dyavidyavi || 1.4.1
upa naH savanA gahi somasya somapAH piba |godA idrevato madaH || 1.4.2
athA te antamAnAM vidyAma sumatInAm |mA no ati khya A gahi || 1.4.3
parehi vigramastR^itamindraM pR^ichChA vipashchitam |yaste sakhibhya A varam || 1.4.4
uta bruvantu no nido niranyatashchidArata |dadhAnA indra idduvaH || 1.4.5
uta naH subhagA.N arirvocheyurdasma kR^iShTayaH |syAmedindrasya sharmaNi || 1.4.6
emAshumAshave bhara yaj~nashriyaM nR^imAdanam |patayanmandayatsakham || 1.4.7
asya pItvA shatakrato ghano vR^itrANAmabhavaH |prAvo vAjeShu vAjinam || 1.4.8
taM tvA vAjeShu vAjinaM vAjayAmaH shatakrato |dhanAnAmindra sAtaye || 1.4.9
yo rAyo.avanirmahAnsupAraH sunvataH sakhA |tasmA indrAya gAyata || 1.4.10

A tvetA ni ShIdatendramabhi pra gAyata |sakhAyaH stomavAhasaH || 1.5.1
purUtamaM purUNAmIshAnaM vAryANAm |indraM some sachA sute || 1.5.2
sa ghA no yoga A bhuvatsa rAye sa puraMdhyAm |gamadvAjebhirA sa naH || 1.5.3
yasya saMsthe na vR^iNvate harI samatsu shatravaH |tasmA indrAya gAyata || 1.5.4
sutapAvne sutA ime shuchayo yanti vItaye |somAso dadhyAshiraH || 1.5.5
tvaM sutasya pItaye sadyo vR^iddho ajAyathAH |indra jyaiShThyAya sukrato || 1.5.6
A tvA vishantvAshavaH somAsa indra girvaNaH |shaM te santu prachetase || 1.5.7
tvAM stomA avIvR^idhantvAmukthA shatakrato |tvAM vardhantu no giraH || 1.5.8
akShitotiH sanedimaM vAjamindraH sahasriNam |yasminvishvAni pauMsyA || 1.5.9
mA no martA abhi druhantanUnAmindra girvaNaH |IshAno yavayA vadham || 1.5.10

yu~njanti bradhnamaruShaM charantaM pari tasthuShaH |rochante rochanA divi || 1.6.1
yu~njantyasya kAmyA harI vipakShasA rathe |shoNA dhR^iShNU nR^ivAhasA || 1.6.2
ketuM kR^iNvannaketave pesho maryA apeshase |samuShadbhirajAyathAH || 1.6.3
Adaha svadhAmanu punargarbhatvamerire |dadhAnA nAma yaj~niyam || 1.6.4
vILu chidArujatnubhirguhA chidindra vahnibhiH |avinda usriyA anu || 1.6.5
devayanto yathA matimachChA vidadvasuM giraH |mahAmanUShata shrutam || 1.6.6
indreNa saM hi dR^ikShase saMjagmAno abibhyuShA |mandU samAnavarchasA || 1.6.7
anavadyairabhidyubhirmakhaH sahasvadarchati |gaNairindrasya kAmyaiH || 1.6.8
ataH parijmannA gahi divo vA rochanAdadhi |samasminnR^i~njate giraH || 1.6.9
ito vA sAtimImahe divo vA pArthivAdadhi |indraM maho vA rajasaH || 1.6.10

indramidgAthino bR^ihadindramarkebhirarkiNaH |indraM vANIranUShata || 1.7.1
indra iddharyoH sachA sammishla A vachoyujA |indro vajrI hiraNyayaH || 1.7.2
indro dIrghAya chakShasa A sUryaM rohayaddivi |vi gobhiradrimairayat || 1.7.3
indra vAjeShu no.ava sahasrapradhaneShu cha |ugra ugrAbhirUtibhiH || 1.7.4
indraM vayaM mahAdhana indramarbhe havAmahe |yujaM vR^itreShu vajriNam || 1.7.5
sa no vR^iShannamuM charuM satrAdAvannapA vR^idhi |asmabhyamapratiShkutaH || 1.7.6
tu~njetu~nje ya uttare stomA indrasya vajriNaH |na vindhe asya suShTutim || 1.7.7
vR^iShA yUtheva vaMsagaH kR^iShTIriyartyojasA |IshAno apratiShkutaH || 1.7.8
ya ekashcharShaNInAM vasUnAmirajyati |indraH pa~ncha kShitInAm || 1.7.9
indraM vo vishvataspari havAmahe janebhyaH |asmAkamastu kevalaH || 1.7.10

endra sAnasiM rayiM sajitvAnaM sadAsaham |varShiShThamUtaye bhara || 1.8.1
ni yena muShTihatyayA ni vR^itrA ruNadhAmahai |tvotAso nyarvatA || 1.8.2
indra tvotAsa A vayaM vajraM ghanA dadImahi |jayema saM yudhi spR^idhaH || 1.8.3
vayaM shUrebhirastR^ibhirindra tvayA yujA vayam |sAsahyAma pR^itanyataH || 1.8.4
mahA.N indraH parashcha nu mahitvamastu vajriNe |dyaurna prathinA shavaH || 1.8.5
samohe vA ya Ashata narastokasya sanitau |viprAso vA dhiyAyavaH || 1.8.6
yaH kukShiH somapAtamaH samudra iva pinvate |urvIrApo na kAkudaH || 1.8.7
evA hyasya sUnR^itA virapshI gomatI mahI |pakvA shAkhA na dAshuShe || 1.8.8
evA hi te vibhUtaya Utaya indra mAvate |sadyashchitsanti dAshuShe || 1.8.9
evA hyasya kAmyA stoma ukthaM cha shaMsyA |indrAya somapItaye || 1.8.10

indrehi matsyandhaso vishvebhiH somaparvabhiH |mahA.N abhiShTirojasA || 1.9.1
emenaM sR^ijatA sute mandimindrAya mandine |chakriM vishvAni chakraye || 1.9.2
matsvA sushipra mandibhiH stomebhirvishvacharShaNe |sachaiShu savaneShvA || 1.9.3
asR^igramindra te giraH prati tvAmudahAsata |ajoShA vR^iShabhaM patim || 1.9.4
saM chodaya chitramarvAgrAdha indra vareNyam |asaditte vibhu prabhu || 1.9.5
asmAnsu tatra chodayendra rAye rabhasvataH |tuvidyumna yashasvataH || 1.9.6
saM gomadindra vAjavadasme pR^ithu shravo bR^ihat |vishvAyurdhehyakShitam || 1.9.7
asme dhehi shravo bR^ihaddyumnaM sahasrasAtamam |indra tA rathinIriShaH || 1.9.8
vasorindraM vasupatiM gIrbhirgR^iNanta R^igmiyam |homa gantAramUtaye || 1.9.9
sutesute nyokase bR^ihadbR^ihata edariH |indrAya shUShamarchati || 1.9.10

gAyanti tvA gAyatriNo.archantyarkamarkiNaH |brahmANastvA shatakrata udvaMshamiva yemire || 1.10.1
yatsAnoH sAnumAruhadbhUryaspaShTa kartvam |tadindro arthaM chetati yUthena vR^iShNirejati || 1.10.2
yukShvA hi keshinA harI vR^iShaNA kakShyaprA |athA na indra somapA girAmupashrutiM chara || 1.10.3
ehi stomA.N abhi svarAbhi gR^iNIhyA ruva |brahma cha no vaso sachendra yaj~naM cha vardhaya || 1.10.4
ukthamindrAya shaMsyaM vardhanaM puruniShShidhe |shakro yathA suteShu No rAraNatsakhyeShu cha || 1.10.5
tamitsakhitva Imahe taM rAye taM suvIrye |sa shakra uta naH shakadindro vasu dayamAnaH || 1.10.6
suvivR^itaM sunirajamindra tvAdAtamidyashaH |gavAmapa vrajaM vR^idhi kR^iNuShva rAdho adrivaH || 1.10.7
nahi tvA rodasI ubhe R^ighAyamANaminvataH |jeShaH svarvatIrapaH saM gA asmabhyaM dhUnuhi || 1.10.8
AshrutkarNa shrudhI havaM nU chiddadhiShva me giraH |indra stomamimaM mama kR^iShvA yujashchidantaram || 1.10.9
vidmA hi tvA vR^iShantamaM vAjeShu havanashrutam |vR^iShantamasya hUmaha UtiM sahasrasAtamAm || 1.10.10
A tU na indra kaushika mandasAnaH sutaM piba |navyamAyuH pra sU tira kR^idhI sahasrasAmR^iShim || 1.10.11
pari tvA girvaNo gira imA bhavantu vishvataH |vR^iddhAyumanu vR^iddhayo juShTA bhavantu juShTayaH || 1.10.12

indraM vishvA avIvR^idhansamudravyachasaM giraH |rathItamaM rathInAM vAjAnAM satpatiM patim || 1.11.1
sakhye ta indra vAjino mA bhema shavasaspate |tvAmabhi pra Nonumo jetAramaparAjitam || 1.11.2
pUrvIrindrasya rAtayo na vi dasyantyUtayaH |yadI vAjasya gomataH stotR^ibhyo maMhate magham || 1.11.3
purAM bhinduryuvA kaviramitaujA ajAyata |indro vishvasya karmaNo dhartA vajrI puruShTutaH || 1.11.4
tvaM valasya gomato.apAvaradrivo bilam |tvAM devA abibhyuShastujyamAnAsa AviShuH || 1.11.5
tavAhaM shUra rAtibhiH pratyAyaM sindhumAvadan |upAtiShThanta girvaNo viduShTe tasya kAravaH || 1.11.6
mAyAbhirindra mAyinaM tvaM shuShNamavAtiraH |viduShTe tasya medhirAsteShAM shravAMsyuttira || 1.11.7
indramIshAnamojasAbhi stomA anUShata |sahasraM yasya rAtaya uta vA santi bhUyasIH || 1.11.8

agniM dUtaM vR^iNImahe hotAraM vishvavedasam |asya yaj~nasya sukratum || 1.12.1
agnimagniM havImabhiH sadA havanta vishpatim |havyavAhaM purupriyam || 1.12.2
agne devA.N ihA vaha jaj~nAno vR^iktabarhiShe |asi hotA na IDyaH || 1.12.3
tA.N ushato vi bodhaya yadagne yAsi dUtyam |devairA satsi barhiShi || 1.12.4
ghR^itAhavana dIdivaH prati Shma riShato daha |agne tvaM rakShasvinaH || 1.12.5
agninAgniH samidhyate kavirgR^ihapatiryuvA |havyavADjuhvAsyaH || 1.12.6
kavimagnimupa stuhi satyadharmANamadhvare |devamamIvachAtanam || 1.12.7
yastvAmagne haviShpatirdUtaM deva saparyati |tasya sma prAvitA bhava || 1.12.8
yo agniM devavItaye haviShmA.N AvivAsati |tasmai pAvaka mR^iLaya || 1.12.9
sa naH pAvaka dIdivo.agne devA.N ihA vaha |upa yaj~naM havishcha naH || 1.12.10
sa naH stavAna A bhara gAyatreNa navIyasA |rayiM vIravatImiSham || 1.12.11
agne shukreNa shochiShA vishvAbhirdevahUtibhiH |imaM stomaM juShasva naH || 1.12.12

susamiddho na A vaha devA.N agne haviShmate |hotaH pAvaka yakShi cha || 1.13.1
madhumantaM tanUnapAdyaj~naM deveShu naH kave |adyA kR^iNuhi vItaye || 1.13.2
narAshaMsamiha priyamasminyaj~na upa hvaye |madhujihvaM haviShkR^itam || 1.13.3
agne sukhatame rathe devA.N ILita A vaha |asi hotA manurhitaH || 1.13.4
stR^iNIta barhirAnuShagghR^itapR^iShThaM manIShiNaH |yatrAmR^itasya chakShaNam || 1.13.5
vi shrayantAmR^itAvR^idho dvAro devIrasashchataH |adyA nUnaM cha yaShTave || 1.13.6
naktoShAsA supeshasAsminyaj~na upa hvaye |idaM no barhirAsade || 1.13.7
tA sujihvA upa hvaye hotArA daivyA kavI |yaj~naM no yakShatAmimam || 1.13.8
iLA sarasvatI mahI tisro devIrmayobhuvaH |barhiH sIdantvasridhaH || 1.13.9
iha tvaShTAramagriyaM vishvarUpamupa hvaye |asmAkamastu kevalaH || 1.13.10
ava sR^ijA vanaspate deva devebhyo haviH |pra dAturastu chetanam || 1.13.11
svAhA yaj~naM kR^iNotanendrAya yajvano gR^ihe |tatra devA.N upa hvaye || 1.13.12

aibhiragne duvo giro vishvebhiH somapItaye |devebhiryAhi yakShi cha || 1.14.1
A tvA kaNvA ahUShata gR^iNanti vipra te dhiyaH |devebhiragna A gahi || 1.14.2
indravAyU bR^ihaspatiM mitrAgniM pUShaNaM bhagam |AdityAnmArutaM gaNam || 1.14.3
pra vo bhriyanta indavo matsarA mAdayiShNavaH |drapsA madhvashchamUShadaH || 1.14.4
ILate tvAmavasyavaH kaNvAso vR^iktabarhiShaH |haviShmanto araMkR^itaH || 1.14.5
ghR^itapR^iShThA manoyujo ye tvA vahanti vahnayaH |A devAnsomapItaye || 1.14.6
tAnyajatrA.N R^itAvR^idho.agne patnIvataskR^idhi |madhvaH sujihva pAyaya || 1.14.7
ye yajatrA ya IDyAste te pibantu jihvayA |madhoragne vaShaTkR^iti || 1.14.8
AkIM sUryasya rochanAdvishvAndevA.N uSharbudhaH |vipro hoteha vakShati || 1.14.9
vishvebhiH somyaM madhvagna indreNa vAyunA |pibA mitrasya dhAmabhiH || 1.14.10
tvaM hotA manurhito.agne yaj~neShu sIdasi |semaM no adhvaraM yaja || 1.14.11
yukShvA hyaruShI rathe harito deva rohitaH |tAbhirdevA.N ihA vaha || 1.14.12

indra somaM piba R^itunA tvA vishantvindavaH |matsarAsastadokasaH || 1.15.1
marutaH pibata R^itunA potrAdyaj~naM punItana |yUyaM hi ShThA sudAnavaH || 1.15.2
abhi yaj~naM gR^iNIhi no gnAvo neShTaH piba R^itunA |tvaM hi ratnadhA asi || 1.15.3
agne devA.N ihA vaha sAdayA yoniShu triShu |pari bhUSha piba R^itunA || 1.15.4
brAhmaNAdindra rAdhasaH pibA somamR^itU.Nranu |taveddhi sakhyamastR^itam || 1.15.5
yuvaM dakShaM dhR^itavrata mitrAvaruNa dULabham |R^itunA yaj~namAshAthe || 1.15.6
draviNodA draviNaso grAvahastAso adhvare |yaj~neShu devamILate || 1.15.7
draviNodA dadAtu no vasUni yAni shR^iNvire |deveShu tA vanAmahe || 1.15.8
draviNodAH pipIShati juhota pra cha tiShThata |neShTrAdR^itubhiriShyata || 1.15.9
yattvA turIyamR^itubhirdraviNodo yajAmahe |adha smA no dadirbhava || 1.15.10
ashvinA pibataM madhu dIdyagnI shuchivratA |R^itunA yaj~navAhasA || 1.15.11
gArhapatyena santya R^itunA yaj~nanIrasi |devAndevayate yaja || 1.15.12

A tvA vahantu harayo vR^iShaNaM somapItaye |indra tvA sUrachakShasaH || 1.16.1
imA dhAnA ghR^itasnuvo harI ihopa vakShataH |indraM sukhatame rathe || 1.16.2
indraM prAtarhavAmaha indraM prayatyadhvare |indraM somasya pItaye || 1.16.3
upa naH sutamA gahi haribhirindra keshibhiH |sute hi tvA havAmahe || 1.16.4
semaM naH stomamA gahyupedaM savanaM sutam |gauro na tR^iShitaH piba || 1.16.5
ime somAsa indavaH sutAso adhi barhiShi |tA.N indra sahase piba || 1.16.6
ayaM te stomo agriyo hR^idispR^igastu shaMtamaH |athA somaM sutaM piba || 1.16.7
vishvamitsavanaM sutamindro madAya gachChati |vR^itrahA somapItaye || 1.16.8
semaM naH kAmamA pR^iNa gobhirashvaiH shatakrato |stavAma tvA svAdhyaH || 1.16.9

indrAvaruNayorahaM samrAjorava A vR^iNe |tA no mR^iLAta IdR^ishe || 1.17.1
gantArA hi stho.avase havaM viprasya mAvataH |dhartArA charShaNInAm || 1.17.2
anukAmaM tarpayethAmindrAvaruNa rAya A |tA vAM nediShThamImahe || 1.17.3
yuvAku hi shachInAM yuvAku sumatInAm |bhUyAma vAjadAvnAm || 1.17.4
indraH sahasradAvnAM varuNaH shaMsyAnAm |kraturbhavatyukthyaH || 1.17.5
tayoridavasA vayaM sanema ni cha dhImahi |syAduta prarechanam || 1.17.6
indrAvaruNa vAmahaM huve chitrAya rAdhase |asmAnsu jigyuShaskR^itam || 1.17.7
indrAvaruNa nU nu vAM siShAsantIShu dhIShvA |asmabhyaM sharma yachChatam || 1.17.8
pra vAmashnotu suShTutirindrAvaruNa yAM huve |yAmR^idhAthe sadhastutim || 1.17.9

somAnaM svaraNaM kR^iNuhi brahmaNaspate |kakShIvantaM ya aushijaH || 1.18.1
yo revAnyo amIvahA vasuvitpuShTivardhanaH |sa naH siShaktu yasturaH || 1.18.2
mA naH shaMso araruSho dhUrtiH praNa~Nmartyasya |rakShA No brahmaNaspate || 1.18.3
sa ghA vIro na riShyati yamindro brahmaNaspatiH |somo hinoti martyam || 1.18.4
tvaM taM brahmaNaspate soma indrashcha martyam |dakShiNA pAtvaMhasaH || 1.18.5
sadasaspatimadbhutaM priyamindrasya kAmyam |saniM medhAmayAsiSham || 1.18.6
yasmAdR^ite na sidhyati yaj~no vipashchitashchana |sa dhInAM yogaminvati || 1.18.7
AdR^idhnoti haviShkR^itiM prA~nchaM kR^iNotyadhvaram |hotrA deveShu gachChati || 1.18.8
narAshaMsaM sudhR^iShTamamapashyaM saprathastamam |divo na sadmamakhasam || 1.18.9

prati tyaM chArumadhvaraM gopIthAya pra hUyase |marudbhiragna A gahi || 1.19.1
nahi devo na martyo mahastava kratuM paraH |marudbhiragna A gahi || 1.19.2
ye maho rajaso vidurvishve devAso adruhaH |marudbhiragna A gahi || 1.19.3
ya ugrA arkamAnR^ichuranAdhR^iShTAsa ojasA |marudbhiragna A gahi || 1.19.4
ye shubhrA ghoravarpasaH sukShatrAso rishAdasaH |marudbhiragna A gahi || 1.19.5
ye nAkasyAdhi rochane divi devAsa Asate |marudbhiragna A gahi || 1.19.6
ya I~Nkhayanti parvatAntiraH samudramarNavam |marudbhiragna A gahi || 1.19.7
A ye tanvanti rashmibhistiraH samudramojasA |marudbhiragna A gahi || 1.19.8
abhi tvA pUrvapItaye sR^ijAmi somyaM madhu |marudbhiragna A gahi || 1.19.9

ayaM devAya janmane stomo viprebhirAsayA |akAri ratnadhAtamaH || 1.20.1
ya indrAya vachoyujA tatakShurmanasA harI |shamIbhiryaj~namAshata || 1.20.2
takShannAsatyAbhyAM parijmAnaM sukhaM ratham |takShandhenuM sabardughAm || 1.20.3
yuvAnA pitarA punaH satyamantrA R^ijUyavaH |R^ibhavo viShTyakrata || 1.20.4
saM vo madAso agmatendreNa cha marutvatA |Adityebhishcha rAjabhiH || 1.20.5
uta tyaM chamasaM navaM tvaShTurdevasya niShkR^itam |akarta chaturaH punaH || 1.20.6

adhArayanta vahnayo.abhajanta sukR^ityayA |bhAgaM deveShu yaj~niyam || 1.20.8

ihendrAgnI upa hvaye tayoritstomamushmasi |tA somaM somapAtamA || 1.21.1
tA yaj~neShu pra shaMsatendrAgnI shumbhatA naraH |tA gAyatreShu gAyata || 1.21.2

prAtaryujA vi bodhayAshvinAveha gachChatAm |asya somasya pItaye || 1.22.1
yA surathA rathItamobhA devA divispR^ishA |ashvinA tA havAmahe || 1.22.2

nahi vAmasti dUrake yatrA rathena gachChathaH |ashvinA somino gR^iham || 1.22.4
hiraNyapANimUtaye savitAramupa hvaye |sa chettA devatA padam || 1.22.5
apAM napAtamavase savitAramupa stuhi |tasya vratAnyushmasi || 1.22.6
vibhaktAraM havAmahe vasoshchitrasya rAdhasaH |savitAraM nR^ichakShasam || 1.22.7
sakhAya A ni ShIdata savitA stomyo nu naH |dAtA rAdhAMsi shumbhati || 1.22.8
agne patnIrihA vaha devAnAmushatIrupa |tvaShTAraM somapItaye || 1.22.9
A gnA agna ihAvase hotrAM yaviShTha bhAratIm |varUtrIM dhiShaNAM vaha || 1.22.10

idaM viShNurvi chakrame tredhA ni dadhe padam |samULhamasya pAMsure || 1.22.17
trINi padA vi chakrame viShNurgopA adAbhyaH |ato dharmANi dhArayan || 1.22.18
viShNoH karmANi pashyata yato vratAni paspashe |indrasya yujyaH sakhA || 1.22.19
tadviShNoH paramaM padaM sadA pashyanti sUrayaH |divIva chakShurAtatam || 1.22.20

tIvrAH somAsa A gahyAshIrvantaH sutA ime |vAyo tAnprasthitAnpiba || 1.23.1
ubhA devA divispR^ishendravAyU havAmahe |asya somasya pItaye || 1.23.2

mitraM vayaM havAmahe varuNaM somapItaye |jaj~nAnA pUtadakShasA || 1.23.4
R^itena yAvR^itAvR^idhAvR^itasya jyotiShaspatI |tA mitrAvaruNA huve || 1.23.5
varuNaH prAvitA bhuvanmitro vishvAbhirUtibhiH |karatAM naH surAdhasaH || 1.23.6

A pUSha~nchitrabarhiShamAghR^iNe dharuNaM divaH |AjA naShTaM yathA pashum || 1.23.13
pUShA rAjAnamAghR^iNirapagULhaM guhA hitam |avindachchitrabarhiSham || 1.23.14
uto sa mahyamindubhiH ShaDyuktA.N anuseShidhat |gobhiryavaM na charkR^iShat || 1.23.15

amUryA upa sUrye yAbhirvA sUryaH saha |tA no hinvantvadhvaram || 1.23.17
apo devIrupa hvaye yatra gAvaH pibanti naH |sindhubhyaH kartvaM haviH || 1.23.18
apsvantaramR^itamapsu bheShajamapAmuta prashastaye |devA bhavata vAjinaH || 1.23.19

ApaH pR^iNIta bheShajaM varUthaM tanve mama |jyokcha sUryaM dR^ishe || 1.23.21
idamApaH pra vahata yatkiM cha duritaM mayi |yadvAhamabhidudroha yadvA shepa utAnR^itam || 1.23.22
Apo adyAnvachAriShaM rasena samagasmahi |payasvAnagna A gahi taM mA saM sR^ija varchasA || 1.23.23
saM mAgne varchasA sR^ija saM prajayA samAyuShA |vidyurme asya devA indro vidyAtsaha R^iShibhiH || 1.23.24

kasya nUnaM katamasyAmR^itAnAM manAmahe chAru devasya nAma |ko no mahyA aditaye punardAtpitaraM cha dR^isheyaM mAtaraM cha || 1.24.1
agnervayaM prathamasyAmR^itAnAM manAmahe chAru devasya nAma |sa no mahyA aditaye punardAtpitaraM cha dR^isheyaM mAtaraM cha || 1.24.2
abhi tvA deva savitarIshAnaM vAryANAm |sadAvanbhAgamImahe || 1.24.3
yashchiddhi ta itthA bhagaH shashamAnaH purA nidaH |adveSho hastayordadhe || 1.24.4

nahi te kShatraM na saho na manyuM vayashchanAmI patayanta ApuH |nemA Apo animiShaM charantIrna ye vAtasya praminantyabhvam || 1.24.6
abudhne rAjA varuNo vanasyordhvaM stUpaM dadate pUtadakShaH |nIchInAH sthurupari budhna eShAmasme antarnihitAH ketavaH syuH || 1.24.7
uruM hi rAjA varuNashchakAra sUryAya panthAmanvetavA u |apade pAdA pratidhAtave.akarutApavaktA hR^idayAvidhashchit || 1.24.8
shataM te rAjanbhiShajaH sahasramurvI gabhIrA sumatiShTe astu |bAdhasva dUre nirR^itiM parAchaiH kR^itaM chidenaH pra mumugdhyasmat || 1.24.9

tattvA yAmi brahmaNA vandamAnastadA shAste yajamAno havirbhiH |aheLamAno varuNeha bodhyurushaMsa mA na AyuH pra moShIH || 1.24.11
tadinnaktaM taddivA mahyamAhustadayaM keto hR^ida A vi chaShTe |shunaHshepo yamahvadgR^ibhItaH so asmAnrAjA varuNo mumoktu || 1.24.12
shunaHshepo hyahvadgR^ibhItastriShvAdityaM drupadeShu baddhaH |avainaM rAjA varuNaH sasR^ijyAdvidvA.N adabdho vi mumoktu pAshAn || 1.24.13

uduttamaM varuNa pAshamasmadavAdhamaM vi madhyamaM shrathAya |athA vayamAditya vrate tavAnAgaso aditaye syAma || 1.24.15

yachchiddhi te visho yathA pra deva varuNa vratam |minImasi dyavidyavi || 1.25.1
mA no vadhAya hatnave jihILAnasya rIradhaH |mA hR^iNAnasya manyave || 1.25.2

parA hi me vimanyavaH patanti vasya{}iShTaye |vayo na vasatIrupa || 1.25.4

ni ShasAda dhR^itavrato varuNaH pastyAsvA |sAmrAjyAya sukratuH || 1.25.10

sa no vishvAhA sukraturAdityaH supathA karat |pra Na AyUMShi tAriShat || 1.25.12
bibhraddrApiM hiraNyayaM varuNo vasta nirNijam |pari spasho ni Shedire || 1.25.13
na yaM dipsanti dipsavo na druhvANo janAnAm |na devamabhimAtayaH || 1.25.14
uta yo mAnuSheShvA yashashchakre asAmyA |asmAkamudareShvA || 1.25.15

vasiShvA hi miyedhya vastrANyUrjAM pate |semaM no adhvaraM yaja || 1.26.1
ni no hotA vareNyaH sadA yaviShTha manmabhiH |agne divitmatA vachaH || 1.26.2
A hi ShmA sUnave pitApiryajatyApaye |sakhA sakhye vareNyaH || 1.26.3

ashvaM na tvA vAravantaM vandadhyA agniM namobhiH |samrAjantamadhvarANAm || 1.27.1

A no bhaja parameShvA vAjeShu madhyameShu |shikShA vasvo antamasya || 1.27.5

yatra grAvA pR^ithubudhna Urdhvo bhavati sotave |ulUkhalasutAnAmavedvindra jalgulaH || 1.28.1

yachchiddhi satya somapA anAshastA iva smasi |A tU na indra shaMsaya goShvashveShu shubhriShu sahasreShu tuvImagha || 1.29.1

A va indraM kriviM yathA vAjayantaH shatakratum |maMhiShThaM si~ncha indubhiH || 1.30.1
shataM vA yaH shuchInAM sahasraM vA samAshirAm |edu nimnaM na rIyate || 1.30.2
saM yanmadAya shuShmiNa enA hyasyodare |samudro na vyacho dadhe || 1.30.3
ayamu te samatasi kapota iva garbhadhim |vachastachchinna ohase || 1.30.4
stotraM rAdhAnAM pate girvAho vIra yasya te |vibhUtirastu sUnR^itA || 1.30.5
UrdhvastiShThA na Utaye.asminvAje shatakrato |samanyeShu bravAvahai || 1.30.6
yogeyoge tavastaraM vAjevAje havAmahe |sakhAya indramUtaye || 1.30.7
A ghA gamadyadi shravatsahasriNIbhirUtibhiH |vAjebhirupa no havam || 1.30.8
anu pratnasyaukaso huve tuvipratiM naram |yaM te pUrvaM pitA huve || 1.30.9
taM tvA vayaM vishvavArA shAsmahe puruhUta |sakhe vaso jaritR^ibhyaH || 1.30.10
asmAkaM shipriNInAM somapAH somapAvnAm |sakhe vajrinsakhInAm || 1.30.11
tathA tadastu somapAH sakhe vajrintathA kR^iNu |yathA ta ushmasIShTaye || 1.30.12
revatIrnaH sadhamAda indre santu tuvivAjAH |kShumanto yAbhirmadema || 1.30.13
A gha tvAvAntmanAptaH stotR^ibhyo dhR^iShNaviyAnaH |R^iNorakShaM na chakryoH || 1.30.14
A yadduvaH shatakratavA kAmaM jaritR^INAm |R^iNorakShaM na shachIbhiH || 1.30.15
shashvadindraH popruthadbhirjigAya nAnadadbhiH shAshvasadbhirdhanAni |sa no hiraNyarathaM daMsanAvAnsa naH sanitA sanaye sa no.adAt || 1.30.16
AshvinAvashvAvatyeShA yAtaM shavIrayA |gomaddasrA hiraNyavat || 1.30.17
samAnayojano hi vAM ratho dasrAvamartyaH |samudre ashvineyate || 1.30.18
nyaghnyasya mUrdhani chakraM rathasya yemathuH |pari dyAmanyadIyate || 1.30.19
kasta uShaH kadhapriye bhuje marto amartye |kaM nakShase vibhAvari || 1.30.20
vayaM hi te amanmahyAntAdA parAkAt |ashve na chitre aruShi || 1.30.21
tvaM tyebhirA gahi vAjebhirduhitardivaH |asme rayiM ni dhAraya || 1.30.22

tvamagne prathamo a~NgirA R^iShirdevo devAnAmabhavaH shivaH sakhA |tava vrate kavayo vidmanApaso.ajAyanta maruto bhrAjadR^iShTayaH || 1.31.1
tvamagne prathamo a~NgirastamaH kavirdevAnAM pari bhUShasi vratam |vibhurvishvasmai bhuvanAya medhiro dvimAtA shayuH katidhA chidAyave || 1.31.2
tvamagne prathamo mAtarishvana Avirbhava sukratUyA vivasvate |arejetAM rodasI hotR^ivUrye.asaghnorbhAramayajo maho vaso || 1.31.3
tvamagne manave dyAmavAshayaH purUravase sukR^ite sukR^ittaraH |shvAtreNa yatpitrormuchyase paryA tvA pUrvamanayannAparaM punaH || 1.31.4
tvamagne vR^iShabhaH puShTivardhana udyatasruche bhavasi shravAyyaH |ya AhutiM pari vedA vaShaTkR^itimekAyuragre visha AvivAsasi || 1.31.5
tvamagne vR^ijinavartaniM naraM sakmanpiparShi vidathe vicharShaNe |yaH shUrasAtA paritakmye dhane dabhrebhishchitsamR^itA haMsi bhUyasaH || 1.31.6
tvaM tamagne amR^itatva uttame martaM dadhAsi shravase divedive |yastAtR^iShANa ubhayAya janmane mayaH kR^iNoShi praya A cha sUraye || 1.31.7
tvaM no agne sanaye dhanAnAM yashasaM kAruM kR^iNuhi stavAnaH |R^idhyAma karmApasA navena devairdyAvApR^ithivI prAvataM naH || 1.31.8
tvaM no agne pitrorupastha A devo deveShvanavadya jAgR^iviH |tanUkR^idbodhi pramatishcha kArave tvaM kalyANa vasu vishvamopiShe || 1.31.9
tvamagne pramatistvaM pitAsi nastvaM vayaskR^ittava jAmayo vayam |saM tvA rAyaH shatinaH saM sahasriNaH suvIraM yanti vratapAmadAbhya || 1.31.10
tvAmagne prathamamAyumAyave devA akR^iNvannahuShasya vishpatim |iLAmakR^iNvanmanuShasya shAsanIM pituryatputro mamakasya jAyate || 1.31.11
tvaM no agne tava deva pAyubhirmaghono rakSha tanvashcha vandya |trAtA tokasya tanaye gavAmasyanimeShaM rakShamANastava vrate || 1.31.12
tvamagne yajyave pAyurantaro.aniSha~NgAya chaturakSha idhyase |yo rAtahavyo.avR^ikAya dhAyase kIreshchinmantraM manasA vanoShi tam || 1.31.13
tvamagna urushaMsAya vAghate spArhaM yadrekNaH paramaM vanoShi tat |Adhrasya chitpramatiruchyase pitA pra pAkaM shAssi pra disho viduShTaraH || 1.31.14
tvamagne prayatadakShiNaM naraM varmeva syUtaM pari pAsi vishvataH |svAdukShadmA yo vasatau syonakR^ijjIvayAjaM yajate sopamA divaH || 1.31.15
imAmagne sharaNiM mImR^iSho na imamadhvAnaM yamagAma dUrAt |ApiH pitA pramatiH somyAnAM bhR^imirasyR^iShikR^inmartyAnAm || 1.31.16
manuShvadagne a~Ngirasvada~Ngiro yayAtivatsadane pUrvavachChuche |achCha yAhyA vahA daivyaM janamA sAdaya barhiShi yakShi cha priyam || 1.31.17
etenAgne brahmaNA vAvR^idhasva shaktI vA yatte chakR^imA vidA vA |uta pra NeShyabhi vasyo asmAnsaM naH sR^ija sumatyA vAjavatyA || 1.31.18

indrasya nu vIryANi pra vochaM yAni chakAra prathamAni vajrI |ahannahimanvapastatarda pra vakShaNA abhinatparvatAnAm || 1.32.1
ahannahiM parvate shishriyANaM tvaShTAsmai vajraM svaryaM tatakSha |vAshrA iva dhenavaH syandamAnA a~njaH samudramava jagmurApaH || 1.32.2
vR^iShAyamANo.avR^iNIta somaM trikadrukeShvapibatsutasya |A sAyakaM maghavAdatta vajramahannenaM prathamajAmahInAm || 1.32.3
yadindrAhanprathamajAmahInAmAnmAyinAmaminAH prota mAyAH |AtsUryaM janayandyAmuShAsaM tAdItnA shatruM na kilA vivitse || 1.32.4
ahanvR^itraM vR^itrataraM vyaMsamindro vajreNa mahatA vadhena |skandhAMsIva kulishenA vivR^ikNAhiH shayata upapR^ikpR^ithivyAH || 1.32.5
ayoddheva durmada A hi juhve mahAvIraM tuvibAdhamR^ijISham |nAtArIdasya samR^itiM vadhAnAM saM rujAnAH pipiSha indrashatruH || 1.32.6
apAdahasto apR^itanyadindramAsya vajramadhi sAnau jaghAna |vR^iShNo vadhriH pratimAnaM bubhUShanpurutrA vR^itro ashayadvyastaH || 1.32.7
nadaM na bhinnamamuyA shayAnaM mano ruhANA ati yantyApaH |yAshchidvR^itro mahinA paryatiShThattAsAmahiH patsutaHshIrbabhUva || 1.32.8
nIchAvayA abhavadvR^itraputrendro asyA ava vadharjabhAra |uttarA sUradharaH putra AsIddAnuH shaye sahavatsA na dhenuH || 1.32.9
atiShThantInAmaniveshanAnAM kAShThAnAM madhye nihitaM sharIram |vR^itrasya niNyaM vi charantyApo dIrghaM tama AshayadindrashatruH || 1.32.10
dAsapatnIrahigopA atiShThanniruddhA ApaH paNineva gAvaH |apAM bilamapihitaM yadAsIdvR^itraM jaghanvA.N apa tadvavAra || 1.32.11
ashvyo vAro abhavastadindra sR^ike yattvA pratyahandeva ekaH |ajayo gA ajayaH shUra somamavAsR^ijaH sartave sapta sindhUn || 1.32.12
nAsmai vidyunna tanyatuH siShedha na yAM mihamakiraddhrAduniM cha |indrashcha yadyuyudhAte ahishchotAparIbhyo maghavA vi jigye || 1.32.13
aheryAtAraM kamapashya indra hR^idi yatte jaghnuSho bhIragachChat |nava cha yannavatiM cha sravantIH shyeno na bhIto ataro rajAMsi || 1.32.14
indro yAto.avasitasya rAjA shamasya cha shR^i~NgiNo vajrabAhuH |sedu rAjA kShayati charShaNInAmarAnna nemiH pari tA babhUva || 1.32.15

etAyAmopa gavyanta indramasmAkaM su pramatiM vAvR^idhAti |anAmR^iNaH kuvidAdasya rAyo gavAM ketaM paramAvarjate naH || 1.33.1
upedahaM dhanadAmapratItaM juShTAM na shyeno vasatiM patAmi |indraM namasyannupamebhirarkairyaH stotR^ibhyo havyo asti yAman || 1.33.2
ni sarvasena iShudhI.Nrasakta samaryo gA ajati yasya vaShTi |choShkUyamANa indra bhUri vAmaM mA paNirbhUrasmadadhi pravR^iddha || 1.33.3
vadhIrhi dasyuM dhaninaM ghanena.N ekashcharannupashAkebhirindra |dhanoradhi viShuNakte vyAyannayajvAnaH sanakAH pretimIyuH || 1.33.4
parA chichChIrShA vavR^ijusta indrAyajvAno yajvabhiH spardhamAnAH |pra yaddivo harivaH sthAtarugra niravratA.N adhamo rodasyoH || 1.33.5
ayuyutsannanavadyasya senAmayAtayanta kShitayo navagvAH |vR^iShAyudho na vadhrayo niraShTAH pravadbhirindrAchchitayanta Ayan || 1.33.6
tvametAnrudato jakShatashchAyodhayo rajasa indra pAre |avAdaho diva A dasyumuchchA pra sunvataH stuvataH shaMsamAvaH || 1.33.7
chakrANAsaH parINahaM pR^ithivyA hiraNyena maNinA shumbhamAnAH |na hinvAnAsastitirusta indraM pari spasho adadhAtsUryeNa || 1.33.8
pari yadindra rodasI ubhe abubhojIrmahinA vishvataH sIm |amanyamAnA.N abhi manyamAnairnirbrahmabhiradhamo dasyumindra || 1.33.9
na ye divaH pR^ithivyA antamApurna mAyAbhirdhanadAM paryabhUvan |yujaM vajraM vR^iShabhashchakra indro nirjyotiShA tamaso gA adukShat || 1.33.10
anu svadhAmakSharannApo asyAvardhata madhya A nAvyAnAm |sadhrIchInena manasA tamindra ojiShThena hanmanAhannabhi dyUn || 1.33.11
nyAvidhyadilIbishasya dR^iLhA vi shR^i~NgiNamabhinachChuShNamindraH |yAvattaro maghavanyAvadojo vajreNa shatrumavadhIH pR^itanyum || 1.33.12
abhi sidhmo ajigAdasya shatrUnvi tigmena vR^iShabheNA puro.abhet |saM vajreNAsR^ijadvR^itramindraH pra svAM matimatirachChAshadAnaH || 1.33.13
AvaH kutsamindra yasmi~nchAkanprAvo yudhyantaM vR^iShabhaM dashadyum |shaphachyuto reNurnakShata dyAmuchChvaitreyo nR^iShAhyAya tasthau || 1.33.14
AvaH shamaM vR^iShabhaM tugryAsu kShetrajeShe maghava~nChvitryaM gAm |jyokchidatra tasthivAMso akra~nChatrUyatAmadharA vedanAkaH || 1.33.15

trishchinno adyA bhavataM navedasA vibhurvAM yAma uta rAtirashvinA |yuvorhi yantraM himyeva vAsaso.abhyAyaMsenyA bhavataM manIShibhiH || 1.34.1
trayaH pavayo madhuvAhane rathe somasya venAmanu vishva idviduH |trayaH skambhAsaH skabhitAsa Arabhe trirnaktaM yAthastrirvashvinA divA || 1.34.2
samAne ahantriravadyagohanA triradya yaj~naM madhunA mimikShatam |trirvAjavatIriSho ashvinA yuvaM doShA asmabhyamuShasashcha pinvatam || 1.34.3
trirvartiryAtaM triranuvrate jane triH suprAvye tredheva shikShatam |trirnAndyaM vahatamashvinA yuvaM triH pR^ikSho asme akShareva pinvatam || 1.34.4
trirno rayiM vahatamashvinA yuvaM trirdevatAtA trirutAvataM dhiyaH |triH saubhagatvaM triruta shravAMsi nastriShThaM vAM sUre duhitA ruhadratham || 1.34.5
trirno ashvinA divyAni bheShajA triH pArthivAni triru dattamadbhyaH |omAnaM shaMyormamakAya sUnave tridhAtu sharma vahataM shubhaspatI || 1.34.6
trirno ashvinA yajatA divedive pari tridhAtu pR^ithivImashAyatam |tisro nAsatyA rathyA parAvata Atmeva vAtaH svasarANi gachChatam || 1.34.7
trirashvinA sindhubhiH saptamAtR^ibhistraya AhAvAstredhA haviShkR^itam |tisraH pR^ithivIrupari pravA divo nAkaM rakShethe dyubhiraktubhirhitam || 1.34.8
kva trI chakrA trivR^ito rathasya kva trayo vandhuro ye sanILAH |kadA yogo vAjino rAsabhasya yena yaj~naM nAsatyopayAthaH || 1.34.9
A nAsatyA gachChataM hUyate havirmadhvaH pibataM madhupebhirAsabhiH |yuvorhi pUrvaM savitoShaso rathamR^itAya chitraM ghR^itavantamiShyati || 1.34.10
A nAsatyA tribhirekAdashairiha devebhiryAtaM madhupeyamashvinA |prAyustAriShTaM nI rapAMsi mR^ikShataM sedhataM dveSho bhavataM sachAbhuvA || 1.34.11
A no ashvinA trivR^itA rathenArvA~nchaM rayiM vahataM suvIram |shR^iNvantA vAmavase johavImi vR^idhe cha no bhavataM vAjasAtau || 1.34.12

hvayAmyagniM prathamaM svastaye hvayAmi mitrAvaruNAvihAvase |hvayAmi rAtrIM jagato niveshanIM hvayAmi devaM savitAramUtaye || 1.35.1
A kR^iShNena rajasA vartamAno niveshayannamR^itaM martyaM cha |hiraNyayena savitA rathenA devo yAti bhuvanAni pashyan || 1.35.2
yAti devaH pravatA yAtyudvatA yAti shubhrAbhyAM yajato haribhyAm |A devo yAti savitA parAvato.apa vishvA duritA bAdhamAnaH || 1.35.3
abhIvR^itaM kR^ishanairvishvarUpaM hiraNyashamyaM yajato bR^ihantam |AsthAdrathaM savitA chitrabhAnuH kR^iShNA rajAMsi taviShIM dadhAnaH || 1.35.4
vi janA~nChyAvAH shitipAdo akhyanrathaM hiraNyapra{}ugaM vahantaH |shashvadvishaH saviturdaivyasyopasthe vishvA bhuvanAni tasthuH || 1.35.5
tisro dyAvaH saviturdvA upasthA.N ekA yamasya bhuvane virAShAT |ANiM na rathyamamR^itAdhi tasthuriha bravItu ya u tachchiketat || 1.35.6
vi suparNo antarikShANyakhyadgabhIravepA asuraH sunIthaH |kvedAnIM sUryaH kashchiketa katamAM dyAM rashmirasyA tatAna || 1.35.7
aShTau vyakhyatkakubhaH pR^ithivyAstrI dhanva yojanA sapta sindhUn |hiraNyAkShaH savitA deva AgAddadhadratnA dAshuShe vAryANi || 1.35.8
hiraNyapANiH savitA vicharShaNirubhe dyAvApR^ithivI antarIyate |apAmIvAM bAdhate veti sUryamabhi kR^iShNena rajasA dyAmR^iNoti || 1.35.9
hiraNyahasto asuraH sunIthaH sumR^iLIkaH svavA.N yAtvarvA~N |apasedhanrakShaso yAtudhAnAnasthAddevaH pratidoShaM gR^iNAnaH || 1.35.10
ye te panthAH savitaH pUrvyAso.areNavaH sukR^itA antarikShe |tebhirno adya pathibhiH sugebhI rakShA cha no adhi cha brUhi deva || 1.35.11

pra vo yahvaM purUNAM vishAM devayatInAm |agniM sUktebhirvachobhirImahe yaM sImidanya ILate || 1.36.1
janAso agniM dadhire sahovR^idhaM haviShmanto vidhema te |sa tvaM no adya sumanA ihAvitA bhavA vAjeShu santya || 1.36.2
pra tvA dUtaM vR^iNImahe hotAraM vishvavedasam |mahaste sato vi charantyarchayo divi spR^ishanti bhAnavaH || 1.36.3
devAsastvA varuNo mitro aryamA saM dUtaM pratnamindhate |vishvaM so agne jayati tvayA dhanaM yaste dadAsha martyaH || 1.36.4
mandro hotA gR^ihapatiragne dUto vishAmasi |tve vishvA saMgatAni vratA dhruvA yAni devA akR^iNvata || 1.36.5
tve idagne subhage yaviShThya vishvamA hUyate haviH |sa tvaM no adya sumanA utAparaM yakShi devAnsuvIryA || 1.36.6
taM ghemitthA namasvina upa svarAjamAsate |hotrAbhiragniM manuShaH samindhate titirvAMso ati sridhaH || 1.36.7
ghnanto vR^itramataranrodasI apa uru kShayAya chakrire |bhuvatkaNve vR^iShA dyumnyAhutaH krandadashvo gaviShTiShu || 1.36.8
saM sIdasva mahA.N asi shochasva devavItamaH |vi dhUmamagne aruShaM miyedhya sR^ija prashasta darshatam || 1.36.9
yaM tvA devAso manave dadhuriha yajiShThaM havyavAhana |yaM kaNvo medhyAtithirdhanaspR^itaM yaM vR^iShA yamupastutaH || 1.36.10
yamagniM medhyAtithiH kaNva Idha R^itAdadhi |tasya preSho dIdiyustamimA R^ichastamagniM vardhayAmasi || 1.36.11
rAyaspUrdhi svadhAvo.asti hi te.agne deveShvApyam |tvaM vAjasya shrutyasya rAjasi sa no mR^iLa mahA.N asi || 1.36.12
Urdhva U Shu Na Utaye tiShThA devo na savitA |Urdhvo vAjasya sanitA yada~njibhirvAghadbhirvihvayAmahe || 1.36.13
Urdhvo naH pAhyaMhaso ni ketunA vishvaM samatriNaM daha |kR^idhI na UrdhvA~ncharathAya jIvase vidA deveShu no duvaH || 1.36.14
pAhi no agne rakShasaH pAhi dhUrterarAvNaH |pAhi rIShata uta vA jighAMsato bR^ihadbhAno yaviShThya || 1.36.15
ghaneva viShvagvi jahyarAvNastapurjambha yo asmadhruk |yo martyaH shishIte atyaktubhirmA naH sa ripurIshata || 1.36.16
agnirvavne suvIryamagniH kaNvAya saubhagam |agniH prAvanmitrota medhyAtithimagniH sAtA upastutam || 1.36.17
agninA turvashaM yaduM parAvata ugrAdevaM havAmahe |agnirnayannavavAstvaM bR^ihadrathaM turvItiM dasyave sahaH || 1.36.18
ni tvAmagne manurdadhe jyotirjanAya shashvate |dIdetha kaNva R^itajAta ukShito yaM namasyanti kR^iShTayaH || 1.36.19
tveShAso agneramavanto archayo bhImAso na pratItaye |rakShasvinaH sadamidyAtumAvato vishvaM samatriNaM daha || 1.36.20

krILaM vaH shardho mArutamanarvANaM ratheshubham |kaNvA abhi pra gAyata || 1.37.1
ye pR^iShatIbhirR^iShTibhiH sAkaM vAshIbhira~njibhiH |ajAyanta svabhAnavaH || 1.37.2
iheva shR^iNva eShAM kashA hasteShu yadvadAn |ni yAma~nchitramR^i~njate || 1.37.3
pra vaH shardhAya ghR^iShvaye tveShadyumnAya shuShmiNe |devattaM brahma gAyata || 1.37.4
pra shaMsA goShvaghnyaM krILaM yachChardho mArutam |jambhe rasasya vAvR^idhe || 1.37.5
ko vo varShiShTha A naro divashcha gmashcha dhUtayaH |yatsImantaM na dhUnutha || 1.37.6
ni vo yAmAya mAnuSho dadhra ugrAya manyave |jihIta parvato giriH || 1.37.7
yeShAmajmeShu pR^ithivI jujurvA.N iva vishpatiH |bhiyA yAmeShu rejate || 1.37.8
sthiraM hi jAnameShAM vayo mAturniretave |yatsImanu dvitA shavaH || 1.37.9
udu tye sUnavo giraH kAShThA ajmeShvatnata |vAshrA abhij~nu yAtave || 1.37.10
tyaM chidghA dIrghaM pR^ithuM miho napAtamamR^idhram |pra chyAvayanti yAmabhiH || 1.37.11
maruto yaddha vo balaM janA.N achuchyavItana |girI.NrachuchyavItana || 1.37.12
yaddha yAnti marutaH saM ha bruvate.adhvannA |shR^iNoti kashchideShAm || 1.37.13
pra yAta shIbhamAshubhiH santi kaNveShu vo duvaH |tatro Shu mAdayAdhvai || 1.37.14
asti hi ShmA madAya vaH smasi ShmA vayameShAm |vishvaM chidAyurjIvase || 1.37.15

kaddha nUnaM kadhapriyaH pitA putraM na hastayoH |dadhidhve vR^iktabarhiShaH || 1.38.1
kva nUnaM kadvo arthaM gantA divo na pR^ithivyAH |kva vo gAvo na raNyanti || 1.38.2
kva vaH sumnA navyAMsi marutaH kva suvitA |kvo vishvAni saubhagA || 1.38.3
yadyUyaM pR^ishnimAtaro martAsaH syAtana |stotA vo amR^itaH syAt || 1.38.4
mA vo mR^igo na yavase jaritA bhUdajoShyaH |pathA yamasya gAdupa || 1.38.5
mo Shu NaH parAparA nirR^itirdurhaNA vadhIt |padIShTa tR^iShNayA saha || 1.38.6
satyaM tveShA amavanto dhanva~nchidA rudriyAsaH |mihaM kR^iNvantyavAtAm || 1.38.7
vAshreva vidyunmimAti vatsaM na mAtA siShakti |yadeShAM vR^iShTirasarji || 1.38.8
divA chittamaH kR^iNvanti parjanyenodavAhena |yatpR^ithivIM vyundanti || 1.38.9
adha svanAnmarutAM vishvamA sadma pArthivam |arejanta pra mAnuShAH || 1.38.10
maruto vILupANibhishchitrA rodhasvatIranu |yAtemakhidrayAmabhiH || 1.38.11
sthirA vaH santu nemayo rathA ashvAsa eShAm |susaMskR^itA abhIshavaH || 1.38.12
achChA vadA tanA girA jarAyai brahmaNaspatim |agniM mitraM na darshatam || 1.38.13
mimIhi shlokamAsye parjanya iva tatanaH |gAya gAyatramukthyam || 1.38.14
vandasva mArutaM gaNaM tveShaM panasyumarkiNam |asme vR^iddhA asanniha || 1.38.15

pra yaditthA parAvataH shochirna mAnamasyatha |kasya kratvA marutaH kasya varpasA kaM yAtha kaM ha dhUtayaH || 1.39.1
sthirA vaH santvAyudhA parANude vILU uta pratiShkabhe |yuShmAkamastu taviShI panIyasI mA martyasya mAyinaH || 1.39.2
parA ha yatsthiraM hatha naro vartayathA guru |vi yAthana vaninaH pR^ithivyA vyAshAH parvatAnAm || 1.39.3
nahi vaH shatrurvivide adhi dyavi na bhUmyAM rishAdasaH |yuShmAkamastu taviShI tanA yujA rudrAso nU chidAdhR^iShe || 1.39.4
pra vepayanti parvatAnvi vi~nchanti vanaspatIn |pro Arata maruto durmadA iva devAsaH sarvayA vishA || 1.39.5
upo ratheShu pR^iShatIrayugdhvaM praShTirvahati rohitaH |A vo yAmAya pR^ithivI chidashrodabIbhayanta mAnuShAH || 1.39.6
A vo makShU tanAya kaM rudrA avo vR^iNImahe |gantA nUnaM no.avasA yathA puretthA kaNvAya bibhyuShe || 1.39.7
yuShmeShito maruto martyeShita A yo no abhva IShate |vi taM yuyota shavasA vyojasA vi yuShmAkAbhirUtibhiH || 1.39.8
asAmi hi prayajyavaH kaNvaM dada prachetasaH |asAmibhirmaruta A na UtibhirgantA vR^iShTiM na vidyutaH || 1.39.9
asAmyojo bibhR^ithA sudAnavo.asAmi dhUtayaH shavaH |R^iShidviShe marutaH parimanyava iShuM na sR^ijata dviSham || 1.39.10

uttiShTha brahmaNaspate devayantastvemahe |upa pra yantu marutaH sudAnava indra prAshUrbhavA sachA || 1.40.1
tvAmiddhi sahasasputra martya upabrUte dhane hite |suvIryaM maruta A svashvyaM dadhIta yo va Achake || 1.40.2
praitu brahmaNaspatiH pra devyetu sUnR^itA |achChA vIraM naryaM pa~NktirAdhasaM devA yaj~naM nayantu naH || 1.40.3
yo vAghate dadAti sUnaraM vasu sa dhatte akShiti shravaH |tasmA iLAM suvIrAmA yajAmahe supratUrtimanehasam || 1.40.4
pra nUnaM brahmaNaspatirmantraM vadatyukthyam |yasminnindro varuNo mitro aryamA devA okAMsi chakrire || 1.40.5
tamidvochemA vidatheShu shambhuvaM mantraM devA anehasam |imAM cha vAchaM pratiharyathA naro vishvedvAmA vo ashnavat || 1.40.6
ko devayantamashnavajjanaM ko vR^iktabarhiSham |prapra dAshvAnpastyAbhirasthitAntarvAvatkShayaM dadhe || 1.40.7
upa kShatraM pR^i~nchIta hanti rAjabhirbhaye chitsukShitiM dadhe |nAsya vartA na tarutA mahAdhane nArbhe asti vajriNaH || 1.40.8

yaM rakShanti prachetaso varuNo mitro aryamA |nU chitsa dabhyate janaH || 1.41.1
yaM bAhuteva piprati pAnti martyaM riShaH |ariShTaH sarva edhate || 1.41.2
vi durgA vi dviShaH puro ghnanti rAjAna eShAm |nayanti duritA tiraH || 1.41.3
sugaH panthA anR^ikShara AdityAsa R^itaM yate |nAtrAvakhAdo asti vaH || 1.41.4
yaM yaj~naM nayathA nara AdityA R^ijunA pathA |pra vaH sa dhItaye nashat || 1.41.5
sa ratnaM martyo vasu vishvaM tokamuta tmanA |achChA gachChatyastR^itaH || 1.41.6
kathA rAdhAma sakhAyaH stomaM mitrasyAryamNaH |mahi psaro varuNasya || 1.41.7
mA vo ghnantaM mA shapantaM prati voche devayantam |sumnairidva A vivAse || 1.41.8
chaturashchiddadamAnAdbibhIyAdA nidhAtoH |na duruktAya spR^ihayet || 1.41.9

saM pUShannadhvanastira vyaMho vimucho napAt |sakShvA deva pra NaspuraH || 1.42.1
yo naH pUShannagho vR^iko duHsheva Adideshati |apa sma taM patho jahi || 1.42.2
apa tyaM paripanthinaM muShIvANaM hurashchitam |dUramadhi sruteraja || 1.42.3
tvaM tasya dvayAvino.aghashaMsasya kasya chit |padAbhi tiShTha tapuShim || 1.42.4
A tatte dasra mantumaH pUShannavo vR^iNImahe |yena pitR^InachodayaH || 1.42.5
adhA no vishvasaubhaga hiraNyavAshImattama |dhanAni suShaNA kR^idhi || 1.42.6
ati naH sashchato naya sugA naH supathA kR^iNu |pUShanniha kratuM vidaH || 1.42.7
abhi sUyavasaM naya na navajvAro adhvane |pUShanniha kratuM vidaH || 1.42.8
shagdhi pUrdhi pra yaMsi cha shishIhi prAsyudaram |pUShanniha kratuM vidaH || 1.42.9
na pUShaNaM methAmasi sUktairabhi gR^iNImasi |vasUni dasmamImahe || 1.42.10

kadrudrAya prachetase mILhuShTamAya tavyase |vochema shaMtamaM hR^ide || 1.43.1
yathA no aditiH karatpashve nR^ibhyo yathA gave |yathA tokAya rudriyam || 1.43.2
yathA no mitro varuNo yathA rudrashchiketati |yathA vishve sajoShasaH || 1.43.3
gAthapatiM medhapatiM rudraM jalAShabheShajam |tachChaMyoH sumnamImahe || 1.43.4
yaH shukra iva sUryo hiraNyamiva rochate |shreShTho devAnAM vasuH || 1.43.5
shaM naH karatyarvate sugaM meShAya meShye |nR^ibhyo nAribhyo gave || 1.43.6
asme soma shriyamadhi ni dhehi shatasya nR^iNAm |mahi shravastuvinR^imNam || 1.43.7
mA naH somaparibAdho mArAtayo juhuranta |A na indo vAje bhaja || 1.43.8
yAste prajA amR^itasya parasmindhAmannR^itasya |mUrdhA nAbhA soma vena AbhUShantIH soma vedaH || 1.43.9

agne vivasvaduShasashchitraM rAdho amartya |A dAshuShe jAtavedo vahA tvamadyA devA.N uSharbudhaH || 1.44.1
juShTo hi dUto asi havyavAhano.agne rathIradhvarANAm |sajUrashvibhyAmuShasA suvIryamasme dhehi shravo bR^ihat || 1.44.2
adyA dUtaM vR^iNImahe vasumagniM purupriyam |dhUmaketuM bhAR^ijIkaM vyuShTiShu yaj~nAnAmadhvarashriyam || 1.44.3
shreShThaM yaviShThamatithiM svAhutaM juShTaM janAya dAshuShe |devA.N achChA yAtave jAtavedasamagnimILe vyuShTiShu || 1.44.4
staviShyAmi tvAmahaM vishvasyAmR^ita bhojana |agne trAtAramamR^itaM miyedhya yajiShThaM havyavAhana || 1.44.5
sushaMso bodhi gR^iNate yaviShThya madhujihvaH svAhutaH |praskaNvasya pratirannAyurjIvase namasyA daivyaM janam || 1.44.6
hotAraM vishvavedasaM saM hi tvA visha indhate |sa A vaha puruhUta prachetaso.agne devA.N iha dravat || 1.44.7
savitAramuShasamashvinA bhagamagniM vyuShTiShu kShapaH |kaNvAsastvA sutasomAsa indhate havyavAhaM svadhvara || 1.44.8
patirhyadhvarANAmagne dUto vishAmasi |uSharbudha A vaha somapItaye devA.N adya svardR^ishaH || 1.44.9
agne pUrvA anUShaso vibhAvaso dIdetha vishvadarshataH |asi grAmeShvavitA purohito.asi yaj~neShu mAnuShaH || 1.44.10
ni tvA yaj~nasya sAdhanamagne hotAramR^itvijam |manuShvaddeva dhImahi prachetasaM jIraM dUtamamartyam || 1.44.11
yaddevAnAM mitramahaH purohito.antaro yAsi dUtyam |sindhoriva prasvanitAsa Urmayo.agnerbhrAjante archayaH || 1.44.12
shrudhi shrutkarNa vahnibhirdevairagne sayAvabhiH |A sIdantu barhiShi mitro aryamA prAtaryAvANo adhvaram || 1.44.13
shR^iNvantu stomaM marutaH sudAnavo.agnijihvA R^itAvR^idhaH |pibatu somaM varuNo dhR^itavrato.ashvibhyAmuShasA sajUH || 1.44.14

tvamagne vasU.Nriha rudrA.N AdityA.N uta |yajA svadhvaraM janaM manujAtaM ghR^itapruSham || 1.45.1
shruShTIvAno hi dAshuShe devA agne vichetasaH |tAnrohidashva girvaNastrayastriMshatamA vaha || 1.45.2
priyamedhavadatrivajjAtavedo virUpavat |a~Ngirasvanmahivrata praskaNvasya shrudhI havam || 1.45.3
mahikerava Utaye priyamedhA ahUShata |rAjantamadhvarANAmagniM shukreNa shochiShA || 1.45.4
ghR^itAhavana santyemA u Shu shrudhI giraH |yAbhiH kaNvasya sUnavo havante.avase tvA || 1.45.5
tvAM chitrashravastama havante vikShu jantavaH |shochiShkeshaM purupriyAgne havyAya voLhave || 1.45.6
ni tvA hotAramR^itvijaM dadhire vasuvittamam |shrutkarNaM saprathastamaM viprA agne diviShTiShu || 1.45.7
A tvA viprA achuchyavuH sutasomA abhi prayaH |bR^ihadbhA bibhrato haviragne martAya dAshuShe || 1.45.8
prAtaryAvNaH sahaskR^ita somapeyAya santya |ihAdya daivyaM janaM barhirA sAdayA vaso || 1.45.9
arvA~nchaM daivyaM janamagne yakShva sahUtibhiH |ayaM somaH sudAnavastaM pAta tiro/ahnyam || 1.45.10

eSho uShA apUrvyA vyuchChati priyA divaH |stuShe vAmashvinA bR^ihat || 1.46.1
yA dasrA sindhumAtarA manotarA rayINAm |dhiyA devA vasuvidA || 1.46.2
vachyante vAM kakuhAso jUrNAyAmadhi viShTapi |yadvAM ratho vibhiShpatAt || 1.46.3
haviShA jAro apAM piparti papurirnarA |pitA kuTasya charShaNiH || 1.46.4
AdAro vAM matInAM nAsatyA matavachasA |pAtaM somasya dhR^iShNuyA || 1.46.5
yA naH pIparadashvinA jyotiShmatI tamastiraH |tAmasme rAsAthAmiSham || 1.46.6
A no nAvA matInAM yAtaM pArAya gantave |yu~njAthAmashvinA ratham || 1.46.7
aritraM vAM divaspR^ithu tIrthe sindhUnAM rathaH |dhiyA yuyujra indavaH || 1.46.8
divaskaNvAsa indavo vasu sindhUnAM pade |svaM vavriM kuha dhitsathaH || 1.46.9
abhUdu bhA u aMshave hiraNyaM prati sUryaH |vyakhyajjihvayAsitaH || 1.46.10
abhUdu pArametave panthA R^itasya sAdhuyA |adarshi vi srutirdivaH || 1.46.11
tattadidashvinoravo jaritA prati bhUShati |made somasya pipratoH || 1.46.12
vAvasAnA vivasvati somasya pItyA girA |manuShvachChambhU A gatam || 1.46.13
yuvoruShA anu shriyaM parijmanorupAcharat |R^itA vanatho aktubhiH || 1.46.14
ubhA pibatamashvinobhA naH sharma yachChatam |avidriyAbhirUtibhiH || 1.46.15

ayaM vAM madhumattamaH sutaH soma R^itAvR^idhA |tamashvinA pibataM tiro/ahnyaM dhattaM ratnAni dAshuShe || 1.47.1
trivandhureNa trivR^itA supeshasA rathenA yAtamashvinA |kaNvAso vAM brahma kR^iNvantyadhvare teShAM su shR^iNutaM havam || 1.47.2
ashvinA madhumattamaM pAtaM somamR^itAvR^idhA |athAdya dasrA vasu bibhratA rathe dAshvAMsamupa gachChatam || 1.47.3
triShadhasthe barhiShi vishvavedasA madhvA yaj~naM mimikShatam |kaNvAso vAM sutasomA abhidyavo yuvAM havante ashvinA || 1.47.4
yAbhiH kaNvamabhiShTibhiH prAvataM yuvamashvinA |tAbhiH ShvasmA.N avataM shubhaspatI pAtaM somamR^itAvR^idhA || 1.47.5
sudAse dasrA vasu bibhratA rathe pR^ikSho vahatamashvinA |rayiM samudrAduta vA divasparyasme dhattaM puruspR^iham || 1.47.6
yannAsatyA parAvati yadvA stho adhi turvashe |ato rathena suvR^itA na A gataM sAkaM sUryasya rashmibhiH || 1.47.7
arvA~nchA vAM saptayo.adhvarashriyo vahantu savanedupa |iShaM pR^i~nchantA sukR^ite sudAnava A barhiH sIdataM narA || 1.47.8
tena nAsatyA gataM rathena sUryatvachA |yena shashvadUhathurdAshuShe vasu madhvaH somasya pItaye || 1.47.9
ukthebhirarvAgavase purUvasU arkaishcha ni hvayAmahe |shashvatkaNvAnAM sadasi priye hi kaM somaM papathurashvinA || 1.47.10

saha vAmena na uSho vyuchChA duhitardivaH |saha dyumnena bR^ihatA vibhAvari rAyA devi dAsvatI || 1.48.1
ashvAvatIrgomatIrvishvasuvido bhUri chyavanta vastave |udIraya prati mA sUnR^itA uShashchoda rAdho maghonAm || 1.48.2
uvAsoShA uchChAchcha nu devI jIrA rathAnAm |ye asyA AcharaNeShu dadhrire samudre na shravasyavaH || 1.48.3
uSho ye te pra yAmeShu yu~njate mano dAnAya sUrayaH |atrAha tatkaNva eShAM kaNvatamo nAma gR^iNAti nR^iNAm || 1.48.4
A ghA yoSheva sUnaryuShA yAti prabhu~njatI |jarayantI vR^ijanaM padvadIyata utpAtayati pakShiNaH || 1.48.5
vi yA sR^ijati samanaM vyarthinaH padaM na vetyodatI |vayo nakiShTe paptivAMsa Asate vyuShTau vAjinIvati || 1.48.6
eShAyukta parAvataH sUryasyodayanAdadhi |shataM rathebhiH subhagoShA iyaM vi yAtyabhi mAnuShAn || 1.48.7
vishvamasyA nAnAma chakShase jagajjyotiShkR^iNoti sUnarI |apa dveSho maghonI duhitA diva uShA uchChadapa sridhaH || 1.48.8
uSha A bhAhi bhAnunA chandreNa duhitardivaH |AvahantI bhUryasmabhyaM saubhagaM vyuchChantI diviShTiShu || 1.48.9
vishvasya hi prANanaM jIvanaM tve vi yaduchChasi sUnari |sA no rathena bR^ihatA vibhAvari shrudhi chitrAmaghe havam || 1.48.10
uSho vAjaM hi vaMsva yashchitro mAnuShe jane |tenA vaha sukR^ito adhvarA.N upa ye tvA gR^iNanti vahnayaH || 1.48.11
vishvAndevA.N A vaha somapItaye.antarikShAduShastvam |sAsmAsu dhA gomadashvAvadukthyamuSho vAjaM suvIryam || 1.48.12
yasyA rushanto archayaH prati bhadrA adR^ikShata |sA no rayiM vishvavAraM supeshasamuShA dadAtu sugmyam || 1.48.13
ye chiddhi tvAmR^iShayaH pUrva Utaye juhUre.avase mahi |sA naH stomA.N abhi gR^iNIhi rAdhasoShaH shukreNa shochiShA || 1.48.14
uSho yadadya bhAnunA vi dvArAvR^iNavo divaH |pra no yachChatAdavR^ikaM pR^ithu chChardiH pra devi gomatIriShaH || 1.48.15
saM no rAyA bR^ihatA vishvapeshasA mimikShvA samiLAbhirA |saM dyumnena vishvaturoSho mahi saM vAjairvAjinIvati || 1.48.16

uSho bhadrebhirA gahi divashchidrochanAdadhi |vahantvaruNapsava upa tvA somino gR^iham || 1.49.1
supeshasaM sukhaM rathaM yamadhyasthA uShastvam |tenA sushravasaM janaM prAvAdya duhitardivaH || 1.49.2
vayashchitte patatriNo dvipachchatuShpadarjuni |uShaH prArannR^itU.Nranu divo antebhyaspari || 1.49.3
vyuchChantI hi rashmibhirvishvamAbhAsi rochanam |tAM tvAmuSharvasUyavo gIrbhiH kaNvA ahUShata || 1.49.4

udu tyaM jAtavedasaM devaM vahanti ketavaH |dR^ishe vishvAya sUryam || 1.50.1
apa tye tAyavo yathA nakShatrA yantyaktubhiH |sUrAya vishvachakShase || 1.50.2
adR^ishramasya ketavo vi rashmayo janA.N anu |bhrAjanto agnayo yathA || 1.50.3
taraNirvishvadarshato jyotiShkR^idasi sUrya |vishvamA bhAsi rochanam || 1.50.4
pratya~NdevAnAM vishaH pratya~N~NudeShi mAnuShAn |pratya~NvishvaM svardR^ishe || 1.50.5
yenA pAvaka chakShasA bhuraNyantaM janA.N anu |tvaM varuNa pashyasi || 1.50.6
vi dyAmeShi rajaspR^ithvahA mimAno aktubhiH |pashya~njanmAni sUrya || 1.50.7
sapta tvA harito rathe vahanti deva sUrya |shochiShkeshaM vichakShaNa || 1.50.8
ayukta sapta shundhyuvaH sUro rathasya naptyaH |tAbhiryAti svayuktibhiH || 1.50.9
udvayaM tamasaspari jyotiShpashyanta uttaram |devaM devatrA sUryamaganma jyotiruttamam || 1.50.10
udyannadya mitramaha ArohannuttarAM divam |hR^idrogaM mama sUrya harimANaM cha nAshaya || 1.50.11
shukeShu me harimANaM ropaNAkAsu dadhmasi |atho hAridraveShu me harimANaM ni dadhmasi || 1.50.12
udagAdayamAdityo vishvena sahasA saha |dviShantaM mahyaM randhayanmo ahaM dviShate radham || 1.50.13

abhi tyaM meShaM puruhUtamR^igmiyamindraM gIrbhirmadatA vasvo arNavam |yasya dyAvo na vicharanti mAnuShA bhuje maMhiShThamabhi vipramarchata || 1.51.1
abhImavanvansvabhiShTimUtayo.antarikShaprAM taviShIbhirAvR^itam |indraM dakShAsa R^ibhavo madachyutaM shatakratuM javanI sUnR^itAruhat || 1.51.2
tvaM gotrama~Ngirobhyo.avR^iNorapotAtraye shatadureShu gAtuvit |sasena chidvimadAyAvaho vasvAjAvadriM vAvasAnasya nartayan || 1.51.3
tvamapAmapidhAnAvR^iNorapAdhArayaH parvate dAnumadvasu |vR^itraM yadindra shavasAvadhIrahimAditsUryaM divyArohayo dR^ishe || 1.51.4
tvaM mAyAbhirapa mAyino.adhamaH svadhAbhirye adhi shuptAvajuhvata |tvaM piprornR^imaNaH prArujaH puraH pra R^ijishvAnaM dasyuhatyeShvAvitha || 1.51.5
tvaM kutsaM shuShNahatyeShvAvithArandhayo.atithigvAya shambaram |mahAntaM chidarbudaM ni kramIH padA sanAdeva dasyuhatyAya jaj~niShe || 1.51.6
tve vishvA taviShI sadhryagghitA tava rAdhaH somapIthAya harShate |tava vajrashchikite bAhvorhito vR^ishchA shatrorava vishvAni vR^iShNyA || 1.51.7
vi jAnIhyAryAnye cha dasyavo barhiShmate randhayA shAsadavratAn |shAkI bhava yajamAnasya choditA vishvettA te sadhamAdeShu chAkana || 1.51.8
anuvratAya randhayannapavratAnAbhUbhirindraH shnathayannanAbhuvaH |vR^iddhasya chidvardhato dyAminakShataH stavAno vamro vi jaghAna saMdihaH || 1.51.9
takShadyatta ushanA sahasA saho vi rodasI majmanA bAdhate shavaH |A tvA vAtasya nR^imaNo manoyuja A pUryamANamavahannabhi shravaH || 1.51.10
mandiShTa yadushane kAvye sachA.N indro va~NkU va~NkutarAdhi tiShThati |ugro yayiM nirapaH srotasAsR^ijadvi shuShNasya dR^iMhitA airayatpuraH || 1.51.11
A smA rathaM vR^iShapANeShu tiShThasi shAryAtasya prabhR^itA yeShu mandase |indra yathA sutasomeShu chAkano.anarvANaM shlokamA rohase divi || 1.51.12
adadA arbhAM mahate vachasyave kakShIvate vR^ichayAmindra sunvate |menAbhavo vR^iShaNashvasya sukrato vishvettA te savaneShu pravAchyA || 1.51.13
indro ashrAyi sudhyo nireke pajreShu stomo duryo na yUpaH |ashvayurgavyU rathayurvasUyurindra idrAyaH kShayati prayantA || 1.51.14
idaM namo vR^iShabhAya svarAje satyashuShmAya tavase.avAchi |asminnindra vR^ijane sarvavIrAH smatsUribhistava sharmansyAma || 1.51.15

tyaM su meShaM mahayA svarvidaM shataM yasya subhvaH sAkamIrate |atyaM na vAjaM havanasyadaM rathamendraM vavR^ityAmavase suvR^iktibhiH || 1.52.1
sa parvato na dharuNeShvachyutaH sahasramUtistaviShIShu vAvR^idhe |indro yadvR^itramavadhInnadIvR^itamubjannarNAMsi jarhR^iShANo andhasA || 1.52.2
sa hi dvaro dvariShu vavra Udhani chandrabudhno madavR^iddho manIShibhiH |indraM tamahve svapasyayA dhiyA maMhiShTharAtiM sa hi paprirandhasaH || 1.52.3
A yaM pR^iNanti divi sadmabarhiShaH samudraM na subhvaH svA abhiShTayaH |taM vR^itrahatye anu tasthurUtayaH shuShmA indramavAtA ahrutapsavaH || 1.52.4
abhi svavR^iShTiM made asya yudhyato raghvIriva pravaNe sasrurUtayaH |indro yadvajrI dhR^iShamANo andhasA bhinadvalasya paridhI.Nriva tritaH || 1.52.5
parIM ghR^iNA charati titviShe shavo.apo vR^itvI rajaso budhnamAshayat |vR^itrasya yatpravaNe durgR^ibhishvano nijaghantha hanvorindra tanyatum || 1.52.6
hradaM na hi tvA nyR^iShantyUrmayo brahmANIndra tava yAni vardhanA |tvaShTA chitte yujyaM vAvR^idhe shavastatakSha vajramabhibhUtyojasam || 1.52.7
jaghanvA.N u haribhiH sambhR^itakratavindra vR^itraM manuShe gAtuyannapaH |ayachChathA bAhvorvajramAyasamadhArayo divyA sUryaM dR^ishe || 1.52.8
bR^ihatsvashchandramamavadyadukthyamakR^iNvata bhiyasA rohaNaM divaH |yanmAnuShapradhanA indramUtayaH svarnR^iShAcho maruto.amadannanu || 1.52.9
dyaushchidasyAmavA.N aheH svanAdayoyavIdbhiyasA vajra indra te |vR^itrasya yadbadbadhAnasya rodasI made sutasya shavasAbhinachChiraH || 1.52.10
yadinnvindra pR^ithivI dashabhujirahAni vishvA tatananta kR^iShTayaH |atrAha te maghavanvishrutaM saho dyAmanu shavasA barhaNA bhuvat || 1.52.11
tvamasya pAre rajaso vyomanaH svabhUtyojA avase dhR^iShanmanaH |chakR^iShe bhUmiM pratimAnamojaso.apaH svaH paribhUreShyA divam || 1.52.12
tvaM bhuvaH pratimAnaM pR^ithivyA R^iShvavIrasya bR^ihataH patirbhUH |vishvamAprA antarikShaM mahitvA satyamaddhA nakiranyastvAvAn || 1.52.13
na yasya dyAvApR^ithivI anu vyacho na sindhavo rajaso antamAnashuH |nota svavR^iShTiM made asya yudhyata eko anyachchakR^iShe vishvamAnuShak || 1.52.14
Archannatra marutaH sasminnAjau vishve devAso amadannanu tvA |vR^itrasya yadbhR^iShTimatA vadhena ni tvamindra pratyAnaM jaghantha || 1.52.15

nyU Shu vAchaM pra mahe bharAmahe gira indrAya sadane vivasvataH |nU chiddhi ratnaM sasatAmivAvidanna duShTutirdraviNodeShu shasyate || 1.53.1
duro ashvasya dura indra gorasi duro yavasya vasuna inaspatiH |shikShAnaraH pradivo akAmakarshanaH sakhA sakhibhyastamidaM gR^iNImasi || 1.53.2
shachIva indra purukR^iddyumattama tavedidamabhitashchekite vasu |ataH saMgR^ibhyAbhibhUta A bhara mA tvAyato jarituH kAmamUnayIH || 1.53.3
ebhirdyubhiH sumanA ebhirindubhirnirundhAno amatiM gobhirashvinA |indreNa dasyuM darayanta indubhiryutadveShasaH samiShA rabhemahi || 1.53.4
samindra rAyA samiShA rabhemahi saM vAjebhiH purushchandrairabhidyubhiH |saM devyA pramatyA vIrashuShmayA go/agrayAshvAvatyA rabhemahi || 1.53.5
te tvA madA amadantAni vR^iShNyA te somAso vR^itrahatyeShu satpate |yatkArave dasha vR^itrANyaprati barhiShmate ni sahasrANi barhayaH || 1.53.6
yudhA yudhamupa ghedeShi dhR^iShNuyA purA puraM samidaM haMsyojasA |namyA yadindra sakhyA parAvati nibarhayo namuchiM nAma mAyinam || 1.53.7
tvaM kara~njamuta parNayaM vadhIstejiShThayAtithigvasya vartanI |tvaM shatA va~NgR^idasyAbhinatpuro.anAnudaH pariShUtA R^ijishvanA || 1.53.8
tvametA~njanarAj~no dvirdashAbandhunA sushravasopajagmuShaH |ShaShTiM sahasrA navatiM nava shruto ni chakreNa rathyA duShpadAvR^iNak || 1.53.9
tvamAvitha sushravasaM tavotibhistava trAmabhirindra tUrvayANam |tvamasmai kutsamatithigvamAyuM mahe rAj~ne yUne arandhanAyaH || 1.53.10
ya udR^ichIndra devagopAH sakhAyaste shivatamA asAma |tvAM stoShAma tvayA suvIrA drAghIya AyuH prataraM dadhAnAH || 1.53.11

mA no asminmaghavanpR^itsvaMhasi nahi te antaH shavasaH parINashe |akrandayo nadyo roruvadvanA kathA na kShoNIrbhiyasA samArata || 1.54.1
archA shakrAya shAkine shachIvate shR^iNvantamindraM mahayannabhi ShTuhi |yo dhR^iShNunA shavasA rodasI ubhe vR^iShA vR^iShatvA vR^iShabho nyR^i~njate || 1.54.2
archA dive bR^ihate shUShyaM vachaH svakShatraM yasya dhR^iShato dhR^iShanmanaH |bR^ihachChravA asuro barhaNA kR^itaH puro haribhyAM vR^iShabho ratho hi ShaH || 1.54.3
tvaM divo bR^ihataH sAnu kopayo.ava tmanA dhR^iShatA shambaraM bhinat |yanmAyino vrandino mandinA dhR^iShachChitAM gabhastimashaniM pR^itanyasi || 1.54.4
ni yadvR^iNakShi shvasanasya mUrdhani shuShNasya chidvrandino roruvadvanA |prAchInena manasA barhaNAvatA yadadyA chitkR^iNavaH kastvA pari || 1.54.5
tvamAvitha naryaM turvashaM yaduM tvaM turvItiM vayyaM shatakrato |tvaM rathametashaM kR^itvye dhane tvaM puro navatiM dambhayo nava || 1.54.6
sa ghA rAjA satpatiH shUshuvajjano rAtahavyaH prati yaH shAsaminvati |ukthA vA yo abhigR^iNAti rAdhasA dAnurasmA uparA pinvate divaH || 1.54.7
asamaM kShatramasamA manIShA pra somapA apasA santu neme |ye ta indra daduSho vardhayanti mahi kShatraM sthaviraM vR^iShNyaM cha || 1.54.8
tubhyedete bahulA adridugdhAshchamUShadashchamasA indrapAnAH |vyashnuhi tarpayA kAmameShAmathA mano vasudeyAya kR^iShva || 1.54.9
apAmatiShThaddharuNahvaraM tamo.antarvR^itrasya jaThareShu parvataH |abhImindro nadyo vavriNA hitA vishvA anuShThAH pravaNeShu jighnate || 1.54.10
sa shevR^idhamadhi dhA dyumnamasme mahi kShatraM janAShALindra tavyam |rakShA cha no maghonaH pAhi sUrInrAye cha naH svapatyA iShe dhAH || 1.54.11

divashchidasya varimA vi papratha indraM na mahnA pR^ithivI chana prati |bhImastuviShmA~ncharShaNibhya AtapaH shishIte vajraM tejase na vaMsagaH || 1.55.1
so arNavo na nadyaH samudriyaH prati gR^ibhNAti vishritA varImabhiH |indraH somasya pItaye vR^iShAyate sanAtsa yudhma ojasA panasyate || 1.55.2
tvaM tamindra parvataM na bhojase maho nR^imNasya dharmaNAmirajyasi |pra vIryeNa devatAti chekite vishvasmA ugraH karmaNe purohitaH || 1.55.3
sa idvane namasyubhirvachasyate chAru janeShu prabruvANa indriyam |vR^iShA Chandurbhavati haryato vR^iShA kShemeNa dhenAM maghavA yadinvati || 1.55.4
sa inmahAni samithAni majmanA kR^iNoti yudhma ojasA janebhyaH |adhA chana shraddadhati tviShImata indrAya vajraM nighanighnate vadham || 1.55.5
sa hi shravasyuH sadanAni kR^itrimA kShmayA vR^idhAna ojasA vinAshayan |jyotIMShi kR^iNvannavR^ikANi yajyave.ava sukratuH sartavA apaH sR^ijat || 1.55.6
dAnAya manaH somapAvannastu te.arvA~nchA harI vandanashrudA kR^idhi |yamiShThAsaH sArathayo ya indra te na tvA ketA A dabhnuvanti bhUrNayaH || 1.55.7
aprakShitaM vasu bibharShi hastayoraShALhaM sahastanvi shruto dadhe |AvR^itAso.avatAso na kartR^ibhistanUShu te kratava indra bhUrayaH || 1.55.8

eSha pra pUrvIrava tasya chamriSho.atyo na yoShAmudayaMsta bhurvaNiH |dakShaM mahe pAyayate hiraNyayaM rathamAvR^ityA hariyogamR^ibhvasam || 1.56.1
taM gUrtayo nemanniShaH parINasaH samudraM na saMcharaNe saniShyavaH |patiM dakShasya vidathasya nU saho giriM na venA adhi roha tejasA || 1.56.2
sa turvaNirmahA.N areNu pauMsye girerbhR^iShTirna bhrAjate tujA shavaH |yena shuShNaM mAyinamAyaso made dudhra AbhUShu rAmayanni dAmani || 1.56.3
devI yadi taviShI tvAvR^idhotaya indraM siShaktyuShasaM na sUryaH |yo dhR^iShNunA shavasA bAdhate tama iyarti reNuM bR^ihadarhariShvaNiH || 1.56.4
vi yattiro dharuNamachyutaM rajo.atiShThipo diva AtAsu barhaNA |svarmILhe yanmada indra harShyAhanvR^itraM nirapAmaubjo arNavam || 1.56.5
tvaM divo dharuNaM dhiSha ojasA pR^ithivyA indra sadaneShu mAhinaH |tvaM sutasya made ariNA apo vi vR^itrasya samayA pAShyArujaH || 1.56.6

pra maMhiShThAya bR^ihate bR^ihadraye satyashuShmAya tavase matiM bhare |apAmiva pravaNe yasya durdharaM rAdho vishvAyu shavase apAvR^itam || 1.57.1
adha te vishvamanu hAsadiShTaya Apo nimneva savanA haviShmataH |yatparvate na samashIta haryata indrasya vajraH shnathitA hiraNyayaH || 1.57.2
asmai bhImAya namasA samadhvara uSho na shubhra A bharA panIyase |yasya dhAma shravase nAmendriyaM jyotirakAri harito nAyase || 1.57.3
ime ta indra te vayaM puruShTuta ye tvArabhya charAmasi prabhUvaso |nahi tvadanyo girvaNo giraH saghatkShoNIriva prati no harya tadvachaH || 1.57.4
bhUri ta indra vIryaM tava smasyasya stoturmaghavankAmamA pR^iNa |anu te dyaurbR^ihatI vIryaM mama iyaM cha te pR^ithivI nema ojase || 1.57.5
tvaM tamindra parvataM mahAmuruM vajreNa vajrinparvashashchakartitha |avAsR^ijo nivR^itAH sartavA apaH satrA vishvaM dadhiShe kevalaM sahaH || 1.57.6

nU chitsahojA amR^ito ni tundate hotA yaddUto abhavadvivasvataH |vi sAdhiShThebhiH pathibhI rajo mama A devatAtA haviShA vivAsati || 1.58.1
A svamadma yuvamAno ajarastR^iShvaviShyannataseShu tiShThati |atyo na pR^iShThaM pruShitasya rochate divo na sAnu stanayannachikradat || 1.58.2
krANA rudrebhirvasubhiH purohito hotA niShatto rayiShALamartyaH |ratho na vikShvR^i~njasAna AyuShu vyAnuShagvAryA deva R^iNvati || 1.58.3
vi vAtajUto ataseShu tiShThate vR^ithA juhUbhiH sR^iNyA tuviShvaNiH |tR^iShu yadagne vanino vR^iShAyase kR^iShNaM ta ema rushadUrme ajara || 1.58.4
tapurjambho vana A vAtachodito yUthe na sAhvA.N ava vAti vaMsagaH |abhivrajannakShitaM pAjasA rajaH sthAtushcharathaM bhayate patatriNaH || 1.58.5
dadhuShTvA bhR^igavo mAnuSheShvA rayiM na chAruM suhavaM janebhyaH |hotAramagne atithiM vareNyaM mitraM na shevaM divyAya janmane || 1.58.6
hotAraM sapta juhvo yajiShThaM yaM vAghato vR^iNate adhvareShu |agniM vishveShAmaratiM vasUnAM saparyAmi prayasA yAmi ratnam || 1.58.7
achChidrA sUno sahaso no adya stotR^ibhyo mitramahaH sharma yachCha |agne gR^iNantamaMhasa uruShyorjo napAtpUrbhirAyasIbhiH || 1.58.8
bhavA varUthaM gR^iNate vibhAvo bhavA maghavanmaghavadbhyaH sharma |uruShyAgne aMhaso gR^iNantaM prAtarmakShU dhiyAvasurjagamyAt || 1.58.9

vayA idagne agnayaste anye tve vishve amR^itA mAdayante |vaishvAnara nAbhirasi kShitInAM sthUNeva janA.N upamidyayantha || 1.59.1
mUrdhA divo nAbhiragniH pR^ithivyA athAbhavadaratI rodasyoH |taM tvA devAso.ajanayanta devaM vaishvAnara jyotiridAryAya || 1.59.2
A sUrye na rashmayo dhruvAso vaishvAnare dadhire.agnA vasUni |yA parvateShvoShadhIShvapsu yA mAnuSheShvasi tasya rAjA || 1.59.3
bR^ihatI iva sUnave rodasI giro hotA manuShyo na dakShaH |svarvate satyashuShmAya pUrvIrvaishvAnarAya nR^itamAya yahvIH || 1.59.4
divashchitte bR^ihato jAtavedo vaishvAnara pra ririche mahitvam |rAjA kR^iShTInAmasi mAnuShINAM yudhA devebhyo varivashchakartha || 1.59.5
pra nU mahitvaM vR^iShabhasya vochaM yaM pUravo vR^itrahaNaM sachante |vaishvAnaro dasyumagnirjaghanvA.N adhUnotkAShThA ava shambaraM bhet || 1.59.6
vaishvAnaro mahimnA vishvakR^iShTirbharadvAjeShu yajato vibhAvA |shAtavaneye shatinIbhiragniH puruNIthe jarate sUnR^itAvAn || 1.59.7

vahniM yashasaM vidathasya ketuM suprAvyaM dUtaM sadyo/artham |dvijanmAnaM rayimiva prashastaM rAtiM bharadbhR^igave mAtarishvA || 1.60.1
asya shAsurubhayAsaH sachante haviShmanta ushijo ye cha martAH |divashchitpUrvo nyasAdi hotApR^ichChyo vishpatirvikShu vedhAH || 1.60.2
taM navyasI hR^ida A jAyamAnamasmatsukIrtirmadhujihvamashyAH |yamR^itvijo vR^ijane mAnuShAsaH prayasvanta Ayavo jIjananta || 1.60.3
ushikpAvako vasurmAnuSheShu vareNyo hotAdhAyi vikShu |damUnA gR^ihapatirdama A.N agnirbhuvadrayipatI rayINAm || 1.60.4
taM tvA vayaM patimagne rayINAM pra shaMsAmo matibhirgotamAsaH |AshuM na vAjambharaM marjayantaH prAtarmakShU dhiyAvasurjagamyAt || 1.60.5

asmA idu pra tavase turAya prayo na harmi stomaM mAhinAya |R^ichIShamAyAdhrigava ohamindrAya brahmANi rAtatamA || 1.61.1
asmA idu praya iva pra yaMsi bharAmyA~NgUShaM bAdhe suvR^ikti |indrAya hR^idA manasA manIShA pratnAya patye dhiyo marjayanta || 1.61.2
asmA idu tyamupamaM svarShAM bharAmyA~NgUShamAsyena |maMhiShThamachChoktibhirmatInAM suvR^iktibhiH sUriM vAvR^idhadhyai || 1.61.3
asmA idu stomaM saM hinomi rathaM na taShTeva tatsinAya |girashcha girvAhase suvR^iktIndrAya vishvaminvaM medhirAya || 1.61.4
asmA idu saptimiva shravasyendrAyArkaM juhvA sama~nje |vIraM dAnaukasaM vandadhyai purAM gUrtashravasaM darmANam || 1.61.5
asmA idu tvaShTA takShadvajraM svapastamaM svaryaM raNAya |vR^itrasya chidvidadyena marma tujannIshAnastujatA kiyedhAH || 1.61.6
asyedu mAtuH savaneShu sadyo mahaH pituM papivA~nchArvannA |muShAyadviShNuH pachataM sahIyAnvidhyadvarAhaM tiro adrimastA || 1.61.7
asmA idu gnAshchiddevapatnIrindrAyArkamahihatya UvuH |pari dyAvApR^ithivI jabhra urvI nAsya te mahimAnaM pari ShTaH || 1.61.8
asyedeva pra ririche mahitvaM divaspR^ithivyAH paryantarikShAt |svarALindro dama A vishvagUrtaH svariramatro vavakShe raNAya || 1.61.9
asyedeva shavasA shuShantaM vi vR^ishchadvajreNa vR^itramindraH |gA na vrANA avanIramu~nchadabhi shravo dAvane sachetAH || 1.61.10
asyedu tveShasA ranta sindhavaH pari yadvajreNa sImayachChat |IshAnakR^iddAshuShe dashasyanturvItaye gAdhaM turvaNiH kaH || 1.61.11
asmA idu pra bharA tUtujAno vR^itrAya vajramIshAnaH kiyedhAH |gorna parva vi radA tirashcheShyannarNAMsyapAM charadhyai || 1.61.12
asyedu pra brUhi pUrvyANi turasya karmANi navya ukthaiH |yudhe yadiShNAna AyudhAnyR^ighAyamANo niriNAti shatrUn || 1.61.13
asyedu bhiyA girayashcha dR^iLhA dyAvA cha bhUmA januShastujete |upo venasya joguvAna oNiM sadyo bhuvadvIryAya nodhAH || 1.61.14
asmA idu tyadanu dAyyeShAmeko yadvavne bhUrerIshAnaH |praitashaM sUrye paspR^idhAnaM sauvashvye suShvimAvadindraH || 1.61.15
evA te hAriyojanA suvR^iktIndra brahmANi gotamAso akran |aiShu vishvapeshasaM dhiyaM dhAH prAtarmakShU dhiyAvasurjagamyAt || 1.61.16

pra manmahe shavasAnAya shUShamA~NgUShaM girvaNase a~Ngirasvat |suvR^iktibhiH stuvata R^igmiyAyArchAmArkaM nare vishrutAya || 1.62.1
pra vo mahe mahi namo bharadhvamA~NgUShyaM shavasAnAya sAma |yenA naH pUrve pitaraH padaj~nA archanto a~Ngiraso gA avindan || 1.62.2
indrasyA~NgirasAM cheShTau vidatsaramA tanayAya dhAsim |bR^ihaspatirbhinadadriM vidadgAH samusriyAbhirvAvashanta naraH || 1.62.3
sa suShTubhA sa stubhA sapta vipraiH svareNAdriM svaryo navagvaiH |saraNyubhiH phaligamindra shakra valaM raveNa darayo dashagvaiH || 1.62.4
gR^iNAno a~Ngirobhirdasma vi varuShasA sUryeNa gobhirandhaH |vi bhUmyA aprathaya indra sAnu divo raja uparamastabhAyaH || 1.62.5
tadu prayakShatamamasya karma dasmasya chArutamamasti daMsaH |upahvare yaduparA apinvanmadhvarNaso nadyashchatasraH || 1.62.6
dvitA vi vavre sanajA sanILe ayAsyaH stavamAnebhirarkaiH |bhago na mene parame vyomannadhArayadrodasI sudaMsAH || 1.62.7
sanAddivaM pari bhUmA virUpe punarbhuvA yuvatI svebhirevaiH |kR^iShNebhiraktoShA rushadbhirvapurbhirA charato anyAnyA || 1.62.8
sanemi sakhyaM svapasyamAnaH sUnurdAdhAra shavasA sudaMsAH |AmAsu chiddadhiShe pakvamantaH payaH kR^iShNAsu rushadrohiNIShu || 1.62.9
sanAtsanILA avanIravAtA vratA rakShante amR^itAH sahobhiH |purU sahasrA janayo na patnIrduvasyanti svasAro ahrayANam || 1.62.10
sanAyuvo namasA navyo arkairvasUyavo matayo dasma dadruH |patiM na patnIrushatIrushantaM spR^ishanti tvA shavasAvanmanIShAH || 1.62.11
sanAdeva tava rAyo gabhastau na kShIyante nopa dasyanti dasma |dyumA.N asi kratumA.N indra dhIraH shikShA shachIvastava naH shachIbhiH || 1.62.12
sanAyate gotama indra navyamatakShadbrahma hariyojanAya |sunIthAya naH shavasAna nodhAH prAtarmakShU dhiyAvasurjagamyAt || 1.62.13

tvaM mahA.N indra yo ha shuShmairdyAvA jaj~nAnaH pR^ithivI ame dhAH |yaddha te vishvA girayashchidabhvA bhiyA dR^iLhAsaH kiraNA naijan || 1.63.1
A yaddharI indra vivratA verA te vajraM jaritA bAhvordhAt |yenAviharyatakrato amitrAnpura iShNAsi puruhUta pUrvIH || 1.63.2
tvaM satya indra dhR^iShNuretAntvamR^ibhukShA naryastvaM ShAT |tvaM shuShNaM vR^ijane pR^ikSha ANau yUne kutsAya dyumate sachAhan || 1.63.3
tvaM ha tyadindra chodIH sakhA vR^itraM yadvajrinvR^iShakarmannubhnAH |yaddha shUra vR^iShamaNaH parAchairvi dasyU.NryonAvakR^ito vR^ithAShAT || 1.63.4
tvaM ha tyadindrAriShaNyandR^iLhasya chinmartAnAmajuShTau |vyasmadA kAShThA arvate varghaneva vajri~nChnathihyamitrAn || 1.63.5
tvAM ha tyadindrArNasAtau svarmILhe nara AjA havante |tava svadhAva iyamA samarya UtirvAjeShvatasAyyA bhUt || 1.63.6
tvaM ha tyadindra sapta yudhyanpuro vajrinpurukutsAya dardaH |barhirna yatsudAse vR^ithA vargaMho rAjanvarivaH pUrave kaH || 1.63.7
tvaM tyAM na indra deva chitrAmiShamApo na pIpayaH parijman |yayA shUra pratyasmabhyaM yaMsi tmanamUrjaM na vishvadha kSharadhyai || 1.63.8
akAri ta indra gotamebhirbrahmANyoktA namasA haribhyAm |supeshasaM vAjamA bharA naH prAtarmakShU dhiyAvasurjagamyAt || 1.63.9

vR^iShNe shardhAya sumakhAya vedhase nodhaH suvR^iktiM pra bharA marudbhyaH |apo na dhIro manasA suhastyo giraH sama~nje vidatheShvAbhuvaH || 1.64.1
te jaj~nire diva R^iShvAsa ukShaNo rudrasya maryA asurA arepasaH |pAvakAsaH shuchayaH sUryA iva satvAno na drapsino ghoravarpasaH || 1.64.2
yuvAno rudrA ajarA abhogghano vavakShuradhrigAvaH parvatA iva |dR^iLhA chidvishvA bhuvanAni pArthivA pra chyAvayanti divyAni majmanA || 1.64.3
chitraira~njibhirvapuShe vya~njate vakShassu rukmA.N adhi yetire shubhe |aMseShveShAM ni mimR^ikShurR^iShTayaH sAkaM jaj~nire svadhayA divo naraH || 1.64.4
IshAnakR^ito dhunayo rishAdaso vAtAnvidyutastaviShIbhirakrata |duhantyUdhardivyAni dhUtayo bhUmiM pinvanti payasA parijrayaH || 1.64.5
pinvantyapo marutaH sudAnavaH payo ghR^itavadvidatheShvAbhuvaH |atyaM na mihe vi nayanti vAjinamutsaM duhanti stanayantamakShitam || 1.64.6
mahiShAso mAyinashchitrabhAnavo girayo na svatavaso raghuShyadaH |mR^igA iva hastinaH khAdathA vanA yadAruNIShu taviShIrayugdhvam || 1.64.7
siMhA iva nAnadati prachetasaH pishA iva supisho vishvavedasaH |kShapo jinvantaH pR^iShatIbhirR^iShTibhiH samitsabAdhaH shavasAhimanyavaH || 1.64.8
rodasI A vadatA gaNashriyo nR^iShAchaH shUrAH shavasAhimanyavaH |A vandhureShvamatirna darshatA vidyunna tasthau maruto ratheShu vaH || 1.64.9
vishvavedaso rayibhiH samokasaH sammishlAsastaviShIbhirvirapshinaH |astAra iShuM dadhire gabhastyoranantashuShmA vR^iShakhAdayo naraH || 1.64.10
hiraNyayebhiH pavibhiH payovR^idha ujjighnanta Apathyo na parvatAn |makhA ayAsaH svasR^ito dhruvachyuto dudhrakR^ito maruto bhrAjadR^iShTayaH || 1.64.11
ghR^iShuM pAvakaM vaninaM vicharShaNiM rudrasya sUnuM havasA gR^iNImasi |rajasturaM tavasaM mArutaM gaNamR^ijIShiNaM vR^iShaNaM sashchata shriye || 1.64.12
pra nU sa martaH shavasA janA.N ati tasthau va UtI maruto yamAvata |arvadbhirvAjaM bharate dhanA nR^ibhirApR^ichChyaM kratumA kSheti puShyati || 1.64.13
charkR^ityaM marutaH pR^itsu duShTaraM dyumantaM shuShmaM maghavatsu dhattana |dhanaspR^itamukthyaM vishvacharShaNiM tokaM puShyema tanayaM shataM himAH || 1.64.14
nU ShThiraM maruto vIravantamR^itIShAhaM rayimasmAsu dhatta |sahasriNaM shatinaM shUshuvAMsaM prAtarmakShU dhiyAvasurjagamyAt || 1.64.15

pashvA na tAyuM guhA chatantaM namo yujAnaM namo vahantam || 1.65.1
sajoShA dhIrAH padairanu gmannupa tvA sIdanvishve yajatrAH || 1.65.2
R^itasya devA anu vratA gurbhuvatpariShTirdyaurna bhUma || 1.65.3
vardhantImApaH panvA sushishvimR^itasya yonA garbhe sujAtam || 1.65.4
puShTirna raNvA kShitirna pR^ithvI girirna bhujma kShodo na shambhu || 1.65.5
atyo nAjmansargaprataktaH sindhurna kShodaH ka IM varAte || 1.65.6
jAmiH sindhUnAM bhrAteva svasrAmibhyAnna rAjA vanAnyatti || 1.65.7
yadvAtajUto vanA vyasthAdagnirha dAti romA pR^ithivyAH || 1.65.8
shvasityapsu haMso na sIdankratvA chetiShTho vishAmuSharbhut || 1.65.9
somo na vedhA R^itaprajAtaH pashurna shishvA vibhurdUrebhAH || 1.65.10

rayirna chitrA sUro na saMdR^igAyurna prANo nityo na sUnuH || 1.66.1
takvA na bhUrNirvanA siShakti payo na dhenuH shuchirvibhAvA || 1.66.2
dAdhAra kShemamoko na raNvo yavo na pakvo jetA janAnAm || 1.66.3
R^iShirna stubhvA vikShu prashasto vAjI na prIto vayo dadhAti || 1.66.4
durokashochiH kraturna nityo jAyeva yonAvaraM vishvasmai || 1.66.5
chitro yadabhrAT Chveto na vikShu ratho na rukmI tveShaH samatsu || 1.66.6
seneva sR^iShTAmaM dadhAtyasturna didyuttveShapratIkA || 1.66.7
yamo ha jAto yamo janitvaM jAraH kanInAM patirjanInAm || 1.66.8
taM vashcharAthA vayaM vasatyAstaM na gAvo nakShanta iddham || 1.66.9
sindhurna kShodaH pra nIchIrainonnavanta gAvaH svardR^ishIke || 1.66.10

vaneShu jAyurmarteShu mitro vR^iNIte shruShTiM rAjevAjuryam || 1.67.1
kShemo na sAdhuH kraturna bhadro bhuvatsvAdhIrhotA havyavAT || 1.67.2
haste dadhAno nR^imNA vishvAnyame devAndhAdguhA niShIdan || 1.67.3
vidantImatra naro dhiyaMdhA hR^idA yattaShTAnmantrA.N ashaMsan || 1.67.4
ajo na kShAM dAdhAra pR^ithivIM tastambha dyAM mantrebhiH satyaiH || 1.67.5
priyA padAni pashvo ni pAhi vishvAyuragne guhA guhaM gAH || 1.67.6
ya IM chiketa guhA bhavantamA yaH sasAda dhArAmR^itasya || 1.67.7
vi ye chR^itantyR^itA sapanta AdidvasUni pra vavAchAsmai || 1.67.8
vi yo vIrutsu rodhanmahitvota prajA uta prasUShvantaH || 1.67.9
chittirapAM dame vishvAyuH sadmeva dhIrAH sammAya chakruH || 1.67.10

shrINannupa sthAddivaM bhuraNyuH sthAtushcharathamaktUnvyUrNot || 1.68.1
pari yadeShAmeko vishveShAM bhuvaddevo devAnAM mahitvA || 1.68.2
Aditte vishve kratuM juShanta shuShkAdyaddeva jIvo janiShThAH || 1.68.3
bhajanta vishve devatvaM nAma R^itaM sapanto amR^itamevaiH || 1.68.4
R^itasya preShA R^itasya dhItirvishvAyurvishve apAMsi chakruH || 1.68.5
yastubhyaM dAshAdyo vA te shikShAttasmai chikitvAnrayiM dayasva || 1.68.6
hotA niShatto manorapatye sa chinnvAsAM patI rayINAm || 1.68.7
ichChanta reto mithastanUShu saM jAnata svairdakShairamUrAH || 1.68.8
piturna putrAH kratuM juShanta shroShanye asya shAsaM turAsaH || 1.68.9
vi rAya aurNodduraH purukShuH pipesha nAkaM stR^ibhirdamUnAH || 1.68.10

shukraH shushukvA.N uSho na jAraH paprA samIchI divo na jyotiH || 1.69.1
pari prajAtaH kratvA babhUtha bhuvo devAnAM pitA putraH san || 1.69.2
vedhA adR^ipto agnirvijAnannUdharna gonAM svAdmA pitUnAm || 1.69.3
jane na sheva AhUryaH sanmadhye niShatto raNvo duroNe || 1.69.4
putro na jAto raNvo duroNe vAjI na prIto visho vi tArIt || 1.69.5
visho yadahve nR^ibhiH sanILA agnirdevatvA vishvAnyashyAH || 1.69.6
nakiShTa etA vratA minanti nR^ibhyo yadebhyaH shruShTiM chakartha || 1.69.7
tattu te daMso yadahansamAnairnR^ibhiryadyukto vive rapAMsi || 1.69.8
uSho na jAro vibhAvosraH saMj~nAtarUpashchiketadasmai || 1.69.9
tmanA vahanto duro vyR^iNvannavanta vishve svardR^ishIke || 1.69.10

vanema pUrvIraryo manIShA agniH sushoko vishvAnyashyAH || 1.70.1
A daivyAni vratA chikitvAnA mAnuShasya janasya janma || 1.70.2
garbho yo apAM garbho vanAnAM garbhashcha sthAtAM garbhashcharathAm || 1.70.3
adrau chidasmA antarduroNe vishAM na vishvo amR^itaH svAdhIH || 1.70.4
sa hi kShapAvA.N agnI rayINAM dAshadyo asmA araM sUktaiH || 1.70.5
etA chikitvo bhUmA ni pAhi devAnAM janma martA.Nshcha vidvAn || 1.70.6
vardhAnyaM pUrvIH kShapo virUpAH sthAtushcha rathamR^itapravItam || 1.70.7
arAdhi hotA svarniShattaH kR^iNvanvishvAnyapAMsi satyA || 1.70.8
goShu prashastiM vaneShu dhiShe bharanta vishve baliM svarNaH || 1.70.9
vi tvA naraH purutrA saparyanpiturna jivrervi vedo bharanta || 1.70.10
sAdhurna gR^idhnurasteva shUro yAteva bhImastveShaH samatsu || 1.70.11

upa pra jinvannushatIrushantaM patiM na nityaM janayaH sanILAH |svasAraH shyAvImaruShImajuShra~nchitramuchChantImuShasaM na gAvaH || 1.71.1
vILu chiddR^iLhA pitaro na ukthairadriM rujanna~Ngiraso raveNa |chakrurdivo bR^ihato gAtumasme ahaH svarvividuH ketumusrAH || 1.71.2
dadhannR^itaM dhanayannasya dhItimAdidaryo didhiShvo vibhR^itrAH |atR^iShyantIrapaso yantyachChA devA~njanma prayasA vardhayantIH || 1.71.3
mathIdyadIM vibhR^ito mAtarishvA gR^ihegR^ihe shyeto jenyo bhUt |AdIM rAj~ne na sahIyase sachA sannA dUtyaM bhR^igavANo vivAya || 1.71.4
mahe yatpitra IM rasaM dive karava tsaratpR^ishanyashchikitvAn |sR^ijadastA dhR^iShatA didyumasmai svAyAM devo duhitari tviShiM dhAt || 1.71.5
sva A yastubhyaM dama A vibhAti namo vA dAshAdushato anu dyUn |vardho agne vayo asya dvibarhA yAsadrAyA sarathaM yaM junAsi || 1.71.6
agniM vishvA abhi pR^ikShaH sachante samudraM na sravataH sapta yahvIH |na jAmibhirvi chikite vayo no vidA deveShu pramatiM chikitvAn || 1.71.7
A yadiShe nR^ipatiM teja AnaT Chuchi reto niShiktaM dyaurabhIke |agniH shardhamanavadyaM yuvAnaM svAdhyaM janayatsUdayachcha || 1.71.8
mano na yo.adhvanaH sadya etyekaH satrA sUro vasva Ishe |rAjAnA mitrAvaruNA supANI goShu priyamamR^itaM rakShamANA || 1.71.9
mA no agne sakhyA pitryANi pra marShiShThA abhi viduShkaviH san |nabho na rUpaM jarimA minAti purA tasyA abhishasteradhIhi || 1.71.10

ni kAvyA vedhasaH shashvataskarhaste dadhAno naryA purUNi |agnirbhuvadrayipatI rayINAM satrA chakrANo amR^itAni vishvA || 1.72.1
asme vatsaM pari ShantaM na vindannichChanto vishve amR^itA amUrAH |shramayuvaH padavyo dhiyaMdhAstasthuH pade parame chArvagneH || 1.72.2
tisro yadagne sharadastvAmichChuchiM ghR^itena shuchayaH saparyAn |nAmAni chiddadhire yaj~niyAnyasUdayanta tanvaH sujAtAH || 1.72.3
A rodasI bR^ihatI vevidAnAH pra rudriyA jabhrire yaj~niyAsaH |vidanmarto nemadhitA chikitvAnagniM pade parame tasthivAMsam || 1.72.4
saMjAnAnA upa sIdannabhij~nu patnIvanto namasyaM namasyan |ririkvAMsastanvaH kR^iNvata svAH sakhA sakhyurnimiShi rakShamANAH || 1.72.5
triH sapta yadguhyAni tve itpadAvidannihitA yaj~niyAsaH |tebhI rakShante amR^itaM sajoShAH pashU~ncha sthAtR^I~ncharathaM cha pAhi || 1.72.6
vidvA.N agne vayunAni kShitInAM vyAnuShakChurudho jIvase dhAH |antarvidvA.N adhvano devayAnAnatandro dUto abhavo havirvAT || 1.72.7
svAdhyo diva A sapta yahvI rAyo duro vyR^itaj~nA ajAnan |vidadgavyaM saramA dR^iLhamUrvaM yenA nu kaM mAnuShI bhojate viT || 1.72.8
A ye vishvA svapatyAni tasthuH kR^iNvAnAso amR^itatvAya gAtum |mahnA mahadbhiH pR^ithivI vi tasthe mAtA putrairaditirdhAyase veH || 1.72.9
adhi shriyaM ni dadhushchArumasmindivo yadakShI amR^itA akR^iNvan |adha kSharanti sindhavo na sR^iShTAH pra nIchIragne aruShIrajAnan || 1.72.10

rayirna yaH pitR^ivitto vayodhAH supraNItishchikituSho na shAsuH |syonashIratithirna prINAno hoteva sadma vidhato vi tArIt || 1.73.1
devo na yaH savitA satyamanmA kratvA nipAti vR^ijanAni vishvA |puruprashasto amatirna satya Atmeva shevo didhiShAyyo bhUt || 1.73.2
devo na yaH pR^ithivIM vishvadhAyA upakSheti hitamitro na rAjA |puraHsadaH sharmasado na vIrA anavadyA patijuShTeva nArI || 1.73.3
taM tvA naro dama A nityamiddhamagne sachanta kShitiShu dhruvAsu |adhi dyumnaM ni dadhurbhUryasminbhavA vishvAyurdharuNo rayINAm || 1.73.4
vi pR^ikSho agne maghavAno ashyurvi sUrayo dadato vishvamAyuH |sanema vAjaM samitheShvaryo bhAgaM deveShu shravase dadhAnAH || 1.73.5
R^itasya hi dhenavo vAvashAnAH smadUdhnIH pIpayanta dyubhaktAH |parAvataH sumatiM bhikShamANA vi sindhavaH samayA sasruradrim || 1.73.6
tve agne sumatiM bhikShamANA divi shravo dadhire yaj~niyAsaH |naktA cha chakruruShasA virUpe kR^iShNaM cha varNamaruNaM cha saM dhuH || 1.73.7
yAnrAye martAnsuShUdo agne te syAma maghavAno vayaM cha |ChAyeva vishvaM bhuvanaM sisakShyApaprivAnrodasI antarikSham || 1.73.8
arvadbhiragne arvato nR^ibhirnR^InvIrairvIrAnvanuyAmA tvotAH |IshAnAsaH pitR^ivittasya rAyo vi sUrayaH shatahimA no ashyuH || 1.73.9
etA te agna uchathAni vedho juShTAni santu manase hR^ide cha |shakema rAyaH sudhuro yamaM te.adhi shravo devabhaktaM dadhAnAH || 1.73.10

upaprayanto adhvaraM mantraM vochemAgnaye |Are asme cha shR^iNvate || 1.74.1
yaH snIhitIShu pUrvyaH saMjagmAnAsu kR^iShTiShu |arakShaddAshuShe gayam || 1.74.2
uta bruvantu jantava udagnirvR^itrahAjani |dhanaMjayo raNeraNe || 1.74.3
yasya dUto asi kShaye veShi havyAni vItaye |dasmatkR^iNoShyadhvaram || 1.74.4
tamitsuhavyama~NgiraH sudevaM sahaso yaho |janA AhuH subarhiSham || 1.74.5
A cha vahAsi tA.N iha devA.N upa prashastaye |havyA sushchandra vItaye || 1.74.6
na yorupabdirashvyaH shR^iNve rathasya kachchana |yadagne yAsi dUtyam || 1.74.7
tvoto vAjyahrayo.abhi pUrvasmAdaparaH |pra dAshvA.N agne asthAt || 1.74.8
uta dyumatsuvIryaM bR^ihadagne vivAsasi |devebhyo deva dAshuShe || 1.74.9

juShasva saprathastamaM vacho devapsarastamam |havyA juhvAna Asani || 1.75.1
athA te a~NgirastamAgne vedhastama priyam |vochema brahma sAnasi || 1.75.2
kaste jAmirjanAnAmagne ko dAshvadhvaraH |ko ha kasminnasi shritaH || 1.75.3
tvaM jAmirjanAnAmagne mitro asi priyaH |sakhA sakhibhya IDyaH || 1.75.4
