bhUrINi hi tve dadhire anIkAgne devasya yajyavo janAsaH |sa A vaha devatAtiM yaviShTha shardho yadadya divyaM yajAsi || 3.19.4
yattvA hotAramanajanmiyedhe niShAdayanto yajathAya devAH |sa tvaM no agne.aviteha bodhyadhi shravAMsi dhehi nastanUShu || 3.19.5

agnimuShasamashvinA dadhikrAM vyuShTiShu havate vahnirukthaiH |sujyotiSho naH shR^iNvantu devAH sajoShaso adhvaraM vAvashAnAH || 3.20.1
agne trI te vAjinA trI ShadhasthA tisraste jihvA R^itajAta pUrvIH |tisra u te tanvo devavAtAstAbhirnaH pAhi giro aprayuchChan || 3.20.2
agne bhUrINi tava jAtavedo deva svadhAvo.amR^itasya nAma |yAshcha mAyA mAyinAM vishvaminva tve pUrvIH saMdadhuH pR^iShTabandho || 3.20.3
agnirnetA bhaga iva kShitInAM daivInAM deva R^itupA R^itAvA |sa vR^itrahA sanayo vishvavedAH parShadvishvAti duritA gR^iNantam || 3.20.4
dadhikrAmagnimuShasaM cha devIM bR^ihaspatiM savitAraM cha devam |ashvinA mitrAvaruNA bhagaM cha vasUnrudrA.N AdityA.N iha huve || 3.20.5

imaM no yaj~namamR^iteShu dhehImA havyA jAtavedo juShasva |stokAnAmagne medaso ghR^itasya hotaH prAshAna prathamo niShadya || 3.21.1
ghR^itavantaH pAvaka te stokAH shchotanti medasaH |svadharmandevavItaye shreShThaM no dhehi vAryam || 3.21.2
tubhyaM stokA ghR^itashchuto.agne viprAya santya |R^iShiH shreShThaH samidhyase yaj~nasya prAvitA bhava || 3.21.3
tubhyaM shchotantyadhrigo shachIvaH stokAso agne medaso ghR^itasya |kavishasto bR^ihatA bhAnunAgA havyA juShasva medhira || 3.21.4
ojiShThaM te madhyato meda udbhR^itaM pra te vayaM dadAmahe |shchotanti te vaso stokA adhi tvachi prati tAndevasho vihi || 3.21.5

ayaM so agniryasminsomamindraH sutaM dadhe jaThare vAvashAnaH |sahasriNaM vAjamatyaM na saptiM sasavAnsanstUyase jAtavedaH || 3.22.1
agne yatte divi varchaH pR^ithivyAM yadoShadhIShvapsvA yajatra |yenAntarikShamurvAtatantha tveShaH sa bhAnurarNavo nR^ichakShAH || 3.22.2
agne divo arNamachChA jigAsyachChA devA.N UchiShe dhiShNyA ye |yA rochane parastAtsUryasya yAshchAvastAdupatiShThanta ApaH || 3.22.3
purIShyAso agnayaH prAvaNebhiH sajoShasaH |juShantAM yaj~namadruho.anamIvA iSho mahIH || 3.22.4
iLAmagne purudaMsaM saniM goH shashvattamaM havamAnAya sAdha |syAnnaH sUnustanayo vijAvAgne sA te sumatirbhUtvasme || 3.22.5

nirmathitaH sudhita A sadhasthe yuvA kaviradhvarasya praNetA |jUryatsvagnirajaro vaneShvatrA dadhe amR^itaM jAtavedAH || 3.23.1
amanthiShTAM bhAratA revadagniM devashravA devavAtaH sudakSham |agne vi pashya bR^ihatAbhi rAyeShAM no netA bhavatAdanu dyUn || 3.23.2
dasha kShipaH pUrvyaM sImajIjanansujAtaM mAtR^iShu priyam |agniM stuhi daivavAtaM devashravo yo janAnAmasadvashI || 3.23.3
ni tvA dadhe vara A pR^ithivyA iLAyAspade sudinatve ahnAm |dR^iShadvatyAM mAnuSha ApayAyAM sarasvatyAM revadagne didIhi || 3.23.4
iLAmagne purudaMsaM saniM goH shashvattamaM havamAnAya sAdha |syAnnaH sUnustanayo vijAvAgne sA te sumatirbhUtvasme || 3.23.5

agne sahasva pR^itanA abhimAtIrapAsya |duShTarastarannarAtIrvarcho dhA yaj~navAhase || 3.24.1
agna iLA samidhyase vItihotro amartyaH |juShasva sU no adhvaram || 3.24.2
agne dyumnena jAgR^ive sahasaH sUnavAhuta |edaM barhiH sado mama || 3.24.3
agne vishvebhiragnibhirdevebhirmahayA giraH |yaj~neShu ya u chAyavaH || 3.24.4
agne dA dAshuShe rayiM vIravantaM parINasam |shishIhi naH sUnumataH || 3.24.5

agne divaH sUnurasi prachetAstanA pR^ithivyA uta vishvavedAH |R^idhagdevA.N iha yajA chikitvaH || 3.25.1
agniH sanoti vIryANi vidvAnsanoti vAjamamR^itAya bhUShan |sa no devA.N eha vahA purukSho || 3.25.2
agnirdyAvApR^ithivI vishvajanye A bhAti devI amR^ite amUraH |kShayanvAjaiH purushchandro namobhiH || 3.25.3
agna indrashcha dAshuSho duroNe sutAvato yaj~namihopa yAtam |amardhantA somapeyAya devA || 3.25.4
agne apAM samidhyase duroNe nityaH sUno sahaso jAtavedaH |sadhasthAni mahayamAna UtI || 3.25.5

vaishvAnaraM manasAgniM nichAyyA haviShmanto anuShatyaM svarvidam |sudAnuM devaM rathiraM vasUyavo gIrbhI raNvaM kushikAso havAmahe || 3.26.1
taM shubhramagnimavase havAmahe vaishvAnaraM mAtarishvAnamukthyam |bR^ihaspatiM manuSho devatAtaye vipraM shrotAramatithiM raghuShyadam || 3.26.2
ashvo na kranda~njanibhiH samidhyate vaishvAnaraH kushikebhiryugeyuge |sa no agniH suvIryaM svashvyaM dadhAtu ratnamamR^iteShu jAgR^iviH || 3.26.3
pra yantu vAjAstaviShIbhiragnayaH shubhe sammishlAH pR^iShatIrayukShata |bR^ihadukSho maruto vishvavedasaH pra vepayanti parvatA.N adAbhyAH || 3.26.4
agnishriyo maruto vishvakR^iShTaya A tveShamugramava Imahe vayam |te svAnino rudriyA varShanirNijaH siMhA na heShakratavaH sudAnavaH || 3.26.5
vrAtaMvrAtaM gaNaMgaNaM sushastibhiragnerbhAmaM marutAmoja Imahe |pR^iShadashvAso anavabhrarAdhaso gantAro yaj~naM vidatheShu dhIrAH || 3.26.6
agnirasmi janmanA jAtavedA ghR^itaM me chakShuramR^itaM ma Asan |arkastridhAtU rajaso vimAno.ajasro gharmo havirasmi nAma || 3.26.7
tribhiH pavitrairapupoddhyarkaM hR^idA matiM jyotiranu prajAnan |varShiShThaM ratnamakR^ita svadhAbhirAdiddyAvApR^ithivI paryapashyat || 3.26.8
shatadhAramutsamakShIyamANaM vipashchitaM pitaraM vaktvAnAm |meLiM madantaM pitrorupasthe taM rodasI pipR^itaM satyavAcham || 3.26.9

pra vo vAjA abhidyavo haviShmanto ghR^itAchyA |devA~njigAti sumnayuH || 3.27.1
ILe agniM vipashchitaM girA yaj~nasya sAdhanam |shruShTIvAnaM dhitAvAnam || 3.27.2
agne shakema te vayaM yamaM devasya vAjinaH |ati dveShAMsi tarema || 3.27.3
samidhyamAno adhvare.agniH pAvaka IDyaH |shochiShkeshastamImahe || 3.27.4
pR^ithupAjA amartyo ghR^itanirNiksvAhutaH |agniryaj~nasya havyavAT || 3.27.5
taM sabAdho yatasrucha itthA dhiyA yaj~navantaH |A chakruragnimUtaye || 3.27.6
hotA devo amartyaH purastAdeti mAyayA |vidathAni prachodayan || 3.27.7
vAjI vAjeShu dhIyate.adhvareShu pra NIyate |vipro yaj~nasya sAdhanaH || 3.27.8
dhiyA chakre vareNyo bhUtAnAM garbhamA dadhe |dakShasya pitaraM tanA || 3.27.9
ni tvA dadhe vareNyaM dakShasyeLA sahaskR^ita |agne sudItimushijam || 3.27.10
agniM yanturamapturamR^itasya yoge vanuShaH |viprA vAjaiH samindhate || 3.27.11
Urjo napAtamadhvare dIdivAMsamupa dyavi |agnimILe kavikratum || 3.27.12
ILenyo namasyastirastamAMsi darshataH |samagniridhyate vR^iShA || 3.27.13
vR^iSho agniH samidhyate.ashvo na devavAhanaH |taM haviShmanta ILate || 3.27.14
vR^iShaNaM tvA vayaM vR^iShanvR^iShaNaH samidhImahi |agne dIdyataM bR^ihat || 3.27.15

agne juShasva no haviH puroLAshaM jAtavedaH |prAtaHsAve dhiyAvaso || 3.28.1
puroLA agne pachatastubhyaM vA ghA pariShkR^itaH |taM juShasva yaviShThya || 3.28.2
agne vIhi puroLAshamAhutaM tiro/ahnyam |sahasaH sUnurasyadhvare hitaH || 3.28.3
mAdhyaMdine savane jAtavedaH puroLAshamiha kave juShasva |agne yahvasya tava bhAgadheyaM na pra minanti vidatheShu dhIrAH || 3.28.4
agne tR^itIye savane hi kAniShaH puroLAshaM sahasaH sUnavAhutam |athA deveShvadhvaraM vipanyayA dhA ratnavantamamR^iteShu jAgR^ivim || 3.28.5
agne vR^idhAna AhutiM puroLAshaM jAtavedaH |juShasva tiro/ahnyam || 3.28.6

astIdamadhimanthanamasti prajananaM kR^itam |etAM vishpatnImA bharAgniM manthAma pUrvathA || 3.29.1
araNyornihito jAtavedA garbha iva sudhito garbhiNIShu |divediva IDyo jAgR^ivadbhirhaviShmadbhirmanuShyebhiragniH || 3.29.2
uttAnAyAmava bharA chikitvAnsadyaH pravItA vR^iShaNaM jajAna |aruShastUpo rushadasya pAja iLAyAsputro vayune.ajaniShTa || 3.29.3
iLAyAstvA pade vayaM nAbhA pR^ithivyA adhi |jAtavedo ni dhImahyagne havyAya voLhave || 3.29.4
manthatA naraH kavimadvayantaM prachetasamamR^itaM supratIkam |yaj~nasya ketuM prathamaM purastAdagniM naro janayatA sushevam || 3.29.5
yadI manthanti bAhubhirvi rochate.ashvo na vAjyaruSho vaneShvA |chitro na yAmannashvinoranivR^itaH pari vR^iNaktyashmanastR^iNA dahan || 3.29.6
jAto agnI rochate chekitAno vAjI vipraH kavishastaH sudAnuH |yaM devAsa IDyaM vishvavidaM havyavAhamadadhuradhvareShu || 3.29.7
sIda hotaH sva u loke chikitvAnsAdayA yaj~naM sukR^itasya yonau |devAvIrdevAnhaviShA yajAsyagne bR^ihadyajamAne vayo dhAH || 3.29.8
kR^iNota dhUmaM vR^iShaNaM sakhAyo.asredhanta itana vAjamachCha |ayamagniH pR^itanAShAT suvIro yena devAso asahanta dasyUn || 3.29.9
ayaM te yonirR^itviyo yato jAto arochathAH |taM jAnannagna A sIdAthA no vardhayA giraH || 3.29.10
tanUnapAduchyate garbha Asuro narAshaMso bhavati yadvijAyate |mAtarishvA yadamimIta mAtari vAtasya sargo abhavatsarImaNi || 3.29.11
sunirmathA nirmathitaH sunidhA nihitaH kaviH |agne svadhvarA kR^iNu devAndevayate yaja || 3.29.12
ajIjanannamR^itaM martyAso.asremANaM taraNiM vILujambham |dasha svasAro agruvaH samIchIH pumAMsaM jAtamabhi saM rabhante || 3.29.13
pra saptahotA sanakAdarochata mAturupasthe yadashochadUdhani |na ni miShati suraNo divedive yadasurasya jaTharAdajAyata || 3.29.14
amitrAyudho marutAmiva prayAH prathamajA brahmaNo vishvamidviduH |dyumnavadbrahma kushikAsa erira eka/eko dame agniM samIdhire || 3.29.15
yadadya tvA prayati yaj~ne asminhotashchikitvo.avR^iNImahIha |dhruvamayA dhruvamutAshamiShThAH prajAnanvidvA.N upa yAhi somam || 3.29.16

ichChanti tvA somyAsaH sakhAyaH sunvanti somaM dadhati prayAMsi |titikShante abhishastiM janAnAmindra tvadA kashchana hi praketaH || 3.30.1
na te dUre paramA chidrajAMsyA tu pra yAhi harivo haribhyAm |sthirAya vR^iShNe savanA kR^itemA yuktA grAvANaH samidhAne agnau || 3.30.2
indraH sushipro maghavA tarutro mahAvrAtastuvikUrmirR^ighAvAn |yadugro dhA bAdhito martyeShu kva tyA te vR^iShabha vIryANi || 3.30.3
tvaM hi ShmA chyAvayannachyutAnyeko vR^itrA charasi jighnamAnaH |tava dyAvApR^ithivI parvatAso.anu vratAya nimiteva tasthuH || 3.30.4
utAbhaye puruhUta shravobhireko dR^iLhamavado vR^itrahA san |ime chidindra rodasI apAre yatsaMgR^ibhNA maghavankAshiritte || 3.30.5
pra sU ta indra pravatA haribhyAM pra te vajraH pramR^iNannetu shatrUn |jahi pratIcho anUchaH parAcho vishvaM satyaM kR^iNuhi viShTamastu || 3.30.6
yasmai dhAyuradadhA martyAyAbhaktaM chidbhajate gehyaM saH |bhadrA ta indra sumatirghR^itAchI sahasradAnA puruhUta rAtiH || 3.30.7
sahadAnuM puruhUta kShiyantamahastamindra saM piNakkuNArum |abhi vR^itraM vardhamAnaM piyArumapAdamindra tavasA jaghantha || 3.30.8
ni sAmanAmiShirAmindra bhUmiM mahImapArAM sadane sasattha |astabhnAddyAM vR^iShabho antarikShamarShantvApastvayeha prasUtAH || 3.30.9
alAtR^iNo vala indra vrajo goH purA hantorbhayamAno vyAra |sugAnpatho akR^iNonniraje gAH prAvanvANIH puruhUtaM dhamantIH || 3.30.10
eko dve vasumatI samIchI indra A paprau pR^ithivImuta dyAm |utAntarikShAdabhi naH samIka iSho rathIH sayujaH shUra vAjAn || 3.30.11
dishaH sUryo na minAti pradiShTA divedive haryashvaprasUtAH |saM yadAnaLadhvana AdidashvairvimochanaM kR^iNute tattvasya || 3.30.12
didR^ikShanta uShaso yAmannaktorvivasvatyA mahi chitramanIkam |vishve jAnanti mahinA yadAgAdindrasya karma sukR^itA purUNi || 3.30.13
mahi jyotirnihitaM vakShaNAsvAmA pakvaM charati bibhratI gauH |vishvaM svAdma sambhR^itamusriyAyAM yatsImindro adadhAdbhojanAya || 3.30.14
indra dR^ihya yAmakoshA abhUvanyaj~nAya shikSha gR^iNate sakhibhyaH |durmAyavo durevA martyAso niSha~NgiNo ripavo hantvAsaH || 3.30.15
saM ghoShaH shR^iNve.avamairamitrairjahI nyeShvashaniM tapiShThAm |vR^ishchemadhastAdvi rujA sahasva jahi rakSho maghavanrandhayasva || 3.30.16
udvR^iha rakShaH sahamUlamindra vR^ishchA madhyaM pratyagraM shR^iNIhi |A kIvataH salalUkaM chakartha brahmadviShe tapuShiM hetimasya || 3.30.17
svastaye vAjibhishcha praNetaH saM yanmahIriSha Asatsi pUrvIH |rAyo vantAro bR^ihataH syAmAsme astu bhaga indra prajAvAn || 3.30.18
A no bhara bhagamindra dyumantaM ni te deShNasya dhImahi prareke |Urva iva paprathe kAmo asme tamA pR^iNa vasupate vasUnAm || 3.30.19
imaM kAmaM mandayA gobhirashvaishchandravatA rAdhasA paprathashcha |svaryavo matibhistubhyaM viprA indrAya vAhaH kushikAso akran || 3.30.20
A no gotrA dardR^ihi gopate gAH samasmabhyaM sanayo yantu vAjAH |divakShA asi vR^iShabha satyashuShmo.asmabhyaM su maghavanbodhi godAH || 3.30.21
shunaM huvema maghavAnamindramasminbhare nR^itamaM vAjasAtau |shR^iNvantamugramUtaye samatsu ghnantaM vR^itrANi saMjitaM dhanAnAm || 3.30.22

shAsadvahnirduhiturnaptyaM gAdvidvA.N R^itasya dIdhitiM saparyan |pitA yatra duhituH sekamR^i~njansaM shagmyena manasA dadhanve || 3.31.1
na jAmaye tAnvo rikthamAraikchakAra garbhaM saniturnidhAnam |yadI mAtaro janayanta vahnimanyaH kartA sukR^itoranya R^indhan || 3.31.2
agnirjaj~ne juhvA rejamAno mahasputrA.N aruShasya prayakShe |mahAngarbho mahyA jAtameShAM mahI pravR^iddharyashvasya yaj~naiH || 3.31.3
abhi jaitrIrasachanta spR^idhAnaM mahi jyotistamaso nirajAnan |taM jAnatIH pratyudAyannuShAsaH patirgavAmabhavadeka indraH || 3.31.4
vILau satIrabhi dhIrA atR^indanprAchAhinvanmanasA sapta viprAH |vishvAmavindanpathyAmR^itasya prajAnannittA namasA vivesha || 3.31.5
vidadyadI saramA rugNamadrermahi pAthaH pUrvyaM sadhryakkaH |agraM nayatsupadyakSharANAmachChA ravaM prathamA jAnatI gAt || 3.31.6
agachChadu vipratamaH sakhIyannasUdayatsukR^ite garbhamadriH |sasAna maryo yuvabhirmakhasyannathAbhavada~NgirAH sadyo archan || 3.31.7
sataHsataH pratimAnaM purobhUrvishvA veda janimA hanti shuShNam |pra No divaH padavIrgavyurarchansakhA sakhI.Nramu~nchanniravadyAt || 3.31.8
ni gavyatA manasA sedurarkaiH kR^iNvAnAso amR^itatvAya gAtum |idaM chinnu sadanaM bhUryeShAM yena mAsA.N asiShAsannR^itena || 3.31.9
sampashyamAnA amadannabhi svaM payaH pratnasya retaso dughAnAH |vi rodasI atapadghoSha eShAM jAte niShThAmadadhurgoShu vIrAn || 3.31.10
sa jAtebhirvR^itrahA sedu havyairudusriyA asR^ijadindro arkaiH |urUchyasmai ghR^itavadbharantI madhu svAdma duduhe jenyA gauH || 3.31.11
pitre chichchakruH sadanaM samasmai mahi tviShImatsukR^ito vi hi khyan |viShkabhnantaH skambhanenA janitrI AsInA UrdhvaM rabhasaM vi minvan || 3.31.12
mahI yadi dhiShaNA shishnathe dhAtsadyovR^idhaM vibhvaM rodasyoH |giro yasminnanavadyAH samIchIrvishvA indrAya taviShIranuttAH || 3.31.13
mahyA te sakhyaM vashmi shaktIrA vR^itraghne niyuto yanti pUrvIH |mahi stotramava Aganma sUrerasmAkaM su maghavanbodhi gopAH || 3.31.14
mahi kShetraM puru shchandraM vividvAnAditsakhibhyashcharathaM samairat |indro nR^ibhirajanaddIdyAnaH sAkaM sUryamuShasaM gAtumagnim || 3.31.15
apashchideSha vibhvo damUnAH pra sadhrIchIrasR^ijadvishvashchandrAH |madhvaH punAnAH kavibhiH pavitrairdyubhirhinvantyaktubhirdhanutrIH || 3.31.16
anu kR^iShNe vasudhitI jihAte ubhe sUryasya maMhanA yajatre |pari yatte mahimAnaM vR^ijadhyai sakhAya indra kAmyA R^ijipyAH || 3.31.17
patirbhava vR^itrahansUnR^itAnAM girAM vishvAyurvR^iShabho vayodhAH |A no gahi sakhyebhiH shivebhirmahAnmahIbhirUtibhiH saraNyan || 3.31.18
tama~NgirasvannamasA saparyannavyaM kR^iNomi sanyase purAjAm |druho vi yAhi bahulA adevIH svashcha no maghavansAtaye dhAH || 3.31.19
mihaH pAvakAH pratatA abhUvansvasti naH pipR^ihi pAramAsAm |indra tvaM rathiraH pAhi no riSho makShUmakShU kR^iNuhi gojito naH || 3.31.20
adediShTa vR^itrahA gopatirgA antaH kR^iShNA.N aruShairdhAmabhirgAt |pra sUnR^itA dishamAna R^itena durashcha vishvA avR^iNodapa svAH || 3.31.21
shunaM huvema maghavAnamindramasminbhare nR^itamaM vAjasAtau |shR^iNvantamugramUtaye samatsu ghnantaM vR^itrANi saMjitaM dhanAnAm || 3.31.22

indra somaM somapate pibemaM mAdhyaMdinaM savanaM chAru yatte |prapruthyA shipre maghavannR^ijIShinvimuchyA harI iha mAdayasva || 3.32.1
gavAshiraM manthinamindra shukraM pibA somaM rarimA te madAya |brahmakR^itA mArutenA gaNena sajoShA rudraistR^ipadA vR^iShasva || 3.32.2
ye te shuShmaM ye taviShImavardhannarchanta indra marutasta ojaH |mAdhyaMdine savane vajrahasta pibA rudrebhiH sagaNaH sushipra || 3.32.3
ta innvasya madhumadvivipra indrasya shardho maruto ya Asan |yebhirvR^itrasyeShito vivedAmarmaNo manyamAnasya marma || 3.32.4
manuShvadindra savanaM juShANaH pibA somaM shashvate vIryAya |sa A vavR^itsva haryashva yaj~naiH saraNyubhirapo arNA sisarShi || 3.32.5
tvamapo yaddha vR^itraM jaghanvA.N atyA.N iva prAsR^ijaH sartavAjau |shayAnamindra charatA vadhena vavrivAMsaM pari devIradevam || 3.32.6
yajAma innamasA vR^iddhamindraM bR^ihantamR^iShvamajaraM yuvAnam |yasya priye mamaturyaj~niyasya na rodasI mahimAnaM mamAte || 3.32.7
indrasya karma sukR^itA purUNi vratAni devA na minanti vishve |dAdhAra yaH pR^ithivIM dyAmutemAM jajAna sUryamuShasaM sudaMsAH || 3.32.8
adrogha satyaM tava tanmahitvaM sadyo yajjAto apibo ha somam |na dyAva indra tavasasta ojo nAhA na mAsAH sharado varanta || 3.32.9
tvaM sadyo apibo jAta indra madAya somaM parame vyoman |yaddha dyAvApR^ithivI AviveshIrathAbhavaH pUrvyaH kArudhAyAH || 3.32.10
ahannahiM parishayAnamarNa ojAyamAnaM tuvijAta tavyAn |na te mahitvamanu bhUdadha dyauryadanyayA sphigyA kShAmavasthAH || 3.32.11
yaj~no hi ta indra vardhano bhUduta priyaH sutasomo miyedhaH |yaj~nena yaj~namava yaj~niyaH sanyaj~naste vajramahihatya Avat || 3.32.12
yaj~nenendramavasA chakre arvAgainaM sumnAya navyase vavR^ityAm |yaH stomebhirvAvR^idhe pUrvyebhiryo madhyamebhiruta nUtanebhiH || 3.32.13
viveSha yanmA dhiShaNA jajAna stavai purA pAryAdindramahnaH |aMhaso yatra pIparadyathA no nAveva yAntamubhaye havante || 3.32.14
ApUrNo asya kalashaH svAhA sekteva koshaM sisiche pibadhyai |samu priyA AvavR^itranmadAya pradakShiNidabhi somAsa indram || 3.32.15
na tvA gabhIraH puruhUta sindhurnAdrayaH pari Shanto varanta |itthA sakhibhya iShito yadindrA dR^iLhaM chidarujo gavyamUrvam || 3.32.16
shunaM huvema maghavAnamindramasminbhare nR^itamaM vAjasAtau |shR^iNvantamugramUtaye samatsu ghnantaM vR^itrANi saMjitaM dhanAnAm || 3.32.17

pra parvatAnAmushatI upasthAdashve iva viShite hAsamAne |gAveva shubhre mAtarA rihANe vipAT ChutudrI payasA javete || 3.33.1
indreShite prasavaM bhikShamANe achChA samudraM rathyeva yAthaH |samArANe UrmibhiH pinvamAne anyA vAmanyAmapyeti shubhre || 3.33.2
achChA sindhuM mAtR^itamAmayAsaM vipAshamurvIM subhagAmaganma |vatsamiva mAtarA saMrihANe samAnaM yonimanu saMcharantI || 3.33.3
enA vayaM payasA pinvamAnA anu yoniM devakR^itaM charantIH |na vartave prasavaH sargataktaH kiMyurvipro nadyo johavIti || 3.33.4
ramadhvaM me vachase somyAya R^itAvarIrupa muhUrtamevaiH |pra sindhumachChA bR^ihatI manIShAvasyurahve kushikasya sUnuH || 3.33.5
indro asmA.N aradadvajrabAhurapAhanvR^itraM paridhiM nadInAm |devo.anayatsavitA supANistasya vayaM prasave yAma urvIH || 3.33.6
pravAchyaM shashvadhA vIryaM tadindrasya karma yadahiM vivR^ishchat |vi vajreNa pariShado jaghAnAyannApo.ayanamichChamAnAH || 3.33.7
etadvacho jaritarmApi mR^iShThA A yatte ghoShAnuttarA yugAni |uktheShu kAro prati no juShasva mA no ni kaH puruShatrA namaste || 3.33.8
o Shu svasAraH kArave shR^iNota yayau vo dUrAdanasA rathena |ni ShU namadhvaM bhavatA supArA adho/akShAH sindhavaH srotyAbhiH || 3.33.9
A te kAro shR^iNavAmA vachAMsi yayAtha dUrAdanasA rathena |ni te naMsai pIpyAneva yoShA maryAyeva kanyA shashvachai te || 3.33.10
yada~Nga tvA bharatAH saMtareyurgavyangrAma iShita indrajUtaH |arShAdaha prasavaH sargatakta A vo vR^iNe sumatiM yaj~niyAnAm || 3.33.11
atAriShurbharatA gavyavaH samabhakta vipraH sumatiM nadInAm |pra pinvadhvamiShayantIH surAdhA A vakShaNAH pR^iNadhvaM yAta shIbham || 3.33.12
udva UrmiH shamyA hantvApo yoktrANi mu~nchata |mAduShkR^itau vyenasAghnyau shUnamAratAm || 3.33.13

indraH pUrbhidAtiraddAsamarkairvidadvasurdayamAno vi shatrUn |brahmajUtastanvA vAvR^idhAno bhUridAtra ApR^iNadrodasI ubhe || 3.34.1
makhasya te taviShasya pra jUtimiyarmi vAchamamR^itAya bhUShan |indra kShitInAmasi mAnuShINAM vishAM daivInAmuta pUrvayAvA || 3.34.2
indro vR^itramavR^iNochChardhanItiH pra mAyinAmaminAdvarpaNItiH |ahanvyaMsamushadhagvaneShvAvirdhenA akR^iNodrAmyANAm || 3.34.3
indraH svarShA janayannahAni jigAyoshigbhiH pR^itanA abhiShTiH |prArochayanmanave ketumahnAmavindajjyotirbR^ihate raNAya || 3.34.4
indrastujo barhaNA A vivesha nR^ivaddadhAno naryA purUNi |achetayaddhiya imA jaritre premaM varNamatirachChukramAsAm || 3.34.5
maho mahAni panayantyasyendrasya karma sukR^itA purUNi |vR^ijanena vR^ijinAnsaM pipeSha mAyAbhirdasyU.NrabhibhUtyojAH || 3.34.6
yudhendro mahnA varivashchakAra devebhyaH satpatishcharShaNiprAH |vivasvataH sadane asya tAni viprA ukthebhiH kavayo gR^iNanti || 3.34.7
satrAsAhaM vareNyaM sahodAM sasavAMsaM svarapashcha devIH |sasAna yaH pR^ithivIM dyAmutemAmindraM madantyanu dhIraNAsaH || 3.34.8
sasAnAtyA.N uta sUryaM sasAnendraH sasAna purubhojasaM gAm |hiraNyayamuta bhogaM sasAna hatvI dasyUnprAryaM varNamAvat || 3.34.9
indra oShadhIrasanodahAni vanaspatI.NrasanodantarikSham |bibheda valaM nunude vivAcho.athAbhavaddamitAbhikratUnAm || 3.34.10
shunaM huvema maghavAnamindramasminbhare nR^itamaM vAjasAtau |shR^iNvantamugramUtaye samatsu ghnantaM vR^itrANi saMjitaM dhanAnAm || 3.34.11

tiShThA harI ratha A yujyamAnA yAhi vAyurna niyuto no achCha |pibAsyandho abhisR^iShTo asme indra svAhA rarimA te madAya || 3.35.1
upAjirA puruhUtAya saptI harI rathasya dhUrShvA yunajmi |dravadyathA sambhR^itaM vishvatashchidupemaM yaj~namA vahAta indram || 3.35.2
upo nayasva vR^iShaNA tapuShpotemava tvaM vR^iShabha svadhAvaH |grasetAmashvA vi mucheha shoNA divedive sadR^ishIraddhi dhAnAH || 3.35.3
brahmaNA te brahmayujA yunajmi harI sakhAyA sadhamAda AshU |sthiraM rathaM sukhamindrAdhitiShThanprajAnanvidvA.N upa yAhi somam || 3.35.4
mA te harI vR^iShaNA vItapR^iShThA ni rIramanyajamAnAso anye |atyAyAhi shashvato vayaM te.araM sutebhiH kR^iNavAma somaiH || 3.35.5
tavAyaM somastvamehyarvA~NChashvattamaM sumanA asya pAhi |asminyaj~ne barhiShyA niShadyA dadhiShvemaM jaThara indumindra || 3.35.6
stIrNaM te barhiH suta indra somaH kR^itA dhAnA attave te haribhyAm |tadokase purushAkAya vR^iShNe marutvate tubhyaM rAtA havIMShi || 3.35.7
imaM naraH parvatAstubhyamApaH samindra gobhirmadhumantamakran |tasyAgatyA sumanA R^iShva pAhi prajAnanvidvAnpathyA anu svAH || 3.35.8
yA.N Abhajo maruta indra some ye tvAmavardhannabhavangaNaste |tebhiretaM sajoShA vAvashAno.agneH piba jihvayA somamindra || 3.35.9
indra piba svadhayA chitsutasyAgnervA pAhi jihvayA yajatra |adhvaryorvA prayataM shakra hastAddhoturvA yaj~naM haviSho juShasva || 3.35.10
shunaM huvema maghavAnamindramasminbhare nR^itamaM vAjasAtau |shR^iNvantamugramUtaye samatsu ghnantaM vR^itrANi saMjitaM dhanAnAm || 3.35.11

imAmU Shu prabhR^itiM sAtaye dhAH shashvachChashvadUtibhiryAdamAnaH |sutesute vAvR^idhe vardhanebhiryaH karmabhirmahadbhiH sushruto bhUt || 3.36.1
indrAya somAH pradivo vidAnA R^ibhuryebhirvR^iShaparvA vihAyAH |prayamyamAnAnprati ShU gR^ibhAyendra piba vR^iShadhUtasya vR^iShNaH || 3.36.2
pibA vardhasva tava ghA sutAsa indra somAsaH prathamA uteme |yathApibaH pUrvyA.N indra somA.N evA pAhi panyo adyA navIyAn || 3.36.3
mahA.N amatro vR^ijane virapshyugraM shavaH patyate dhR^iShNvojaH |nAha vivyAcha pR^ithivI chanainaM yatsomAso haryashvamamandan || 3.36.4
mahA.N ugro vAvR^idhe vIryAya samAchakre vR^iShabhaH kAvyena |indro bhago vAjadA asya gAvaH pra jAyante dakShiNA asya pUrvIH || 3.36.5
pra yatsindhavaH prasavaM yathAyannApaH samudraM rathyeva jagmuH |atashchidindraH sadaso varIyAnyadIM somaH pR^iNati dugdho aMshuH || 3.36.6
samudreNa sindhavo yAdamAnA indrAya somaM suShutaM bharantaH |aMshuM duhanti hastino bharitrairmadhvaH punanti dhArayA pavitraiH || 3.36.7
hradA iva kukShayaH somadhAnAH samI vivyAcha savanA purUNi |annA yadindraH prathamA vyAsha vR^itraM jaghanvA.N avR^iNIta somam || 3.36.8
A tU bhara mAkiretatpari ShThAdvidmA hi tvA vasupatiM vasUnAm |indra yatte mAhinaM datramastyasmabhyaM taddharyashva pra yandhi || 3.36.9
asme pra yandhi maghavannR^ijIShinnindra rAyo vishvavArasya bhUreH |asme shataM sharado jIvase dhA asme vIrA~nChashvata indra shiprin || 3.36.10
shunaM huvema maghavAnamindramasminbhare nR^itamaM vAjasAtau |shR^iNvantamugramUtaye samatsu ghnantaM vR^itrANi saMjitaM dhanAnAm || 3.36.11

vArtrahatyAya shavase pR^itanAShAhyAya cha |indra tvA vartayAmasi || 3.37.1
arvAchInaM su te mana uta chakShuH shatakrato |indra kR^iNvantu vAghataH || 3.37.2
nAmAni te shatakrato vishvAbhirgIrbhirImahe |indrAbhimAtiShAhye || 3.37.3
puruShTutasya dhAmabhiH shatena mahayAmasi |indrasya charShaNIdhR^itaH || 3.37.4
indraM vR^itrAya hantave puruhUtamupa bruve |bhareShu vAjasAtaye || 3.37.5
vAjeShu sAsahirbhava tvAmImahe shatakrato |indra vR^itrAya hantave || 3.37.6
dyumneShu pR^itanAjye pR^itsutUrShu shravassu cha |indra sAkShvAbhimAtiShu || 3.37.7
shuShmintamaM na Utaye dyumninaM pAhi jAgR^ivim |indra somaM shatakrato || 3.37.8
indriyANi shatakrato yA te janeShu pa~nchasu |indra tAni ta A vR^iNe || 3.37.9
agannindra shravo bR^ihaddyumnaM dadhiShva duShTaram |utte shuShmaM tirAmasi || 3.37.10
arvAvato na A gahyatho shakra parAvataH |u loko yaste adriva indreha tata A gahi || 3.37.11

abhi taShTeva dIdhayA manIShAmatyo na vAjI sudhuro jihAnaH |abhi priyANi marmR^ishatparANi kavI.NrichChAmi saMdR^ishe sumedhAH || 3.38.1
inota pR^ichCha janimA kavInAM manodhR^itaH sukR^itastakShata dyAm |imA u te praNyo vardhamAnA manovAtA adha nu dharmaNi gman || 3.38.2
ni ShImidatra guhyA dadhAnA uta kShatrAya rodasI sama~njan |saM mAtrAbhirmamire yemururvI antarmahI samR^ite dhAyase dhuH || 3.38.3
AtiShThantaM pari vishve abhUSha~nChriyo vasAnashcharati svarochiH |mahattadvR^iShNo asurasya nAmA vishvarUpo amR^itAni tasthau || 3.38.4
asUta pUrvo vR^iShabho jyAyAnimA asya shurudhaH santi pUrvIH |divo napAtA vidathasya dhIbhiH kShatraM rAjAnA pradivo dadhAthe || 3.38.5
trINi rAjAnA vidathe purUNi pari vishvAni bhUShathaH sadAMsi |apashyamatra manasA jaganvAnvrate gandharvA.N api vAyukeshAn || 3.38.6
tadinnvasya vR^iShabhasya dhenorA nAmabhirmamire sakmyaM goH |anyadanyadasuryaM vasAnA ni mAyino mamire rUpamasmin || 3.38.7
tadinnvasya saviturnakirme hiraNyayImamatiM yAmashishret |A suShTutI rodasI vishvaminve apIva yoShA janimAni vavre || 3.38.8
yuvaM pratnasya sAdhatho maho yaddaivI svastiH pari NaH syAtam |gopAjihvasya tasthuSho virUpA vishve pashyanti mAyinaH kR^itAni || 3.38.9
shunaM huvema maghavAnamindramasminbhare nR^itamaM vAjasAtau |shR^iNvantamugramUtaye samatsu ghnantaM vR^itrANi saMjitaM dhanAnAm || 3.38.10

indraM matirhR^ida A vachyamAnAchChA patiM stomataShTA jigAti |yA jAgR^ivirvidathe shasyamAnendra yatte jAyate viddhi tasya || 3.39.1
divashchidA pUrvyA jAyamAnA vi jAgR^ivirvidathe shasyamAnA |bhadrA vastrANyarjunA vasAnA seyamasme sanajA pitryA dhIH || 3.39.2
yamA chidatra yamasUrasUta jihvAyA agraM patadA hyasthAt |vapUMShi jAtA mithunA sachete tamohanA tapuSho budhna etA || 3.39.3
nakireShAM ninditA martyeShu ye asmAkaM pitaro goShu yodhAH |indra eShAM dR^iMhitA mAhinAvAnudgotrANi sasR^ije daMsanAvAn || 3.39.4
sakhA ha yatra sakhibhirnavagvairabhij~nvA satvabhirgA anugman |satyaM tadindro dashabhirdashagvaiH sUryaM viveda tamasi kShiyantam || 3.39.5
indro madhu sambhR^itamusriyAyAM padvadviveda shaphavanname goH |guhA hitaM guhyaM gULhamapsu haste dadhe dakShiNe dakShiNAvAn || 3.39.6
jyotirvR^iNIta tamaso vijAnannAre syAma duritAdabhIke |imA giraH somapAH somavR^iddha juShasvendra purutamasya kAroH || 3.39.7
jyotiryaj~nAya rodasI anu ShyAdAre syAma duritasya bhUreH |bhUri chiddhi tujato martyasya supArAso vasavo barhaNAvat || 3.39.8
shunaM huvema maghavAnamindramasminbhare nR^itamaM vAjasAtau |shR^iNvantamugramUtaye samatsu ghnantaM vR^itrANi saMjitaM dhanAnAm || 3.39.9

indra tvA vR^iShabhaM vayaM sute some havAmahe |sa pAhi madhvo andhasaH || 3.40.1
indra kratuvidaM sutaM somaM harya puruShTuta |pibA vR^iShasva tAtR^ipim || 3.40.2
indra pra No dhitAvAnaM yaj~naM vishvebhirdevebhiH |tira stavAna vishpate || 3.40.3
indra somAH sutA ime tava pra yanti satpate |kShayaM chandrAsa indavaH || 3.40.4
dadhiShvA jaThare sutaM somamindra vareNyam |tava dyukShAsa indavaH || 3.40.5
girvaNaH pAhi naH sutaM madhordhArAbhirajyase |indra tvAdAtamidyashaH || 3.40.6
abhi dyumnAni vanina indraM sachante akShitA |pItvI somasya vAvR^idhe || 3.40.7
arvAvato na A gahi parAvatashcha vR^itrahan |imA juShasva no giraH || 3.40.8
yadantarA parAvatamarvAvataM cha hUyase |indreha tata A gahi || 3.40.9

A tU na indra madryagghuvAnaH somapItaye |haribhyAM yAhyadrivaH || 3.41.1
satto hotA na R^itviyastistire barhirAnuShak |ayujranprAtaradrayaH || 3.41.2
imA brahma brahmavAhaH kriyanta A barhiH sIda |vIhi shUra puroLAsham || 3.41.3
rArandhi savaneShu Na eShu stomeShu vR^itrahan |uktheShvindra girvaNaH || 3.41.4
matayaH somapAmuruM rihanti shavasaspatim |indraM vatsaM na mAtaraH || 3.41.5
sa mandasvA hyandhaso rAdhase tanvA mahe |na stotAraM nide karaH || 3.41.6
vayamindra tvAyavo haviShmanto jarAmahe |uta tvamasmayurvaso || 3.41.7
mAre asmadvi mumucho haripriyArvA~NyAhi |indra svadhAvo matsveha || 3.41.8
arvA~nchaM tvA sukhe rathe vahatAmindra keshinA |ghR^itasnU barhirAsade || 3.41.9

upa naH sutamA gahi somamindra gavAshiram |haribhyAM yaste asmayuH || 3.42.1
tamindra madamA gahi barhiHShThAM grAvabhiH sutam |kuvinnvasya tR^ipNavaH || 3.42.2
indramitthA giro mamAchChAguriShitA itaH |AvR^ite somapItaye || 3.42.3
indraM somasya pItaye stomairiha havAmahe |ukthebhiH kuvidAgamat || 3.42.4
indra somAH sutA ime tAndadhiShva shatakrato |jaThare vAjinIvaso || 3.42.5
vidmA hi tvA dhanaMjayaM vAjeShu dadhR^iShaM kave |adhA te sumnamImahe || 3.42.6
imamindra gavAshiraM yavAshiraM cha naH piba |AgatyA vR^iShabhiH sutam || 3.42.7
tubhyedindra sva okye somaM chodAmi pItaye |eSha rArantu te hR^idi || 3.42.8
tvAM sutasya pItaye pratnamindra havAmahe |kushikAso avasyavaH || 3.42.9

A yAhyarvA~Nupa vandhureShThAstavedanu pradivaH somapeyam |priyA sakhAyA vi muchopa barhistvAmime havyavAho havante || 3.43.1
A yAhi pUrvIrati charShaNIrA.N arya AshiSha upa no haribhyAm |imA hi tvA matayaH stomataShTA indra havante sakhyaM juShANAH || 3.43.2
A no yaj~naM namovR^idhaM sajoShA indra deva haribhiryAhi tUyam |ahaM hi tvA matibhirjohavImi ghR^itaprayAH sadhamAde madhUnAm || 3.43.3
A cha tvAmetA vR^iShaNA vahAto harI sakhAyA sudhurA sva~NgA |dhAnAvadindraH savanaM juShANaH sakhA sakhyuH shR^iNavadvandanAni || 3.43.4
kuvinmA gopAM karase janasya kuvidrAjAnaM maghavannR^ijIShin |kuvinma R^iShiM papivAMsaM sutasya kuvinme vasvo amR^itasya shikShAH || 3.43.5
A tvA bR^ihanto harayo yujAnA arvAgindra sadhamAdo vahantu |pra ye dvitA diva R^i~njantyAtAH susammR^iShTAso vR^iShabhasya mUrAH || 3.43.6
indra piba vR^iShadhUtasya vR^iShNa A yaM te shyena ushate jabhAra |yasya made chyAvayasi pra kR^iShTIryasya made apa gotrA vavartha || 3.43.7
shunaM huvema maghavAnamindramasminbhare nR^itamaM vAjasAtau |shR^iNvantamugramUtaye samatsu ghnantaM vR^itrANi saMjitaM dhanAnAm || 3.43.8

ayaM te astu haryataH soma A haribhiH sutaH |juShANa indra haribhirna A gahyA tiShTha haritaM ratham || 3.44.1
haryannuShasamarchayaH sUryaM haryannarochayaH |vidvA.NshchikitvAnharyashva vardhasa indra vishvA abhi shriyaH || 3.44.2
dyAmindro haridhAyasaM pR^ithivIM harivarpasam |adhArayaddharitorbhUri bhojanaM yayorantarharishcharat || 3.44.3
jaj~nAno harito vR^iShA vishvamA bhAti rochanam |haryashvo haritaM dhatta AyudhamA vajraM bAhvorharim || 3.44.4
indro haryantamarjunaM vajraM shukrairabhIvR^itam |apAvR^iNoddharibhiradribhiH sutamudgA haribhirAjata || 3.44.5

A mandrairindra haribhiryAhi mayUraromabhiH |mA tvA ke chinni yamanviM na pAshino.ati dhanveva tA.N ihi || 3.45.1
vR^itrakhAdo valaMrujaH purAM darmo apAmajaH |sthAtA rathasya haryorabhisvara indro dR^iLhA chidArujaH || 3.45.2
gambhIrA.N udadhI.Nriva kratuM puShyasi gA iva |pra sugopA yavasaM dhenavo yathA hradaM kulyA ivAshata || 3.45.3
A nastujaM rayiM bharAMshaM na pratijAnate |vR^ikShaM pakvaM phalama~NkIva dhUnuhIndra sampAraNaM vasu || 3.45.4
svayurindra svarALasi smaddiShTiH svayashastaraH |sa vAvR^idhAna ojasA puruShTuta bhavA naH sushravastamaH || 3.45.5

yudhmasya te vR^iShabhasya svarAja ugrasya yUnaH sthavirasya ghR^iShveH |ajUryato vajriNo vIryANIndra shrutasya mahato mahAni || 3.46.1
mahA.N asi mahiSha vR^iShNyebhirdhanaspR^idugra sahamAno anyAn |eko vishvasya bhuvanasya rAjA sa yodhayA cha kShayayA cha janAn || 3.46.2
pra mAtrAbhI ririche rochamAnaH pra devebhirvishvato apratItaH |pra majmanA diva indraH pR^ithivyAH prorormaho antarikShAdR^ijIShI || 3.46.3
uruM gabhIraM januShAbhyugraM vishvavyachasamavataM matInAm |indraM somAsaH pradivi sutAsaH samudraM na sravata A vishanti || 3.46.4
yaM somamindra pR^ithivIdyAvA garbhaM na mAtA bibhR^itastvAyA |taM te hinvanti tamu te mR^ijantyadhvaryavo vR^iShabha pAtavA u || 3.46.5

marutvA.N indra vR^iShabho raNAya pibA somamanuShvadhaM madAya |A si~nchasva jaThare madhva UrmiM tvaM rAjAsi pradivaH sutAnAm || 3.47.1
sajoShA indra sagaNo marudbhiH somaM piba vR^itrahA shUra vidvAn |jahi shatrU.Nrapa mR^idho nudasvAthAbhayaM kR^iNuhi vishvato naH || 3.47.2
uta R^itubhirR^itupAH pAhi somamindra devebhiH sakhibhiH sutaM naH |yA.N Abhajo maruto ye tvAnvahanvR^itramadadhustubhyamojaH || 3.47.3
ye tvAhihatye maghavannavardhanye shAmbare harivo ye gaviShTau |ye tvA nUnamanumadanti viprAH pibendra somaM sagaNo marudbhiH || 3.47.4
marutvantaM vR^iShabhaM vAvR^idhAnamakavAriM divyaM shAsamindram |vishvAsAhamavase nUtanAyograM sahodAmiha taM huvema || 3.47.5

sadyo ha jAto vR^iShabhaH kanInaH prabhartumAvadandhasaH sutasya |sAdhoH piba pratikAmaM yathA te rasAshiraH prathamaM somyasya || 3.48.1
yajjAyathAstadaharasya kAmeM.ashoH pIyUShamapibo giriShThAm |taM te mAtA pari yoShA janitrI mahaH piturdama Asi~nchadagre || 3.48.2
upasthAya mAtaramannamaiTTa tigmamapashyadabhi somamUdhaH |prayAvayannacharadgR^itso anyAnmahAni chakre purudhapratIkaH || 3.48.3
ugrasturAShALabhibhUtyojA yathAvashaM tanvaM chakra eShaH |tvaShTAramindro januShAbhibhUyAmuShyA somamapibachchamUShu || 3.48.4
shunaM huvema maghavAnamindramasminbhare nR^itamaM vAjasAtau |shR^iNvantamugramUtaye samatsu ghnantaM vR^itrANi saMjitaM dhanAnAm || 3.48.5

shaMsA mahAmindraM yasminvishvA A kR^iShTayaH somapAH kAmamavyan |yaM sukratuM dhiShaNe vibhvataShTaM ghanaM vR^itrANAM janayanta devAH || 3.49.1
yaM nu nakiH pR^itanAsu svarAjaM dvitA tarati nR^itamaM hariShThAm |inatamaH satvabhiryo ha shUShaiH pR^ithujrayA aminAdAyurdasyoH || 3.49.2
sahAvA pR^itsu taraNirnArvA vyAnashI rodasI mehanAvAn |bhago na kAre havyo matInAM piteva chAruH suhavo vayodhAH || 3.49.3
dhartA divo rajasaspR^iShTa Urdhvo ratho na vAyurvasubhirniyutvAn |kShapAM vastA janitA sUryasya vibhaktA bhAgaM dhiShaNeva vAjam || 3.49.4
shunaM huvema maghavAnamindramasminbhare nR^itamaM vAjasAtau |shR^iNvantamugramUtaye samatsu ghnantaM vR^itrANi saMjitaM dhanAnAm || 3.49.5

indraH svAhA pibatu yasya soma AgatyA tumro vR^iShabho marutvAn |oruvyachAH pR^iNatAmebhirannairAsya havistanvaH kAmamR^idhyAH || 3.50.1
A te saparyU javase yunajmi yayoranu pradivaH shruShTimAvaH |iha tvA dheyurharayaH sushipra pibA tvasya suShutasya chAroH || 3.50.2
gobhirmimikShuM dadhire supAramindraM jyaiShThyAya dhAyase gR^iNAnAH |mandAnaH somaM papivA.N R^ijIShinsamasmabhyaM purudhA gA iShaNya || 3.50.3
imaM kAmaM mandayA gobhirashvaishchandravatA rAdhasA paprathashcha |svaryavo matibhistubhyaM viprA indrAya vAhaH kushikAso akran || 3.50.4
shunaM huvema maghavAnamindramasminbhare nR^itamaM vAjasAtau |shR^iNvantamugramUtaye samatsu ghnantaM vR^itrANi saMjitaM dhanAnAm || 3.50.5

charShaNIdhR^itaM maghavAnamukthyamindraM giro bR^ihatIrabhyanUShata |vAvR^idhAnaM puruhUtaM suvR^iktibhiramartyaM jaramANaM divedive || 3.51.1
shatakratumarNavaM shAkinaM naraM giro ma indramupa yanti vishvataH |vAjasaniM pUrbhidaM tUrNimapturaM dhAmasAchamabhiShAchaM svarvidam || 3.51.2
Akare vasorjaritA panasyate.anehasaH stubha indro duvasyati |vivasvataH sadana A hi pipriye satrAsAhamabhimAtihanaM stuhi || 3.51.3
nR^iNAmu tvA nR^itamaM gIrbhirukthairabhi pra vIramarchatA sabAdhaH |saM sahase purumAyo jihIte namo asya pradiva eka Ishe || 3.51.4
pUrvIrasya niShShidho martyeShu purU vasUni pR^ithivI bibharti |indrAya dyAva oShadhIrutApo rayiM rakShanti jIrayo vanAni || 3.51.5
tubhyaM brahmANi gira indra tubhyaM satrA dadhire harivo juShasva |bodhyApiravaso nUtanasya sakhe vaso jaritR^ibhyo vayo dhAH || 3.51.6
indra marutva iha pAhi somaM yathA shAryAte apibaH sutasya |tava praNItI tava shUra sharmannA vivAsanti kavayaH suyaj~nAH || 3.51.7
sa vAvashAna iha pAhi somaM marudbhirindra sakhibhiH sutaM naH |jAtaM yattvA pari devA abhUShanmahe bharAya puruhUta vishve || 3.51.8
aptUrye maruta ApireSho.amandannindramanu dAtivArAH |tebhiH sAkaM pibatu vR^itrakhAdaH sutaM somaM dAshuShaH sve sadhasthe || 3.51.9
idaM hyanvojasA sutaM rAdhAnAM pate |pibA tvasya girvaNaH || 3.51.10
yaste anu svadhAmasatsute ni yachCha tanvam |sa tvA mamattu somyam || 3.51.11
pra te ashnotu kukShyoH prendra brahmaNA shiraH |pra bAhU shUra rAdhase || 3.51.12

dhAnAvantaM karambhiNamapUpavantamukthinam |indra prAtarjuShasva naH || 3.52.1
puroLAshaM pachatyaM juShasvendrA gurasva cha |tubhyaM havyAni sisrate || 3.52.2
puroLAshaM cha no ghaso joShayAse girashcha naH |vadhUyuriva yoShaNAm || 3.52.3
puroLAshaM sanashruta prAtaHsAve juShasva naH |indra kraturhi te bR^ihan || 3.52.4
mAdhyaMdinasya savanasya dhAnAH puroLAshamindra kR^iShveha chArum |pra yatstotA jaritA tUrNyartho vR^iShAyamANa upa gIrbhirITTe || 3.52.5
tR^itIye dhAnAH savane puruShTuta puroLAshamAhutaM mAmahasva naH |R^ibhumantaM vAjavantaM tvA kave prayasvanta upa shikShema dhItibhiH || 3.52.6
pUShaNvate te chakR^imA karambhaM harivate haryashvAya dhAnAH |apUpamaddhi sagaNo marudbhiH somaM piba vR^itrahA shUra vidvAn || 3.52.7
prati dhAnA bharata tUyamasmai puroLAshaM vIratamAya nR^iNAm |divedive sadR^ishIrindra tubhyaM vardhantu tvA somapeyAya dhR^iShNo || 3.52.8

indrAparvatA bR^ihatA rathena vAmIriSha A vahataM suvIrAH |vItaM havyAnyadhvareShu devA vardhethAM gIrbhiriLayA madantA || 3.53.1
tiShThA su kaM maghavanmA parA gAH somasya nu tvA suShutasya yakShi |piturna putraH sichamA rabhe ta indra svAdiShThayA girA shachIvaH || 3.53.2
shaMsAvAdhvaryo prati me gR^iNIhIndrAya vAhaH kR^iNavAva juShTam |edaM barhiryajamAnasya sIdAthA cha bhUdukthamindrAya shastam || 3.53.3
jAyedastaM maghavansedu yonistadittvA yuktA harayo vahantu |yadA kadA cha sunavAma somamagniShTvA dUto dhanvAtyachCha || 3.53.4
parA yAhi maghavannA cha yAhIndra bhrAtarubhayatrA te artham |yatrA rathasya bR^ihato nidhAnaM vimochanaM vAjino rAsabhasya || 3.53.5
apAH somamastamindra pra yAhi kalyANIrjAyA suraNaM gR^ihe te |yatrA rathasya bR^ihato nidhAnaM vimochanaM vAjino dakShiNAvat || 3.53.6
ime bhojA a~Ngiraso virUpA divasputrAso asurasya vIrAH |vishvAmitrAya dadato maghAni sahasrasAve pra tiranta AyuH || 3.53.7
rUpaMrUpaM maghavA bobhavIti mAyAH kR^iNvAnastanvaM pari svAm |triryaddivaH pari muhUrtamAgAtsvairmantrairanR^itupA R^itAvA || 3.53.8
mahA.N R^iShirdevajA devajUto.astabhnAtsindhumarNavaM nR^ichakShAH |vishvAmitro yadavahatsudAsamapriyAyata kushikebhirindraH || 3.53.9
haMsA iva kR^iNutha shlokamadribhirmadanto gIrbhiradhvare sute sachA |devebhirviprA R^iShayo nR^ichakShaso vi pibadhvaM kushikAH somyaM madhu || 3.53.10
upa preta kushikAshchetayadhvamashvaM rAye pra mu~nchatA sudAsaH |rAjA vR^itraM ja~NghanatprAgapAgudagathA yajAte vara A pR^ithivyAH || 3.53.11
ya ime rodasI ubhe ahamindramatuShTavam |vishvAmitrasya rakShati brahmedaM bhArataM janam || 3.53.12
vishvAmitrA arAsata brahmendrAya vajriNe |karadinnaH surAdhasaH || 3.53.13
kiM te kR^iNvanti kIkaTeShu gAvo nAshiraM duhre na tapanti gharmam |A no bhara pramagandasya vedo naichAshAkhaM maghavanrandhayA naH || 3.53.14
sasarparIramatiM bAdhamAnA bR^ihanmimAya jamadagnidattA |A sUryasya duhitA tatAna shravo deveShvamR^itamajuryam || 3.53.15
sasarparIrabharattUyamebhyo.adhi shravaH pA~nchajanyAsu kR^iShTiShu |sA pakShyA navyamAyurdadhAnA yAM me palastijamadagnayo daduH || 3.53.16
sthirau gAvau bhavatAM vILurakSho meShA vi varhi mA yugaM vi shAri |indraH pAtalye dadatAM sharItorariShTaneme abhi naH sachasva || 3.53.17
balaM dhehi tanUShu no balamindrAnaLutsu naH |balaM tokAya tanayAya jIvase tvaM hi baladA asi || 3.53.18
abhi vyayasva khadirasya sAramojo dhehi spandane shiMshapAyAm |akSha vILo vILita vILayasva mA yAmAdasmAdava jIhipo naH || 3.53.19
ayamasmAnvanaspatirmA cha hA mA cha rIriShat |svastyA gR^ihebhya AvasA A vimochanAt || 3.53.20
indrotibhirbahulAbhirno adya yAchChreShThAbhirmaghava~nChUra jinva |yo no dveShTyadharaH saspadIShTa yamu dviShmastamu prANo jahAtu || 3.53.21
parashuM chidvi tapati shimbalaM chidvi vR^ishchati |ukhA chidindra yeShantI prayastA phenamasyati || 3.53.22
na sAyakasya chikite janAso lodhaM nayanti pashu manyamAnAH |nAvAjinaM vAjinA hAsayanti na gardabhaM puro ashvAnnayanti || 3.53.23
ima indra bharatasya putrA apapitvaM chikiturna prapitvam |hinvantyashvamaraNaM na nityaM jyAvAjaM pari NayantyAjau || 3.53.24

imaM mahe vidathyAya shUShaM shashvatkR^itva IDyAya pra jabhruH |shR^iNotu no damyebhiranIkaiH shR^iNotvagnirdivyairajasraH || 3.54.1
mahi mahe dive archA pR^ithivyai kAmo ma ichCha~ncharati prajAnan |yayorha stome vidatheShu devAH saparyavo mAdayante sachAyoH || 3.54.2
yuvorR^itaM rodasI satyamastu mahe Shu NaH suvitAya pra bhUtam |idaM dive namo agne pR^ithivyai saparyAmi prayasA yAmi ratnam || 3.54.3
uto hi vAM pUrvyA Avividra R^itAvarI rodasI satyavAchaH |narashchidvAM samithe shUrasAtau vavandire pR^ithivi vevidAnAH || 3.54.4
ko addhA veda ka iha pra vochaddevA.N achChA pathyA kA sameti |dadR^ishra eShAmavamA sadAMsi pareShu yA guhyeShu vrateShu || 3.54.5
kavirnR^ichakShA abhi ShImachaShTa R^itasya yonA vighR^ite madantI |nAnA chakrAte sadanaM yathA veH samAnena kratunA saMvidAne || 3.54.6
samAnyA viyute dUre/ante dhruve pade tasthaturjAgarUke |uta svasArA yuvatI bhavantI Adu bruvAte mithunAni nAma || 3.54.7
vishvedete janimA saM vivikto maho devAnbibhratI na vyathete |ejaddhruvaM patyate vishvamekaM charatpatatri viShuNaM vi jAtam || 3.54.8
sanA purANamadhyemyArAnmahaH piturjaniturjAmi tannaH |devAso yatra panitAra evairurau pathi vyute tasthurantaH || 3.54.9
imaM stomaM rodasI pra bravImyR^idUdarAH shR^iNavannagnijihvAH |mitraH samrAjo varuNo yuvAna AdityAsaH kavayaH paprathAnAH || 3.54.10
hiraNyapANiH savitA sujihvastrirA divo vidathe patyamAnaH |deveShu cha savitaH shlokamashrerAdasmabhyamA suva sarvatAtim || 3.54.11
sukR^itsupANiH svavA.N R^itAvA devastvaShTAvase tAni no dhAt |pUShaNvanta R^ibhavo mAdayadhvamUrdhvagrAvANo adhvaramataShTa || 3.54.12
vidyudrathA maruta R^iShTimanto divo maryA R^itajAtA ayAsaH |sarasvatI shR^iNavanyaj~niyAso dhAtA rayiM sahavIraM turAsaH || 3.54.13
viShNuM stomAsaH purudasmamarkA bhagasyeva kAriNo yAmani gman |urukramaH kakuho yasya pUrvIrna mardhanti yuvatayo janitrIH || 3.54.14
indro vishvairvIryaiH patyamAna ubhe A paprau rodasI mahitvA |puraMdaro vR^itrahA dhR^iShNuSheNaH saMgR^ibhyA na A bharA bhUri pashvaH || 3.54.15
nAsatyA me pitarA bandhupR^ichChA sajAtyamashvinoshchAru nAma |yuvaM hi stho rayidau no rayINAM dAtraM rakShethe akavairadabdhA || 3.54.16
mahattadvaH kavayashchAru nAma yaddha devA bhavatha vishva indre |sakha R^ibhubhiH puruhUta priyebhirimAM dhiyaM sAtaye takShatA naH || 3.54.17
aryamA No aditiryaj~niyAso.adabdhAni varuNasya vratAni |yuyota no anapatyAni gantoH prajAvAnnaH pashumA.N astu gAtuH || 3.54.18
devAnAM dUtaH purudha prasUto.anAgAnno vochatu sarvatAtA |shR^iNotu naH pR^ithivI dyaurutApaH sUryo nakShatrairurvantarikSham || 3.54.19
shR^iNvantu no vR^iShaNaH parvatAso dhruvakShemAsa iLayA madantaH |Adityairno aditiH shR^iNotu yachChantu no marutaH sharma bhadram || 3.54.20
sadA sugaH pitumA.N astu panthA madhvA devA oShadhIH saM pipR^ikta |bhago me agne sakhye na mR^idhyA udrAyo ashyAM sadanaM purukShoH || 3.54.21
svadasva havyA samiSho didIhyasmadryaksaM mimIhi shravAMsi |vishvA.N agne pR^itsu tA~njeShi shatrUnahA vishvA sumanA dIdihI naH || 3.54.22

uShasaH pUrvA adha yadvyUShurmahadvi jaj~ne akSharaM pade goH |vratA devAnAmupa nu prabhUShanmahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.1
mo ShU No atra juhuranta devA mA pUrve agne pitaraH padaj~nAH |purANyoH sadmanoH keturantarmahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.2
vi me purutrA patayanti kAmAH shamyachChA dIdye pUrvyANi |samiddhe agnAvR^itamidvadema mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.3
samAno rAjA vibhR^itaH purutrA shaye shayAsu prayuto vanAnu |anyA vatsaM bharati kSheti mAtA mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.4
AkShitpUrvAsvaparA anUrutsadyo jAtAsu taruNIShvantaH |antarvatIH suvate apravItA mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.5
shayuH parastAdadha nu dvimAtAbandhanashcharati vatsa ekaH |mitrasya tA varuNasya vratAni mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.6
dvimAtA hotA vidatheShu samrALanvagraM charati kSheti budhnaH |pra raNyAni raNyavAcho bharante mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.7
shUrasyeva yudhyato antamasya pratIchInaM dadR^ishe vishvamAyat |antarmatishcharati niShShidhaM gormahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.8
ni veveti palito dUta AsvantarmahA.Nshcharati rochanena |vapUMShi bibhradabhi no vi chaShTe mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.9
viShNurgopAH paramaM pAti pAthaH priyA dhAmAnyamR^itA dadhAnaH |agniShTA vishvA bhuvanAni veda mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.10
nAnA chakrAte yamyA vapUMShi tayoranyadrochate kR^iShNamanyat |shyAvI cha yadaruShI cha svasArau mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.11
mAtA cha yatra duhitA cha dhenU sabardughe dhApayete samIchI |R^itasya te sadasILe antarmahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.12
anyasyA vatsaM rihatI mimAya kayA bhuvA ni dadhe dhenurUdhaH |R^itasya sA payasApinvateLA mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.13
padyA vaste pururUpA vapUMShyUrdhvA tasthau tryaviM rerihANA |R^itasya sadma vi charAmi vidvAnmahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.14
pade iva nihite dasme antastayoranyadguhyamAviranyat |sadhrIchInA pathyA sA viShUchI mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.15
A dhenavo dhunayantAmashishvIH sabardughAH shashayA apradugdhAH |navyAnavyA yuvatayo bhavantIrmahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.16
yadanyAsu vR^iShabho roravIti so anyasminyUthe ni dadhAti retaH |sa hi kShapAvAnsa bhagaH sa rAjA mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.17
vIrasya nu svashvyaM janAsaH pra nu vochAma vidurasya devAH |ShoLhA yuktAH pa~nchapa~nchA vahanti mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.18
devastvaShTA savitA vishvarUpaH pupoSha prajAH purudhA jajAna |imA cha vishvA bhuvanAnyasya mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.19
mahI samairachchamvA samIchI ubhe te asya vasunA nyR^iShTe |shR^iNve vIro vindamAno vasUni mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.20
imAM cha naH pR^ithivIM vishvadhAyA upa kSheti hitamitro na rAjA |puraHsadaH sharmasado na vIrA mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.21
niShShidhvarIsta oShadhIrutApo rayiM ta indra pR^ithivI bibharti |sakhAyaste vAmabhAjaH syAma mahaddevAnAmasuratvamekam || 3.55.22

na tA minanti mAyino na dhIrA vratA devAnAM prathamA dhruvANi |na rodasI adruhA vedyAbhirna parvatA niname tasthivAMsaH || 3.56.1
ShaDbhArA.N eko acharanbibhartyR^itaM varShiShThamupa gAva AguH |tisro mahIruparAstasthuratyA guhA dve nihite darshyekA || 3.56.2
tripAjasyo vR^iShabho vishvarUpa uta tryudhA purudha prajAvAn |tryanIkaH patyate mAhinAvAnsa retodhA vR^iShabhaH shashvatInAm || 3.56.3
abhIka AsAM padavIrabodhyAdityAnAmahve chAru nAma |ApashchidasmA aramanta devIH pR^ithagvrajantIH pari ShImavR^i~njan || 3.56.4
trI ShadhasthA sindhavastriH kavInAmuta trimAtA vidatheShu samrAT |R^itAvarIryoShaNAstisro apyAstrirA divo vidathe patyamAnAH || 3.56.5
trirA divaH savitarvAryANi divediva A suva trirno ahnaH |tridhAtu rAya A suvA vasUni bhaga trAtardhiShaNe sAtaye dhAH || 3.56.6
trirA divaH savitA soShavIti rAjAnA mitrAvaruNA supANI |Apashchidasya rodasI chidurvI ratnaM bhikShanta savituH savAya || 3.56.7
triruttamA dUNashA rochanAni trayo rAjantyasurasya vIrAH |R^itAvAna iShirA dULabhAsastrirA divo vidathe santu devAH || 3.56.8

pra me vivikvA.N avidanmanIShAM dhenuM charantIM prayutAmagopAm |sadyashchidyA duduhe bhUri dhAserindrastadagniH panitAro asyAH || 3.57.1
indraH su pUShA vR^iShaNA suhastA divo na prItAH shashayaM duduhre |vishve yadasyAM raNayanta devAH pra vo.atra vasavaH sumnamashyAm || 3.57.2
yA jAmayo vR^iShNa ichChanti shaktiM namasyantIrjAnate garbhamasmin |achChA putraM dhenavo vAvashAnA mahashcharanti bibhrataM vapUMShi || 3.57.3
achChA vivakmi rodasI sumeke grAvNo yujAno adhvare manIShA |imA u te manave bhUrivArA UrdhvA bhavanti darshatA yajatrAH || 3.57.4
yA te jihvA madhumatI sumedhA agne deveShUchyata urUchI |tayeha vishvA.N avase yajatrAnA sAdaya pAyayA chA madhUni || 3.57.5
yA te agne parvatasyeva dhArAsashchantI pIpayaddeva chitrA |tAmasmabhyaM pramatiM jAtavedo vaso rAsva sumatiM vishvajanyAm || 3.57.6

dhenuH pratnasya kAmyaM duhAnAntaH putrashcharati dakShiNAyAH |A dyotaniM vahati shubhrayAmoShasaH stomo ashvinAvajIgaH || 3.58.1
suyugvahanti prati vAmR^itenordhvA bhavanti pitareva medhAH |jarethAmasmadvi paNermanIShAM yuvoravashchakR^imA yAtamarvAk || 3.58.2
suyugbhirashvaiH suvR^itA rathena dasrAvimaM shR^iNutaM shlokamadreH |kima~Nga vAM pratyavartiM gamiShThAhurviprAso ashvinA purAjAH || 3.58.3
A manyethAmA gataM kachchidevairvishve janAso ashvinA havante |imA hi vAM goR^ijIkA madhUni pra mitrAso na dadurusro agre || 3.58.4
tiraH purU chidashvinA rajAMsyA~NgUSho vAM maghavAnA janeShu |eha yAtaM pathibhirdevayAnairdasrAvime vAM nidhayo madhUnAm || 3.58.5
purANamokaH sakhyaM shivaM vAM yuvornarA draviNaM jahnAvyAm |punaH kR^iNvAnAH sakhyA shivAni madhvA madema saha nU samAnAH || 3.58.6
ashvinA vAyunA yuvaM sudakShA niyudbhiShcha sajoShasA yuvAnA |nAsatyA tiro/ahnyaM juShANA somaM pibatamasridhA sudAnU || 3.58.7
ashvinA pari vAmiShaH purUchIrIyurgIrbhiryatamAnA amR^idhrAH |ratho ha vAmR^itajA adrijUtaH pari dyAvApR^ithivI yAti sadyaH || 3.58.8
ashvinA madhuShuttamo yuvAkuH somastaM pAtamA gataM duroNe |ratho ha vAM bhUri varpaH karikratsutAvato niShkR^itamAgamiShThaH || 3.58.9

mitro janAnyAtayati bruvANo mitro dAdhAra pR^ithivImuta dyAm |mitraH kR^iShTIranimiShAbhi chaShTe mitrAya havyaM ghR^itavajjuhota || 3.59.1
pra sa mitra marto astu prayasvAnyasta Aditya shikShati vratena |na hanyate na jIyate tvoto nainamaMho ashnotyantito na dUrAt || 3.59.2
anamIvAsa iLayA madanto mitaj~navo varimannA pR^ithivyAH |Adityasya vratamupakShiyanto vayaM mitrasya sumatau syAma || 3.59.3
ayaM mitro namasyaH sushevo rAjA sukShatro ajaniShTa vedhAH |tasya vayaM sumatau yaj~niyasyApi bhadre saumanase syAma || 3.59.4
mahA.N Adityo namasopasadyo yAtayajjano gR^iNate sushevaH |tasmA etatpanyatamAya juShTamagnau mitrAya havirA juhota || 3.59.5
mitrasya charShaNIdhR^ito.avo devasya sAnasi |dyumnaM chitrashravastamam || 3.59.6
abhi yo mahinA divaM mitro babhUva saprathAH |abhi shravobhiH pR^ithivIm || 3.59.7
mitrAya pa~ncha yemire janA abhiShTishavase |sa devAnvishvAnbibharti || 3.59.8
mitro deveShvAyuShu janAya vR^iktabarhiShe |iSha iShTavratA akaH || 3.59.9

iheha vo manasA bandhutA nara ushijo jagmurabhi tAni vedasA |yAbhirmAyAbhiH pratijUtivarpasaH saudhanvanA yaj~niyaM bhAgamAnasha || 3.60.1
yAbhiH shachIbhishchamasA.N apiMshata yayA dhiyA gAmariNIta charmaNaH |yena harI manasA niratakShata tena devatvamR^ibhavaH samAnasha || 3.60.2
indrasya sakhyamR^ibhavaH samAnashurmanornapAto apaso dadhanvire |saudhanvanAso amR^itatvamerire viShTvI shamIbhiH sukR^itaH sukR^ityayA || 3.60.3
indreNa yAtha sarathaM sute sachA.N atho vashAnAM bhavathA saha shriyA |na vaH pratimai sukR^itAni vAghataH saudhanvanA R^ibhavo vIryANi cha || 3.60.4
indra R^ibhubhirvAjavadbhiH samukShitaM sutaM somamA vR^iShasvA gabhastyoH |dhiyeShito maghavandAshuSho gR^ihe saudhanvanebhiH saha matsvA nR^ibhiH || 3.60.5
indra R^ibhumAnvAjavAnmatsveha no.asminsavane shachyA puruShTuta |imAni tubhyaM svasarANi yemire vratA devAnAM manuShashcha dharmabhiH || 3.60.6
indra R^ibhubhirvAjibhirvAjayanniha stomaM jariturupa yAhi yaj~niyam |shataM ketebhiriShirebhirAyave sahasraNItho adhvarasya homani || 3.60.7

uSho vAjena vAjini prachetAH stomaM juShasva gR^iNato maghoni |purANI devi yuvatiH puraMdhiranu vrataM charasi vishvavAre || 3.61.1
uSho devyamartyA vi bhAhi chandrarathA sUnR^itA IrayantI |A tvA vahantu suyamAso ashvA hiraNyavarNAM pR^ithupAjaso ye || 3.61.2
uShaH pratIchI bhuvanAni vishvordhvA tiShThasyamR^itasya ketuH |samAnamarthaM charaNIyamAnA chakramiva navyasyA vavR^itsva || 3.61.3
ava syUmeva chinvatI maghonyuShA yAti svasarasya patnI |svarjanantI subhagA sudaMsA AntAddivaH papratha A pR^ithivyAH || 3.61.4
achChA vo devImuShasaM vibhAtIM pra vo bharadhvaM namasA suvR^iktim |UrdhvaM madhudhA divi pAjo ashretpra rochanA ruruche raNvasaMdR^ik || 3.61.5
R^itAvarI divo arkairabodhyA revatI rodasI chitramasthAt |AyatImagna uShasaM vibhAtIM vAmameShi draviNaM bhikShamANaH || 3.61.6
R^itasya budhna uShasAmiShaNyanvR^iShA mahI rodasI A vivesha |mahI mitrasya varuNasya mAyA chandreva bhAnuM vi dadhe purutrA || 3.61.7

imA u vAM bhR^imayo manyamAnA yuvAvate na tujyA abhUvan |kva tyadindrAvaruNA yasho vAM yena smA sinaM bharathaH sakhibhyaH || 3.62.1
ayamu vAM purutamo rayIya~nChashvattamamavase johavIti |sajoShAvindrAvaruNA marudbhirdivA pR^ithivyA shR^iNutaM havaM me || 3.62.2
asme tadindrAvaruNA vasu ShyAdasme rayirmarutaH sarvavIraH |asmAnvarUtrIH sharaNairavantvasmAnhotrA bhAratI dakShiNAbhiH || 3.62.3
bR^ihaspate juShasva no havyAni vishvadevya |rAsva ratnAni dAshuShe || 3.62.4
shuchimarkairbR^ihaspatimadhvareShu namasyata |anAmyoja A chake || 3.62.5
vR^iShabhaM charShaNInAM vishvarUpamadAbhyam |bR^ihaspatiM vareNyam || 3.62.6
iyaM te pUShannAghR^iNe suShTutirdeva navyasI |asmAbhistubhyaM shasyate || 3.62.7
tAM juShasva giraM mama vAjayantImavA dhiyam |vadhUyuriva yoShaNAm || 3.62.8
yo vishvAbhi vipashyati bhuvanA saM cha pashyati |sa naH pUShAvitA bhuvat || 3.62.9
tatsaviturvareNyaM bhargo devasya dhImahi |dhiyo yo naH prachodayAt || 3.62.10
devasya saviturvayaM vAjayantaH puraMdhyA |bhagasya rAtimImahe || 3.62.11
devaM naraH savitAraM viprA yaj~naiH suvR^iktibhiH |namasyanti dhiyeShitAH || 3.62.12
somo jigAti gAtuviddevAnAmeti niShkR^itam |R^itasya yonimAsadam || 3.62.13
somo asmabhyaM dvipade chatuShpade cha pashave |anamIvA iShaskarat || 3.62.14
asmAkamAyurvardhayannabhimAtIH sahamAnaH |somaH sadhasthamAsadat || 3.62.15
A no mitrAvaruNA ghR^itairgavyUtimukShatam |madhvA rajAMsi sukratU || 3.62.16
urushaMsA namovR^idhA mahnA dakShasya rAjathaH |drAghiShThAbhiH shuchivratA || 3.62.17
gR^iNAnA jamadagninA yonAvR^itasya sIdatam |pAtaM somamR^itAvR^idhA || 3.62.18


tvAM hyagne sadamitsamanyavo devAso devamaratiM nyerira iti kratvA nyerire |amartyaM yajata martyeShvA devamAdevaM janata prachetasaM vishvamAdevaM janata prachetasam || 4.1.1
sa bhrAtaraM varuNamagna A vavR^itsva devA.N achChA sumatI yaj~navanasaM jyeShThaM yaj~navanasam |R^itAvAnamAdityaM charShaNIdhR^itaM rAjAnaM charShaNIdhR^itam || 4.1.2
sakhe sakhAyamabhyA vavR^itsvAshuM na chakraM rathyeva raMhyAsmabhyaM dasma raMhyA |agne mR^iLIkaM varuNe sachA vido marutsu vishvabhAnuShu |tokAya tuje shushuchAna shaM kR^idhyasmabhyaM dasma shaM kR^idhi || 4.1.3
tvaM no agne varuNasya vidvAndevasya heLo.ava yAsisIShThAH |yajiShTho vahnitamaH shoshuchAno vishvA dveShAMsi pra mumugdhyasmat || 4.1.4
sa tvaM no agne.avamo bhavotI nediShTho asyA uShaso vyuShTau |ava yakShva no varuNaM rarANo vIhi mR^iLIkaM suhavo na edhi || 4.1.5
asya shreShThA subhagasya saMdR^igdevasya chitratamA martyeShu |shuchi ghR^itaM na taptamaghnyAyAH spArhA devasya maMhaneva dhenoH || 4.1.6
trirasya tA paramA santi satyA spArhA devasya janimAnyagneH |anante antaH parivIta AgAchChuchiH shukro aryo roruchAnaH || 4.1.7
sa dUto vishvedabhi vaShTi sadmA hotA hiraNyaratho raMsujihvaH |rohidashvo vapuShyo vibhAvA sadA raNvaH pitumatIva saMsat || 4.1.8
sa chetayanmanuSho yaj~nabandhuH pra taM mahyA rashanayA nayanti |sa kShetyasya duryAsu sAdhandevo martasya sadhanitvamApa || 4.1.9
sa tU no agnirnayatu prajAnannachChA ratnaM devabhaktaM yadasya |dhiyA yadvishve amR^itA akR^iNvandyauShpitA janitA satyamukShan || 4.1.10
sa jAyata prathamaH pastyAsu maho budhne rajaso asya yonau |apAdashIrShA guhamAno antAyoyuvAno vR^iShabhasya nILe || 4.1.11
pra shardha Arta prathamaM vipanyA.N R^itasya yonA vR^iShabhasya nILe |spArho yuvA vapuShyo vibhAvA sapta priyAso.ajanayanta vR^iShNe || 4.1.12
asmAkamatra pitaro manuShyA abhi pra sedurR^itamAshuShANAH |ashmavrajAH sudughA vavre antarudusrA AjannuShaso huvAnAH || 4.1.13
te marmR^ijata dadR^ivAMso adriM tadeShAmanye abhito vi vochan |pashvayantrAso abhi kAramarchanvidanta jyotishchakR^ipanta dhIbhiH || 4.1.14
te gavyatA manasA dR^idhramubdhaM gA yemAnaM pari Shantamadrim |dR^iLhaM naro vachasA daivyena vrajaM gomantamushijo vi vavruH || 4.1.15
te manvata prathamaM nAma dhenostriH sapta mAtuH paramANi vindan |tajjAnatIrabhyanUShata vrA AvirbhuvadaruNIryashasA goH || 4.1.16
neshattamo dudhitaM rochata dyauruddevyA uShaso bhAnurarta |A sUryo bR^ihatastiShThadajrA.N R^iju marteShu vR^ijinA cha pashyan || 4.1.17
AditpashchA bubudhAnA vyakhyannAdidratnaM dhArayanta dyubhaktam |vishve vishvAsu duryAsu devA mitra dhiye varuNa satyamastu || 4.1.18
achChA vocheya shushuchAnamagniM hotAraM vishvabharasaM yajiShTham |shuchyUdho atR^iNanna gavAmandho na pUtaM pariShiktamaMshoH || 4.1.19
vishveShAmaditiryaj~niyAnAM vishveShAmatithirmAnuShANAm |agnirdevAnAmava AvR^iNAnaH sumR^iLIko bhavatu jAtavedAH || 4.1.20

yo martyeShvamR^ita R^itAvA devo deveShvaratirnidhAyi |hotA yajiShTho mahnA shuchadhyai havyairagnirmanuSha Irayadhyai || 4.2.1
iha tvaM sUno sahaso no adya jAto jAtA.N ubhayA.N antaragne |dUta Iyase yuyujAna R^iShva R^ijumuShkAnvR^iShaNaH shukrA.Nshcha || 4.2.2
atyA vR^idhasnU rohitA ghR^itasnU R^itasya manye manasA javiShThA |antarIyase aruShA yujAno yuShmA.Nshcha devAnvisha A cha martAn || 4.2.3
aryamaNaM varuNaM mitrameShAmindrAviShNU maruto ashvinota |svashvo agne surathaH surAdhA edu vaha suhaviShe janAya || 4.2.4
gomA.N agne.avimA.N ashvI yaj~no nR^ivatsakhA sadamidapramR^iShyaH |iLAvA.N eSho asura prajAvAndIrgho rayiH pR^ithubudhnaH sabhAvAn || 4.2.5
yasta idhmaM jabharatsiShvidAno mUrdhAnaM vA tatapate tvAyA |bhuvastasya svatavA.NH pAyuragne vishvasmAtsImaghAyata uruShya || 4.2.6
yaste bharAdanniyate chidannaM nishiShanmandramatithimudIrat |A devayurinadhate duroNe tasminrayirdhruvo astu dAsvAn || 4.2.7
yastvA doShA ya uShasi prashaMsAtpriyaM vA tvA kR^iNavate haviShmAn |ashvo na sve dama A hemyAvAntamaMhasaH pIparo dAshvAMsam || 4.2.8
yastubhyamagne amR^itAya dAshadduvastve kR^iNavate yatasruk |na sa rAyA shashamAno vi yoShannainamaMhaH pari varadaghAyoH || 4.2.9
yasya tvamagne adhvaraM jujoSho devo martasya sudhitaM rarANaH |prItedasaddhotrA sA yaviShThAsAma yasya vidhato vR^idhAsaH || 4.2.10
chittimachittiM chinavadvi vidvAnpR^iShTheva vItA vR^ijinA cha martAn |rAye cha naH svapatyAya deva ditiM cha rAsvAditimuruShya || 4.2.11
kaviM shashAsuH kavayo.adabdhA nidhArayanto duryAsvAyoH |atastvaM dR^ishyA.N agna etAnpaDbhiH pashyeradbhutA.N arya evaiH || 4.2.12
tvamagne vAghate supraNItiH sutasomAya vidhate yaviShTha |ratnaM bhara shashamAnAya ghR^iShve pR^ithu shchandramavase charShaNiprAH || 4.2.13
adhA ha yadvayamagne tvAyA paDbhirhastebhishchakR^imA tanUbhiH |rathaM na kranto apasA bhurijorR^itaM yemuH sudhya AshuShANAH || 4.2.14
adhA mAturuShasaH sapta viprA jAyemahi prathamA vedhaso nR^In |divasputrA a~Ngiraso bhavemAdriM rujema dhaninaM shuchantaH || 4.2.15
adhA yathA naH pitaraH parAsaH pratnAso agna R^itamAshuShANAH |shuchIdayandIdhitimukthashAsaH kShAmA bhindanto aruNIrapa vran || 4.2.16
sukarmANaH surucho devayanto.ayo na devA janimA dhamantaH |shuchanto agniM vavR^idhanta indramUrvaM gavyaM pariShadanto agman || 4.2.17
A yUtheva kShumati pashvo akhyaddevAnAM yajjanimAntyugra |martAnAM chidurvashIrakR^ipranvR^idhe chidarya uparasyAyoH || 4.2.18
akarma te svapaso abhUma R^itamavasrannuShaso vibhAtIH |anUnamagniM purudhA sushchandraM devasya marmR^ijatashchAru chakShuH || 4.2.19
etA te agna uchathAni vedho.avochAma kavaye tA juShasva |uchChochasva kR^iNuhi vasyaso no maho rAyaH puruvAra pra yandhi || 4.2.20

A vo rAjAnamadhvarasya rudraM hotAraM satyayajaM rodasyoH |agniM purA tanayitnorachittAddhiraNyarUpamavase kR^iNudhvam || 4.3.1
ayaM yonishchakR^imA yaM vayaM te jAyeva patya ushatI suvAsAH |arvAchInaH parivIto ni ShIdemA u te svapAka pratIchIH || 4.3.2
AshR^iNvate adR^ipitAya manma nR^ichakShase sumR^iLIkAya vedhaH |devAya shastimamR^itAya shaMsa grAveva sotA madhuShudyamILe || 4.3.3
tvaM chinnaH shamyA agne asyA R^itasya bodhyR^itachitsvAdhIH |kadA ta ukthA sadhamAdyAni kadA bhavanti sakhyA gR^ihe te || 4.3.4
kathA ha tadvaruNAya tvamagne kathA dive garhase kanna AgaH |kathA mitrAya mILhuShe pR^ithivyai bravaH kadaryamNe kadbhagAya || 4.3.5
kaddhiShNyAsu vR^idhasAno agne kadvAtAya pratavase shubhaMye |parijmane nAsatyAya kShe bravaH kadagne rudrAya nR^ighne || 4.3.6
kathA mahe puShTimbharAya pUShNe kadrudrAya sumakhAya havirde |kadviShNava urugAyAya reto bravaH kadagne sharave bR^ihatyai || 4.3.7
kathA shardhAya marutAmR^itAya kathA sUre bR^ihate pR^ichChyamAnaH |prati bravo.aditaye turAya sAdhA divo jAtavedashchikitvAn || 4.3.8
R^itena R^itaM niyatamILa A gorAmA sachA madhumatpakvamagne |kR^iShNA satI rushatA dhAsinaiShA jAmaryeNa payasA pIpAya || 4.3.9
R^itena hi ShmA vR^iShabhashchidaktaH pumA.N agniH payasA pR^iShThyena |aspandamAno acharadvayodhA vR^iShA shukraM duduhe pR^ishnirUdhaH || 4.3.10
R^itenAdriM vyasanbhidantaH sama~Ngiraso navanta gobhiH |shunaM naraH pari ShadannuShAsamAviH svarabhavajjAte agnau || 4.3.11
R^itena devIramR^itA amR^iktA arNobhirApo madhumadbhiragne |vAjI na sargeShu prastubhAnaH pra sadamitsravitave dadhanyuH || 4.3.12
mA kasya yakShaM sadamiddhuro gA mA veshasya praminato mApeH |mA bhrAturagne anR^ijorR^iNaM vermA sakhyurdakShaM riporbhujema || 4.3.13
rakShA No agne tava rakShaNebhI rArakShANaH sumakha prINAnaH |prati Shphura vi ruja vIDvaMho jahi rakSho mahi chidvAvR^idhAnam || 4.3.14
ebhirbhava sumanA agne arkairimAnspR^isha manmabhiH shUra vAjAn |uta brahmANya~Ngiro juShasva saM te shastirdevavAtA jareta || 4.3.15
etA vishvA viduShe tubhyaM vedho nIthAnyagne niNyA vachAMsi |nivachanA kavaye kAvyAnyashaMsiShaM matibhirvipra ukthaiH || 4.3.16

kR^iNuShva pAjaH prasitiM na pR^ithvIM yAhi rAjevAmavA.N ibhena |tR^iShvImanu prasitiM drUNAno.astAsi vidhya rakShasastapiShThaiH || 4.4.1
tava bhramAsa AshuyA patantyanu spR^isha dhR^iShatA shoshuchAnaH |tapUMShyagne juhvA pataMgAnasaMdito vi sR^ija viShvagulkAH || 4.4.2
prati spasho vi sR^ija tUrNitamo bhavA pAyurvisho asyA adabdhaH |yo no dUre aghashaMso yo antyagne mAkiShTe vyathirA dadharShIt || 4.4.3
udagne tiShTha pratyA tanuShva nyamitrA.N oShatAttigmahete |yo no arAtiM samidhAna chakre nIchA taM dhakShyatasaM na shuShkam || 4.4.4
Urdhvo bhava prati vidhyAdhyasmadAviShkR^iNuShva daivyAnyagne |ava sthirA tanuhi yAtujUnAM jAmimajAmiM pra mR^iNIhi shatrUn || 4.4.5
sa te jAnAti sumatiM yaviShTha ya Ivate brahmaNe gAtumairat |vishvAnyasmai sudinAni rAyo dyumnAnyaryo vi duro abhi dyaut || 4.4.6
sedagne astu subhagaH sudAnuryastvA nityena haviShA ya ukthaiH |piprIShati sva AyuShi duroNe vishvedasmai sudinA sAsadiShTiH || 4.4.7
archAmi te sumatiM ghoShyarvAksaM te vAvAtA jaratAmiyaM gIH |svashvAstvA surathA marjayemAsme kShatrANi dhArayeranu dyUn || 4.4.8
iha tvA bhUryA charedupa tmandoShAvastardIdivAMsamanu dyUn |krILantastvA sumanasaH sapemAbhi dyumnA tasthivAMso janAnAm || 4.4.9
yastvA svashvaH suhiraNyo agna upayAti vasumatA rathena |tasya trAtA bhavasi tasya sakhA yasta AtithyamAnuShagjujoShat || 4.4.10
maho rujAmi bandhutA vachobhistanmA piturgotamAdanviyAya |tvaM no asya vachasashchikiddhi hotaryaviShTha sukrato damUnAH || 4.4.11
asvapnajastaraNayaH sushevA atandrAso.avR^ikA ashramiShThAH |te pAyavaH sadhrya~ncho niShadyAgne tava naH pAntvamUra || 4.4.12
ye pAyavo mAmateyaM te agne pashyanto andhaM duritAdarakShan |rarakSha tAnsukR^ito vishvavedA dipsanta idripavo nAha debhuH || 4.4.13
tvayA vayaM sadhanyastvotAstava praNItyashyAma vAjAn |ubhA shaMsA sUdaya satyatAte.anuShThuyA kR^iNuhyahrayANa || 4.4.14
ayA te agne samidhA vidhema prati stomaM shasyamAnaM gR^ibhAya |dahAshaso rakShasaH pAhyasmAndruho nido mitramaho avadyAt || 4.4.15

vaishvAnarAya mILhuShe sajoShAH kathA dAshemAgnaye bR^ihadbhAH |anUnena bR^ihatA vakShathenopa stabhAyadupaminna rodhaH || 4.5.1
mA nindata ya imAM mahyaM rAtiM devo dadau martyAya svadhAvAn |pAkAya gR^itso amR^ito vichetA vaishvAnaro nR^itamo yahvo agniH || 4.5.2
sAma dvibarhA mahi tigmabhR^iShTiH sahasraretA vR^iShabhastuviShmAn |padaM na gorapagULhaM vividvAnagnirmahyaM predu vochanmanIShAm || 4.5.3
pra tA.N agnirbabhasattigmajambhastapiShThena shochiShA yaH surAdhAH |pra ye minanti varuNasya dhAma priyA mitrasya chetato dhruvANi || 4.5.4
abhrAtaro na yoShaNo vyantaH patiripo na janayo durevAH |pApAsaH santo anR^itA asatyA idaM padamajanatA gabhIram || 4.5.5
idaM me agne kiyate pAvakAminate guruM bhAraM na manma |bR^ihaddadhAtha dhR^iShatA gabhIraM yahvaM pR^iShThaM prayasA saptadhAtu || 4.5.6
taminnveva samanA samAnamabhi kratvA punatI dhItirashyAH |sasasya charmannadhi chAru pR^ishneragre rupa ArupitaM jabAru || 4.5.7
pravAchyaM vachasaH kiM me asya guhA hitamupa niNigvadanti |yadusriyANAmapa vAriva vranpAti priyaM rupo agraM padaM veH || 4.5.8
idamu tyanmahi mahAmanIkaM yadusriyA sachata pUrvyaM gauH |R^itasya pade adhi dIdyAnaM guhA raghuShyadraghuyadviveda || 4.5.9
adha dyutAnaH pitroH sachAsAmanuta guhyaM chAru pR^ishneH |mAtuShpade parame anti ShadgorvR^iShNaH shochiShaH prayatasya jihvA || 4.5.10
R^itaM voche namasA pR^ichChyamAnastavAshasA jAtavedo yadIdam |tvamasya kShayasi yaddha vishvaM divi yadu draviNaM yatpR^ithivyAm || 4.5.11
kiM no asya draviNaM kaddha ratnaM vi no vocho jAtavedashchikitvAn |guhAdhvanaH paramaM yanno asya reku padaM na nidAnA aganma || 4.5.12
kA maryAdA vayunA kaddha vAmamachChA gamema raghavo na vAjam |kadA no devIramR^itasya patnIH sUro varNena tatanannuShAsaH || 4.5.13
anireNa vachasA phalgvena pratItyena kR^idhunAtR^ipAsaH |adhA te agne kimihA vadantyanAyudhAsa AsatA sachantAm || 4.5.14
asya shriye samidhAnasya vR^iShNo vasoranIkaM dama A rurocha |rushadvasAnaH sudR^ishIkarUpaH kShitirna rAyA puruvAro adyaut || 4.5.15

Urdhva U Shu No adhvarasya hotaragne tiShTha devatAtA yajIyAn |tvaM hi vishvamabhyasi manma pra vedhasashchittirasi manIShAm || 4.6.1
amUro hotA nyasAdi vikShvagnirmandro vidatheShu prachetAH |UrdhvaM bhAnuM savitevAshrenmeteva dhUmaM stabhAyadupa dyAm || 4.6.2
yatA sujUrNI rAtinI ghR^itAchI pradakShiNiddevatAtimurANaH |udu svarurnavajA nAkraH pashvo anakti sudhitaH sumekaH || 4.6.3
stIrNe barhiShi samidhAne agnA Urdhvo adhvaryurjujuShANo asthAt |paryagniH pashupA na hotA triviShTyeti pradiva urANaH || 4.6.4
pari tmanA mitadrureti hotAgnirmandro madhuvachA R^itAvA |dravantyasya vAjino na shokA bhayante vishvA bhuvanA yadabhrAT || 4.6.5
bhadrA te agne svanIka saMdR^igghorasya sato viShuNasya chAruH |na yatte shochistamasA varanta na dhvasmAnastanvI repa A dhuH || 4.6.6
na yasya sAturjanitoravAri na mAtarApitarA nU chidiShTau |adhA mitro na sudhitaH pAvako.agnirdIdAya mAnuShIShu vikShu || 4.6.7
dviryaM pa~ncha jIjanansaMvasAnAH svasAro agniM mAnuShIShu vikShu |uSharbudhamatharyo na dantaM shukraM svAsaM parashuM na tigmam || 4.6.8
tava tye agne harito ghR^itasnA rohitAsa R^ijva~nchaH sva~nchaH |aruShAso vR^iShaNa R^ijumuShkA A devatAtimahvanta dasmAH || 4.6.9
ye ha tye te sahamAnA ayAsastveShAso agne archayashcharanti |shyenAso na duvasanAso arthaM tuviShvaNaso mArutaM na shardhaH || 4.6.10
akAri brahma samidhAna tubhyaM shaMsAtyukthaM yajate vyU dhAH |hotAramagniM manuSho ni Shedurnamasyanta ushijaH shaMsamAyoH || 4.6.11

ayamiha prathamo dhAyi dhAtR^ibhirhotA yajiShTho adhvareShvIDyaH |yamapnavAno bhR^igavo viruruchurvaneShu chitraM vibhvaM vishevishe || 4.7.1
agne kadA ta AnuShagbhuvaddevasya chetanam |adhA hi tvA jagR^ibhrire martAso vikShvIDyam || 4.7.2
R^itAvAnaM vichetasaM pashyanto dyAmiva stR^ibhiH |vishveShAmadhvarANAM haskartAraM damedame || 4.7.3
AshuM dUtaM vivasvato vishvA yashcharShaNIrabhi |A jabhruH ketumAyavo bhR^igavANaM vishevishe || 4.7.4
tamIM hotAramAnuShakchikitvAMsaM ni Shedire |raNvaM pAvakashochiShaM yajiShThaM sapta dhAmabhiH || 4.7.5
taM shashvatIShu mAtR^iShu vana A vItamashritam |chitraM santaM guhA hitaM suvedaM kUchidarthinam || 4.7.6
sasasya yadviyutA sasminnUdhannR^itasya dhAmanraNayanta devAH |mahA.N agnirnamasA rAtahavyo veradhvarAya sadamidR^itAvA || 4.7.7
veradhvarasya dUtyAni vidvAnubhe antA rodasI saMchikitvAn |dUta Iyase pradiva urANo viduShTaro diva ArodhanAni || 4.7.8
kR^iShNaM ta ema rushataH puro bhAshchariShNvarchirvapuShAmidekam |yadapravItA dadhate ha garbhaM sadyashchijjAto bhavasIdu dUtaH || 4.7.9
sadyo jAtasya dadR^ishAnamojo yadasya vAto anuvAti shochiH |vR^iNakti tigmAmataseShu jihvAM sthirA chidannA dayate vi jambhaiH || 4.7.10
tR^iShu yadannA tR^iShuNA vavakSha tR^iShuM dUtaM kR^iNute yahvo agniH |vAtasya meLiM sachate nijUrvannAshuM na vAjayate hinve arvA || 4.7.11

dUtaM vo vishvavedasaM havyavAhamamartyam |yajiShThamR^i~njase girA || 4.8.1
sa hi vedA vasudhitiM mahA.N ArodhanaM divaH |sa devA.N eha vakShati || 4.8.2
sa veda deva AnamaM devA.N R^itAyate dame |dAti priyANi chidvasu || 4.8.3
sa hotA sedu dUtyaM chikitvA.N antarIyate |vidvA.N ArodhanaM divaH || 4.8.4
te syAma ye agnaye dadAshurhavyadAtibhiH |ya IM puShyanta indhate || 4.8.5
te rAyA te suvIryaiH sasavAMso vi shR^iNvire |ye agnA dadhire duvaH || 4.8.6
asme rAyo divedive saM charantu puruspR^ihaH |asme vAjAsa IratAm || 4.8.7
sa viprashcharShaNInAM shavasA mAnuShANAm |ati kShipreva vidhyati || 4.8.8

agne mR^iLa mahA.N asi ya ImA devayuM janam |iyetha barhirAsadam || 4.9.1
sa mAnuShIShu dULabho vikShu prAvIramartyaH |dUto vishveShAM bhuvat || 4.9.2
sa sadma pari NIyate hotA mandro diviShTiShu |uta potA ni ShIdati || 4.9.3
uta gnA agniradhvara uto gR^ihapatirdame |uta brahmA ni ShIdati || 4.9.4
veShi hyadhvarIyatAmupavaktA janAnAm |havyA cha mAnuShANAm || 4.9.5
veShIdvasya dUtyaM yasya jujoSho adhvaram |havyaM martasya voLhave || 4.9.6
asmAkaM joShyadhvaramasmAkaM yaj~nama~NgiraH |asmAkaM shR^iNudhI havam || 4.9.7
pari te dULabho ratho.asmA.N ashnotu vishvataH |yena rakShasi dAshuShaH || 4.9.8

agne tamadyAshvaM na stomaiH kratuM na bhadraM hR^idispR^isham |R^idhyAmA ta ohaiH || 4.10.1
adhA hyagne kratorbhadrasya dakShasya sAdhoH |rathIrR^itasya bR^ihato babhUtha || 4.10.2
ebhirno arkairbhavA no arvA~NsvarNa jyotiH |agne vishvebhiH sumanA anIkaiH || 4.10.3
AbhiShTe adya gIrbhirgR^iNanto.agne dAshema |pra te divo na stanayanti shuShmAH || 4.10.4
tava svAdiShThAgne saMdR^iShTiridA chidahna idA chidaktoH |shriye rukmo na rochata upAke || 4.10.5
ghR^itaM na pUtaM tanUrarepAH shuchi hiraNyam |tatte rukmo na rochata svadhAvaH || 4.10.6
kR^itaM chiddhi ShmA sanemi dveSho.agna inoShi martAt |itthA yajamAnAdR^itAvaH || 4.10.7
shivA naH sakhyA santu bhrAtrAgne deveShu yuShme |sA no nAbhiH sadane sasminnUdhan || 4.10.8

bhadraM te agne sahasinnanIkamupAka A rochate sUryasya |rushaddR^ishe dadR^ishe naktayA chidarUkShitaM dR^isha A rUpe annam || 4.11.1
vi ShAhyagne gR^iNate manIShAM khaM vepasA tuvijAta stavAnaH |vishvebhiryadvAvanaH shukra devaistanno rAsva sumaho bhUri manma || 4.11.2
tvadagne kAvyA tvanmanIShAstvadukthA jAyante rAdhyAni |tvadeti draviNaM vIrapeshA itthAdhiye dAshuShe martyAya || 4.11.3
tvadvAjI vAjambharo vihAyA abhiShTikR^ijjAyate satyashuShmaH |tvadrayirdevajUto mayobhustvadAshurjUjuvA.N agne arvA || 4.11.4
tvAmagne prathamaM devayanto devaM martA amR^ita mandrajihvam |dveShoyutamA vivAsanti dhIbhirdamUnasaM gR^ihapatimamUram || 4.11.5
Are asmadamatimAre aMha Are vishvAM durmatiM yannipAsi |doShA shivaH sahasaH sUno agne yaM deva A chitsachase svasti || 4.11.6

yastvAmagna inadhate yatasruktriste annaM kR^iNavatsasminnahan |sa su dyumnairabhyastu prasakShattava kratvA jAtavedashchikitvAn || 4.12.1
idhmaM yaste jabharachChashramANo maho agne anIkamA saparyan |sa idhAnaH prati doShAmuShAsaM puShyanrayiM sachate ghnannamitrAn || 4.12.2
agnirIshe bR^ihataH kShatriyasyAgnirvAjasya paramasya rAyaH |dadhAti ratnaM vidhate yaviShTho vyAnuSha~NmartyAya svadhAvAn || 4.12.3
yachchiddhi te puruShatrA yaviShThAchittibhishchakR^imA kachchidAgaH |kR^idhI ShvasmA.N aditeranAgAnvyenAMsi shishratho viShvagagne || 4.12.4
mahashchidagna enaso abhIka UrvAddevAnAmuta martyAnAm |mA te sakhAyaH sadamidriShAma yachChA tokAya tanayAya shaM yoH || 4.12.5
yathA ha tyadvasavo gauryaM chitpadi ShitAmamu~nchatA yajatrAH |evo Shvasmanmu~nchatA vyaMhaH pra tAryagne prataraM na AyuH || 4.12.6

pratyagniruShasAmagramakhyadvibhAtInAM sumanA ratnadheyam |yAtamashvinA sukR^ito duroNamutsUryo jyotiShA deva eti || 4.13.1
UrdhvaM bhAnuM savitA devo ashreddrapsaM davidhvadgaviSho na satvA |anu vrataM varuNo yanti mitro yatsUryaM divyArohayanti || 4.13.2
yaM sImakR^iNvantamase vipR^iche dhruvakShemA anavasyanto artham |taM sUryaM haritaH sapta yahvIH spashaM vishvasya jagato vahanti || 4.13.3
vahiShThebhirviharanyAsi tantumavavyayannasitaM deva vasma |davidhvato rashmayaH sUryasya charmevAvAdhustamo apsvantaH || 4.13.4
anAyato anibaddhaH kathAyaM nya~N~NuttAno.ava padyate na |kayA yAti svadhayA ko dadarsha divaH skambhaH samR^itaH pAti nAkam || 4.13.5

pratyagniruShaso jAtavedA akhyaddevo rochamAnA mahobhiH |A nAsatyorugAyA rathenemaM yaj~namupa no yAtamachCha || 4.14.1
UrdhvaM ketuM savitA devo ashrejjyotirvishvasmai bhuvanAya kR^iNvan |AprA dyAvApR^ithivI antarikShaM vi sUryo rashmibhishchekitAnaH || 4.14.2
AvahantyaruNIrjyotiShAgAnmahI chitrA rashmibhishchekitAnA |prabodhayantI suvitAya devyuShA Iyate suyujA rathena || 4.14.3
A vAM vahiShThA iha te vahantu rathA ashvAsa uShaso vyuShTau |ime hi vAM madhupeyAya somA asminyaj~ne vR^iShaNA mAdayethAm || 4.14.4
anAyato anibaddhaH kathAyaM nya~N~NuttAno.ava padyate na |kayA yAti svadhayA ko dadarsha divaH skambhaH samR^itaH pAti nAkam || 4.14.5

agnirhotA no adhvare vAjI sanpari NIyate |devo deveShu yaj~niyaH || 4.15.1
pari triviShTyadhvaraM yAtyagnI rathIriva |A deveShu prayo dadhat || 4.15.2
pari vAjapatiH kaviragnirhavyAnyakramIt |dadhadratnAni dAshuShe || 4.15.3
ayaM yaH sR^i~njaye puro daivavAte samidhyate |dyumA.N amitradambhanaH || 4.15.4
asya ghA vIra Ivato.agnerIshIta martyaH |tigmajambhasya mILhuShaH || 4.15.5
tamarvantaM na sAnasimaruShaM na divaH shishum |marmR^ijyante divedive || 4.15.6
bodhadyanmA haribhyAM kumAraH sAhadevyaH |achChA na hUta udaram || 4.15.7
uta tyA yajatA harI kumArAtsAhadevyAt |prayatA sadya A dade || 4.15.8
eSha vAM devAvashvinA kumAraH sAhadevyaH |dIrghAyurastu somakaH || 4.15.9
taM yuvaM devAvashvinA kumAraM sAhadevyam |dIrghAyuShaM kR^iNotana || 4.15.10

A satyo yAtu maghavA.N R^ijIShI dravantvasya haraya upa naH |tasmA idandhaH suShumA sudakShamihAbhipitvaM karate gR^iNAnaH || 4.16.1
ava sya shUrAdhvano nAnte.asminno adya savane mandadhyai |shaMsAtyukthamushaneva vedhAshchikituShe asuryAya manma || 4.16.2
kavirna niNyaM vidathAni sAdhanvR^iShA yatsekaM vipipAno archAt |diva itthA jIjanatsapta kArUnahnA chichchakrurvayunA gR^iNantaH || 4.16.3
svaryadvedi sudR^ishIkamarkairmahi jyotI ruruchuryaddha vastoH |andhA tamAMsi dudhitA vichakShe nR^ibhyashchakAra nR^itamo abhiShTau || 4.16.4
vavakSha indro amitamR^ijIShyubhe A paprau rodasI mahitvA |atashchidasya mahimA vi rechyabhi yo vishvA bhuvanA babhUva || 4.16.5
vishvAni shakro naryANi vidvAnapo rirecha sakhibhirnikAmaiH |ashmAnaM chidye bibhidurvachobhirvrajaM gomantamushijo vi vavruH || 4.16.6
apo vR^itraM vavrivAMsaM parAhanprAvatte vajraM pR^ithivI sachetAH |prArNAMsi samudriyANyainoH patirbhava~nChavasA shUra dhR^iShNo || 4.16.7
apo yadadriM puruhUta dardarAvirbhuvatsaramA pUrvyaM te |sa no netA vAjamA darShi bhUriM gotrA rujanna~NgirobhirgR^iNAnaH || 4.16.8
achChA kaviM nR^imaNo gA abhiShTau svarShAtA maghavannAdhamAnam |UtibhistamiShaNo dyumnahUtau ni mAyAvAnabrahmA dasyurarta || 4.16.9
A dasyughnA manasA yAhyastaM bhuvatte kutsaH sakhye nikAmaH |sve yonau ni ShadataM sarUpA vi vAM chikitsadR^itachiddha nArI || 4.16.10
yAsi kutsena sarathamavasyustodo vAtasya haryorIshAnaH |R^ijrA vAjaM na gadhyaM yuyUShankaviryadahanpAryAya bhUShAt || 4.16.11
kutsAya shuShNamashuShaM ni barhIH prapitve ahnaH kuyavaM sahasrA |sadyo dasyUnpra mR^iNa kutsyena pra sUrashchakraM vR^ihatAdabhIke || 4.16.12
tvaM pipruM mR^igayaM shUshuvAMsamR^ijishvane vaidathinAya randhIH |pa~nchAshatkR^iShNA ni vapaH sahasrAtkaM na puro jarimA vi dardaH || 4.16.13
sUra upAke tanvaM dadhAno vi yatte chetyamR^itasya varpaH |mR^igo na hastI taviShImuShANaH siMho na bhIma AyudhAni bibhrat || 4.16.14
indraM kAmA vasUyanto agmansvarmILhe na savane chakAnAH |shravasyavaH shashamAnAsa ukthairoko na raNvA sudR^ishIva puShTiH || 4.16.15
tamidva indraM suhavaM huvema yastA chakAra naryA purUNi |yo mAvate jaritre gadhyaM chinmakShU vAjaM bharati spArharAdhAH || 4.16.16
tigmA yadantarashaniH patAti kasmi~nchichChUra muhuke janAnAm |ghorA yadarya samR^itirbhavAtyadha smA nastanvo bodhi gopAH || 4.16.17
bhuvo.avitA vAmadevasya dhInAM bhuvaH sakhAvR^iko vAjasAtau |tvAmanu pramatimA jaganmorushaMso jaritre vishvadha syAH || 4.16.18
ebhirnR^ibhirindra tvAyubhiShTvA maghavadbhirmaghavanvishva Ajau |dyAvo na dyumnairabhi santo aryaH kShapo madema sharadashcha pUrvIH || 4.16.19
evedindrAya vR^iShabhAya vR^iShNe brahmAkarma bhR^igavo na ratham |nU chidyathA naH sakhyA viyoShadasanna ugro.avitA tanUpAH || 4.16.20
nU ShTuta indra nU gR^iNAna iShaM jaritre nadyo na pIpeH |akAri te harivo brahma navyaM dhiyA syAma rathyaH sadAsAH || 4.16.21

tvaM mahA.N indra tubhyaM ha kShA anu kShatraM maMhanA manyata dyauH |tvaM vR^itraM shavasA jaghanvAnsR^ijaH sindhU.NrahinA jagrasAnAn || 4.17.1
tava tviSho janimanrejata dyau rejadbhUmirbhiyasA svasya manyoH |R^ighAyanta subhvaH parvatAsa ArdandhanvAni sarayanta ApaH || 4.17.2
bhinadgiriM shavasA vajramiShNannAviShkR^iNvAnaH sahasAna ojaH |vadhIdvR^itraM vajreNa mandasAnaH sarannApo javasA hatavR^iShNIH || 4.17.3
suvIraste janitA manyata dyaurindrasya kartA svapastamo bhUt |ya IM jajAna svaryaM suvajramanapachyutaM sadaso na bhUma || 4.17.4
ya eka ichchyAvayati pra bhUmA rAjA kR^iShTInAM puruhUta indraH |satyamenamanu vishve madanti rAtiM devasya gR^iNato maghonaH || 4.17.5
satrA somA abhavannasya vishve satrA madAso bR^ihato madiShThAH |satrAbhavo vasupatirvasUnAM datre vishvA adhithA indra kR^iShTIH || 4.17.6
tvamadha prathamaM jAyamAno.ame vishvA adhithA indra kR^iShTIH |tvaM prati pravata AshayAnamahiM vajreNa maghavanvi vR^ishchaH || 4.17.7
satrAhaNaM dAdhR^iShiM tumramindraM mahAmapAraM vR^iShabhaM suvajram |hantA yo vR^itraM sanitota vAjaM dAtA maghAni maghavA surAdhAH || 4.17.8
ayaM vR^itashchAtayate samIchIrya AjiShu maghavA shR^iNva ekaH |ayaM vAjaM bharati yaM sanotyasya priyAsaH sakhye syAma || 4.17.9
ayaM shR^iNve adha jayannuta ghnannayamuta pra kR^iNute yudhA gAH |yadA satyaM kR^iNute manyumindro vishvaM dR^iLhaM bhayata ejadasmAt || 4.17.10
samindro gA ajayatsaM hiraNyA samashviyA maghavA yo ha pUrvIH |ebhirnR^ibhirnR^itamo asya shAkai rAyo vibhaktA sambharashcha vasvaH || 4.17.11
kiyatsvidindro adhyeti mAtuH kiyatpiturjanituryo jajAna |yo asya shuShmaM muhukairiyarti vAto na jUtaH stanayadbhirabhraiH || 4.17.12
kShiyantaM tvamakShiyantaM kR^iNotIyarti reNuM maghavA samoham |vibha~njanurashanimA.N iva dyauruta stotAraM maghavA vasau dhAt || 4.17.13
ayaM chakramiShaNatsUryasya nyetashaM rIramatsasR^imANam |A kR^iShNa IM juhurANo jigharti tvacho budhne rajaso asya yonau || 4.17.14
asiknyAM yajamAno na hotA || 4.17.15
gavyanta indraM sakhyAya viprA ashvAyanto vR^iShaNaM vAjayantaH |janIyanto janidAmakShitotimA chyAvayAmo.avate na kosham || 4.17.16
trAtA no bodhi dadR^ishAna ApirabhikhyAtA marDitA somyAnAm |sakhA pitA pitR^itamaH pitR^INAM kartemu lokamushate vayodhAH || 4.17.17
sakhIyatAmavitA bodhi sakhA gR^iNAna indra stuvate vayo dhAH |vayaM hyA te chakR^imA sabAdha AbhiH shamIbhirmahayanta indra || 4.17.18
stuta indro maghavA yaddha vR^itrA bhUrINyeko apratIni hanti |asya priyo jaritA yasya sharmannakirdevA vArayante na martAH || 4.17.19
evA na indro maghavA virapshI karatsatyA charShaNIdhR^idanarvA |tvaM rAjA januShAM dhehyasme adhi shravo mAhinaM yajjaritre || 4.17.20
nU ShTuta indra nU gR^iNAna iShaM jaritre nadyo na pIpeH |akAri te harivo brahma navyaM dhiyA syAma rathyaH sadAsAH || 4.17.21

ayaM panthA anuvittaH purANo yato devA udajAyanta vishve |atashchidA janiShIShTa pravR^iddho mA mAtaramamuyA pattave kaH || 4.18.1
nAhamato nirayA durgahaitattirashchatA pArshvAnnirgamANi |bahUni me akR^itA kartvAni yudhyai tvena saM tvena pR^ichChai || 4.18.2
parAyatIM mAtaramanvachaShTa na nAnu gAnyanu nU gamAni |tvaShTurgR^ihe apibatsomamindraH shatadhanyaM chamvoH sutasya || 4.18.3
kiM sa R^idhakkR^iNavadyaM sahasraM mAso jabhAra sharadashcha pUrvIH |nahI nvasya pratimAnamastyantarjAteShUta ye janitvAH || 4.18.4
avadyamiva manyamAnA guhAkarindraM mAtA vIryeNA nyR^iShTam |athodasthAtsvayamatkaM vasAna A rodasI apR^iNAjjAyamAnaH || 4.18.5
etA arShantyalalAbhavantIrR^itAvarIriva saMkroshamAnAH |etA vi pR^ichCha kimidaM bhananti kamApo adriM paridhiM rujanti || 4.18.6
kimu Shvidasmai nivido bhanantendrasyAvadyaM didhiShanta ApaH |mamaitAnputro mahatA vadhena vR^itraM jaghanvA.N asR^ijadvi sindhUn || 4.18.7
mamachchana tvA yuvatiH parAsa mamachchana tvA kuShavA jagAra |mamachchidApaH shishave mamR^iDyurmamachchidindraH sahasodatiShThat || 4.18.8
mamachchana te maghavanvyaMso nivividhvA.N apa hanU jaghAna |adhA nividdha uttaro babhUvA~nChiro dAsasya saM piNagvadhena || 4.18.9
