gR^iShTiH sasUva sthaviraM tavAgAmanAdhR^iShyaM vR^iShabhaM tumramindram |arILhaM vatsaM charathAya mAtA svayaM gAtuM tanva ichChamAnam || 4.18.10
uta mAtA mahiShamanvavenadamI tvA jahati putra devAH |athAbravIdvR^itramindro haniShyansakhe viShNo vitaraM vi kramasva || 4.18.11
kaste mAtaraM vidhavAmachakrachChayuM kastvAmajighAMsachcharantam |kaste devo adhi mArDIka AsIdyatprAkShiNAH pitaraM pAdagR^ihya || 4.18.12
avartyA shuna AntrANi peche na deveShu vivide marDitAram |apashyaM jAyAmamahIyamAnAmadhA me shyeno madhvA jabhAra || 4.18.13

evA tvAmindra vajrinnatra vishve devAsaH suhavAsa UmAH |mahAmubhe rodasI vR^iddhamR^iShvaM nirekamidvR^iNate vR^itrahatye || 4.19.1
avAsR^ijanta jivrayo na devA bhuvaH samrALindra satyayoniH |ahannahiM parishayAnamarNaH pra vartanIrarado vishvadhenAH || 4.19.2
atR^ipNuvantaM viyatamabudhyamabudhyamAnaM suShupANamindra |sapta prati pravata AshayAnamahiM vajreNa vi riNA aparvan || 4.19.3
akShodayachChavasA kShAma budhnaM vArNa vAtastaviShIbhirindraH |dR^iLhAnyaubhnAdushamAna ojo.avAbhinatkakubhaH parvatAnAm || 4.19.4
abhi pra dadrurjanayo na garbhaM rathA iva pra yayuH sAkamadrayaH |atarpayo visR^ita ubja UrmIntvaM vR^itA.N ariNA indra sindhUn || 4.19.5
tvaM mahImavaniM vishvadhenAM turvItaye vayyAya kSharantIm |aramayo namasaijadarNaH sutaraNA.N akR^iNorindra sindhUn || 4.19.6
prAgruvo nabhanvo na vakvA dhvasrA apinvadyuvatIrR^itaj~nAH |dhanvAnyajrA.N apR^iNaktR^iShANA.N adhogindraH staryo daMsupatnIH || 4.19.7
pUrvIruShasaH sharadashcha gUrtA vR^itraM jaghanvA.N asR^ijadvi sindhUn |pariShThitA atR^iNadbadbadhAnAH sIrA indraH sravitave pR^ithivyA || 4.19.8
vamrIbhiH putramagruvo adAnaM niveshanAddhariva A jabhartha |vyandho akhyadahimAdadAno nirbhUdukhachChitsamaranta parva || 4.19.9
pra te pUrvANi karaNAni viprAvidvA.N Aha viduShe karAMsi |yathAyathA vR^iShNyAni svagUrtApAMsi rAjannaryAviveShIH || 4.19.10
nU ShTuta indra nU gR^iNAna iShaM jaritre nadyo na pIpeH |akAri te harivo brahma navyaM dhiyA syAma rathyaH sadAsAH || 4.19.11

A na indro dUrAdA na AsAdabhiShTikR^idavase yAsadugraH |ojiShThebhirnR^ipatirvajrabAhuH saMge samatsu turvaNiH pR^itanyUn || 4.20.1
A na indro haribhiryAtvachChArvAchIno.avase rAdhase cha |tiShThAti vajrI maghavA virapshImaM yaj~namanu no vAjasAtau || 4.20.2
imaM yaj~naM tvamasmAkamindra puro dadhatsaniShyasi kratuM naH |shvaghnIva vajrinsanaye dhanAnAM tvayA vayamarya AjiM jayema || 4.20.3
ushannu Shu NaH sumanA upAke somasya nu suShutasya svadhAvaH |pA indra pratibhR^itasya madhvaH samandhasA mamadaH pR^iShThyena || 4.20.4
vi yo rarapsha R^iShibhirnavebhirvR^ikSho na pakvaH sR^iNyo na jetA |maryo na yoShAmabhi manyamAno.achChA vivakmi puruhUtamindram || 4.20.5
girirna yaH svatavA.N R^iShva indraH sanAdeva sahase jAta ugraH |AdartA vajraM sthaviraM na bhIma udneva koshaM vasunA nyR^iShTam || 4.20.6
na yasya vartA januShA nvasti na rAdhasa AmarItA maghasya |udvAvR^iShANastaviShIva ugrAsmabhyaM daddhi puruhUta rAyaH || 4.20.7
IkShe rAyaH kShayasya charShaNInAmuta vrajamapavartAsi gonAm |shikShAnaraH samitheShu prahAvAnvasvo rAshimabhinetAsi bhUrim || 4.20.8
kayA tachChR^iNve shachyA shachiShTho yayA kR^iNoti muhu kA chidR^iShvaH |puru dAshuShe vichayiShTho aMho.athA dadhAti draviNaM jaritre || 4.20.9
mA no mardhIrA bharA daddhi tannaH pra dAshuShe dAtave bhUri yatte |navye deShNe shaste asminta ukthe pra bravAma vayamindra stuvantaH || 4.20.10
nU ShTuta indra nU gR^iNAna iShaM jaritre nadyo na pIpeH |akAri te harivo brahma navyaM dhiyA syAma rathyaH sadAsAH || 4.20.11

A yAtvindro.avasa upa na iha stutaH sadhamAdastu shUraH |vAvR^idhAnastaviShIryasya pUrvIrdyaurna kShatramabhibhUti puShyAt || 4.21.1
tasyediha stavatha vR^iShNyAni tuvidyumnasya tuvirAdhaso nR^In |yasya kraturvidathyo na samrAT sAhvAntarutro abhyasti kR^iShTIH || 4.21.2
A yAtvindro diva A pR^ithivyA makShU samudrAduta vA purIShAt |svarNarAdavase no marutvAnparAvato vA sadanAdR^itasya || 4.21.3
sthUrasya rAyo bR^ihato ya Ishe tamu ShTavAma vidatheShvindram |yo vAyunA jayati gomatIShu pra dhR^iShNuyA nayati vasyo achCha || 4.21.4
upa yo namo namasi stabhAyanniyarti vAchaM janayanyajadhyai |R^i~njasAnaH puruvAra ukthairendraM kR^iNvIta sadaneShu hotA || 4.21.5
dhiShA yadi dhiShaNyantaH saraNyAnsadanto adrimaushijasya gohe |A duroShAH pAstyasya hotA yo no mahAnsaMvaraNeShu vahniH || 4.21.6
satrA yadIM bhArvarasya vR^iShNaH siShakti shuShmaH stuvate bharAya |guhA yadImaushijasya gohe pra yaddhiye prAyase madAya || 4.21.7
vi yadvarAMsi parvatasya vR^iNve payobhirjinve apAM javAMsi |vidadgaurasya gavayasya gohe yadI vAjAya sudhyo vahanti || 4.21.8
bhadrA te hastA sukR^itota pANI prayantArA stuvate rAdha indra |kA te niShattiH kimu no mamatsi kiM nodudu harShase dAtavA u || 4.21.9
evA vasva indraH satyaH samrADDhantA vR^itraM varivaH pUrave kaH |puruShTuta kratvA naH shagdhi rAyo bhakShIya te.avaso daivyasya || 4.21.10
nU ShTuta indra nU gR^iNAna iShaM jaritre nadyo na pIpeH |akAri te harivo brahma navyaM dhiyA syAma rathyaH sadAsAH || 4.21.11

yanna indro jujuShe yachcha vaShTi tanno mahAnkarati shuShmyA chit |brahma stomaM maghavA somamukthA yo ashmAnaM shavasA bibhradeti || 4.22.1
vR^iShA vR^iShandhiM chaturashrimasyannugro bAhubhyAM nR^itamaH shachIvAn |shriye paruShNImuShamANa UrNAM yasyAH parvANi sakhyAya vivye || 4.22.2
yo devo devatamo jAyamAno maho vAjebhirmahadbhishcha shuShmaiH |dadhAno vajraM bAhvorushantaM dyAmamena rejayatpra bhUma || 4.22.3
vishvA rodhAMsi pravatashcha pUrvIrdyaurR^iShvAjjanimanrejata kShAH |A mAtarA bharati shuShmyA gornR^ivatparijmannonuvanta vAtAH || 4.22.4
tA tU ta indra mahato mahAni vishveShvitsavaneShu pravAchyA |yachChUra dhR^iShNo dhR^iShatA dadhR^iShvAnahiM vajreNa shavasAviveShIH || 4.22.5
tA tU te satyA tuvinR^imNa vishvA pra dhenavaH sisrate vR^iShNa UdhnaH |adhA ha tvadvR^iShamaNo bhiyAnAH pra sindhavo javasA chakramanta || 4.22.6
atrAha te harivastA u devIravobhirindra stavanta svasAraH |yatsImanu pra mucho badbadhAnA dIrghAmanu prasitiM syandayadhyai || 4.22.7
pipILe aMshurmadyo na sindhurA tvA shamI shashamAnasya shaktiH |asmadryakChushuchAnasya yamyA Ashurna rashmiM tuvyojasaM goH || 4.22.8
asme varShiShThA kR^iNuhi jyeShThA nR^imNAni satrA sahure sahAMsi |asmabhyaM vR^itrA suhanAni randhi jahi vadharvanuSho martyasya || 4.22.9
asmAkamitsu shR^iNuhi tvamindrAsmabhyaM chitrA.N upa mAhi vAjAn |asmabhyaM vishvA iShaNaH puraMdhIrasmAkaM su maghavanbodhi godAH || 4.22.10
nU ShTuta indra nU gR^iNAna iShaM jaritre nadyo na pIpeH |akAri te harivo brahma navyaM dhiyA syAma rathyaH sadAsAH || 4.22.11

kathA mahAmavR^idhatkasya hoturyaj~naM juShANo abhi somamUdhaH |pibannushAno juShamANo andho vavakSha R^iShvaH shuchate dhanAya || 4.23.1
ko asya vIraH sadhamAdamApa samAnaMsha sumatibhiH ko asya |kadasya chitraM chikite kadUtI vR^idhe bhuvachChashamAnasya yajyoH || 4.23.2
kathA shR^iNoti hUyamAnamindraH kathA shR^iNvannavasAmasya veda |kA asya pUrvIrupamAtayo ha kathainamAhuH papuriM jaritre || 4.23.3
kathA sabAdhaH shashamAno asya nashadabhi draviNaM dIdhyAnaH |devo bhuvannavedA ma R^itAnAM namo jagR^ibhvA.N abhi yajjujoShat || 4.23.4
kathA kadasyA uShaso vyuShTau devo martasya sakhyaM jujoSha |kathA kadasya sakhyaM sakhibhyo ye asminkAmaM suyujaM tatasre || 4.23.5
kimAdamatraM sakhyaM sakhibhyaH kadA nu te bhrAtraM pra bravAma |shriye sudR^isho vapurasya sargAH svarNa chitratamamiSha A goH || 4.23.6
druhaM jighAMsandhvarasamanindrAM tetikte tigmA tujase anIkA |R^iNA chidyatra R^iNayA na ugro dUre aj~nAtA uShaso babAdhe || 4.23.7
R^itasya hi shurudhaH santi pUrvIrR^itasya dhItirvR^ijinAni hanti |R^itasya shloko badhirA tatarda karNA budhAnaH shuchamAna AyoH || 4.23.8
R^itasya dR^iLhA dharuNAni santi purUNi chandrA vapuShe vapUMShi |R^itena dIrghamiShaNanta pR^ikSha R^itena gAva R^itamA viveshuH || 4.23.9
R^itaM yemAna R^itamidvanotyR^itasya shuShmasturayA u gavyuH |R^itAya pR^ithvI bahule gabhIre R^itAya dhenU parame duhAte || 4.23.10
nU ShTuta indra nU gR^iNAna iShaM jaritre nadyo na pIpeH |akAri te harivo brahma navyaM dhiyA syAma rathyaH sadAsAH || 4.23.11

kA suShTutiH shavasaH sUnumindramarvAchInaM rAdhasa A vavartat |dadirhi vIro gR^iNate vasUni sa gopatirniShShidhAM no janAsaH || 4.24.1
sa vR^itrahatye havyaH sa IDyaH sa suShTuta indraH satyarAdhAH |sa yAmannA maghavA martyAya brahmaNyate suShvaye varivo dhAt || 4.24.2
taminnaro vi hvayante samIke ririkvAMsastanvaH kR^iNvata trAm |mitho yattyAgamubhayAso agmannarastokasya tanayasya sAtau || 4.24.3
kratUyanti kShitayo yoga ugrAshuShANAso mitho arNasAtau |saM yadvisho.avavR^itranta yudhmA Adinnema indrayante abhIke || 4.24.4
Adiddha nema indriyaM yajanta AditpaktiH puroLAshaM ririchyAt |Aditsomo vi papR^ichyAdasuShvInAdijjujoSha vR^iShabhaM yajadhyai || 4.24.5
kR^iNotyasmai varivo ya itthendrAya somamushate sunoti |sadhrIchInena manasAvivenantamitsakhAyaM kR^iNute samatsu || 4.24.6

yadA samaryaM vyachedR^ighAvA dIrghaM yadAjimabhyakhyadaryaH |achikradadvR^iShaNaM patnyachChA duroNa A nishitaM somasudbhiH || 4.24.8
bhUyasA vasnamacharatkanIyo.avikrIto akAniShaM punaryan |sa bhUyasA kanIyo nArirechIddInA dakShA vi duhanti pra vANam || 4.24.9
ka imaM dashabhirmamendraM krINAti dhenubhiH |yadA vR^itrANi ja~NghanadathainaM me punardadat || 4.24.10
nU ShTuta indra nU gR^iNAna iShaM jaritre nadyo na pIpeH |akAri te harivo brahma navyaM dhiyA syAma rathyaH sadAsAH || 4.24.11

ko adya naryo devakAma ushannindrasya sakhyaM jujoSha |ko vA mahe.avase pAryAya samiddhe agnau sutasoma ITTe || 4.25.1
ko nAnAma vachasA somyAya manAyurvA bhavati vasta usrAH |ka indrasya yujyaM kaH sakhitvaM ko bhrAtraM vaShTi kavaye ka UtI || 4.25.2
ko devAnAmavo adyA vR^iNIte ka AdityA.N aditiM jyotirITTe |kasyAshvinAvindro agniH sutasyAMshoH pibanti manasAvivenam || 4.25.3
tasmA agnirbhArataH sharma yaMsajjyokpashyAtsUryamuchcharantam |ya indrAya sunavAmetyAha nare naryAya nR^itamAya nR^iNAm || 4.25.4
na taM jinanti bahavo na dabhrA urvasmA aditiH sharma yaMsat |priyaH sukR^itpriya indre manAyuH priyaH suprAvIH priyo asya somI || 4.25.5
suprAvyaH prAshuShALeSha vIraH suShveH paktiM kR^iNute kevalendraH |nAsuShverApirna sakhA na jAmirduShprAvyo.avahantedavAchaH || 4.25.6
na revatA paNinA sakhyamindro.asunvatA sutapAH saM gR^iNIte |Asya vedaH khidati hanti nagnaM vi suShvaye paktaye kevalo bhUt || 4.25.7
indraM pare.avare madhyamAsa indraM yAnto.avasitAsa indram |indraM kShiyanta uta yudhyamAnA indraM naro vAjayanto havante || 4.25.8

ahaM manurabhavaM sUryashchAhaM kakShIvA.N R^iShirasmi vipraH |ahaM kutsamArjuneyaM nyR^i~nje.ahaM kavirushanA pashyatA mA || 4.26.1
ahaM bhUmimadadAmAryAyAhaM vR^iShTiM dAshuShe martyAya |ahamapo anayaM vAvashAnA mama devAso anu ketamAyan || 4.26.2
ahaM puro mandasAno vyairaM nava sAkaM navatIH shambarasya |shatatamaM veshyaM sarvatAtA divodAsamatithigvaM yadAvam || 4.26.3
pra su Sha vibhyo maruto virastu pra shyenaH shyenebhya AshupatvA |achakrayA yatsvadhayA suparNo havyaM bharanmanave devajuShTam || 4.26.4
bharadyadi virato vevijAnaH pathoruNA manojavA asarji |tUyaM yayau madhunA somyenota shravo vivide shyeno atra || 4.26.5
R^ijIpI shyeno dadamAno aMshuM parAvataH shakuno mandraM madam |somaM bharaddAdR^ihANo devAvAndivo amuShmAduttarAdAdAya || 4.26.6
AdAya shyeno abharatsomaM sahasraM savA.N ayutaM cha sAkam |atrA puraMdhirajahAdarAtIrmade somasya mUrA amUraH || 4.26.7

garbhe nu sannanveShAmavedamahaM devAnAM janimAni vishvA |shataM mA pura AyasIrarakShannadha shyeno javasA niradIyam || 4.27.1
na ghA sa mAmapa joShaM jabhArAbhImAsa tvakShasA vIryeNa |IrmA puraMdhirajahAdarAtIruta vAtA.N atarachChUshuvAnaH || 4.27.2
ava yachChyeno asvanIdadha dyorvi yadyadi vAta UhuH puraMdhim |sR^ijadyadasmA ava ha kShipajjyAM kR^ishAnurastA manasA bhuraNyan || 4.27.3
R^ijipya ImindrAvato na bhujyuM shyeno jabhAra bR^ihato adhi ShNoH |antaH patatpatatryasya parNamadha yAmani prasitasya tadveH || 4.27.4
adha shvetaM kalashaM gobhiraktamApipyAnaM maghavA shukramandhaH |adhvaryubhiH prayataM madhvo agramindro madAya prati dhatpibadhyai shUro madAya prati dhatpibadhyai || 4.27.5

tvA yujA tava tatsoma sakhya indro apo manave sasrutaskaH |ahannahimariNAtsapta sindhUnapAvR^iNodapihiteva khAni || 4.28.1
tvA yujA ni khidatsUryasyendrashchakraM sahasA sadya indo |adhi ShNunA bR^ihatA vartamAnaM maho druho apa vishvAyu dhAyi || 4.28.2
ahannindro adahadagnirindo purA dasyUnmadhyaMdinAdabhIke |durge duroNe kratvA na yAtAM purU sahasrA sharvA ni barhIt || 4.28.3
vishvasmAtsImadhamA.N indra dasyUnvisho dAsIrakR^iNoraprashastAH |abAdhethAmamR^iNataM ni shatrUnavindethAmapachitiM vadhatraiH || 4.28.4
evA satyaM maghavAnA yuvaM tadindrashcha somorvamashvyaM goH |AdardR^itamapihitAnyashnA ririchathuH kShAshchittatR^idAnA || 4.28.5

A naH stuta upa vAjebhirUtI indra yAhi haribhirmandasAnaH |tirashchidaryaH savanA purUNyA~NgUShebhirgR^iNAnaH satyarAdhAH || 4.29.1
A hi ShmA yAti naryashchikitvAnhUyamAnaH sotR^ibhirupa yaj~nam |svashvo yo abhIrurmanyamAnaH suShvANebhirmadati saM ha vIraiH || 4.29.2
shrAvayedasya karNA vAjayadhyai juShTAmanu pra dishaM mandayadhyai |udvAvR^iShANo rAdhase tuviShmAnkaranna indraH sutIrthAbhayaM cha || 4.29.3
achChA yo gantA nAdhamAnamUtI itthA vipraM havamAnaM gR^iNantam |upa tmani dadhAno dhuryAshUnsahasrANi shatAni vajrabAhuH || 4.29.4
tvotAso maghavannindra viprA vayaM te syAma sUrayo gR^iNantaH |bhejAnAso bR^ihaddivasya rAya AkAyyasya dAvane purukShoH || 4.29.5

nakirindra tvaduttaro na jyAyA.N asti vR^itrahan |nakirevA yathA tvam || 4.30.1
satrA te anu kR^iShTayo vishvA chakreva vAvR^ituH |satrA mahA.N asi shrutaH || 4.30.2
vishve chanedanA tvA devAsa indra yuyudhuH |yadahA naktamAtiraH || 4.30.3
yatrota bAdhitebhyashchakraM kutsAya yudhyate |muShAya indra sUryam || 4.30.4
yatra devA.N R^ighAyato vishvA.N ayudhya eka it |tvamindra vanU.Nrahan || 4.30.5
yatrota martyAya kamariNA indra sUryam |prAvaH shachIbhiretasham || 4.30.6
kimAdutAsi vR^itrahanmaghavanmanyumattamaH |atrAha dAnumAtiraH || 4.30.7
etadgheduta vIryamindra chakartha pauMsyam |striyaM yaddurhaNAyuvaM vadhIrduhitaraM divaH || 4.30.8
divashchidghA duhitaraM mahAnmahIyamAnAm |uShAsamindra saM piNak || 4.30.9
apoShA anasaH saratsampiShTAdaha bibhyuShI |ni yatsIM shishnathadvR^iShA || 4.30.10
etadasyA anaH shaye susampiShTaM vipAshyA |sasAra sIM parAvataH || 4.30.11
uta sindhuM vibAlyaM vitasthAnAmadhi kShami |pari ShThA indra mAyayA || 4.30.12
uta shuShNasya dhR^iShNuyA pra mR^ikSho abhi vedanam |puro yadasya sampiNak || 4.30.13
uta dAsaM kaulitaraM bR^ihataH parvatAdadhi |avAhannindra shambaram || 4.30.14
uta dAsasya varchinaH sahasrANi shatAvadhIH |adhi pa~ncha pradhI.Nriva || 4.30.15
uta tyaM putramagruvaH parAvR^iktaM shatakratuH |uktheShvindra Abhajat || 4.30.16
uta tyA turvashAyadU asnAtArA shachIpatiH |indro vidvA.N apArayat || 4.30.17
uta tyA sadya AryA sarayorindra pArataH |arNAchitrarathAvadhIH || 4.30.18
anu dvA jahitA nayo.andhaM shroNaM cha vR^itrahan |na tatte sumnamaShTave || 4.30.19
shatamashmanmayInAM purAmindro vyAsyat |divodAsAya dAshuShe || 4.30.20
asvApayaddabhItaye sahasrA triMshataM hathaiH |dAsAnAmindro mAyayA || 4.30.21
sa ghedutAsi vR^itrahansamAna indra gopatiH |yastA vishvAni chichyuShe || 4.30.22
uta nUnaM yadindriyaM kariShyA indra pauMsyam |adyA nakiShTadA minat || 4.30.23
vAmaMvAmaM ta Adure devo dadAtvaryamA |vAmaM pUShA vAmaM bhago vAmaM devaH karULatI || 4.30.24

kayA nashchitra A bhuvadUtI sadAvR^idhaH sakhA |kayA shachiShThayA vR^itA || 4.31.1
kastvA satyo madAnAM maMhiShTho matsadandhasaH |dR^iLhA chidAruje vasu || 4.31.2
abhI Shu NaH sakhInAmavitA jaritR^INAm |shataM bhavAsyUtibhiH || 4.31.3
abhI na A vavR^itsva chakraM na vR^ittamarvataH |niyudbhishcharShaNInAm || 4.31.4
pravatA hi kratUnAmA hA padeva gachChasi |abhakShi sUrye sachA || 4.31.5
saM yatta indra manyavaH saM chakrANi dadhanvire |adha tve adha sUrye || 4.31.6
uta smA hi tvAmAhurinmaghavAnaM shachIpate |dAtAramavidIdhayum || 4.31.7
uta smA sadya itpari shashamAnAya sunvate |purU chinmaMhase vasu || 4.31.8
nahi ShmA te shataM chana rAdho varanta AmuraH |na chyautnAni kariShyataH || 4.31.9
asmA.N avantu te shatamasmAnsahasramUtayaH |asmAnvishvA abhiShTayaH || 4.31.10
asmA.N ihA vR^iNIShva sakhyAya svastaye |maho rAye divitmate || 4.31.11
asmA.N aviDDhi vishvahendra rAyA parINasA |asmAnvishvAbhirUtibhiH || 4.31.12
asmabhyaM tA.N apA vR^idhi vrajA.N asteva gomataH |navAbhirindrotibhiH || 4.31.13
asmAkaM dhR^iShNuyA ratho dyumA.N indrAnapachyutaH |gavyurashvayurIyate || 4.31.14
asmAkamuttamaM kR^idhi shravo deveShu sUrya |varShiShThaM dyAmivopari || 4.31.15

A tU na indra vR^itrahannasmAkamardhamA gahi |mahAnmahIbhirUtibhiH || 4.32.1
bhR^imishchidghAsi tUtujirA chitra chitriNIShvA |chitraM kR^iNoShyUtaye || 4.32.2
dabhrebhishchichChashIyAMsaM haMsi vrAdhantamojasA |sakhibhirye tve sachA || 4.32.3
vayamindra tve sachA vayaM tvAbhi nonumaH |asmA.NasmA.N idudava || 4.32.4
sa nashchitrAbhiradrivo.anavadyAbhirUtibhiH |anAdhR^iShTAbhirA gahi || 4.32.5
bhUyAmo Shu tvAvataH sakhAya indra gomataH |yujo vAjAya ghR^iShvaye || 4.32.6
tvaM hyeka IshiSha indra vAjasya gomataH |sa no yandhi mahImiSham || 4.32.7
na tvA varante anyathA yadditsasi stuto magham |stotR^ibhya indra girvaNaH || 4.32.8
abhi tvA gotamA girAnUShata pra dAvane |indra vAjAya ghR^iShvaye || 4.32.9
pra te vochAma vIryA yA mandasAna ArujaH |puro dAsIrabhItya || 4.32.10
tA te gR^iNanti vedhaso yAni chakartha pauMsyA |suteShvindra girvaNaH || 4.32.11
avIvR^idhanta gotamA indra tve stomavAhasaH |aiShu dhA vIravadyashaH || 4.32.12
yachchiddhi shashvatAmasIndra sAdhAraNastvam |taM tvA vayaM havAmahe || 4.32.13
arvAchIno vaso bhavAsme su matsvAndhasaH |somAnAmindra somapAH || 4.32.14
asmAkaM tvA matInAmA stoma indra yachChatu |arvAgA vartayA harI || 4.32.15
puroLAshaM cha no ghaso joShayAse girashcha naH |vadhUyuriva yoShaNAm || 4.32.16
sahasraM vyatInAM yuktAnAmindramImahe |shataM somasya khAryaH || 4.32.17
sahasrA te shatA vayaM gavAmA chyAvayAmasi |asmatrA rAdha etu te || 4.32.18
dasha te kalashAnAM hiraNyAnAmadhImahi |bhUridA asi vR^itrahan || 4.32.19
bhUridA bhUri dehi no mA dabhraM bhUryA bhara |bhUri ghedindra ditsasi || 4.32.20
bhUridA hyasi shrutaH purutrA shUra vR^itrahan |A no bhajasva rAdhasi || 4.32.21
pra te babhrU vichakShaNa shaMsAmi goShaNo napAt |mAbhyAM gA anu shishrathaH || 4.32.22
kanInakeva vidradhe nave drupade arbhake |babhrU yAmeShu shobhete || 4.32.23
araM ma usrayAmNe.aramanusrayAmNe |babhrU yAmeShvasridhA || 4.32.24

pra R^ibhubhyo dUtamiva vAchamiShya upastire shvaitarIM dhenumILe |ye vAtajUtAstaraNibhirevaiH pari dyAM sadyo apaso babhUvuH || 4.33.1
yadAramakrannR^ibhavaH pitR^ibhyAM pariviShTI veShaNA daMsanAbhiH |AdiddevAnAmupa sakhyamAyandhIrAsaH puShTimavahanmanAyai || 4.33.2
punarye chakruH pitarA yuvAnA sanA yUpeva jaraNA shayAnA |te vAjo vibhvA.N R^ibhurindravanto madhupsaraso no.avantu yaj~nam || 4.33.3
yatsaMvatsamR^ibhavo gAmarakShanyatsaMvatsamR^ibhavo mA apiMshan |yatsaMvatsamabharanbhAso asyAstAbhiH shamIbhiramR^itatvamAshuH || 4.33.4
jyeShTha Aha chamasA dvA kareti kanIyAntrInkR^iNavAmetyAha |kaniShTha Aha chaturaskareti tvaShTa R^ibhavastatpanayadvacho vaH || 4.33.5
satyamUchurnara evA hi chakruranu svadhAmR^ibhavo jagmuretAm |vibhrAjamAnA.NshchamasA.N ahevAvenattvaShTA chaturo dadR^ishvAn || 4.33.6
dvAdasha dyUnyadagohyasyAtithye raNannR^ibhavaH sasantaH |sukShetrAkR^iNvannanayanta sindhUndhanvAtiShThannoShadhIrnimnamApaH || 4.33.7
rathaM ye chakruH suvR^itaM nareShThAM ye dhenuM vishvajuvaM vishvarUpAm |ta A takShantvR^ibhavo rayiM naH svavasaH svapasaH suhastAH || 4.33.8
apo hyeShAmajuShanta devA abhi kratvA manasA dIdhyAnAH |vAjo devAnAmabhavatsukarmendrasya R^ibhukShA varuNasya vibhvA || 4.33.9
ye harI medhayokthA madanta indrAya chakruH suyujA ye ashvA |te rAyaspoShaM draviNAnyasme dhatta R^ibhavaH kShemayanto na mitram || 4.33.10
idAhnaH pItimuta vo madaM dhurna R^ite shrAntasya sakhyAya devAH |te nUnamasme R^ibhavo vasUni tR^itIye asminsavane dadhAta || 4.33.11

R^ibhurvibhvA vAja indro no achChemaM yaj~naM ratnadheyopa yAta |idA hi vo dhiShaNA devyahnAmadhAtpItiM saM madA agmatA vaH || 4.34.1
vidAnAso janmano vAjaratnA uta R^itubhirR^ibhavo mAdayadhvam |saM vo madA agmata saM puraMdhiH suvIrAmasme rayimerayadhvam || 4.34.2
ayaM vo yaj~na R^ibhavo.akAri yamA manuShvatpradivo dadhidhve |pra vo.achChA jujuShANAso asthurabhUta vishve agriyota vAjAH || 4.34.3
abhUdu vo vidhate ratnadheyamidA naro dAshuShe martyAya |pibata vAjA R^ibhavo dade vo mahi tR^itIyaM savanaM madAya || 4.34.4
A vAjA yAtopa na R^ibhukShA maho naro draviNaso gR^iNAnAH |A vaH pItayo.abhipitve ahnAmimA astaM navasva iva gman || 4.34.5
A napAtaH shavaso yAtanopemaM yaj~naM namasA hUyamAnAH |sajoShasaH sUrayo yasya cha stha madhvaH pAta ratnadhA indravantaH || 4.34.6
sajoShA indra varuNena somaM sajoShAH pAhi girvaNo marudbhiH |agrepAbhirR^itupAbhiH sajoShA gnAspatnIbhI ratnadhAbhiH sajoShAH || 4.34.7
sajoShasa AdityairmAdayadhvaM sajoShasa R^ibhavaH parvatebhiH |sajoShaso daivyenA savitrA sajoShasaH sindhubhI ratnadhebhiH || 4.34.8
ye ashvinA ye pitarA ya UtI dhenuM tatakShurR^ibhavo ye ashvA |ye aMsatrA ya R^idhagrodasI ye vibhvo naraH svapatyAni chakruH || 4.34.9
ye gomantaM vAjavantaM suvIraM rayiM dhattha vasumantaM purukShum |te agrepA R^ibhavo mandasAnA asme dhatta ye cha rAtiM gR^iNanti || 4.34.10
nApAbhUta na vo.atItR^iShAmAniHshastA R^ibhavo yaj~ne asmin |samindreNa madatha saM marudbhiH saM rAjabhI ratnadheyAya devAH || 4.34.11

ihopa yAta shavaso napAtaH saudhanvanA R^ibhavo mApa bhUta |asminhi vaH savane ratnadheyaM gamantvindramanu vo madAsaH || 4.35.1
AgannR^ibhUNAmiha ratnadheyamabhUtsomasya suShutasya pItiH |sukR^ityayA yatsvapasyayA cha.N ekaM vichakra chamasaM chaturdhA || 4.35.2
vyakR^iNota chamasaM chaturdhA sakhe vi shikShetyabravIta |athaita vAjA amR^itasya panthAM gaNaM devAnAmR^ibhavaH suhastAH || 4.35.3
kimmayaH svichchamasa eSha Asa yaM kAvyena chaturo vichakra |athA sunudhvaM savanaM madAya pAta R^ibhavo madhunaH somyasya || 4.35.4
shachyAkarta pitarA yuvAnA shachyAkarta chamasaM devapAnam |shachyA harI dhanutarAvataShTendravAhAvR^ibhavo vAjaratnAH || 4.35.5
yo vaH sunotyabhipitve ahnAM tIvraM vAjAsaH savanaM madAya |tasmai rayimR^ibhavaH sarvavIramA takShata vR^iShaNo mandasAnAH || 4.35.6
prAtaH sutamapibo haryashva mAdhyaMdinaM savanaM kevalaM te |samR^ibhubhiH pibasva ratnadhebhiH sakhI.NryA.N indra chakR^iShe sukR^ityA || 4.35.7
ye devAso abhavatA sukR^ityA shyenA ivedadhi divi niSheda |te ratnaM dhAta shavaso napAtaH saudhanvanA abhavatAmR^itAsaH || 4.35.8
yattR^itIyaM savanaM ratnadheyamakR^iNudhvaM svapasyA suhastAH |tadR^ibhavaH pariShiktaM va etatsaM madebhirindriyebhiH pibadhvam || 4.35.9

anashvo jAto anabhIshurukthyo rathastrichakraH pari vartate rajaH |mahattadvo devyasya pravAchanaM dyAmR^ibhavaH pR^ithivIM yachcha puShyatha || 4.36.1
rathaM ye chakruH suvR^itaM suchetaso.avihvarantaM manasaspari dhyayA |tA.N U nvasya savanasya pItaya A vo vAjA R^ibhavo vedayAmasi || 4.36.2
tadvo vAjA R^ibhavaH supravAchanaM deveShu vibhvo abhavanmahitvanam |jivrI yatsantA pitarA sanAjurA punaryuvAnA charathAya takShatha || 4.36.3
ekaM vi chakra chamasaM chaturvayaM nishcharmaNo gAmariNIta dhItibhiH |athA deveShvamR^itatvamAnasha shruShTI vAjA R^ibhavastadva ukthyam || 4.36.4
R^ibhuto rayiH prathamashravastamo vAjashrutAso yamajIjanannaraH |vibhvataShTo vidatheShu pravAchyo yaM devAso.avathA sa vicharShaNiH || 4.36.5
sa vAjyarvA sa R^iShirvachasyayA sa shUro astA pR^itanAsu duShTaraH |sa rAyaspoShaM sa suvIryaM dadhe yaM vAjo vibhvA.N R^ibhavo yamAviShuH || 4.36.6
shreShThaM vaH pesho adhi dhAyi darshataM stomo vAjA R^ibhavastaM jujuShTana |dhIrAso hi ShThA kavayo vipashchitastAnva enA brahmaNA vedayAmasi || 4.36.7
yUyamasmabhyaM dhiShaNAbhyaspari vidvAMso vishvA naryANi bhojanA |dyumantaM vAjaM vR^iShashuShmamuttamamA no rayimR^ibhavastakShatA vayaH || 4.36.8
iha prajAmiha rayiM rarANA iha shravo vIravattakShatA naH |yena vayaM chitayemAtyanyAntaM vAjaM chitramR^ibhavo dadA naH || 4.36.9

upa no vAjA adhvaramR^ibhukShA devA yAta pathibhirdevayAnaiH |yathA yaj~naM manuSho vikShvAsu dadhidhve raNvAH sudineShvahnAm || 4.37.1
te vo hR^ide manase santu yaj~nA juShTAso adya ghR^itanirNijo guH |pra vaH sutAso harayanta pUrNAH kratve dakShAya harShayanta pItAH || 4.37.2
tryudAyaM devahitaM yathA vaH stomo vAjA R^ibhukShaNo dade vaH |juhve manuShvaduparAsu vikShu yuShme sachA bR^ihaddiveShu somam || 4.37.3
pIvo/ashvAH shuchadrathA hi bhUtAyaHshiprA vAjinaH suniShkAH |indrasya sUno shavaso napAto.anu vashchetyagriyaM madAya || 4.37.4
R^ibhumR^ibhukShaNo rayiM vAje vAjintamaM yujam |indrasvantaM havAmahe sadAsAtamamashvinam || 4.37.5
sedR^ibhavo yamavatha yUyamindrashcha martyam |sa dhIbhirastu sanitA medhasAtA so arvatA || 4.37.6
vi no vAjA R^ibhukShaNaH pathashchitana yaShTave |asmabhyaM sUrayaH stutA vishvA AshAstarIShaNi || 4.37.7
taM no vAjA R^ibhukShaNa indra nAsatyA rayim |samashvaM charShaNibhya A puru shasta maghattaye || 4.37.8

uto hi vAM dAtrA santi pUrvA yA pUrubhyastrasadasyurnitoshe |kShetrAsAM dadathururvarAsAM ghanaM dasyubhyo abhibhUtimugram || 4.38.1
uta vAjinaM puruniShShidhvAnaM dadhikrAmu dadathurvishvakR^iShTim |R^ijipyaM shyenaM pruShitapsumAshuM charkR^ityamaryo nR^ipatiM na shUram || 4.38.2
yaM sImanu pravateva dravantaM vishvaH pUrurmadati harShamANaH |paDbhirgR^idhyantaM medhayuM na shUraM rathaturaM vAtamiva dhrajantam || 4.38.3
yaH smArundhAno gadhyA samatsu sanutarashcharati goShu gachChan |AvirR^ijIko vidathA nichikyattiro aratiM paryApa AyoH || 4.38.4
uta smainaM vastramathiM na tAyumanu kroshanti kShitayo bhareShu |nIchAyamAnaM jasuriM na shyenaM shravashchAchChA pashumachcha yUtham || 4.38.5
uta smAsu prathamaH sariShyanni veveti shreNibhI rathAnAm |srajaM kR^iNvAno janyo na shubhvA reNuM rerihatkiraNaM dadashvAn || 4.38.6
uta sya vAjI sahurirR^itAvA shushrUShamANastanvA samarye |turaM yatIShu turayannR^ijipyo.adhi bhruvoH kirate reNumR^i~njan || 4.38.7
uta smAsya tanyatoriva dyorR^ighAyato abhiyujo bhayante |yadA sahasramabhi ShImayodhIddurvartuH smA bhavati bhIma R^i~njan || 4.38.8
uta smAsya panayanti janA jUtiM kR^iShTipro abhibhUtimAshoH |utainamAhuH samithe viyantaH parA dadhikrA asaratsahasraiH || 4.38.9
A dadhikrAH shavasA pa~ncha kR^iShTIH sUrya iva jyotiShApastatAna |sahasrasAH shatasA vAjyarvA pR^iNaktu madhvA samimA vachAMsi || 4.38.10

AshuM dadhikrAM tamu nu ShTavAma divaspR^ithivyA uta charkirAma |uchChantIrmAmuShasaH sUdayantvati vishvAni duritAni parShan || 4.39.1
mahashcharkarmyarvataH kratuprA dadhikrAvNaH puruvArasya vR^iShNaH |yaM pUrubhyo dIdivAMsaM nAgniM dadathurmitrAvaruNA taturim || 4.39.2
yo ashvasya dadhikrAvNo akArItsamiddhe agnA uShaso vyuShTau |anAgasaM tamaditiH kR^iNotu sa mitreNa varuNenA sajoShAH || 4.39.3
dadhikrAvNa iSha Urjo maho yadamanmahi marutAM nAma bhadram |svastaye varuNaM mitramagniM havAmaha indraM vajrabAhum || 4.39.4
indramivedubhaye vi hvayanta udIrANA yaj~namupaprayantaH |dadhikrAmu sUdanaM martyAya dadathurmitrAvaruNA no ashvam || 4.39.5
dadhikrAvNo akAriShaM jiShNorashvasya vAjinaH |surabhi no mukhA karatpra Na AyUMShi tAriShat || 4.39.6

dadhikrAvNa idu nu charkirAma vishvA inmAmuShasaH sUdayantu |apAmagneruShasaH sUryasya bR^ihaspaterA~Ngirasasya jiShNoH || 4.40.1
satvA bhariSho gaviSho duvanyasachChravasyAdiSha uShasasturaNyasat |satyo dravo dravaraH pataMgaro dadhikrAveShamUrjaM svarjanat || 4.40.2
uta smAsya dravatasturaNyataH parNaM na veranu vAti pragardhinaH |shyenasyeva dhrajato a~NkasaM pari dadhikrAvNaH sahorjA taritrataH || 4.40.3
uta sya vAjI kShipaNiM turaNyati grIvAyAM baddho apikakSha Asani |kratuM dadhikrA anu saMtavItvatpathAma~NkAMsyanvApanIphaNat || 4.40.4
haMsaH shuchiShadvasurantarikShasaddhotA vediShadatithirduroNasat |nR^iShadvarasadR^itasadvyomasadabjA gojA R^itajA adrijA R^itam || 4.40.5

indrA ko vAM varuNA sumnamApa stomo haviShmA.N amR^ito na hotA |yo vAM hR^idi kratumA.N asmaduktaH pasparshadindrAvaruNA namasvAn || 4.41.1
indrA ha yo varuNA chakra ApI devau martaH sakhyAya prayasvAn |sa hanti vR^itrA samitheShu shatrUnavobhirvA mahadbhiH sa pra shR^iNve || 4.41.2
indrA ha ratnaM varuNA dheShThetthA nR^ibhyaH shashamAnebhyastA |yadI sakhAyA sakhyAya somaiH sutebhiH suprayasA mAdayaite || 4.41.3
indrA yuvaM varuNA didyumasminnojiShThamugrA ni vadhiShTaM vajram |yo no durevo vR^ikatirdabhItistasminmimAthAmabhibhUtyojaH || 4.41.4
indrA yuvaM varuNA bhUtamasyA dhiyaH pretArA vR^iShabheva dhenoH |sA no duhIyadyavaseva gatvI sahasradhArA payasA mahI gauH || 4.41.5
toke hite tanaya urvarAsu sUro dR^ishIke vR^iShaNashcha pauMsye |indrA no atra varuNA syAtAmavobhirdasmA paritakmyAyAm || 4.41.6
yuvAmiddhyavase pUrvyAya pari prabhUtI gaviShaH svApI |vR^iNImahe sakhyAya priyAya shUrA maMhiShThA pitareva shambhU || 4.41.7
tA vAM dhiyo.avase vAjayantIrAjiM na jagmuryuvayUH sudAnU |shriye na gAva upa somamasthurindraM giro varuNaM me manIShAH || 4.41.8
imA indraM varuNaM me manIShA agmannupa draviNamichChamAnAH |upemasthurjoShTAra iva vasvo raghvIriva shravaso bhikShamANAH || 4.41.9
ashvyasya tmanA rathyasya puShTernityasya rAyaH patayaH syAma |tA chakrANA UtibhirnavyasIbhirasmatrA rAyo niyutaH sachantAm || 4.41.10
A no bR^ihantA bR^ihatIbhirUtI indra yAtaM varuNa vAjasAtau |yaddidyavaH pR^itanAsu prakrILAntasya vAM syAma sanitAra AjeH || 4.41.11

mama dvitA rAShTraM kShatriyasya vishvAyorvishve amR^itA yathA naH |kratuM sachante varuNasya devA rAjAmi kR^iShTerupamasya vavreH || 4.42.1
ahaM rAjA varuNo mahyaM tAnyasuryANi prathamA dhArayanta |kratuM sachante varuNasya devA rAjAmi kR^iShTerupamasya vavreH || 4.42.2
ahamindro varuNaste mahitvorvI gabhIre rajasI sumeke |tvaShTeva vishvA bhuvanAni vidvAnsamairayaM rodasI dhArayaM cha || 4.42.3
ahamapo apinvamukShamANA dhArayaM divaM sadana R^itasya |R^itena putro aditerR^itAvota tridhAtu prathayadvi bhUma || 4.42.4
mAM naraH svashvA vAjayanto mAM vR^itAH samaraNe havante |kR^iNomyAjiM maghavAhamindra iyarmi reNumabhibhUtyojAH || 4.42.5
ahaM tA vishvA chakaraM nakirmA daivyaM saho varate apratItam |yanmA somAso mamadanyadukthobhe bhayete rajasI apAre || 4.42.6
viduShTe vishvA bhuvanAni tasya tA pra bravIShi varuNAya vedhaH |tvaM vR^itrANi shR^iNviShe jaghanvAntvaM vR^itA.N ariNA indra sindhUn || 4.42.7
asmAkamatra pitarasta Asansapta R^iShayo daurgahe badhyamAne |ta Ayajanta trasadasyumasyA indraM na vR^itraturamardhadevam || 4.42.8
purukutsAnI hi vAmadAshaddhavyebhirindrAvaruNA namobhiH |athA rAjAnaM trasadasyumasyA vR^itrahaNaM dadathurardhadevam || 4.42.9
rAyA vayaM sasavAMso madema havyena devA yavasena gAvaH |tAM dhenumindrAvaruNA yuvaM no vishvAhA dhattamanapasphurantIm || 4.42.10

ka u shravatkatamo yaj~niyAnAM vandAru devaH katamo juShAte |kasyemAM devImamR^iteShu preShThAM hR^idi shreShAma suShTutiM suhavyAm || 4.43.1
ko mR^iLAti katama AgamiShTho devAnAmu katamaH shambhaviShThaH |rathaM kamAhurdravadashvamAshuM yaM sUryasya duhitAvR^iNIta || 4.43.2
makShU hi ShmA gachChatha Ivato dyUnindro na shaktiM paritakmyAyAm |diva AjAtA divyA suparNA kayA shachInAM bhavathaH shachiShThA || 4.43.3
kA vAM bhUdupamAtiH kayA na AshvinA gamatho hUyamAnA |ko vAM mahashchittyajaso abhIka uruShyataM mAdhvI dasrA na UtI || 4.43.4
uru vAM rathaH pari nakShati dyAmA yatsamudrAdabhi vartate vAm |madhvA mAdhvI madhu vAM pruShAyanyatsIM vAM pR^ikSho bhurajanta pakvAH || 4.43.5
sindhurha vAM rasayA si~nchadashvAnghR^iNA vayo.aruShAsaH pari gman |tadU Shu vAmajiraM cheti yAnaM yena patI bhavathaH sUryAyAH || 4.43.6
iheha yadvAM samanA papR^ikShe seyamasme sumatirvAjaratnA |uruShyataM jaritAraM yuvaM ha shritaH kAmo nAsatyA yuvadrik || 4.43.7

taM vAM rathaM vayamadyA huvema pR^ithujrayamashvinA saMgatiM goH |yaH sUryAM vahati vandhurAyurgirvAhasaM purutamaM vasUyum || 4.44.1
yuvaM shriyamashvinA devatA tAM divo napAtA vanathaH shachIbhiH |yuvorvapurabhi pR^ikShaH sachante vahanti yatkakuhAso rathe vAm || 4.44.2
ko vAmadyA karate rAtahavya Utaye vA sutapeyAya vArkaiH |R^itasya vA vanuShe pUrvyAya namo yemAno ashvinA vavartat || 4.44.3
hiraNyayena purubhU rathenemaM yaj~naM nAsatyopa yAtam |pibAtha inmadhunaH somyasya dadhatho ratnaM vidhate janAya || 4.44.4
A no yAtaM divo achChA pR^ithivyA hiraNyayena suvR^itA rathena |mA vAmanye ni yamandevayantaH saM yaddade nAbhiH pUrvyA vAm || 4.44.5
nU no rayiM puruvIraM bR^ihantaM dasrA mimAthAmubhayeShvasme |naro yadvAmashvinA stomamAvansadhastutimAjamILhAso agman || 4.44.6
iheha yadvAM samanA papR^ikShe seyamasme sumatirvAjaratnA |uruShyataM jaritAraM yuvaM ha shritaH kAmo nAsatyA yuvadrik || 4.44.7

eSha sya bhAnurudiyarti yujyate rathaH parijmA divo asya sAnavi |pR^ikShAso asminmithunA adhi trayo dR^itisturIyo madhuno vi rapshate || 4.45.1
udvAM pR^ikShAso madhumanta Irate rathA ashvAsa uShaso vyuShTiShu |aporNuvantastama A parIvR^itaM svarNa shukraM tanvanta A rajaH || 4.45.2
madhvaH pibataM madhupebhirAsabhiruta priyaM madhune yu~njAthAM ratham |A vartaniM madhunA jinvathaspatho dR^itiM vahethe madhumantamashvinA || 4.45.3
haMsAso ye vAM madhumanto asridho hiraNyaparNA uhuva uSharbudhaH |udapruto mandino mandinispR^isho madhvo na makShaH savanAni gachChathaH || 4.45.4
svadhvarAso madhumanto agnaya usrA jarante prati vastorashvinA |yanniktahastastaraNirvichakShaNaH somaM suShAva madhumantamadribhiH || 4.45.5
AkenipAso ahabhirdavidhvataH svarNa shukraM tanvanta A rajaH |sUrashchidashvAnyuyujAna Iyate vishvA.N anu svadhayA chetathaspathaH || 4.45.6
pra vAmavochamashvinA dhiyaMdhA rathaH svashvo ajaro yo asti |yena sadyaH pari rajAMsi yAtho haviShmantaM taraNiM bhojamachCha || 4.45.7

agraM pibA madhUnAM sutaM vAyo diviShTiShu |tvaM hi pUrvapA asi || 4.46.1
shatenA no abhiShTibhirniyutvA.N indrasArathiH |vAyo sutasya tR^impatam || 4.46.2
A vAM sahasraM haraya indravAyU abhi prayaH |vahantu somapItaye || 4.46.3
rathaM hiraNyavandhuramindravAyU svadhvaram |A hi sthAtho divispR^isham || 4.46.4
rathena pR^ithupAjasA dAshvAMsamupa gachChatam |indravAyU ihA gatam || 4.46.5
indravAyU ayaM sutastaM devebhiH sajoShasA |pibataM dAshuSho gR^ihe || 4.46.6
iha prayANamastu vAmindravAyU vimochanam |iha vAM somapItaye || 4.46.7

vAyo shukro ayAmi te madhvo agraM diviShTiShu |A yAhi somapItaye spArho deva niyutvatA || 4.47.1
indrashcha vAyaveShAM somAnAM pItimarhathaH |yuvAM hi yantIndavo nimnamApo na sadhryak || 4.47.2
vAyavindrashcha shuShmiNA sarathaM shavasaspatI |niyutvantA na Utaya A yAtaM somapItaye || 4.47.3
yA vAM santi puruspR^iho niyuto dAshuShe narA |asme tA yaj~navAhasendravAyU ni yachChatam || 4.47.4

vihi hotrA avItA vipo na rAyo aryaH |vAyavA chandreNa rathena yAhi sutasya pItaye || 4.48.1
niryuvANo ashastIrniyutvA.N indrasArathiH |vAyavA chandreNa rathena yAhi sutasya pItaye || 4.48.2
anu kR^iShNe vasudhitI yemAte vishvapeshasA |vAyavA chandreNa rathena yAhi sutasya pItaye || 4.48.3
vahantu tvA manoyujo yuktAso navatirnava |vAyavA chandreNa rathena yAhi sutasya pItaye || 4.48.4
vAyo shataM harINAM yuvasva poShyANAm |uta vA te sahasriNo ratha A yAtu pAjasA || 4.48.5

idaM vAmAsye haviH priyamindrAbR^ihaspatI |ukthaM madashcha shasyate || 4.49.1
ayaM vAM pari Shichyate soma indrAbR^ihaspatI |chArurmadAya pItaye || 4.49.2
A na indrAbR^ihaspatI gR^ihamindrashcha gachChatam |somapA somapItaye || 4.49.3
asme indrAbR^ihaspatI rayiM dhattaM shatagvinam |ashvAvantaM sahasriNam || 4.49.4
indrAbR^ihaspatI vayaM sute gIrbhirhavAmahe |asya somasya pItaye || 4.49.5
somamindrAbR^ihaspatI pibataM dAshuSho gR^ihe |mAdayethAM tadokasA || 4.49.6

yastastambha sahasA vi jmo antAnbR^ihaspatistriShadhastho raveNa |taM pratnAsa R^iShayo dIdhyAnAH puro viprA dadhire mandrajihvam || 4.50.1
dhunetayaH supraketaM madanto bR^ihaspate abhi ye nastatasre |pR^iShantaM sR^ipramadabdhamUrvaM bR^ihaspate rakShatAdasya yonim || 4.50.2
bR^ihaspate yA paramA parAvadata A ta R^itaspR^isho ni SheduH |tubhyaM khAtA avatA adridugdhA madhvaH shchotantyabhito virapsham || 4.50.3
bR^ihaspatiH prathamaM jAyamAno maho jyotiShaH parame vyoman |saptAsyastuvijAto raveNa vi saptarashmiradhamattamAMsi || 4.50.4
sa suShTubhA sa R^ikvatA gaNena valaM ruroja phaligaM raveNa |bR^ihaspatirusriyA havyasUdaH kanikradadvAvashatIrudAjat || 4.50.5
evA pitre vishvadevAya vR^iShNe yaj~nairvidhema namasA havirbhiH |bR^ihaspate suprajA vIravanto vayaM syAma patayo rayINAm || 4.50.6
sa idrAjA pratijanyAni vishvA shuShmeNa tasthAvabhi vIryeNa |bR^ihaspatiM yaH subhR^itaM bibharti valgUyati vandate pUrvabhAjam || 4.50.7
sa itkSheti sudhita okasi sve tasmA iLA pinvate vishvadAnIm |tasmai vishaH svayamevA namante yasminbrahmA rAjani pUrva eti || 4.50.8
apratIto jayati saM dhanAni pratijanyAnyuta yA sajanyA |avasyave yo varivaH kR^iNoti brahmaNe rAjA tamavanti devAH || 4.50.9
indrashcha somaM pibataM bR^ihaspate.asminyaj~ne mandasAnA vR^iShaNvasU |A vAM vishantvindavaH svAbhuvo.asme rayiM sarvavIraM ni yachChatam || 4.50.10
bR^ihaspata indra vardhataM naH sachA sA vAM sumatirbhUtvasme |aviShTaM dhiyo jigR^itaM puraMdhIrjajastamaryo vanuShAmarAtIH || 4.50.11

idamu tyatpurutamaM purastAjjyotistamaso vayunAvadasthAt |nUnaM divo duhitaro vibhAtIrgAtuM kR^iNavannuShaso janAya || 4.51.1
asthuru chitrA uShasaH purastAnmitA iva svaravo.adhvareShu |vyU vrajasya tamaso dvArochChantIravra~nChuchayaH pAvakAH || 4.51.2
uchChantIradya chitayanta bhojAnrAdhodeyAyoShaso maghonIH |achitre antaH paNayaH sasantvabudhyamAnAstamaso vimadhye || 4.51.3
kuvitsa devIH sanayo navo vA yAmo babhUyAduShaso vo adya |yenA navagve a~Ngire dashagve saptAsye revatI revadUSha || 4.51.4
yUyaM hi devIrR^itayugbhirashvaiH pariprayAtha bhuvanAni sadyaH |prabodhayantIruShasaH sasantaM dvipAchchatuShpAchcharathAya jIvam || 4.51.5
kva svidAsAM katamA purANI yayA vidhAnA vidadhurR^ibhUNAm |shubhaM yachChubhrA uShasashcharanti na vi j~nAyante sadR^ishIrajuryAH || 4.51.6
tA ghA tA bhadrA uShasaH purAsurabhiShTidyumnA R^itajAtasatyAH |yAsvIjAnaH shashamAna ukthaiH stuva~nChaMsandraviNaM sadya Apa || 4.51.7
tA A charanti samanA purastAtsamAnataH samanA paprathAnAH |R^itasya devIH sadaso budhAnA gavAM na sargA uShaso jarante || 4.51.8
tA innveva samanA samAnIramItavarNA uShasashcharanti |gUhantIrabhvamasitaM rushadbhiH shukrAstanUbhiH shuchayo ruchAnAH || 4.51.9
rayiM divo duhitaro vibhAtIH prajAvantaM yachChatAsmAsu devIH |syonAdA vaH pratibudhyamAnAH suvIryasya patayaH syAma || 4.51.10
tadvo divo duhitaro vibhAtIrupa bruva uShaso yaj~naketuH |vayaM syAma yashaso janeShu taddyaushcha dhattAM pR^ithivI cha devI || 4.51.11

prati ShyA sUnarI janI vyuchChantI pari svasuH |divo adarshi duhitA || 4.52.1
ashveva chitrAruShI mAtA gavAmR^itAvarI |sakhAbhUdashvinoruShAH || 4.52.2
uta sakhAsyashvinoruta mAtA gavAmasi |utoSho vasva IshiShe || 4.52.3
yAvayaddveShasaM tvA chikitvitsUnR^itAvari |prati stomairabhutsmahi || 4.52.4
prati bhadrA adR^ikShata gavAM sargA na rashmayaH |oShA aprA uru jrayaH || 4.52.5
ApapruShI vibhAvari vyAvarjyotiShA tamaH |uSho anu svadhAmava || 4.52.6
A dyAM tanoShi rashmibhirAntarikShamuru priyam |uShaH shukreNa shochiShA || 4.52.7

taddevasya saviturvAryaM mahadvR^iNImahe asurasya prachetasaH |Chardiryena dAshuShe yachChati tmanA tanno mahA.N udayAndevo aktubhiH || 4.53.1
divo dhartA bhuvanasya prajApatiH pisha~NgaM drApiM prati mu~nchate kaviH |vichakShaNaH prathayannApR^iNannurvajIjanatsavitA sumnamukthyam || 4.53.2
AprA rajAMsi divyAni pArthivA shlokaM devaH kR^iNute svAya dharmaNe |pra bAhU asrAksavitA savImani niveshayanprasuvannaktubhirjagat || 4.53.3
adAbhyo bhuvanAni prachAkashadvratAni devaH savitAbhi rakShate |prAsrAgbAhU bhuvanasya prajAbhyo dhR^itavrato maho ajmasya rAjati || 4.53.4
trirantarikShaM savitA mahitvanA trI rajAMsi paribhustrINi rochanA |tisro divaH pR^ithivIstisra invati tribhirvratairabhi no rakShati tmanA || 4.53.5
bR^ihatsumnaH prasavItA niveshano jagataH sthAturubhayasya yo vashI |sa no devaH savitA sharma yachChatvasme kShayAya trivarUthamaMhasaH || 4.53.6
Agandeva R^itubhirvardhatu kShayaM dadhAtu naH savitA suprajAmiSham |sa naH kShapAbhirahabhishcha jinvatu prajAvantaM rayimasme saminvatu || 4.53.7

abhUddevaH savitA vandyo nu na idAnImahna upavAchyo nR^ibhiH |vi yo ratnA bhajati mAnavebhyaH shreShThaM no atra draviNaM yathA dadhat || 4.54.1
devebhyo hi prathamaM yaj~niyebhyo.amR^itatvaM suvasi bhAgamuttamam |AdiddAmAnaM savitarvyUrNuShe.anUchInA jIvitA mAnuShebhyaH || 4.54.2
achittI yachchakR^imA daivye jane dInairdakShaiH prabhUtI pUruShatvatA |deveShu cha savitarmAnuSheShu cha tvaM no atra suvatAdanAgasaH || 4.54.3
na pramiye saviturdaivyasya tadyathA vishvaM bhuvanaM dhArayiShyati |yatpR^ithivyA varimannA sva~NgurirvarShmandivaH suvati satyamasya tat || 4.54.4
indrajyeShThAnbR^ihadbhyaH parvatebhyaH kShayA.N ebhyaH suvasi pastyAvataH |yathAyathA patayanto viyemira evaiva tasthuH savitaH savAya te || 4.54.5
ye te trirahansavitaH savAso divedive saubhagamAsuvanti |indro dyAvApR^ithivI sindhuradbhirAdityairno aditiH sharma yaMsat || 4.54.6

ko vastrAtA vasavaH ko varUtA dyAvAbhUmI adite trAsIthAM naH |sahIyaso varuNa mitra martAtko vo.adhvare varivo dhAti devAH || 4.55.1
pra ye dhAmAni pUrvyANyarchAnvi yaduchChAnviyotAro amUrAH |vidhAtAro vi te dadhurajasrA R^itadhItayo ruruchanta dasmAH || 4.55.2
pra pastyAmaditiM sindhumarkaiH svastimILe sakhyAya devIm |ubhe yathA no ahanI nipAta uShAsAnaktA karatAmadabdhe || 4.55.3
vyaryamA varuNashcheti panthAmiShaspatiH suvitaM gAtumagniH |indrAviShNU nR^ivadu Shu stavAnA sharma no yantamamavadvarUtham || 4.55.4
A parvatasya marutAmavAMsi devasya trAturavri bhagasya |pAtpatirjanyAdaMhaso no mitro mitriyAduta na uruShyet || 4.55.5
nU rodasI ahinA budhnyena stuvIta devI apyebhiriShTaiH |samudraM na saMcharaNe saniShyavo gharmasvaraso nadyo apa vran || 4.55.6
devairno devyaditirni pAtu devastrAtA trAyatAmaprayuchChan |nahi mitrasya varuNasya dhAsimarhAmasi pramiyaM sAnvagneH || 4.55.7
agnirIshe vasavyasyAgnirmahaH saubhagasya |tAnyasmabhyaM rAsate || 4.55.8
uSho maghonyA vaha sUnR^ite vAryA puru |asmabhyaM vAjinIvati || 4.55.9
tatsu naH savitA bhago varuNo mitro aryamA |indro no rAdhasA gamat || 4.55.10

mahI dyAvApR^ithivI iha jyeShThe ruchA bhavatAM shuchayadbhirarkaiH |yatsIM variShThe bR^ihatI viminvanruvaddhokShA paprathAnebhirevaiH || 4.56.1
devI devebhiryajate yajatrairaminatI tasthaturukShamANe |R^itAvarI adruhA devaputre yaj~nasya netrI shuchayadbhirarkaiH || 4.56.2
sa itsvapA bhuvaneShvAsa ya ime dyAvApR^ithivI jajAna |urvI gabhIre rajasI sumeke avaMshe dhIraH shachyA samairat || 4.56.3
nU rodasI bR^ihadbhirno varUthaiH patnIvadbhiriShayantI sajoShAH |urUchI vishve yajate ni pAtaM dhiyA syAma rathyaH sadAsAH || 4.56.4
pra vAM mahi dyavI abhyupastutiM bharAmahe |shuchI upa prashastaye || 4.56.5
punAne tanvA mithaH svena dakSheNa rAjathaH |UhyAthe sanAdR^itam || 4.56.6
mahI mitrasya sAdhathastarantI pipratI R^itam |pari yaj~naM ni ShedathuH || 4.56.7

kShetrasya patinA vayaM hiteneva jayAmasi |gAmashvaM poShayitnvA sa no mR^iLAtIdR^ishe || 4.57.1
kShetrasya pate madhumantamUrmiM dhenuriva payo asmAsu dhukShva |madhushchutaM ghR^itamiva supUtamR^itasya naH patayo mR^iLayantu || 4.57.2
madhumatIroShadhIrdyAva Apo madhumanno bhavatvantarikSham |kShetrasya patirmadhumAnno astvariShyanto anvenaM charema || 4.57.3
shunaM vAhAH shunaM naraH shunaM kR^iShatu lA~Ngalam |shunaM varatrA badhyantAM shunamaShTrAmudi~Ngaya || 4.57.4
shunAsIrAvimAM vAchaM juShethAM yaddivi chakrathuH payaH |tenemAmupa si~nchatam || 4.57.5
arvAchI subhage bhava sIte vandAmahe tvA |yathA naH subhagAsasi yathA naH suphalAsasi || 4.57.6
indraH sItAM ni gR^ihNAtu tAM pUShAnu yachChatu |sA naH payasvatI duhAmuttarAmuttarAM samAm || 4.57.7
shunaM naH phAlA vi kR^iShantu bhUmiM shunaM kInAshA abhi yantu vAhaiH |shunaM parjanyo madhunA payobhiH shunAsIrA shunamasmAsu dhattam || 4.57.8

samudrAdUrmirmadhumA.N udAradupAMshunA samamR^itatvamAnaT |ghR^itasya nAma guhyaM yadasti jihvA devAnAmamR^itasya nAbhiH || 4.58.1
vayaM nAma pra bravAmA ghR^itasyAsminyaj~ne dhArayAmA namobhiH |upa brahmA shR^iNavachChasyamAnaM chatuHshR^i~Ngo.avamIdgaura etat || 4.58.2
chatvAri shR^i~NgA trayo asya pAdA dve shIrShe sapta hastAso asya |tridhA baddho vR^iShabho roravIti maho devo martyA.N A vivesha || 4.58.3
tridhA hitaM paNibhirguhyamAnaM gavi devAso ghR^itamanvavindan |indra ekaM sUrya ekaM jajAna venAdekaM svadhayA niShTatakShuH || 4.58.4
etA arShanti hR^idyAtsamudrAchChatavrajA ripuNA nAvachakShe |ghR^itasya dhArA abhi chAkashImi hiraNyayo vetaso madhya AsAm || 4.58.5
samyaksravanti sarito na dhenA antarhR^idA manasA pUyamAnAH |ete arShantyUrmayo ghR^itasya mR^igA iva kShipaNorIShamANAH || 4.58.6
sindhoriva prAdhvane shUghanAso vAtapramiyaH patayanti yahvAH |ghR^itasya dhArA aruSho na vAjI kAShThA bhindannUrmibhiH pinvamAnaH || 4.58.7
abhi pravanta samaneva yoShAH kalyANyaH smayamAnAso agnim |ghR^itasya dhArAH samidho nasanta tA juShANo haryati jAtavedAH || 4.58.8
kanyA iva vahatumetavA u a~njya~njAnA abhi chAkashImi |yatra somaH sUyate yatra yaj~no ghR^itasya dhArA abhi tatpavante || 4.58.9
abhyarShata suShTutiM gavyamAjimasmAsu bhadrA draviNAni dhatta |imaM yaj~naM nayata devatA no ghR^itasya dhArA madhumatpavante || 4.58.10
dhAmante vishvaM bhuvanamadhi shritamantaH samudre hR^idyantarAyuShi |apAmanIke samithe ya AbhR^itastamashyAma madhumantaM ta Urmim || 4.58.11

##
Last updated July 2, 2013

Special mention : Initial processing and help by Avinash and Shashi Sathaye, 
Avinash Chopde, Shree Devi Kumar, Sunder Hattangadi, John Gardner.
Reprocessed from Original in final form by Detlef Eichler with additional corrections.
See Detlef's site http://www.detlef108.de/Rigveda.htm
for other details and formats.

The text is shown without accents (Anudattas, dependent Svaritas,
and independent Svaritas including Kampas). Words are connected (agnimILe). 
Ch is doubled as in gachChati according to the rules of Rigveda-Pratishakhya. 
At the end of a word m is replaced by Anusvara M if the initial letter of the
following word is a labial stop consonant (p, ph, b, bh, m).
Visarga H before sh, Sh or s followed by a voiceless consonant has been restored.

Source : The Aufrecht/van Nooten/Holland (Samhita) version
of the Rigveda (http://www.people.fas.harvard.edu/~witzel/onlineRV.htm).
In this text accented vowels have Udatta or 'independent Svarita' markers.
Kampas are not shown. Words are separated (agnim ILe). 
Ch is not doubled as in gaChati. At the end of a word we find m before
a following labial stop consonant (p, ph, b, bh, m).
Visarga H before sh, Sh or s followed by a voiceless consonant has 
been dropped according to a rule of  Rigveda-Pratishakhya.

Send corrections to   : detlefeichler@googlemail.com, sanskrit@cheerful.com

The text is to be used for personal studies and research only.
Any use for commercial purpose is prohibited as a `gentleman's' agreement.


abodhyagniH samidhA janAnAM prati dhenumivAyatImuShAsam |yahvA iva pra vayAmujjihAnAH pra bhAnavaH sisrate nAkamachCha || 5.1.1
abodhi hotA yajathAya devAnUrdhvo agniH sumanAH prAtarasthAt |samiddhasya rushadadarshi pAjo mahAndevastamaso niramochi || 5.1.2
yadIM gaNasya rashanAmajIgaH shuchira~Nkte shuchibhirgobhiragniH |AddakShiNA yujyate vAjayantyuttAnAmUrdhvo adhayajjuhUbhiH || 5.1.3
agnimachChA devayatAM manAMsi chakShUMShIva sUrye saM charanti |yadIM suvAte uShasA virUpe shveto vAjI jAyate agre ahnAm || 5.1.4
janiShTa hi jenyo agre ahnAM hito hiteShvaruSho vaneShu |damedame sapta ratnA dadhAno.agnirhotA ni ShasAdA yajIyAn || 5.1.5
agnirhotA nyasIdadyajIyAnupasthe mAtuH surabhA u loke |yuvA kaviH puruniShTha R^itAvA dhartA kR^iShTInAmuta madhya iddhaH || 5.1.6
pra Nu tyaM vipramadhvareShu sAdhumagniM hotAramILate namobhiH |A yastatAna rodasI R^itena nityaM mR^ijanti vAjinaM ghR^itena || 5.1.7
mArjAlyo mR^ijyate sve damUnAH kaviprashasto atithiH shivo naH |sahasrashR^i~Ngo vR^iShabhastadojA vishvA.N agne sahasA prAsyanyAn || 5.1.8
pra sadyo agne atyeShyanyAnAviryasmai chArutamo babhUtha |ILenyo vapuShyo vibhAvA priyo vishAmatithirmAnuShINAm || 5.1.9
tubhyaM bharanti kShitayo yaviShTha balimagne antita ota dUrAt |A bhandiShThasya sumatiM chikiddhi bR^ihatte agne mahi sharma bhadram || 5.1.10
Adya rathaM bhAnumo bhAnumantamagne tiShTha yajatebhiH samantam |vidvAnpathInAmurvantarikShameha devAnhaviradyAya vakShi || 5.1.11
avochAma kavaye medhyAya vacho vandAru vR^iShabhAya vR^iShNe |gaviShThiro namasA stomamagnau divIva rukmamuruvya~nchamashret || 5.1.12

kumAraM mAtA yuvatiH samubdhaM guhA bibharti na dadAti pitre |anIkamasya na minajjanAsaH puraH pashyanti nihitamaratau || 5.2.1
kametaM tvaM yuvate kumAraM peShI bibharShi mahiShI jajAna |pUrvIrhi garbhaH sharado vavardhApashyaM jAtaM yadasUta mAtA || 5.2.2
hiraNyadantaM shuchivarNamArAtkShetrAdapashyamAyudhA mimAnam |dadAno asmA amR^itaM vipR^ikvatkiM mAmanindrAH kR^iNavannanukthAH || 5.2.3
kShetrAdapashyaM sanutashcharantaM sumadyUthaM na puru shobhamAnam |na tA agR^ibhrannajaniShTa hi ShaH paliknIridyuvatayo bhavanti || 5.2.4
ke me maryakaM vi yavanta gobhirna yeShAM gopA araNashchidAsa |ya IM jagR^ibhurava te sR^ijantvAjAti pashva upa nashchikitvAn || 5.2.5
vasAM rAjAnaM vasatiM janAnAmarAtayo ni dadhurmartyeShu |brahmANyatrerava taM sR^ijantu ninditAro nindyAso bhavantu || 5.2.6
shunashchichChepaM niditaM sahasrAdyUpAdamu~ncho ashamiShTa hi ShaH |evAsmadagne vi mumugdhi pAshAnhotashchikitva iha tU niShadya || 5.2.7
hR^iNIyamAno apa hi madaiyeH pra me devAnAM vratapA uvAcha |indro vidvA.N anu hi tvA chachakSha tenAhamagne anushiShTa AgAm || 5.2.8
vi jyotiShA bR^ihatA bhAtyagnirAvirvishvAni kR^iNute mahitvA |prAdevIrmAyAH sahate durevAH shishIte shR^i~Nge rakShase vinikShe || 5.2.9
uta svAnAso divi ShantvagnestigmAyudhA rakShase hantavA u |made chidasya pra rujanti bhAmA na varante paribAdho adevIH || 5.2.10
etaM te stomaM tuvijAta vipro rathaM na dhIraH svapA atakSham |yadIdagne prati tvaM deva haryAH svarvatIrapa enA jayema || 5.2.11
tuvigrIvo vR^iShabho vAvR^idhAno.ashatrvaryaH samajAti vedaH |itImamagnimamR^itA avochanbarhiShmate manave sharma yaMsaddhaviShmate manave sharma yaMsat || 5.2.12

tvamagne varuNo jAyase yattvaM mitro bhavasi yatsamiddhaH |tve vishve sahasasputra devAstvamindro dAshuShe martyAya || 5.3.1
tvamaryamA bhavasi yatkanInAM nAma svadhAvanguhyaM bibharShi |a~njanti mitraM sudhitaM na gobhiryaddampatI samanasA kR^iNoShi || 5.3.2
tava shriye maruto marjayanta rudra yatte janima chAru chitram |padaM yadviShNorupamaM nidhAyi tena pAsi guhyaM nAma gonAm || 5.3.3
tava shriyA sudR^isho deva devAH purU dadhAnA amR^itaM sapanta |hotAramagniM manuSho ni Shedurdashasyanta ushijaH shaMsamAyoH || 5.3.4
na tvaddhotA pUrvo agne yajIyAnna kAvyaiH paro asti svadhAvaH |vishashcha yasyA atithirbhavAsi sa yaj~nena vanavaddeva martAn || 5.3.5
vayamagne vanuyAma tvotA vasUyavo haviShA budhyamAnAH |vayaM samarye vidatheShvahnAM vayaM rAyA sahasasputra martAn || 5.3.6
yo na Ago abhyeno bharAtyadhIdaghamaghashaMse dadhAta |jahI chikitvo abhishastimetAmagne yo no marchayati dvayena || 5.3.7
tvAmasyA vyuShi deva pUrve dUtaM kR^iNvAnA ayajanta havyaiH |saMsthe yadagna Iyase rayINAM devo martairvasubhiridhyamAnaH || 5.3.8
ava spR^idhi pitaraM yodhi vidvAnputro yaste sahasaH sUna Uhe |kadA chikitvo abhi chakShase no.agne kadA.N R^itachidyAtayAse || 5.3.9
bhUri nAma vandamAno dadhAti pitA vaso yadi tajjoShayAse |kuviddevasya sahasA chakAnaH sumnamagnirvanate vAvR^idhAnaH || 5.3.10
tvama~Nga jaritAraM yaviShTha vishvAnyagne duritAti parShi |stenA adR^ishranripavo janAso.aj~nAtaketA vR^ijinA abhUvan || 5.3.11
ime yAmAsastvadrigabhUvanvasave vA tadidAgo avAchi |nAhAyamagnirabhishastaye no na rIShate vAvR^idhAnaH parA dAt || 5.3.12

tvAmagne vasupatiM vasUnAmabhi pra mande adhvareShu rAjan |tvayA vAjaM vAjayanto jayemAbhi ShyAma pR^itsutIrmartyAnAm || 5.4.1
havyavALagnirajaraH pitA no vibhurvibhAvA sudR^ishIko asme |sugArhapatyAH samiSho didIhyasmadryaksaM mimIhi shravAMsi || 5.4.2
vishAM kaviM vishpatiM mAnuShINAM shuchiM pAvakaM ghR^itapR^iShThamagnim |ni hotAraM vishvavidaM dadhidhve sa deveShu vanate vAryANi || 5.4.3
juShasvAgna iLayA sajoShA yatamAno rashmibhiH sUryasya |juShasva naH samidhaM jAtaveda A cha devAnhaviradyAya vakShi || 5.4.4
juShTo damUnA atithirduroNa imaM no yaj~namupa yAhi vidvAn |vishvA agne abhiyujo vihatyA shatrUyatAmA bharA bhojanAni || 5.4.5
vadhena dasyuM pra hi chAtayasva vayaH kR^iNvAnastanve svAyai |piparShi yatsahasasputra devAntso agne pAhi nR^itama vAje asmAn || 5.4.6
vayaM te agna ukthairvidhema vayaM havyaiH pAvaka bhadrashoche |asme rayiM vishvavAraM saminvAsme vishvAni draviNAni dhehi || 5.4.7
asmAkamagne adhvaraM juShasva sahasaH sUno triShadhastha havyam |vayaM deveShu sukR^itaH syAma sharmaNA nastrivarUthena pAhi || 5.4.8
vishvAni no durgahA jAtavedaH sindhuM na nAvA duritAti parShi |agne atrivannamasA gR^iNAno.asmAkaM bodhyavitA tanUnAm || 5.4.9
yastvA hR^idA kIriNA manyamAno.amartyaM martyo johavImi |jAtavedo yasho asmAsu dhehi prajAbhiragne amR^itatvamashyAm || 5.4.10
yasmai tvaM sukR^ite jAtaveda u lokamagne kR^iNavaH syonam |ashvinaM sa putriNaM vIravantaM gomantaM rayiM nashate svasti || 5.4.11

susamiddhAya shochiShe ghR^itaM tIvraM juhotana |agnaye jAtavedase || 5.5.1
narAshaMsaH suShUdatImaM yaj~namadAbhyaH |kavirhi madhuhastyaH || 5.5.2
ILito agna A vahendraM chitramiha priyam |sukhai rathebhirUtaye || 5.5.3
UrNamradA vi prathasvAbhyarkA anUShata |bhavA naH shubhra sAtaye || 5.5.4
devIrdvAro vi shrayadhvaM suprAyaNA na Utaye |prapra yaj~naM pR^iNItana || 5.5.5
supratIke vayovR^idhA yahvI R^itasya mAtarA |doShAmuShAsamImahe || 5.5.6
vAtasya patmannILitA daivyA hotArA manuShaH |imaM no yaj~namA gatam || 5.5.7
iLA sarasvatI mahI tisro devIrmayobhuvaH |barhiH sIdantvasridhaH || 5.5.8
shivastvaShTarihA gahi vibhuH poSha uta tmanA |yaj~neyaj~ne na udava || 5.5.9
yatra vettha vanaspate devAnAM guhyA nAmAni |tatra havyAni gAmaya || 5.5.10
svAhAgnaye varuNAya svAhendrAya marudbhyaH |svAhA devebhyo haviH || 5.5.11

agniM taM manye yo vasurastaM yaM yanti dhenavaH |astamarvanta Ashavo.astaM nityAso vAjina iShaM stotR^ibhya A bhara || 5.6.1
so agniryo vasurgR^iNe saM yamAyanti dhenavaH |samarvanto raghudruvaH saM sujAtAsaH sUraya iShaM stotR^ibhya A bhara || 5.6.2
agnirhi vAjinaM vishe dadAti vishvacharShaNiH |agnI rAye svAbhuvaM sa prIto yAti vAryamiShaM stotR^ibhya A bhara || 5.6.3
A te agna idhImahi dyumantaM devAjaram |yaddha syA te panIyasI samiddIdayati dyavIShaM stotR^ibhya A bhara || 5.6.4
A te agna R^ichA haviH shukrasya shochiShaspate |sushchandra dasma vishpate havyavAT tubhyaM hUyata iShaM stotR^ibhya A bhara || 5.6.5
pro tye agnayo.agniShu vishvaM puShyanti vAryam |te hinvire ta invire ta iShaNyantyAnuShagiShaM stotR^ibhya A bhara || 5.6.6
tava tye agne archayo mahi vrAdhanta vAjinaH |ye patvabhiH shaphAnAM vrajA bhuranta gonAmiShaM stotR^ibhya A bhara || 5.6.7
navA no agna A bhara stotR^ibhyaH sukShitIriShaH |te syAma ya AnR^ichustvAdUtAso damedama iShaM stotR^ibhya A bhara || 5.6.8
ubhe sushchandra sarpiSho darvI shrINISha Asani |uto na utpupUryA uktheShu shavasaspata iShaM stotR^ibhya A bhara || 5.6.9
evA.N agnimajuryamurgIrbhiryaj~nebhirAnuShak |dadhadasme suvIryamuta tyadAshvashvyamiShaM stotR^ibhya A bhara || 5.6.10

sakhAyaH saM vaH samya~nchamiShaM stomaM chAgnaye |varShiShThAya kShitInAmUrjo naptre sahasvate || 5.7.1
kutrA chidyasya samR^itau raNvA naro nR^iShadane |arhantashchidyamindhate saMjanayanti jantavaH || 5.7.2
saM yadiSho vanAmahe saM havyA mAnuShANAm |uta dyumnasya shavasa R^itasya rashmimA dade || 5.7.3
sa smA kR^iNoti ketumA naktaM chiddUra A sate |pAvako yadvanaspatInpra smA minAtyajaraH || 5.7.4
ava sma yasya veShaNe svedaM pathiShu juhvati |abhImaha svajenyaM bhUmA pR^iShTheva ruruhuH || 5.7.5
yaM martyaH puruspR^ihaM vidadvishvasya dhAyase |pra svAdanaM pitUnAmastatAtiM chidAyave || 5.7.6
sa hi ShmA dhanvAkShitaM dAtA na dAtyA pashuH |hirishmashruH shuchidannR^ibhuranibhR^iShTataviShiH || 5.7.7
shuchiH Shma yasmA atrivatpra svadhitIva rIyate |suShUrasUta mAtA krANA yadAnashe bhagam || 5.7.8
A yaste sarpirAsute.agne shamasti dhAyase |aiShu dyumnamuta shrava A chittaM martyeShu dhAH || 5.7.9
iti chinmanyumadhrijastvAdAtamA pashuM dade |Adagne apR^iNato.atriH sAsahyAddasyUniShaH sAsahyAnnR^In || 5.7.10

tvAmagna R^itAyavaH samIdhire pratnaM pratnAsa Utaye sahaskR^ita |purushchandraM yajataM vishvadhAyasaM damUnasaM gR^ihapatiM vareNyam || 5.8.1
tvAmagne atithiM pUrvyaM vishaH shochiShkeshaM gR^ihapatiM ni Shedire |bR^ihatketuM pururUpaM dhanaspR^itaM susharmANaM svavasaM jaradviSham || 5.8.2
tvAmagne mAnuShIrILate visho hotrAvidaM vivichiM ratnadhAtamam |guhA santaM subhaga vishvadarshataM tuviShvaNasaM suyajaM ghR^itashriyam || 5.8.3
tvAmagne dharNasiM vishvadhA vayaM gIrbhirgR^iNanto namasopa sedima |sa no juShasva samidhAno a~Ngiro devo martasya yashasA sudItibhiH || 5.8.4
tvamagne pururUpo vishevishe vayo dadhAsi pratnathA puruShTuta |purUNyannA sahasA vi rAjasi tviShiH sA te titviShANasya nAdhR^iShe || 5.8.5
tvAmagne samidhAnaM yaviShThya devA dUtaM chakrire havyavAhanam |urujrayasaM ghR^itayonimAhutaM tveShaM chakShurdadhire chodayanmati || 5.8.6
tvAmagne pradiva AhutaM ghR^itaiH sumnAyavaH suShamidhA samIdhire |sa vAvR^idhAna oShadhIbhirukShito.abhi jrayAMsi pArthivA vi tiShThase || 5.8.7

tvAmagne haviShmanto devaM martAsa ILate |manye tvA jAtavedasaM sa havyA vakShyAnuShak || 5.9.1
agnirhotA dAsvataH kShayasya vR^iktabarhiShaH |saM yaj~nAsashcharanti yaM saM vAjAsaH shravasyavaH || 5.9.2
uta sma yaM shishuM yathA navaM janiShTAraNI |dhartAraM mAnuShINAM vishAmagniM svadhvaram || 5.9.3
uta sma durgR^ibhIyase putro na hvAryANAm |purU yo dagdhAsi vanAgne pashurna yavase || 5.9.4
adha sma yasyArchayaH samyaksaMyanti dhUminaH |yadImaha trito divyupa dhmAteva dhamati shishIte dhmAtarI yathA || 5.9.5
tavAhamagna Utibhirmitrasya cha prashastibhiH |dveShoyuto na duritA turyAma martyAnAm || 5.9.6
taM no agne abhI naro rayiM sahasva A bhara |sa kShepayatsa poShayadbhuvadvAjasya sAtaya utaidhi pR^itsu no vR^idhe || 5.9.7

agna ojiShThamA bhara dyumnamasmabhyamadhrigo |pra no rAyA parINasA ratsi vAjAya panthAm || 5.10.1
tvaM no agne adbhuta kratvA dakShasya maMhanA |tve asuryamAruhatkrANA mitro na yaj~niyaH || 5.10.2
tvaM no agna eShAM gayaM puShTiM cha vardhaya |ye stomebhiH pra sUrayo naro maghAnyAnashuH || 5.10.3
ye agne chandra te giraH shumbhantyashvarAdhasaH |shuShmebhiH shuShmiNo naro divashchidyeShAM bR^ihatsukIrtirbodhati tmanA || 5.10.4
tava tye agne archayo bhrAjanto yanti dhR^iShNuyA |parijmAno na vidyutaH svAno ratho na vAjayuH || 5.10.5
nU no agna Utaye sabAdhasashcha rAtaye |asmAkAsashcha sUrayo vishvA AshAstarIShaNi || 5.10.6
tvaM no agne a~NgiraH stutaH stavAna A bhara |hotarvibhvAsahaM rayiM stotR^ibhyaH stavase cha na utaidhi pR^itsu no vR^idhe || 5.10.7

janasya gopA ajaniShTa jAgR^iviragniH sudakShaH suvitAya navyase |ghR^itapratIko bR^ihatA divispR^ishA dyumadvi bhAti bharatebhyaH shuchiH || 5.11.1
yaj~nasya ketuM prathamaM purohitamagniM narastriShadhasthe samIdhire |indreNa devaiH sarathaM sa barhiShi sIdanni hotA yajathAya sukratuH || 5.11.2
asammR^iShTo jAyase mAtroH shuchirmandraH kavirudatiShTho vivasvataH |ghR^itena tvAvardhayannagna Ahuta dhUmaste keturabhavaddivi shritaH || 5.11.3
agnirno yaj~namupa vetu sAdhuyAgniM naro vi bharante gR^ihegR^ihe |agnirdUto abhavaddhavyavAhano.agniM vR^iNAnA vR^iNate kavikratum || 5.11.4
tubhyedamagne madhumattamaM vachastubhyaM manIShA iyamastu shaM hR^ide |tvAM giraH sindhumivAvanIrmahIrA pR^iNanti shavasA vardhayanti cha || 5.11.5
tvAmagne a~Ngiraso guhA hitamanvavinda~nChishriyANaM vanevane |sa jAyase mathyamAnaH saho mahattvAmAhuH sahasasputrama~NgiraH || 5.11.6

prAgnaye bR^ihate yaj~niyAya R^itasya vR^iShNe asurAya manma |ghR^itaM na yaj~na Asye supUtaM giraM bhare vR^iShabhAya pratIchIm || 5.12.1
R^itaM chikitva R^itamichchikiddhyR^itasya dhArA anu tR^indhi pUrvIH |nAhaM yAtuM sahasA na dvayena R^itaM sapAmyaruShasya vR^iShNaH || 5.12.2
kayA no agna R^itayannR^itena bhuvo navedA uchathasya navyaH |vedA me deva R^itupA R^itUnAM nAhaM patiM saniturasya rAyaH || 5.12.3
ke te agne ripave bandhanAsaH ke pAyavaH saniShanta dyumantaH |ke dhAsimagne anR^itasya pAnti ka Asato vachasaH santi gopAH || 5.12.4
sakhAyaste viShuNA agna ete shivAsaH santo ashivA abhUvan |adhUrShata svayamete vachobhirR^ijUyate vR^ijinAni bruvantaH || 5.12.5
yaste agne namasA yaj~namITTa R^itaM sa pAtyaruShasya vR^iShNaH |tasya kShayaH pR^ithurA sAdhuretu prasarsrANasya nahuShasya sheShaH || 5.12.6

archantastvA havAmahe.archantaH samidhImahi |agne archanta Utaye || 5.13.1
agneH stomaM manAmahe sidhramadya divispR^ishaH |devasya draviNasyavaH || 5.13.2
agnirjuShata no giro hotA yo mAnuSheShvA |sa yakShaddaivyaM janam || 5.13.3
tvamagne saprathA asi juShTo hotA vareNyaH |tvayA yaj~naM vi tanvate || 5.13.4
tvAmagne vAjasAtamaM viprA vardhanti suShTutam |sa no rAsva suvIryam || 5.13.5
agne nemirarA.N iva devA.NstvaM paribhUrasi |A rAdhashchitramR^i~njase || 5.13.6

agniM stomena bodhaya samidhAno amartyam |havyA deveShu no dadhat || 5.14.1
tamadhvareShvILate devaM martA amartyam |yajiShThaM mAnuShe jane || 5.14.2
taM hi shashvanta ILate sruchA devaM ghR^itashchutA |agniM havyAya voLhave || 5.14.3
agnirjAto arochata ghnandasyU~njyotiShA tamaH |avindadgA apaH svaH || 5.14.4
agnimILenyaM kaviM ghR^itapR^iShThaM saparyata |vetu me shR^iNavaddhavam || 5.14.5
agniM ghR^itena vAvR^idhuH stomebhirvishvacharShaNim |svAdhIbhirvachasyubhiH || 5.14.6

pra vedhase kavaye vedyAya giraM bhare yashase pUrvyAya |ghR^itaprasatto asuraH sushevo rAyo dhartA dharuNo vasvo agniH || 5.15.1
R^itena R^itaM dharuNaM dhArayanta yaj~nasya shAke parame vyoman |divo dharmandharuNe seduSho nR^I~njAtairajAtA.N abhi ye nanakShuH || 5.15.2
a~Nhoyuvastanvastanvate vi vayo mahadduShTaraM pUrvyAya |sa saMvato navajAtastuturyAtsi~NhaM na kruddhamabhitaH pari ShThuH || 5.15.3
mAteva yadbharase paprathAno janaMjanaM dhAyase chakShase cha |vayovayo jarase yaddadhAnaH pari tmanA viShurUpo jigAsi || 5.15.4
vAjo nu te shavasaspAtvantamuruM doghaM dharuNaM deva rAyaH |padaM na tAyurguhA dadhAno maho rAye chitayannatrimaspaH || 5.15.5

bR^ihadvayo hi bhAnave.archA devAyAgnaye |yaM mitraM na prashastibhirmartAso dadhire puraH || 5.16.1
sa hi dyubhirjanAnAM hotA dakShasya bAhvoH |vi havyamagnirAnuShagbhago na vAramR^iNvati || 5.16.2
asya stome maghonaH sakhye vR^iddhashochiShaH |vishvA yasmintuviShvaNi samarye shuShmamAdadhuH || 5.16.3
adhA hyagna eShAM suvIryasya maMhanA |tamidyahvaM na rodasI pari shravo babhUvatuH || 5.16.4
nU na ehi vAryamagne gR^iNAna A bhara |ye vayaM ye cha sUrayaH svasti dhAmahe sachotaidhi pR^itsu no vR^idhe || 5.16.5

A yaj~nairdeva martya itthA tavyAMsamUtaye |agniM kR^ite svadhvare pUrurILItAvase || 5.17.1
asya hi svayashastara AsA vidharmanmanyase |taM nAkaM chitrashochiShaM mandraM paro manIShayA || 5.17.2
asya vAsA u archiShA ya Ayukta tujA girA |divo na yasya retasA bR^ihachChochantyarchayaH || 5.17.3
asya kratvA vichetaso dasmasya vasu ratha A |adhA vishvAsu havyo.agnirvikShu pra shasyate || 5.17.4
nU na iddhi vAryamAsA sachanta sUrayaH |Urjo napAdabhiShTaye pAhi shagdhi svastaya utaidhi pR^itsu no vR^idhe || 5.17.5

prAtaragniH purupriyo vishaH stavetAtithiH |vishvAni yo amartyo havyA marteShu raNyati || 5.18.1
dvitAya mR^iktavAhase svasya dakShasya maMhanA |induM sa dhatta AnuShakstotA chitte amartya || 5.18.2
taM vo dIrghAyushochiShaM girA huve maghonAm |ariShTo yeShAM ratho vyashvadAvannIyate || 5.18.3
chitrA vA yeShu dIdhitirAsannukthA pAnti ye |stIrNaM barhiH svarNare shravAMsi dadhire pari || 5.18.4
ye me pa~nchAshataM dadurashvAnAM sadhastuti |dyumadagne mahi shravo bR^ihatkR^idhi maghonAM nR^ivadamR^ita nR^iNAm || 5.18.5

abhyavasthAH pra jAyante pra vavrervavrishchiketa |upasthe mAturvi chaShTe || 5.19.1
juhure vi chitayanto.animiShaM nR^imNaM pAnti |A dR^iLhAM puraM vivishuH || 5.19.2
A shvaitreyasya jantavo dyumadvardhanta kR^iShTayaH |niShkagrIvo bR^ihaduktha enA madhvA na vAjayuH || 5.19.3
priyaM dugdhaM na kAmyamajAmi jAmyoH sachA |gharmo na vAjajaTharo.adabdhaH shashvato dabhaH || 5.19.4
krILanno rashma A bhuvaH saM bhasmanA vAyunA vevidAnaH |tA asya sandhR^iShajo na tigmAH susaMshitA vakShyo vakShaNesthAH || 5.19.5

yamagne vAjasAtama tvaM chinmanyase rayim |taM no gIrbhiH shravAyyaM devatrA panayA yujam || 5.20.1
ye agne nerayanti te vR^iddhA ugrasya shavasaH |apa dveSho apa hvaro.anyavratasya sashchire || 5.20.2
hotAraM tvA vR^iNImahe.agne dakShasya sAdhanam |yaj~neShu pUrvyaM girA prayasvanto havAmahe || 5.20.3
itthA yathA ta Utaye sahasAvandivedive |rAya R^itAya sukrato gobhiH ShyAma sadhamAdo vIraiH syAma sadhamAdaH || 5.20.4

manuShvattvA ni dhImahi manuShvatsamidhImahi |agne manuShvada~Ngiro devAndevayate yaja || 5.21.1
tvaM hi mAnuShe jane.agne suprIta idhyase |sruchastvA yantyAnuShaksujAta sarpirAsute || 5.21.2
tvAM vishve sajoShaso devAso dUtamakrata |saparyantastvA kave yaj~neShu devamILate || 5.21.3
devaM vo devayajyayAgnimILIta martyaH |samiddhaH shukra dIdihyR^itasya yonimAsadaH sasasya yonimAsadaH || 5.21.4

pra vishvasAmannatrivadarchA pAvakashochiShe |yo adhvareShvIDyo hotA mandratamo vishi || 5.22.1
nyagniM jAtavedasaM dadhAtA devamR^itvijam |pra yaj~na etvAnuShagadyA devavyachastamaH || 5.22.2
chikitvinmanasaM tvA devaM martAsa Utaye |vareNyasya te.avasa iyAnAso amanmahi || 5.22.3
agne chikiddhyasya na idaM vachaH sahasya |taM tvA sushipra dampate stomairvardhantyatrayo gIrbhiH shumbhantyatrayaH || 5.22.4

agne sahantamA bhara dyumnasya prAsahA rayim |vishvA yashcharShaNIrabhyAsA vAjeShu sAsahat || 5.23.1
tamagne pR^itanAShahaM rayiM sahasva A bhara |tvaM hi satyo adbhuto dAtA vAjasya gomataH || 5.23.2
vishve hi tvA sajoShaso janAso vR^iktabarhiShaH |hotAraM sadmasu priyaM vyanti vAryA puru || 5.23.3
sa hi ShmA vishvacharShaNirabhimAti saho dadhe |agna eShu kShayeShvA revannaH shukra dIdihi dyumatpAvaka dIdihi || 5.23.4

agne tvaM no antama uta trAtA shivo bhavA varUthyaH || 5.24.1
vasuragnirvasushravA achChA nakShi dyumattamaM rayiM dAH || 5.24.2
sa no bodhi shrudhI havamuruShyA No aghAyataH samasmAt || 5.24.3
taM tvA shochiShTha dIdivaH sumnAya nUnamImahe sakhibhyaH || 5.24.4

achChA vo agnimavase devaM gAsi sa no vasuH |rAsatputra R^iShUNAmR^itAvA parShati dviShaH || 5.25.1
sa hi satyo yaM pUrve chiddevAsashchidyamIdhire |hotAraM mandrajihvamitsudItibhirvibhAvasum || 5.25.2
sa no dhItI variShThayA shreShThayA cha sumatyA |agne rAyo didIhi naH suvR^iktibhirvareNya || 5.25.3
agnirdeveShu rAjatyagnirmarteShvAvishan |agnirno havyavAhano.agniM dhIbhiH saparyata || 5.25.4
agnistuvishravastamaM tuvibrahmANamuttamam |atUrtaM shrAvayatpatiM putraM dadAti dAshuShe || 5.25.5
agnirdadAti satpatiM sAsAha yo yudhA nR^ibhiH |agniratyaM raghuShyadaM jetAramaparAjitam || 5.25.6
yadvAhiShThaM tadagnaye bR^ihadarcha vibhAvaso |mahiShIva tvadrayistvadvAjA udIrate || 5.25.7
tava dyumanto archayo grAvevochyate bR^ihat |uto te tanyaturyathA svAno arta tmanA divaH || 5.25.8
evA.N agniM vasUyavaH sahasAnaM vavandima |sa no vishvA ati dviShaH parShannAveva sukratuH || 5.25.9

agne pAvaka rochiShA mandrayA deva jihvayA |A devAnvakShi yakShi cha || 5.26.1
taM tvA ghR^itasnavImahe chitrabhAno svardR^isham |devA.N A vItaye vaha || 5.26.2
vItihotraM tvA kave dyumantaM samidhImahi |agne bR^ihantamadhvare || 5.26.3
agne vishvebhirA gahi devebhirhavyadAtaye |hotAraM tvA vR^iNImahe || 5.26.4
yajamAnAya sunvata Agne suvIryaM vaha |devairA satsi barhiShi || 5.26.5
samidhAnaH sahasrajidagne dharmANi puShyasi |devAnAM dUta ukthyaH || 5.26.6
nyagniM jAtavedasaM hotravAhaM yaviShThyam |dadhAtA devamR^itvijam || 5.26.7
pra yaj~na etvAnuShagadyA devavyachastamaH |stR^iNIta barhirAsade || 5.26.8
edaM maruto ashvinA mitraH sIdantu varuNaH |devAsaH sarvayA vishA || 5.26.9

anasvantA satpatirmAmahe me gAvA chetiShTho asuro maghonaH |traivR^iShNo agne dashabhiH sahasrairvaishvAnara tryaruNashchiketa || 5.27.1
yo me shatA cha viMshatiM cha gonAM harI cha yuktA sudhurA dadAti |vaishvAnara suShTuto vAvR^idhAno.agne yachCha tryaruNAya sharma || 5.27.2
evA te agne sumatiM chakAno naviShThAya navamaM trasadasyuH |yo me girastuvijAtasya pUrvIryuktenAbhi tryaruNo gR^iNAti || 5.27.3
yo ma iti pravochatyashvamedhAya sUraye |dadadR^ichA saniM yate dadanmedhAmR^itAyate || 5.27.4
yasya mA paruShAH shatamuddharShayantyukShaNaH |ashvamedhasya dAnAH somA iva tryAshiraH || 5.27.5
indrAgnI shatadAvnyashvamedhe suvIryam |kShatraM dhArayataM bR^ihaddivi sUryamivAjaram || 5.27.6

samiddho agnirdivi shochirashretpratya~N~NuShasamurviyA vi bhAti |eti prAchI vishvavArA namobhirdevA.N ILAnA haviShA ghR^itAchI || 5.28.1
samidhyamAno amR^itasya rAjasi haviShkR^iNvantaM sachase svastaye |vishvaM sa dhatte draviNaM yaminvasyAtithyamagne ni cha dhatta itpuraH || 5.28.2
agne shardha mahate saubhagAya tava dyumnAnyuttamAni santu |saM jAspatyaM suyamamA kR^iNuShva shatrUyatAmabhi tiShThA mahAMsi || 5.28.3
samiddhasya pramahaso.agne vande tava shriyam |vR^iShabho dyumnavA.N asi samadhvareShvidhyase || 5.28.4
samiddho agna Ahuta devAnyakShi svadhvara |tvaM hi havyavALasi || 5.28.5
A juhotA duvasyatAgniM prayatyadhvare |vR^iNIdhvaM havyavAhanam || 5.28.6

tryaryamA manuSho devatAtA trI rochanA divyA dhArayanta |archanti tvA marutaH pUtadakShAstvameShAmR^iShirindrAsi dhIraH || 5.29.1
anu yadIM maruto mandasAnamArchannindraM papivAMsaM sutasya |Adatta vajramabhi yadahiM hannapo yahvIrasR^ijatsartavA u || 5.29.2
uta brahmANo maruto me asyendraH somasya suShutasya peyAH |taddhi havyaM manuShe gA avindadahannahiM papivA.N indro asya || 5.29.3
AdrodasI vitaraM vi ShkabhAyatsaMvivyAnashchidbhiyase mR^igaM kaH |jigartimindro apajargurANaH prati shvasantamava dAnavaM han || 5.29.4
adha kratvA maghavantubhyaM devA anu vishve adaduH somapeyam |yatsUryasya haritaH patantIH puraH satIruparA etashe kaH || 5.29.5
nava yadasya navatiM cha bhogAnsAkaM vajreNa maghavA vivR^ishchat |archantIndraM marutaH sadhasthe traiShTubhena vachasA bAdhata dyAm || 5.29.6
sakhA sakhye apachattUyamagnirasya kratvA mahiShA trI shatAni |trI sAkamindro manuShaH sarAMsi sutaM pibadvR^itrahatyAya somam || 5.29.7
trI yachChatA mahiShANAmagho mAstrI sarAMsi maghavA somyApAH |kAraM na vishve ahvanta devA bharamindrAya yadahiM jaghAna || 5.29.8
ushanA yatsahasyairayAtaM gR^ihamindra jUjuvAnebhirashvaiH |vanvAno atra sarathaM yayAtha kutsena devairavanorha shuShNam || 5.29.9
prAnyachchakramavR^ihaH sUryasya kutsAyAnyadvarivo yAtave.akaH |anAso dasyU.NramR^iNo vadhena ni duryoNa AvR^iNa~NmR^idhravAchaH || 5.29.10
stomAsastvA gaurivIteravardhannarandhayo vaidathinAya piprum |A tvAmR^ijishvA sakhyAya chakre pachanpaktIrapibaH somamasya || 5.29.11
navagvAsaH sutasomAsa indraM dashagvAso abhyarchantyarkaiH |gavyaM chidUrvamapidhAnavantaM taM chinnaraH shashamAnA apa vran || 5.29.12
katho nu te pari charANi vidvAnvIryA maghavanyA chakartha |yA cho nu navyA kR^iNavaH shaviShTha predu tA te vidatheShu bravAma || 5.29.13
etA vishvA chakR^ivA.N indra bhUryaparIto januShA vIryeNa |yA chinnu vajrinkR^iNavo dadhR^iShvAnna te vartA taviShyA asti tasyAH || 5.29.14
indra brahma kriyamANA juShasva yA te shaviShTha navyA akarma |vastreva bhadrA sukR^itA vasUyU rathaM na dhIraH svapA atakSham || 5.29.15

kva sya vIraH ko apashyadindraM sukharathamIyamAnaM haribhyAm |yo rAyA vajrI sutasomamichChantadoko gantA puruhUta UtI || 5.30.1
avAchachakShaM padamasya sasvarugraM nidhAturanvAyamichChan |apR^ichChamanyA.N uta te ma AhurindraM naro bubudhAnA ashema || 5.30.2
pra nu vayaM sute yA te kR^itAnIndra bravAma yAni no jujoShaH |vedadavidvA~nChR^iNavachcha vidvAnvahate.ayaM maghavA sarvasenaH || 5.30.3
sthiraM manashchakR^iShe jAta indra veShIdeko yudhaye bhUyasashchit |ashmAnaM chichChavasA didyuto vi vido gavAmUrvamusriyANAm || 5.30.4
paro yattvaM parama AjaniShThAH parAvati shrutyaM nAma bibhrat |atashchidindrAdabhayanta devA vishvA apo ajayaddAsapatnIH || 5.30.5
tubhyedete marutaH sushevA archantyarkaM sunvantyandhaH |ahimohAnamapa AshayAnaM pra mAyAbhirmAyinaM sakShadindraH || 5.30.6
vi ShU mR^idho januShA dAnaminvannahangavA maghavansaMchakAnaH |atrA dAsasya namucheH shiro yadavartayo manave gAtumichChan || 5.30.7
yujaM hi mAmakR^ithA Adidindra shiro dAsasya namuchermathAyan |ashmAnaM chitsvaryaM vartamAnaM pra chakriyeva rodasI marudbhyaH || 5.30.8
striyo hi dAsa AyudhAni chakre kiM mA karannabalA asya senAH |antarhyakhyadubhe asya dhene athopa praidyudhaye dasyumindraH || 5.30.9
samatra gAvo.abhito.anavanteheha vatsairviyutA yadAsan |saM tA indro asR^ijadasya shAkairyadIM somAsaH suShutA amandan || 5.30.10
yadIM somA babhrudhUtA amandannaroravIdvR^iShabhaH sAdaneShu |puraMdaraH papivA.N indro asya punargavAmadadAdusriyANAm || 5.30.11
bhadramidaM rushamA agne akrangavAM chatvAri dadataH sahasrA |R^iNaMchayasya prayatA maghAni pratyagrabhIShma nR^itamasya nR^iNAm || 5.30.12
supeshasaM mAva sR^ijantyastaM gavAM sahasrai rushamAso agne |tIvrA indramamamanduH sutAso.aktorvyuShTau paritakmyAyAH || 5.30.13
auchChatsA rAtrI paritakmyA yA.N R^iNaMchaye rAjani rushamAnAm |atyo na vAjI raghurajyamAno babhrushchatvAryasanatsahasrA || 5.30.14
chatuHsahasraM gavyasya pashvaH pratyagrabhIShma rushameShvagne |gharmashchittaptaH pravR^ije ya AsIdayasmayastamvAdAma viprAH || 5.30.15

indro rathAya pravataM kR^iNoti yamadhyasthAnmaghavA vAjayantam |yUtheva pashvo vyunoti gopA ariShTo yAti prathamaH siShAsan || 5.31.1
A pra drava harivo mA vi venaH pisha~NgarAte abhi naH sachasva |nahi tvadindra vasyo anyadastyamenA.Nshchijjanivatashchakartha || 5.31.2
udyatsahaH sahasa AjaniShTa dediShTa indra indriyANi vishvA |prAchodayatsudughA vavre antarvi jyotiShA saMvavR^itvattamo.avaH || 5.31.3
anavaste rathamashvAya takShantvaShTA vajraM puruhUta dyumantam |brahmANa indraM mahayanto arkairavardhayannahaye hantavA u || 5.31.4
vR^iShNe yatte vR^iShaNo arkamarchAnindra grAvANo aditiH sajoShAH |anashvAso ye pavayo.arathA indreShitA abhyavartanta dasyUn || 5.31.5
pra te pUrvANi karaNAni vochaM pra nUtanA maghavanyA chakartha |shaktIvo yadvibharA rodasI ubhe jayannapo manave dAnuchitrAH || 5.31.6
tadinnu te karaNaM dasma viprAhiM yadghnannojo atrAmimIthAH |shuShNasya chitpari mAyA agR^ibhNAH prapitvaM yannapa dasyU.NrasedhaH || 5.31.7
tvamapo yadave turvashAyAramayaH sudughAH pAra indra |ugramayAtamavaho ha kutsaM saM ha yadvAmushanAranta devAH || 5.31.8
indrAkutsA vahamAnA rathenA vAmatyA api karNe vahantu |niH ShImadbhyo dhamatho niH ShadhasthAnmaghono hR^ido varathastamAMsi || 5.31.9
vAtasya yuktAnsuyujashchidashvAnkavishchideSho ajagannavasyuH |vishve te atra marutaH sakhAya indra brahmANi taviShImavardhan || 5.31.10
sUrashchidrathaM paritakmyAyAM pUrvaM karaduparaM jUjuvAMsam |bharachchakrametashaH saM riNAti puro dadhatsaniShyati kratuM naH || 5.31.11
AyaM janA abhichakShe jagAmendraH sakhAyaM sutasomamichChan |vadangrAvAva vediM bhriyAte yasya jIramadhvaryavashcharanti || 5.31.12
ye chAkananta chAkananta nU te martA amR^ita mo te aMha Aran |vAvandhi yajyU.Nruta teShu dhehyojo janeShu yeShu te syAma || 5.31.13

adardarutsamasR^ijo vi khAni tvamarNavAnbadbadhAnA.N aramNAH |mahAntamindra parvataM vi yadvaH sR^ijo vi dhArA ava dAnavaM han || 5.32.1
tvamutsA.N R^itubhirbadbadhAnA.N araMha UdhaH parvatasya vajrin |ahiM chidugra prayutaM shayAnaM jaghanvA.N indra taviShImadhatthAH || 5.32.2
tyasya chinmahato nirmR^igasya vadharjaghAna taviShIbhirindraH |ya eka idapratirmanyamAna AdasmAdanyo ajaniShTa tavyAn || 5.32.3
tyaM chideShAM svadhayA madantaM miho napAtaM suvR^idhaM tamogAm |vR^iShaprabharmA dAnavasya bhAmaM vajreNa vajrI ni jaghAna shuShNam || 5.32.4
tyaM chidasya kratubhirniShattamamarmaNo vidadidasya marma |yadIM sukShatra prabhR^itA madasya yuyutsantaM tamasi harmye dhAH || 5.32.5
tyaM chiditthA katpayaM shayAnamasUrye tamasi vAvR^idhAnam |taM chinmandAno vR^iShabhaH sutasyochchairindro apagUryA jaghAna || 5.32.6
udyadindro mahate dAnavAya vadharyamiShTa saho apratItam |yadIM vajrasya prabhR^itau dadAbha vishvasya jantoradhamaM chakAra || 5.32.7
tyaM chidarNaM madhupaM shayAnamasinvaM vavraM mahyAdadugraH |apAdamatraM mahatA vadhena ni duryoNa AvR^iNa~NmR^idhravAcham || 5.32.8
ko asya shuShmaM taviShIM varAta eko dhanA bharate apratItaH |ime chidasya jrayaso nu devI indrasyaujaso bhiyasA jihAte || 5.32.9
nyasmai devI svadhitirjihIta indrAya gAturushatIva yeme |saM yadojo yuvate vishvamAbhiranu svadhAvne kShitayo namanta || 5.32.10
ekaM nu tvA satpatiM pA~nchajanyaM jAtaM shR^iNomi yashasaM janeShu |taM me jagR^ibhra Ashaso naviShThaM doShA vastorhavamAnAsa indram || 5.32.11
evA hi tvAmR^ituthA yAtayantaM maghA viprebhyo dadataM shR^iNomi |kiM te brahmANo gR^ihate sakhAyo ye tvAyA nidadhuH kAmamindra || 5.32.12

mahi mahe tavase dIdhye nR^InindrAyetthA tavase atavyAn |yo asmai sumatiM vAjasAtau stuto jane samaryashchiketa || 5.33.1
sa tvaM na indra dhiyasAno arkairharINAM vR^iShanyoktramashreH |yA itthA maghavannanu joShaM vakSho abhi prAryaH sakShi janAn || 5.33.2
na te ta indrAbhyasmadR^iShvAyuktAso abrahmatA yadasan |tiShThA rathamadhi taM vajrahastA rashmiM deva yamase svashvaH || 5.33.3
purU yatta indra santyukthA gave chakarthorvarAsu yudhyan |tatakShe sUryAya chidokasi sve vR^iShA samatsu dAsasya nAma chit || 5.33.4
vayaM te ta indra ye cha naraH shardho jaj~nAnA yAtAshcha rathAH |AsmA~njagamyAdahishuShma satvA bhago na havyaH prabhR^itheShu chAruH || 5.33.5
papR^ikSheNyamindra tve hyojo nR^imNAni cha nR^itamAno amartaH |sa na enIM vasavAno rayiM dAH prAryaH stuShe tuvimaghasya dAnam || 5.33.6
evA na indrotibhirava pAhi gR^iNataH shUra kArUn |uta tvachaM dadato vAjasAtau piprIhi madhvaH suShutasya chAroH || 5.33.7
uta tye mA paurukutsyasya sUrestrasadasyorhiraNino rarANAH |vahantu mA dasha shyetAso asya gairikShitasya kratubhirnu sashche || 5.33.8
uta tye mA mArutAshvasya shoNAH kratvAmaghAso vidathasya rAtau |sahasrA me chyavatAno dadAna AnUkamaryo vapuShe nArchat || 5.33.9
uta tye mA dhvanyasya juShTA lakShmaNyasya surucho yatAnAH |mahnA rAyaH saMvaraNasya R^iShervrajaM na gAvaH prayatA api gman || 5.33.10

ajAtashatrumajarA svarvatyanu svadhAmitA dasmamIyate |sunotana pachata brahmavAhase puruShTutAya prataraM dadhAtana || 5.34.1
A yaH somena jaTharamapipratAmandata maghavA madhvo andhasaH |yadIM mR^igAya hantave mahAvadhaH sahasrabhR^iShTimushanA vadhaM yamat || 5.34.2
yo asmai ghraMsa uta vA ya Udhani somaM sunoti bhavati dyumA.N aha |apApa shakrastatanuShTimUhati tanUshubhraM maghavA yaH kavAsakhaH || 5.34.3
yasyAvadhItpitaraM yasya mAtaraM yasya shakro bhrAtaraM nAta IShate |vetIdvasya prayatA yataMkaro na kilbiShAdIShate vasva AkaraH || 5.34.4
na pa~nchabhirdashabhirvaShTyArabhaM nAsunvatA sachate puShyatA chana |jinAti vedamuyA hanti vA dhunirA devayuM bhajati gomati vraje || 5.34.5
vitvakShaNaH samR^itau chakramAsajo.asunvato viShuNaH sunvato vR^idhaH |indro vishvasya damitA vibhIShaNo yathAvashaM nayati dAsamAryaH || 5.34.6
samIM paNerajati bhojanaM muShe vi dAshuShe bhajati sUnaraM vasu |durge chana dhriyate vishva A puru jano yo asya taviShImachukrudhat || 5.34.7
saM yajjanau sudhanau vishvashardhasAvavedindro maghavA goShu shubhriShu |yujaM hyanyamakR^ita pravepanyudIM gavyaM sR^ijate satvabhirdhuniH || 5.34.8
sahasrasAmAgniveshiM gR^iNIShe shatrimagna upamAM ketumaryaH |tasmA ApaH saMyataH pIpayanta tasminkShatramamavattveShamastu || 5.34.9

yaste sAdhiShTho.avasa indra kratuShTamA bhara |asmabhyaM charShaNIsahaM sasniM vAjeShu duShTaram || 5.35.1
yadindra te chatasro yachChUra santi tisraH |yadvA pa~ncha kShitInAmavastatsu na A bhara || 5.35.2
A te.avo vareNyaM vR^iShantamasya hUmahe |vR^iShajUtirhi jaj~niSha AbhUbhirindra turvaNiH || 5.35.3
vR^iShA hyasi rAdhase jaj~niShe vR^iShNi te shavaH |svakShatraM te dhR^iShanmanaH satrAhamindra pauMsyam || 5.35.4
tvaM tamindra martyamamitrayantamadrivaH |sarvarathA shatakrato ni yAhi shavasaspate || 5.35.5
tvAmidvR^itrahantama janAso vR^iktabarhiShaH |ugraM pUrvIShu pUrvyaM havante vAjasAtaye || 5.35.6
asmAkamindra duShTaraM puroyAvAnamAjiShu |sayAvAnaM dhanedhane vAjayantamavA ratham || 5.35.7
asmAkamindrehi no rathamavA puraMdhyA |vayaM shaviShTha vAryaM divi shravo dadhImahi divi stomaM manAmahe || 5.35.8

sa A gamadindro yo vasUnAM chiketaddAtuM dAmano rayINAm |dhanvacharo na vaMsagastR^iShANashchakamAnaH pibatu dugdhamaMshum || 5.36.1
A te hanU harivaH shUra shipre ruhatsomo na parvatasya pR^iShThe |anu tvA rAjannarvato na hinvangIrbhirmadema puruhUta vishve || 5.36.2
chakraM na vR^ittaM puruhUta vepate mano bhiyA me amateridadrivaH |rathAdadhi tvA jaritA sadAvR^idha kuvinnu stoShanmaghavanpurUvasuH || 5.36.3
eSha grAveva jaritA ta indreyarti vAchaM bR^ihadAshuShANaH |pra savyena maghavanyaMsi rAyaH pra dakShiNiddharivo mA vi venaH || 5.36.4
vR^iShA tvA vR^iShaNaM vardhatu dyaurvR^iShA vR^iShabhyAM vahase haribhyAm |sa no vR^iShA vR^iSharathaH sushipra vR^iShakrato vR^iShA vajrinbhare dhAH || 5.36.5
yo rohitau vAjinau vAjinIvAntribhiH shataiH sachamAnAvadiShTa |yUne samasmai kShitayo namantAM shrutarathAya maruto duvoyA || 5.36.6
