saM bhAnunA yatate sUryasyAjuhvAno ghR^itapR^iShThaH sva~nchAH |tasmA amR^idhrA uShaso vyuchChAnya indrAya sunavAmetyAha || 5.37.1
samiddhAgnirvanavatstIrNabarhiryuktagrAvA sutasomo jarAte |grAvANo yasyeShiraM vadantyayadadhvaryurhaviShAva sindhum || 5.37.2
vadhUriyaM patimichChantyeti ya IM vahAte mahiShImiShirAm |Asya shravasyAdratha A cha ghoShAtpurU sahasrA pari vartayAte || 5.37.3
na sa rAjA vyathate yasminnindrastIvraM somaM pibati gosakhAyam |A satvanairajati hanti vR^itraM kSheti kShitIH subhago nAma puShyan || 5.37.4
puShyAtkSheme abhi yoge bhavAtyubhe vR^itau saMyatI saM jayAti |priyaH sUrye priyo agnA bhavAti ya indrAya sutasomo dadAshat || 5.37.5

uroShTa indra rAdhaso vibhvI rAtiH shatakrato |adhA no vishvacharShaNe dyumnA sukShatra maMhaya || 5.38.1
yadImindra shravAyyamiShaM shaviShTha dadhiShe |paprathe dIrghashruttamaM hiraNyavarNa duShTaram || 5.38.2
shuShmAso ye te adrivo mehanA ketasApaH |ubhA devAvabhiShTaye divashcha gmashcha rAjathaH || 5.38.3
uto no asya kasya chiddakShasya tava vR^itrahan |asmabhyaM nR^imNamA bharAsmabhyaM nR^imaNasyase || 5.38.4
nU ta AbhirabhiShTibhistava sharma~nChatakrato |indra syAma sugopAH shUra syAma sugopAH || 5.38.5

yadindra chitra mehanAsti tvAdAtamadrivaH |rAdhastanno vidadvasa ubhayAhastyA bhara || 5.39.1
yanmanyase vareNyamindra dyukShaM tadA bhara |vidyAma tasya te vayamakUpArasya dAvane || 5.39.2
yatte ditsu prarAdhyaM mano asti shrutaM bR^ihat |tena dR^iLhA chidadriva A vAjaM darShi sAtaye || 5.39.3
maMhiShThaM vo maghonAM rAjAnaM charShaNInAm |indramupa prashastaye pUrvIbhirjujuShe giraH || 5.39.4
asmA itkAvyaM vacha ukthamindrAya shaMsyam |tasmA u brahmavAhase giro vardhantyatrayo giraH shumbhantyatrayaH || 5.39.5

A yAhyadribhiH sutaM somaM somapate piba |vR^iShannindra vR^iShabhirvR^itrahantama || 5.40.1
vR^iShA grAvA vR^iShA mado vR^iShA somo ayaM sutaH |vR^iShannindra vR^iShabhirvR^itrahantama || 5.40.2
vR^iShA tvA vR^iShaNaM huve vajri~nchitrAbhirUtibhiH |vR^iShannindra vR^iShabhirvR^itrahantama || 5.40.3
R^ijIShI vajrI vR^iShabhasturAShAT ChuShmI rAjA vR^itrahA somapAvA |yuktvA haribhyAmupa yAsadarvA~NmAdhyaMdine savane matsadindraH || 5.40.4
yattvA sUrya svarbhAnustamasAvidhyadAsuraH |akShetravidyathA mugdho bhuvanAnyadIdhayuH || 5.40.5
svarbhAnoradha yadindra mAyA avo divo vartamAnA avAhan |gULhaM sUryaM tamasApavratena turIyeNa brahmaNAvindadatriH || 5.40.6
mA mAmimaM tava santamatra irasyA drugdho bhiyasA ni gArIt |tvaM mitro asi satyarAdhAstau mehAvataM varuNashcha rAjA || 5.40.7
grAvNo brahmA yuyujAnaH saparyankIriNA devAnnamasopashikShan |atriH sUryasya divi chakShurAdhAtsvarbhAnorapa mAyA aghukShat || 5.40.8
yaM vai sUryaM svarbhAnustamasAvidhyadAsuraH |atrayastamanvavindannahyanye ashaknuvan || 5.40.9

ko nu vAM mitrAvaruNAvR^itAyandivo vA mahaH pArthivasya vA de |R^itasya vA sadasi trAsIthAM no yaj~nAyate vA pashuSho na vAjAn || 5.41.1
te no mitro varuNo aryamAyurindra R^ibhukShA maruto juShanta |namobhirvA ye dadhate suvR^iktiM stomaM rudrAya mILhuShe sajoShAH || 5.41.2
A vAM yeShThAshvinA huvadhyai vAtasya patmanrathyasya puShTau |uta vA divo asurAya manma prAndhAMsIva yajyave bharadhvam || 5.41.3
pra sakShaNo divyaH kaNvahotA trito divaH sajoShA vAto agniH |pUShA bhagaH prabhR^ithe vishvabhojA AjiM na jagmurAshvashvatamAH || 5.41.4
pra vo rayiM yuktAshvaM bharadhvaM rAya eShe.avase dadhIta dhIH |susheva evairaushijasya hotA ye va evA marutasturANAm || 5.41.5
pra vo vAyuM rathayujaM kR^iNudhvaM pra devaM vipraM panitAramarkaiH |iShudhyava R^itasApaH puraMdhIrvasvIrno atra patnIrA dhiye dhuH || 5.41.6
upa va eShe vandyebhiH shUShaiH pra yahvI divashchitayadbhirarkaiH |uShAsAnaktA viduShIva vishvamA hA vahato martyAya yaj~nam || 5.41.7
abhi vo arche poShyAvato nR^InvAstoShpatiM tvaShTAraM rarANaH |dhanyA sajoShA dhiShaNA namobhirvanaspatI.NroShadhI rAya eShe || 5.41.8
tuje nastane parvatAH santu svaitavo ye vasavo na vIrAH |panita Aptyo yajataH sadA no vardhAnnaH shaMsaM naryo abhiShTau || 5.41.9
vR^iShNo astoShi bhUmyasya garbhaM trito napAtamapAM suvR^ikti |gR^iNIte agniretarI na shUShaiH shochiShkesho ni riNAti vanA || 5.41.10
kathA mahe rudriyAya bravAma kadrAye chikituShe bhagAya |Apa oShadhIruta no.avantu dyaurvanA girayo vR^ikShakeshAH || 5.41.11
shR^iNotu na UrjAM patirgiraH sa nabhastarIyA.N iShiraH parijmA |shR^iNvantvApaH puro na shubhrAH pari srucho babR^ihANasyAdreH || 5.41.12
vidA chinnu mahAnto ye va evA bravAma dasmA vAryaM dadhAnAH |vayashchana subhva Ava yanti kShubhA martamanuyataM vadhasnaiH || 5.41.13
A daivyAni pArthivAni janmApashchAchChA sumakhAya vocham |vardhantAM dyAvo girashchandrAgrA udA vardhantAmabhiShAtA arNAH || 5.41.14
padepade me jarimA ni dhAyi varUtrI vA shakrA yA pAyubhishcha |siShaktu mAtA mahI rasA naH smatsUribhirR^ijuhasta R^ijuvaniH || 5.41.15
kathA dAshema namasA sudAnUnevayA maruto achChoktau prashravaso maruto achChoktau |mA no.ahirbudhnyo riShe dhAdasmAkaM bhUdupamAtivaniH || 5.41.16
iti chinnu prajAyai pashumatyai devAso vanate martyo va A devAso vanate martyo vaH |atrA shivAM tanvo dhAsimasyA jarAM chinme nirR^itirjagrasIta || 5.41.17
tAM vo devAH sumatimUrjayantImiShamashyAma vasavaH shasA goH |sA naH sudAnurmR^iLayantI devI prati dravantI suvitAya gamyAH || 5.41.18
abhi na iLA yUthasya mAtA smannadIbhirurvashI vA gR^iNAtu |urvashI vA bR^ihaddivA gR^iNAnAbhyUrNvAnA prabhR^ithasyAyoH || 5.41.19
siShaktu na Urjavyasya puShTeH || 5.41.20

pra shaMtamA varuNaM dIdhitI gIrmitraM bhagamaditiM nUnamashyAH |pR^iShadyoniH pa~nchahotA shR^iNotvatUrtapanthA asuro mayobhuH || 5.42.1
prati me stomamaditirjagR^ibhyAtsUnuM na mAtA hR^idyaM sushevam |brahma priyaM devahitaM yadastyahaM mitre varuNe yanmayobhu || 5.42.2
udIraya kavitamaM kavInAmunattainamabhi madhvA ghR^itena |sa no vasUni prayatA hitAni chandrANi devaH savitA suvAti || 5.42.3
samindra No manasA neShi gobhiH saM sUribhirharivaH saM svasti |saM brahmaNA devahitaM yadasti saM devAnAM sumatyA yaj~niyAnAm || 5.42.4
devo bhagaH savitA rAyo aMsha indro vR^itrasya saMjito dhanAnAm |R^ibhukShA vAja uta vA puraMdhiravantu no amR^itAsasturAsaH || 5.42.5
marutvato apratItasya jiShNorajUryataH pra bravAmA kR^itAni |na te pUrve maghavannAparAso na vIryaM nUtanaH kashchanApa || 5.42.6
upa stuhi prathamaM ratnadheyaM bR^ihaspatiM sanitAraM dhanAnAm |yaH shaMsate stuvate shambhaviShThaH purUvasurAgamajjohuvAnam || 5.42.7
tavotibhiH sachamAnA ariShTA bR^ihaspate maghavAnaH suvIrAH |ye ashvadA uta vA santi godA ye vastradAH subhagAsteShu rAyaH || 5.42.8
visarmANaM kR^iNuhi vittameShAM ye bhu~njate apR^iNanto na ukthaiH |apavratAnprasave vAvR^idhAnAnbrahmadviShaH sUryAdyAvayasva || 5.42.9
ya ohate rakShaso devavItAvachakrebhistaM maruto ni yAta |yo vaH shamIM shashamAnasya nindAttuchChyAnkAmAnkarate siShvidAnaH || 5.42.10
tamu ShTuhi yaH sviShuH sudhanvA yo vishvasya kShayati bheShajasya |yakShvA mahe saumanasAya rudraM namobhirdevamasuraM duvasya || 5.42.11
damUnaso apaso ye suhastA vR^iShNaH patnIrnadyo vibhvataShTAH |sarasvatI bR^ihaddivota rAkA dashasyantIrvarivasyantu shubhrAH || 5.42.12
pra sU mahe susharaNAya medhAM giraM bhare navyasIM jAyamAnAm |ya AhanA duhiturvakShaNAsu rUpA minAno akR^iNodidaM naH || 5.42.13
pra suShTutiH stanayantaM ruvantamiLaspatiM jaritarnUnamashyAH |yo abdimA.N udanimA.N iyarti pra vidyutA rodasI ukShamANaH || 5.42.14
eSha stomo mArutaM shardho achChA rudrasya sUnU.NryuvanyU.NrudashyAH |kAmo rAye havate mA svastyupa stuhi pR^iShadashvA.N ayAsaH || 5.42.15
praiSha stomaH pR^ithivImantarikShaM vanaspatI.NroShadhI rAye ashyAH |devodevaH suhavo bhUtu mahyaM mA no mAtA pR^ithivI durmatau dhAt || 5.42.16
urau devA anibAdhe syAma || 5.42.17
samashvinoravasA nUtanena mayobhuvA supraNItI gamema |A no rayiM vahatamota vIrAnA vishvAnyamR^itA saubhagAni || 5.42.18

A dhenavaH payasA tUrNyarthA amardhantIrupa no yantu madhvA |maho rAye bR^ihatIH sapta vipro mayobhuvo jaritA johavIti || 5.43.1
A suShTutI namasA vartayadhyai dyAvA vAjAya pR^ithivI amR^idhre |pitA mAtA madhuvachAH suhastA bharebhare no yashasAvaviShTAm || 5.43.2
adhvaryavashchakR^ivAMso madhUni pra vAyave bharata chAru shukram |hoteva naH prathamaH pAhyasya deva madhvo rarimA te madAya || 5.43.3
dasha kShipo yu~njate bAhU adriM somasya yA shamitArA suhastA |madhvo rasaM sugabhastirgiriShThAM chanishchadadduduhe shukramaMshuH || 5.43.4
asAvi te jujuShANAya somaH kratve dakShAya bR^ihate madAya |harI rathe sudhurA yoge arvAgindra priyA kR^iNuhi hUyamAnaH || 5.43.5
A no mahImaramatiM sajoShA gnAM devIM namasA rAtahavyAm |madhormadAya bR^ihatImR^itaj~nAmAgne vaha pathibhirdevayAnaiH || 5.43.6
a~njanti yaM prathayanto na viprA vapAvantaM nAgninA tapantaH |piturna putra upasi preShTha A gharmo agnimR^itayannasAdi || 5.43.7
achChA mahI bR^ihatI shaMtamA gIrdUto na gantvashvinA huvadhyai |mayobhuvA sarathA yAtamarvAggantaM nidhiM dhuramANirna nAbhim || 5.43.8
pra tavyaso nama{}uktiM turasyAhaM pUShNa uta vAyoradikShi |yA rAdhasA choditArA matInAM yA vAjasya draviNodA uta tman || 5.43.9
A nAmabhirmaruto vakShi vishvAnA rUpebhirjAtavedo huvAnaH |yaj~naM giro jarituH suShTutiM cha vishve ganta maruto vishva UtI || 5.43.10
A no divo bR^ihataH parvatAdA sarasvatI yajatA gantu yaj~nam |havaM devI jujuShANA ghR^itAchI shagmAM no vAchamushatI shR^iNotu || 5.43.11
A vedhasaM nIlapR^iShThaM bR^ihantaM bR^ihaspatiM sadane sAdayadhvam |sAdadyoniM dama A dIdivAMsaM hiraNyavarNamaruShaM sapema || 5.43.12
A dharNasirbR^ihaddivo rarANo vishvebhirgantvomabhirhuvAnaH |gnA vasAna oShadhIramR^idhrastridhAtushR^i~Ngo vR^iShabho vayodhAH || 5.43.13
mAtuShpade parame shukra Ayorvipanyavo rAspirAso agman |sushevyaM namasA rAtahavyAH shishuM mR^ijantyAyavo na vAse || 5.43.14
bR^ihadvayo bR^ihate tubhyamagne dhiyAjuro mithunAsaH sachanta |devodevaH suhavo bhUtu mahyaM mA no mAtA pR^ithivI durmatau dhAt || 5.43.15
urau devA anibAdhe syAma || 5.43.16
samashvinoravasA nUtanena mayobhuvA supraNItI gamema |A no rayiM vahatamota vIrAnA vishvAnyamR^itA saubhagAni || 5.43.17

taM pratnathA pUrvathA vishvathemathA jyeShThatAtiM barhiShadaM svarvidam |pratIchInaM vR^ijanaM dohase girAshuM jayantamanu yAsu vardhase || 5.44.1
shriye sudR^ishIruparasya yAH svarvirochamAnaH kakubhAmachodate |sugopA asi na dabhAya sukrato paro mAyAbhirR^ita Asa nAma te || 5.44.2
atyaM haviH sachate sachcha dhAtu chAriShTagAtuH sa hotA sahobhariH |prasarsrANo anu barhirvR^iShA shishurmadhye yuvAjaro visruhA hitaH || 5.44.3
pra va ete suyujo yAmanniShTaye nIchIramuShmai yamya R^itAvR^idhaH |suyantubhiH sarvashAsairabhIshubhiH krivirnAmAni pravaNe muShAyati || 5.44.4
saMjarbhurANastarubhiH sutegR^ibhaM vayAkinaM chittagarbhAsu susvaruH |dhAravAkeShvR^ijugAtha shobhase vardhasva patnIrabhi jIvo adhvare || 5.44.5
yAdR^igeva dadR^ishe tAdR^iguchyate saM ChAyayA dadhire sidhrayApsvA |mahImasmabhyamuruShAmuru jrayo bR^ihatsuvIramanapachyutaM sahaH || 5.44.6
vetyagrurjanivAnvA ati spR^idhaH samaryatA manasA sUryaH kaviH |ghraMsaM rakShantaM pari vishvato gayamasmAkaM sharma vanavatsvAvasuH || 5.44.7
jyAyAMsamasya yatunasya ketuna R^iShisvaraM charati yAsu nAma te |yAdR^ishmindhAyi tamapasyayA vidadya u svayaM vahate so araM karat || 5.44.8
samudramAsAmava tasthe agrimA na riShyati savanaM yasminnAyatA |atrA na hArdi kravaNasya rejate yatrA matirvidyate pUtabandhanI || 5.44.9
sa hi kShatrasya manasasya chittibhirevAvadasya yajatasya sadhreH |avatsArasya spR^iNavAma raNvabhiH shaviShThaM vAjaM viduShA chidardhyam || 5.44.10
shyena AsAmaditiH kakShyo mado vishvavArasya yajatasya mAyinaH |samanyamanyamarthayantyetave vidurviShANaM paripAnamanti te || 5.44.11
sadApR^iNo yajato vi dviSho vadhIdbAhuvR^iktaH shrutavittaryo vaH sachA |ubhA sa varA pratyeti bhAti cha yadIM gaNaM bhajate suprayAvabhiH || 5.44.12
sutambharo yajamAnasya satpatirvishvAsAmUdhaH sa dhiyAmuda~nchanaH |bharaddhenU rasavachChishriye payo.anubruvANo adhyeti na svapan || 5.44.13
yo jAgAra tamR^ichaH kAmayante yo jAgAra tamu sAmAni yanti |yo jAgAra tamayaM soma Aha tavAhamasmi sakhye nyokAH || 5.44.14
agnirjAgAra tamR^ichaH kAmayante.agnirjAgAra tamu sAmAni yanti |agnirjAgAra tamayaM soma Aha tavAhamasmi sakhye nyokAH || 5.44.15

vidA divo viShyannadrimukthairAyatyA uShaso archino guH |apAvR^ita vrajinIrutsvargAdvi duro mAnuShIrdeva AvaH || 5.45.1
vi sUryo amatiM na shriyaM sAdorvAdgavAM mAtA jAnatI gAt |dhanvarNaso nadyaH khAdo/arNAH sthUNeva sumitA dR^iMhata dyauH || 5.45.2
asmA ukthAya parvatasya garbho mahInAM januShe pUrvyAya |vi parvato jihIta sAdhata dyaurAvivAsanto dasayanta bhUma || 5.45.3
sUktebhirvo vachobhirdevajuShTairindrA nvagnI avase huvadhyai |ukthebhirhi ShmA kavayaH suyaj~nA AvivAsanto maruto yajanti || 5.45.4
eto nvadya sudhyo bhavAma pra duchChunA minavAmA varIyaH |Are dveShAMsi sanutardadhAmAyAma prA~ncho yajamAnamachCha || 5.45.5
etA dhiyaM kR^iNavAmA sakhAyo.apa yA mAtA.N R^iNuta vrajaM goH |yayA manurvishishipraM jigAya yayA vaNigva~NkurApA purISham || 5.45.6
anUnodatra hastayato adrirArchanyena dasha mAso navagvAH |R^itaM yatI saramA gA avindadvishvAni satyA~NgirAshchakAra || 5.45.7
vishve asyA vyuShi mAhinAyAH saM yadgobhira~Ngiraso navanta |utsa AsAM parame sadhastha R^itasya pathA saramA vidadgAH || 5.45.8
A sUryo yAtu saptAshvaH kShetraM yadasyorviyA dIrghayAthe |raghuH shyenaH patayadandho achChA yuvA kavirdIdayadgoShu gachChan || 5.45.9
A sUryo aruhachChukramarNo.ayukta yaddharito vItapR^iShThAH |udnA na nAvamanayanta dhIrA AshR^iNvatIrApo arvAgatiShThan || 5.45.10
dhiyaM vo apsu dadhiShe svarShAM yayAtarandasha mAso navagvAH |ayA dhiyA syAma devagopA ayA dhiyA tuturyAmAtyaMhaH || 5.45.11

hayo na vidvA.N ayuji svayaM dhuri tAM vahAmi prataraNImavasyuvam |nAsyA vashmi vimuchaM nAvR^itaM punarvidvAnpathaH pura/eta R^iju neShati || 5.46.1
agna indra varuNa mitra devAH shardhaH pra yanta mArutota viShNo |ubhA nAsatyA rudro adha gnAH pUShA bhagaH sarasvatI juShanta || 5.46.2
indrAgnI mitrAvaruNAditiM svaH pR^ithivIM dyAM marutaH parvatA.N apaH |huve viShNuM pUShaNaM brahmaNaspatiM bhagaM nu shaMsaM savitAramUtaye || 5.46.3
uta no viShNuruta vAto asridho draviNodA uta somo mayaskarat |uta R^ibhava uta rAye no ashvinota tvaShTota vibhvAnu maMsate || 5.46.4
uta tyanno mArutaM shardha A gamaddivikShayaM yajataM barhirAsade |bR^ihaspatiH sharma pUShota no yamadvarUthyaM varuNo mitro aryamA || 5.46.5
uta tye naH parvatAsaH sushastayaH sudItayo nadyastrAmaNe bhuvan |bhago vibhaktA shavasAvasA gamaduruvyachA aditiH shrotu me havam || 5.46.6
devAnAM patnIrushatIravantu naH prAvantu nastujaye vAjasAtaye |yAH pArthivAso yA apAmapi vrate tA no devIH suhavAH sharma yachChata || 5.46.7
uta gnA vyantu devapatnIrindrANyagnAyyashvinI rAT |A rodasI varuNAnI shR^iNotu vyantu devIrya R^iturjanInAm || 5.46.8

prayu~njatI diva eti bruvANA mahI mAtA duhiturbodhayantI |AvivAsantI yuvatirmanIShA pitR^ibhya A sadane johuvAnA || 5.47.1
ajirAsastadapa IyamAnA AtasthivAMso amR^itasya nAbhim |anantAsa uravo vishvataH sIM pari dyAvApR^ithivI yanti panthAH || 5.47.2
ukShA samudro aruShaH suparNaH pUrvasya yoniM piturA vivesha |madhye divo nihitaH pR^ishnirashmA vi chakrame rajasaspAtyantau || 5.47.3
chatvAra IM bibhrati kShemayanto dasha garbhaM charase dhApayante |tridhAtavaH paramA asya gAvo divashcharanti pari sadyo antAn || 5.47.4
idaM vapurnivachanaM janAsashcharanti yannadyastasthurApaH |dve yadIM bibhR^ito mAturanye iheha jAte yamyA sabandhU || 5.47.5
vi tanvate dhiyo asmA apAMsi vastrA putrAya mAtaro vayanti |upaprakShe vR^iShaNo modamAnA divaspathA vadhvo yantyachCha || 5.47.6
tadastu mitrAvaruNA tadagne shaM yorasmabhyamidamastu shastam |ashImahi gAdhamuta pratiShThAM namo dive bR^ihate sAdanAya || 5.47.7

kadu priyAya dhAmne manAmahe svakShatrAya svayashase mahe vayam |Amenyasya rajaso yadabhra A.N apo vR^iNAnA vitanoti mAyinI || 5.48.1
tA atnata vayunaM vIravakShaNaM samAnyA vR^itayA vishvamA rajaH |apo apAchIraparA apejate pra pUrvAbhistirate devayurjanaH || 5.48.2
A grAvabhirahanyebhiraktubhirvariShThaM vajramA jigharti mAyini |shataM vA yasya pracharansve dame saMvartayanto vi cha vartayannahA || 5.48.3
tAmasya rItiM parashoriva pratyanIkamakhyaM bhuje asya varpasaH |sachA yadi pitumantamiva kShayaM ratnaM dadhAti bharahUtaye vishe || 5.48.4
sa jihvayA chaturanIka R^i~njate chAru vasAno varuNo yatannarim |na tasya vidma puruShatvatA vayaM yato bhagaH savitA dAti vAryam || 5.48.5

devaM vo adya savitArameShe bhagaM cha ratnaM vibhajantamAyoH |A vAM narA purubhujA vavR^ityAM divedive chidashvinA sakhIyan || 5.49.1
prati prayANamasurasya vidvAnsUktairdevaM savitAraM duvasya |upa bruvIta namasA vijAna~njyeShThaM cha ratnaM vibhajantamAyoH || 5.49.2
adatrayA dayate vAryANi pUShA bhago aditirvasta usraH |indro viShNurvaruNo mitro agnirahAni bhadrA janayanta dasmAH || 5.49.3
tanno anarvA savitA varUthaM tatsindhava iShayanto anu gman |upa yadvoche adhvarasya hotA rAyaH syAma patayo vAjaratnAH || 5.49.4
pra ye vasubhya IvadA namo durye mitre varuNe sUktavAchaH |avaitvabhvaM kR^iNutA varIyo divaspR^ithivyoravasA madema || 5.49.5

vishvo devasya neturmarto vurIta sakhyam |vishvo rAya iShudhyati dyumnaM vR^iNIta puShyase || 5.50.1
te te deva netarye chemA.N anushase |te rAyA te hyApR^iche sachemahi sachathyaiH || 5.50.2
ato na A nR^InatithInataH patnIrdashasyata |Are vishvaM patheShThAM dviSho yuyotu yUyuviH || 5.50.3
yatra vahnirabhihito dudravaddroNyaH pashuH |nR^imaNA vIrapastyo.arNA dhIreva sanitA || 5.50.4
eSha te deva netA rathaspatiH shaM rayiH |shaM rAye shaM svastaya iShaHstuto manAmahe devastuto manAmahe || 5.50.5

agne sutasya pItaye vishvairUmebhirA gahi |devebhirhavyadAtaye || 5.51.1
R^itadhItaya A gata satyadharmANo adhvaram |agneH pibata jihvayA || 5.51.2
viprebhirvipra santya prAtaryAvabhirA gahi |devebhiH somapItaye || 5.51.3
ayaM somashchamU suto.amatre pari Shichyate |priya indrAya vAyave || 5.51.4
vAyavA yAhi vItaye juShANo havyadAtaye |pibA sutasyAndhaso abhi prayaH || 5.51.5
indrashcha vAyaveShAM sutAnAM pItimarhathaH |tA~njuShethAmarepasAvabhi prayaH || 5.51.6
sutA indrAya vAyave somAso dadhyAshiraH |nimnaM na yanti sindhavo.abhi prayaH || 5.51.7
sajUrvishvebhirdevebhirashvibhyAmuShasA sajUH |A yAhyagne atrivatsute raNa || 5.51.8
sajUrmitrAvaruNAbhyAM sajUH somena viShNunA |A yAhyagne atrivatsute raNa || 5.51.9
sajUrAdityairvasubhiH sajUrindreNa vAyunA |A yAhyagne atrivatsute raNa || 5.51.10
svasti no mimItAmashvinA bhagaH svasti devyaditiranarvaNaH |svasti pUShA asuro dadhAtu naH svasti dyAvApR^ithivI suchetunA || 5.51.11
svastaye vAyumupa bravAmahai somaM svasti bhuvanasya yaspatiH |bR^ihaspatiM sarvagaNaM svastaye svastaya AdityAso bhavantu naH || 5.51.12
vishve devA no adyA svastaye vaishvAnaro vasuragniH svastaye |devA avantvR^ibhavaH svastaye svasti no rudraH pAtvaMhasaH || 5.51.13
svasti mitrAvaruNA svasti pathye revati |svasti na indrashchAgnishcha svasti no adite kR^idhi || 5.51.14
svasti panthAmanu charema sUryAchandramasAviva |punardadatAghnatA jAnatA saM gamemahi || 5.51.15

pra shyAvAshva dhR^iShNuyArchA marudbhirR^ikvabhiH |ye adroghamanuShvadhaM shravo madanti yaj~niyAH || 5.52.1
te hi sthirasya shavasaH sakhAyaH santi dhR^iShNuyA |te yAmannA dhR^iShadvinastmanA pAnti shashvataH || 5.52.2
te syandrAso nokShaNo.ati Shkandanti sharvarIH |marutAmadhA maho divi kShamA cha manmahe || 5.52.3
marutsu vo dadhImahi stomaM yaj~naM cha dhR^iShNuyA |vishve ye mAnuShA yugA pAnti martyaM riShaH || 5.52.4
arhanto ye sudAnavo naro asAmishavasaH |pra yaj~naM yaj~niyebhyo divo archA marudbhyaH || 5.52.5
A rukmairA yudhA nara R^iShvA R^iShTIrasR^ikShata |anvenA.N aha vidyuto maruto jajjhatIriva bhAnurarta tmanA divaH || 5.52.6
ye vAvR^idhanta pArthivA ya urAvantarikSha A |vR^ijane vA nadInAM sadhasthe vA maho divaH || 5.52.7
shardho mArutamuchChaMsa satyashavasamR^ibhvasam |uta sma te shubhe naraH pra syandrA yujata tmanA || 5.52.8
uta sma te paruShNyAmUrNA vasata shundhyavaH |uta pavyA rathAnAmadriM bhindantyojasA || 5.52.9
Apathayo vipathayo.antaspathA anupathAH |etebhirmahyaM nAmabhiryaj~naM viShTAra ohate || 5.52.10
adhA naro nyohate.adhA niyuta ohate |adhA pArAvatA iti chitrA rUpANi darshyA || 5.52.11
ChandaHstubhaH kubhanyava utsamA kIriNo nR^ituH |te me ke chinna tAyava UmA AsandR^ishi tviShe || 5.52.12
ya R^iShvA R^iShTividyutaH kavayaH santi vedhasaH |tamR^iShe mArutaM gaNaM namasyA ramayA girA || 5.52.13
achCha R^iShe mArutaM gaNaM dAnA mitraM na yoShaNA |divo vA dhR^iShNava ojasA stutA dhIbhiriShaNyata || 5.52.14
nU manvAna eShAM devA.N achChA na vakShaNA |dAnA sacheta sUribhiryAmashrutebhira~njibhiH || 5.52.15
pra ye me bandhveShe gAM vochanta sUrayaH pR^ishniM vochanta mAtaram |adhA pitaramiShmiNaM rudraM vochanta shikvasaH || 5.52.16
sapta me sapta shAkina ekamekA shatA daduH |yamunAyAmadhi shrutamudrAdho gavyaM mR^ije ni rAdho ashvyaM mR^ije || 5.52.17

ko veda jAnameShAM ko vA purA sumneShvAsa marutAm |yadyuyujre kilAsyaH || 5.53.1
aitAnratheShu tasthuShaH kaH shushrAva kathA yayuH |kasmai sasruH sudAse anvApaya iLAbhirvR^iShTayaH saha || 5.53.2
te ma Ahurya Ayayurupa dyubhirvibhirmade |naro maryA arepasa imAnpashyanniti ShTuhi || 5.53.3
ye a~njiShu ye vAshIShu svabhAnavaH srakShu rukmeShu khAdiShu |shrAyA ratheShu dhanvasu || 5.53.4
yuShmAkaM smA rathA.N anu mude dadhe maruto jIradAnavaH |vR^iShTI dyAvo yatIriva || 5.53.5
A yaM naraH sudAnavo dadAshuShe divaH koshamachuchyavuH |vi parjanyaM sR^ijanti rodasI anu dhanvanA yanti vR^iShTayaH || 5.53.6
tatR^idAnAH sindhavaH kShodasA rajaH pra sasrurdhenavo yathA |syannA ashvA ivAdhvano vimochane vi yadvartanta enyaH || 5.53.7
A yAta maruto diva AntarikShAdamAduta |mAva sthAta parAvataH || 5.53.8
mA vo rasAnitabhA kubhA krumurmA vaH sindhurni rIramat |mA vaH pari ShThAtsarayuH purIShiNyasme itsumnamastu vaH || 5.53.9
taM vaH shardhaM rathAnAM tveShaM gaNaM mArutaM navyasInAm |anu pra yanti vR^iShTayaH || 5.53.10
shardhaMshardhaM va eShAM vrAtaMvrAtaM gaNaMgaNaM sushastibhiH |anu krAmema dhItibhiH || 5.53.11
kasmA adya sujAtAya rAtahavyAya pra yayuH |enA yAmena marutaH || 5.53.12
yena tokAya tanayAya dhAnyaM bIjaM vahadhve akShitam |asmabhyaM taddhattana yadva Imahe rAdho vishvAyu saubhagam || 5.53.13
atIyAma nidastiraH svastibhirhitvAvadyamarAtIH |vR^iShTvI shaM yorApa usri bheShajaM syAma marutaH saha || 5.53.14
sudevaH samahAsati suvIro naro marutaH sa martyaH |yaM trAyadhve syAma te || 5.53.15
stuhi bhojAnstuvato asya yAmani raNangAvo na yavase |yataH pUrvA.N iva sakhI.Nranu hvaya girA gR^iNIhi kAminaH || 5.53.16

pra shardhAya mArutAya svabhAnava imAM vAchamanajA parvatachyute |gharmastubhe diva A pR^iShThayajvane dyumnashravase mahi nR^imNamarchata || 5.54.1
pra vo marutastaviShA udanyavo vayovR^idho ashvayujaH parijrayaH |saM vidyutA dadhati vAshati tritaH svarantyApo.avanA parijrayaH || 5.54.2
vidyunmahaso naro ashmadidyavo vAtatviSho marutaH parvatachyutaH |abdayA chinmuhurA hrAdunIvR^itaH stanayadamA rabhasA udojasaH || 5.54.3
vyaktUnrudrA vyahAni shikvaso vyantarikShaM vi rajAMsi dhUtayaH |vi yadajrA.N ajatha nAva IM yathA vi durgANi maruto nAha riShyatha || 5.54.4
tadvIryaM vo maruto mahitvanaM dIrghaM tatAna sUryo na yojanam |etA na yAme agR^ibhItashochiSho.anashvadAM yannyayAtanA girim || 5.54.5
abhrAji shardho maruto yadarNasaM moShathA vR^ikShaM kapaneva vedhasaH |adha smA no aramatiM sajoShasashchakShuriva yantamanu neShathA sugam || 5.54.6
na sa jIyate maruto na hanyate na sredhati na vyathate na riShyati |nAsya rAya upa dasyanti notaya R^iShiM vA yaM rAjAnaM vA suShUdatha || 5.54.7
niyutvanto grAmajito yathA naro.aryamaNo na marutaH kabandhinaH |pinvantyutsaM yadinAso asvaranvyundanti pR^ithivIM madhvo andhasA || 5.54.8
pravatvatIyaM pR^ithivI marudbhyaH pravatvatI dyaurbhavati prayadbhyaH |pravatvatIH pathyA antarikShyAH pravatvantaH parvatA jIradAnavaH || 5.54.9
yanmarutaH sabharasaH svarNaraH sUrya udite madathA divo naraH |na vo.ashvAH shrathayantAha sisrataH sadyo asyAdhvanaH pAramashnutha || 5.54.10
aMseShu va R^iShTayaH patsu khAdayo vakShassu rukmA maruto rathe shubhaH |agnibhrAjaso vidyuto gabhastyoH shiprAH shIrShasu vitatA hiraNyayIH || 5.54.11
taM nAkamaryo agR^ibhItashochiShaM rushatpippalaM maruto vi dhUnutha |samachyanta vR^ijanAtitviShanta yatsvaranti ghoShaM vitatamR^itAyavaH || 5.54.12
yuShmAdattasya maruto vichetaso rAyaH syAma rathyo vayasvataH |na yo yuchChati tiShyo yathA divo.asme rAranta marutaH sahasriNam || 5.54.13
yUyaM rayiM marutaH spArhavIraM yUyamR^iShimavatha sAmavipram |yUyamarvantaM bharatAya vAjaM yUyaM dhattha rAjAnaM shruShTimantam || 5.54.14
tadvo yAmi draviNaM sadya/Utayo yenA svarNa tatanAma nR^I.Nrabhi |idaM su me maruto haryatA vacho yasya tarema tarasA shataM himAH || 5.54.15

prayajyavo maruto bhrAjadR^iShTayo bR^ihadvayo dadhire rukmavakShasaH |Iyante ashvaiH suyamebhirAshubhiH shubhaM yAtAmanu rathA avR^itsata || 5.55.1
svayaM dadhidhve taviShIM yathA vida bR^ihanmahAnta urviyA vi rAjatha |utAntarikShaM mamire vyojasA shubhaM yAtAmanu rathA avR^itsata || 5.55.2
sAkaM jAtAH subhvaH sAkamukShitAH shriye chidA prataraM vAvR^idhurnaraH |virokiNaH sUryasyeva rashmayaH shubhaM yAtAmanu rathA avR^itsata || 5.55.3
AbhUSheNyaM vo maruto mahitvanaM didR^ikSheNyaM sUryasyeva chakShaNam |uto asmA.N amR^itatve dadhAtana shubhaM yAtAmanu rathA avR^itsata || 5.55.4
udIrayathA marutaH samudrato yUyaM vR^iShTiM varShayathA purIShiNaH |na vo dasrA upa dasyanti dhenavaH shubhaM yAtAmanu rathA avR^itsata || 5.55.5
yadashvAndhUrShu pR^iShatIrayugdhvaM hiraNyayAnpratyatkA.N amugdhvam |vishvA itspR^idho maruto vyasyatha shubhaM yAtAmanu rathA avR^itsata || 5.55.6
na parvatA na nadyo varanta vo yatrAchidhvaM maruto gachChathedu tat |uta dyAvApR^ithivI yAthanA pari shubhaM yAtAmanu rathA avR^itsata || 5.55.7
yatpUrvyaM maruto yachcha nUtanaM yadudyate vasavo yachcha shasyate |vishvasya tasya bhavathA navedasaH shubhaM yAtAmanu rathA avR^itsata || 5.55.8
mR^iLata no maruto mA vadhiShTanAsmabhyaM sharma bahulaM vi yantana |adhi stotrasya sakhyasya gAtana shubhaM yAtAmanu rathA avR^itsata || 5.55.9
yUyamasmAnnayata vasyo achChA niraMhatibhyo maruto gR^iNAnAH |juShadhvaM no havyadAtiM yajatrA vayaM syAma patayo rayINAm || 5.55.10

agne shardhantamA gaNaM piShTaM rukmebhira~njibhiH |visho adya marutAmava hvaye divashchidrochanAdadhi || 5.56.1
yathA chinmanyase hR^idA tadinme jagmurAshasaH |ye te nediShThaM havanAnyAgamantAnvardha bhImasaMdR^ishaH || 5.56.2
mILhuShmatIva pR^ithivI parAhatA madantyetyasmadA |R^ikSho na vo marutaH shimIvA.N amo dudhro gauriva bhImayuH || 5.56.3
ni ye riNantyojasA vR^ithA gAvo na durdhuraH |ashmAnaM chitsvaryaM parvataM giriM pra chyAvayanti yAmabhiH || 5.56.4
uttiShTha nUnameShAM stomaiH samukShitAnAm |marutAM purutamamapUrvyaM gavAM sargamiva hvaye || 5.56.5
yu~NgdhvaM hyaruShI rathe yu~NgdhvaM ratheShu rohitaH |yu~NgdhvaM harI ajirA dhuri voLhave vahiShThA dhuri voLhave || 5.56.6
uta sya vAjyaruShastuviShvaNiriha sma dhAyi darshataH |mA vo yAmeShu marutashchiraM karatpra taM ratheShu chodata || 5.56.7
rathaM nu mArutaM vayaM shravasyumA huvAmahe |A yasmintasthau suraNAni bibhratI sachA marutsu rodasI || 5.56.8
taM vaH shardhaM ratheshubhaM tveShaM panasyumA huve |yasminsujAtA subhagA mahIyate sachA marutsu mILhuShI || 5.56.9

A rudrAsa indravantaH sajoShaso hiraNyarathAH suvitAya gantana |iyaM vo asmatprati haryate matistR^iShNaje na diva utsA udanyave || 5.57.1
vAshImanta R^iShTimanto manIShiNaH sudhanvAna iShumanto niSha~NgiNaH |svashvAH stha surathAH pR^ishnimAtaraH svAyudhA maruto yAthanA shubham || 5.57.2
dhUnutha dyAM parvatAndAshuShe vasu ni vo vanA jihate yAmano bhiyA |kopayatha pR^ithivIM pR^ishnimAtaraH shubhe yadugrAH pR^iShatIrayugdhvam || 5.57.3
vAtatviSho maruto varShanirNijo yamA iva susadR^ishaH supeshasaH |pisha~NgAshvA aruNAshvA arepasaH pratvakShaso mahinA dyaurivoravaH || 5.57.4
purudrapsA a~njimantaH sudAnavastveShasaMdR^isho anavabhrarAdhasaH |sujAtAso januShA rukmavakShaso divo arkA amR^itaM nAma bhejire || 5.57.5
R^iShTayo vo maruto aMsayoradhi saha ojo bAhvorvo balaM hitam |nR^imNA shIrShasvAyudhA ratheShu vo vishvA vaH shrIradhi tanUShu pipishe || 5.57.6
gomadashvAvadrathavatsuvIraM chandravadrAdho maruto dadA naH |prashastiM naH kR^iNuta rudriyAso bhakShIya vo.avaso daivyasya || 5.57.7
haye naro maruto mR^iLatA nastuvImaghAso amR^itA R^itaj~nAH |satyashrutaH kavayo yuvAno bR^ihadgirayo bR^ihadukShamANAH || 5.57.8

tamu nUnaM taviShImantameShAM stuShe gaNaM mArutaM navyasInAm |ya AshvashvA amavadvahanta uteshire amR^itasya svarAjaH || 5.58.1
tveShaM gaNaM tavasaM khAdihastaM dhunivrataM mAyinaM dAtivAram |mayobhuvo ye amitA mahitvA vandasva vipra tuvirAdhaso nR^In || 5.58.2
A vo yantUdavAhAso adya vR^iShTiM ye vishve maruto junanti |ayaM yo agnirmarutaH samiddha etaM juShadhvaM kavayo yuvAnaH || 5.58.3
yUyaM rAjAnamiryaM janAya vibhvataShTaM janayathA yajatrAH |yuShmadeti muShTihA bAhujUto yuShmatsadashvo marutaH suvIraH || 5.58.4
arA ivedacharamA aheva prapra jAyante akavA mahobhiH |pR^ishneH putrA upamAso rabhiShThAH svayA matyA marutaH saM mimikShuH || 5.58.5
yatprAyAsiShTa pR^iShatIbhirashvairvILupavibhirmaruto rathebhiH |kShodanta Apo riNate vanAnyavosriyo vR^iShabhaH krandatu dyauH || 5.58.6
prathiShTa yAmanpR^ithivI chideShAM bharteva garbhaM svamichChavo dhuH |vAtAnhyashvAndhuryAyuyujre varShaM svedaM chakrire rudriyAsaH || 5.58.7
haye naro maruto mR^iLatA nastuvImaghAso amR^itA R^itaj~nAH |satyashrutaH kavayo yuvAno bR^ihadgirayo bR^ihadukShamANAH || 5.58.8

pra vaH spaLakransuvitAya dAvane.archA dive pra pR^ithivyA R^itaM bhare |ukShante ashvAntaruShanta A rajo.anu svaM bhAnuM shrathayante arNavaiH || 5.59.1
amAdeShAM bhiyasA bhUmirejati naurna pUrNA kSharati vyathiryatI |dUredR^isho ye chitayanta emabhirantarmahe vidathe yetire naraH || 5.59.2
gavAmiva shriyase shR^i~NgamuttamaM sUryo na chakShU rajaso visarjane |atyA iva subhvashchAravaH sthana maryA iva shriyase chetathA naraH || 5.59.3
ko vo mahAnti mahatAmudashnavatkaskAvyA marutaH ko ha pauMsyA |yUyaM ha bhUmiM kiraNaM na rejatha pra yadbharadhve suvitAya dAvane || 5.59.4
ashvA ivedaruShAsaH sabandhavaH shUrA iva prayudhaH prota yuyudhuH |maryA iva suvR^idho vAvR^idhurnaraH sUryasya chakShuH pra minanti vR^iShTibhiH || 5.59.5
te ajyeShThA akaniShThAsa udbhido.amadhyamAso mahasA vi vAvR^idhuH |sujAtAso januShA pR^ishnimAtaro divo maryA A no achChA jigAtana || 5.59.6
vayo na ye shreNIH papturojasAntAndivo bR^ihataH sAnunaspari |ashvAsa eShAmubhaye yathA viduH pra parvatasya nabhanU.NrachuchyavuH || 5.59.7
mimAtu dyauraditirvItaye naH saM dAnuchitrA uShaso yatantAm |AchuchyavurdivyaM koshameta R^iShe rudrasya maruto gR^iNAnAH || 5.59.8

ILe agniM svavasaM namobhiriha prasatto vi chayatkR^itaM naH |rathairiva pra bhare vAjayadbhiH pradakShiNinmarutAM stomamR^idhyAm || 5.60.1
A ye tasthuH pR^iShatIShu shrutAsu sukheShu rudrA maruto ratheShu |vanA chidugrA jihate ni vo bhiyA pR^ithivI chidrejate parvatashchit || 5.60.2
parvatashchinmahi vR^iddho bibhAya divashchitsAnu rejata svane vaH |yatkrILatha maruta R^iShTimanta Apa iva sadhrya~ncho dhavadhve || 5.60.3
varA ivedraivatAso hiraNyairabhi svadhAbhistanvaH pipishre |shriye shreyAMsastavaso ratheShu satrA mahAMsi chakrire tanUShu || 5.60.4
ajyeShThAso akaniShThAsa ete saM bhrAtaro vAvR^idhuH saubhagAya |yuvA pitA svapA rudra eShAM sudughA pR^ishniH sudinA marudbhyaH || 5.60.5
yaduttame maruto madhyame vA yadvAvame subhagAso divi ShTha |ato no rudrA uta vA nvasyAgne vittAddhaviSho yadyajAma || 5.60.6
agnishcha yanmaruto vishvavedaso divo vahadhva uttarAdadhi ShNubhiH |te mandasAnA dhunayo rishAdaso vAmaM dhatta yajamAnAya sunvate || 5.60.7
agne marudbhiH shubhayadbhirR^ikvabhiH somaM piba mandasAno gaNashribhiH |pAvakebhirvishvaminvebhirAyubhirvaishvAnara pradivA ketunA sajUH || 5.60.8

ke ShThA naraH shreShThatamA ya eka/eka Ayaya |paramasyAH parAvataH || 5.61.1
kva vo.ashvAH kvAbhIshavaH kathaM sheka kathA yaya |pR^iShThe sado nasoryamaH || 5.61.2
jaghane choda eShAM vi sakthAni naro yamuH |putrakR^ithe na janayaH || 5.61.3
parA vIrAsa etana maryAso bhadrajAnayaH |agnitapo yathAsatha || 5.61.4
sanatsAshvyaM pashumuta gavyaM shatAvayam |shyAvAshvastutAya yA dorvIrAyopabarbR^ihat || 5.61.5
uta tvA strI shashIyasI puMso bhavati vasyasI |adevatrAdarAdhasaH || 5.61.6
vi yA jAnAti jasuriM vi tR^iShyantaM vi kAminam |devatrA kR^iNute manaH || 5.61.7
uta ghA nemo astutaH pumA.N iti bruve paNiH |sa vairadeya itsamaH || 5.61.8
uta me.arapadyuvatirmamanduShI prati shyAvAya vartanim |vi rohitA purumILhAya yematurviprAya dIrghayashase || 5.61.9
yo me dhenUnAM shataM vaidadashviryathA dadat |taranta iva maMhanA || 5.61.10
ya IM vahanta AshubhiH pibanto madiraM madhu |atra shravAMsi dadhire || 5.61.11
yeShAM shriyAdhi rodasI vibhrAjante ratheShvA |divi rukma ivopari || 5.61.12
yuvA sa mAruto gaNastveSharatho anedyaH |shubhaMyAvApratiShkutaH || 5.61.13
ko veda nUnameShAM yatrA madanti dhUtayaH |R^itajAtA arepasaH || 5.61.14
yUyaM martaM vipanyavaH praNetAra itthA dhiyA |shrotAro yAmahUtiShu || 5.61.15
te no vasUni kAmyA purushchandrA rishAdasaH |A yaj~niyAso vavR^ittana || 5.61.16
etaM me stomamUrmye dArbhyAya parA vaha |giro devi rathIriva || 5.61.17
uta me vochatAditi sutasome rathavItau |na kAmo apa veti me || 5.61.18
eSha kSheti rathavItirmaghavA gomatIranu |parvateShvapashritaH || 5.61.19

R^itena R^itamapihitaM dhruvaM vAM sUryasya yatra vimuchantyashvAn |dasha shatA saha tasthustadekaM devAnAM shreShThaM vapuShAmapashyam || 5.62.1
tatsu vAM mitrAvaruNA mahitvamIrmA tasthuShIrahabhirduduhre |vishvAH pinvathaH svasarasya dhenA anu vAmekaH pavirA vavarta || 5.62.2
adhArayataM pR^ithivImuta dyAM mitrarAjAnA varuNA mahobhiH |vardhayatamoShadhIH pinvataM gA ava vR^iShTiM sR^ijataM jIradAnU || 5.62.3
A vAmashvAsaH suyujo vahantu yatarashmaya upa yantvarvAk |ghR^itasya nirNiganu vartate vAmupa sindhavaH pradivi kSharanti || 5.62.4
anu shrutAmamatiM vardhadurvIM barhiriva yajuShA rakShamANA |namasvantA dhR^itadakShAdhi garte mitrAsAthe varuNeLAsvantaH || 5.62.5
akravihastA sukR^ite paraspA yaM trAsAthe varuNeLAsvantaH |rAjAnA kShatramahR^iNIyamAnA sahasrasthUNaM bibhR^ithaH saha dvau || 5.62.6
hiraNyanirNigayo asya sthUNA vi bhrAjate divyashvAjanIva |bhadre kShetre nimitA tilvile vA sanema madhvo adhigartyasya || 5.62.7
hiraNyarUpamuShaso vyuShTAvayaHsthUNamuditA sUryasya |A rohatho varuNa mitra gartamatashchakShAthe aditiM ditiM cha || 5.62.8
yadbaMhiShThaM nAtividhe sudAnU achChidraM sharma bhuvanasya gopA |tena no mitrAvaruNAvaviShTaM siShAsanto jigIvAMsaH syAma || 5.62.9

R^itasya gopAvadhi tiShThatho rathaM satyadharmANA parame vyomani |yamatra mitrAvaruNAvatho yuvaM tasmai vR^iShTirmadhumatpinvate divaH || 5.63.1
samrAjAvasya bhuvanasya rAjatho mitrAvaruNA vidathe svardR^ishA |vR^iShTiM vAM rAdho amR^itatvamImahe dyAvApR^ithivI vi charanti tanyavaH || 5.63.2
samrAjA ugrA vR^iShabhA divaspatI pR^ithivyA mitrAvaruNA vicharShaNI |chitrebhirabhrairupa tiShThatho ravaM dyAM varShayatho asurasya mAyayA || 5.63.3
mAyA vAM mitrAvaruNA divi shritA sUryo jyotishcharati chitramAyudham |tamabhreNa vR^iShTyA gUhatho divi parjanya drapsA madhumanta Irate || 5.63.4
rathaM yu~njate marutaH shubhe sukhaM shUro na mitrAvaruNA gaviShTiShu |rajAMsi chitrA vi charanti tanyavo divaH samrAjA payasA na ukShatam || 5.63.5
vAchaM su mitrAvaruNAvirAvatIM parjanyashchitrAM vadati tviShImatIm |abhrA vasata marutaH su mAyayA dyAM varShayatamaruNAmarepasam || 5.63.6
dharmaNA mitrAvaruNA vipashchitA vratA rakShethe asurasya mAyayA |R^itena vishvaM bhuvanaM vi rAjathaH sUryamA dhattho divi chitryaM ratham || 5.63.7

varuNaM vo rishAdasamR^ichA mitraM havAmahe |pari vrajeva bAhvorjaganvAMsA svarNaram || 5.64.1
tA bAhavA suchetunA pra yantamasmA archate |shevaM hi jAryaM vAM vishvAsu kShAsu joguve || 5.64.2
yannUnamashyAM gatiM mitrasya yAyAM pathA |asya priyasya sharmaNyahiMsAnasya sashchire || 5.64.3
yuvAbhyAM mitrAvaruNopamaM dheyAmR^ichA |yaddha kShaye maghonAM stotR^INAM cha spUrdhase || 5.64.4
A no mitra sudItibhirvaruNashcha sadhastha A |sve kShaye maghonAM sakhInAM cha vR^idhase || 5.64.5
yuvaM no yeShu varuNa kShatraM bR^ihachcha bibhR^ithaH |uru No vAjasAtaye kR^itaM rAye svastaye || 5.64.6
uchChantyAM me yajatA devakShatre rushadgavi |sutaM somaM na hastibhirA paDbhirdhAvataM narA bibhratAvarchanAnasam || 5.64.7

yashchiketa sa sukraturdevatrA sa bravItu naH |varuNo yasya darshato mitro vA vanate giraH || 5.65.1
tA hi shreShThavarchasA rAjAnA dIrghashruttamA |tA satpatI R^itAvR^idha R^itAvAnA janejane || 5.65.2
tA vAmiyAno.avase pUrvA upa bruve sachA |svashvAsaH su chetunA vAjA.N abhi pra dAvane || 5.65.3
mitro aMhoshchidAduru kShayAya gAtuM vanate |mitrasya hi pratUrvataH sumatirasti vidhataH || 5.65.4
vayaM mitrasyAvasi syAma saprathastame |anehasastvotayaH satrA varuNasheShasaH || 5.65.5
yuvaM mitremaM janaM yatathaH saM cha nayathaH |mA maghonaH pari khyataM mo asmAkamR^iShINAM gopIthe na uruShyatam || 5.65.6

A chikitAna sukratU devau marta rishAdasA |varuNAya R^itapeshase dadhIta prayase mahe || 5.66.1
tA hi kShatramavihrutaM samyagasuryamAshAte |adha vrateva mAnuShaM svarNa dhAyi darshatam || 5.66.2
tA vAmeShe rathAnAmurvIM gavyUtimeShAm |rAtahavyasya suShTutiM dadhR^ikstomairmanAmahe || 5.66.3
adhA hi kAvyA yuvaM dakShasya pUrbhiradbhutA |ni ketunA janAnAM chikethe pUtadakShasA || 5.66.4
tadR^itaM pR^ithivi bR^ihachChrava/eSha R^iShINAm |jrayasAnAvaraM pR^ithvati kSharanti yAmabhiH || 5.66.5
A yadvAmIyachakShasA mitra vayaM cha sUrayaH |vyachiShThe bahupAyye yatemahi svarAjye || 5.66.6

baLitthA deva niShkR^itamAdityA yajataM bR^ihat |varuNa mitrAryamanvarShiShThaM kShatramAshAthe || 5.67.1
A yadyoniM hiraNyayaM varuNa mitra sadathaH |dhartArA charShaNInAM yantaM sumnaM rishAdasA || 5.67.2
vishve hi vishvavedaso varuNo mitro aryamA |vratA padeva sashchire pAnti martyaM riShaH || 5.67.3
te hi satyA R^itaspR^isha R^itAvAno janejane |sunIthAsaH sudAnavoM.ahoshchiduruchakrayaH || 5.67.4
ko nu vAM mitrAstuto varuNo vA tanUnAm |tatsu vAmeShate matiratribhya eShate matiH || 5.67.5

pra vo mitrAya gAyata varuNAya vipA girA |mahikShatrAvR^itaM bR^ihat || 5.68.1
samrAjA yA ghR^itayonI mitrashchobhA varuNashcha |devA deveShu prashastA || 5.68.2
tA naH shaktaM pArthivasya maho rAyo divyasya |mahi vAM kShatraM deveShu || 5.68.3
R^itamR^itena sapanteShiraM dakShamAshAte |adruhA devau vardhete || 5.68.4
vR^iShTidyAvA rItyApeShaspatI dAnumatyAH |bR^ihantaM gartamAshAte || 5.68.5

trI rochanA varuNa trI.Nruta dyUntrINi mitra dhArayatho rajAMsi |vAvR^idhAnAvamatiM kShatriyasyAnu vrataM rakShamANAvajuryam || 5.69.1
irAvatIrvaruNa dhenavo vAM madhumadvAM sindhavo mitra duhre |trayastasthurvR^iShabhAsastisR^iNAM dhiShaNAnAM retodhA vi dyumantaH || 5.69.2
prAtardevImaditiM johavImi madhyaMdina uditA sUryasya |rAye mitrAvaruNA sarvatAteLe tokAya tanayAya shaM yoH || 5.69.3
yA dhartArA rajaso rochanasyotAdityA divyA pArthivasya |na vAM devA amR^itA A minanti vratAni mitrAvaruNA dhruvANi || 5.69.4

purUruNA chiddhyastyavo nUnaM vAM varuNa |mitra vaMsi vAM sumatim || 5.70.1
tA vAM samyagadruhvANeShamashyAma dhAyase |vayaM te rudrA syAma || 5.70.2
pAtaM no rudrA pAyubhiruta trAyethAM sutrAtrA |turyAma dasyUntanUbhiH || 5.70.3
mA kasyAdbhutakratU yakShaM bhujemA tanUbhiH |mA sheShasA mA tanasA || 5.70.4

A no gantaM rishAdasA varuNa mitra barhaNA |upemaM chArumadhvaram || 5.71.1
vishvasya hi prachetasA varuNa mitra rAjathaH |IshAnA pipyataM dhiyaH || 5.71.2
upa naH sutamA gataM varuNa mitra dAshuShaH |asya somasya pItaye || 5.71.3

A mitre varuNe vayaM gIrbhirjuhumo atrivat |ni barhiShi sadataM somapItaye || 5.72.1
vratena stho dhruvakShemA dharmaNA yAtayajjanA |ni barhiShi sadataM somapItaye || 5.72.2
mitrashcha no varuNashcha juShetAM yaj~namiShTaye |ni barhiShi sadatAM somapItaye || 5.72.3

yadadya sthaH parAvati yadarvAvatyashvinA |yadvA purU purubhujA yadantarikSha A gatam || 5.73.1
iha tyA purubhUtamA purU daMsAMsi bibhratA |varasyA yAmyadhrigU huve tuviShTamA bhuje || 5.73.2
IrmAnyadvapuShe vapushchakraM rathasya yemathuH |paryanyA nAhuShA yugA mahnA rajAMsi dIyathaH || 5.73.3
tadU Shu vAmenA kR^itaM vishvA yadvAmanu ShTave |nAnA jAtAvarepasA samasme bandhumeyathuH || 5.73.4
A yadvAM sUryA rathaM tiShThadraghuShyadaM sadA |pari vAmaruShA vayo ghR^iNA varanta AtapaH || 5.73.5
yuvoratrishchiketati narA sumnena chetasA |gharmaM yadvAmarepasaM nAsatyAsnA bhuraNyati || 5.73.6
ugro vAM kakuho yayiH shR^iNve yAmeShu saMtaniH |yadvAM daMsobhirashvinAtrirnarAvavartati || 5.73.7
madhva U Shu madhUyuvA rudrA siShakti pipyuShI |yatsamudrAti parShathaH pakvAH pR^ikSho bharanta vAm || 5.73.8
satyamidvA u ashvinA yuvAmAhurmayobhuvA |tA yAmanyAmahUtamA yAmannA mR^iLayattamA || 5.73.9
imA brahmANi vardhanAshvibhyAM santu shaMtamA |yA takShAma rathA.N ivAvochAma bR^ihannamaH || 5.73.10

kUShTho devAvashvinAdyA divo manAvasU |tachChravatho vR^iShaNvasU atrirvAmA vivAsati || 5.74.1
kuha tyA kuha nu shrutA divi devA nAsatyA |kasminnA yatatho jane ko vAM nadInAM sachA || 5.74.2
kaM yAthaH kaM ha gachChathaH kamachChA yu~njAthe ratham |kasya brahmANi raNyatho vayaM vAmushmasIShTaye || 5.74.3
pauraM chiddhyudaprutaM paura paurAya jinvathaH |yadIM gR^ibhItatAtaye siMhamiva druhaspade || 5.74.4
pra chyavAnAjjujuruSho vavrimatkaM na mu~nchathaH |yuvA yadI kR^ithaH punarA kAmamR^iNve vadhvaH || 5.74.5
asti hi vAmiha stotA smasi vAM saMdR^ishi shriye |nU shrutaM ma A gatamavobhirvAjinIvasU || 5.74.6
ko vAmadya purUNAmA vavne martyAnAm |ko vipro vipravAhasA ko yaj~nairvAjinIvasU || 5.74.7
A vAM ratho rathAnAM yeShTho yAtvashvinA |purU chidasmayustira A~NgUSho martyeShvA || 5.74.8
shamU Shu vAM madhUyuvAsmAkamastu charkR^itiH |arvAchInA vichetasA vibhiH shyeneva dIyatam || 5.74.9
ashvinA yaddha karhi chichChushrUyAtamimaM havam |vasvIrU Shu vAM bhujaH pR^i~nchanti su vAM pR^ichaH || 5.74.10

prati priyatamaM rathaM vR^iShaNaM vasuvAhanam |stotA vAmashvinAvR^iShiH stomena prati bhUShati mAdhvI mama shrutaM havam || 5.75.1
atyAyAtamashvinA tiro vishvA ahaM sanA |dasrA hiraNyavartanI suShumnA sindhuvAhasA mAdhvI mama shrutaM havam || 5.75.2
A no ratnAni bibhratAvashvinA gachChataM yuvam |rudrA hiraNyavartanI juShANA vAjinIvasU mAdhvI mama shrutaM havam || 5.75.3
suShTubho vAM vR^iShaNvasU rathe vANIchyAhitA |uta vAM kakuho mR^igaH pR^ikShaH kR^iNoti vApuSho mAdhvI mama shrutaM havam || 5.75.4
bodhinmanasA rathyeShirA havanashrutA |vibhishchyavAnamashvinA ni yAtho advayAvinaM mAdhvI mama shrutaM havam || 5.75.5
A vAM narA manoyujo.ashvAsaH pruShitapsavaH |vayo vahantu pItaye saha sumnebhirashvinA mAdhvI mama shrutaM havam || 5.75.6
ashvinAveha gachChataM nAsatyA mA vi venatam |tirashchidaryayA pari vartiryAtamadAbhyA mAdhvI mama shrutaM havam || 5.75.7
asminyaj~ne adAbhyA jaritAraM shubhaspatI |avasyumashvinA yuvaM gR^iNantamupa bhUShatho mAdhvI mama shrutaM havam || 5.75.8
abhUduShA rushatpashurAgniradhAyyR^itviyaH |ayoji vAM vR^iShaNvasU ratho dasrAvamartyo mAdhvI mama shrutaM havam || 5.75.9

A bhAtyagniruShasAmanIkamudviprANAM devayA vAcho asthuH |arvA~nchA nUnaM rathyeha yAtaM pIpivAMsamashvinA gharmamachCha || 5.76.1
na saMskR^itaM pra mimIto gamiShThAnti nUnamashvinopastuteha |divAbhipitve.avasAgamiShThA pratyavartiM dAshuShe shambhaviShThA || 5.76.2
utA yAtaM saMgave prAtarahno madhyaMdina uditA sUryasya |divA naktamavasA shaMtamena nedAnIM pItirashvinA tatAna || 5.76.3
idaM hi vAM pradivi sthAnamoka ime gR^ihA ashvinedaM duroNam |A no divo bR^ihataH parvatAdAdbhyo yAtamiShamUrjaM vahantA || 5.76.4
samashvinoravasA nUtanena mayobhuvA supraNItI gamema |A no rayiM vahatamota vIrAnA vishvAnyamR^itA saubhagAni || 5.76.5

prAtaryAvANA prathamA yajadhvaM purA gR^idhrAdararuShaH pibAtaH |prAtarhi yaj~namashvinA dadhAte pra shaMsanti kavayaH pUrvabhAjaH || 5.77.1
prAtaryajadhvamashvinA hinota na sAyamasti devayA ajuShTam |utAnyo asmadyajate vi chAvaH pUrvaHpUrvo yajamAno vanIyAn || 5.77.2
hiraNyatva~NmadhuvarNo ghR^itasnuH pR^ikSho vahannA ratho vartate vAm |manojavA ashvinA vAtaraMhA yenAtiyAtho duritAni vishvA || 5.77.3
yo bhUyiShThaM nAsatyAbhyAM viveSha chaniShThaM pitvo rarate vibhAge |sa tokamasya pIparachChamIbhiranUrdhvabhAsaH sadamittuturyAt || 5.77.4
samashvinoravasA nUtanena mayobhuvA supraNItI gamema |A no rayiM vahatamota vIrAnA vishvAnyamR^itA saubhagAni || 5.77.5

ashvinAveha gachChataM nAsatyA mA vi venatam |haMsAviva patatamA sutA.N upa || 5.78.1
ashvinA hariNAviva gaurAvivAnu yavasam |haMsAviva patatamA sutA.N upa || 5.78.2
ashvinA vAjinIvasU juShethAM yaj~namiShTaye |haMsAviva patatamA sutA.N upa || 5.78.3
atriryadvAmavarohannR^ibIsamajohavInnAdhamAneva yoShA |shyenasya chijjavasA nUtanenAgachChatamashvinA shaMtamena || 5.78.4
vi jihIShva vanaspate yoniH sUShyantyA iva |shrutaM me ashvinA havaM saptavadhriM cha mu~nchatam || 5.78.5
bhItAya nAdhamAnAya R^iShaye saptavadhraye |mAyAbhirashvinA yuvaM vR^ikShaM saM cha vi chAchathaH || 5.78.6
yathA vAtaH puShkariNIM sami~Ngayati sarvataH |evA te garbha ejatu niraitu dashamAsyaH || 5.78.7
yathA vAto yathA vanaM yathA samudra ejati |evA tvaM dashamAsya sahAvehi jarAyuNA || 5.78.8
dasha mAsA~nChashayAnaH kumAro adhi mAtari |niraitu jIvo akShato jIvo jIvantyA adhi || 5.78.9

mahe no adya bodhayoSho rAye divitmatI |yathA chinno abodhayaH satyashravasi vAyye sujAte ashvasUnR^ite || 5.79.1
yA sunIthe shauchadrathe vyauchCho duhitardivaH |sA vyuchCha sahIyasi satyashravasi vAyye sujAte ashvasUnR^ite || 5.79.2
sA no adyAbharadvasurvyuchChA duhitardivaH |yo vyauchChaH sahIyasi satyashravasi vAyye sujAte ashvasUnR^ite || 5.79.3
abhi ye tvA vibhAvari stomairgR^iNanti vahnayaH |maghairmaghoni sushriyo dAmanvantaH surAtayaH sujAte ashvasUnR^ite || 5.79.4
yachchiddhi te gaNA ime Chadayanti maghattaye |pari chidvaShTayo dadhurdadato rAdho ahrayaM sujAte ashvasUnR^ite || 5.79.5
aiShu dhA vIravadyasha uSho maghoni sUriShu |ye no rAdhAMsyahrayA maghavAno arAsata sujAte ashvasUnR^ite || 5.79.6
tebhyo dyumnaM bR^ihadyasha uSho maghonyA vaha |ye no rAdhAMsyashvyA gavyA bhajanta sUrayaH sujAte ashvasUnR^ite || 5.79.7
uta no gomatIriSha A vahA duhitardivaH |sAkaM sUryasya rashmibhiH shukraiH shochadbhirarchibhiH sujAte ashvasUnR^ite || 5.79.8
vyuchChA duhitardivo mA chiraM tanuthA apaH |nettvA stenaM yathA ripuM tapAti sUro archiShA sujAte ashvasUnR^ite || 5.79.9
etAvadveduShastvaM bhUyo vA dAtumarhasi |yA stotR^ibhyo vibhAvaryuchChantI na pramIyase sujAte ashvasUnR^ite || 5.79.10

dyutadyAmAnaM bR^ihatImR^itena R^itAvarImaruNapsuM vibhAtIm |devImuShasaM svarAvahantIM prati viprAso matibhirjarante || 5.80.1
eShA janaM darshatA bodhayantI sugAnpathaH kR^iNvatI yAtyagre |bR^ihadrathA bR^ihatI vishvaminvoShA jyotiryachChatyagre ahnAm || 5.80.2
eShA gobhiraruNebhiryujAnAsredhantI rayimaprAyu chakre |patho radantI suvitAya devI puruShTutA vishvavArA vi bhAti || 5.80.3
eShA vyenI bhavati dvibarhA AviShkR^iNvAnA tanvaM purastAt |R^itasya panthAmanveti sAdhu prajAnatIva na disho minAti || 5.80.4
eShA shubhrA na tanvo vidAnordhveva snAtI dR^ishaye no asthAt |apa dveSho bAdhamAnA tamAMsyuShA divo duhitA jyotiShAgAt || 5.80.5
eShA pratIchI duhitA divo nR^InyoSheva bhadrA ni riNIte apsaH |vyUrNvatI dAshuShe vAryANi punarjyotiryuvatiH pUrvathAkaH || 5.80.6

yu~njate mana uta yu~njate dhiyo viprA viprasya bR^ihato vipashchitaH |vi hotrA dadhe vayunAvideka inmahI devasya savituH pariShTutiH || 5.81.1
vishvA rUpANi prati mu~nchate kaviH prAsAvIdbhadraM dvipade chatuShpade |vi nAkamakhyatsavitA vareNyo.anu prayANamuShaso vi rAjati || 5.81.2
yasya prayANamanvanya idyayurdevA devasya mahimAnamojasA |yaH pArthivAni vimame sa etasho rajAMsi devaH savitA mahitvanA || 5.81.3
uta yAsi savitastrINi rochanota sUryasya rashmibhiH samuchyasi |uta rAtrImubhayataH parIyasa uta mitro bhavasi deva dharmabhiH || 5.81.4
uteshiShe prasavasya tvameka iduta pUShA bhavasi deva yAmabhiH |utedaM vishvaM bhuvanaM vi rAjasi shyAvAshvaste savitaH stomamAnashe || 5.81.5

tatsaviturvR^iNImahe vayaM devasya bhojanam |shreShThaM sarvadhAtamaM turaM bhagasya dhImahi || 5.82.1
asya hi svayashastaraM savituH kachchana priyam |na minanti svarAjyam || 5.82.2
sa hi ratnAni dAshuShe suvAti savitA bhagaH |taM bhAgaM chitramImahe || 5.82.3
adyA no deva savitaH prajAvatsAvIH saubhagam |parA duShShvapnyaM suva || 5.82.4
vishvAni deva savitarduritAni parA suva |yadbhadraM tanna A suva || 5.82.5
anAgaso aditaye devasya savituH save |vishvA vAmAni dhImahi || 5.82.6
A vishvadevaM satpatiM sUktairadyA vR^iNImahe |satyasavaM savitAram || 5.82.7
ya ime ubhe ahanI pura etyaprayuchChan |svAdhIrdevaH savitA || 5.82.8
ya imA vishvA jAtAnyAshrAvayati shlokena |pra cha suvAti savitA || 5.82.9

achChA vada tavasaM gIrbhirAbhiH stuhi parjanyaM namasA vivAsa |kanikradadvR^iShabho jIradAnU reto dadhAtyoShadhIShu garbham || 5.83.1
vi vR^ikShAnhantyuta hanti rakShaso vishvaM bibhAya bhuvanaM mahAvadhAt |utAnAgA IShate vR^iShNyAvato yatparjanyaH stanayanhanti duShkR^itaH || 5.83.2
rathIva kashayAshvA.N abhikShipannAvirdUtAnkR^iNute varShyA.N aha |dUrAtsiMhasya stanathA udIrate yatparjanyaH kR^iNute varShyaM nabhaH || 5.83.3
pra vAtA vAnti patayanti vidyuta udoShadhIrjihate pinvate svaH |irA vishvasmai bhuvanAya jAyate yatparjanyaH pR^ithivIM retasAvati || 5.83.4
yasya vrate pR^ithivI nannamIti yasya vrate shaphavajjarbhurIti |yasya vrata oShadhIrvishvarUpAH sa naH parjanya mahi sharma yachCha || 5.83.5
divo no vR^iShTiM maruto rarIdhvaM pra pinvata vR^iShNo ashvasya dhArAH |arvA~Netena stanayitnunehyapo niShi~nchannasuraH pitA naH || 5.83.6
abhi kranda stanaya garbhamA dhA udanvatA pari dIyA rathena |dR^itiM su karSha viShitaM nya~nchaM samA bhavantUdvato nipAdAH || 5.83.7
mahAntaM koshamudachA ni Shi~ncha syandantAM kulyA viShitAH purastAt |ghR^itena dyAvApR^ithivI vyundhi suprapANaM bhavatvaghnyAbhyaH || 5.83.8
yatparjanya kanikradatstanayanhaMsi duShkR^itaH |pratIdaM vishvaM modate yatkiM cha pR^ithivyAmadhi || 5.83.9
avarShIrvarShamudu ShU gR^ibhAyAkardhanvAnyatyetavA u |ajIjana oShadhIrbhojanAya kamuta prajAbhyo.avido manIShAm || 5.83.10

baLitthA parvatAnAM khidraM bibharShi pR^ithivi |pra yA bhUmiM pravatvati mahnA jinoShi mahini || 5.84.1
stomAsastvA vichAriNi prati ShTobhantyaktubhiH |pra yA vAjaM na heShantaM perumasyasyarjuni || 5.84.2
dR^iLhA chidyA vanaspatInkShmayA dardharShyojasA |yatte abhrasya vidyuto divo varShanti vR^iShTayaH || 5.84.3

pra samrAje bR^ihadarchA gabhIraM brahma priyaM varuNAya shrutAya |vi yo jaghAna shamiteva charmopastire pR^ithivIM sUryAya || 5.85.1
vaneShu vyantarikShaM tatAna vAjamarvatsu paya usriyAsu |hR^itsu kratuM varuNo apsvagniM divi sUryamadadhAtsomamadrau || 5.85.2
nIchInabAraM varuNaH kavandhaM pra sasarja rodasI antarikSham |tena vishvasya bhuvanasya rAjA yavaM na vR^iShTirvyunatti bhUma || 5.85.3
unatti bhUmiM pR^ithivImuta dyAM yadA dugdhaM varuNo vaShTyAdit |samabhreNa vasata parvatAsastaviShIyantaH shrathayanta vIrAH || 5.85.4
imAmU ShvAsurasya shrutasya mahIM mAyAM varuNasya pra vocham |mAneneva tasthivA.N antarikShe vi yo mame pR^ithivIM sUryeNa || 5.85.5
imAmU nu kavitamasya mAyAM mahIM devasya nakirA dadharSha |ekaM yadudnA na pR^iNantyenIrAsi~nchantIravanayaH samudram || 5.85.6
aryamyaM varuNa mitryaM vA sakhAyaM vA sadamidbhrAtaraM vA |veshaM vA nityaM varuNAraNaM vA yatsImAgashchakR^imA shishrathastat || 5.85.7
kitavAso yadriripurna dIvi yadvA ghA satyamuta yanna vidma |sarvA tA vi Shya shithireva devAdhA te syAma varuNa priyAsaH || 5.85.8

indrAgnI yamavatha ubhA vAjeShu martyam |dR^iLhA chitsa pra bhedati dyumnA vANIriva tritaH || 5.86.1
yA pR^itanAsu duShTarA yA vAjeShu shravAyyA |yA pa~ncha charShaNIrabhIndrAgnI tA havAmahe || 5.86.2
tayoridamavachChavastigmA didyunmaghonoH |prati druNA gabhastyorgavAM vR^itraghna eShate || 5.86.3
tA vAmeShe rathAnAmindrAgnI havAmahe |patI turasya rAdhaso vidvAMsA girvaNastamA || 5.86.4
tA vR^idhantAvanu dyUnmartAya devAvadabhA |arhantA chitpuro dadheM.asheva devAvarvate || 5.86.5
evendrAgnibhyAmahAvi havyaM shUShyaM ghR^itaM na pUtamadribhiH |tA sUriShu shravo bR^ihadrayiM gR^iNatsu didhR^itamiShaM gR^iNatsu didhR^itam || 5.86.6

pra vo mahe matayo yantu viShNave marutvate girijA evayAmarut |pra shardhAya prayajyave sukhAdaye tavase bhandadiShTaye dhunivratAya shavase || 5.87.1
pra ye jAtA mahinA ye cha nu svayaM pra vidmanA bruvata evayAmarut |kratvA tadvo maruto nAdhR^iShe shavo dAnA mahnA tadeShAmadhR^iShTAso nAdrayaH || 5.87.2
pra ye divo bR^ihataH shR^iNvire girA sushukvAnaH subhva evayAmarut |na yeShAmirI sadhastha IShTa A.N agnayo na svavidyutaH pra syandrAso dhunInAm || 5.87.3
sa chakrame mahato nirurukramaH samAnasmAtsadasa evayAmarut |yadAyukta tmanA svAdadhi ShNubhirviShpardhaso vimahaso jigAti shevR^idho nR^ibhiH || 5.87.4
svano na vo.amavAnrejayadvR^iShA tveSho yayistaviSha evayAmarut |yenA sahanta R^i~njata svarochiShaH sthArashmAno hiraNyayAH svAyudhAsa iShmiNaH || 5.87.5
apAro vo mahimA vR^iddhashavasastveShaM shavo.avatvevayAmarut |sthAtAro hi prasitau saMdR^ishi sthana te na uruShyatA nidaH shushukvAMso nAgnayaH || 5.87.6
te rudrAsaH sumakhA agnayo yathA tuvidyumnA avantvevayAmarut |dIrghaM pR^ithu paprathe sadma pArthivaM yeShAmajmeShvA mahaH shardhAMsyadbhutainasAm || 5.87.7
adveSho no maruto gAtumetana shrotA havaM jariturevayAmarut |viShNormahaH samanyavo yuyotana smadrathyo na daMsanApa dveShAMsi sanutaH || 5.87.8
gantA no yaj~naM yaj~niyAH sushami shrotA havamarakSha evayAmarut |jyeShThAso na parvatAso vyomani yUyaM tasya prachetasaH syAta durdhartavo nidaH || 5.87.9

##
Last updated July 2, 2013

Special mention : Initial processing and help by Avinash and Shashi Sathaye, 
Avinash Chopde, Shree Devi Kumar, Sunder Hattangadi, John Gardner.
Reprocessed from Original in final form by Detlef Eichler with additional corrections.
See Detlef's site http://www.detlef108.de/Rigveda.htm
for other details and formats.

The text is shown without accents (Anudattas, dependent Svaritas,
and independent Svaritas including Kampas). Words are connected (agnimILe). 
Ch is doubled as in gachChati according to the rules of Rigveda-Pratishakhya. 
At the end of a word m is replaced by Anusvara M if the initial letter of the
following word is a labial stop consonant (p, ph, b, bh, m).
Visarga H before sh, Sh or s followed by a voiceless consonant has been restored.

Source : The Aufrecht/van Nooten/Holland (Samhita) version
of the Rigveda (http://www.people.fas.harvard.edu/~witzel/onlineRV.htm).
In this text accented vowels have Udatta or 'independent Svarita' markers.
Kampas are not shown. Words are separated (agnim ILe). 
Ch is not doubled as in gaChati. At the end of a word we find m before
a following labial stop consonant (p, ph, b, bh, m).
Visarga H before sh, Sh or s followed by a voiceless consonant has 
been dropped according to a rule of  Rigveda-Pratishakhya.

Send corrections to   : detlefeichler@googlemail.com, sanskrit@cheerful.com

The text is to be used for personal studies and research only.
Any use for commercial purpose is prohibited as a `gentleman's' agreement.


|| R^igvedaH vaidikasvaravirahitaH maNDalaM 6 ||
tvaM hyagne prathamo manotAsyA dhiyo abhavo dasma hotA |tvaM sIM vR^iShannakR^iNorduShTarItu saho vishvasmai sahase sahadhyai || 6.1.1
adhA hotA nyasIdo yajIyAniLaspada iShayannIDyaH san |taM tvA naraH prathamaM devayanto maho rAye chitayanto anu gman || 6.1.2
vR^iteva yantaM bahubhirvasavyaistve rayiM jAgR^ivAMso anu gman |rushantamagniM darshataM bR^ihantaM vapAvantaM vishvahA dIdivAMsam || 6.1.3
padaM devasya namasA vyantaH shravasyavaH shrava ApannamR^iktam |nAmAni chiddadhire yaj~niyAni bhadrAyAM te raNayanta saMdR^iShTau || 6.1.4
tvAM vardhanti kShitayaH pR^ithivyAM tvAM rAya ubhayAso janAnAm |tvaM trAtA taraNe chetyo bhUH pitA mAtA sadaminmAnuShANAm || 6.1.5
saparyeNyaH sa priyo vikShvagnirhotA mandro ni ShasAdA yajIyAn |taM tvA vayaM dama A dIdivAMsamupa j~nubAdho namasA sadema || 6.1.6
taM tvA vayaM sudhyo navyamagne sumnAyava Imahe devayantaH |tvaM visho anayo dIdyAno divo agne bR^ihatA rochanena || 6.1.7
vishAM kaviM vishpatiM shashvatInAM nitoshanaM vR^iShabhaM charShaNInAm |pretIShaNimiShayantaM pAvakaM rAjantamagniM yajataM rayINAm || 6.1.8
so agna Ije shashame cha marto yasta AnaT samidhA havyadAtim |ya AhutiM pari vedA namobhirvishvetsa vAmA dadhate tvotaH || 6.1.9
asmA u te mahi mahe vidhema namobhiragne samidhota havyaiH |vedI sUno sahaso gIrbhirukthairA te bhadrAyAM sumatau yatema || 6.1.10
A yastatantha rodasI vi bhAsA shravobhishcha shravasyastarutraH |bR^ihadbhirvAjaiH sthavirebhirasme revadbhiragne vitaraM vi bhAhi || 6.1.11
nR^ivadvaso sadamiddhehyasme bhUri tokAya tanayAya pashvaH |pUrvIriSho bR^ihatIrAre/aghA asme bhadrA saushravasAni santu || 6.1.12
purUNyagne purudhA tvAyA vasUni rAjanvasutA te ashyAm |purUNi hi tve puruvAra santyagne vasu vidhate rAjani tve || 6.1.13

tvaM hi kShaitavadyasho.agne mitro na patyase |tvaM vicharShaNe shravo vaso puShTiM na puShyasi || 6.2.1
tvAM hi ShmA charShaNayo yaj~nebhirgIrbhirILate |tvAM vAjI yAtyavR^iko rajastUrvishvacharShaNiH || 6.2.2
sajoShastvA divo naro yaj~nasya ketumindhate |yaddha sya mAnuSho janaH sumnAyurjuhve adhvare || 6.2.3
R^idhadyaste sudAnave dhiyA martaH shashamate |UtI Sha bR^ihato divo dviSho aMho na tarati || 6.2.4
samidhA yasta AhutiM nishitiM martyo nashat |vayAvantaM sa puShyati kShayamagne shatAyuSham || 6.2.5
tveShaste dhUma R^iNvati divi Sha~nChukra AtataH |sUro na hi dyutA tvaM kR^ipA pAvaka rochase || 6.2.6
adhA hi vikShvIDyo.asi priyo no atithiH |raNvaH purIva jUryaH sUnurna trayayAyyaH || 6.2.7
kratvA hi droNe ajyase.agne vAjI na kR^itvyaH |parijmeva svadhA gayo.atyo na hvAryaH shishuH || 6.2.8
tvaM tyA chidachyutAgne pashurna yavase |dhAmA ha yatte ajara vanA vR^ishchanti shikvasaH || 6.2.9
veShi hyadhvarIyatAmagne hotA dame vishAm |samR^idho vishpate kR^iNu juShasva havyama~NgiraH || 6.2.10
achChA no mitramaho deva devAnagne vochaH sumatiM rodasyoH |vIhi svastiM sukShitiM divo nR^IndviSho aMhAMsi duritA tarema tA tarema tavAvasA tarema || 6.2.11

agne sa kSheShadR^itapA R^itejA uru jyotirnashate devayuShTe |yaM tvaM mitreNa varuNaH sajoShA deva pAsi tyajasA martamaMhaH || 6.3.1
Ije yaj~nebhiH shashame shamIbhirR^idhadvArAyAgnaye dadAsha |evA chana taM yashasAmajuShTirnAMho martaM nashate na pradR^iptiH || 6.3.2
sUro na yasya dR^ishatirarepA bhImA yadeti shuchatasta A dhIH |heShasvataH shurudho nAyamaktoH kutrA chidraNvo vasatirvanejAH || 6.3.3
tigmaM chidema mahi varpo asya bhasadashvo na yamasAna AsA |vijehamAnaH parashurna jihvAM dravirna drAvayati dAru dhakShat || 6.3.4
sa idasteva prati dhAdasiShya~nChishIta tejo.ayaso na dhArAm |chitradhrajatiraratiryo aktorverna druShadvA raghupatmajaMhAH || 6.3.5
sa IM rebho na prati vasta usrAH shochiShA rArapIti mitramahAH |naktaM ya ImaruSho yo divA nR^Inamartyo aruSho yo divA nR^In || 6.3.6
divo na yasya vidhato navInodvR^iShA rukSha oShadhIShu nUnot |ghR^iNA na yo dhrajasA patmanA yannA rodasI vasunA daM supatnI || 6.3.7
dhAyobhirvA yo yujyebhirarkairvidyunna davidyotsvebhiH shuShmaiH |shardho vA yo marutAM tatakSha R^ibhurna tveSho rabhasAno adyaut || 6.3.8

yathA hotarmanuSho devatAtA yaj~nebhiH sUno sahaso yajAsi |evA no adya samanA samAnAnushannagna ushato yakShi devAn || 6.4.1
sa no vibhAvA chakShaNirna vastoragnirvandAru vedyashchano dhAt |vishvAyuryo amR^ito martyeShUSharbhudbhUdatithirjAtavedAH || 6.4.2
dyAvo na yasya panayantyabhvaM bhAsAMsi vaste sUryo na shukraH |vi ya inotyajaraH pAvako.ashnasya chichChishnathatpUrvyANi || 6.4.3
vadmA hi sUno asyadmasadvA chakre agnirjanuShAjmAnnam |sa tvaM na Urjasana UrjaM dhA rAjeva jeravR^ike kSheShyantaH || 6.4.4
nitikti yo vAraNamannamatti vAyurna rAShTryatyetyaktUn |turyAma yasta AdishAmarAtIratyo na hrutaH patataH parihrut || 6.4.5
A sUryo na bhAnumadbhirarkairagne tatantha rodasI vi bhAsA |chitro nayatpari tamAMsyaktaH shochiShA patmannaushijo na dIyan || 6.4.6
tvAM hi mandratamamarkashokairvavR^imahe mahi naH shroShyagne |indraM na tvA shavasA devatA vAyuM pR^iNanti rAdhasA nR^itamAH || 6.4.7
nU no agne.avR^ikebhiH svasti veShi rAyaH pathibhiH parShyaMhaH |tA sUribhyo gR^iNate rAsi sumnaM madema shatahimAH suvIrAH || 6.4.8

huve vaH sUnuM sahaso yuvAnamadroghavAchaM matibhiryaviShTham |ya invati draviNAni prachetA vishvavArANi puruvAro adhruk || 6.5.1
tve vasUni purvaNIka hotardoShA vastorerire yaj~niyAsaH |kShAmeva vishvA bhuvanAni yasminsaM saubhagAni dadhire pAvake || 6.5.2
tvaM vikShu pradivaH sIda Asu kratvA rathIrabhavo vAryANAm |ata inoShi vidhate chikitvo vyAnuShagjAtavedo vasUni || 6.5.3
yo naH sanutyo abhidAsadagne yo antaro mitramaho vanuShyAt |tamajarebhirvR^iShabhistava svaistapA tapiShTha tapasA tapasvAn || 6.5.4
yaste yaj~nena samidhA ya ukthairarkebhiH sUno sahaso dadAshat |sa martyeShvamR^ita prachetA rAyA dyumnena shravasA vi bhAti || 6.5.5
sa tatkR^idhIShitastUyamagne spR^idho bAdhasva sahasA sahasvAn |yachChasyase dyubhirakto vachobhistajjuShasva jariturghoShi manma || 6.5.6
ashyAma taM kAmamagne tavotI ashyAma rayiM rayivaH suvIram |ashyAma vAjamabhi vAjayanto.ashyAma dyumnamajarAjaraM te || 6.5.7

pra navyasA sahasaH sUnumachChA yaj~nena gAtumava ichChamAnaH |vR^ishchadvanaM kR^iShNayAmaM rushantaM vItI hotAraM divyaM jigAti || 6.6.1
sa shvitAnastanyatU rochanasthA ajarebhirnAnadadbhiryaviShThaH |yaH pAvakaH purutamaH purUNi pR^ithUnyagniranuyAti bharvan || 6.6.2
vi te viShvagvAtajUtAso agne bhAmAsaH shuche shuchayashcharanti |tuvimrakShAso divyA navagvA vanA vananti dhR^iShatA rujantaH || 6.6.3
ye te shukrAsaH shuchayaH shuchiShmaH kShAM vapanti viShitAso ashvAH |adha bhramasta urviyA vi bhAti yAtayamAno adhi sAnu pR^ishneH || 6.6.4
adha jihvA pApatIti pra vR^iShNo goShuyudho nAshaniH sR^ijAnA |shUrasyeva prasitiH kShAtiragnerdurvarturbhImo dayate vanAni || 6.6.5
A bhAnunA pArthivAni jrayAMsi mahastodasya dhR^iShatA tatantha |sa bAdhasvApa bhayA sahobhiH spR^idho vanuShyanvanuSho ni jUrva || 6.6.6
sa chitra chitraM chitayantamasme chitrakShatra chitratamaM vayodhAm |chandraM rayiM puruvIraM bR^ihantaM chandra chandrAbhirgR^iNate yuvasva || 6.6.7

mUrdhAnaM divo aratiM pR^ithivyA vaishvAnaramR^ita A jAtamagnim |kaviM samrAjamatithiM janAnAmAsannA pAtraM janayanta devAH || 6.7.1
nAbhiM yaj~nAnAM sadanaM rayINAM mahAmAhAvamabhi saM navanta |vaishvAnaraM rathyamadhvarANAM yaj~nasya ketuM janayanta devAH || 6.7.2
tvadvipro jAyate vAjyagne tvadvIrAso abhimAtiShAhaH |vaishvAnara tvamasmAsu dhehi vasUni rAjanspR^ihayAyyANi || 6.7.3
tvAM vishve amR^ita jAyamAnaM shishuM na devA abhi saM navante |tava kratubhiramR^itatvamAyanvaishvAnara yatpitroradIdeH || 6.7.4
vaishvAnara tava tAni vratAni mahAnyagne nakirA dadharSha |yajjAyamAnaH pitrorupasthe.avindaH ketuM vayuneShvahnAm || 6.7.5
vaishvAnarasya vimitAni chakShasA sAnUni divo amR^itasya ketunA |tasyedu vishvA bhuvanAdhi mUrdhani vayA iva ruruhuH sapta visruhaH || 6.7.6
vi yo rajAMsyamimIta sukraturvaishvAnaro vi divo rochanA kaviH |pari yo vishvA bhuvanAni paprathe.adabdho gopA amR^itasya rakShitA || 6.7.7

pR^ikShasya vR^iShNo aruShasya nU sahaH pra nu vochaM vidathA jAtavedasaH |vaishvAnarAya matirnavyasI shuchiH soma iva pavate chAruragnaye || 6.8.1
sa jAyamAnaH parame vyomani vratAnyagnirvratapA arakShata |vyantarikShamamimIta sukraturvaishvAnaro mahinA nAkamaspR^ishat || 6.8.2
vyastabhnAdrodasI mitro adbhuto.antarvAvadakR^iNojjyotiShA tamaH |vi charmaNIva dhiShaNe avartayadvaishvAnaro vishvamadhatta vR^iShNyam || 6.8.3
apAmupasthe mahiShA agR^ibhNata visho rAjAnamupa tasthurR^igmiyam |A dUto agnimabharadvivasvato vaishvAnaraM mAtarishvA parAvataH || 6.8.4
yugeyuge vidathyaM gR^iNadbhyo.agne rayiM yashasaM dhehi navyasIm |pavyeva rAjannaghashaMsamajara nIchA ni vR^ishcha vaninaM na tejasA || 6.8.5
asmAkamagne maghavatsu dhArayAnAmi kShatramajaraM suvIryam |vayaM jayema shatinaM sahasriNaM vaishvAnara vAjamagne tavotibhiH || 6.8.6
adabdhebhistava gopAbhiriShTe.asmAkaM pAhi triShadhastha sUrIn |rakShA cha no daduShAM shardho agne vaishvAnara pra cha tArIH stavAnaH || 6.8.7

ahashcha kR^iShNamahararjunaM cha vi vartete rajasI vedyAbhiH |vaishvAnaro jAyamAno na rAjAvAtirajjyotiShAgnistamAMsi || 6.9.1
nAhaM tantuM na vi jAnAmyotuM na yaM vayanti samare.atamAnAH |kasya svitputra iha vaktvAni paro vadAtyavareNa pitrA || 6.9.2
sa ittantuM sa vi jAnAtyotuM sa vaktvAnyR^ituthA vadAti |ya IM chiketadamR^itasya gopA avashcharanparo anyena pashyan || 6.9.3
ayaM hotA prathamaH pashyatemamidaM jyotiramR^itaM martyeShu |ayaM sa jaj~ne dhruva A niShatto.amartyastanvA vardhamAnaH || 6.9.4
dhruvaM jyotirnihitaM dR^ishaye kaM mano javiShThaM patayatsvantaH |vishve devAH samanasaH saketA ekaM kratumabhi vi yanti sAdhu || 6.9.5
vi me karNA patayato vi chakShurvIdaM jyotirhR^idaya AhitaM yat |vi me manashcharati dUra/AdhIH kiM svidvakShyAmi kimu nU maniShye || 6.9.6
vishve devA anamasyanbhiyAnAstvAmagne tamasi tasthivAMsam |vaishvAnaro.avatUtaye no.amartyo.avatUtaye naH || 6.9.7

puro vo mandraM divyaM suvR^iktiM prayati yaj~ne agnimadhvare dadhidhvam |pura ukthebhiH sa hi no vibhAvA svadhvarA karati jAtavedAH || 6.10.1
tamu dyumaH purvaNIka hotaragne agnibhirmanuSha idhAnaH |stomaM yamasmai mamateva shUShaM ghR^itaM na shuchi matayaH pavante || 6.10.2
pIpAya sa shravasA martyeShu yo agnaye dadAsha vipra ukthaiH |chitrAbhistamUtibhishchitrashochirvrajasya sAtA gomato dadhAti || 6.10.3
A yaH paprau jAyamAna urvI dUredR^ishA bhAsA kR^iShNAdhvA |adha bahu chittama UrmyAyAstiraH shochiShA dadR^ishe pAvakaH || 6.10.4
nU nashchitraM puruvAjAbhirUtI agne rayiM maghavadbhyashcha dhehi |ye rAdhasA shravasA chAtyanyAnsuvIryebhishchAbhi santi janAn || 6.10.5
imaM yaj~naM chano dhA agna ushanyaM ta AsAno juhute haviShmAn |bharadvAjeShu dadhiShe suvR^iktimavIrvAjasya gadhyasya sAtau || 6.10.6
vi dveShAMsInuhi vardhayeLAM madema shatahimAH suvIrAH || 6.10.7

yajasva hotariShito yajIyAnagne bAdho marutAM na prayukti |A no mitrAvaruNA nAsatyA dyAvA hotrAya pR^ithivI vavR^ityAH || 6.11.1
tvaM hotA mandratamo no adhrugantardevo vidathA martyeShu |pAvakayA juhvA vahnirAsAgne yajasva tanvaM tava svAm || 6.11.2
dhanyA chiddhi tve dhiShaNA vaShTi pra devA~njanma gR^iNate yajadhyai |vepiShTho a~NgirasAM yaddha vipro madhu chChando bhanati rebha iShTau || 6.11.3
adidyutatsvapAko vibhAvAgne yajasva rodasI urUchI |AyuM na yaM namasA rAtahavyA a~njanti suprayasaM pa~ncha janAH || 6.11.4
vR^i~nje ha yannamasA barhiragnAvayAmi srugghR^itavatI suvR^iktiH |amyakShi sadma sadane pR^ithivyA ashrAyi yaj~naH sUrye na chakShuH || 6.11.5
dashasyA naH purvaNIka hotardevebhiragne agnibhiridhAnaH |rAyaH sUno sahaso vAvasAnA ati srasema vR^ijanaM nAMhaH || 6.11.6

madhye hotA duroNe barhiSho rALagnistodasya rodasI yajadhyai |ayaM sa sUnuH sahasa R^itAvA dUrAtsUryo na shochiShA tatAna || 6.12.1
A yasmintve svapAke yajatra yakShadrAjansarvatAteva nu dyauH |triShadhasthastataruSho na jaMho havyA maghAni mAnuShA yajadhyai || 6.12.2
tejiShThA yasyAratirvanerAT todo adhvanna vR^idhasAno adyaut |adrogho na dravitA chetati tmannamartyo.avartra oShadhIShu || 6.12.3
sAsmAkebhiretarI na shUShairagniH ShTave dama A jAtavedAH |drvanno vanvankratvA nArvosraH piteva jArayAyi yaj~naiH || 6.12.4
adha smAsya panayanti bhAso vR^ithA yattakShadanuyAti pR^ithvIm |sadyo yaH syandro viShito dhavIyAnR^iNo na tAyurati dhanvA rAT || 6.12.5
sa tvaM no arvannidAyA vishvebhiragne agnibhiridhAnaH |veShi rAyo vi yAsi duchChunA madema shatahimAH suvIrAH || 6.12.6

tvadvishvA subhaga saubhagAnyagne vi yanti vanino na vayAH |shruShTI rayirvAjo vR^itratUrye divo vR^iShTirIDyo rItirapAm || 6.13.1
tvaM bhago na A hi ratnamiShe parijmeva kShayasi dasmavarchAH |agne mitro na bR^ihata R^itasyAsi kShattA vAmasya deva bhUreH || 6.13.2
sa satpatiH shavasA hanti vR^itramagne vipro vi paNerbharti vAjam |yaM tvaM pracheta R^itajAta rAyA sajoShA naptrApAM hinoShi || 6.13.3
yaste sUno sahaso gIrbhirukthairyaj~nairmarto nishitiM vedyAnaT |vishvaM sa deva prati vAramagne dhatte dhAnyaM patyate vasavyaiH || 6.13.4
tA nR^ibhya A saushravasA suvIrAgne sUno sahasaH puShyase dhAH |kR^iNoShi yachChavasA bhUri pashvo vayo vR^ikAyAraye jasuraye || 6.13.5
vadmA sUno sahaso no vihAyA agne tokaM tanayaM vAji no dAH |vishvAbhirgIrbhirabhi pUrtimashyAM madema shatahimAH suvIrAH || 6.13.6

agnA yo martyo duvo dhiyaM jujoSha dhItibhiH |bhasannu Sha pra pUrvya iShaM vurItAvase || 6.14.1
agniriddhi prachetA agnirvedhastama R^iShiH |agniM hotAramILate yaj~neShu manuSho vishaH || 6.14.2
nAnA hyagne.avase spardhante rAyo aryaH |tUrvanto dasyumAyavo vrataiH sIkShanto avratam || 6.14.3
agnirapsAmR^itIShahaM vIraM dadAti satpatim |yasya trasanti shavasaH saMchakShi shatravo bhiyA || 6.14.4
agnirhi vidmanA nido devo martamuruShyati |sahAvA yasyAvR^ito rayirvAjeShvavR^itaH || 6.14.5
achChA no mitramaho deva devAnagne vochaH sumatiM rodasyoH |vIhi svastiM sukShitiM divo nR^IndviSho aMhAMsi duritA tarema tA tarema tavAvasA tarema || 6.14.6

imamU Shu vo atithimuSharbudhaM vishvAsAM vishAM patimR^i~njase girA |vetIddivo januShA kachchidA shuchirjyokchidatti garbho yadachyutam || 6.15.1
mitraM na yaM sudhitaM bhR^igavo dadhurvanaspatAvIDyamUrdhvashochiSham |sa tvaM suprIto vItahavye adbhuta prashastibhirmahayase divedive || 6.15.2
sa tvaM dakShasyAvR^iko vR^idho bhUraryaH parasyAntarasya taruShaH |rAyaH sUno sahaso martyeShvA ChardiryachCha vItahavyAya sapratho bharadvAjAya saprathaH || 6.15.3
dyutAnaM vo atithiM svarNaramagniM hotAraM manuShaH svadhvaram |vipraM na dyukShavachasaM suvR^iktibhirhavyavAhamaratiM devamR^i~njase || 6.15.4
pAvakayA yashchitayantyA kR^ipA kShAmanrurucha uShaso na bhAnunA |tUrvanna yAmannetashasya nU raNa A yo ghR^iNe na tatR^iShANo ajaraH || 6.15.5
agnimagniM vaH samidhA duvasyata priyampriyaM vo atithiM gR^iNIShaNi |upa vo gIrbhiramR^itaM vivAsata devo deveShu vanate hi vAryaM devo deveShu vanate hi no duvaH || 6.15.6
samiddhamagniM samidhA girA gR^iNe shuchiM pAvakaM puro adhvare dhruvam |vipraM hotAraM puruvAramadruhaM kaviM sumnairImahe jAtavedasam || 6.15.7
tvAM dUtamagne amR^itaM yugeyuge havyavAhaM dadhire pAyumIDyam |devAsashcha martAsashcha jAgR^iviM vibhuM vishpatiM namasA ni Shedire || 6.15.8
vibhUShannagna ubhayA.N anu vratA dUto devAnAM rajasI samIyase |yatte dhItiM sumatimAvR^iNImahe.adha smA nastrivarUthaH shivo bhava || 6.15.9
taM supratIkaM sudR^ishaM sva~nchamavidvAMso viduShTaraM sapema |sa yakShadvishvA vayunAni vidvAnpra havyamagniramR^iteShu vochat || 6.15.10
tamagne pAsyuta taM piparShi yasta AnaT kavaye shUra dhItim |yaj~nasya vA nishitiM voditiM vA tamitpR^iNakShi shavasota rAyA || 6.15.11
tvamagne vanuShyato ni pAhi tvamu naH sahasAvannavadyAt |saM tvA dhvasmanvadabhyetu pAthaH saM rayiH spR^ihayAyyaH sahasrI || 6.15.12
agnirhotA gR^ihapatiH sa rAjA vishvA veda janimA jAtavedAH |devAnAmuta yo martyAnAM yajiShThaH sa pra yajatAmR^itAvA || 6.15.13
agne yadadya visho adhvarasya hotaH pAvakashoche veShTvaM hi yajvA |R^itA yajAsi mahinA vi yadbhUrhavyA vaha yaviShTha yA te adya || 6.15.14
abhi prayAMsi sudhitAni hi khyo ni tvA dadhIta rodasI yajadhyai |avA no maghavanvAjasAtAvagne vishvAni duritA tarema tA tarema tavAvasA tarema || 6.15.15
agne vishvebhiH svanIka devairUrNAvantaM prathamaH sIda yonim |kulAyinaM ghR^itavantaM savitre yaj~naM naya yajamAnAya sAdhu || 6.15.16
imamu tyamatharvavadagniM manthanti vedhasaH |yama~NkUyantamAnayannamUraM shyAvyAbhyaH || 6.15.17
janiShvA devavItaye sarvatAtA svastaye |A devAnvakShyamR^itA.N R^itAvR^idho yaj~naM deveShu pispR^ishaH || 6.15.18
vayamu tvA gR^ihapate janAnAmagne akarma samidhA bR^ihantam |asthUri no gArhapatyAni santu tigmena nastejasA saM shishAdhi || 6.15.19

tvamagne yaj~nAnAM hotA vishveShAM hitaH |devebhirmAnuShe jane || 6.16.1
sa no mandrAbhiradhvare jihvAbhiryajA mahaH |A devAnvakShi yakShi cha || 6.16.2
vetthA hi vedho adhvanaH pathashcha devA~njasA |agne yaj~neShu sukrato || 6.16.3
tvAmILe adha dvitA bharato vAjibhiH shunam |Ije yaj~neShu yaj~niyam || 6.16.4
tvamimA vAryA puru divodAsAya sunvate |bharadvAjAya dAshuShe || 6.16.5
tvaM dUto amartya A vahA daivyaM janam |shR^iNvanviprasya suShTutim || 6.16.6
tvAmagne svAdhyo martAso devavItaye |yaj~neShu devamILate || 6.16.7
tava pra yakShi saMdR^ishamuta kratuM sudAnavaH |vishve juShanta kAminaH || 6.16.8
tvaM hotA manurhito vahnirAsA viduShTaraH |agne yakShi divo vishaH || 6.16.9
agna A yAhi vItaye gR^iNAno havyadAtaye |ni hotA satsi barhiShi || 6.16.10
taM tvA samidbhira~Ngiro ghR^itena vardhayAmasi |bR^ihachChochA yaviShThya || 6.16.11
sa naH pR^ithu shravAyyamachChA deva vivAsasi |bR^ihadagne suvIryam || 6.16.12
tvAmagne puShkarAdadhyatharvA niramanthata |mUrdhno vishvasya vAghataH || 6.16.13
tamu tvA dadhya~N~NR^iShiH putra Idhe atharvaNaH |vR^itrahaNaM puraMdaram || 6.16.14
tamu tvA pAthyo vR^iShA samIdhe dasyuhantamam |dhanaMjayaM raNeraNe || 6.16.15
ehyU Shu bravANi te.agna itthetarA giraH |ebhirvardhAsa indubhiH || 6.16.16
yatra kva cha te mano dakShaM dadhasa uttaram |tatrA sadaH kR^iNavase || 6.16.17
nahi te pUrtamakShipadbhuvannemAnAM vaso |athA duvo vanavase || 6.16.18
AgniragAmi bhArato vR^itrahA puruchetanaH |divodAsasya satpatiH || 6.16.19
sa hi vishvAti pArthivA rayiM dAshanmahitvanA |vanvannavAto astR^itaH || 6.16.20
sa pratnavannavIyasAgne dyumnena saMyatA |bR^ihattatantha bhAnunA || 6.16.21
pra vaH sakhAyo agnaye stomaM yaj~naM cha dhR^iShNuyA |archa gAya cha vedhase || 6.16.22
sa hi yo mAnuShA yugA sIdaddhotA kavikratuH |dUtashcha havyavAhanaH || 6.16.23
tA rAjAnA shuchivratAdityAnmArutaM gaNam |vaso yakShIha rodasI || 6.16.24
vasvI te agne saMdR^iShTiriShayate martyAya |Urjo napAdamR^itasya || 6.16.25
kratvA dA astu shreShTho.adya tvA vanvansurekNAH |marta AnAsha suvR^iktim || 6.16.26
te te agne tvotA iShayanto vishvamAyuH |taranto aryo arAtIrvanvanto aryo arAtIH || 6.16.27
agnistigmena shochiShA yAsadvishvaM nyatriNam |agnirno vanate rayim || 6.16.28
suvIraM rayimA bhara jAtavedo vicharShaNe |jahi rakShAMsi sukrato || 6.16.29
tvaM naH pAhyaMhaso jAtavedo aghAyataH |rakShA No brahmaNaskave || 6.16.30
yo no agne dureva A marto vadhAya dAshati |tasmAnnaH pAhyaMhasaH || 6.16.31
tvaM taM deva jihvayA pari bAdhasva duShkR^itam |marto yo no jighAMsati || 6.16.32
bharadvAjAya saprathaH sharma yachCha sahantya |agne vareNyaM vasu || 6.16.33
agnirvR^itrANi ja~NghanaddraviNasyurvipanyayA |samiddhaH shukra AhutaH || 6.16.34
garbhe mAtuH pituShpitA vididyutAno akShare |sIdannR^itasya yonimA || 6.16.35
brahma prajAvadA bhara jAtavedo vicharShaNe |agne yaddIdayaddivi || 6.16.36
upa tvA raNvasaMdR^ishaM prayasvantaH sahaskR^ita |agne sasR^ijmahe giraH || 6.16.37
upa chChAyAmiva ghR^iNeraganma sharma te vayam |agne hiraNyasaMdR^ishaH || 6.16.38
ya ugra iva sharyahA tigmashR^i~Ngo na vaMsagaH |agne puro rurojitha || 6.16.39
A yaM haste na khAdinaM shishuM jAtaM na bibhrati |vishAmagniM svadhvaram || 6.16.40
pra devaM devavItaye bharatA vasuvittamam |A sve yonau ni ShIdatu || 6.16.41
A jAtaM jAtavedasi priyaM shishItAtithim |syona A gR^ihapatim || 6.16.42
agne yukShvA hi ye tavAshvAso deva sAdhavaH |araM vahanti manyave || 6.16.43
achChA no yAhyA vahAbhi prayAMsi vItaye |A devAnsomapItaye || 6.16.44
udagne bhArata dyumadajasreNa davidyutat |shochA vi bhAhyajara || 6.16.45
vItI yo devaM marto duvasyedagnimILItAdhvare haviShmAn |hotAraM satyayajaM rodasyoruttAnahasto namasA vivAset || 6.16.46
A te agna R^ichA havirhR^idA taShTaM bharAmasi |te te bhavantUkShaNa R^iShabhAso vashA uta || 6.16.47
agniM devAso agriyamindhate vR^itrahantamam |yenA vasUnyAbhR^itA tR^iLhA rakShAMsi vAjinA || 6.16.48

pibA somamabhi yamugra tarda UrvaM gavyaM mahi gR^iNAna indra |vi yo dhR^iShNo vadhiSho vajrahasta vishvA vR^itramamitriyA shavobhiH || 6.17.1
sa IM pAhi ya R^ijIShI tarutro yaH shipravAnvR^iShabho yo matInAm |yo gotrabhidvajrabhR^idyo hariShThAH sa indra chitrA.N abhi tR^indhi vAjAn || 6.17.2
evA pAhi pratnathA mandatu tvA shrudhi brahma vAvR^idhasvota gIrbhiH |AviH sUryaM kR^iNuhi pIpihISho jahi shatrU.Nrabhi gA indra tR^indhi || 6.17.3
te tvA madA bR^ihadindra svadhAva ime pItA ukShayanta dyumantam |mahAmanUnaM tavasaM vibhUtiM matsarAso jarhR^iShanta prasAham || 6.17.4
yebhiH sUryamuShasaM mandasAno.avAsayo.apa dR^iLhAni dardrat |mahAmadriM pari gA indra santaM nutthA achyutaM sadasaspari svAt || 6.17.5
tava kratvA tava taddaMsanAbhirAmAsu pakvaM shachyA ni dIdhaH |aurNordura usriyAbhyo vi dR^iLhodUrvAdgA asR^ijo a~NgirasvAn || 6.17.6
paprAtha kShAM mahi daMso vyurvImupa dyAmR^iShvo bR^ihadindra stabhAyaH |adhArayo rodasI devaputre pratne mAtarA yahvI R^itasya || 6.17.7
adha tvA vishve pura indra devA ekaM tavasaM dadhire bharAya |adevo yadabhyauhiShTa devAnsvarShAtA vR^iNata indramatra || 6.17.8
adha dyaushchitte apa sA nu vajrAddvitAnamadbhiyasA svasya manyoH |ahiM yadindro abhyohasAnaM ni chidvishvAyuH shayathe jaghAna || 6.17.9
adha tvaShTA te maha ugra vajraM sahasrabhR^iShTiM vavR^itachChatAshrim |nikAmamaramaNasaM yena navantamahiM saM piNagR^ijIShin || 6.17.10
vardhAnyaM vishve marutaH sajoShAH pachachChataM mahiShA.N indra tubhyam |pUShA viShNustrINi sarAMsi dhAvanvR^itrahaNaM madiramaMshumasmai || 6.17.11
A kShodo mahi vR^itaM nadInAM pariShThitamasR^ija UrmimapAm |tAsAmanu pravata indra panthAM prArdayo nIchIrapasaH samudram || 6.17.12
evA tA vishvA chakR^ivAMsamindraM mahAmugramajuryaM sahodAm |suvIraM tvA svAyudhaM suvajramA brahma navyamavase vavR^ityAt || 6.17.13
sa no vAjAya shravasa iShe cha rAye dhehi dyumata indra viprAn |bharadvAje nR^ivata indra sUrIndivi cha smaidhi pArye na indra || 6.17.14
ayA vAjaM devahitaM sanema madema shatahimAH suvIrAH || 6.17.15

tamu ShTuhi yo abhibhUtyojA vanvannavAtaH puruhUta indraH |aShALhamugraM sahamAnamAbhirgIrbhirvardha vR^iShabhaM charShaNInAm || 6.18.1
sa yudhmaH satvA khajakR^itsamadvA tuvimrakSho nadanumA.N R^ijIShI |bR^ihadreNushchyavano mAnuShINAmekaH kR^iShTInAmabhavatsahAvA || 6.18.2
tvaM ha nu tyadadamAyo dasyU.NrekaH kR^iShTIravanorAryAya |asti svinnu vIryaM tatta indra na svidasti tadR^ituthA vi vochaH || 6.18.3
sadiddhi te tuvijAtasya manye sahaH sahiShTha turatasturasya |ugramugrasya tavasastavIyo.aradhrasya radhraturo babhUva || 6.18.4
tannaH pratnaM sakhyamastu yuShme itthA vadadbhirvalama~NgirobhiH |hannachyutachyuddasmeShayantamR^iNoH puro vi duro asya vishvAH || 6.18.5
sa hi dhIbhirhavyo astyugra IshAnakR^inmahati vR^itratUrye |sa tokasAtA tanaye sa vajrI vitantasAyyo abhavatsamatsu || 6.18.6
sa majmanA janima mAnuShANAmamartyena nAmnAti pra sarsre |sa dyumnena sa shavasota rAyA sa vIryeNa nR^itamaH samokAH || 6.18.7
sa yo na muhe na mithU jano bhUtsumantunAmA chumuriM dhuniM cha |vR^iNakpipruM shambaraM shuShNamindraH purAM chyautnAya shayathAya nU chit || 6.18.8
udAvatA tvakShasA panyasA cha vR^itrahatyAya rathamindra tiShTha |dhiShva vajraM hasta A dakShiNatrAbhi pra manda purudatra mAyAH || 6.18.9
agnirna shuShkaM vanamindra hetI rakSho ni dhakShyashanirna bhImA |gambhIraya R^iShvayA yo rurojAdhvAnayadduritA dambhayachcha || 6.18.10
A sahasraM pathibhirindra rAyA tuvidyumna tuvivAjebhirarvAk |yAhi sUno sahaso yasya nU chidadeva Ishe puruhUta yotoH || 6.18.11
pra tuvidyumnasya sthavirasya ghR^iShverdivo rarapshe mahimA pR^ithivyAH |nAsya shatrurna pratimAnamasti na pratiShThiH purumAyasya sahyoH || 6.18.12
pra tatte adyA karaNaM kR^itaM bhUtkutsaM yadAyumatithigvamasmai |purU sahasrA ni shishA abhi kShAmuttUrvayANaM dhR^iShatA ninetha || 6.18.13
anu tvAhighne adha deva devA madanvishve kavitamaM kavInAm |karo yatra varivo bAdhitAya dive janAya tanve gR^iNAnaH || 6.18.14
anu dyAvApR^ithivI tatta ojo.amartyA jihata indra devAH |kR^iShvA kR^itno akR^itaM yatte astyukthaM navIyo janayasva yaj~naiH || 6.18.15

mahA.N indro nR^ivadA charShaNiprA uta dvibarhA aminaH sahobhiH |asmadryagvAvR^idhe vIryAyoruH pR^ithuH sukR^itaH kartR^ibhirbhUt || 6.19.1
indrameva dhiShaNA sAtaye dhAdbR^ihantamR^iShvamajaraM yuvAnam |aShALhena shavasA shUshuvAMsaM sadyashchidyo vAvR^idhe asAmi || 6.19.2
pR^ithU karasnA bahulA gabhastI asmadryaksaM mimIhi shravAMsi |yUtheva pashvaH pashupA damUnA asmA.N indrAbhyA vavR^itsvAjau || 6.19.3
taM va indraM chatinamasya shAkairiha nUnaM vAjayanto huvema |yathA chitpUrve jaritAra AsuranedyA anavadyA ariShTAH || 6.19.4
dhR^itavrato dhanadAH somavR^iddhaH sa hi vAmasya vasunaH purukShuH |saM jagmire pathyA rAyo asminsamudre na sindhavo yAdamAnAH || 6.19.5
shaviShThaM na A bhara shUra shava ojiShThamojo abhibhUta ugram |vishvA dyumnA vR^iShNyA mAnuShANAmasmabhyaM dA harivo mAdayadhyai || 6.19.6
yaste madaH pR^itanAShALamR^idhra indra taM na A bhara shUshuvAMsam |yena tokasya tanayasya sAtau maMsImahi jigIvAMsastvotAH || 6.19.7
A no bhara vR^iShaNaM shuShmamindra dhanaspR^itaM shUshuvAMsaM sudakSham |yena vaMsAma pR^itanAsu shatrUntavotibhiruta jAmI.NrajAmIn || 6.19.8
A te shuShmo vR^iShabha etu pashchAdottarAdadharAdA purastAt |A vishvato abhi sametvarvA~Nindra dyumnaM svarvaddhehyasme || 6.19.9
nR^ivatta indra nR^itamAbhirUtI vaMsImahi vAmaM shromatebhiH |IkShe hi vasva ubhayasya rAjandhA ratnaM mahi sthUraM bR^ihantam || 6.19.10
