uSho na jAraH pR^ithu pAjo ashreddavidyutaddIdyachChoshuchAnaH |vR^iShA hariH shuchirA bhAti bhAsA dhiyo hinvAna ushatIrajIgaH || 7.10.1
svarNa vastoruShasAmarochi yaj~naM tanvAnA ushijo na manma |agnirjanmAni deva A vi vidvAndravaddUto devayAvA vaniShThaH || 7.10.2
achChA giro matayo devayantIragniM yanti draviNaM bhikShamANAH |susaMdR^ishaM supratIkaM sva~nchaM havyavAhamaratiM mAnuShANAm || 7.10.3
indraM no agne vasubhiH sajoShA rudraM rudrebhirA vahA bR^ihantam |AdityebhiraditiM vishvajanyAM bR^ihaspatimR^ikvabhirvishvavAram || 7.10.4
mandraM hotAramushijo yaviShThamagniM visha ILate adhvareShu |sa hi kShapAvA.N abhavadrayINAmatandro dUto yajathAya devAn || 7.10.5

mahA.N asyadhvarasya praketo na R^ite tvadamR^itA mAdayante |A vishvebhiH sarathaM yAhi devairnyagne hotA prathamaH sadeha || 7.11.1
tvAmILate ajiraM dUtyAya haviShmantaH sadaminmAnuShAsaH |yasya devairAsado barhiragne.ahAnyasmai sudinA bhavanti || 7.11.2
trishchidaktoH pra chikiturvasUni tve antardAshuShe martyAya |manuShvadagna iha yakShi devAnbhavA no dUto abhishastipAvA || 7.11.3
agnirIshe bR^ihato adhvarasyAgnirvishvasya haviShaH kR^itasya |kratuM hyasya vasavo juShantAthA devA dadhire havyavAham || 7.11.4
Agne vaha haviradyAya devAnindrajyeShThAsa iha mAdayantAm |imaM yaj~naM divi deveShu dhehi yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.11.5

aganma mahA namasA yaviShThaM yo dIdAya samiddhaH sve duroNe |chitrabhAnuM rodasI antarurvI svAhutaM vishvataH pratya~ncham || 7.12.1
sa mahnA vishvA duritAni sAhvAnagniH ShTave dama A jAtavedAH |sa no rakShiShadduritAdavadyAdasmAngR^iNata uta no maghonaH || 7.12.2
tvaM varuNa uta mitro agne tvAM vardhanti matibhirvasiShThAH |tve vasu suShaNanAni santu yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.12.3

prAgnaye vishvashuche dhiyaMdhe.asuraghne manma dhItiM bharadhvam |bhare havirna barhiShi prINAno vaishvAnarAya yataye matInAm || 7.13.1
tvamagne shochiShA shoshuchAna A rodasI apR^iNA jAyamAnaH |tvaM devA.N abhishasteramu~ncho vaishvAnara jAtavedo mahitvA || 7.13.2
jAto yadagne bhuvanA vyakhyaH pashUnna gopA iryaH parijmA |vaishvAnara brahmaNe vinda gAtuM yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.13.3

samidhA jAtavedase devAya devahUtibhiH |havirbhiH shukrashochiShe namasvino vayaM dAshemAgnaye || 7.14.1
vayaM te agne samidhA vidhema vayaM dAshema suShTutI yajatra |vayaM ghR^itenAdhvarasya hotarvayaM deva haviShA bhadrashoche || 7.14.2
A no devebhirupa devahUtimagne yAhi vaShaTkR^itiM juShANaH |tubhyaM devAya dAshataH syAma yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.14.3

upasadyAya mILhuSha Asye juhutA haviH |yo no nediShThamApyam || 7.15.1
yaH pa~ncha charShaNIrabhi niShasAda damedame |kavirgR^ihapatiryuvA || 7.15.2
sa no vedo amAtyamagnI rakShatu vishvataH |utAsmAnpAtvaMhasaH || 7.15.3
navaM nu stomamagnaye divaH shyenAya jIjanam |vasvaH kuvidvanAti naH || 7.15.4
spArhA yasya shriyo dR^ishe rayirvIravato yathA |agre yaj~nasya shochataH || 7.15.5
semAM vetu vaShaTkR^itimagnirjuShata no giraH |yajiShTho havyavAhanaH || 7.15.6
ni tvA nakShya vishpate dyumantaM deva dhImahi |suvIramagna Ahuta || 7.15.7
kShapa usrashcha dIdihi svagnayastvayA vayam |suvIrastvamasmayuH || 7.15.8
upa tvA sAtaye naro viprAso yanti dhItibhiH |upAkSharA sahasriNI || 7.15.9
agnI rakShAMsi sedhati shukrashochiramartyaH |shuchiH pAvaka IDyaH || 7.15.10
sa no rAdhAMsyA bhareshAnaH sahaso yaho |bhagashcha dAtu vAryam || 7.15.11
tvamagne vIravadyasho devashcha savitA bhagaH |ditishcha dAti vAryam || 7.15.12
agne rakShA No aMhasaH prati Shma deva rIShataH |tapiShThairajaro daha || 7.15.13
adhA mahI na AyasyanAdhR^iShTo nR^ipItaye |pUrbhavA shatabhujiH || 7.15.14
tvaM naH pAhyaMhaso doShAvastaraghAyataH |divA naktamadAbhya || 7.15.15

enA vo agniM namasorjo napAtamA huve |priyaM chetiShThamaratiM svadhvaraM vishvasya dUtamamR^itam || 7.16.1
sa yojate aruShA vishvabhojasA sa dudravatsvAhutaH |subrahmA yaj~naH sushamI vasUnAM devaM rAdho janAnAm || 7.16.2
udasya shochirasthAdAjuhvAnasya mILhuShaH |uddhUmAso aruShAso divispR^ishaH samagnimindhate naraH || 7.16.3
taM tvA dUtaM kR^iNmahe yashastamaM devA.N A vItaye vaha |vishvA sUno sahaso martabhojanA rAsva tadyattvemahe || 7.16.4
tvamagne gR^ihapatistvaM hotA no adhvare |tvaM potA vishvavAra prachetA yakShi veShi cha vAryam || 7.16.5
kR^idhi ratnaM yajamAnAya sukrato tvaM hi ratnadhA asi |A na R^ite shishIhi vishvamR^itvijaM sushaMso yashcha dakShate || 7.16.6
tve agne svAhuta priyAsaH santu sUrayaH |yantAro ye maghavAno janAnAmUrvAndayanta gonAm || 7.16.7
yeShAmiLA ghR^itahastA duroNa A.N api prAtA niShIdati |tA.NstrAyasva sahasya druho nido yachChA naH sharma dIrghashrut || 7.16.8
sa mandrayA cha jihvayA vahnirAsA viduShTaraH |agne rayiM maghavadbhyo na A vaha havyadAtiM cha sUdaya || 7.16.9
ye rAdhAMsi dadatyashvyA maghA kAmena shravaso mahaH |tA.N aMhasaH pipR^ihi partR^ibhiShTvaM shataM pUrbhiryaviShThya || 7.16.10
devo vo draviNodAH pUrNAM vivaShTyAsicham |udvA si~nchadhvamupa vA pR^iNadhvamAdidvo deva ohate || 7.16.11
taM hotAramadhvarasya prachetasaM vahniM devA akR^iNvata |dadhAti ratnaM vidhate suvIryamagnirjanAya dAshuShe || 7.16.12

agne bhava suShamidhA samiddha uta barhirurviyA vi stR^iNItAm || 7.17.1
uta dvAra ushatIrvi shrayantAmuta devA.N ushata A vaheha || 7.17.2
agne vIhi haviShA yakShi devAnsvadhvarA kR^iNuhi jAtavedaH || 7.17.3
svadhvarA karati jAtavedA yakShaddevA.N amR^itAnpiprayachcha || 7.17.4
vaMsva vishvA vAryANi prachetaH satyA bhavantvAshiSho no adya || 7.17.5
tvAmu te dadhire havyavAhaM devAso agna Urja A napAtam || 7.17.6
te te devAya dAshataH syAma maho no ratnA vi dadha iyAnaH || 7.17.7

tve ha yatpitarashchinna indra vishvA vAmA jaritAro asanvan |tve gAvaH sudughAstve hyashvAstvaM vasu devayate vaniShThaH || 7.18.1
rAjeva hi janibhiH kSheShyevAva dyubhirabhi viduShkaviH san |pishA giro maghavangobhirashvaistvAyataH shishIhi rAye asmAn || 7.18.2
imA u tvA paspR^idhAnAso atra mandrA giro devayantIrupa sthuH |arvAchI te pathyA rAya etu syAma te sumatAvindra sharman || 7.18.3
dhenuM na tvA sUyavase dudukShannupa brahmANi sasR^ije vasiShThaH |tvAminme gopatiM vishva AhA na indraH sumatiM gantvachCha || 7.18.4
arNAMsi chitpaprathAnA sudAsa indro gAdhAnyakR^iNotsupArA |shardhantaM shimyumuchathasya navyaH shApaM sindhUnAmakR^iNodashastIH || 7.18.5
puroLA itturvasho yakShurAsIdrAye matsyAso nishitA apIva |shruShTiM chakrurbhR^igavo druhyavashcha sakhA sakhAyamataradviShUchoH || 7.18.6
A pakthAso bhalAnaso bhanantAlinAso viShANinaH shivAsaH |A yo.anayatsadhamA Aryasya gavyA tR^itsubhyo ajaganyudhA nR^In || 7.18.7
durAdhyo aditiM srevayanto.achetaso vi jagR^ibhre paruShNIm |mahnAvivyakpR^ithivIM patyamAnaH pashuShkavirashayachchAyamAnaH || 7.18.8
IyurarthaM na nyarthaM paruShNImAshushchanedabhipitvaM jagAma |sudAsa indraH sutukA.N amitrAnarandhayanmAnuShe vadhrivAchaH || 7.18.9
IyurgAvo na yavasAdagopA yathAkR^itamabhi mitraM chitAsaH |pR^ishnigAvaH pR^ishninipreShitAsaH shruShTiM chakrurniyuto rantayashcha || 7.18.10
ekaM cha yo viMshatiM cha shravasyA vaikarNayorjanAnrAjA nyastaH |dasmo na sadmanni shishAti barhiH shUraH sargamakR^iNodindra eShAm || 7.18.11
adha shrutaM kavaShaM vR^iddhamapsvanu druhyuM ni vR^iNagvajrabAhuH |vR^iNAnA atra sakhyAya sakhyaM tvAyanto ye amadannanu tvA || 7.18.12
vi sadyo vishvA dR^iMhitAnyeShAmindraH puraH sahasA sapta dardaH |vyAnavasya tR^itsave gayaM bhAgjeShma pUruM vidathe mR^idhravAcham || 7.18.13
ni gavyavo.anavo druhyavashcha ShaShTiH shatA suShupuH ShaT sahasrA |ShaShTirvIrAso adhi ShaDduvoyu vishvedindrasya vIryA kR^itAni || 7.18.14
indreNaite tR^itsavo veviShANA Apo na sR^iShTA adhavanta nIchIH |durmitrAsaH prakalavinmimAnA jahurvishvAni bhojanA sudAse || 7.18.15
ardhaM vIrasya shR^itapAmanindraM parA shardhantaM nunude abhi kShAm |indro manyuM manyumyo mimAya bheje patho vartaniM patyamAnaH || 7.18.16
AdhreNa chittadvekaM chakAra siMhyaM chitpetvenA jaghAna |ava sraktIrveshyAvR^ishchadindraH prAyachChadvishvA bhojanA sudAse || 7.18.17
shashvanto hi shatravo rAradhuShTe bhedasya chichChardhato vinda randhim |martA.N enaH stuvato yaH kR^iNoti tigmaM tasminni jahi vajramindra || 7.18.18
AvadindraM yamunA tR^itsavashcha prAtra bhedaM sarvatAtA muShAyat |ajAsashcha shigravo yakShavashcha baliM shIrShANi jabhrurashvyAni || 7.18.19
na ta indra sumatayo na rAyaH saMchakShe pUrvA uShaso na nUtnAH |devakaM chinmAnyamAnaM jaghanthAva tmanA bR^ihataH shambaraM bhet || 7.18.20
pra ye gR^ihAdamamadustvAyA parAsharaH shatayAturvasiShThaH |na te bhojasya sakhyaM mR^iShantAdhA sUribhyaH sudinA vyuchChAn || 7.18.21
dve napturdevavataH shate gordvA rathA vadhUmantA sudAsaH |arhannagne paijavanasya dAnaM hoteva sadma paryemi rebhan || 7.18.22
chatvAro mA paijavanasya dAnAH smaddiShTayaH kR^ishanino nireke |R^ijrAso mA pR^ithiviShThAH sudAsastokaM tokAya shravase vahanti || 7.18.23
yasya shravo rodasI antarurvI shIrShNeshIrShNe vibabhAjA vibhaktA |saptedindraM na sravato gR^iNanti ni yudhyAmadhimashishAdabhIke || 7.18.24
imaM naro marutaH sashchatAnu divodAsaM na pitaraM sudAsaH |aviShTanA paijavanasya ketaM dUNAshaM kShatramajaraM duvoyu || 7.18.25

yastigmashR^i~Ngo vR^iShabho na bhIma ekaH kR^iShTIshchyAvayati pra vishvAH |yaH shashvato adAshuSho gayasya prayantAsi suShvitarAya vedaH || 7.19.1
tvaM ha tyadindra kutsamAvaH shushrUShamANastanvA samarye |dAsaM yachChuShNaM kuyavaM nyasmA arandhaya ArjuneyAya shikShan || 7.19.2
tvaM dhR^iShNo dhR^iShatA vItahavyaM prAvo vishvAbhirUtibhiH sudAsam |pra paurukutsiM trasadasyumAvaH kShetrasAtA vR^itrahatyeShu pUrum || 7.19.3
tvaM nR^ibhirnR^imaNo devavItau bhUrINi vR^itrA haryashva haMsi |tvaM ni dasyuM chumuriM dhuniM chAsvApayo dabhItaye suhantu || 7.19.4
tava chyautnAni vajrahasta tAni nava yatpuro navatiM cha sadyaH |niveshane shatatamAviveShIraha~ncha vR^itraM namuchimutAhan || 7.19.5
sanA tA ta indra bhojanAni rAtahavyAya dAshuShe sudAse |vR^iShNe te harI vR^iShaNA yunajmi vyantu brahmANi purushAka vAjam || 7.19.6
mA te asyAM sahasAvanpariShTAvaghAya bhUma harivaH parAdai |trAyasva no.avR^ikebhirvarUthaistava priyAsaH sUriShu syAma || 7.19.7
priyAsa itte maghavannabhiShTau naro madema sharaNe sakhAyaH |ni turvashaM ni yAdvaM shishIhyatithigvAya shaMsyaM kariShyan || 7.19.8
sadyashchinnu te maghavannabhiShTau naraH shaMsantyukthashAsa ukthA |ye te havebhirvi paNI.NradAshannasmAnvR^iNIShva yujyAya tasmai || 7.19.9
ete stomA narAM nR^itama tubhyamasmadrya~ncho dadato maghAni |teShAmindra vR^itrahatye shivo bhUH sakhA cha shUro.avitA cha nR^iNAm || 7.19.10
nU indra shUra stavamAna UtI brahmajUtastanvA vAvR^idhasva |upa no vAjAnmimIhyupa stInyUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.19.11

ugro jaj~ne vIryAya svadhAvA~nchakrirapo naryo yatkariShyan |jagmiryuvA nR^iShadanamavobhistrAtA na indra enaso mahashchit || 7.20.1
hantA vR^itramindraH shUshuvAnaH prAvInnu vIro jaritAramUtI |kartA sudAse aha vA u lokaM dAtA vasu muhurA dAshuShe bhUt || 7.20.2
yudhmo anarvA khajakR^itsamadvA shUraH satrAShADjanuShemaShALhaH |vyAsa indraH pR^itanAH svojA adhA vishvaM shatrUyantaM jaghAna || 7.20.3
ubhe chidindra rodasI mahitvA paprAtha taviShIbhistuviShmaH |ni vajramindro harivAnmimikShansamandhasA madeShu vA uvocha || 7.20.4
vR^iShA jajAna vR^iShaNaM raNAya tamu chinnArI naryaM sasUva |pra yaH senAnIradha nR^ibhyo astInaH satvA gaveShaNaH sa dhR^iShNuH || 7.20.5
nU chitsa bhreShate jano na reShanmano yo asya ghoramAvivAsAt |yaj~nairya indre dadhate duvAMsi kShayatsa rAya R^itapA R^itejAH || 7.20.6
yadindra pUrvo aparAya shikShannayajjyAyAnkanIyaso deShNam |amR^ita itparyAsIta dUramA chitra chitryaM bharA rayiM naH || 7.20.7
yasta indra priyo jano dadAshadasannireke adrivaH sakhA te |vayaM te asyAM sumatau chaniShThAH syAma varUthe aghnato nR^ipItau || 7.20.8
eSha stomo achikradadvR^iShA ta uta stAmurmaghavannakrapiShTa |rAyaskAmo jaritAraM ta Agantvama~Nga shakra vasva A shako naH || 7.20.9
sa na indra tvayatAyA iShe dhAstmanA cha ye maghavAno junanti |vasvI Shu te jaritre astu shaktiryUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.20.10

asAvi devaM goR^ijIkamandho nyasminnindro januShemuvocha |bodhAmasi tvA haryashva yaj~nairbodhA naH stomamandhaso madeShu || 7.21.1
pra yanti yaj~naM vipayanti barhiH somamAdo vidathe dudhravAchaH |nyu bhriyante yashaso gR^ibhAdA dUra{}upabdo vR^iShaNo nR^iShAchaH || 7.21.2
tvamindra sravitavA apaskaH pariShThitA ahinA shUra pUrvIH |tvadvAvakre rathyo na dhenA rejante vishvA kR^itrimANi bhIShA || 7.21.3
bhImo viveShAyudhebhireShAmapAMsi vishvA naryANi vidvAn |indraH puro jarhR^iShANo vi dUdhodvi vajrahasto mahinA jaghAna || 7.21.4
na yAtava indra jUjuvurno na vandanA shaviShTha vedyAbhiH |sa shardhadaryo viShuNasya jantormA shishnadevA api gurR^itaM naH || 7.21.5
abhi kratvendra bhUradha jmanna te vivya~NmahimAnaM rajAMsi |svenA hi vR^itraM shavasA jaghantha na shatrurantaM vividadyudhA te || 7.21.6
devAshchitte asuryAya pUrve.anu kShatrAya mamire sahAMsi |indro maghAni dayate viShahyendraM vAjasya johuvanta sAtau || 7.21.7
kIrishchiddhi tvAmavase juhAveshAnamindra saubhagasya bhUreH |avo babhUtha shatamUte asme abhikShattustvAvato varUtA || 7.21.8
sakhAyasta indra vishvaha syAma namovR^idhAso mahinA tarutra |vanvantu smA te.avasA samIke.abhItimaryo vanuShAM shavAMsi || 7.21.9
sa na indra tvayatAyA iShe dhAstmanA cha ye maghavAno junanti |vasvI Shu te jaritre astu shaktiryUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.21.10

pibA somamindra mandatu tvA yaM te suShAva haryashvAdriH |soturbAhubhyAM suyato nArvA || 7.22.1
yaste mado yujyashchArurasti yena vR^itrANi haryashva haMsi |sa tvAmindra prabhUvaso mamattu || 7.22.2
bodhA su me maghavanvAchamemAM yAM te vasiShTho archati prashastim |imA brahma sadhamAde juShasva || 7.22.3
shrudhI havaM vipipAnasyAdrerbodhA viprasyArchato manIShAm |kR^iShvA duvAMsyantamA sachemA || 7.22.4
na te giro api mR^iShye turasya na suShTutimasuryasya vidvAn |sadA te nAma svayasho vivakmi || 7.22.5
bhUri hi te savanA mAnuSheShu bhUri manIShI havate tvAmit |mAre asmanmaghava~njyokkaH || 7.22.6
tubhyedimA savanA shUra vishvA tubhyaM brahmANi vardhanA kR^iNomi |tvaM nR^ibhirhavyo vishvadhAsi || 7.22.7
nU chinnu te manyamAnasya dasmodashnuvanti mahimAnamugra |na vIryamindra te na rAdhaH || 7.22.8
ye cha pUrva R^iShayo ye cha nUtnA indra brahmANi janayanta viprAH |asme te santu sakhyA shivAni yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.22.9

udu brahmANyairata shravasyendraM samarye mahayA vasiShTha |A yo vishvAni shavasA tatAnopashrotA ma Ivato vachAMsi || 7.23.1
ayAmi ghoSha indra devajAmirirajyanta yachChurudho vivAchi |nahi svamAyushchikite janeShu tAnIdaMhAMsyati parShyasmAn || 7.23.2
yuje rathaM gaveShaNaM haribhyAmupa brahmANi jujuShANamasthuH |vi bAdhiShTa sya rodasI mahitvendro vR^itrANyapratI jaghanvAn || 7.23.3
ApashchitpipyuH staryo na gAvo nakShannR^itaM jaritArasta indra |yAhi vAyurna niyuto no achChA tvaM hi dhIbhirdayase vi vAjAn || 7.23.4
te tvA madA indra mAdayantu shuShmiNaM tuvirAdhasaM jaritre |eko devatrA dayase hi martAnasmi~nChUra savane mAdayasva || 7.23.5
evedindraM vR^iShaNaM vajrabAhuM vasiShThAso abhyarchantyarkaiH |sa naH stuto vIravaddhAtu gomadyUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.23.6

yoniShTa indra sadane akAri tamA nR^ibhiH puruhUta pra yAhi |aso yathA no.avitA vR^idhe cha dado vasUni mamadashcha somaiH || 7.24.1
gR^ibhItaM te mana indra dvibarhAH sutaH somaH pariShiktA madhUni |visR^iShTadhenA bharate suvR^iktiriyamindraM johuvatI manIShA || 7.24.2
A no diva A pR^ithivyA R^ijIShinnidaM barhiH somapeyAya yAhi |vahantu tvA harayo madrya~nchamA~NgUShamachChA tavasaM madAya || 7.24.3
A no vishvAbhirUtibhiH sajoShA brahma juShANo haryashva yAhi |varIvR^ijatsthavirebhiH sushiprAsme dadhadvR^iShaNaM shuShmamindra || 7.24.4
eSha stomo maha ugrAya vAhe dhurIvAtyo na vAjayannadhAyi |indra tvAyamarka ITTe vasUnAM divIva dyAmadhi naH shromataM dhAH || 7.24.5
evA na indra vAryasya pUrdhi pra te mahIM sumatiM vevidAma |iShaM pinva maghavadbhyaH suvIrAM yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.24.6

A te maha indrotyugra samanyavo yatsamaranta senAH |patAti didyunnaryasya bAhvormA te mano viShvadryagvi chArIt || 7.25.1
ni durga indra shnathihyamitrA.N abhi ye no martAso amanti |Are taM shaMsaM kR^iNuhi ninitsorA no bhara sambharaNaM vasUnAm || 7.25.2
shataM te shiprinnUtayaH sudAse sahasraM shaMsA uta rAtirastu |jahi vadharvanuSho martyasyAsme dyumnamadhi ratnaM cha dhehi || 7.25.3
tvAvato hIndra kratve asmi tvAvato.avituH shUra rAtau |vishvedahAni taviShIva ugra.N okaH kR^iNuShva harivo na mardhIH || 7.25.4
kutsA ete haryashvAya shUShamindre saho devajUtamiyAnAH |satrA kR^idhi suhanA shUra vR^itrA vayaM tarutrAH sanuyAma vAjam || 7.25.5
evA na indra vAryasya pUrdhi pra te mahIM sumatiM vevidAma |iShaM pinva maghavadbhyaH suvIrAM yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.25.6

na soma indramasuto mamAda nAbrahmANo maghavAnaM sutAsaH |tasmA ukthaM janaye yajjujoShannR^ivannavIyaH shR^iNavadyathA naH || 7.26.1
ukthaukthe soma indraM mamAda nIthenIthe maghavAnaM sutAsaH |yadIM sabAdhaH pitaraM na putrAH samAnadakShA avase havante || 7.26.2
chakAra tA kR^iNavannUnamanyA yAni bruvanti vedhasaH suteShu |janIriva patirekaH samAno ni mAmR^ije pura indraH su sarvAH || 7.26.3
evA tamAhuruta shR^iNva indra eko vibhaktA taraNirmaghAnAm |mithastura Utayo yasya pUrvIrasme bhadrANi sashchata priyANi || 7.26.4
evA vasiShTha indramUtaye nR^InkR^iShTInAM vR^iShabhaM sute gR^iNAti |sahasriNa upa no mAhi vAjAnyUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.26.5

indraM naro nemadhitA havante yatpAryA yunajate dhiyastAH |shUro nR^iShAtA shavasashchakAna A gomati vraje bhajA tvaM naH || 7.27.1
ya indra shuShmo maghavante asti shikShA sakhibhyaH puruhUta nR^ibhyaH |tvaM hi dR^iLhA maghavanvichetA apA vR^idhi parivR^itaM na rAdhaH || 7.27.2
indro rAjA jagatashcharShaNInAmadhi kShami viShurUpaM yadasti |tato dadAti dAshuShe vasUni chodadrAdha upastutashchidarvAk || 7.27.3
nU chinna indro maghavA sahUtI dAno vAjaM ni yamate na UtI |anUnA yasya dakShiNA pIpAya vAmaM nR^ibhyo abhivItA sakhibhyaH || 7.27.4
nU indra rAye varivaskR^idhI na A te mano vavR^ityAma maghAya |gomadashvAvadrathavadvyanto yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.27.5

brahmA Na indropa yAhi vidvAnarvA~nchaste harayaH santu yuktAH |vishve chiddhi tvA vihavanta martA asmAkamichChR^iNuhi vishvaminva || 7.28.1
havaM ta indra mahimA vyAnaDbrahma yatpAsi shavasinnR^iShINAm |A yadvajraM dadhiShe hasta ugra ghoraH sankratvA janiShThA aShALhaH || 7.28.2
tava praNItIndra johuvAnAnsaM yannR^Inna rodasI ninetha |mahe kShatrAya shavase hi jaj~ne.atUtujiM chittUtujirashishnat || 7.28.3
ebhirna indrAhabhirdashasya durmitrAso hi kShitayaH pavante |prati yachchaShTe anR^itamanenA ava dvitA varuNo mAyI naH sAt || 7.28.4
vochemedindraM maghavAnamenaM maho rAyo rAdhaso yaddadannaH |yo archato brahmakR^itimaviShTho yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.28.5

ayaM soma indra tubhyaM sunva A tu pra yAhi harivastadokAH |pibA tvasya suShutasya chArordado maghAni maghavanniyAnaH || 7.29.1
brahmanvIra brahmakR^itiM juShANo.arvAchIno haribhiryAhi tUyam |asminnU Shu savane mAdayasvopa brahmANi shR^iNava imA naH || 7.29.2
kA te astyaraMkR^itiH sUktaiH kadA nUnaM te maghavandAshema |vishvA matIrA tatane tvAyAdhA ma indra shR^iNavo havemA || 7.29.3
uto ghA te puruShyA idAsanyeShAM pUrveShAmashR^iNorR^iShINAm |adhAhaM tvA maghava~njohavImi tvaM na indrAsi pramatiH piteva || 7.29.4
vochemedindraM maghavAnamenaM maho rAyo rAdhaso yaddadannaH |yo archato brahmakR^itimaviShTho yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.29.5

A no deva shavasA yAhi shuShminbhavA vR^idha indra rAyo asya |mahe nR^imNAya nR^ipate suvajra mahi kShatrAya pauMsyAya shUra || 7.30.1
havanta u tvA havyaM vivAchi tanUShu shUrAH sUryasya sAtau |tvaM vishveShu senyo janeShu tvaM vR^itrANi randhayA suhantu || 7.30.2
ahA yadindra sudinA vyuchChAndadho yatketumupamaM samatsu |nyagniH sIdadasuro na hotA huvAno atra subhagAya devAn || 7.30.3
vayaM te ta indra ye cha deva stavanta shUra dadato maghAni |yachChA sUribhya upamaM varUthaM svAbhuvo jaraNAmashnavanta || 7.30.4
vochemedindraM maghavAnamenaM maho rAyo rAdhaso yaddadannaH |yo archato brahmakR^itimaviShTho yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.30.5

pra va indrAya mAdanaM haryashvAya gAyata |sakhAyaH somapAvne || 7.31.1
shaMsedukthaM sudAnava uta dyukShaM yathA naraH |chakR^imA satyarAdhase || 7.31.2
tvaM na indra vAjayustvaM gavyuH shatakrato |tvaM hiraNyayurvaso || 7.31.3
vayamindra tvAyavo.abhi pra Nonumo vR^iShan |viddhI tvasya no vaso || 7.31.4
mA no nide cha vaktave.aryo randhIrarAvNe |tve api kraturmama || 7.31.5
tvaM varmAsi saprathaH puroyodhashcha vR^itrahan |tvayA prati bruve yujA || 7.31.6
mahA.N utAsi yasya te.anu svadhAvarI sahaH |mamnAte indra rodasI || 7.31.7
taM tvA marutvatI pari bhuvadvANI sayAvarI |nakShamANA saha dyubhiH || 7.31.8
UrdhvAsastvAnvindavo bhuvandasmamupa dyavi |saM te namanta kR^iShTayaH || 7.31.9
pra vo mahe mahivR^idhe bharadhvaM prachetase pra sumatiM kR^iNudhvam |vishaH pUrvIH pra charA charShaNiprAH || 7.31.10
uruvyachase mahine suvR^iktimindrAya brahma janayanta viprAH |tasya vratAni na minanti dhIrAH || 7.31.11
indraM vANIranuttamanyumeva satrA rAjAnaM dadhire sahadhyai |haryashvAya barhayA samApIn || 7.31.12

mo Shu tvA vAghatashchanAre asmanni rIraman |ArAttAchchitsadhamAdaM na A gahIha vA sannupa shrudhi || 7.32.1
ime hi te brahmakR^itaH sute sachA madhau na makSha Asate |indre kAmaM jaritAro vasUyavo rathe na pAdamA dadhuH || 7.32.2
rAyaskAmo vajrahastaM sudakShiNaM putro na pitaraM huve || 7.32.3
ima indrAya sunvire somAso dadhyAshiraH |tA.N A madAya vajrahasta pItaye haribhyAM yAhyoka A || 7.32.4
shravachChrutkarNa Iyate vasUnAM nU chinno mardhiShadgiraH |sadyashchidyaH sahasrANi shatA dadannakirditsantamA minat || 7.32.5
sa vIro apratiShkuta indreNa shUshuve nR^ibhiH |yaste gabhIrA savanAni vR^itrahansunotyA cha dhAvati || 7.32.6
bhavA varUthaM maghavanmaghonAM yatsamajAsi shardhataH |vi tvAhatasya vedanaM bhajemahyA dUNAsho bharA gayam || 7.32.7
sunotA somapAvne somamindrAya vajriNe |pachatA paktIravase kR^iNudhvamitpR^iNannitpR^iNate mayaH || 7.32.8
mA sredhata somino dakShatA mahe kR^iNudhvaM rAya Atuje |taraNirijjayati kSheti puShyati na devAsaH kavatnave || 7.32.9
nakiH sudAso rathaM paryAsa na rIramat |indro yasyAvitA yasya maruto gamatsa gomati vraje || 7.32.10
gamadvAjaM vAjayannindra martyo yasya tvamavitA bhuvaH |asmAkaM bodhyavitA rathAnAmasmAkaM shUra nR^iNAm || 7.32.11
udinnvasya richyateM.asho dhanaM na jigyuShaH |ya indro harivAnna dabhanti taM ripo dakShaM dadhAti somini || 7.32.12
mantramakharvaM sudhitaM supeshasaM dadhAta yaj~niyeShvA |pUrvIshchana prasitayastaranti taM ya indre karmaNA bhuvat || 7.32.13
kastamindra tvAvasumA martyo dadharShati |shraddhA itte maghavanpArye divi vAjI vAjaM siShAsati || 7.32.14
maghonaH sma vR^itrahatyeShu chodaya ye dadati priyA vasu |tava praNItI haryashva sUribhirvishvA tarema duritA || 7.32.15
tavedindrAvamaM vasu tvaM puShyasi madhyamam |satrA vishvasya paramasya rAjasi nakiShTvA goShu vR^iNvate || 7.32.16
tvaM vishvasya dhanadA asi shruto ya IM bhavantyAjayaH |tavAyaM vishvaH puruhUta pArthivo.avasyurnAma bhikShate || 7.32.17
yadindra yAvatastvametAvadahamIshIya |stotAramiddidhiSheya radAvaso na pApatvAya rAsIya || 7.32.18
shikSheyaminmahayate divedive rAya A kuhachidvide |nahi tvadanyanmaghavanna ApyaM vasyo asti pitA chana || 7.32.19
taraNiritsiShAsati vAjaM puraMdhyA yujA |A va indraM puruhUtaM name girA nemiM taShTeva sudrvam || 7.32.20
na duShTutI martyo vindate vasu na sredhantaM rayirnashat |sushaktirinmaghavantubhyaM mAvate deShNaM yatpArye divi || 7.32.21
abhi tvA shUra nonumo.adugdhA iva dhenavaH |IshAnamasya jagataH svardR^ishamIshAnamindra tasthuShaH || 7.32.22
na tvAvA.N anyo divyo na pArthivo na jAto na janiShyate |ashvAyanto maghavannindra vAjino gavyantastvA havAmahe || 7.32.23
abhI ShatastadA bharendra jyAyaH kanIyasaH |purUvasurhi maghavansanAdasi bharebhare cha havyaH || 7.32.24
parA Nudasva maghavannamitrAnsuvedA no vasU kR^idhi |asmAkaM bodhyavitA mahAdhane bhavA vR^idhaH sakhInAm || 7.32.25
indra kratuM na A bhara pitA putrebhyo yathA |shikShA No asminpuruhUta yAmani jIvA jyotirashImahi || 7.32.26
mA no aj~nAtA vR^ijanA durAdhyo mAshivAso ava kramuH |tvayA vayaM pravataH shashvatIrapo.ati shUra tarAmasi || 7.32.27

shvitya~ncho mA dakShiNataskapardA dhiyaMjinvAso abhi hi pramanduH |uttiShThanvoche pari barhiSho nR^Inna me dUrAdavitave vasiShThAH || 7.33.1
dUrAdindramanayannA sutena tiro vaishantamati pAntamugram |pAshadyumnasya vAyatasya somAtsutAdindro.avR^iNItA vasiShThAn || 7.33.2
evennu kaM sindhumebhistatArevennu kaM bhedamebhirjaghAna |evennu kaM dAsharAj~ne sudAsaM prAvadindro brahmaNA vo vasiShThAH || 7.33.3
juShTI naro brahmaNA vaH pitR^INAmakShamavyayaM na kilA riShAtha |yachChakvarIShu bR^ihatA raveNendre shuShmamadadhAtA vasiShThAH || 7.33.4
uddyAmivettR^iShNajo nAthitAso.adIdhayurdAsharAj~ne vR^itAsaH |vasiShThasya stuvata indro ashroduruM tR^itsubhyo akR^iNodu lokam || 7.33.5
daNDA ivedgo/ajanAsa AsanparichChinnA bharatA arbhakAsaH |abhavachcha pura/etA vasiShTha AdittR^itsUnAM visho aprathanta || 7.33.6
trayaH kR^iNvanti bhuvaneShu retastisraH prajA AryA jyotiragrAH |trayo gharmAsa uShasaM sachante sarvA.N ittA.N anu vidurvasiShThAH || 7.33.7
sUryasyeva vakShatho jyotireShAM samudrasyeva mahimA gabhIraH |vAtasyeva prajavo nAnyena stomo vasiShThA anvetave vaH || 7.33.8
ta inniNyaM hR^idayasya praketaiH sahasravalshamabhi saM charanti |yamena tataM paridhiM vayanto.apsarasa upa sedurvasiShThAH || 7.33.9
vidyuto jyotiH pari saMjihAnaM mitrAvaruNA yadapashyatAM tvA |tatte janmotaikaM vasiShThAgastyo yattvA visha AjabhAra || 7.33.10
utAsi maitrAvaruNo vasiShThorvashyA brahmanmanaso.adhi jAtaH |drapsaM skannaM brahmaNA daivyena vishve devAH puShkare tvAdadanta || 7.33.11
sa praketa ubhayasya pravidvAnsahasradAna uta vA sadAnaH |yamena tataM paridhiM vayiShyannapsarasaH pari jaj~ne vasiShThaH || 7.33.12
satre ha jAtAviShitA namobhiH kumbhe retaH siShichatuH samAnam |tato ha mAna udiyAya madhyAttato jAtamR^iShimAhurvasiShTham || 7.33.13
ukthabhR^itaM sAmabhR^itaM bibharti grAvANaM bibhratpra vadAtyagre |upainamAdhvaM sumanasyamAnA A vo gachChAti pratR^ido vasiShThaH || 7.33.14

pra shukraitu devI manIShA asmatsutaShTo ratho na vAjI || 7.34.1
viduH pR^ithivyA divo janitraM shR^iNvantyApo adha kSharantIH || 7.34.2
Apashchidasmai pinvanta pR^ithvIrvR^itreShu shUrA maMsanta ugrAH || 7.34.3
A dhUrShvasmai dadhAtAshvAnindro na vajrI hiraNyabAhuH || 7.34.4
abhi pra sthAtAheva yaj~naM yAteva patmantmanA hinota || 7.34.5
tmanA samatsu hinota yaj~naM dadhAta ketuM janAya vIram || 7.34.6
udasya shuShmAdbhAnurnArta bibharti bhAraM pR^ithivI na bhUma || 7.34.7
hvayAmi devA.N ayAturagne sAdhannR^itena dhiyaM dadhAmi || 7.34.8
abhi vo devIM dhiyaM dadhidhvaM pra vo devatrA vAchaM kR^iNudhvam || 7.34.9
A chaShTa AsAM pAtho nadInAM varuNa ugraH sahasrachakShAH || 7.34.10
rAjA rAShTrAnAM pesho nadInAmanuttamasmai kShatraM vishvAyu || 7.34.11
aviShTo asmAnvishvAsu vikShvadyuM kR^iNota shaMsaM ninitsoH || 7.34.12
vyetu didyuddviShAmashevA yuyota viShvagrapastanUnAm || 7.34.13
avInno agnirhavyAnnamobhiH preShTho asmA adhAyi stomaH || 7.34.14
sajUrdevebhirapAM napAtaM sakhAyaM kR^idhvaM shivo no astu || 7.34.15
abjAmukthairahiM gR^iNIShe budhne nadInAM rajassu ShIdan || 7.34.16
mA no.ahirbudhnyo riShe dhAnmA yaj~no asya sridhadR^itAyoH || 7.34.17
uta na eShu nR^iShu shravo dhuH pra rAye yantu shardhanto aryaH || 7.34.18
tapanti shatruM svarNa bhUmA mahAsenAso amebhireShAm || 7.34.19
A yannaH patnIrgamantyachChA tvaShTA supANirdadhAtu vIrAn || 7.34.20
prati naH stomaM tvaShTA juSheta syAdasme aramatirvasUyuH || 7.34.21
tA no rAsanrAtiShAcho vasUnyA rodasI varuNAnI shR^iNotu |varUtrIbhiH susharaNo no astu tvaShTA sudatro vi dadhAtu rAyaH || 7.34.22
tanno rAyaH parvatAstanna ApastadrAtiShAcha oShadhIruta dyauH |vanaspatibhiH pR^ithivI sajoShA ubhe rodasI pari pAsato naH || 7.34.23
anu tadurvI rodasI jihAtAmanu dyukSho varuNa indrasakhA |anu vishve maruto ye sahAso rAyaH syAma dharuNaM dhiyadhyai || 7.34.24
tanna indro varuNo mitro agnirApa oShadhIrvanino juShanta |sharmansyAma marutAmupasthe yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.34.25

shaM na indrAgnI bhavatAmavobhiH shaM na indrAvaruNA rAtahavyA |shamindrAsomA suvitAya shaM yoH shaM na indrApUShaNA vAjasAtau || 7.35.1
shaM no bhagaH shamu naH shaMso astu shaM naH puraMdhiH shamu santu rAyaH |shaM naH satyasya suyamasya shaMsaH shaM no aryamA purujAto astu || 7.35.2
shaM no dhAtA shamu dhartA no astu shaM na urUchI bhavatu svadhAbhiH |shaM rodasI bR^ihatI shaM no adriH shaM no devAnAM suhavAni santu || 7.35.3
shaM no agnirjyotiranIko astu shaM no mitrAvaruNAvashvinA sham |shaM naH sukR^itAM sukR^itAni santu shaM na iShiro abhi vAtu vAtaH || 7.35.4
shaM no dyAvApR^ithivI pUrvahUtau shamantarikShaM dR^ishaye no astu |shaM na oShadhIrvanino bhavantu shaM no rajasaspatirastu jiShNuH || 7.35.5
shaM na indro vasubhirdevo astu shamAdityebhirvaruNaH sushaMsaH |shaM no rudro rudrebhirjalAShaH shaM nastvaShTA gnAbhiriha shR^iNotu || 7.35.6
shaM naH somo bhavatu brahma shaM naH shaM no grAvANaH shamu santu yaj~nAH |shaM naH svarUNAM mitayo bhavantu shaM naH prasvaH shamvastu vediH || 7.35.7
shaM naH sUrya uruchakShA udetu shaM nashchatasraH pradisho bhavantu |shaM naH parvatA dhruvayo bhavantu shaM naH sindhavaH shamu santvApaH || 7.35.8
shaM no aditirbhavatu vratebhiH shaM no bhavantu marutaH svarkAH |shaM no viShNuH shamu pUShA no astu shaM no bhavitraM shamvastu vAyuH || 7.35.9
shaM no devaH savitA trAyamANaH shaM no bhavantUShaso vibhAtIH |shaM naH parjanyo bhavatu prajAbhyaH shaM naH kShetrasya patirastu shambhuH || 7.35.10
shaM no devA vishvadevA bhavantu shaM sarasvatI saha dhIbhirastu |shamabhiShAchaH shamu rAtiShAchaH shaM no divyAH pArthivAH shaM no apyAH || 7.35.11
shaM naH satyasya patayo bhavantu shaM no arvantaH shamu santu gAvaH |shaM na R^ibhavaH sukR^itaH suhastAH shaM no bhavantu pitaro haveShu || 7.35.12
shaM no aja ekapAddevo astu shaM no.ahirbudhnyaH shaM samudraH |shaM no apAM napAtperurastu shaM naH pR^ishnirbhavatu devagopA || 7.35.13
AdityA rudrA vasavo juShantedaM brahma kriyamANaM navIyaH |shR^iNvantu no divyAH pArthivAso gojAtA uta ye yaj~niyAsaH || 7.35.14
ye devAnAM yaj~niyA yaj~niyAnAM manoryajatrA amR^itA R^itaj~nAH |te no rAsantAmurugAyamadya yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.35.15

pra brahmaitu sadanAdR^itasya vi rashmibhiH sasR^ije sUryo gAH |vi sAnunA pR^ithivI sasra urvI pR^ithu pratIkamadhyedhe agniH || 7.36.1
imAM vAM mitrAvaruNA suvR^iktimiShaM na kR^iNve asurA navIyaH |ino vAmanyaH padavIradabdho janaM cha mitro yatati bruvANaH || 7.36.2
A vAtasya dhrajato ranta ityA apIpayanta dhenavo na sUdAH |maho divaH sadane jAyamAno.achikradadvR^iShabhaH sasminnUdhan || 7.36.3
girA ya etA yunajaddharI ta indra priyA surathA shUra dhAyU |pra yo manyuM ririkShato minAtyA sukratumaryamaNaM vavR^ityAm || 7.36.4
yajante asya sakhyaM vayashcha namasvinaH sva R^itasya dhAman |vi pR^ikSho bAbadhe nR^ibhiH stavAna idaM namo rudrAya preShTham || 7.36.5
A yatsAkaM yashaso vAvashAnAH sarasvatI saptathI sindhumAtA |yAH suShvayanta sudughAH sudhArA abhi svena payasA pIpyAnAH || 7.36.6
uta tye no maruto mandasAnA dhiyaM tokaM cha vAjino.avantu |mA naH pari khyadakSharA charantyavIvR^idhanyujyaM te rayiM naH || 7.36.7
pra vo mahImaramatiM kR^iNudhvaM pra pUShaNaM vidathyaM na vIram |bhagaM dhiyo.avitAraM no asyAH sAtau vAjaM rAtiShAchaM puraMdhim || 7.36.8
achChAyaM vo marutaH shloka etvachChA viShNuM niShiktapAmavobhiH |uta prajAyai gR^iNate vayo dhuryUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.36.9

A vo vAhiShTho vahatu stavadhyai ratho vAjA R^ibhukShaNo amR^iktaH |abhi tripR^iShThaiH savaneShu somairmade sushiprA mahabhiH pR^iNadhvam || 7.37.1
yUyaM ha ratnaM maghavatsu dhattha svardR^isha R^ibhukShaNo amR^iktam |saM yaj~neShu svadhAvantaH pibadhvaM vi no rAdhAMsi matibhirdayadhvam || 7.37.2
uvochitha hi maghavandeShNaM maho arbhasya vasuno vibhAge |ubhA te pUrNA vasunA gabhastI na sUnR^itA ni yamate vasavyA || 7.37.3
tvamindra svayashA R^ibhukShA vAjo na sAdhurastameShyR^ikvA |vayaM nu te dAshvAMsaH syAma brahma kR^iNvanto harivo vasiShThAH || 7.37.4
sanitAsi pravato dAshuShe chidyAbhirviveSho haryashva dhIbhiH |vavanmA nu te yujyAbhirUtI kadA na indra rAya A dashasyeH || 7.37.5
vAsayasIva vedhasastvaM naH kadA na indra vachaso bubodhaH |astaM tAtyA dhiyA rayiM suvIraM pR^ikSho no arvA nyuhIta vAjI || 7.37.6
abhi yaM devI nirR^itishchidIshe nakShanta indraM sharadaH supR^ikShaH |upa tribandhurjaradaShTimetyasvaveshaM yaM kR^iNavanta martAH || 7.37.7
A no rAdhAMsi savitaH stavadhyA A rAyo yantu parvatasya rAtau |sadA no divyaH pAyuH siShaktu yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.37.8

udu Shya devaH savitA yayAma hiraNyayImamatiM yAmashishret |nUnaM bhago havyo mAnuShebhirvi yo ratnA purUvasurdadhAti || 7.38.1
udu tiShTha savitaH shrudhyasya hiraNyapANe prabhR^itAvR^itasya |vyurvIM pR^ithvImamatiM sR^ijAna A nR^ibhyo martabhojanaM suvAnaH || 7.38.2
api ShTutaH savitA devo astu yamA chidvishve vasavo gR^iNanti |sa naH stomAnnamasyashchano dhAdvishvebhiH pAtu pAyubhirni sUrIn || 7.38.3
abhi yaM devyaditirgR^iNAti savaM devasya saviturjuShANA |abhi samrAjo varuNo gR^iNantyabhi mitrAso aryamA sajoShAH || 7.38.4
abhi ye mitho vanuShaH sapante rAtiM divo rAtiShAchaH pR^ithivyAH |ahirbudhnya uta naH shR^iNotu varUtryekadhenubhirni pAtu || 7.38.5
anu tanno jAspatirmaMsIShTa ratnaM devasya savituriyAnaH |bhagamugro.avase johavIti bhagamanugro adha yAti ratnam || 7.38.6
shaM no bhavantu vAjino haveShu devatAtA mitadravaH svarkAH |jambhayanto.ahiM vR^ikaM rakShAMsi sanemyasmadyuyavannamIvAH || 7.38.7
vAjevAje.avata vAjino no dhaneShu viprA amR^itA R^itaj~nAH |asya madhvaH pibata mAdayadhvaM tR^iptA yAta pathibhirdevayAnaiH || 7.38.8

Urdhvo agniH sumatiM vasvo ashretpratIchI jUrNirdevatAtimeti |bhejAte adrI rathyeva panthAmR^itaM hotA na iShito yajAti || 7.39.1
pra vAvR^ije suprayA barhireShAmA vishpatIva bIriTa iyAte |vishAmaktoruShasaH pUrvahUtau vAyuH pUShA svastaye niyutvAn || 7.39.2
jmayA atra vasavo ranta devA urAvantarikShe marjayanta shubhrAH |arvAkpatha urujrayaH kR^iNudhvaM shrotA dUtasya jagmuSho no asya || 7.39.3
te hi yaj~neShu yaj~niyAsa UmAH sadhasthaM vishve abhi santi devAH |tA.N adhvara ushato yakShyagne shruShTI bhagaM nAsatyA puraMdhim || 7.39.4
Agne giro diva A pR^ithivyA mitraM vaha varuNamindramagnim |AryamaNamaditiM viShNumeShAM sarasvatI maruto mAdayantAm || 7.39.5
rare havyaM matibhiryaj~niyAnAM nakShatkAmaM martyAnAmasinvan |dhAtA rayimavidasyaM sadAsAM sakShImahi yujyebhirnu devaiH || 7.39.6
nU rodasI abhiShTute vasiShThairR^itAvAno varuNo mitro agniH |yachChantu chandrA upamaM no arkaM yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.39.7

o shruShTirvidathyA sametu prati stomaM dadhImahi turANAm |yadadya devaH savitA suvAti syAmAsya ratnino vibhAge || 7.40.1
mitrastanno varuNo rodasI cha dyubhaktamindro aryamA dadAtu |dideShTu devyaditI rekNo vAyushcha yanniyuvaite bhagashcha || 7.40.2
sedugro astu marutaH sa shuShmI yaM martyaM pR^iShadashvA avAtha |utemagniH sarasvatI junanti na tasya rAyaH paryetAsti || 7.40.3
ayaM hi netA varuNa R^itasya mitro rAjAno aryamApo dhuH |suhavA devyaditiranarvA te no aMho ati parShannariShTAn || 7.40.4
asya devasya mILhuSho vayA viShNoreShasya prabhR^ithe havirbhiH |vide hi rudro rudriyaM mahitvaM yAsiShTaM vartirashvinAvirAvat || 7.40.5
mAtra pUShannAghR^iNa irasyo varUtrI yadrAtiShAchashcha rAsan |mayobhuvo no arvanto ni pAntu vR^iShTiM parijmA vAto dadAtu || 7.40.6
nU rodasI abhiShTute vasiShThairR^itAvAno varuNo mitro agniH |yachChantu chandrA upamaM no arkaM yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.40.7

prAtaragniM prAtarindraM havAmahe prAtarmitrAvaruNA prAtarashvinA |prAtarbhagaM pUShaNaM brahmaNaspatiM prAtaH somamuta rudraM huvema || 7.41.1
prAtarjitaM bhagamugraM huvema vayaM putramaditeryo vidhartA |AdhrashchidyaM manyamAnasturashchidrAjA chidyaM bhagaM bhakShItyAha || 7.41.2
bhaga praNetarbhaga satyarAdho bhagemAM dhiyamudavA dadannaH |bhaga pra No janaya gobhirashvairbhaga pra nR^ibhirnR^ivantaH syAma || 7.41.3
utedAnIM bhagavantaH syAmota prapitva uta madhye ahnAm |utoditA maghavansUryasya vayaM devAnAM sumatau syAma || 7.41.4
bhaga eva bhagavA.N astu devAstena vayaM bhagavantaH syAma |taM tvA bhaga sarva ijjohavIti sa no bhaga pura/etA bhaveha || 7.41.5
samadhvarAyoShaso namanta dadhikrAveva shuchaye padAya |arvAchInaM vasuvidaM bhagaM no rathamivAshvA vAjina A vahantu || 7.41.6
ashvAvatIrgomatIrna uShAso vIravatIH sadamuchChantu bhadrAH |ghR^itaM duhAnA vishvataH prapItA yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.41.7

pra brahmANo a~Ngiraso nakShanta pra krandanurnabhanyasya vetu |pra dhenava udapruto navanta yujyAtAmadrI adhvarasya peshaH || 7.42.1
sugaste agne sanavitto adhvA yukShvA sute harito rohitashcha |ye vA sadmannaruShA vIravAho huve devAnAM janimAni sattaH || 7.42.2
samu vo yaj~naM mahayannamobhiH pra hotA mandro riricha upAke |yajasva su purvaNIka devAnA yaj~niyAmaramatiM vavR^ityAH || 7.42.3
yadA vIrasya revato duroNe syonashIratithirAchiketat |suprIto agniH sudhito dama A sa vishe dAti vAryamiyatyai || 7.42.4
imaM no agne adhvaraM juShasva marutsvindre yashasaM kR^idhI naH |A naktA barhiH sadatAmuShAsoshantA mitrAvaruNA yajeha || 7.42.5
evAgniM sahasyaM vasiShTho rAyaskAmo vishvapsnyasya staut |iShaM rayiM paprathadvAjamasme yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.42.6

pra vo yaj~neShu devayanto archandyAvA namobhiH pR^ithivI iShadhyai |yeShAM brahmANyasamAni viprA viShvagviyanti vanino na shAkhAH || 7.43.1
pra yaj~na etu hetvo na saptirudyachChadhvaM samanaso ghR^itAchIH |stR^iNIta barhiradhvarAya sAdhUrdhvA shochIMShi devayUnyasthuH || 7.43.2
A putrAso na mAtaraM vibhR^itrAH sAnau devAso barhiShaH sadantu |A vishvAchI vidathyAmanaktvagne mA no devatAtA mR^idhaskaH || 7.43.3
te sIShapanta joShamA yajatrA R^itasya dhArAH sudughA duhAnAH |jyeShThaM vo adya maha A vasUnAmA gantana samanaso yati ShTha || 7.43.4
evA no agne vikShvA dashasya tvayA vayaM sahasAvannAskrAH |rAyA yujA sadhamAdo ariShTA yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.43.5

dadhikrAM vaH prathamamashvinoShasamagniM samiddhaM bhagamUtaye huve |indraM viShNuM pUShaNaM brahmaNaspatimAdityAndyAvApR^ithivI apaH svaH || 7.44.1
dadhikrAmu namasA bodhayanta udIrANA yaj~namupaprayantaH |iLAM devIM barhiShi sAdayanto.ashvinA viprA suhavA huvema || 7.44.2
dadhikrAvANaM bubudhAno agnimupa bruva uShasaM sUryaM gAm |bradhnaM mA.NshchatorvaruNasya babhruM te vishvAsmadduritA yAvayantu || 7.44.3
dadhikrAvA prathamo vAjyarvAgre rathAnAM bhavati prajAnan |saMvidAna uShasA sUryeNAdityebhirvasubhira~NgirobhiH || 7.44.4
A no dadhikrAH pathyAmanaktvR^itasya panthAmanvetavA u |shR^iNotu no daivyaM shardho agniH shR^iNvantu vishve mahiShA amUrAH || 7.44.5

A devo yAtu savitA suratno.antarikShaprA vahamAno ashvaiH |haste dadhAno naryA purUNi niveshaya~ncha prasuva~ncha bhUma || 7.45.1
udasya bAhU shithirA bR^ihantA hiraNyayA divo antA.N anaShTAm |nUnaM so asya mahimA paniShTa sUrashchidasmA anu dAdapasyAm || 7.45.2
sa ghA no devaH savitA sahAvA sAviShadvasupatirvasUni |vishrayamANo amatimurUchIM martabhojanamadha rAsate naH || 7.45.3
imA giraH savitAraM sujihvaM pUrNagabhastimILate supANim |chitraM vayo bR^ihadasme dadhAtu yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.45.4

imA rudrAya sthiradhanvane giraH kShipreShave devAya svadhAvne |aShALhAya sahamAnAya vedhase tigmAyudhAya bharatA shR^iNotu naH || 7.46.1
sa hi kShayeNa kShamyasya janmanaH sAmrAjyena divyasya chetati |avannavantIrupa no durashcharAnamIvo rudra jAsu no bhava || 7.46.2
yA te didyudavasR^iShTA divaspari kShmayA charati pari sA vR^iNaktu naH |sahasraM te svapivAta bheShajA mA nastokeShu tanayeShu rIriShaH || 7.46.3
mA no vadhI rudra mA parA dA mA te bhUma prasitau hILitasya |A no bhaja barhiShi jIvashaMse yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.46.4

Apo yaM vaH prathamaM devayanta indrapAnamUrmimakR^iNvateLaH |taM vo vayaM shuchimaripramadya ghR^itapruShaM madhumantaM vanema || 7.47.1
tamUrmimApo madhumattamaM vo.apAM napAdavatvAshuhemA |yasminnindro vasubhirmAdayAte tamashyAma devayanto vo adya || 7.47.2
shatapavitrAH svadhayA madantIrdevIrdevAnAmapi yanti pAthaH |tA indrasya na minanti vratAni sindhubhyo havyaM ghR^itavajjuhota || 7.47.3
yAH sUryo rashmibhirAtatAna yAbhya indro aradadgAtumUrmim |te sindhavo varivo dhAtanA no yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.47.4

R^ibhukShaNo vAjA mAdayadhvamasme naro maghavAnaH sutasya |A vo.arvAchaH kratavo na yAtAM vibhvo rathaM naryaM vartayantu || 7.48.1
R^ibhurR^ibhubhirabhi vaH syAma vibhvo vibhubhiH shavasA shavAMsi |vAjo asmA.N avatu vAjasAtAvindreNa yujA taruShema vR^itram || 7.48.2
te chiddhi pUrvIrabhi santi shAsA vishvA.N arya uparatAti vanvan |indro vibhvA.N R^ibhukShA vAjo aryaH shatrormithatyA kR^iNavanvi nR^imNam || 7.48.3
nU devAso varivaH kartanA no bhUta no vishve.avase sajoShAH |samasme iShaM vasavo dadIranyUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.48.4

samudrajyeShThAH salilasya madhyAtpunAnA yantyanivishamAnAH |indro yA vajrI vR^iShabho rarAda tA Apo devIriha mAmavantu || 7.49.1
yA Apo divyA uta vA sravanti khanitrimA uta vA yAH svayaMjAH |samudrArthA yAH shuchayaH pAvakAstA Apo devIriha mAmavantu || 7.49.2
yAsAM rAjA varuNo yAti madhye satyAnR^ite avapashya~njanAnAm |madhushchutaH shuchayo yAH pAvakAstA Apo devIriha mAmavantu || 7.49.3
yAsu rAjA varuNo yAsu somo vishve devA yAsUrjaM madanti |vaishvAnaro yAsvagniH praviShTastA Apo devIriha mAmavantu || 7.49.4

A mAM mitrAvaruNeha rakShataM kulAyayadvishvayanmA na A gan |ajakAvaM durdR^ishIkaM tiro dadhe mA mAM padyena rapasA vidattsaruH || 7.50.1
yadvijAmanparuShi vandanaM bhuvadaShThIvantau pari kulphau cha dehat |agniShTachChochannapa bAdhatAmito mA mAM padyena rapasA vidattsaruH || 7.50.2
yachChalmalau bhavati yannadIShu yadoShadhIbhyaH pari jAyate viSham |vishve devA niritastatsuvantu mA mAM padyena rapasA vidattsaruH || 7.50.3
yAH pravato nivata udvata udanvatIranudakAshcha yAH |tA asmabhyaM payasA pinvamAnAH shivA devIrashipadA bhavantu sarvA nadyo ashimidA bhavantu || 7.50.4

AdityAnAmavasA nUtanena sakShImahi sharmaNA shaMtamena |anAgAstve adititve turAsa imaM yaj~naM dadhatu shroShamANAH || 7.51.1
AdityAso aditirmAdayantAM mitro aryamA varuNo rajiShThAH |asmAkaM santu bhuvanasya gopAH pibantu somamavase no adya || 7.51.2
AdityA vishve marutashcha vishve devAshcha vishva R^ibhavashcha vishve |indro agnirashvinA tuShTuvAnA yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.51.3

AdityAso aditayaH syAma pUrdevatrA vasavo martyatrA |sanema mitrAvaruNA sananto bhavema dyAvApR^ithivI bhavantaH || 7.52.1
mitrastanno varuNo mAmahanta sharma tokAya tanayAya gopAH |mA vo bhujemAnyajAtameno mA tatkarma vasavo yachchayadhve || 7.52.2
turaNyavo.a~Ngiraso nakShanta ratnaM devasya savituriyAnAH |pitA cha tanno mahAnyajatro vishve devAH samanaso juShanta || 7.52.3

pra dyAvA yaj~naiH pR^ithivI namobhiH sabAdha ILe bR^ihatI yajatre |te chiddhi pUrve kavayo gR^iNantaH puro mahI dadhire devaputre || 7.53.1
pra pUrvaje pitarA navyasIbhirgIrbhiH kR^iNudhvaM sadane R^itasya |A no dyAvApR^ithivI daivyena janena yAtaM mahi vAM varUtham || 7.53.2
uto hi vAM ratnadheyAni santi purUNi dyAvApR^ithivI sudAse |asme dhattaM yadasadaskR^idhoyu yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.53.3

vAstoShpate prati jAnIhyasmAnsvAvesho anamIvo bhavA naH |yattvemahe prati tanno juShasva shaM no bhava dvipade shaM chatuShpade || 7.54.1
vAstoShpate prataraNo na edhi gayasphAno gobhirashvebhirindo |ajarAsaste sakhye syAma piteva putrAnprati no juShasva || 7.54.2
vAstoShpate shagmayA saMsadA te sakShImahi raNvayA gAtumatyA |pAhi kShema uta yoge varaM no yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.54.3

amIvahA vAstoShpate vishvA rUpANyAvishan |sakhA susheva edhi naH || 7.55.1
yadarjuna sArameya dataH pisha~Nga yachChase |vIva bhrAjanta R^iShTaya upa srakveShu bapsato ni Shu svapa || 7.55.2
stenaM rAya sArameya taskaraM vA punaHsara |stotR^Inindrasya rAyasi kimasmAnduchChunAyase ni Shu svapa || 7.55.3
tvaM sUkarasya dardR^ihi tava dardartu sUkaraH |stotR^Inindrasya rAyasi kimasmAnduchChunAyase ni Shu svapa || 7.55.4
sastu mAtA sastu pitA sastu shvA sastu vishpatiH |sasantu sarve j~nAtayaH sastvayamabhito janaH || 7.55.5
ya Aste yashcha charati yashcha pashyati no janaH |teShAM saM hanmo akShANi yathedaM harmyaM tathA || 7.55.6
sahasrashR^i~Ngo vR^iShabho yaH samudrAdudAcharat |tenA sahasyenA vayaM ni janAnsvApayAmasi || 7.55.7
proShTheshayA vahyeshayA nArIryAstalpashIvarIH |striyo yAH puNyagandhAstAH sarvAH svApayAmasi || 7.55.8

ka IM vyaktA naraH sanILA rudrasya maryA adha svashvAH || 7.56.1
nakirhyeShAM janUMShi veda te a~Nga vidre mitho janitram || 7.56.2
abhi svapUbhirmitho vapanta vAtasvanasaH shyenA aspR^idhran || 7.56.3
etAni dhIro niNyA chiketa pR^ishniryadUdho mahI jabhAra || 7.56.4
sA viT suvIrA marudbhirastu sanAtsahantI puShyantI nR^imNam || 7.56.5
yAmaM yeShThAH shubhA shobhiShThAH shriyA sammishlA ojobhirugrAH || 7.56.6
ugraM va ojaH sthirA shavAMsyadhA marudbhirgaNastuviShmAn || 7.56.7
shubhro vaH shuShmaH krudhmI manAMsi dhunirmuniriva shardhasya dhR^iShNoH || 7.56.8
sanemyasmadyuyota didyuM mA vo durmatiriha praNa~NnaH || 7.56.9
priyA vo nAma huve turANAmA yattR^ipanmaruto vAvashAnAH || 7.56.10
svAyudhAsa iShmiNaH suniShkA uta svayaM tanvaH shumbhamAnAH || 7.56.11
shuchI vo havyA marutaH shuchInAM shuchiM hinomyadhvaraM shuchibhyaH |R^itena satyamR^itasApa Aya~nChuchijanmAnaH shuchayaH pAvakAH || 7.56.12
aMseShvA marutaH khAdayo vo vakShassu rukmA upashishriyANAH |vi vidyuto na vR^iShTibhI ruchAnA anu svadhAmAyudhairyachChamAnAH || 7.56.13
pra budhnyA va Irate mahAMsi pra nAmAni prayajyavastiradhvam |sahasriyaM damyaM bhAgametaM gR^ihamedhIyaM maruto juShadhvam || 7.56.14
yadi stutasya maruto adhIthetthA viprasya vAjino havIman |makShU rAyaH suvIryasya dAta nU chidyamanya AdabhadarAvA || 7.56.15
atyAso na ye marutaH sva~ncho yakShadR^isho na shubhayanta maryAH |te harmyeShThAH shishavo na shubhrA vatsAso na prakrILinaH payodhAH || 7.56.16
dashasyanto no maruto mR^iLantu varivasyanto rodasI sumeke |Are gohA nR^ihA vadho vo astu sumnebhirasme vasavo namadhvam || 7.56.17
A vo hotA johavIti sattaH satrAchIM rAtiM maruto gR^iNAnaH |ya Ivato vR^iShaNo asti gopAH so advayAvI havate va ukthaiH || 7.56.18
ime turaM maruto rAmayantIme sahaH sahasa A namanti |ime shaMsaM vanuShyato ni pAnti guru dveSho araruShe dadhanti || 7.56.19
ime radhraM chinmaruto junanti bhR^imiM chidyathA vasavo juShanta |apa bAdhadhvaM vR^iShaNastamAMsi dhatta vishvaM tanayaM tokamasme || 7.56.20
mA vo dAtrAnmaruto nirarAma mA pashchAddaghma rathyo vibhAge |A naH spArhe bhajatanA vasavye yadIM sujAtaM vR^iShaNo vo asti || 7.56.21
saM yaddhananta manyubhirjanAsaH shUrA yahvIShvoShadhIShu vikShu |adha smA no maruto rudriyAsastrAtAro bhUta pR^itanAsvaryaH || 7.56.22
bhUri chakra marutaH pitryANyukthAni yA vaH shasyante purA chit |marudbhirugraH pR^itanAsu sALhA marudbhiritsanitA vAjamarvA || 7.56.23
asme vIro marutaH shuShmyastu janAnAM yo asuro vidhartA |apo yena sukShitaye taremAdha svamoko abhi vaH syAma || 7.56.24
tanna indro varuNo mitro agnirApa oShadhIrvanino juShanta |sharmansyAma marutAmupasthe yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.56.25

madhvo vo nAma mArutaM yajatrAH pra yaj~neShu shavasA madanti |ye rejayanti rodasI chidurvI pinvantyutsaM yadayAsurugrAH || 7.57.1
nichetAro hi maruto gR^iNantaM praNetAro yajamAnasya manma |asmAkamadya vidatheShu barhirA vItaye sadata pipriyANAH || 7.57.2
naitAvadanye maruto yatheme bhrAjante rukmairAyudhaistanUbhiH |A rodasI vishvapishaH pishAnAH samAnama~njya~njate shubhe kam || 7.57.3
R^idhaksA vo maruto didyudastu yadva AgaH puruShatA karAma |mA vastasyAmapi bhUmA yajatrA asme vo astu sumatishchaniShThA || 7.57.4
kR^ite chidatra maruto raNantAnavadyAsaH shuchayaH pAvakAH |pra No.avata sumatibhiryajatrAH pra vAjebhistirata puShyase naH || 7.57.5
uta stutAso maruto vyantu vishvebhirnAmabhirnaro havIMShi |dadAta no amR^itasya prajAyai jigR^ita rAyaH sUnR^itA maghAni || 7.57.6
A stutAso maruto vishva UtI achChA sUrInsarvatAtA jigAta |ye nastmanA shatino vardhayanti yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.57.7

pra sAkamukShe archatA gaNAya yo daivyasya dhAmnastuviShmAn |uta kShodanti rodasI mahitvA nakShante nAkaM nirR^iteravaMshAt || 7.58.1
janUshchidvo marutastveShyeNa bhImAsastuvimanyavo.ayAsaH |pra ye mahobhirojasota santi vishvo vo yAmanbhayate svardR^ik || 7.58.2
bR^ihadvayo maghavadbhyo dadhAta jujoShanninmarutaH suShTutiM naH |gato nAdhvA vi tirAti jantuM pra NaH spArhAbhirUtibhistireta || 7.58.3
yuShmoto vipro marutaH shatasvI yuShmoto arvA sahuriH sahasrI |yuShmotaH samrALuta hanti vR^itraM pra tadvo astu dhUtayo deShNam || 7.58.4
tA.N A rudrasya mILhuSho vivAse kuvinnaMsante marutaH punarnaH |yatsasvartA jihILire yadAvirava tadena Imahe turANAm || 7.58.5
pra sA vAchi suShTutirmaghonAmidaM sUktaM maruto juShanta |ArAchchiddveSho vR^iShaNo yuyota yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.58.6

yaM trAyadhva idamidaM devAso yaM cha nayatha |tasmA agne varuNa mitrAryamanmarutaH sharma yachChata || 7.59.1
yuShmAkaM devA avasAhani priya IjAnastarati dviShaH |pra sa kShayaM tirate vi mahIriSho yo vo varAya dAshati || 7.59.2
nahi vashcharamaM chana vasiShThaH parimaMsate |asmAkamadya marutaH sute sachA vishve pibata kAminaH || 7.59.3
nahi va UtiH pR^itanAsu mardhati yasmA arAdhvaM naraH |abhi va AvartsumatirnavIyasI tUyaM yAta pipIShavaH || 7.59.4
o Shu ghR^iShvirAdhaso yAtanAndhAMsi pItaye |imA vo havyA maruto rare hi kaM mo Shvanyatra gantana || 7.59.5
A cha no barhiH sadatAvitA cha naH spArhANi dAtave vasu |asredhanto marutaH somye madhau svAheha mAdayAdhvai || 7.59.6
sasvashchiddhi tanvaH shumbhamAnA A haMsAso nIlapR^iShThA apaptan |vishvaM shardho abhito mA ni Sheda naro na raNvAH savane madantaH || 7.59.7
yo no maruto abhi durhR^iNAyustirashchittAni vasavo jighAMsati |druhaH pAshAnprati sa muchIShTa tapiShThena hanmanA hantanA tam || 7.59.8
sAMtapanA idaM havirmarutastajjujuShTana |yuShmAkotI rishAdasaH || 7.59.9
gR^ihamedhAsa A gata maruto mApa bhUtana |yuShmAkotI sudAnavaH || 7.59.10
iheha vaH svatavasaH kavayaH sUryatvachaH |yaj~naM maruta A vR^iNe || 7.59.11
tryambakaM yajAmahe sugandhiM puShTivardhanam |urvArukamiva bandhanAnmR^ityormukShIya mAmR^itAt || 7.59.12

yadadya sUrya bravo.anAgA udyanmitrAya varuNAya satyam |vayaM devatrAdite syAma tava priyAso aryamangR^iNantaH || 7.60.1
eSha sya mitrAvaruNA nR^ichakShA ubhe udeti sUryo abhi jman |vishvasya sthAturjagatashcha gopA R^iju marteShu vR^ijinA cha pashyan || 7.60.2
ayukta sapta haritaH sadhasthAdyA IM vahanti sUryaM ghR^itAchIH |dhAmAni mitrAvaruNA yuvAkuH saM yo yUtheva janimAni chaShTe || 7.60.3
udvAM pR^ikShAso madhumanto asthurA sUryo aruhachChukramarNaH |yasmA AdityA adhvano radanti mitro aryamA varuNaH sajoShAH || 7.60.4
ime chetAro anR^itasya bhUrermitro aryamA varuNo hi santi |ima R^itasya vAvR^idhurduroNe shagmAsaH putrA aditeradabdhAH || 7.60.5
ime mitro varuNo dULabhAso.achetasaM chichchitayanti dakShaiH |api kratuM suchetasaM vatantastirashchidaMhaH supathA nayanti || 7.60.6
ime divo animiShA pR^ithivyAshchikitvAMso achetasaM nayanti |pravrAje chinnadyo gAdhamasti pAraM no asya viShpitasya parShan || 7.60.7
yadgopAvadaditiH sharma bhadraM mitro yachChanti varuNaH sudAse |tasminnA tokaM tanayaM dadhAnA mA karma devaheLanaM turAsaH || 7.60.8
ava vediM hotrAbhiryajeta ripaH kAshchidvaruNadhrutaH saH |pari dveShobhiraryamA vR^iNaktUruM sudAse vR^iShaNA u lokam || 7.60.9
sasvashchiddhi samR^itistveShyeShAmapIchyena sahasA sahante |yuShmadbhiyA vR^iShaNo rejamAnA dakShasya chinmahinA mR^iLatA naH || 7.60.10
yo brahmaNe sumatimAyajAte vAjasya sAtau paramasya rAyaH |sIkShanta manyuM maghavAno arya uru kShayAya chakrire sudhAtu || 7.60.11
iyaM deva purohitiryuvabhyAM yaj~neShu mitrAvaruNAvakAri |vishvAni durgA pipR^itaM tiro no yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.60.12

udvAM chakShurvaruNa supratIkaM devayoreti sUryastatanvAn |abhi yo vishvA bhuvanAni chaShTe sa manyuM martyeShvA chiketa || 7.61.1
pra vAM sa mitrAvaruNAvR^itAvA vipro manmAni dIrghashrudiyarti |yasya brahmANi sukratU avAtha A yatkratvA na sharadaH pR^iNaithe || 7.61.2
prorormitrAvaruNA pR^ithivyAH pra diva R^iShvAdbR^ihataH sudAnU |spasho dadhAthe oShadhIShu vikShvR^idhagyato animiShaM rakShamANA || 7.61.3
shaMsA mitrasya varuNasya dhAma shuShmo rodasI badbadhe mahitvA |ayanmAsA ayajvanAmavIrAH pra yaj~namanmA vR^ijanaM tirAte || 7.61.4
amUrA vishvA vR^iShaNAvimA vAM na yAsu chitraM dadR^ishe na yakSham |druhaH sachante anR^itA janAnAM na vAM niNyAnyachite abhUvan || 7.61.5
samu vAM yaj~naM mahayaM namobhirhuve vAM mitrAvaruNA sabAdhaH |pra vAM manmAnyR^ichase navAni kR^itAni brahma jujuShannimAni || 7.61.6
iyaM deva purohitiryuvabhyAM yaj~neShu mitrAvaruNAvakAri |vishvAni durgA pipR^itaM tiro no yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.61.7

utsUryo bR^ihadarchIMShyashretpuru vishvA janima mAnuShANAm |samo divA dadR^ishe rochamAnaH kratvA kR^itaH sukR^itaH kartR^ibhirbhUt || 7.62.1
sa sUrya prati puro na udgA ebhiH stomebhiretashebhirevaiH |pra no mitrAya varuNAya vocho.anAgaso aryamNe agnaye cha || 7.62.2
vi naH sahasraM shurudho radantvR^itAvAno varuNo mitro agniH |yachChantu chandrA upamaM no arkamA naH kAmaM pUpurantu stavAnAH || 7.62.3
dyAvAbhUmI adite trAsIthAM no ye vAM jaj~nuH sujanimAna R^iShve |mA heLe bhUma varuNasya vAyormA mitrasya priyatamasya nR^iNAm || 7.62.4
pra bAhavA sisR^itaM jIvase na A no gavyUtimukShataM ghR^itena |A no jane shravayataM yuvAnA shrutaM me mitrAvaruNA havemA || 7.62.5
nU mitro varuNo aryamA nastmane tokAya varivo dadhantu |sugA no vishvA supathAni santu yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.62.6

udveti subhago vishvachakShAH sAdhAraNaH sUryo mAnuShANAm |chakShurmitrasya varuNasya devashcharmeva yaH samavivyaktamAMsi || 7.63.1
udveti prasavItA janAnAM mahAnketurarNavaH sUryasya |samAnaM chakraM paryAvivR^itsanyadetasho vahati dhUrShu yuktaH || 7.63.2
vibhrAjamAna uShasAmupasthAdrebhairudetyanumadyamAnaH |eSha me devaH savitA chachChanda yaH samAnaM na praminAti dhAma || 7.63.3
divo rukma uruchakShA udeti dUre/arthastaraNirbhrAjamAnaH |nUnaM janAH sUryeNa prasUtA ayannarthAni kR^iNavannapAMsi || 7.63.4
yatrA chakruramR^itA gAtumasmai shyeno na dIyannanveti pAthaH |prati vAM sUra udite vidhema namobhirmitrAvaruNota havyaiH || 7.63.5
nU mitro varuNo aryamA nastmane tokAya varivo dadhantu |sugA no vishvA supathAni santu yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.63.6

divi kShayantA rajasaH pR^ithivyAM pra vAM ghR^itasya nirNijo dadIran |havyaM no mitro aryamA sujAto rAjA sukShatro varuNo juShanta || 7.64.1
A rAjAnA maha R^itasya gopA sindhupatI kShatriyA yAtamarvAk |iLAM no mitrAvaruNota vR^iShTimava diva invataM jIradAnU || 7.64.2
mitrastanno varuNo devo aryaH pra sAdhiShThebhiH pathibhirnayantu |bravadyathA na AdariH sudAsa iShA madema saha devagopAH || 7.64.3
yo vAM gartaM manasA takShadetamUrdhvAM dhItiM kR^iNavaddhArayachcha |ukShethAM mitrAvaruNA ghR^itena tA rAjAnA sukShitIstarpayethAm || 7.64.4
eSha stomo varuNa mitra tubhyaM somaH shukro na vAyave.ayAmi |aviShTaM dhiyo jigR^itaM puraMdhIryUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.64.5

prati vAM sUra udite sUktairmitraM huve varuNaM pUtadakSham |yayorasuryamakShitaM jyeShThaM vishvasya yAmannAchitA jigatnu || 7.65.1
tA hi devAnAmasurA tAvaryA tA naH kShitIH karatamUrjayantIH |ashyAma mitrAvaruNA vayaM vAM dyAvA cha yatra pIpayannahA cha || 7.65.2
tA bhUripAshAvanR^itasya setU duratyetU ripave martyAya |R^itasya mitrAvaruNA pathA vAmapo na nAvA duritA tarema || 7.65.3
A no mitrAvaruNA havyajuShTiM ghR^itairgavyUtimukShatamiLAbhiH |prati vAmatra varamA janAya pR^iNItamudno divyasya chAroH || 7.65.4
eSha stomo varuNa mitra tubhyaM somaH shukro na vAyave.ayAmi |aviShTaM dhiyo jigR^itaM puraMdhIryUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.65.5

pra mitrayorvaruNayoH stomo na etu shUShyaH |namasvAntuvijAtayoH || 7.66.1
yA dhArayanta devAH sudakShA dakShapitarA |asuryAya pramahasA || 7.66.2
tA naH stipA tanUpA varuNa jaritR^INAm |mitra sAdhayataM dhiyaH || 7.66.3
yadadya sUra udite.anAgA mitro aryamA |suvAti savitA bhagaH || 7.66.4
suprAvIrastu sa kShayaH pra nu yAmansudAnavaH |ye no aMho.atipiprati || 7.66.5
uta svarAjo aditiradabdhasya vratasya ye |maho rAjAna Ishate || 7.66.6
prati vAM sUra udite mitraM gR^iNIShe varuNam |aryamaNaM rishAdasam || 7.66.7
rAyA hiraNyayA matiriyamavR^ikAya shavase |iyaM viprA medhasAtaye || 7.66.8
te syAma deva varuNa te mitra sUribhiH saha |iShaM svashcha dhImahi || 7.66.9
bahavaH sUrachakShaso.agnijihvA R^itAvR^idhaH |trINi ye yemurvidathAni dhItibhirvishvAni paribhUtibhiH || 7.66.10
vi ye dadhuH sharadaM mAsamAdaharyaj~namaktuM chAdR^icham |anApyaM varuNo mitro aryamA kShatraM rAjAna Ashata || 7.66.11
tadvo adya manAmahe sUktaiH sUra udite |yadohate varuNo mitro aryamA yUyamR^itasya rathyaH || 7.66.12
R^itAvAna R^itajAtA R^itAvR^idho ghorAso anR^itadviShaH |teShAM vaH sumne suchChardiShTame naraH syAma ye cha sUrayaH || 7.66.13
udu tyaddarshataM vapurdiva eti pratihvare |yadImAshurvahati deva etasho vishvasmai chakShase aram || 7.66.14
shIrShNaHshIrShNo jagatastasthuShaspatiM samayA vishvamA rajaH |sapta svasAraH suvitAya sUryaM vahanti harito rathe || 7.66.15
tachchakShurdevahitaM shukramuchcharat |pashyema sharadaH shataM jIvema sharadaH shatam || 7.66.16
kAvyebhiradAbhyA yAtaM varuNa dyumat |mitrashcha somapItaye || 7.66.17
divo dhAmabhirvaruNa mitrashchA yAtamadruhA |pibataM somamAtujI || 7.66.18
A yAtaM mitrAvaruNA juShANAvAhutiM narA |pAtaM somamR^itAvR^idhA || 7.66.19

prati vAM rathaM nR^ipatI jaradhyai haviShmatA manasA yaj~niyena |yo vAM dUto na dhiShNyAvajIgarachChA sUnurna pitarA vivakmi || 7.67.1
ashochyagniH samidhAno asme upo adR^ishrantamasashchidantAH |acheti keturuShasaH purastAchChriye divo duhiturjAyamAnaH || 7.67.2
abhi vAM nUnamashvinA suhotA stomaiH siShakti nAsatyA vivakvAn |pUrvIbhiryAtaM pathyAbhirarvAksvarvidA vasumatA rathena || 7.67.3
avorvAM nUnamashvinA yuvAkurhuve yadvAM sute mAdhvI vasUyuH |A vAM vahantu sthavirAso ashvAH pibAtho asme suShutA madhUni || 7.67.4
prAchImu devAshvinA dhiyaM me.amR^idhrAM sAtaye kR^itaM vasUyum |vishvA aviShTaM vAja A puraMdhIstA naH shaktaM shachIpatI shachIbhiH || 7.67.5
aviShTaM dhIShvashvinA na Asu prajAvadreto ahrayaM no astu |A vAM toke tanaye tUtujAnAH suratnAso devavItiM gamema || 7.67.6
eSha sya vAM pUrvagatveva sakhye nidhirhito mAdhvI rAto asme |aheLatA manasA yAtamarvAgashnantA havyaM mAnuShIShu vikShu || 7.67.7
ekasminyoge bhuraNA samAne pari vAM sapta sravato ratho gAt |na vAyanti subhvo devayuktA ye vAM dhUrShu taraNayo vahanti || 7.67.8
asashchatA maghavadbhyo hi bhUtaM ye rAyA maghadeyaM junanti |pra ye bandhuM sUnR^itAbhistirante gavyA pR^i~nchanto ashvyA maghAni || 7.67.9
nU me havamA shR^iNutaM yuvAnA yAsiShTaM vartirashvinAvirAvat |dhattaM ratnAni jarataM cha sUrInyUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.67.10

A shubhrA yAtamashvinA svashvA giro dasrA jujuShANA yuvAkoH |havyAni cha pratibhR^itA vItaM naH || 7.68.1
pra vAmandhAMsi madyAnyasthuraraM gantaM haviSho vItaye me |tiro aryo havanAni shrutaM naH || 7.68.2
pra vAM ratho manojavA iyarti tiro rajAMsyashvinA shatotiH |asmabhyaM sUryAvasU iyAnaH || 7.68.3
ayaM ha yadvAM devayA u adrirUrdhvo vivakti somasudyuvabhyAm |A valgU vipro vavR^itIta havyaiH || 7.68.4
chitraM ha yadvAM bhojanaM nvasti nyatraye mahiShvantaM yuyotam |yo vAmomAnaM dadhate priyaH san || 7.68.5
uta tyadvAM jurate ashvinA bhUchchyavAnAya pratItyaM havirde |adhi yadvarpa ita/Uti dhatthaH || 7.68.6
uta tyaM bhujyumashvinA sakhAyo madhye jahurdurevAsaH samudre |nirIM parShadarAvA yo yuvAkuH || 7.68.7
vR^ikAya chijjasamAnAya shaktamuta shrutaM shayave hUyamAnA |yAvaghnyAmapinvatamapo na staryaM chichChaktyashvinA shachIbhiH || 7.68.8
eSha sya kArurjarate sUktairagre budhAna uShasAM sumanmA |iShA taM vardhadaghnyA payobhiryUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.68.9

A vAM ratho rodasI badbadhAno hiraNyayo vR^iShabhiryAtvashvaiH |ghR^itavartaniH pavibhI ruchAna iShAM voLhA nR^ipatirvAjinIvAn || 7.69.1
sa paprathAno abhi pa~ncha bhUmA trivandhuro manasA yAtu yuktaH |visho yena gachChatho devayantIH kutrA chidyAmamashvinA dadhAnA || 7.69.2
svashvA yashasA yAtamarvAgdasrA nidhiM madhumantaM pibAthaH |vi vAM ratho vadhvA yAdamAno.antAndivo bAdhate vartanibhyAm || 7.69.3
yuvoH shriyaM pari yoShAvR^iNIta sUro duhitA paritakmyAyAm |yaddevayantamavathaH shachIbhiH pari ghraMsamomanA vAM vayo gAt || 7.69.4
yo ha sya vAM rathirA vasta usrA ratho yujAnaH pariyAti vartiH |tena naH shaM yoruShaso vyuShTau nyashvinA vahataM yaj~ne asmin || 7.69.5
narA gaureva vidyutaM tR^iShANAsmAkamadya savanopa yAtam |purutrA hi vAM matibhirhavante mA vAmanye ni yamandevayantaH || 7.69.6
yuvaM bhujyumavaviddhaM samudra udUhathurarNaso asridhAnaiH |patatribhirashramairavyathibhirdaMsanAbhirashvinA pArayantA || 7.69.7
nU me havamA shR^iNutaM yuvAnA yAsiShTaM vartirashvinAvirAvat |dhattaM ratnAni jarataM cha sUrInyUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.69.8

A vishvavArAshvinA gataM naH pra tatsthAnamavAchi vAM pR^ithivyAm |ashvo na vAjI shunapR^iShTho asthAdA yatsedathurdhruvase na yonim || 7.70.1
siShakti sA vAM sumatishchaniShThAtApi gharmo manuSho duroNe |yo vAM samudrAnsaritaH pipartyetagvA chinna suyujA yujAnaH || 7.70.2
yAni sthAnAnyashvinA dadhAthe divo yahvIShvoShadhIShu vikShu |ni parvatasya mUrdhani sadanteShaM janAya dAshuShe vahantA || 7.70.3
chaniShTaM devA oShadhIShvapsu yadyogyA ashnavaithe R^iShINAm |purUNi ratnA dadhatau nyasme anu pUrvANi chakhyathuryugAni || 7.70.4
shushruvAMsA chidashvinA purUNyabhi brahmANi chakShAthe R^iShINAm |prati pra yAtaM varamA janAyAsme vAmastu sumatishchaniShThA || 7.70.5
yo vAM yaj~no nAsatyA haviShmAnkR^itabrahmA samaryo bhavAti |upa pra yAtaM varamA vasiShThamimA brahmANyR^ichyante yuvabhyAm || 7.70.6
iyaM manIShA iyamashvinA gIrimAM suvR^iktiM vR^iShaNA juShethAm |imA brahmANi yuvayUnyagmanyUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.70.7

apa svasuruShaso nagjihIte riNakti kR^iShNIraruShAya panthAm |ashvAmaghA gomaghA vAM huvema divA naktaM sharumasmadyuyotam || 7.71.1
upAyAtaM dAshuShe martyAya rathena vAmamashvinA vahantA |yuyutamasmadanirAmamIvAM divA naktaM mAdhvI trAsIthAM naH || 7.71.2
A vAM rathamavamasyAM vyuShTau sumnAyavo vR^iShaNo vartayantu |syUmagabhastimR^itayugbhirashvairAshvinA vasumantaM vahethAm || 7.71.3
yo vAM ratho nR^ipatI asti voLhA trivandhuro vasumA.N usrayAmA |A na enA nAsatyopa yAtamabhi yadvAM vishvapsnyo jigAti || 7.71.4
yuvaM chyavAnaM jaraso.amumuktaM ni pedava UhathurAshumashvam |niraMhasastamasaH spartamatriM ni jAhuShaM shithire dhAtamantaH || 7.71.5
iyaM manIShA iyamashvinA gIrimAM suvR^iktiM vR^iShaNA juShethAm |imA brahmANi yuvayUnyagmanyUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.71.6

A gomatA nAsatyA rathenAshvAvatA purushchandreNa yAtam |abhi vAM vishvA niyutaH sachante spArhayA shriyA tanvA shubhAnA || 7.72.1
A no devebhirupa yAtamarvAksajoShasA nAsatyA rathena |yuvorhi naH sakhyA pitryANi samAno bandhuruta tasya vittam || 7.72.2
udu stomAso ashvinorabudhra~njAmi brahmANyuShasashcha devIH |AvivAsanrodasI dhiShNyeme achChA vipro nAsatyA vivakti || 7.72.3
vi cheduchChantyashvinA uShAsaH pra vAM brahmANi kAravo bharante |UrdhvaM bhAnuM savitA devo ashredbR^ihadagnayaH samidhA jarante || 7.72.4
A pashchAtAnnAsatyA purastAdAshvinA yAtamadharAdudaktAt |A vishvataH pA~nchajanyena rAyA yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.72.5

atAriShma tamasaspAramasya prati stomaM devayanto dadhAnAH |purudaMsA purutamA purAjAmartyA havate ashvinA gIH || 7.73.1
nyu priyo manuShaH sAdi hotA nAsatyA yo yajate vandate cha |ashnItaM madhvo ashvinA upAka A vAM voche vidatheShu prayasvAn || 7.73.2
ahema yaj~naM pathAmurANA imAM suvR^iktiM vR^iShaNA juShethAm |shruShTIveva preShito vAmabodhi prati stomairjaramANo vasiShThaH || 7.73.3
upa tyA vahnI gamato vishaM no rakShohaNA sambhR^itA vILupANI |samandhAMsyagmata matsarANi mA no mardhiShTamA gataM shivena || 7.73.4
A pashchAtAnnAsatyA purastAdAshvinA yAtamadharAdudaktAt |A vishvataH pA~nchajanyena rAyA yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.73.5

imA u vAM diviShTaya usrA havante ashvinA |ayaM vAmahve.avase shachIvasU vishaMvishaM hi gachChathaH || 7.74.1
yuvaM chitraM dadathurbhojanaM narA chodethAM sUnR^itAvate |arvAgrathaM samanasA ni yachChataM pibataM somyaM madhu || 7.74.2
A yAtamupa bhUShataM madhvaH pibatamashvinA |dugdhaM payo vR^iShaNA jenyAvasU mA no mardhiShTamA gatam || 7.74.3
ashvAso ye vAmupa dAshuSho gR^ihaM yuvAM dIyanti bibhrataH |makShUyubhirnarA hayebhirashvinA devA yAtamasmayU || 7.74.4
adhA ha yanto ashvinA pR^ikShaH sachanta sUrayaH |tA yaMsato maghavadbhyo dhruvaM yashashChardirasmabhyaM nAsatyA || 7.74.5
pra ye yayuravR^ikAso rathA iva nR^ipAtAro janAnAm |uta svena shavasA shUshuvurnara uta kShiyanti sukShitim || 7.74.6

vyuShA Avo divijA R^itenAviShkR^iNvAnA mahimAnamAgAt |apa druhastama AvarajuShTama~NgirastamA pathyA ajIgaH || 7.75.1
mahe no adya suvitAya bodhyuSho mahe saubhagAya pra yandhi |chitraM rayiM yashasaM dhehyasme devi marteShu mAnuShi shravasyum || 7.75.2
ete tye bhAnavo darshatAyAshchitrA uShaso amR^itAsa AguH |janayanto daivyAni vratAnyApR^iNanto antarikShA vyasthuH || 7.75.3
eShA syA yujAnA parAkAtpa~ncha kShitIH pari sadyo jigAti |abhipashyantI vayunA janAnAM divo duhitA bhuvanasya patnI || 7.75.4
vAjinIvatI sUryasya yoShA chitrAmaghA rAya Ishe vasUnAm |R^iShiShTutA jarayantI maghonyuShA uchChati vahnibhirgR^iNAnA || 7.75.5
prati dyutAnAmaruShAso ashvAshchitrA adR^ishrannuShasaM vahantaH |yAti shubhrA vishvapishA rathena dadhAti ratnaM vidhate janAya || 7.75.6
satyA satyebhirmahatI mahadbhirdevI devebhiryajatA yajatraiH |rujaddR^iLhAni dadadusriyANAM prati gAva uShasaM vAvashanta || 7.75.7
nU no gomadvIravaddhehi ratnamuSho ashvAvatpurubhojo asme |mA no barhiH puruShatA nide karyUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.75.8

udu jyotiramR^itaM vishvajanyaM vishvAnaraH savitA devo ashret |kratvA devAnAmajaniShTa chakShurAvirakarbhuvanaM vishvamuShAH || 7.76.1
pra me panthA devayAnA adR^ishrannamardhanto vasubhiriShkR^itAsaH |abhUdu keturuShasaH purastAtpratIchyAgAdadhi harmyebhyaH || 7.76.2
tAnIdahAni bahulAnyAsanyA prAchInamuditA sUryasya |yataH pari jAra ivAcharantyuSho dadR^ikShe na punaryatIva || 7.76.3
ta iddevAnAM sadhamAda AsannR^itAvAnaH kavayaH pUrvyAsaH |gULhaM jyotiH pitaro anvavindansatyamantrA ajanayannuShAsam || 7.76.4
samAna Urve adhi saMgatAsaH saM jAnate na yatante mithaste |te devAnAM na minanti vratAnyamardhanto vasubhiryAdamAnAH || 7.76.5
prati tvA stomairILate vasiShThA uSharbudhaH subhage tuShTuvAMsaH |gavAM netrI vAjapatnI na uchChoShaH sujAte prathamA jarasva || 7.76.6
eShA netrI rAdhasaH sUnR^itAnAmuShA uchChantI ribhyate vasiShThaiH |dIrghashrutaM rayimasme dadhAnA yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.76.7

upo ruruche yuvatirna yoShA vishvaM jIvaM prasuvantI charAyai |abhUdagniH samidhe mAnuShANAmakarjyotirbAdhamAnA tamAMsi || 7.77.1
vishvaM pratIchI saprathA udasthAdrushadvAso bibhratI shukramashvait |hiraNyavarNA sudR^ishIkasaMdR^iggavAM mAtA netryahnAmarochi || 7.77.2
devAnAM chakShuH subhagA vahantI shvetaM nayantI sudR^ishIkamashvam |uShA adarshi rashmibhirvyaktA chitrAmaghA vishvamanu prabhUtA || 7.77.3
antivAmA dUre amitramuchChorvIM gavyUtimabhayaM kR^idhI naH |yAvaya dveSha A bharA vasUni chodaya rAdho gR^iNate maghoni || 7.77.4
asme shreShThebhirbhAnubhirvi bhAhyuSho devi pratirantI na AyuH |iShaM cha no dadhatI vishvavAre gomadashvAvadrathavachcha rAdhaH || 7.77.5
yAM tvA divo duhitarvardhayantyuShaH sujAte matibhirvasiShThAH |sAsmAsu dhA rayimR^iShvaM bR^ihantaM yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.77.6

prati ketavaH prathamA adR^ishrannUrdhvA asyA a~njayo vi shrayante |uSho arvAchA bR^ihatA rathena jyotiShmatA vAmamasmabhyaM vakShi || 7.78.1
prati ShImagnirjarate samiddhaH prati viprAso matibhirgR^iNantaH |uShA yAti jyotiShA bAdhamAnA vishvA tamAMsi duritApa devI || 7.78.2
etA u tyAH pratyadR^ishranpurastAjjyotiryachChantIruShaso vibhAtIH |ajIjanansUryaM yaj~namagnimapAchInaM tamo agAdajuShTam || 7.78.3
acheti divo duhitA maghonI vishve pashyantyuShasaM vibhAtIm |AsthAdrathaM svadhayA yujyamAnamA yamashvAsaH suyujo vahanti || 7.78.4
prati tvAdya sumanaso budhantAsmAkAso maghavAno vayaM cha |tilvilAyadhvamuShaso vibhAtIryUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.78.5

vyuShA AvaH pathyA janAnAM pa~ncha kShitIrmAnuShIrbodhayantI |susaMdR^igbhirukShabhirbhAnumashredvi sUryo rodasI chakShasAvaH || 7.79.1
vya~njate divo anteShvaktUnvisho na yuktA uShaso yatante |saM te gAvastama A vartayanti jyotiryachChanti saviteva bAhU || 7.79.2
abhUduShA indratamA maghonyajIjanatsuvitAya shravAMsi |vi divo devI duhitA dadhAtya~NgirastamA sukR^ite vasUni || 7.79.3
tAvaduSho rAdho asmabhyaM rAsva yAvatstotR^ibhyo arado gR^iNAnA |yAM tvA jaj~nurvR^iShabhasyA raveNa vi dR^iLhasya duro adreraurNoH || 7.79.4
devaMdevaM rAdhase chodayantyasmadryaksUnR^itA IrayantI |vyuchChantI naH sanaye dhiyo dhA yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.79.5

prati stomebhiruShasaM vasiShThA gIrbhirviprAsaH prathamA abudhran |vivartayantIM rajasI samante AviShkR^iNvatIM bhuvanAni vishvA || 7.80.1
eShA syA navyamAyurdadhAnA gUDhvI tamo jyotiShoShA abodhi |agra eti yuvatirahrayANA prAchikitatsUryaM yaj~namagnim || 7.80.2
ashvAvatIrgomatIrna uShAso vIravatIH sadamuchChantu bhadrAH |ghR^itaM duhAnA vishvataH prapItA yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.80.3

pratyu adarshyAyatyuchChantI duhitA divaH |apo mahi vyayati chakShase tamo jyotiShkR^iNoti sUnarI || 7.81.1
udusriyAH sR^ijate sUryaH sachA.N udyannakShatramarchivat |taveduSho vyuShi sUryasya cha saM bhaktena gamemahi || 7.81.2
prati tvA duhitardiva uSho jIrA abhutsmahi |yA vahasi puru spArhaM vananvati ratnaM na dAshuShe mayaH || 7.81.3
uchChantI yA kR^iNoShi maMhanA mahi prakhyai devi svardR^ishe |tasyAste ratnabhAja Imahe vayaM syAma mAturna sUnavaH || 7.81.4
tachchitraM rAdha A bharoSho yaddIrghashruttamam |yatte divo duhitarmartabhojanaM tadrAsva bhunajAmahai || 7.81.5
shravaH sUribhyo amR^itaM vasutvanaM vAjA.N asmabhyaM gomataH |chodayitrI maghonaH sUnR^itAvatyuShA uchChadapa sridhaH || 7.81.6

indrAvaruNA yuvamadhvarAya no vishe janAya mahi sharma yachChatam |dIrghaprayajyumati yo vanuShyati vayaM jayema pR^itanAsu dUDhyaH || 7.82.1
samrALanyaH svarALanya uchyate vAM mahAntAvindrAvaruNA mahAvasU |vishve devAsaH parame vyomani saM vAmojo vR^iShaNA saM balaM dadhuH || 7.82.2
anvapAM khAnyatR^intamojasA sUryamairayataM divi prabhum |indrAvaruNA made asya mAyino.apinvatamapitaH pinvataM dhiyaH || 7.82.3
yuvAmidyutsu pR^itanAsu vahnayo yuvAM kShemasya prasave mitaj~navaH |IshAnA vasva ubhayasya kArava indrAvaruNA suhavA havAmahe || 7.82.4
indrAvaruNA yadimAni chakrathurvishvA jAtAni bhuvanasya majmanA |kShemeNa mitro varuNaM duvasyati marudbhirugraH shubhamanya Iyate || 7.82.5
mahe shulkAya varuNasya nu tviSha ojo mimAte dhruvamasya yatsvam |ajAmimanyaH shnathayantamAtiraddabhrebhiranyaH pra vR^iNoti bhUyasaH || 7.82.6
na tamaMho na duritAni martyamindrAvaruNA na tapaH kutashchana |yasya devA gachChatho vItho adhvaraM na taM martasya nashate parihvR^itiH || 7.82.7
arvA~NnarA daivyenAvasA gataM shR^iNutaM havaM yadi me jujoShathaH |yuvorhi sakhyamuta vA yadApyaM mArDIkamindrAvaruNA ni yachChatam || 7.82.8
asmAkamindrAvaruNA bharebhare puroyodhA bhavataM kR^iShTyojasA |yadvAM havanta ubhaye adha spR^idhi narastokasya tanayasya sAtiShu || 7.82.9
asme indro varuNo mitro aryamA dyumnaM yachChantu mahi sharma saprathaH |avadhraM jyotiraditerR^itAvR^idho devasya shlokaM saviturmanAmahe || 7.82.10

yuvAM narA pashyamAnAsa ApyaM prAchA gavyantaH pR^ithuparshavo yayuH |dAsA cha vR^itrA hatamAryANi cha sudAsamindrAvaruNAvasAvatam || 7.83.1
yatrA naraH samayante kR^itadhvajo yasminnAjA bhavati kiM chana priyam |yatrA bhayante bhuvanA svardR^ishastatrA na indrAvaruNAdhi vochatam || 7.83.2
saM bhUmyA antA dhvasirA adR^ikShatendrAvaruNA divi ghoSha Aruhat |asthurjanAnAmupa mAmarAtayo.arvAgavasA havanashrutA gatam || 7.83.3
indrAvaruNA vadhanAbhiraprati bhedaM vanvantA pra sudAsamAvatam |brahmANyeShAM shR^iNutaM havImani satyA tR^itsUnAmabhavatpurohitiH || 7.83.4
indrAvaruNAvabhyA tapanti mAghAnyaryo vanuShAmarAtayaH |yuvaM hi vasva ubhayasya rAjatho.adha smA no.avataM pArye divi || 7.83.5
yuvAM havanta ubhayAsa AjiShvindraM cha vasvo varuNaM cha sAtaye |yatra rAjabhirdashabhirnibAdhitaM pra sudAsamAvataM tR^itsubhiH saha || 7.83.6
dasha rAjAnaH samitA ayajyavaH sudAsamindrAvaruNA na yuyudhuH |satyA nR^iNAmadmasadAmupastutirdevA eShAmabhavandevahUtiShu || 7.83.7
dAsharAj~ne pariyattAya vishvataH sudAsa indrAvaruNAvashikShatam |shvitya~ncho yatra namasA kapardino dhiyA dhIvanto asapanta tR^itsavaH || 7.83.8
vR^itrANyanyaH samitheShu jighnate vratAnyanyo abhi rakShate sadA |havAmahe vAM vR^iShaNA suvR^iktibhirasme indrAvaruNA sharma yachChatam || 7.83.9
asme indro varuNo mitro aryamA dyumnaM yachChantu mahi sharma saprathaH |avadhraM jyotiraditerR^itAvR^idho devasya shlokaM saviturmanAmahe || 7.83.10

A vAM rAjAnAvadhvare vavR^ityAM havyebhirindrAvaruNA namobhiH |pra vAM ghR^itAchI bAhvordadhAnA pari tmanA viShurUpA jigAti || 7.84.1
yuvo rAShTraM bR^ihadinvati dyauryau setR^ibhirarajjubhiH sinIthaH |pari no heLo varuNasya vR^ijyA uruM na indraH kR^iNavadu lokam || 7.84.2
kR^itaM no yaj~naM vidatheShu chAruM kR^itaM brahmANi sUriShu prashastA |upo rayirdevajUto na etu pra NaH spArhAbhirUtibhistiretam || 7.84.3
asme indrAvaruNA vishvavAraM rayiM dhattaM vasumantaM purukShum |pra ya Adityo anR^itA minAtyamitA shUro dayate vasUni || 7.84.4
iyamindraM varuNamaShTa me gIH prAvattoke tanaye tUtujAnA |suratnAso devavItiM gamema yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.84.5

punIShe vAmarakShasaM manIShAM somamindrAya varuNAya juhvat |ghR^itapratIkAmuShasaM na devIM tA no yAmannuruShyatAmabhIke || 7.85.1
spardhante vA u devahUye atra yeShu dhvajeShu didyavaH patanti |yuvaM tA.N indrAvaruNAvamitrAnhataM parAchaH sharvA viShUchaH || 7.85.2
Apashchiddhi svayashasaH sadassu devIrindraM varuNaM devatA dhuH |kR^iShTIranyo dhArayati praviktA vR^itrANyanyo apratIni hanti || 7.85.3
sa sukraturR^itachidastu hotA ya Aditya shavasA vAM namasvAn |Avavartadavase vAM haviShmAnasaditsa suvitAya prayasvAn || 7.85.4
iyamindraM varuNamaShTa me gIH prAvattoke tanaye tUtujAnA |suratnAso devavItiM gamema yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.85.5

dhIrA tvasya mahinA janUMShi vi yastastambha rodasI chidurvI |pra nAkamR^iShvaM nunude bR^ihantaM dvitA nakShatraM paprathachcha bhUma || 7.86.1
uta svayA tanvA saM vade tatkadA nvantarvaruNe bhuvAni |kiM me havyamahR^iNAno juSheta kadA mR^iLIkaM sumanA abhi khyam || 7.86.2
pR^ichChe tadeno varuNa didR^ikShUpo emi chikituSho vipR^ichCham |samAnaminme kavayashchidAhurayaM ha tubhyaM varuNo hR^iNIte || 7.86.3
kimAga Asa varuNa jyeShThaM yatstotAraM jighAMsasi sakhAyam |pra tanme vocho dULabha svadhAvo.ava tvAnenA namasA tura iyAm || 7.86.4
ava drugdhAni pitryA sR^ijA no.ava yA vayaM chakR^imA tanUbhiH |ava rAjanpashutR^ipaM na tAyuM sR^ijA vatsaM na dAmno vasiShTham || 7.86.5
na sa svo dakSho varuNa dhrutiH sA surA manyurvibhIdako achittiH |asti jyAyAnkanIyasa upAre svapnashchanedanR^itasya prayotA || 7.86.6
araM dAso na mILhuShe karANyahaM devAya bhUrNaye.anAgAH |achetayadachito devo aryo gR^itsaM rAye kavitaro junAti || 7.86.7
ayaM su tubhyaM varuNa svadhAvo hR^idi stoma upashritashchidastu |shaM naH kSheme shamu yoge no astu yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.86.8

radatpatho varuNaH sUryAya prArNAMsi samudriyA nadInAm |sargo na sR^iShTo arvatIrR^itAya~nchakAra mahIravanIrahabhyaH || 7.87.1
AtmA te vAto raja A navInotpashurna bhUrNiryavase sasavAn |antarmahI bR^ihatI rodasIme vishvA te dhAma varuNa priyANi || 7.87.2
pari spasho varuNasya smadiShTA ubhe pashyanti rodasI sumeke |R^itAvAnaH kavayo yaj~nadhIrAH prachetaso ya iShayanta manma || 7.87.3
uvAcha me varuNo medhirAya triH sapta nAmAghnyA bibharti |vidvAnpadasya guhyA na vochadyugAya vipra uparAya shikShan || 7.87.4
tisro dyAvo nihitA antarasmintisro bhUmIruparAH ShaDvidhAnAH |gR^itso rAjA varuNashchakra etaM divi pre~NkhaM hiraNyayaM shubhe kam || 7.87.5
ava sindhuM varuNo dyauriva sthAddrapso na shveto mR^igastuviShmAn |gambhIrashaMso rajaso vimAnaH supArakShatraH sato asya rAjA || 7.87.6
yo mR^iLayAti chakruShe chidAgo vayaM syAma varuNe anAgAH |anu vratAnyaditerR^idhanto yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.87.7

pra shundhyuvaM varuNAya preShThAM matiM vasiShTha mILhuShe bharasva |ya ImarvA~nchaM karate yajatraM sahasrAmaghaM vR^iShaNaM bR^ihantam || 7.88.1
adhA nvasya saMdR^ishaM jaganvAnagneranIkaM varuNasya maMsi |svaryadashmannadhipA u andho.abhi mA vapurdR^ishaye ninIyAt || 7.88.2
A yadruhAva varuNashcha nAvaM pra yatsamudramIrayAva madhyam |adhi yadapAM snubhishcharAva pra pre~Nkha I~NkhayAvahai shubhe kam || 7.88.3
vasiShThaM ha varuNo nAvyAdhAdR^iShiM chakAra svapA mahobhiH |stotAraM vipraH sudinatve ahnAM yAnnu dyAvastatananyAduShAsaH || 7.88.4
kva tyAni nau sakhyA babhUvuH sachAvahe yadavR^ikaM purA chit |bR^ihantaM mAnaM varuNa svadhAvaH sahasradvAraM jagamA gR^ihaM te || 7.88.5
ya Apirnityo varuNa priyaH santvAmAgAMsi kR^iNavatsakhA te |mA ta enasvanto yakShinbhujema yandhi ShmA vipraH stuvate varUtham || 7.88.6
dhruvAsu tvAsu kShitiShu kShiyanto vyasmatpAshaM varuNo mumochat |avo vanvAnA aditerupasthAdyUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.88.7

mo Shu varuNa mR^inmayaM gR^ihaM rAjannahaM gamam |mR^iLA sukShatra mR^iLaya || 7.89.1
yademi prasphuranniva dR^itirna dhmAto adrivaH |mR^iLA sukShatra mR^iLaya || 7.89.2
kratvaH samaha dInatA pratIpaM jagamA shuche |mR^iLA sukShatra mR^iLaya || 7.89.3
apAM madhye tasthivAMsaM tR^iShNAvidajjaritAram |mR^iLA sukShatra mR^iLaya || 7.89.4
yatkiM chedaM varuNa daivye jane.abhidrohaM manuShyAshcharAmasi |achittI yattava dharmA yuyopima mA nastasmAdenaso deva rIriShaH || 7.89.5

pra vIrayA shuchayo dadrire vAmadhvaryubhirmadhumantaH sutAsaH |vaha vAyo niyuto yAhyachChA pibA sutasyAndhaso madAya || 7.90.1
IshAnAya prahutiM yasta AnaT ChuchiM somaM shuchipAstubhyaM vAyo |kR^iNoShi taM martyeShu prashastaM jAtojAto jAyate vAjyasya || 7.90.2
rAye nu yaM jaj~natU rodasIme rAye devI dhiShaNA dhAti devam |adha vAyuM niyutaH sashchata svA uta shvetaM vasudhitiM nireke || 7.90.3
uchChannuShasaH sudinA ariprA uru jyotirvividurdIdhyAnAH |gavyaM chidUrvamushijo vi vavrusteShAmanu pradivaH sasrurApaH || 7.90.4
te satyena manasA dIdhyAnAH svena yuktAsaH kratunA vahanti |indravAyU vIravAhaM rathaM vAmIshAnayorabhi pR^ikShaH sachante || 7.90.5
IshAnAso ye dadhate svarNo gobhirashvebhirvasubhirhiraNyaiH |indravAyU sUrayo vishvamAyurarvadbhirvIraiH pR^itanAsu sahyuH || 7.90.6
arvanto na shravaso bhikShamANA indravAyU suShTutibhirvasiShThAH |vAjayantaH svavase huvema yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.90.7

kuvida~Nga namasA ye vR^idhAsaH purA devA anavadyAsa Asan |te vAyave manave bAdhitAyAvAsayannuShasaM sUryeNa || 7.91.1
ushantA dUtA na dabhAya gopA mAsashcha pAthaH sharadashcha pUrvIH |indravAyU suShTutirvAmiyAnA mArDIkamITTe suvitaM cha navyam || 7.91.2
pIvo/annA.N rayivR^idhaH sumedhAH shvetaH siShakti niyutAmabhishrIH |te vAyave samanaso vi tasthurvishvennaraH svapatyAni chakruH || 7.91.3
yAvattarastanvo yAvadojo yAvannarashchakShasA dIdhyAnAH |shuchiM somaM shuchipA pAtamasme indravAyU sadataM barhiredam || 7.91.4
niyuvAnA niyutaH spArhavIrA indravAyU sarathaM yAtamarvAk |idaM hi vAM prabhR^itaM madhvo agramadha prINAnA vi mumuktamasme || 7.91.5
yA vAM shataM niyuto yAH sahasramindravAyU vishvavArAH sachante |AbhiryAtaM suvidatrAbhirarvAkpAtaM narA pratibhR^itasya madhvaH || 7.91.6
arvanto na shravaso bhikShamANA indravAyU suShTutibhirvasiShThAH |vAjayantaH svavase huvema yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.91.7

A vAyo bhUSha shuchipA upa naH sahasraM te niyuto vishvavAra |upo te andho madyamayAmi yasya deva dadhiShe pUrvapeyam || 7.92.1
pra sotA jIro adhvareShvasthAtsomamindrAya vAyave pibadhyai |pra yadvAM madhvo agriyaM bharantyadhvaryavo devayantaH shachIbhiH || 7.92.2
pra yAbhiryAsi dAshvAMsamachChA niyudbhirvAyaviShTaye duroNe |ni no rayiM subhojasaM yuvasva ni vIraM gavyamashvyaM cha rAdhaH || 7.92.3
ye vAyava indramAdanAsa AdevAso nitoshanAso aryaH |ghnanto vR^itrANi sUribhiH ShyAma sAsahvAMso yudhA nR^ibhiramitrAn || 7.92.4
A no niyudbhiH shatinIbhiradhvaraM sahasriNIbhirupa yAhi yaj~nam |vAyo asminsavane mAdayasva yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.92.5

shuchiM nu stomaM navajAtamadyendrAgnI vR^itrahaNA juShethAm |ubhA hi vAM suhavA johavImi tA vAjaM sadya ushate dheShThA || 7.93.1
tA sAnasI shavasAnA hi bhUtaM sAkaMvR^idhA shavasA shUshuvAMsA |kShayantau rAyo yavasasya bhUreH pR^i~NktaM vAjasya sthavirasya ghR^iShveH || 7.93.2
upo ha yadvidathaM vAjino gurdhIbhirviprAH pramatimichChamAnAH |arvanto na kAShThAM nakShamANA indrAgnI johuvato naraste || 7.93.3
gIrbhirvipraH pramatimichChamAna ITTe rayiM yashasaM pUrvabhAjam |indrAgnI vR^itrahaNA suvajrA pra no navyebhistirataM deShNaiH || 7.93.4
saM yanmahI mithatI spardhamAne tanUruchA shUrasAtA yataite |adevayuM vidathe devayubhiH satrA hataM somasutA janena || 7.93.5
