imAmu Shu somasutimupa na endrAgnI saumanasAya yAtam |nU chiddhi parimamnAthe asmAnA vAM shashvadbhirvavR^itIya vAjaiH || 7.93.6
so agna enA namasA samiddho.achChA mitraM varuNamindraM vocheH |yatsImAgashchakR^imA tatsu mR^iLa tadaryamAditiH shishrathantu || 7.93.7
etA agna AshuShANAsa iShTIryuvoH sachAbhyashyAma vAjAn |mendro no viShNurmarutaH pari khyanyUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.93.8

iyaM vAmasya manmana indrAgnI pUrvyastutiH |abhrAdvR^iShTirivAjani || 7.94.1
shR^iNutaM jariturhavamindrAgnI vanataM giraH |IshAnA pipyataM dhiyaH || 7.94.2
mA pApatvAya no narendrAgnI mAbhishastaye |mA no rIradhataM nide || 7.94.3
indre agnA namo bR^ihatsuvR^iktimerayAmahe |dhiyA dhenA avasyavaH || 7.94.4
tA hi shashvanta ILata itthA viprAsa Utaye |sabAdho vAjasAtaye || 7.94.5
tA vAM gIrbhirvipanyavaH prayasvanto havAmahe |medhasAtA saniShyavaH || 7.94.6
indrAgnI avasA gatamasmabhyaM charShaNIsahA |mA no duHshaMsa Ishata || 7.94.7
mA kasya no araruSho dhUrtiH praNa~Nmartyasya |indrAgnI sharma yachChatam || 7.94.8
gomaddhiraNyavadvasu yadvAmashvAvadImahe |indrAgnI tadvanemahi || 7.94.9
yatsoma A sute nara indrAgnI ajohavuH |saptIvantA saparyavaH || 7.94.10
ukthebhirvR^itrahantamA yA mandAnA chidA girA |A~NgUShairAvivAsataH || 7.94.11
tAvidduHshaMsaM martyaM durvidvAMsaM rakShasvinam |AbhogaM hanmanA hatamudadhiM hanmanA hatam || 7.94.12

pra kShodasA dhAyasA sasra eShA sarasvatI dharuNamAyasI pUH |prabAbadhAnA rathyeva yAti vishvA apo mahinA sindhuranyAH || 7.95.1
ekAchetatsarasvatI nadInAM shuchiryatI giribhya A samudrAt |rAyashchetantI bhuvanasya bhUrerghR^itaM payo duduhe nAhuShAya || 7.95.2
sa vAvR^idhe naryo yoShaNAsu vR^iShA shishurvR^iShabho yaj~niyAsu |sa vAjinaM maghavadbhyo dadhAti vi sAtaye tanvaM mAmR^ijIta || 7.95.3
uta syA naH sarasvatI juShANopa shravatsubhagA yajNe asmin |mitaj~nubhirnamasyairiyAnA rAyA yujA chiduttarA sakhibhyaH || 7.95.4
imA juhvAnA yuShmadA namobhiH prati stomaM sarasvati juShasva |tava sharmanpriyatame dadhAnA upa stheyAma sharaNaM na vR^ikSham || 7.95.5
ayamu te sarasvati vasiShTho dvArAvR^itasya subhage vyAvaH |vardha shubhre stuvate rAsi vAjAnyUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.95.6

bR^ihadu gAyiShe vacho.asuryA nadInAm |sarasvatIminmahayA suvR^iktibhiH stomairvasiShTha rodasI || 7.96.1
ubhe yatte mahinA shubhre andhasI adhikShiyanti pUravaH |sA no bodhyavitrI marutsakhA choda rAdho maghonAm || 7.96.2
bhadramidbhadrA kR^iNavatsarasvatyakavArI chetati vAjinIvatI |gR^iNAnA jamadagnivatstuvAnA cha vasiShThavat || 7.96.3
janIyanto nvagravaH putrIyantaH sudAnavaH |sarasvantaM havAmahe || 7.96.4
ye te sarasva Urmayo madhumanto ghR^itashchutaH |tebhirno.avitA bhava || 7.96.5
pIpivAMsaM sarasvataH stanaM yo vishvadarshataH |bhakShImahi prajAmiSham || 7.96.6

yaj~ne divo nR^iShadane pR^ithivyA naro yatra devayavo madanti |indrAya yatra savanAni sunve gamanmadAya prathamaM vayashcha || 7.97.1
A daivyA vR^iNImahe.avAMsi bR^ihaspatirno maha A sakhAyaH |yathA bhavema mILhuShe anAgA yo no dAtA parAvataH piteva || 7.97.2
tamu jyeShThaM namasA havirbhiH sushevaM brahmaNaspatiM gR^iNIShe |indraM shloko mahi daivyaH siShaktu yo brahmaNo devakR^itasya rAjA || 7.97.3
sa A no yoniM sadatu preShTho bR^ihaspatirvishvavAro yo asti |kAmo rAyaH suvIryasya taM dAtparShanno ati sashchato ariShTAn || 7.97.4
tamA no arkamamR^itAya juShTamime dhAsuramR^itAsaH purAjAH |shuchikrandaM yajataM pastyAnAM bR^ihaspatimanarvANaM huvema || 7.97.5
taM shagmAso aruShAso ashvA bR^ihaspatiM sahavAho vahanti |sahashchidyasya nIlavatsadhasthaM nabho na rUpamaruShaM vasAnAH || 7.97.6
sa hi shuchiH shatapatraH sa shundhyurhiraNyavAshIriShiraH svarShAH |bR^ihaspatiH sa svAvesha R^iShvaH purU sakhibhya AsutiM kariShThaH || 7.97.7
devI devasya rodasI janitrI bR^ihaspatiM vAvR^idhaturmahitvA |dakShAyyAya dakShatA sakhAyaH karadbrahmaNe sutarA sugAdhA || 7.97.8
iyaM vAM brahmaNaspate suvR^iktirbrahmendrAya vajriNe akAri |aviShTaM dhiyo jigR^itaM puraMdhIrjajastamaryo vanuShAmarAtIH || 7.97.9
bR^ihaspate yuvamindrashcha vasvo divyasyeshAthe uta pArthivasya |dhattaM rayiM stuvate kIraye chidyUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.97.10

adhvaryavo.aruNaM dugdhamaMshuM juhotana vR^iShabhAya kShitInAm |gaurAdvedIyA.N avapAnamindro vishvAhedyAti sutasomamichChan || 7.98.1
yaddadhiShe pradivi chArvannaM divedive pItimidasya vakShi |uta hR^idota manasA juShANa ushannindra prasthitAnpAhi somAn || 7.98.2
jaj~nAnaH somaM sahase papAtha pra te mAtA mahimAnamuvAcha |endra paprAthorvantarikShaM yudhA devebhyo varivashchakartha || 7.98.3
yadyodhayA mahato manyamAnAnsAkShAma tAnbAhubhiH shAshadAnAn |yadvA nR^ibhirvR^ita indrAbhiyudhyAstaM tvayAjiM saushravasaM jayema || 7.98.4
prendrasya vochaM prathamA kR^itAni pra nUtanA maghavA yA chakAra |yadedadevIrasahiShTa mAyA athAbhavatkevalaH somo asya || 7.98.5
tavedaM vishvamabhitaH pashavyaM yatpashyasi chakShasA sUryasya |gavAmasi gopatireka indra bhakShImahi te prayatasya vasvaH || 7.98.6
bR^ihaspate yuvamindrashcha vasvo divyasyeshAthe uta pArthivasya |dhattaM rayiM stuvate kIraye chidyUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.98.7

paro mAtrayA tanvA vR^idhAna na te mahitvamanvashnuvanti |ubhe te vidma rajasI pR^ithivyA viShNo deva tvaM paramasya vitse || 7.99.1
na te viShNo jAyamAno na jAto deva mahimnaH paramantamApa |udastabhnA nAkamR^iShvaM bR^ihantaM dAdhartha prAchIM kakubhaM pR^ithivyAH || 7.99.2
irAvatI dhenumatI hi bhUtaM sUyavasinI manuShe dashasyA |vyastabhnA rodasI viShNavete dAdhartha pR^ithivImabhito mayUkhaiH || 7.99.3
uruM yaj~nAya chakrathuru lokaM janayantA sUryamuShAsamagnim |dAsasya chidvR^iShashiprasya mAyA jaghnathurnarA pR^itanAjyeShu || 7.99.4
indrAviShNU dR^iMhitAH shambarasya nava puro navatiM cha shnathiShTam |shataM varchinaH sahasraM cha sAkaM hatho apratyasurasya vIrAn || 7.99.5
iyaM manIShA bR^ihatI bR^ihantorukramA tavasA vardhayantI |rare vAM stomaM vidatheShu viShNo pinvatamiSho vR^ijaneShvindra || 7.99.6
vaShaT te viShNavAsa A kR^iNomi tanme juShasva shipiviShTa havyam |vardhantu tvA suShTutayo giro me yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.99.7

nU marto dayate saniShyanyo viShNava urugAyAya dAshat |pra yaH satrAchA manasA yajAta etAvantaM naryamAvivAsAt || 7.100.1
tvaM viShNo sumatiM vishvajanyAmaprayutAmevayAvo matiM dAH |parcho yathA naH suvitasya bhUrerashvAvataH purushchandrasya rAyaH || 7.100.2
trirdevaH pR^ithivImeSha etAM vi chakrame shatarchasaM mahitvA |pra viShNurastu tavasastavIyAntveShaM hyasya sthavirasya nAma || 7.100.3
vi chakrame pR^ithivImeSha etAM kShetrAya viShNurmanuShe dashasyan |dhruvAso asya kIrayo janAsa urukShitiM sujanimA chakAra || 7.100.4
pra tatte adya shipiviShTa nAmAryaH shaMsAmi vayunAni vidvAn |taM tvA gR^iNAmi tavasamatavyAnkShayantamasya rajasaH parAke || 7.100.5
kimitte viShNo parichakShyaM bhUtpra yadvavakShe shipiviShTo asmi |mA varpo asmadapa gUha etadyadanyarUpaH samithe babhUtha || 7.100.6
vaShaT te viShNavAsa A kR^iNomi tanme juShasva shipiviShTa havyam |vardhantu tvA suShTutayo giro me yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.100.7

tisro vAchaH pra vada jyotiragrA yA etadduhre madhudoghamUdhaH |sa vatsaM kR^iNvangarbhamoShadhInAM sadyo jAto vR^iShabho roravIti || 7.101.1
yo vardhana oShadhInAM yo apAM yo vishvasya jagato deva Ishe |sa tridhAtu sharaNaM sharma yaMsattrivartu jyotiH svabhiShTyasme || 7.101.2
starIru tvadbhavati sUta u tvadyathAvashaM tanvaM chakra eShaH |pituH payaH prati gR^ibhNAti mAtA tena pitA vardhate tena putraH || 7.101.3
yasminvishvAni bhuvanAni tasthustisro dyAvastredhA sasrurApaH |trayaH koshAsa upasechanAso madhvaH shchotantyabhito virapsham || 7.101.4
idaM vachaH parjanyAya svarAje hR^ido astvantaraM tajjujoShat |mayobhuvo vR^iShTayaH santvasme supippalA oShadhIrdevagopAH || 7.101.5
sa retodhA vR^iShabhaH shashvatInAM tasminnAtmA jagatastasthuShashcha |tanma R^itaM pAtu shatashAradAya yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 7.101.6

parjanyAya pra gAyata divasputrAya mILhuShe |sa no yavasamichChatu || 7.102.1
yo garbhamoShadhInAM gavAM kR^iNotyarvatAm |parjanyaH puruShINAm || 7.102.2
tasmA idAsye havirjuhotA madhumattamam |iLAM naH saMyataM karat || 7.102.3

saMvatsaraM shashayAnA brAhmaNA vratachAriNaH |vAchaM parjanyajinvitAM pra maNDUkA avAdiShuH || 7.103.1
divyA Apo abhi yadenamAyandR^itiM na shuShkaM sarasI shayAnam |gavAmaha na mAyurvatsinInAM maNDUkAnAM vagnuratrA sameti || 7.103.2
yadImenA.N ushato abhyavarShIttR^iShyAvataH prAvR^iShyAgatAyAm |akhkhalIkR^ityA pitaraM na putro anyo anyamupa vadantameti || 7.103.3
anyo anyamanu gR^ibhNAtyenorapAM prasarge yadamandiShAtAm |maNDUko yadabhivR^iShTaH kaniShkanpR^ishniH sampR^i~Nkte haritena vAcham || 7.103.4
yadeShAmanyo anyasya vAchaM shAktasyeva vadati shikShamANaH |sarvaM tadeShAM samR^idheva parva yatsuvAcho vadathanAdhyapsu || 7.103.5
gomAyureko ajamAyurekaH pR^ishnireko harita eka eShAm |samAnaM nAma bibhrato virUpAH purutrA vAchaM pipishurvadantaH || 7.103.6
brAhmaNAso atirAtre na some saro na pUrNamabhito vadantaH |saMvatsarasya tadahaH pari ShTha yanmaNDUkAH prAvR^iShINaM babhUva || 7.103.7
brAhmaNAsaH somino vAchamakrata brahma kR^iNvantaH parivatsarINam |adhvaryavo gharmiNaH siShvidAnA Avirbhavanti guhyA na ke chit || 7.103.8
devahitiM jugupurdvAdashasya R^ituM naro na pra minantyete |saMvatsare prAvR^iShyAgatAyAM taptA gharmA ashnuvate visargam || 7.103.9
gomAyuradAdajamAyuradAtpR^ishniradAddharito no vasUni |gavAM maNDUkA dadataH shatAni sahasrasAve pra tiranta AyuH || 7.103.10

indrAsomA tapataM rakSha ubjataM nyarpayataM vR^iShaNA tamovR^idhaH |parA shR^iNItamachito nyoShataM hataM nudethAM ni shishItamatriNaH || 7.104.1
indrAsomA samaghashaMsamabhyaghaM tapuryayastu charuragnivA.N iva |brahmadviShe kravyAde ghorachakShase dveSho dhattamanavAyaM kimIdine || 7.104.2
indrAsomA duShkR^ito vavre antaranArambhaNe tamasi pra vidhyatam |yathA nAtaH punarekashchanodayattadvAmastu sahase manyumachChavaH || 7.104.3
indrAsomA vartayataM divo vadhaM saM pR^ithivyA aghashaMsAya tarhaNam |uttakShataM svaryaM parvatebhyo yena rakSho vAvR^idhAnaM nijUrvathaH || 7.104.4
indrAsomA vartayataM divasparyagnitaptebhiryuvamashmahanmabhiH |tapurvadhebhirajarebhiratriNo ni parshAne vidhyataM yantu nisvaram || 7.104.5
indrAsomA pari vAM bhUtu vishvata iyaM matiH kakShyAshveva vAjinA |yAM vAM hotrAM parihinomi medhayemA brahmANi nR^ipatIva jinvatam || 7.104.6
prati smarethAM tujayadbhirevairhataM druho rakShaso bha~NgurAvataH |indrAsomA duShkR^ite mA sugaM bhUdyo naH kadA chidabhidAsati druhA || 7.104.7
yo mA pAkena manasA charantamabhichaShTe anR^itebhirvachobhiH |Apa iva kAshinA saMgR^ibhItA asannastvAsata indra vaktA || 7.104.8
ye pAkashaMsaM viharanta evairye vA bhadraM dUShayanti svadhAbhiH |ahaye vA tAnpradadAtu soma A vA dadhAtu nirR^iterupasthe || 7.104.9
yo no rasaM dipsati pitvo agne yo ashvAnAM yo gavAM yastanUnAm |ripuH stenaH steyakR^iddabhrametu ni Sha hIyatAM tanvA tanA cha || 7.104.10
paraH so astu tanvA tanA cha tisraH pR^ithivIradho astu vishvAH |prati shuShyatu yasho asya devA yo no divA dipsati yashcha naktam || 7.104.11
suvij~nAnaM chikituShe janAya sachchAsachcha vachasI paspR^idhAte |tayoryatsatyaM yataradR^ijIyastaditsomo.avati hantyAsat || 7.104.12
na vA u somo vR^ijinaM hinoti na kShatriyaM mithuyA dhArayantam |hanti rakSho hantyAsadvadantamubhAvindrasya prasitau shayAte || 7.104.13
yadi vAhamanR^itadeva Asa moghaM vA devA.N apyUhe agne |kimasmabhyaM jAtavedo hR^iNIShe droghavAchaste nirR^ithaM sachantAm || 7.104.14
adyA murIya yadi yAtudhAno asmi yadi vAyustatapa pUruShasya |adhA sa vIrairdashabhirvi yUyA yo mA moghaM yAtudhAnetyAha || 7.104.15
yo mAyAtuM yAtudhAnetyAha yo vA rakShAH shuchirasmItyAha |indrastaM hantu mahatA vadhena vishvasya jantoradhamaspadIShTa || 7.104.16
pra yA jigAti khargaleva naktamapa druhA tanvaM gUhamAnA |vavrA.N anantA.N ava sA padIShTa grAvANo ghnantu rakShasa upabdaiH || 7.104.17
vi tiShThadhvaM maruto vikShvichChata gR^ibhAyata rakShasaH saM pinaShTana |vayo ye bhUtvI patayanti naktabhirye vA ripo dadhire deve adhvare || 7.104.18
pra vartaya divo ashmAnamindra somashitaM maghavansaM shishAdhi |prAktAdapAktAdadharAdudaktAdabhi jahi rakShasaH parvatena || 7.104.19
eta u tye patayanti shvayAtava indraM dipsanti dipsavo.adAbhyam |shishIte shakraH pishunebhyo vadhaM nUnaM sR^ijadashaniM yAtumadbhyaH || 7.104.20
indro yAtUnAmabhavatparAsharo havirmathInAmabhyAvivAsatAm |abhIdu shakraH parashuryathA vanaM pAtreva bhindansata eti rakShasaH || 7.104.21
ulUkayAtuM shushulUkayAtuM jahi shvayAtumuta kokayAtum |suparNayAtumuta gR^idhrayAtuM dR^iShadeva pra mR^iNa rakSha indra || 7.104.22
mA no rakSho abhi naDyAtumAvatAmapochChatu mithunA yA kimIdinA |pR^ithivI naH pArthivAtpAtvaMhaso.antarikShaM divyAtpAtvasmAn || 7.104.23
indra jahi pumAMsaM yAtudhAnamuta striyaM mAyayA shAshadAnAm |vigrIvAso mUradevA R^idantu mA te dR^ishansUryamuchcharantam || 7.104.24
prati chakShva vi chakShvendrashcha soma jAgR^itam |rakShobhyo vadhamasyatamashaniM yAtumadbhyaH || 7.104.25

##
Last updated July 2, 2013

Special mention : Initial processing and help by Avinash and Shashi Sathaye, 
Avinash Chopde, Shree Devi Kumar, Sunder Hattangadi, John Gardner.
Reprocessed from Original in final form by Detlef Eichler with additional corrections.
See Detlef's site http://www.detlef108.de/Rigveda.htm
for other details and formats.

The text is shown without accents (Anudattas, dependent Svaritas,
and independent Svaritas including Kampas). Words are connected (agnimILe). 
Ch is doubled as in gachChati according to the rules of Rigveda-Pratishakhya. 
At the end of a word m is replaced by Anusvara M if the initial letter of the
following word is a labial stop consonant (p, ph, b, bh, m).
Visarga H before sh, Sh or s followed by a voiceless consonant has been restored.

Source : The Aufrecht/van Nooten/Holland (Samhita) version
of the Rigveda (http://www.people.fas.harvard.edu/~witzel/onlineRV.htm).
In this text accented vowels have Udatta or 'independent Svarita' markers.
Kampas are not shown. Words are separated (agnim ILe). 
Ch is not doubled as in gaChati. At the end of a word we find m before
a following labial stop consonant (p, ph, b, bh, m).
Visarga H before sh, Sh or s followed by a voiceless consonant has 
been dropped according to a rule of  Rigveda-Pratishakhya.

Send corrections to   : detlefeichler@googlemail.com, sanskrit@cheerful.com

The text is to be used for personal studies and research only.
Any use for commercial purpose is prohibited as a `gentleman's' agreement.


mA chidanyadvi shaMsata sakhAyo mA riShaNyata |indramitstotA vR^iShaNaM sachA sute muhurukthA cha shaMsata || 8.1.1
avakrakShiNaM vR^iShabhaM yathAjuraM gAM na charShaNIsaham |vidveShaNaM saMvananobhayaMkaraM maMhiShThamubhayAvinam || 8.1.2
yachchiddhi tvA janA ime nAnA havanta Utaye |asmAkaM brahmedamindra bhUtu te.ahA vishvA cha vardhanam || 8.1.3
vi tartUryante maghavanvipashchito.aryo vipo janAnAm |upa kramasva pururUpamA bhara vAjaM nediShThamUtaye || 8.1.4
mahe chana tvAmadrivaH parA shulkAya deyAm |na sahasrAya nAyutAya vajrivo na shatAya shatAmagha || 8.1.5
vasyA.N indrAsi me pituruta bhrAturabhu~njataH |mAtA cha me ChadayathaH samA vaso vasutvanAya rAdhase || 8.1.6
kveyatha kvedasi purutrA chiddhi te manaH |alarShi yudhma khajakR^itpuraMdara pra gAyatrA agAsiShuH || 8.1.7
prAsmai gAyatramarchata vAvAturyaH puraMdaraH |yAbhiH kANvasyopa barhirAsadaM yAsadvajrI bhinatpuraH || 8.1.8
ye te santi dashagvinaH shatino ye sahasriNaH |ashvAso ye te vR^iShaNo raghudruvastebhirnastUyamA gahi || 8.1.9
A tvadya sabardughAM huve gAyatravepasam |indraM dhenuM sudughAmanyAmiShamurudhArAmaraMkR^itam || 8.1.10
yattudatsUra etashaM va~NkU vAtasya parNinA |vahatkutsamArjuneyaM shatakratuH tsaradgandharvamastR^itam || 8.1.11
ya R^ite chidabhishriShaH purA jatrubhya AtR^idaH |saMdhAtA saMdhiM maghavA purUvasuriShkartA vihrutaM punaH || 8.1.12
mA bhUma niShTyA ivendra tvadaraNA iva |vanAni na prajahitAnyadrivo duroShAso amanmahi || 8.1.13
amanmahIdanAshavo.anugrAsashcha vR^itrahan |sakR^itsu te mahatA shUra rAdhasA anu stomaM mudImahi || 8.1.14
yadi stomaM mama shravadasmAkamindramindavaH |tiraH pavitraM sasR^ivAMsa Ashavo mandantu tugryAvR^idhaH || 8.1.15
A tvadya sadhastutiM vAvAtuH sakhyurA gahi |upastutirmaghonAM pra tvAvatvadhA te vashmi suShTutim || 8.1.16
sotA hi somamadribhiremenamapsu dhAvata |gavyA vastreva vAsayanta innaro nirdhukShanvakShaNAbhyaH || 8.1.17
adha jmo adha vA divo bR^ihato rochanAdadhi |ayA vardhasva tanvA girA mamA jAtA sukrato pR^iNa || 8.1.18
indrAya su madintamaM somaM sotA vareNyam |shakra eNaM pIpayadvishvayA dhiyA hinvAnaM na vAjayum || 8.1.19
mA tvA somasya galdayA sadA yAchannahaM girA |bhUrNiM mR^igaM na savaneShu chukrudhaM ka IshAnaM na yAchiShat || 8.1.20
madeneShitaM madamugramugreNa shavasA |vishveShAM tarutAraM madachyutaM made hi ShmA dadAti naH || 8.1.21
shevAre vAryA puru devo martAya dAshuShe |sa sunvate cha stuvate cha rAsate vishvagUrto ariShTutaH || 8.1.22
endra yAhi matsva chitreNa deva rAdhasA |saro na prAsyudaraM sapItibhirA somebhiruru sphiram || 8.1.23
A tvA sahasramA shataM yuktA rathe hiraNyaye |brahmayujo haraya indra keshino vahantu somapItaye || 8.1.24
A tvA rathe hiraNyaye harI mayUrashepyA |shitipR^iShThA vahatAM madhvo andhaso vivakShaNasya pItaye || 8.1.25
pibA tvasya girvaNaH sutasya pUrvapA iva |pariShkR^itasya rasina iyamAsutishchArurmadAya patyate || 8.1.26
ya eko asti daMsanA mahA.N ugro abhi vrataiH |gamatsa shiprI na sa yoShadA gamaddhavaM na pari varjati || 8.1.27
tvaM puraM chariShNvaM vadhaiH shuShNasya saM piNak |tvaM bhA anu charo adha dvitA yadindra havyo bhuvaH || 8.1.28
mama tvA sUra udite mama madhyaMdine divaH |mama prapitve apisharvare vasavA stomAso avR^itsata || 8.1.29
stuhi stuhIdete ghA te maMhiShThAso maghonAm |ninditAshvaH prapathI paramajyA maghasya medhyAtithe || 8.1.30
A yadashvAnvananvataH shraddhayAhaM rathe ruham |uta vAmasya vasunashchiketati yo asti yAdvaH pashuH || 8.1.31
ya R^ijrA mahyaM mAmahe saha tvachA hiraNyayA |eSha vishvAnyabhyastu saubhagAsa~Ngasya svanadrathaH || 8.1.32
adha plAyogirati dAsadanyAnAsa~Ngo agne dashabhiH sahasraiH |adhokShaNo dasha mahyaM rushanto naLA iva saraso niratiShThan || 8.1.33
anvasya sthUraM dadR^ishe purastAdanastha UruravarambamANaH |shashvatI nAryabhichakShyAha subhadramarya bhojanaM bibharShi || 8.1.34

idaM vaso sutamandhaH pibA supUrNamudaram |anAbhayinrarimA te || 8.2.1
nR^ibhirdhUtaH suto ashnairavyo vAraiH paripUtaH |ashvo na nikto nadIShu || 8.2.2
taM te yavaM yathA gobhiH svAdumakarma shrINantaH |indra tvAsminsadhamAde || 8.2.3
indra itsomapA eka indraH sutapA vishvAyuH |antardevAnmartyA.Nshcha || 8.2.4
na yaM shukro na durAshIrna tR^iprA uruvyachasam |apaspR^iNvate suhArdam || 8.2.5
gobhiryadImanye asmanmR^igaM na vrA mR^igayante |abhitsaranti dhenubhiH || 8.2.6
traya indrasya somAH sutAsaH santu devasya |sve kShaye sutapAvnaH || 8.2.7
trayaH koshAsaH shchotanti tisrashchamvaH supUrNAH |samAne adhi bhArman || 8.2.8
shuchirasi puruniHShThAH kShIrairmadhyata AshIrtaH |dadhnA mandiShThaH shUrasya || 8.2.9
ime ta indra somAstIvrA asme sutAsaH |shukrA AshiraM yAchante || 8.2.10
tA.N AshiraM puroLAshamindremaM somaM shrINIhi |revantaM hi tvA shR^iNomi || 8.2.11
hR^itsu pItAso yudhyante durmadAso na surAyAm |Udharna nagnA jarante || 8.2.12
revA.N idrevataH stotA syAttvAvato maghonaH |predu harivaH shrutasya || 8.2.13
ukthaM chana shasyamAnamagorarirA chiketa |na gAyatraM gIyamAnam || 8.2.14
mA na indra pIyatnave mA shardhate parA dAH |shikShA shachIvaH shachIbhiH || 8.2.15
vayamu tvA tadidarthA indra tvAyantaH sakhAyaH |kaNvA ukthebhirjarante || 8.2.16
na ghemanyadA papana vajrinnapaso naviShTau |tavedu stomaM chiketa || 8.2.17
ichChanti devAH sunvantaM na svapnAya spR^ihayanti |yanti pramAdamatandrAH || 8.2.18
o Shu pra yAhi vAjebhirmA hR^iNIthA abhyasmAn |mahA.N iva yuvajAniH || 8.2.19
mo Shvadya durhaNAvAnsAyaM karadAre asmat |ashrIra iva jAmAtA || 8.2.20
vidmA hyasya vIrasya bhUridAvarIM sumatim |triShu jAtasya manAMsi || 8.2.21
A tU Shi~ncha kaNvamantaM na ghA vidma shavasAnAt |yashastaraM shatamUteH || 8.2.22
jyeShThena sotarindrAya somaM vIrAya shakrAya |bharA pibannaryAya || 8.2.23
yo vediShTho avyathiShvashvAvantaM jaritR^ibhyaH |vAjaM stotR^ibhyo gomantam || 8.2.24
panyampanyamitsotAra A dhAvata madyAya |somaM vIrAya shUrAya || 8.2.25
pAtA vR^itrahA sutamA ghA gamannAre asmat |ni yamate shatamUtiH || 8.2.26
eha harI brahmayujA shagmA vakShataH sakhAyam |gIrbhiH shrutaM girvaNasam || 8.2.27
svAdavaH somA A yAhi shrItAH somA A yAhi |shiprinnR^iShIvaH shachIvo nAyamachChA sadhamAdam || 8.2.28
stutashcha yAstvA vardhanti mahe rAdhase nR^imNAya |indra kAriNaM vR^idhantaH || 8.2.29
girashcha yAste girvAha ukthA cha tubhyaM tAni |satrA dadhire shavAMsi || 8.2.30
evedeSha tuvikUrmirvAjA.N eko vajrahastaH |sanAdamR^ikto dayate || 8.2.31
hantA vR^itraM dakShiNenendraH purU puruhUtaH |mahAnmahIbhiH shachIbhiH || 8.2.32
yasminvishvAshcharShaNaya uta chyautnA jrayAMsi cha |anu ghenmandI maghonaH || 8.2.33
eSha etAni chakArendro vishvA yo.ati shR^iNve |vAjadAvA maghonAm || 8.2.34
prabhartA rathaM gavyantamapAkAchchidyamavati |ino vasu sa hi voLhA || 8.2.35
sanitA vipro arvadbhirhantA vR^itraM nR^ibhiH shUraH |satyo.avitA vidhantam || 8.2.36
yajadhvainaM priyamedhA indraM satrAchA manasA |yo bhUtsomaiH satyamadvA || 8.2.37
gAthashravasaM satpatiM shravaskAmaM purutmAnam |kaNvAso gAta vAjinam || 8.2.38
ya R^ite chidgAspadebhyo dAtsakhA nR^ibhyaH shachIvAn |ye asminkAmamashriyan || 8.2.39
itthA dhIvantamadrivaH kANvaM medhyAtithim |meSho bhUto.abhi yannayaH || 8.2.40
shikShA vibhindo asmai chatvAryayutA dadat |aShTA paraH sahasrA || 8.2.41
uta su tye payovR^idhA mAkI raNasya naptyA |janitvanAya mAmahe || 8.2.42

pibA sutasya rasino matsvA na indra gomataH |Apirno bodhi sadhamAdyo vR^idhe.asmA.N avantu te dhiyaH || 8.3.1
bhUyAma te sumatau vAjino vayaM mA naH starabhimAtaye |asmA~nchitrAbhiravatAdabhiShTibhirA naH sumneShu yAmaya || 8.3.2
imA u tvA purUvaso giro vardhantu yA mama |pAvakavarNAH shuchayo vipashchito.abhi stomairanUShata || 8.3.3
ayaM sahasramR^iShibhiH sahaskR^itaH samudra iva paprathe |satyaH so asya mahimA gR^iNe shavo yaj~neShu viprarAjye || 8.3.4
indramiddevatAtaya indraM prayatyadhvare |indraM samIke vanino havAmaha indraM dhanasya sAtaye || 8.3.5
indro mahnA rodasI paprathachChava indraH sUryamarochayat |indre ha vishvA bhuvanAni yemira indre suvAnAsa indavaH || 8.3.6
abhi tvA pUrvapItaya indra stomebhirAyavaH |samIchInAsa R^ibhavaH samasvaranrudrA gR^iNanta pUrvyam || 8.3.7
asyedindro vAvR^idhe vR^iShNyaM shavo made sutasya viShNavi |adyA tamasya mahimAnamAyavo.anu ShTuvanti pUrvathA || 8.3.8
tattvA yAmi suvIryaM tadbrahma pUrvachittaye |yenA yatibhyo bhR^igave dhane hite yena praskaNvamAvitha || 8.3.9
yenA samudramasR^ijo mahIrapastadindra vR^iShNi te shavaH |sadyaH so asya mahimA na saMnashe yaM kShoNIranuchakrade || 8.3.10
shagdhI na indra yattvA rayiM yAmi suvIryam |shagdhi vAjAya prathamaM siShAsate shagdhi stomAya pUrvya || 8.3.11
shagdhI no asya yaddha pauramAvitha dhiya indra siShAsataH |shagdhi yathA rushamaM shyAvakaM kR^ipamindra prAvaH svarNaram || 8.3.12
kannavyo atasInAM turo gR^iNIta martyaH |nahI nvasya mahimAnamindriyaM svargR^iNanta AnashuH || 8.3.13
kadu stuvanta R^itayanta devata R^iShiH ko vipra ohate |kadA havaM maghavannindra sunvataH kadu stuvata A gamaH || 8.3.14
udu tye madhumattamA giraH stomAsa Irate |satrAjito dhanasA akShitotayo vAjayanto rathA iva || 8.3.15
kaNvA iva bhR^igavaH sUryA iva vishvamiddhItamAnashuH |indraM stomebhirmahayanta AyavaH priyamedhAso asvaran || 8.3.16
yukShvA hi vR^itrahantama harI indra parAvataH |arvAchIno maghavansomapItaya ugra R^iShvebhirA gahi || 8.3.17
ime hi te kAravo vAvashurdhiyA viprAso medhasAtaye |sa tvaM no maghavannindra girvaNo veno na shR^iNudhI havam || 8.3.18
nirindra bR^ihatIbhyo vR^itraM dhanubhyo asphuraH |nirarbudasya mR^igayasya mAyino niH parvatasya gA AjaH || 8.3.19
niragnayo ruruchurniru sUryo niH soma indriyo rasaH |nirantarikShAdadhamo mahAmahiM kR^iShe tadindra pauMsyam || 8.3.20
yaM me durindro marutaH pAkasthAmA kaurayANaH |vishveShAM tmanA shobhiShThamupeva divi dhAvamAnam || 8.3.21
rohitaM me pAkasthAmA sudhuraM kakShyaprAm |adAdrAyo vibodhanam || 8.3.22
yasmA anye dasha prati dhuraM vahanti vahnayaH |astaM vayo na tugryam || 8.3.23
AtmA pitustanUrvAsa ojodA abhya~njanam |turIyamidrohitasya pAkasthAmAnaM bhojaM dAtAramabravam || 8.3.24

yadindra prAgapAguda~NnyagvA hUyase nR^ibhiH |simA purU nR^iShUto asyAnave.asi prashardha turvashe || 8.4.1
yadvA rume rushame shyAvake kR^ipa indra mAdayase sachA |kaNvAsastvA brahmabhiH stomavAhasa indrA yachChantyA gahi || 8.4.2
yathA gauro apA kR^itaM tR^iShyannetyaveriNam |Apitve naH prapitve tUyamA gahi kaNveShu su sachA piba || 8.4.3
mandantu tvA maghavannindrendavo rAdhodeyAya sunvate |AmuShyA somamapibashchamU sutaM jyeShThaM taddadhiShe sahaH || 8.4.4
pra chakre sahasA saho babha~nja manyumojasA |vishve ta indra pR^itanAyavo yaho ni vR^ikShA iva yemire || 8.4.5
sahasreNeva sachate yavIyudhA yasta AnaLupastutim |putraM prAvargaM kR^iNute suvIrye dAshnoti nama{}uktibhiH || 8.4.6
mA bhema mA shramiShmograsya sakhye tava |mahatte vR^iShNo abhichakShyaM kR^itaM pashyema turvashaM yadum || 8.4.7
savyAmanu sphigyaM vAvase vR^iShA na dAno asya roShati |madhvA sampR^iktAH sAragheNa dhenavastUyamehi dravA piba || 8.4.8
ashvI rathI surUpa idgomA.N idindra te sakhA |shvAtrabhAjA vayasA sachate sadA chandro yAti sabhAmupa || 8.4.9
R^ishyo na tR^iShyannavapAnamA gahi pibA somaM vashA.N anu |nimeghamAno maghavandivediva ojiShThaM dadhiShe sahaH || 8.4.10
adhvaryo drAvayA tvaM somamindraH pipAsati |upa nUnaM yuyuje vR^iShaNA harI A cha jagAma vR^itrahA || 8.4.11
svayaM chitsa manyate dAshurirjano yatrA somasya tR^impasi |idaM te annaM yujyaM samukShitaM tasyehi pra dravA piba || 8.4.12
ratheShThAyAdhvaryavaH somamindrAya sotana |adhi bradhnasyAdrayo vi chakShate sunvanto dAshvadhvaram || 8.4.13
upa bradhnaM vAvAtA vR^iShaNA harI indramapasu vakShataH |arvA~nchaM tvA saptayo.adhvarashriyo vahantu savanedupa || 8.4.14
pra pUShaNaM vR^iNImahe yujyAya purUvasum |sa shakra shikSha puruhUta no dhiyA tuje rAye vimochana || 8.4.15
saM naH shishIhi bhurijoriva kShuraM rAsva rAyo vimochana |tve tannaH suvedamusriyaM vasu yaM tvaM hinoShi martyam || 8.4.16
vemi tvA pUShannR^i~njase vemi stotava AghR^iNe |na tasya vemyaraNaM hi tadvaso stuShe pajrAya sAmne || 8.4.17
parA gAvo yavasaM kachchidAghR^iNe nityaM rekNo amartya |asmAkaM pUShannavitA shivo bhava maMhiShTho vAjasAtaye || 8.4.18
sthUraM rAdhaH shatAshvaM kuru~Ngasya diviShTiShu |rAj~nastveShasya subhagasya rAtiShu turvasheShvamanmahi || 8.4.19
dhIbhiH sAtAni kANvasya vAjinaH priyamedhairabhidyubhiH |ShaShTiM sahasrAnu nirmajAmaje niryUthAni gavAmR^iShiH || 8.4.20
vR^ikShAshchinme abhipitve arAraNuH |gAM bhajanta mehanAshvaM bhajanta mehanA || 8.4.21

dUrAdiheva yatsatyaruNapsurashishvitat |vi bhAnuM vishvadhAtanat || 8.5.1
nR^ivaddasrA manoyujA rathena pR^ithupAjasA |sachethe ashvinoShasam || 8.5.2
yuvAbhyAM vAjinIvasU prati stomA adR^ikShata |vAchaM dUto yathohiShe || 8.5.3
purupriyA Na Utaye purumandrA purUvasU |stuShe kaNvAso ashvinA || 8.5.4
maMhiShThA vAjasAtameShayantA shubhaspatI |gantArA dAshuSho gR^iham || 8.5.5
tA sudevAya dAshuShe sumedhAmavitAriNIm |ghR^itairgavyUtimukShatam || 8.5.6
A naH stomamupa dravattUyaM shyenebhirAshubhiH |yAtamashvebhirashvinA || 8.5.7
yebhistisraH parAvato divo vishvAni rochanA |trI.NraktUnparidIyathaH || 8.5.8
uta no gomatIriSha uta sAtIraharvidA |vi pathaH sAtaye sitam || 8.5.9
A no gomantamashvinA suvIraM surathaM rayim |voLhamashvAvatIriShaH || 8.5.10
vAvR^idhAnA shubhaspatI dasrA hiraNyavartanI |pibataM somyaM madhu || 8.5.11
asmabhyaM vAjinIvasU maghavadbhyashcha saprathaH |ChardiryantamadAbhyam || 8.5.12
ni Shu brahma janAnAM yAviShTaM tUyamA gatam |mo ShvanyA.N upAratam || 8.5.13
asya pibatamashvinA yuvaM madasya chAruNaH |madhvo rAtasya dhiShNyA || 8.5.14
asme A vahataM rayiM shatavantaM sahasriNam |purukShuM vishvadhAyasam || 8.5.15
purutrA chiddhi vAM narA vihvayante manIShiNaH |vAghadbhirashvinA gatam || 8.5.16
janAso vR^iktabarhiSho haviShmanto araMkR^itaH |yuvAM havante ashvinA || 8.5.17
asmAkamadya vAmayaM stomo vAhiShTho antamaH |yuvAbhyAM bhUtvashvinA || 8.5.18
yo ha vAM madhuno dR^itirAhito rathacharShaNe |tataH pibatamashvinA || 8.5.19
tena no vAjinIvasU pashve tokAya shaM gave |vahataM pIvarIriShaH || 8.5.20
uta no divyA iSha uta sindhU.NraharvidA |apa dvAreva varShathaH || 8.5.21
kadA vAM taugryo vidhatsamudre jahito narA |yadvAM ratho vibhiShpatAt || 8.5.22
yuvaM kaNvAya nAsatyA R^ipiriptAya harmye |shashvadUtIrdashasyathaH || 8.5.23
tAbhirA yAtamUtibhirnavyasIbhiH sushastibhiH |yadvAM vR^iShaNvasU huve || 8.5.24
yathA chitkaNvamAvataM priyamedhamupastutam |atriM shi~njAramashvinA || 8.5.25
yathota kR^itvye dhaneM.ashuM goShvagastyam |yathA vAjeShu sobharim || 8.5.26
etAvadvAM vR^iShaNvasU ato vA bhUyo ashvinA |gR^iNantaH sumnamImahe || 8.5.27
rathaM hiraNyavandhuraM hiraNyAbhIshumashvinA |A hi sthAtho divispR^isham || 8.5.28
hiraNyayI vAM rabhirIShA akSho hiraNyayaH |ubhA chakrA hiraNyayA || 8.5.29
tena no vAjinIvasU parAvatashchidA gatam |upemAM suShTutiM mama || 8.5.30
A vahethe parAkAtpUrvIrashnantAvashvinA |iSho dAsIramartyA || 8.5.31
A no dyumnairA shravobhirA rAyA yAtamashvinA |purushchandrA nAsatyA || 8.5.32
eha vAM pruShitapsavo vayo vahantu parNinaH |achChA svadhvaraM janam || 8.5.33
rathaM vAmanugAyasaM ya iShA vartate saha |na chakramabhi bAdhate || 8.5.34
hiraNyayena rathena dravatpANibhirashvaiH |dhIjavanA nAsatyA || 8.5.35
yuvaM mR^igaM jAgR^ivAMsaM svadatho vA vR^iShaNvasU |tA naH pR^i~NktamiShA rayim || 8.5.36
tA me ashvinA sanInAM vidyAtaM navAnAm |yathA chichchaidyaH kashuH shatamuShTrAnAM dadatsahasrA dasha gonAm || 8.5.37
yo me hiraNyasaMdR^isho dasha rAj~no amaMhata |adhaspadA ichchaidyasya kR^iShTayashcharmamnA abhito janAH || 8.5.38
mAkirenA pathA gAdyeneme yanti chedayaH |anyo netsUrirohate bhUridAvattaro janaH || 8.5.39

mahA.N indro ya ojasA parjanyo vR^iShTimA.N iva |stomairvatsasya vAvR^idhe || 8.6.1
prajAmR^itasya piprataH pra yadbharanta vahnayaH |viprA R^itasya vAhasA || 8.6.2
kaNvA indraM yadakrata stomairyaj~nasya sAdhanam |jAmi bruvata Ayudham || 8.6.3
samasya manyave visho vishvA namanta kR^iShTayaH |samudrAyeva sindhavaH || 8.6.4
ojastadasya titviSha ubhe yatsamavartayat |indrashcharmeva rodasI || 8.6.5
vi chidvR^itrasya dodhato vajreNa shataparvaNA |shiro bibheda vR^iShNinA || 8.6.6
imA abhi pra Nonumo vipAmagreShu dhItayaH |agneH shochirna didyutaH || 8.6.7
guhA satIrupa tmanA pra yachChochanta dhItayaH |kaNvA R^itasya dhArayA || 8.6.8
pra tamindra nashImahi rayiM gomantamashvinam |pra brahma pUrvachittaye || 8.6.9
ahamiddhi pituShpari medhAmR^itasya jagrabha |ahaM sUrya ivAjani || 8.6.10
ahaM pratnena manmanA giraH shumbhAmi kaNvavat |yenendraH shuShmamiddadhe || 8.6.11
ye tvAmindra na tuShTuvurR^iShayo ye cha tuShTuvuH |mamedvardhasva suShTutaH || 8.6.12
yadasya manyuradhvanIdvi vR^itraM parvasho rujan |apaH samudramairayat || 8.6.13
ni shuShNa indra dharNasiM vajraM jaghantha dasyavi |vR^iShA hyugra shR^iNviShe || 8.6.14
na dyAva indramojasA nAntarikShANi vajriNam |na vivyachanta bhUmayaH || 8.6.15
yasta indra mahIrapaH stabhUyamAna Ashayat |ni taM padyAsu shishnathaH || 8.6.16
ya ime rodasI mahI samIchI samajagrabhIt |tamobhirindra taM guhaH || 8.6.17
ya indra yatayastvA bhR^igavo ye cha tuShTuvuH |mamedugra shrudhI havam || 8.6.18
imAsta indra pR^ishnayo ghR^itaM duhata Ashiram |enAmR^itasya pipyuShIH || 8.6.19
yA indra prasvastvAsA garbhamachakriran |pari dharmeva sUryam || 8.6.20
tvAmichChavasaspate kaNvA ukthena vAvR^idhuH |tvAM sutAsa indavaH || 8.6.21
tavedindra praNItiShUta prashastiradrivaH |yaj~no vitantasAyyaH || 8.6.22
A na indra mahImiShaM puraM na darShi gomatIm |uta prajAM suvIryam || 8.6.23
uta tyadAshvashvyaM yadindra nAhuShIShvA |agre vikShu pradIdayat || 8.6.24
abhi vrajaM na tatniShe sUra upAkachakShasam |yadindra mR^iLayAsi naH || 8.6.25
yada~Nga taviShIyasa indra prarAjasi kShitIH |mahA.N apAra ojasA || 8.6.26
taM tvA haviShmatIrvisha upa bruvata Utaye |urujrayasamindubhiH || 8.6.27
upahvare girINAM saMgathe cha nadInAm |dhiyA vipro ajAyata || 8.6.28
ataH samudramudvatashchikitvA.N ava pashyati |yato vipAna ejati || 8.6.29
Aditpratnasya retaso jyotiShpashyanti vAsaram |paro yadidhyate divA || 8.6.30
kaNvAsa indra te matiM vishve vardhanti pauMsyam |uto shaviShTha vR^iShNyam || 8.6.31
imAM ma indra suShTutiM juShasva pra su mAmava |uta pra vardhayA matim || 8.6.32
uta brahmaNyA vayaM tubhyaM pravR^iddha vajrivaH |viprA atakShma jIvase || 8.6.33
abhi kaNvA anUShatApo na pravatA yatIH |indraM vananvatI matiH || 8.6.34
indramukthAni vAvR^idhuH samudramiva sindhavaH |anuttamanyumajaram || 8.6.35
A no yAhi parAvato haribhyAM haryatAbhyAm |imamindra sutaM piba || 8.6.36
tvAmidvR^itrahantama janAso vR^iktabarhiShaH |havante vAjasAtaye || 8.6.37
anu tvA rodasI ubhe chakraM na vartyetasham |anu suvAnAsa indavaH || 8.6.38
mandasvA su svarNara utendra sharyaNAvati |matsvA vivasvato matI || 8.6.39
vAvR^idhAna upa dyavi vR^iShA vajryaroravIt |vR^itrahA somapAtamaH || 8.6.40
R^iShirhi pUrvajA asyeka IshAna ojasA |indra choShkUyase vasu || 8.6.41
asmAkaM tvA sutA.N upa vItapR^iShThA abhi prayaH |shataM vahantu harayaH || 8.6.42
imAM su pUrvyAM dhiyaM madhorghR^itasya pipyuShIm |kaNvA ukthena vAvR^idhuH || 8.6.43
indramidvimahInAM medhe vR^iNIta martyaH |indraM saniShyurUtaye || 8.6.44
arvA~nchaM tvA puruShTuta priyamedhastutA harI |somapeyAya vakShataH || 8.6.45
shatamahaM tirindire sahasraM parshAvA dade |rAdhAMsi yAdvAnAm || 8.6.46
trINi shatAnyarvatAM sahasrA dasha gonAm |daduShpajrAya sAmne || 8.6.47
udAnaT kakuho divamuShTrA~nchaturyujo dadat |shravasA yAdvaM janam || 8.6.48

pra yadvastriShTubhamiShaM maruto vipro akSharat |vi parvateShu rAjatha || 8.7.1
yada~Nga taviShIyavo yAmaM shubhrA achidhvam |ni parvatA ahAsata || 8.7.2
udIrayanta vAyubhirvAshrAsaH pR^ishnimAtaraH |dhukShanta pipyuShImiSham || 8.7.3
vapanti maruto mihaM pra vepayanti parvatAn |yadyAmaM yAnti vAyubhiH || 8.7.4
ni yadyAmAya vo girirni sindhavo vidharmaNe |mahe shuShmAya yemire || 8.7.5
yuShmA.N u naktamUtaye yuShmAndivA havAmahe |yuShmAnprayatyadhvare || 8.7.6
udu tye aruNapsavashchitrA yAmebhirIrate |vAshrA adhi ShNunA divaH || 8.7.7
sR^ijanti rashmimojasA panthAM sUryAya yAtave |te bhAnubhirvi tasthire || 8.7.8
imAM me maruto giramimaM stomamR^ibhukShaNaH |imaM me vanatA havam || 8.7.9
trINi sarAMsi pR^ishnayo duduhre vajriNe madhu |utsaM kavandhamudriNam || 8.7.10
maruto yaddha vo divaH sumnAyanto havAmahe |A tU na upa gantana || 8.7.11
yUyaM hi ShThA sudAnavo rudrA R^ibhukShaNo dame |uta prachetaso made || 8.7.12
A no rayiM madachyutaM purukShuM vishvadhAyasam |iyartA maruto divaH || 8.7.13
adhIva yadgirINAM yAmaM shubhrA achidhvam |suvAnairmandadhva indubhiH || 8.7.14
etAvatashchideShAM sumnaM bhikSheta martyaH |adAbhyasya manmabhiH || 8.7.15
ye drapsA iva rodasI dhamantyanu vR^iShTibhiH |utsaM duhanto akShitam || 8.7.16
udu svAnebhirIrata udrathairudu vAyubhiH |utstomaiH pR^ishnimAtaraH || 8.7.17
yenAva turvashaM yaduM yena kaNvaM dhanaspR^itam |rAye su tasya dhImahi || 8.7.18
imA u vaH sudAnavo ghR^itaM na pipyuShIriShaH |vardhAnkANvasya manmabhiH || 8.7.19
kva nUnaM sudAnavo madathA vR^iktabarhiShaH |brahmA ko vaH saparyati || 8.7.20
nahi Shma yaddha vaH purA stomebhirvR^iktabarhiShaH |shardhA.N R^itasya jinvatha || 8.7.21
samu tye mahatIrapaH saM kShoNI samu sUryam |saM vajraM parvasho dadhuH || 8.7.22
vi vR^itraM parvasho yayurvi parvatA.N arAjinaH |chakrANA vR^iShNi pauMsyam || 8.7.23
anu tritasya yudhyataH shuShmamAvannuta kratum |anvindraM vR^itratUrye || 8.7.24
vidyuddhastA abhidyavaH shiprAH shIrShanhiraNyayIH |shubhrA vya~njata shriye || 8.7.25
ushanA yatparAvata ukShNo randhramayAtana |dyaurna chakradadbhiyA || 8.7.26
A no makhasya dAvane.ashvairhiraNyapANibhiH |devAsa upa gantana || 8.7.27
yadeShAM pR^iShatI rathe praShTirvahati rohitaH |yAnti shubhrA riNannapaH || 8.7.28
suShome sharyaNAvatyArjIke pastyAvati |yayurnichakrayA naraH || 8.7.29
kadA gachChAtha maruta itthA vipraM havamAnam |mArDIkebhirnAdhamAnam || 8.7.30
kaddha nUnaM kadhapriyo yadindramajahAtana |ko vaH sakhitva ohate || 8.7.31
saho Shu No vajrahastaiH kaNvAso agniM marudbhiH |stuShe hiraNyavAshIbhiH || 8.7.32
o Shu vR^iShNaH prayajyUnA navyase suvitAya |vavR^ityAM chitravAjAn || 8.7.33
girayashchinni jihate parshAnAso manyamAnAH |parvatAshchinni yemire || 8.7.34
AkShNayAvAno vahantyantarikSheNa patataH |dhAtAraH stuvate vayaH || 8.7.35
agnirhi jAni pUrvyashChando na sUro archiShA |te bhAnubhirvi tasthire || 8.7.36

A no vishvAbhirUtibhirashvinA gachChataM yuvam |dasrA hiraNyavartanI pibataM somyaM madhu || 8.8.1
A nUnaM yAtamashvinA rathena sUryatvachA |bhujI hiraNyapeshasA kavI gambhIrachetasA || 8.8.2
A yAtaM nahuShasparyAntarikShAtsuvR^iktibhiH |pibAtho ashvinA madhu kaNvAnAM savane sutam || 8.8.3
A no yAtaM divasparyAntarikShAdadhapriyA |putraH kaNvasya vAmiha suShAva somyaM madhu || 8.8.4
A no yAtamupashrutyashvinA somapItaye |svAhA stomasya vardhanA pra kavI dhItibhirnarA || 8.8.5
yachchiddhi vAM pura R^iShayo juhUre.avase narA |A yAtamashvinA gatamupemAM suShTutiM mama || 8.8.6
divashchidrochanAdadhyA no gantaM svarvidA |dhIbhirvatsaprachetasA stomebhirhavanashrutA || 8.8.7
kimanye paryAsate.asmatstomebhirashvinA |putraH kaNvasya vAmR^iShirgIrbhirvatso avIvR^idhat || 8.8.8
A vAM vipra ihAvase.ahvatstomebhirashvinA |ariprA vR^itrahantamA tA no bhUtaM mayobhuvA || 8.8.9
A yadvAM yoShaNA rathamatiShThadvAjinIvasU |vishvAnyashvinA yuvaM pra dhItAnyagachChatam || 8.8.10
ataH sahasranirNijA rathenA yAtamashvinA |vatso vAM madhumadvacho.ashaMsItkAvyaH kaviH || 8.8.11
purumandrA purUvasU manotarA rayINAm |stomaM me ashvinAvimamabhi vahnI anUShAtAm || 8.8.12
A no vishvAnyashvinA dhattaM rAdhAMsyahrayA |kR^itaM na R^itviyAvato mA no rIradhataM nide || 8.8.13
yannAsatyA parAvati yadvA stho adhyambare |ataH sahasranirNijA rathenA yAtamashvinA || 8.8.14
yo vAM nAsatyAvR^iShirgIrbhirvatso avIvR^idhat |tasmai sahasranirNijamiShaM dhattaM ghR^itashchutam || 8.8.15
prAsmA UrjaM ghR^itashchutamashvinA yachChataM yuvam |yo vAM sumnAya tuShTavadvasUyAddAnunaspatI || 8.8.16
A no gantaM rishAdasemaM stomaM purubhujA |kR^itaM naH sushriyo naremA dAtamabhiShTaye || 8.8.17
A vAM vishvAbhirUtibhiH priyamedhA ahUShata |rAjantAvadhvarANAmashvinA yAmahUtiShu || 8.8.18
A no gantaM mayobhuvAshvinA shambhuvA yuvam |yo vAM vipanyU dhItibhirgIrbhirvatso avIvR^idhat || 8.8.19
yAbhiH kaNvaM medhAtithiM yAbhirvashaM dashavrajam |yAbhirgosharyamAvataM tAbhirno.avataM narA || 8.8.20
yAbhirnarA trasadasyumAvataM kR^itvye dhane |tAbhiH ShvasmA.N ashvinA prAvataM vAjasAtaye || 8.8.21
pra vAM stomAH suvR^iktayo giro vardhantvashvinA |purutrA vR^itrahantamA tA no bhUtaM puruspR^ihA || 8.8.22
trINi padAnyashvinorAviH sAnti guhA paraH |kavI R^itasya patmabhirarvAgjIvebhyaspari || 8.8.23

A nUnamashvinA yuvaM vatsasya gantamavase |prAsmai yachChatamavR^ikaM pR^ithu chChardiryuyutaM yA arAtayaH || 8.9.1
yadantarikShe yaddivi yatpa~ncha mAnuShA.N anu |nR^imNaM taddhattamashvinA || 8.9.2
ye vAM daMsAMsyashvinA viprAsaH parimAmR^ishuH |evetkANvasya bodhatam || 8.9.3
ayaM vAM gharmo ashvinA stomena pari Shichyate |ayaM somo madhumAnvAjinIvasU yena vR^itraM chiketathaH || 8.9.4
yadapsu yadvanaspatau yadoShadhIShu purudaMsasA kR^itam |tena mAviShTamashvinA || 8.9.5
yannAsatyA bhuraNyatho yadvA deva bhiShajyathaH |ayaM vAM vatso matibhirna vindhate haviShmantaM hi gachChathaH || 8.9.6
A nUnamashvinorR^iShiH stomaM chiketa vAmayA |A somaM madhumattamaM gharmaM si~nchAdatharvaNi || 8.9.7
A nUnaM raghuvartaniM rathaM tiShThAtho ashvinA |A vAM stomA ime mama nabho na chuchyavIrata || 8.9.8
yadadya vAM nAsatyokthairAchuchyuvImahi |yadvA vANIbhirashvinevetkANvasya bodhatam || 8.9.9
yadvAM kakShIvA.N uta yadvyashva R^iShiryadvAM dIrghatamA juhAva |pR^ithI yadvAM vainyaH sAdaneShvevedato ashvinA chetayethAm || 8.9.10
yAtaM ChardiShpA uta naH paraspA bhUtaM jagatpA uta nastanUpA |vartistokAya tanayAya yAtam || 8.9.11
yadindreNa sarathaM yAtho ashvinA yadvA vAyunA bhavathaH samokasA |yadAdityebhirR^ibhubhiH sajoShasA yadvA viShNorvikramaNeShu tiShThathaH || 8.9.12
yadadyAshvinAvahaM huveya vAjasAtaye |yatpR^itsu turvaNe sahastachChreShThamashvinoravaH || 8.9.13
A nUnaM yAtamashvinemA havyAni vAM hitA |ime somAso adhi turvashe yadAvime kaNveShu vAmatha || 8.9.14
yannAsatyA parAke arvAke asti bheShajam |tena nUnaM vimadAya prachetasA ChardirvatsAya yachChatam || 8.9.15
abhutsyu pra devyA sAkaM vAchAhamashvinoH |vyAvardevyA matiM vi rAtiM martyebhyaH || 8.9.16
pra bodhayoSho ashvinA pra devi sUnR^ite mahi |pra yaj~nahotarAnuShakpra madAya shravo bR^ihat || 8.9.17
yaduSho yAsi bhAnunA saM sUryeNa rochase |A hAyamashvino ratho vartiryAti nR^ipAyyam || 8.9.18
yadApItAso aMshavo gAvo na duhra UdhabhiH |yadvA vANIranUShata pra devayanto ashvinA || 8.9.19
pra dyumnAya pra shavase pra nR^iShAhyAya sharmaNe |pra dakShAya prachetasA || 8.9.20
yannUnaM dhIbhirashvinA pituryonA niShIdathaH |yadvA sumnebhirukthyA || 8.9.21

yatstho dIrghaprasadmani yadvAdo rochane divaH |yadvA samudre adhyAkR^ite gR^ihe.ata A yAtamashvinA || 8.10.1
yadvA yaj~naM manave sammimikShathurevetkANvasya bodhatam |bR^ihaspatiM vishvAndevA.N ahaM huva indrAviShNU ashvinAvAshuheShasA || 8.10.2
tyA nvashvinA huve sudaMsasA gR^ibhe kR^itA |yayorasti pra NaH sakhyaM deveShvadhyApyam || 8.10.3
yayoradhi pra yaj~nA asUre santi sUrayaH |tA yaj~nasyAdhvarasya prachetasA svadhAbhiryA pibataH somyaM madhu || 8.10.4
yadadyAshvinAvapAgyatprAkstho vAjinIvasU |yaddruhyavyanavi turvashe yadau huve vAmatha mA gatam || 8.10.5
yadantarikShe patathaH purubhujA yadveme rodasI anu |yadvA svadhAbhiradhitiShThatho rathamata A yAtamashvinA || 8.10.6

tvamagne vratapA asi deva A martyeShvA |tvaM yaj~neShvIDyaH || 8.11.1
tvamasi prashasyo vidatheShu sahantya |agne rathIradhvarANAm || 8.11.2
sa tvamasmadapa dviSho yuyodhi jAtavedaH |adevIragne arAtIH || 8.11.3
anti chitsantamaha yaj~naM martasya ripoH |nopa veShi jAtavedaH || 8.11.4
martA amartyasya te bhUri nAma manAmahe |viprAso jAtavedasaH || 8.11.5
vipraM viprAso.avase devaM martAsa Utaye |agniM gIrbhirhavAmahe || 8.11.6
A te vatso mano yamatparamAchchitsadhasthAt |agne tvAMkAmayA girA || 8.11.7
purutrA hi sadR^i~N~Nasi visho vishvA anu prabhuH |samatsu tvA havAmahe || 8.11.8
samatsvagnimavase vAjayanto havAmahe |vAjeShu chitrarAdhasam || 8.11.9
pratno hi kamIDyo adhvareShu sanAchcha hotA navyashcha satsi |svAM chAgne tanvaM piprayasvAsmabhyaM cha saubhagamA yajasva || 8.11.10

ya indra somapAtamo madaH shaviShTha chetati |yenA haMsi nyatriNaM tamImahe || 8.12.1
yenA dashagvamadhriguM vepayantaM svarNaram |yenA samudramAvithA tamImahe || 8.12.2
yena sindhuM mahIrapo rathA.N iva prachodayaH |panthAmR^itasya yAtave tamImahe || 8.12.3
imaM stomamabhiShTaye ghR^itaM na pUtamadrivaH |yenA nu sadya ojasA vavakShitha || 8.12.4
imaM juShasva girvaNaH samudra iva pinvate |indra vishvAbhirUtibhirvavakShitha || 8.12.5
yo no devaH parAvataH sakhitvanAya mAmahe |divo na vR^iShTiM prathayanvavakShitha || 8.12.6
vavakShurasya ketavo uta vajro gabhastyoH |yatsUryo na rodasI avardhayat || 8.12.7
yadi pravR^iddha satpate sahasraM mahiShA.N aghaH |Aditta indriyaM mahi pra vAvR^idhe || 8.12.8
indraH sUryasya rashmibhirnyarshasAnamoShati |agnirvaneva sAsahiH pra vAvR^idhe || 8.12.9
iyaM ta R^itviyAvatI dhItireti navIyasI |saparyantI purupriyA mimIta it || 8.12.10
garbho yaj~nasya devayuH kratuM punIta AnuShak |stomairindrasya vAvR^idhe mimIta it || 8.12.11
sanirmitrasya papratha indraH somasya pItaye |prAchI vAshIva sunvate mimIta it || 8.12.12
yaM viprA ukthavAhaso.abhipramandurAyavaH |ghR^itaM na pipya AsanyR^itasya yat || 8.12.13
uta svarAje aditiH stomamindrAya jIjanat |puruprashastamUtaya R^itasya yat || 8.12.14
abhi vahnaya Utaye.anUShata prashastaye |na deva vivratA harI R^itasya yat || 8.12.15
yatsomamindra viShNavi yadvA gha trita Aptye |yadvA marutsu mandase samindubhiH || 8.12.16
yadvA shakra parAvati samudre adhi mandase |asmAkamitsute raNA samindubhiH || 8.12.17
yadvAsi sunvato vR^idho yajamAnasya satpate |ukthe vA yasya raNyasi samindubhiH || 8.12.18
devaMdevaM vo.avasa indramindraM gR^iNIShaNi |adhA yaj~nAya turvaNe vyAnashuH || 8.12.19
yaj~nebhiryaj~navAhasaM somebhiH somapAtamam |hotrAbhirindraM vAvR^idhurvyAnashuH || 8.12.20
mahIrasya praNItayaH pUrvIruta prashastayaH |vishvA vasUni dAshuShe vyAnashuH || 8.12.21
indraM vR^itrAya hantave devAso dadhire puraH |indraM vANIranUShatA samojase || 8.12.22
mahAntaM mahinA vayaM stomebhirhavanashrutam |arkairabhi pra NonumaH samojase || 8.12.23
na yaM vivikto rodasI nAntarikShANi vajriNam |amAdidasya titviShe samojasaH || 8.12.24
yadindra pR^itanAjye devAstvA dadhire puraH |Aditte haryatA harI vavakShatuH || 8.12.25
yadA vR^itraM nadIvR^itaM shavasA vajrinnavadhIH |Aditte haryatA harI vavakShatuH || 8.12.26
yadA te viShNurojasA trINi padA vichakrame |Aditte haryatA harI vavakShatuH || 8.12.27
yadA te haryatA harI vAvR^idhAte divedive |Aditte vishvA bhuvanAni yemire || 8.12.28
yadA te mArutIrvishastubhyamindra niyemire |Aditte vishvA bhuvanAni yemire || 8.12.29
yadA sUryamamuM divi shukraM jyotiradhArayaH |Aditte vishvA bhuvanAni yemire || 8.12.30
imAM ta indra suShTutiM vipra iyarti dhItibhiH |jAmiM padeva pipratIM prAdhvare || 8.12.31
yadasya dhAmani priye samIchInAso asvaran |nAbhA yaj~nasya dohanA prAdhvare || 8.12.32
suvIryaM svashvyaM sugavyamindra daddhi naH |hoteva pUrvachittaye prAdhvare || 8.12.33

indraH suteShu someShu kratuM punIta ukthyam |vide vR^idhasya dakShaso mahAnhi ShaH || 8.13.1
sa prathame vyomani devAnAM sadane vR^idhaH |supAraH sushravastamaH samapsujit || 8.13.2
tamahve vAjasAtaya indraM bharAya shuShmiNam |bhavA naH sumne antamaH sakhA vR^idhe || 8.13.3
iyaM ta indra girvaNo rAtiH kSharati sunvataH |mandAno asya barhiSho vi rAjasi || 8.13.4
nUnaM tadindra daddhi no yattvA sunvanta Imahe |rayiM nashchitramA bharA svarvidam || 8.13.5
stotA yatte vicharShaNiratiprashardhayadgiraH |vayA ivAnu rohate juShanta yat || 8.13.6
pratnavajjanayA giraH shR^iNudhI jariturhavam |mademade vavakShithA sukR^itvane || 8.13.7
krILantyasya sUnR^itA Apo na pravatA yatIH |ayA dhiyA ya uchyate patirdivaH || 8.13.8
uto patirya uchyate kR^iShTInAmeka idvashI |namovR^idhairavasyubhiH sute raNa || 8.13.9
stuhi shrutaM vipashchitaM harI yasya prasakShiNA |gantArA dAshuSho gR^ihaM namasvinaH || 8.13.10
tUtujAno mahemate.ashvebhiH pruShitapsubhiH |A yAhi yaj~namAshubhiH shamiddhi te || 8.13.11
indra shaviShTha satpate rayiM gR^iNatsu dhAraya |shravaH sUribhyo amR^itaM vasutvanam || 8.13.12
have tvA sUra udite have madhyaMdine divaH |juShANa indra saptibhirna A gahi || 8.13.13
A tU gahi pra tu drava matsvA sutasya gomataH |tantuM tanuShva pUrvyaM yathA vide || 8.13.14
yachChakrAsi parAvati yadarvAvati vR^itrahan |yadvA samudre andhaso.avitedasi || 8.13.15
indraM vardhantu no gira indraM sutAsa indavaH |indre haviShmatIrvisho arANiShuH || 8.13.16
tamidviprA avasyavaH pravatvatIbhirUtibhiH |indraM kShoNIravardhayanvayA iva || 8.13.17
trikadrukeShu chetanaM devAso yaj~namatnata |tamidvardhantu no giraH sadAvR^idham || 8.13.18
stotA yatte anuvrata ukthAnyR^ituthA dadhe |shuchiH pAvaka uchyate so adbhutaH || 8.13.19
tadidrudrasya chetati yahvaM pratneShu dhAmasu |mano yatrA vi taddadhurvichetasaH || 8.13.20
yadi me sakhyamAvara imasya pAhyandhasaH |yena vishvA ati dviSho atArima || 8.13.21
kadA ta indra girvaNaH stotA bhavAti shaMtamaH |kadA no gavye ashvye vasau dadhaH || 8.13.22
uta te suShTutA harI vR^iShaNA vahato ratham |ajuryasya madintamaM yamImahe || 8.13.23
tamImahe puruShTutaM yahvaM pratnAbhirUtibhiH |ni barhiShi priye sadadadha dvitA || 8.13.24
vardhasvA su puruShTuta R^iShiShTutAbhirUtibhiH |dhukShasva pipyuShImiShamavA cha naH || 8.13.25
indra tvamavitedasItthA stuvato adrivaH |R^itAdiyarmi te dhiyaM manoyujam || 8.13.26
iha tyA sadhamAdyA yujAnaH somapItaye |harI indra pratadvasU abhi svara || 8.13.27
abhi svarantu ye tava rudrAsaH sakShata shriyam |uto marutvatIrvisho abhi prayaH || 8.13.28
imA asya pratUrtayaH padaM juShanta yaddivi |nAbhA yaj~nasya saM dadhuryathA vide || 8.13.29
ayaM dIrghAya chakShase prAchi prayatyadhvare |mimIte yaj~namAnuShagvichakShya || 8.13.30
vR^iShAyamindra te ratha uto te vR^iShaNA harI |vR^iShA tvaM shatakrato vR^iShA havaH || 8.13.31
vR^iShA grAvA vR^iShA mado vR^iShA somo ayaM sutaH |vR^iShA yaj~no yaminvasi vR^iShA havaH || 8.13.32
vR^iShA tvA vR^iShaNaM huve vajri~nchitrAbhirUtibhiH |vAvantha hi pratiShTutiM vR^iShA havaH || 8.13.33

yadindrAhaM yathA tvamIshIya vasva eka it |stotA me goShakhA syAt || 8.14.1
shikSheyamasmai ditseyaM shachIpate manIShiNe |yadahaM gopatiH syAm || 8.14.2
dhenuShTa indra sUnR^itA yajamAnAya sunvate |gAmashvaM pipyuShI duhe || 8.14.3
na te vartAsti rAdhasa indra devo na martyaH |yadditsasi stuto magham || 8.14.4
yaj~na indramavardhayadyadbhUmiM vyavartayat |chakrANa opashaM divi || 8.14.5
vAvR^idhAnasya te vayaM vishvA dhanAni jigyuShaH |UtimindrA vR^iNImahe || 8.14.6
vyantarikShamatiranmade somasya rochanA |indro yadabhinadvalam || 8.14.7
udgA Ajada~Ngirobhya AviShkR^iNvanguhA satIH |arvA~nchaM nunude valam || 8.14.8
indreNa rochanA divo dR^iLhAni dR^iMhitAni cha |sthirANi na parANude || 8.14.9
apAmUrmirmadanniva stoma indrAjirAyate |vi te madA arAjiShuH || 8.14.10
tvaM hi stomavardhana indrAsyukthavardhanaH |stotR^INAmuta bhadrakR^it || 8.14.11
indramitkeshinA harI somapeyAya vakShataH |upa yaj~naM surAdhasam || 8.14.12
apAM phenena namucheH shira indrodavartayaH |vishvA yadajayaH spR^idhaH || 8.14.13
mAyAbhirutsisR^ipsata indra dyAmArurukShataH |ava dasyU.NradhUnuthAH || 8.14.14
asunvAmindra saMsadaM viShUchIM vyanAshayaH |somapA uttaro bhavan || 8.14.15

tamvabhi pra gAyata puruhUtaM puruShTutam |indraM gIrbhistaviShamA vivAsata || 8.15.1
yasya dvibarhaso bR^ihatsaho dAdhAra rodasI |girI.NrajrA.N apaH svarvR^iShatvanA || 8.15.2
sa rAjasi puruShTuta.N eko vR^itrANi jighnase |indra jaitrA shravasyA cha yantave || 8.15.3
taM te madaM gR^iNImasi vR^iShaNaM pR^itsu sAsahim |u lokakR^itnumadrivo harishriyam || 8.15.4
yena jyotIMShyAyave manave cha viveditha |mandAno asya barhiSho vi rAjasi || 8.15.5
tadadyA chitta ukthino.anu ShTuvanti pUrvathA |vR^iShapatnIrapo jayA divedive || 8.15.6
tava tyadindriyaM bR^ihattava shuShmamuta kratum |vajraM shishAti dhiShaNA vareNyam || 8.15.7
tava dyaurindra pauMsyaM pR^ithivI vardhati shravaH |tvAmApaH parvatAsashcha hinvire || 8.15.8
tvAM viShNurbR^ihankShayo mitro gR^iNAti varuNaH |tvAM shardho madatyanu mArutam || 8.15.9
tvaM vR^iShA janAnAM maMhiShTha indra jaj~niShe |satrA vishvA svapatyAni dadhiShe || 8.15.10
satrA tvaM puruShTuta.N eko vR^itrANi toshase |nAnya indrAtkaraNaM bhUya invati || 8.15.11
yadindra manmashastvA nAnA havanta Utaye |asmAkebhirnR^ibhiratrA svarjaya || 8.15.12
araM kShayAya no mahe vishvA rUpANyAvishan |indraM jaitrAya harShayA shachIpatim || 8.15.13

pra samrAjaM charShaNInAmindraM stotA navyaM gIrbhiH |naraM nR^iShAhaM maMhiShTham || 8.16.1
yasminnukthAni raNyanti vishvAni cha shravasyA |apAmavo na samudre || 8.16.2
taM suShTutyA vivAse jyeShTharAjaM bhare kR^itnum |maho vAjinaM sanibhyaH || 8.16.3
yasyAnUnA gabhIrA madA uravastarutrAH |harShumantaH shUrasAtau || 8.16.4
tamiddhaneShu hiteShvadhivAkAya havante |yeShAmindraste jayanti || 8.16.5
tamichchyautnairAryanti taM kR^itebhishcharShaNayaH |eSha indro varivaskR^it || 8.16.6
indro brahmendra R^iShirindraH purU puruhUtaH |mahAnmahIbhiH shachIbhiH || 8.16.7
sa stomyaH sa havyaH satyaH satvA tuvikUrmiH |ekashchitsannabhibhUtiH || 8.16.8
tamarkebhistaM sAmabhistaM gAyatraishcharShaNayaH |indraM vardhanti kShitayaH || 8.16.9
praNetAraM vasyo achChA kartAraM jyotiH samatsu |sAsahvAMsaM yudhAmitrAn || 8.16.10
sa naH papriH pArayAti svasti nAvA puruhUtaH |indro vishvA ati dviShaH || 8.16.11
sa tvaM na indra vAjebhirdashasyA cha gAtuyA cha |achChA cha naH sumnaM neShi || 8.16.12

A yAhi suShumA hi ta indra somaM pibA imam |edaM barhiH sado mama || 8.17.1
A tvA brahmayujA harI vahatAmindra keshinA |upa brahmANi naH shR^iNu || 8.17.2
brahmANastvA vayaM yujA somapAmindra sominaH |sutAvanto havAmahe || 8.17.3
A no yAhi sutAvato.asmAkaM suShTutIrupa |pibA su shiprinnandhasaH || 8.17.4
A te si~nchAmi kukShyoranu gAtrA vi dhAvatu |gR^ibhAya jihvayA madhu || 8.17.5
svAduShTe astu saMsude madhumAntanve tava |somaH shamastu te hR^ide || 8.17.6
ayamu tvA vicharShaNe janIrivAbhi saMvR^itaH |pra soma indra sarpatu || 8.17.7
tuvigrIvo vapodaraH subAhurandhaso made |indro vR^itrANi jighnate || 8.17.8
indra prehi purastvaM vishvasyeshAna ojasA |vR^itrANi vR^itraha~njahi || 8.17.9
dIrghaste astva~Nkusho yenA vasu prayachChasi |yajamAnAya sunvate || 8.17.10
ayaM ta indra somo nipUto adhi barhiShi |ehImasya dravA piba || 8.17.11
shAchigo shAchipUjanAyaM raNAya te sutaH |AkhaNDala pra hUyase || 8.17.12
yaste shR^i~NgavR^iSho napAtpraNapAtkuNDapAyyaH |nyasmindadhra A manaH || 8.17.13
vAstoShpate dhruvA sthUNAMsatraM somyAnAm |drapso bhettA purAM shashvatInAmindro munInAM sakhA || 8.17.14
pR^idAkusAnuryajato gaveShaNa ekaH sannabhi bhUyasaH |bhUrNimashvaM nayattujA puro gR^ibhendraM somasya pItaye || 8.17.15

idaM ha nUnameShAM sumnaM bhikSheta martyaH |AdityAnAmapUrvyaM savImani || 8.18.1
anarvANo hyeShAM panthA AdityAnAm |adabdhAH santi pAyavaH sugevR^idhaH || 8.18.2
tatsu naH savitA bhago varuNo mitro aryamA |sharma yachChantu sapratho yadImahe || 8.18.3
devebhirdevyadite.ariShTabharmannA gahi |smatsUribhiH purupriye susharmabhiH || 8.18.4
te hi putrAso aditervidurdveShAMsi yotave |aMhoshchiduruchakrayo.anehasaH || 8.18.5
aditirno divA pashumaditirnaktamadvayAH |aditiH pAtvaMhasaH sadAvR^idhA || 8.18.6
uta syA no divA matiraditirUtyA gamat |sA shaMtAti mayaskaradapa sridhaH || 8.18.7
uta tyA daivyA bhiShajA shaM naH karato ashvinA |yuyuyAtAmito rapo apa sridhaH || 8.18.8
shamagniragnibhiH karachChaM nastapatu sUryaH |shaM vAto vAtvarapA apa sridhaH || 8.18.9
apAmIvAmapa sridhamapa sedhata durmatim |AdityAso yuyotanA no aMhasaH || 8.18.10
yuyotA sharumasmadA.N AdityAsa utAmatim |R^idhagdveShaH kR^iNuta vishvavedasaH || 8.18.11
tatsu naH sharma yachChatAdityA yanmumochati |enasvantaM chidenasaH sudAnavaH || 8.18.12
yo naH kashchidririkShati rakShastvena martyaH |svaiH Sha evai ririShIShTa yurjanaH || 8.18.13
samittamaghamashnavadduHshaMsaM martyaM ripum |yo asmatrA durhaNAvA.N upa dvayuH || 8.18.14
pAkatrA sthana devA hR^itsu jAnItha martyam |upa dvayuM chAdvayuM cha vasavaH || 8.18.15
A sharma parvatAnAmotApAM vR^iNImahe |dyAvAkShAmAre asmadrapaskR^itam || 8.18.16
te no bhadreNa sharmaNA yuShmAkaM nAvA vasavaH |ati vishvAni duritA pipartana || 8.18.17
tuche tanAya tatsu no drAghIya AyurjIvase |AdityAsaH sumahasaH kR^iNotana || 8.18.18
yaj~no hILo vo antara AdityA asti mR^iLata |yuShme idvo api Shmasi sajAtye || 8.18.19
bR^ihadvarUthaM marutAM devaM trAtAramashvinA |mitramImahe varuNaM svastaye || 8.18.20
aneho mitrAryamannR^ivadvaruNa shaMsyam |trivarUthaM maruto yanta nashChardiH || 8.18.21
ye chiddhi mR^ityubandhava AdityA manavaH smasi |pra sU na AyurjIvase tiretana || 8.18.22

taM gUrdhayA svarNaraM devAso devamaratiM dadhanvire |devatrA havyamohire || 8.19.1
vibhUtarAtiM vipra chitrashochiShamagnimILiShva yanturam |asya medhasya somyasya sobhare premadhvarAya pUrvyam || 8.19.2
yajiShThaM tvA vavR^imahe devaM devatrA hotAramamartyam |asya yaj~nasya sukratum || 8.19.3
Urjo napAtaM subhagaM sudIditimagniM shreShThashochiSham |sa no mitrasya varuNasya so apAmA sumnaM yakShate divi || 8.19.4
yaH samidhA ya AhutI yo vedena dadAsha marto agnaye |yo namasA svadhvaraH || 8.19.5
tasyedarvanto raMhayanta Ashavastasya dyumnitamaM yashaH |na tamaMho devakR^itaM kutashchana na martyakR^itaM nashat || 8.19.6
svagnayo vo agnibhiH syAma sUno sahasa UrjAM pate |suvIrastvamasmayuH || 8.19.7
prashaMsamAno atithirna mitriyo.agnI ratho na vedyaH |tve kShemAso api santi sAdhavastvaM rAjA rayINAm || 8.19.8
so addhA dAshvadhvaro.agne martaH subhaga sa prashaMsyaH |sa dhIbhirastu sanitA || 8.19.9
yasya tvamUrdhvo adhvarAya tiShThasi kShayadvIraH sa sAdhate |so arvadbhiH sanitA sa vipanyubhiH sa shUraiH sanitA kR^itam || 8.19.10
yasyAgnirvapurgR^ihe stomaM chano dadhIta vishvavAryaH |havyA vA veviShadviShaH || 8.19.11
viprasya vA stuvataH sahaso yaho makShUtamasya rAtiShu |avodevamuparimartyaM kR^idhi vaso vividuSho vachaH || 8.19.12
yo agniM havyadAtibhirnamobhirvA sudakShamAvivAsati |girA vAjirashochiSham || 8.19.13
samidhA yo nishitI dAshadaditiM dhAmabhirasya martyaH |vishvetsa dhIbhiH subhago janA.N ati dyumnairudna iva tAriShat || 8.19.14
tadagne dyumnamA bhara yatsAsahatsadane kaM chidatriNam |manyuM janasya dUDhyaH || 8.19.15
yena chaShTe varuNo mitro aryamA yena nAsatyA bhagaH |vayaM tatte shavasA gAtuvittamA indratvotA vidhemahi || 8.19.16
te ghedagne svAdhyo ye tvA vipra nidadhire nR^ichakShasam |viprAso deva sukratum || 8.19.17
ta idvediM subhaga ta AhutiM te sotuM chakrire divi |ta idvAjebhirjigyurmahaddhanaM ye tve kAmaM nyerire || 8.19.18
bhadro no agnirAhuto bhadrA rAtiH subhaga bhadro adhvaraH |bhadrA uta prashastayaH || 8.19.19
bhadraM manaH kR^iNuShva vR^itratUrye yenA samatsu sAsahaH |ava sthirA tanuhi bhUri shardhatAM vanemA te abhiShTibhiH || 8.19.20
ILe girA manurhitaM yaM devA dUtamaratiM nyerire |yajiShThaM havyavAhanam || 8.19.21
tigmajambhAya taruNAya rAjate prayo gAyasyagnaye |yaH piMshate sUnR^itAbhiH suvIryamagnirghR^itebhirAhutaH || 8.19.22
yadI ghR^itebhirAhuto vAshImagnirbharata uchchAva cha |asura iva nirNijam || 8.19.23
yo havyAnyairayatA manurhito deva AsA sugandhinA |vivAsate vAryANi svadhvaro hotA devo amartyaH || 8.19.24
yadagne martyastvaM syAmahaM mitramaho amartyaH |sahasaH sUnavAhuta || 8.19.25
na tvA rAsIyAbhishastaye vaso na pApatvAya santya |na me stotAmatIvA na durhitaH syAdagne na pApayA || 8.19.26
piturna putraH subhR^ito duroNa A devA.N etu pra No haviH || 8.19.27
tavAhamagna UtibhirnediShThAbhiH sacheya joShamA vaso |sadA devasya martyaH || 8.19.28
tava kratvA saneyaM tava rAtibhiragne tava prashastibhiH |tvAmidAhuH pramatiM vaso mamAgne harShasva dAtave || 8.19.29
pra so agne tavotibhiH suvIrAbhistirate vAjabharmabhiH |yasya tvaM sakhyamAvaraH || 8.19.30
tava drapso nIlavAnvAsha R^itviya indhAnaH siShNavA dade |tvaM mahInAmuShasAmasi priyaH kShapo vastuShu rAjasi || 8.19.31
tamAganma sobharayaH sahasramuShkaM svabhiShTimavase |samrAjaM trAsadasyavam || 8.19.32
yasya te agne anye agnaya upakShito vayA iva |vipo na dyumnA ni yuve janAnAM tava kShatrANi vardhayan || 8.19.33
yamAdityAso adruhaH pAraM nayatha martyam |maghonAM vishveShAM sudAnavaH || 8.19.34
yUyaM rAjAnaH kaM chichcharShaNIsahaH kShayantaM mAnuShA.N anu |vayaM te vo varuNa mitrAryamansyAmedR^itasya rathyaH || 8.19.35
adAnme paurukutsyaH pa~nchAshataM trasadasyurvadhUnAm |maMhiShTho aryaH satpatiH || 8.19.36
uta me prayiyorvayiyoH suvAstvA adhi tugvani |tisR^INAM saptatInAM shyAvaH praNetA bhuvadvasurdiyAnAM patiH || 8.19.37

A gantA mA riShaNyata prasthAvAno mApa sthAtA samanyavaH |sthirA chinnamayiShNavaH || 8.20.1
vILupavibhirmaruta R^ibhukShaNa A rudrAsaH sudItibhiH |iShA no adyA gatA puruspR^iho yaj~namA sobharIyavaH || 8.20.2
vidmA hi rudriyANAM shuShmamugraM marutAM shimIvatAm |viShNoreShasya mILhuShAm || 8.20.3
vi dvIpAni pApatantiShThadduchChunobhe yujanta rodasI |pra dhanvAnyairata shubhrakhAdayo yadejatha svabhAnavaH || 8.20.4
achyutA chidvo ajmannA nAnadati parvatAso vanaspatiH |bhUmiryAmeShu rejate || 8.20.5
amAya vo maruto yAtave dyaurjihIta uttarA bR^ihat |yatrA naro dedishate tanUShvA tvakShAMsi bAhvojasaH || 8.20.6
svadhAmanu shriyaM naro mahi tveShA amavanto vR^iShapsavaH |vahante ahrutapsavaH || 8.20.7
gobhirvANo ajyate sobharINAM rathe koshe hiraNyaye |gobandhavaH sujAtAsa iShe bhuje mahAnto naH sparase nu || 8.20.8
prati vo vR^iShada~njayo vR^iShNe shardhAya mArutAya bharadhvam |havyA vR^iShaprayAvNe || 8.20.9
vR^iShaNashvena maruto vR^iShapsunA rathena vR^iShanAbhinA |A shyenAso na pakShiNo vR^ithA naro havyA no vItaye gata || 8.20.10
samAnama~njyeShAM vi bhrAjante rukmAso adhi bAhuShu |davidyutatyR^iShTayaH || 8.20.11
ta ugrAso vR^iShaNa ugrabAhavo nakiShTanUShu yetire |sthirA dhanvAnyAyudhA ratheShu vo.anIkeShvadhi shriyaH || 8.20.12
yeShAmarNo na sapratho nAma tveShaM shashvatAmekamidbhuje |vayo na pitryaM sahaH || 8.20.13
tAnvandasva marutastA.N upa stuhi teShAM hi dhunInAm |arANAM na charamastadeShAM dAnA mahnA tadeShAm || 8.20.14
subhagaH sa va UtiShvAsa pUrvAsu maruto vyuShTiShu |yo vA nUnamutAsati || 8.20.15
yasya vA yUyaM prati vAjino nara A havyA vItaye gatha |abhi Sha dyumnairuta vAjasAtibhiH sumnA vo dhUtayo nashat || 8.20.16
yathA rudrasya sUnavo divo vashantyasurasya vedhasaH |yuvAnastathedasat || 8.20.17
ye chArhanti marutaH sudAnavaH smanmILhuShashcharanti ye |atashchidA na upa vasyasA hR^idA yuvAna A vavR^idhvam || 8.20.18
yUna U Shu naviShThayA vR^iShNaH pAvakA.N abhi sobhare girA |gAya gA iva charkR^iShat || 8.20.19
sAhA ye santi muShTiheva havyo vishvAsu pR^itsu hotR^iShu |vR^iShNashchandrAnna sushravastamAngirA vandasva maruto aha || 8.20.20
gAvashchidghA samanyavaH sajAtyena marutaH sabandhavaH |rihate kakubho mithaH || 8.20.21
martashchidvo nR^itavo rukmavakShasa upa bhrAtR^itvamAyati |adhi no gAta marutaH sadA hi va Apitvamasti nidhruvi || 8.20.22
maruto mArutasya na A bheShajasya vahatA sudAnavaH |yUyaM sakhAyaH saptayaH || 8.20.23
yAbhiH sindhumavatha yAbhistUrvatha yAbhirdashasyathA krivim |mayo no bhUtotibhirmayobhuvaH shivAbhirasachadviShaH || 8.20.24
yatsindhau yadasiknyAM yatsamudreShu marutaH subarhiShaH |yatparvateShu bheShajam || 8.20.25
vishvaM pashyanto bibhR^ithA tanUShvA tenA no adhi vochata |kShamA rapo maruta Aturasya na iShkartA vihrutaM punaH || 8.20.26

vayamu tvAmapUrvya sthUraM na kachchidbharanto.avasyavaH |vAje chitraM havAmahe || 8.21.1
upa tvA karmannUtaye sa no yuvograshchakrAma yo dhR^iShat |tvAmiddhyavitAraM vavR^imahe sakhAya indra sAnasim || 8.21.2
A yAhIma indavo.ashvapate gopata urvarApate |somaM somapate piba || 8.21.3
vayaM hi tvA bandhumantamabandhavo viprAsa indra yemima |yA te dhAmAni vR^iShabha tebhirA gahi vishvebhiH somapItaye || 8.21.4
sIdantaste vayo yathA goshrIte madhau madire vivakShaNe |abhi tvAmindra nonumaH || 8.21.5
achChA cha tvainA namasA vadAmasi kiM muhushchidvi dIdhayaH |santi kAmAso harivo dadiShTvaM smo vayaM santi no dhiyaH || 8.21.6
nUtnA idindra te vayamUtI abhUma nahi nU te adrivaH |vidmA purA parINasaH || 8.21.7
vidmA sakhitvamuta shUra bhojyamA te tA vajrinnImahe |uto samasminnA shishIhi no vaso vAje sushipra gomati || 8.21.8
yo na idamidaM purA pra vasya AninAya tamu vaH stuShe |sakhAya indramUtaye || 8.21.9
haryashvaM satpatiM charShaNIsahaM sa hi ShmA yo amandata |A tu naH sa vayati gavyamashvyaM stotR^ibhyo maghavA shatam || 8.21.10
tvayA ha svidyujA vayaM prati shvasantaM vR^iShabha bruvImahi |saMsthe janasya gomataH || 8.21.11
jayema kAre puruhUta kAriNo.abhi tiShThema dUDhyaH |nR^ibhirvR^itraM hanyAma shUshuyAma chAverindra pra No dhiyaH || 8.21.12
abhrAtR^ivyo anA tvamanApirindra januShA sanAdasi |yudhedApitvamichChase || 8.21.13
nakI revantaM sakhyAya vindase pIyanti te surAshvaH |yadA kR^iNoShi nadanuM samUhasyAditpiteva hUyase || 8.21.14
mA te amAjuro yathA mUrAsa indra sakhye tvAvataH |ni ShadAma sachA sute || 8.21.15
mA te godatra nirarAma rAdhasa indra mA te gR^ihAmahi |dR^iLhA chidaryaH pra mR^ishAbhyA bhara na te dAmAna Adabhe || 8.21.16
indro vA ghediyanmaghaM sarasvatI vA subhagA dadirvasu |tvaM vA chitra dAshuShe || 8.21.17
chitra idrAjA rAjakA idanyake yake sarasvatImanu |parjanya iva tatanaddhi vR^iShTyA sahasramayutA dadat || 8.21.18

o tyamahva A rathamadyA daMsiShThamUtaye |yamashvinA suhavA rudravartanI A sUryAyai tasthathuH || 8.22.1
pUrvAyuShaM suhavaM puruspR^ihaM bhujyuM vAjeShu pUrvyam |sachanAvantaM sumatibhiH sobhare vidveShasamanehasam || 8.22.2
iha tyA purubhUtamA devA namobhirashvinA |arvAchInA svavase karAmahe gantArA dAshuSho gR^iham || 8.22.3
yuvo rathasya pari chakramIyata IrmAnyadvAmiShaNyati |asmA.N achChA sumatirvAM shubhaspatI A dhenuriva dhAvatu || 8.22.4
ratho yo vAM trivandhuro hiraNyAbhIshurashvinA |pari dyAvApR^ithivI bhUShati shrutastena nAsatyA gatam || 8.22.5
dashasyantA manave pUrvyaM divi yavaM vR^ikeNa karShathaH |tA vAmadya sumatibhiH shubhaspatI ashvinA pra stuvImahi || 8.22.6
upa no vAjinIvasU yAtamR^itasya pathibhiH |yebhistR^ikShiM vR^iShaNA trAsadasyavaM mahe kShatrAya jinvathaH || 8.22.7
ayaM vAmadribhiH sutaH somo narA vR^iShaNvasU |A yAtaM somapItaye pibataM dAshuSho gR^ihe || 8.22.8
A hi ruhatamashvinA rathe koshe hiraNyaye vR^iShaNvasU |yu~njAthAM pIvarIriShaH || 8.22.9
yAbhiH pakthamavatho yAbhiradhriguM yAbhirbabhruM vijoShasam |tAbhirno makShU tUyamashvinA gataM bhiShajyataM yadAturam || 8.22.10
yadadhrigAvo adhrigU idA chidahno ashvinA havAmahe |vayaM gIrbhirvipanyavaH || 8.22.11
tAbhirA yAtaM vR^iShaNopa me havaM vishvapsuM vishvavAryam |iShA maMhiShThA purubhUtamA narA yAbhiH kriviM vAvR^idhustAbhirA gatam || 8.22.12
tAvidA chidahAnAM tAvashvinA vandamAna upa bruve |tA u namobhirImahe || 8.22.13
tAviddoShA tA uShasi shubhaspatI tA yAmanrudravartanI |mA no martAya ripave vAjinIvasU paro rudrAvati khyatam || 8.22.14
A sugmyAya sugmyaM prAtA rathenAshvinA vA sakShaNI |huve piteva sobharI || 8.22.15
manojavasA vR^iShaNA madachyutA makShuMgamAbhirUtibhiH |ArAttAchchidbhUtamasme avase pUrvIbhiH purubhojasA || 8.22.16
A no ashvAvadashvinA vartiryAsiShTaM madhupAtamA narA |gomaddasrA hiraNyavat || 8.22.17
suprAvargaM suvIryaM suShThu vAryamanAdhR^iShTaM rakShasvinA |asminnA vAmAyAne vAjinIvasU vishvA vAmAni dhImahi || 8.22.18

ILiShvA hi pratIvyaM yajasva jAtavedasam |chariShNudhUmamagR^ibhItashochiSham || 8.23.1
dAmAnaM vishvacharShaNe.agniM vishvamano girA |uta stuShe viShpardhaso rathAnAm || 8.23.2
yeShAmAbAdha R^igmiya iShaH pR^ikShashcha nigrabhe |upavidA vahnirvindate vasu || 8.23.3
udasya shochirasthAddIdiyuSho vyajaram |tapurjambhasya sudyuto gaNashriyaH || 8.23.4
udu tiShTha svadhvara stavAno devyA kR^ipA |abhikhyA bhAsA bR^ihatA shushukvaniH || 8.23.5
agne yAhi sushastibhirhavyA juhvAna AnuShak |yathA dUto babhUtha havyavAhanaH || 8.23.6
agniM vaH pUrvyaM huve hotAraM charShaNInAm |tamayA vAchA gR^iNe tamu vaH stuShe || 8.23.7
yaj~nebhiradbhutakratuM yaM kR^ipA sUdayanta it |mitraM na jane sudhitamR^itAvani || 8.23.8
R^itAvAnamR^itAyavo yaj~nasya sAdhanaM girA |upo enaM jujuShurnamasaspade || 8.23.9
achChA no a~NgirastamaM yaj~nAso yantu saMyataH |hotA yo asti vikShvA yashastamaH || 8.23.10
agne tava tye ajarendhAnAso bR^ihadbhAH |ashvA iva vR^iShaNastaviShIyavaH || 8.23.11
sa tvaM na UrjAM pate rayiM rAsva suvIryam |prAva nastoke tanaye samatsvA || 8.23.12
yadvA u vishpatiH shitaH suprIto manuSho vishi |vishvedagniH prati rakShAMsi sedhati || 8.23.13
shruShTyagne navasya me stomasya vIra vishpate |ni mAyinastapuShA rakShaso daha || 8.23.14
na tasya mAyayA chana ripurIshIta martyaH |yo agnaye dadAsha havyadAtibhiH || 8.23.15
vyashvastvA vasuvidamukShaNyuraprINAdR^iShiH |maho rAye tamu tvA samidhImahi || 8.23.16
ushanA kAvyastvA ni hotAramasAdayat |AyajiM tvA manave jAtavedasam || 8.23.17
vishve hi tvA sajoShaso devAso dUtamakrata |shruShTI deva prathamo yaj~niyo bhuvaH || 8.23.18
imaM ghA vIro amR^itaM dUtaM kR^iNvIta martyaH |pAvakaM kR^iShNavartaniM vihAyasam || 8.23.19
taM huvema yatasruchaH subhAsaM shukrashochiSham |vishAmagnimajaraM pratnamIDyam || 8.23.20
yo asmai havyadAtibhirAhutiM marto.avidhat |bhUri poShaM sa dhatte vIravadyashaH || 8.23.21
prathamaM jAtavedasamagniM yaj~neShu pUrvyam |prati srugeti namasA haviShmatI || 8.23.22
AbhirvidhemAgnaye jyeShThAbhirvyashvavat |maMhiShThAbhirmatibhiH shukrashochiShe || 8.23.23
nUnamarcha vihAyase stomebhiH sthUrayUpavat |R^iShe vaiyashva damyAyAgnaye || 8.23.24
atithiM mAnuShANAM sUnuM vanaspatInAm |viprA agnimavase pratnamILate || 8.23.25
maho vishvA.N abhi Shato.abhi havyAni mAnuShA |agne ni Shatsi namasAdhi barhiShi || 8.23.26
vaMsvA no vAryA puru vaMsva rAyaH puruspR^ihaH |suvIryasya prajAvato yashasvataH || 8.23.27
tvaM varo suShAmNe.agne janAya chodaya |sadA vaso rAtiM yaviShTha shashvate || 8.23.28
tvaM hi supratUrasi tvaM no gomatIriShaH |maho rAyaH sAtimagne apA vR^idhi || 8.23.29
agne tvaM yashA asyA mitrAvaruNA vaha |R^itAvAnA samrAjA pUtadakShasA || 8.23.30

sakhAya A shiShAmahi brahmendrAya vajriNe |stuSha U Shu vo nR^itamAya dhR^iShNave || 8.24.1
shavasA hyasi shruto vR^itrahatyena vR^itrahA |maghairmaghono ati shUra dAshasi || 8.24.2
sa naH stavAna A bhara rayiM chitrashravastamam |nireke chidyo harivo vasurdadiH || 8.24.3
A nirekamuta priyamindra darShi janAnAm |dhR^iShatA dhR^iShNo stavamAna A bhara || 8.24.4
na te savyaM na dakShiNaM hastaM varanta AmuraH |na paribAdho harivo gaviShTiShu || 8.24.5
A tvA gobhiriva vrajaM gIrbhirR^iNomyadrivaH |A smA kAmaM jariturA manaH pR^iNa || 8.24.6
vishvAni vishvamanaso dhiyA no vR^itrahantama |ugra praNetaradhi ShU vaso gahi || 8.24.7
vayaM te asya vR^itrahanvidyAma shUra navyasaH |vasoH spArhasya puruhUta rAdhasaH || 8.24.8
indra yathA hyasti te.aparItaM nR^ito shavaH |amR^iktA rAtiH puruhUta dAshuShe || 8.24.9
A vR^iShasva mahAmaha mahe nR^itama rAdhase |dR^iLhashchiddR^ihya maghavanmaghattaye || 8.24.10
nU anyatrA chidadrivastvanno jagmurAshasaH |maghava~nChagdhi tava tanna UtibhiH || 8.24.11
nahya~Nga nR^ito tvadanyaM vindAmi rAdhase |rAye dyumnAya shavase cha girvaNaH || 8.24.12
endumindrAya si~nchata pibAti somyaM madhu |pra rAdhasA chodayAte mahitvanA || 8.24.13
upo harINAM patiM dakShaM pR^i~nchantamabravam |nUnaM shrudhi stuvato ashvyasya || 8.24.14
nahya~Nga purA chana jaj~ne vIratarastvat |nakI rAyA naivathA na bhandanA || 8.24.15
edu madhvo madintaraM si~ncha vAdhvaryo andhasaH |evA hi vIraH stavate sadAvR^idhaH || 8.24.16
indra sthAtarharINAM nakiShTe pUrvyastutim |udAnaMsha shavasA na bhandanA || 8.24.17
taM vo vAjAnAM patimahUmahi shravasyavaH |aprAyubhiryaj~nebhirvAvR^idhenyam || 8.24.18
eto nvindraM stavAma sakhAyaH stomyaM naram |kR^iShTIryo vishvA abhyastyeka it || 8.24.19
agorudhAya gaviShe dyukShAya dasmyaM vachaH |ghR^itAtsvAdIyo madhunashcha vochata || 8.24.20
yasyAmitAni vIryA na rAdhaH paryetave |jyotirna vishvamabhyasti dakShiNA || 8.24.21
stuhIndraM vyashvavadanUrmiM vAjinaM yamam |aryo gayaM maMhamAnaM vi dAshuShe || 8.24.22
evA nUnamupa stuhi vaiyashva dashamaM navam |suvidvAMsaM charkR^ityaM charaNInAm || 8.24.23
vetthA hi nirR^itInAM vajrahasta parivR^ijam |aharahaH shundhyuH paripadAmiva || 8.24.24
tadindrAva A bhara yenA daMsiShTha kR^itvane |dvitA kutsAya shishnatho ni chodaya || 8.24.25
tamu tvA nUnamImahe navyaM daMsiShTha sanyase |sa tvaM no vishvA abhimAtIH sakShaNiH || 8.24.26
ya R^ikShAdaMhaso muchadyo vAryAtsapta sindhuShu |vadhardAsasya tuvinR^imNa nInamaH || 8.24.27
yathA varo suShAmNe sanibhya Avaho rayim |vyashvebhyaH subhage vAjinIvati || 8.24.28
A nAryasya dakShiNA vyashvA.N etu sominaH |sthUraM cha rAdhaH shatavatsahasravat || 8.24.29
yattvA pR^ichChAdIjAnaH kuhayA kuhayAkR^ite |eSho apashrito valo gomatImava tiShThati || 8.24.30

tA vAM vishvasya gopA devA deveShu yaj~niyA |R^itAvAnA yajase pUtadakShasA || 8.25.1
mitrA tanA na rathyA varuNo yashcha sukratuH |sanAtsujAtA tanayA dhR^itavratA || 8.25.2
tA mAtA vishvavedasAsuryAya pramahasA |mahI jajAnAditirR^itAvarI || 8.25.3
mahAntA mitrAvaruNA samrAjA devAvasurA |R^itAvAnAvR^itamA ghoShato bR^ihat || 8.25.4
napAtA shavaso mahaH sUnU dakShasya sukratU |sR^ipradAnU iSho vAstvadhi kShitaH || 8.25.5
saM yA dAnUni yemathurdivyAH pArthivIriShaH |nabhasvatIrA vAM charantu vR^iShTayaH || 8.25.6
adhi yA bR^ihato divo.abhi yUtheva pashyataH |R^itAvAnA samrAjA namase hitA || 8.25.7
R^itAvAnA ni ShedatuH sAmrAjyAya sukratU |dhR^itavratA kShatriyA kShatramAshatuH || 8.25.8
akShNashchidgAtuvittarAnulbaNena chakShasA |ni chinmiShantA nichirA ni chikyatuH || 8.25.9
uta no devyaditiruruShyatAM nAsatyA |uruShyantu maruto vR^iddhashavasaH || 8.25.10
te no nAvamuruShyata divA naktaM sudAnavaH |ariShyanto ni pAyubhiH sachemahi || 8.25.11
aghnate viShNave vayamariShyantaH sudAnave |shrudhi svayAvansindho pUrvachittaye || 8.25.12
tadvAryaM vR^iNImahe variShThaM gopayatyam |mitro yatpAnti varuNo yadaryamA || 8.25.13
uta naH sindhurapAM tanmarutastadashvinA |indro viShNurmIDhvAMsaH sajoShasaH || 8.25.14
te hi ShmA vanuSho naro.abhimAtiM kayasya chit |tigmaM na kShodaH pratighnanti bhUrNayaH || 8.25.15
ayameka itthA purUru chaShTe vi vishpatiH |tasya vratAnyanu vashcharAmasi || 8.25.16
anu pUrvANyokyA sAmrAjyasya sashchima |mitrasya vratA varuNasya dIrghashrut || 8.25.17
pari yo rashminA divo.antAnmame pR^ithivyAH |ubhe A paprau rodasI mahitvA || 8.25.18
udu Shya sharaNe divo jyotirayaMsta sUryaH |agnirna shukraH samidhAna AhutaH || 8.25.19
vacho dIrghaprasadmanIshe vAjasya gomataH |Ishe hi pitvo.aviShasya dAvane || 8.25.20
tatsUryaM rodasI ubhe doShA vastorupa bruve |bhojeShvasmA.N abhyuchcharA sadA || 8.25.21
R^ijramukShaNyAyane rajataM harayANe |rathaM yuktamasanAma suShAmaNi || 8.25.22
tA me ashvyAnAM harINAM nitoshanA |uto nu kR^itvyAnAM nR^ivAhasA || 8.25.23
smadabhIshU kashAvantA viprA naviShThayA matI |maho vAjinAvarvantA sachAsanam || 8.25.24

yuvoru ShU rathaM huve sadhastutyAya sUriShu |atUrtadakShA vR^iShaNA vR^iShaNvasU || 8.26.1
yuvaM varo suShAmNe mahe tane nAsatyA |avobhiryAtho vR^iShaNA vR^iShaNvasU || 8.26.2
tA vAmadya havAmahe havyebhirvAjinIvasU |pUrvIriSha iShayantAvati kShapaH || 8.26.3
A vAM vAhiShTho ashvinA ratho yAtu shruto narA |upa stomAnturasya darshathaH shriye || 8.26.4
juhurANA chidashvinA manyethAM vR^iShaNvasU |yuvaM hi rudrA parShatho ati dviShaH || 8.26.5
dasrA hi vishvamAnuSha~NmakShUbhiH paridIyathaH |dhiyaMjinvA madhuvarNA shubhaspatI || 8.26.6
upa no yAtamashvinA rAyA vishvapuShA saha |maghavAnA suvIrAvanapachyutA || 8.26.7
A me asya pratIvyamindranAsatyA gatam |devA devebhiradya sachanastamA || 8.26.8
vayaM hi vAM havAmaha ukShaNyanto vyashvavat |sumatibhirupa viprAvihA gatam || 8.26.9
ashvinA svR^iShe stuhi kuvitte shravato havam |nedIyasaH kULayAtaH paNI.Nruta || 8.26.10
vaiyashvasya shrutaM naroto me asya vedathaH |sajoShasA varuNo mitro aryamA || 8.26.11
yuvAdattasya dhiShNyA yuvAnItasya sUribhiH |aharaharvR^iShaNa mahyaM shikShatam || 8.26.12
yo vAM yaj~nebhirAvR^ito.adhivastrA vadhUriva |saparyantA shubhe chakrAte ashvinA || 8.26.13
yo vAmuruvyachastamaM chiketati nR^ipAyyam |vartirashvinA pari yAtamasmayU || 8.26.14
asmabhyaM su vR^iShaNvasU yAtaM vartirnR^ipAyyam |viShudruheva yaj~namUhathurgirA || 8.26.15
vAhiShTho vAM havAnAM stomo dUto huvannarA |yuvAbhyAM bhUtvashvinA || 8.26.16
yadado divo arNava iSho vA madatho gR^ihe |shrutaminme amartyA || 8.26.17
uta syA shvetayAvarI vAhiShThA vAM nadInAm |sindhurhiraNyavartaniH || 8.26.18
smadetayA sukIrtyAshvinA shvetayA dhiyA |vahethe shubhrayAvAnA || 8.26.19
yukShvA hi tvaM rathAsahA yuvasva poShyA vaso |Anno vAyo madhu pibAsmAkaM savanA gahi || 8.26.20
tava vAyavR^itaspate tvaShTurjAmAtaradbhuta |avAMsyA vR^iNImahe || 8.26.21
tvaShTurjAmAtaraM vayamIshAnaM rAya Imahe |sutAvanto vAyuM dyumnA janAsaH || 8.26.22
vAyo yAhi shivA divo vahasvA su svashvyam |vahasva mahaH pR^ithupakShasA rathe || 8.26.23
tvAM hi supsarastamaM nR^iShadaneShu hUmahe |grAvANaM nAshvapR^iShThaM maMhanA || 8.26.24
sa tvaM no deva manasA vAyo mandAno agriyaH |kR^idhi vAjA.N apo dhiyaH || 8.26.25

agnirukthe purohito grAvANo barhiradhvare |R^ichA yAmi maruto brahmaNaspatiM devA.N avo vareNyam || 8.27.1
A pashuM gAsi pR^ithivIM vanaspatInuShAsA naktamoShadhIH |vishve cha no vasavo vishvavedaso dhInAM bhUta prAvitAraH || 8.27.2
pra sU na etvadhvaro.agnA deveShu pUrvyaH |AdityeShu pra varuNe dhR^itavrate marutsu vishvabhAnuShu || 8.27.3
vishve hi ShmA manave vishvavedaso bhuvanvR^idhe rishAdasaH |ariShTebhiH pAyubhirvishvavedaso yantA no.avR^ikaM ChardiH || 8.27.4
A no adya samanaso gantA vishve sajoShasaH |R^ichA girA maruto devyadite sadane pastye mahi || 8.27.5
abhi priyA maruto yA vo ashvyA havyA mitra prayAthana |A barhirindro varuNasturA nara AdityAsaH sadantu naH || 8.27.6
vayaM vo vR^iktabarhiSho hitaprayasa AnuShak |sutasomAso varuNa havAmahe manuShvadiddhAgnayaH || 8.27.7
A pra yAta maruto viShNo ashvinA pUShanmAkInayA dhiyA |indra A yAtu prathamaH saniShyubhirvR^iShA yo vR^itrahA gR^iNe || 8.27.8
vi no devAso adruho.achChidraM sharma yachChata |na yaddUrAdvasavo nU chidantito varUthamAdadharShati || 8.27.9
asti hi vaH sajAtyaM rishAdaso devAso astyApyam |pra NaH pUrvasmai suvitAya vochata makShU sumnAya navyase || 8.27.10
idA hi va upastutimidA vAmasya bhaktaye |upa vo vishvavedaso namasyurA.N asR^ikShyanyAmiva || 8.27.11
udu Shya vaH savitA supraNItayo.asthAdUrdhvo vareNyaH |ni dvipAdashchatuShpAdo arthino.avishranpatayiShNavaH || 8.27.12
devaMdevaM vo.avase devaMdevamabhiShTaye |devaMdevaM huvema vAjasAtaye gR^iNanto devyA dhiyA || 8.27.13
devAso hi ShmA manave samanyavo vishve sAkaM sarAtayaH |te no adya te aparaM tuche tu no bhavantu varivovidaH || 8.27.14
pra vaH shaMsAmyadruhaH saMstha upastutInAm |na taM dhUrtirvaruNa mitra martyaM yo vo dhAmabhyo.avidhat || 8.27.15
pra sa kShayaM tirate vi mahIriSho yo vo varAya dAshati |pra prajAbhirjAyate dharmaNasparyariShTaH sarva edhate || 8.27.16
R^ite sa vindate yudhaH sugebhiryAtyadhvanaH |aryamA mitro varuNaH sarAtayo yaM trAyante sajoShasaH || 8.27.17
ajre chidasmai kR^iNuthA nya~nchanaM durge chidA susaraNam |eShA chidasmAdashaniH paro nu sAsredhantI vi nashyatu || 8.27.18
yadadya sUrya udyati priyakShatrA R^itaM dadha |yannimruchi prabudhi vishvavedaso yadvA madhyaMdine divaH || 8.27.19
yadvAbhipitve asurA R^itaM yate Chardiryema vi dAshuShe |vayaM tadvo vasavo vishvavedasa upa stheyAma madhya A || 8.27.20
yadadya sUra udite yanmadhyaMdina Atuchi |vAmaM dhattha manave vishvavedaso juhvAnAya prachetase || 8.27.21
vayaM tadvaH samrAja A vR^iNImahe putro na bahupAyyam |ashyAma tadAdityA juhvato haviryena vasyo.anashAmahai || 8.27.22

ye triMshati trayasparo devAso barhirAsadan |vidannaha dvitAsanan || 8.28.1
varuNo mitro aryamA smadrAtiShAcho agnayaH |patnIvanto vaShaTkR^itAH || 8.28.2
te no gopA apAchyAsta udakta itthA nyak |purastAtsarvayA vishA || 8.28.3
yathA vashanti devAstathedasattadeShAM nakirA minat |arAvA chana martyaH || 8.28.4
saptAnAM sapta R^iShTayaH sapta dyumnAnyeShAm |sapto adhi shriyo dhire || 8.28.5

babhrureko viShuNaH sUnaro yuvA~njya~Nkte hiraNyayam || 8.29.1
yonimeka A sasAda dyotano.antardeveShu medhiraH || 8.29.2
vAshImeko bibharti hasta AyasImantardeveShu nidhruviH || 8.29.3
vajrameko bibharti hasta AhitaM tena vR^itrANi jighnate || 8.29.4
tigmameko bibharti hasta AyudhaM shuchirugro jalAShabheShajaH || 8.29.5
patha ekaH pIpAya taskaro yathA.N eSha veda nidhInAm || 8.29.6
trINyeka urugAyo vi chakrame yatra devAso madanti || 8.29.7
vibhirdvA charata ekayA saha pra pravAseva vasataH || 8.29.8
sado dvA chakrAte upamA divi samrAjA sarpirAsutI || 8.29.9
archanta eke mahi sAma manvata tena sUryamarochayan || 8.29.10

nahi vo astyarbhako devAso na kumArakaH |vishve satomahAnta it || 8.30.1
iti stutAso asathA rishAdaso ye stha trayashcha triMshachcha |manordevA yaj~niyAsaH || 8.30.2
te nastrAdhvaM te.avata ta u no adhi vochata |mA naH pathaH pitryAnmAnavAdadhi dUraM naiShTa parAvataH || 8.30.3
ye devAsa iha sthana vishve vaishvAnarA uta |asmabhyaM sharma sapratho gave.ashvAya yachChata || 8.30.4

yo yajAti yajAta itsunavachcha pachAti cha |brahmedindrasya chAkanat || 8.31.1
puroLAshaM yo asmai somaM rarata Ashiram |pAdittaM shakro aMhasaH || 8.31.2
tasya dyumA.N asadratho devajUtaH sa shUshuvat |vishvA vanvannamitriyA || 8.31.3
asya prajAvatI gR^ihe.asashchantI divedive |iLA dhenumatI duhe || 8.31.4
yA dampatI samanasA sunuta A cha dhAvataH |devAso nityayAshirA || 8.31.5
prati prAshavyA.N itaH samya~nchA barhirAshAte |na tA vAjeShu vAyataH || 8.31.6
na devAnAmapi hnutaH sumatiM na jugukShataH |shravo bR^ihadvivAsataH || 8.31.7
putriNA tA kumAriNA vishvamAyurvyashnutaH |ubhA hiraNyapeshasA || 8.31.8
vItihotrA kR^itadvasU dashasyantAmR^itAya kam |samUdho romashaM hato deveShu kR^iNuto duvaH || 8.31.9
A sharma parvatAnAM vR^iNImahe nadInAm |A viShNoH sachAbhuvaH || 8.31.10
aitu pUShA rayirbhagaH svasti sarvadhAtamaH |ururadhvA svastaye || 8.31.11
aramatiranarvaNo vishvo devasya manasA |AdityAnAmaneha it || 8.31.12
yathA no mitro aryamA varuNaH santi gopAH |sugA R^itasya panthAH || 8.31.13
agniM vaH pUrvyaM girA devamILe vasUnAm |saparyantaH purupriyaM mitraM na kShetrasAdhasam || 8.31.14
makShU devavato rathaH shUro vA pR^itsu kAsu chit |devAnAM ya inmano yajamAna iyakShatyabhIdayajvano bhuvat || 8.31.15
na yajamAna riShyasi na sunvAna na devayo |devAnAM ya inmano yajamAna iyakShatyabhIdayajvano bhuvat || 8.31.16
