nakiShTaM karmaNA nashanna pra yoShanna yoShati |devAnAM ya inmano yajamAna iyakShatyabhIdayajvano bhuvat || 8.31.17
asadatra suvIryamuta tyadAshvashvyam |devAnAM ya inmano yajamAna iyakShatyabhIdayajvano bhuvat || 8.31.18

pra kR^itAnyR^ijIShiNaH kaNvA indrasya gAthayA |made somasya vochata || 8.32.1
yaH sR^ibindamanarshaniM pipruM dAsamahIshuvam |vadhIdugro riNannapaH || 8.32.2
nyarbudasya viShTapaM varShmANaM bR^ihatastira |kR^iShe tadindra pauMsyam || 8.32.3
prati shrutAya vo dhR^iShattUrNAshaM na gireradhi |huve sushipramUtaye || 8.32.4
sa gorashvasya vi vrajaM mandAnaH somyebhyaH |puraM na shUra darShasi || 8.32.5
yadi me rAraNaH suta ukthe vA dadhase chanaH |ArAdupa svadhA gahi || 8.32.6
vayaM ghA te api Shmasi stotAra indra girvaNaH |tvaM no jinva somapAH || 8.32.7
uta naH pitumA bhara saMrarANo avikShitam |maghavanbhUri te vasu || 8.32.8
uta no gomataskR^idhi hiraNyavato ashvinaH |iLAbhiH saM rabhemahi || 8.32.9
bR^ibadukthaM havAmahe sR^iprakarasnamUtaye |sAdhu kR^iNvantamavase || 8.32.10
yaH saMsthe chichChatakraturAdIM kR^iNoti vR^itrahA |jaritR^ibhyaH purUvasuH || 8.32.11
sa naH shakrashchidA shakaddAnavA.N antarAbharaH |indro vishvAbhirUtibhiH || 8.32.12
yo rAyo.avanirmahAnsupAraH sunvataH sakhA |tamindramabhi gAyata || 8.32.13
AyantAraM mahi sthiraM pR^itanAsu shravojitam |bhUrerIshAnamojasA || 8.32.14
nakirasya shachInAM niyantA sUnR^itAnAm |nakirvaktA na dAditi || 8.32.15
na nUnaM brahmaNAmR^iNaM prAshUnAmasti sunvatAm |na somo apratA pape || 8.32.16
panya idupa gAyata panya ukthAni shaMsata |brahmA kR^iNota panya it || 8.32.17
panya A dardirachChatA sahasrA vAjyavR^itaH |indro yo yajvano vR^idhaH || 8.32.18
vi ShU chara svadhA anu kR^iShTInAmanvAhuvaH |indra piba sutAnAm || 8.32.19
piba svadhainavAnAmuta yastugrye sachA |utAyamindra yastava || 8.32.20
atIhi manyuShAviNaM suShuvAMsamupAraNe |imaM rAtaM sutaM piba || 8.32.21
ihi tisraH parAvata ihi pa~ncha janA.N ati |dhenA indrAvachAkashat || 8.32.22
sUryo rashmiM yathA sR^ijA tvA yachChantu me giraH |nimnamApo na sadhryak || 8.32.23
adhvaryavA tu hi Shi~ncha somaM vIrAya shipriNe |bharA sutasya pItaye || 8.32.24
ya udnaH phaligaM bhinannyaksindhU.NravAsR^ijat |yo goShu pakvaM dhArayat || 8.32.25
ahanvR^itramR^ichIShama aurNavAbhamahIshuvam |himenAvidhyadarbudam || 8.32.26
pra va ugrAya niShTure.aShALhAya prasakShiNe |devattaM brahma gAyata || 8.32.27
yo vishvAnyabhi vratA somasya made andhasaH |indro deveShu chetati || 8.32.28
iha tyA sadhamAdyA harI hiraNyakeshyA |voLhAmabhi prayo hitam || 8.32.29
arvA~nchaM tvA puruShTuta priyamedhastutA harI |somapeyAya vakShataH || 8.32.30

vayaM gha tvA sutAvanta Apo na vR^iktabarhiShaH |pavitrasya prasravaNeShu vR^itrahanpari stotAra Asate || 8.33.1
svaranti tvA sute naro vaso nireka ukthinaH |kadA sutaM tR^iShANa oka A gama indra svabdIva vaMsagaH || 8.33.2
kaNvebhirdhR^iShNavA dhR^iShadvAjaM darShi sahasriNam |pisha~NgarUpaM maghavanvicharShaNe makShU gomantamImahe || 8.33.3
pAhi gAyAndhaso mada indrAya medhyAtithe |yaH sammishlo haryoryaH sute sachA vajrI ratho hiraNyayaH || 8.33.4
yaH suShavyaH sudakShiNa ino yaH sukraturgR^iNe |ya AkaraH sahasrA yaH shatAmagha indro yaH pUrbhidAritaH || 8.33.5
yo dhR^iShito yo.avR^ito yo asti shmashruShu shritaH |vibhUtadyumnashchyavanaH puruShTutaH kratvA gauriva shAkinaH || 8.33.6
ka IM veda sute sachA pibantaM kadvayo dadhe |ayaM yaH puro vibhinattyojasA mandAnaH shipryandhasaH || 8.33.7
dAnA mR^igo na vAraNaH purutrA charathaM dadhe |nakiShTvA ni yamadA sute gamo mahA.NshcharasyojasA || 8.33.8
ya ugraH sannaniShTR^itaH sthiro raNAya saMskR^itaH |yadi stoturmaghavA shR^iNavaddhavaM nendro yoShatyA gamat || 8.33.9
satyamitthA vR^iShedasi vR^iShajUtirno.avR^itaH |vR^iShA hyugra shR^iNviShe parAvati vR^iSho arvAvati shrutaH || 8.33.10
vR^iShaNaste abhIshavo vR^iShA kashA hiraNyayI |vR^iShA ratho maghavanvR^iShaNA harI vR^iShA tvaM shatakrato || 8.33.11
vR^iShA sotA sunotu te vR^iShannR^ijIpinnA bhara |vR^iShA dadhanve vR^iShaNaM nadIShvA tubhyaM sthAtarharINAm || 8.33.12
endra yAhi pItaye madhu shaviShTha somyam |nAyamachChA maghavA shR^iNavadgiro brahmokthA cha sukratuH || 8.33.13
vahantu tvA ratheShThAmA harayo rathayujaH |tirashchidaryaM savanAni vR^itrahannanyeShAM yA shatakrato || 8.33.14
asmAkamadyAntamaM stomaM dhiShva mahAmaha |asmAkaM te savanA santu shaMtamA madAya dyukSha somapAH || 8.33.15
nahi Shastava no mama shAstre anyasya raNyati |yo asmAnvIra Anayat || 8.33.16
indrashchidghA tadabravItstriyA ashAsyaM manaH |uto aha kratuM raghum || 8.33.17
saptI chidghA madachyutA mithunA vahato ratham |eveddhUrvR^iShNa uttarA || 8.33.18
adhaH pashyasva mopari saMtarAM pAdakau hara |mA te kashaplakau dR^ishanstrI hi brahmA babhUvitha || 8.33.19

endra yAhi haribhirupa kaNvasya suShTutim |divo amuShya shAsato divaM yaya divAvaso || 8.34.1
A tvA grAvA vadanniha somI ghoSheNa yachChatu |divo amuShya shAsato divaM yaya divAvaso || 8.34.2
atrA vi nemireShAmurAM na dhUnute vR^ikaH |divo amuShya shAsato divaM yaya divAvaso || 8.34.3
A tvA kaNvA ihAvase havante vAjasAtaye |divo amuShya shAsato divaM yaya divAvaso || 8.34.4
dadhAmi te sutAnAM vR^iShNe na pUrvapAyyam |divo amuShya shAsato divaM yaya divAvaso || 8.34.5
smatpuraMdhirna A gahi vishvatodhIrna Utaye |divo amuShya shAsato divaM yaya divAvaso || 8.34.6
A no yAhi mahemate sahasrote shatAmagha |divo amuShya shAsato divaM yaya divAvaso || 8.34.7
A tvA hotA manurhito devatrA vakShadIDyaH |divo amuShya shAsato divaM yaya divAvaso || 8.34.8
A tvA madachyutA harI shyenaM pakSheva vakShataH |divo amuShya shAsato divaM yaya divAvaso || 8.34.9
A yAhyarya A pari svAhA somasya pItaye |divo amuShya shAsato divaM yaya divAvaso || 8.34.10
A no yAhyupashrutyuktheShu raNayA iha |divo amuShya shAsato divaM yaya divAvaso || 8.34.11
sarUpairA su no gahi sambhR^itaiH sambhR^itAshvaH |divo amuShya shAsato divaM yaya divAvaso || 8.34.12
A yAhi parvatebhyaH samudrasyAdhi viShTapaH |divo amuShya shAsato divaM yaya divAvaso || 8.34.13
A no gavyAnyashvyA sahasrA shUra dardR^ihi |divo amuShya shAsato divaM yaya divAvaso || 8.34.14
A naH sahasrasho bharAyutAni shatAni cha |divo amuShya shAsato divaM yaya divAvaso || 8.34.15
A yadindrashcha dadvahe sahasraM vasurochiShaH |ojiShThamashvyaM pashum || 8.34.16
ya R^ijrA vAtaraMhaso.aruShAso raghuShyadaH |bhrAjante sUryA iva || 8.34.17
pArAvatasya rAtiShu dravachchakreShvAshuShu |tiShThaM vanasya madhya A || 8.34.18

agninendreNa varuNena viShNunAdityai rudrairvasubhiH sachAbhuvA |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa cha somaM pibatamashvinA || 8.35.1
vishvAbhirdhIbhirbhuvanena vAjinA divA pR^ithivyAdribhiH sachAbhuvA |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa cha somaM pibatamashvinA || 8.35.2
vishvairdevaistribhirekAdashairihAdbhirmarudbhirbhR^igubhiH sachAbhuvA |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa cha somaM pibatamashvinA || 8.35.3
juShethAM yaj~naM bodhataM havasya me vishveha devau savanAva gachChatam |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa cheShaM no voLhamashvinA || 8.35.4
stomaM juShethAM yuvasheva kanyanAM vishveha devau savanAva gachChatam |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa cheShaM no voLhamashvinA || 8.35.5
giro juShethAmadhvaraM juShethAM vishveha devau savanAva gachChatam |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa cheShaM no voLhamashvinA || 8.35.6
hAridraveva patatho vanedupa somaM sutaM mahiShevAva gachChathaH |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa cha trirvartiryAtamashvinA || 8.35.7
haMsAviva patatho adhvagAviva somaM sutaM mahiShevAva gachChathaH |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa cha trirvartiryAtamashvinA || 8.35.8
shyenAviva patatho havyadAtaye somaM sutaM mahiShevAva gachChathaH |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa cha trirvartiryAtamashvinA || 8.35.9
pibataM cha tR^ipNutaM chA cha gachChataM prajAM cha dhattaM draviNaM cha dhattam |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa chorjaM no dhattamashvinA || 8.35.10
jayataM cha pra stutaM cha pra chAvataM prajAM cha dhattaM draviNaM cha dhattam |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa chorjaM no dhattamashvinA || 8.35.11
hataM cha shatrUnyatataM cha mitriNaH prajAM cha dhattaM draviNaM cha dhattam |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa chorjaM no dhattamashvinA || 8.35.12
mitrAvaruNavantA uta dharmavantA marutvantA jariturgachChatho havam |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa chAdityairyAtamashvinA || 8.35.13
a~NgirasvantA uta viShNuvantA marutvantA jariturgachChatho havam |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa chAdityairyAtamashvinA || 8.35.14
R^ibhumantA vR^iShaNA vAjavantA marutvantA jariturgachChatho havam |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa chAdityairyAtamashvinA || 8.35.15
brahma jinvatamuta jinvataM dhiyo hataM rakShAMsi sedhatamamIvAH |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa cha somaM sunvato ashvinA || 8.35.16
kShatraM jinvatamuta jinvataM nR^InhataM rakShAMsi sedhatamamIvAH |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa cha somaM sunvato ashvinA || 8.35.17
dhenUrjinvatamuta jinvataM visho hataM rakShAMsi sedhatamamIvAH |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa cha somaM sunvato ashvinA || 8.35.18
atreriva shR^iNutaM pUrvyastutiM shyAvAshvasya sunvato madachyutA |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa chAshvinA tiro/ahnyam || 8.35.19
sargA.N iva sR^ijataM suShTutIrupa shyAvAshvasya sunvato madachyutA |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa chAshvinA tiro/ahnyam || 8.35.20
rashmI.Nriva yachChatamadhvarA.N upa shyAvAshvasya sunvato madachyutA |sajoShasA uShasA sUryeNa chAshvinA tiro/ahnyam || 8.35.21
arvAgrathaM ni yachChataM pibataM somyaM madhu |A yAtamashvinA gatamavasyurvAmahaM huve dhattaM ratnAni dAshuShe || 8.35.22
namovAke prasthite adhvare narA vivakShaNasya pItaye |A yAtamashvinA gatamavasyurvAmahaM huve dhattaM ratnAni dAshuShe || 8.35.23
svAhAkR^itasya tR^impataM sutasya devAvandhasaH |A yAtamashvinA gatamavasyurvAmahaM huve dhattaM ratnAni dAshuShe || 8.35.24

avitAsi sunvato vR^iktabarhiShaH pibA somaM madAya kaM shatakrato |yaM te bhAgamadhArayanvishvAH sehAnaH pR^itanA uru jrayaH samapsujinmarutvA.N indra satpate || 8.36.1
prAva stotAraM maghavannava tvAM pibA somaM madAya kaM shatakrato |yaM te bhAgamadhArayanvishvAH sehAnaH pR^itanA uru jrayaH samapsujinmarutvA.N indra satpate || 8.36.2
UrjA devA.N avasyojasA tvAM pibA somaM madAya kaM shatakrato |yaM te bhAgamadhArayanvishvAH sehAnaH pR^itanA uru jrayaH samapsujinmarutvA.N indra satpate || 8.36.3
janitA divo janitA pR^ithivyAH pibA somaM madAya kaM shatakrato |yaM te bhAgamadhArayanvishvAH sehAnaH pR^itanA uru jrayaH samapsujinmarutvA.N indra satpate || 8.36.4
janitAshvAnAM janitA gavAmasi pibA somaM madAya kaM shatakrato |yaM te bhAgamadhArayanvishvAH sehAnaH pR^itanA uru jrayaH samapsujinmarutvA.N indra satpate || 8.36.5
atrINAM stomamadrivo mahaskR^idhi pibA somaM madAya kaM shatakrato |yaM te bhAgamadhArayanvishvAH sehAnaH pR^itanA uru jrayaH samapsujinmarutvA.N indra satpate || 8.36.6
shyAvAshvasya sunvatastathA shR^iNu yathAshR^iNoratreH karmANi kR^iNvataH |pra trasadasyumAvitha tvameka innR^iShAhya indra brahmANi vardhayan || 8.36.7

predaM brahma vR^itratUryeShvAvitha pra sunvataH shachIpata indra vishvAbhirUtibhiH |mAdhyaMdinasya savanasya vR^itrahannanedya pibA somasya vajrivaH || 8.37.1
sehAna ugra pR^itanA abhi druhaH shachIpata indra vishvAbhirUtibhiH |mAdhyaMdinasya savanasya vR^itrahannanedya pibA somasya vajrivaH || 8.37.2
ekarALasya bhuvanasya rAjasi shachIpata indra vishvAbhirUtibhiH |mAdhyaMdinasya savanasya vR^itrahannanedya pibA somasya vajrivaH || 8.37.3
sasthAvAnA yavayasi tvameka ichChachIpata indra vishvAbhirUtibhiH |mAdhyaMdinasya savanasya vR^itrahannanedya pibA somasya vajrivaH || 8.37.4
kShemasya cha prayujashcha tvamIshiShe shachIpata indra vishvAbhirUtibhiH |mAdhyaMdinasya savanasya vR^itrahannanedya pibA somasya vajrivaH || 8.37.5
kShatrAya tvamavasi na tvamAvitha shachIpata indra vishvAbhirUtibhiH |mAdhyaMdinasya savanasya vR^itrahannanedya pibA somasya vajrivaH || 8.37.6
shyAvAshvasya rebhatastathA shR^iNu yathAshR^iNoratreH karmANi kR^iNvataH |pra trasadasyumAvitha tvameka innR^iShAhya indra kShatrANi vardhayan || 8.37.7

yaj~nasya hi stha R^itvijA sasnI vAjeShu karmasu |indrAgnI tasya bodhatam || 8.38.1
toshAsA rathayAvAnA vR^itrahaNAparAjitA |indrAgnI tasya bodhatam || 8.38.2
idaM vAM madiraM madhvadhukShannadribhirnaraH |indrAgnI tasya bodhatam || 8.38.3
juShethAM yaj~namiShTaye sutaM somaM sadhastutI |indrAgnI A gataM narA || 8.38.4
imA juShethAM savanA yebhirhavyAnyUhathuH |indrAgnI A gataM narA || 8.38.5
imAM gAyatravartaniM juShethAM suShTutiM mama |indrAgnI A gataM narA || 8.38.6
prAtaryAvabhirA gataM devebhirjenyAvasU |indrAgnI somapItaye || 8.38.7
shyAvAshvasya sunvato.atrINAM shR^iNutaM havam |indrAgnI somapItaye || 8.38.8
evA vAmahva Utaye yathAhuvanta medhirAH |indrAgnI somapItaye || 8.38.9
AhaM sarasvatIvatorindrAgnyoravo vR^iNe |yAbhyAM gAyatramR^ichyate || 8.38.10

agnimastoShyR^igmiyamagnimILA yajadhyai |agnirdevA.N anaktu na ubhe hi vidathe kavirantashcharati dUtyaM nabhantAmanyake same || 8.39.1
nyagne navyasA vachastanUShu shaMsameShAm |nyarAtI rarAvNAM vishvA aryo arAtIrito yuchChantvAmuro nabhantAmanyake same || 8.39.2
agne manmAni tubhyaM kaM ghR^itaM na juhva Asani |sa deveShu pra chikiddhi tvaM hyasi pUrvyaH shivo dUto vivasvato nabhantAmanyake same || 8.39.3
tattadagnirvayo dadhe yathAyathA kR^ipaNyati |UrjAhutirvasUnAM shaM cha yoshcha mayo dadhe vishvasyai devahUtyai nabhantAmanyake same || 8.39.4
sa chiketa sahIyasAgnishchitreNa karmaNA |sa hotA shashvatInAM dakShiNAbhirabhIvR^ita inoti cha pratIvyaM nabhantAmanyake same || 8.39.5
agnirjAtA devAnAmagnirveda martAnAmapIchyam |agniH sa draviNodA agnirdvArA vyUrNute svAhuto navIyasA nabhantAmanyake same || 8.39.6
agnirdeveShu saMvasuH sa vikShu yaj~niyAsvA |sa mudA kAvyA puru vishvaM bhUmeva puShyati devo deveShu yaj~niyo nabhantAmanyake same || 8.39.7
yo agniH saptamAnuShaH shrito vishveShu sindhuShu |tamAganma tripastyaM mandhAturdasyuhantamamagniM yaj~neShu pUrvyaM nabhantAmanyake same || 8.39.8
agnistrINi tridhAtUnyA kSheti vidathA kaviH |sa trI.NrekAdashA.N iha yakShachcha piprayachcha no vipro dUtaH pariShkR^ito nabhantAmanyake same || 8.39.9
tvaM no agna AyuShu tvaM deveShu pUrvya vasva eka irajyasi |tvAmApaH parisrutaH pari yanti svasetavo nabhantAmanyake same || 8.39.10

indrAgnI yuvaM su naH sahantA dAsatho rayim |yena dR^iLhA samatsvA vILu chitsAhiShImahyagnirvaneva vAta innabhantAmanyake same || 8.40.1
nahi vAM vavrayAmahe.athendramidyajAmahe shaviShThaM nR^iNAM naram |sa naH kadA chidarvatA gamadA vAjasAtaye gamadA medhasAtaye nabhantAmanyake same || 8.40.2
tA hi madhyaM bharANAmindrAgnI adhikShitaH |tA u kavitvanA kavI pR^ichChyamAnA sakhIyate saM dhItamashnutaM narA nabhantAmanyake same || 8.40.3
abhyarcha nabhAkavadindrAgnI yajasA girA |yayorvishvamidaM jagadiyaM dyauH pR^ithivI mahyupasthe bibhR^ito vasu nabhantAmanyake same || 8.40.4
pra brahmANi nabhAkavadindrAgnibhyAmirajyata |yA saptabudhnamarNavaM jihmabAramaporNuta indra IshAna ojasA nabhantAmanyake same || 8.40.5
api vR^ishcha purANavadvratateriva guShpitamojo dAsasya dambhaya |vayaM tadasya sambhR^itaM vasvindreNa vi bhajemahi nabhantAmanyake same || 8.40.6
yadindrAgnI janA ime vihvayante tanA girA |asmAkebhirnR^ibhirvayaM sAsahyAma pR^itanyato vanuyAma vanuShyato nabhantAmanyake same || 8.40.7
yA nu shvetAvavo diva uchcharAta upa dyubhiH |indrAgnyoranu vratamuhAnA yanti sindhavo yAnsIM bandhAdamu~nchatAM nabhantAmanyake same || 8.40.8
pUrvIShTa indropamAtayaH pUrvIruta prashastayaH sUno hinvasya harivaH |vasvo vIrasyApR^icho yA nu sAdhanta no dhiyo nabhantAmanyake same || 8.40.9
taM shishItA suvR^iktibhistveShaM satvAnamR^igmiyam |uto nu chidya ojasA shuShNasyANDAni bhedati jeShatsvarvatIrapo nabhantAmanyake same || 8.40.10
taM shishItA svadhvaraM satyaM satvAnamR^itviyam |uto nu chidya ohata ANDA shuShNasya bhedatyajaiH svarvatIrapo nabhantAmanyake same || 8.40.11
evendrAgnibhyAM pitR^ivannavIyo mandhAtR^ivada~NgirasvadavAchi |tridhAtunA sharmaNA pAtamasmAnvayaM syAma patayo rayINAm || 8.40.12

asmA U Shu prabhUtaye varuNAya marudbhyo.archA viduShTarebhyaH |yo dhItA mAnuShANAM pashvo gA iva rakShati nabhantAmanyake same || 8.41.1
tamU Shu samanA girA pitR^INAM cha manmabhiH |nAbhAkasya prashastibhiryaH sindhUnAmupodaye saptasvasA sa madhyamo nabhantAmanyake same || 8.41.2
sa kShapaH pari Shasvaje nyusro mAyayA dadhe sa vishvaM pari darshataH |tasya venIranu vratamuShastisro avardhayannabhantAmanyake same || 8.41.3
yaH kakubho nidhArayaH pR^ithivyAmadhi darshataH |sa mAtA pUrvyaM padaM tadvaruNasya saptyaM sa hi gopA iveryo nabhantAmanyake same || 8.41.4
yo dhartA bhuvanAnAM ya usrANAmapIchyA veda nAmAni guhyA |sa kaviH kAvyA puru rUpaM dyauriva puShyati nabhantAmanyake same || 8.41.5
yasminvishvAni kAvyA chakre nAbhiriva shritA |tritaM jUtI saparyata vraje gAvo na saMyuje yuje ashvA.N ayukShata nabhantAmanyake same || 8.41.6
ya Asvatka Ashaye vishvA jAtAnyeShAm |pari dhAmAni marmR^ishadvaruNasya puro gaye vishve devA anu vrataM nabhantAmanyake same || 8.41.7
sa samudro apIchyasturo dyAmiva rohati ni yadAsu yajurdadhe |sa mAyA archinA padAstR^iNAnnAkamAruhannabhantAmanyake same || 8.41.8
yasya shvetA vichakShaNA tisro bhUmIradhikShitaH |triruttarANi papraturvaruNasya dhruvaM sadaH sa saptAnAmirajyati nabhantAmanyake same || 8.41.9
yaH shvetA.N adhinirNijashchakre kR^iShNA.N anu vratA |sa dhAma pUrvyaM mame yaH skambhena vi rodasI ajo na dyAmadhArayannabhantAmanyake same || 8.41.10

astabhnAddyAmasuro vishvavedA amimIta varimANaM pR^ithivyAH |AsIdadvishvA bhuvanAni samrADvishvettAni varuNasya vratAni || 8.42.1
evA vandasva varuNaM bR^ihantaM namasyA dhIramamR^itasya gopAm |sa naH sharma trivarUthaM vi yaMsatpAtaM no dyAvApR^ithivI upasthe || 8.42.2
imAM dhiyaM shikShamANasya deva kratuM dakShaM varuNa saM shishAdhi |yayAti vishvA duritA tarema sutarmANamadhi nAvaM ruhema || 8.42.3
A vAM grAvANo ashvinA dhIbhirviprA achuchyavuH |nAsatyA somapItaye nabhantAmanyake same || 8.42.4
yathA vAmatrirashvinA gIrbhirvipro ajohavIt |nAsatyA somapItaye nabhantAmanyake same || 8.42.5
evA vAmahva Utaye yathAhuvanta medhirAH |nAsatyA somapItaye nabhantAmanyake same || 8.42.6

ime viprasya vedhaso.agnerastR^itayajvanaH |giraH stomAsa Irate || 8.43.1
asmai te pratiharyate jAtavedo vicharShaNe |agne janAmi suShTutim || 8.43.2
ArokA iva ghedaha tigmA agne tava tviShaH |dadbhirvanAni bapsati || 8.43.3
harayo dhUmaketavo vAtajUtA upa dyavi |yatante vR^ithagagnayaH || 8.43.4
ete tye vR^ithagagnaya iddhAsaH samadR^ikShata |uShasAmiva ketavaH || 8.43.5
kR^iShNA rajAMsi patsutaH prayANe jAtavedasaH |agniryadrodhati kShami || 8.43.6
dhAsiM kR^iNvAna oShadhIrbapsadagnirna vAyati |punaryantaruNIrapi || 8.43.7
jihvAbhiraha nannamadarchiShA ja~njaNAbhavan |agnirvaneShu rochate || 8.43.8
apsvagne sadhiShTava sauShadhIranu rudhyase |garbhe sa~njAyase punaH || 8.43.9
udagne tava tadghR^itAdarchI rochata Ahutam |niMsAnaM juhvo mukhe || 8.43.10
ukShAnnAya vashAnnAya somapR^iShThAya vedhase |stomairvidhemAgnaye || 8.43.11
uta tvA namasA vayaM hotarvareNyakrato |agne samidbhirImahe || 8.43.12
uta tvA bhR^iguvachChuche manuShvadagna Ahuta |a~NgirasvaddhavAmahe || 8.43.13
tvaM hyagne agninA vipro vipreNa sansatA |sakhA sakhyA samidhyase || 8.43.14
sa tvaM viprAya dAshuShe rayiM dehi sahasriNam |agne vIravatImiSham || 8.43.15
agne bhrAtaH sahaskR^ita rohidashva shuchivrata |imaM stomaM juShasva me || 8.43.16
uta tvAgne mama stuto vAshrAya pratiharyate |goShThaM gAva ivAshata || 8.43.17
tubhyaM tA a~Ngirastama vishvAH sukShitayaH pR^ithak |agne kAmAya yemire || 8.43.18
agniM dhIbhirmanIShiNo medhirAso vipashchitaH |admasadyAya hinvire || 8.43.19
taM tvAmajmeShu vAjinaM tanvAnA agne adhvaram |vahniM hotAramILate || 8.43.20
purutrA hi sadR^i~N~Nasi visho vishvA anu prabhuH |samatsu tvA havAmahe || 8.43.21
tamILiShva ya Ahuto.agnirvibhrAjate ghR^itaiH |imaM naH shR^iNavaddhavam || 8.43.22
taM tvA vayaM havAmahe shR^iNvantaM jAtavedasam |agne ghnantamapa dviShaH || 8.43.23
vishAM rAjAnamadbhutamadhyakShaM dharmaNAmimam |agnimILe sa u shravat || 8.43.24
agniM vishvAyuvepasaM maryaM na vAjinaM hitam |saptiM na vAjayAmasi || 8.43.25
ghnanmR^idhrANyapa dviSho dahanrakShAMsi vishvahA |agne tigmena dIdihi || 8.43.26
yaM tvA janAsa indhate manuShvada~Ngirastama |agne sa bodhi me vachaH || 8.43.27
yadagne divijA asyapsujA vA sahaskR^ita |taM tvA gIrbhirhavAmahe || 8.43.28
tubhyaM ghette janA ime vishvAH sukShitayaH pR^ithak |dhAsiM hinvantyattave || 8.43.29
te ghedagne svAdhyo.ahA vishvA nR^ichakShasaH |tarantaH syAma durgahA || 8.43.30
agniM mandraM purupriyaM shIraM pAvakashochiSham |hR^idbhirmandrebhirImahe || 8.43.31
sa tvamagne vibhAvasuH sR^ijansUryo na rashmibhiH |shardhantamAMsi jighnase || 8.43.32
tatte sahasva Imahe dAtraM yannopadasyati |tvadagne vAryaM vasu || 8.43.33

samidhAgniM duvasyata ghR^itairbodhayatAtithim |AsminhavyA juhotana || 8.44.1
agne stomaM juShasva me vardhasvAnena manmanA |prati sUktAni harya naH || 8.44.2
agniM dUtaM puro dadhe havyavAhamupa bruve |devA.N A sAdayAdiha || 8.44.3
utte bR^ihanto archayaH samidhAnasya dIdivaH |agne shukrAsa Irate || 8.44.4
upa tvA juhvo mama ghR^itAchIryantu haryata |agne havyA juShasva naH || 8.44.5
mandraM hotAramR^itvijaM chitrabhAnuM vibhAvasum |agnimILe sa u shravat || 8.44.6
pratnaM hotAramIDyaM juShTamagniM kavikratum |adhvarANAmabhishriyam || 8.44.7
juShANo a~NgirastamemA havyAnyAnuShak |agne yaj~naM naya R^ituthA || 8.44.8
samidhAna u santya shukrashocha ihA vaha |chikitvAndaivyaM janam || 8.44.9
vipraM hotAramadruhaM dhUmaketuM vibhAvasum |yaj~nAnAM ketumImahe || 8.44.10
agne ni pAhi nastvaM prati Shma deva rIShataH |bhindhi dveShaH sahaskR^ita || 8.44.11
agniH pratnena manmanA shumbhAnastanvaM svAm |kavirvipreNa vAvR^idhe || 8.44.12
Urjo napAtamA huve.agniM pAvakashochiSham |asminyaj~ne svadhvare || 8.44.13
sa no mitramahastvamagne shukreNa shochiShA |devairA satsi barhiShi || 8.44.14
yo agniM tanvo dame devaM martaH saparyati |tasmA iddIdayadvasu || 8.44.15
agnirmUrdhA divaH kakutpatiH pR^ithivyA ayam |apAM retAMsi jinvati || 8.44.16
udagne shuchayastava shukrA bhrAjanta Irate |tava jyotIMShyarchayaH || 8.44.17
IshiShe vAryasya hi dAtrasyAgne svarpatiH |stotA syAM tava sharmaNi || 8.44.18
tvAmagne manIShiNastvAM hinvanti chittibhiH |tvAM vardhantu no giraH || 8.44.19
adabdhasya svadhAvato dUtasya rebhataH sadA |agneH sakhyaM vR^iNImahe || 8.44.20
agniH shuchivratatamaH shuchirvipraH shuchiH kaviH |shuchI rochata AhutaH || 8.44.21
uta tvA dhItayo mama giro vardhantu vishvahA |agne sakhyasya bodhi naH || 8.44.22
yadagne syAmahaM tvaM tvaM vA ghA syA aham |syuShTe satyA ihAshiShaH || 8.44.23
vasurvasupatirhi kamasyagne vibhAvasuH |syAma te sumatAvapi || 8.44.24
agne dhR^itavratAya te samudrAyeva sindhavaH |giro vAshrAsa Irate || 8.44.25
yuvAnaM vishpatiM kaviM vishvAdaM puruvepasam |agniM shumbhAmi manmabhiH || 8.44.26
yaj~nAnAM rathye vayaM tigmajambhAya vILave |stomairiShemAgnaye || 8.44.27
ayamagne tve api jaritA bhUtu santya |tasmai pAvaka mR^iLaya || 8.44.28
dhIro hyasyadmasadvipro na jAgR^iviH sadA |agne dIdayasi dyavi || 8.44.29
purAgne duritebhyaH purA mR^idhrebhyaH kave |pra Na Ayurvaso tira || 8.44.30

A ghA ye agnimindhate stR^iNanti barhirAnuShak |yeShAmindro yuvA sakhA || 8.45.1
bR^ihannididhma eShAM bhUri shastaM pR^ithuH svaruH |yeShAmindro yuvA sakhA || 8.45.2
ayuddha idyudhA vR^itaM shUra Ajati satvabhiH |yeShAmindro yuvA sakhA || 8.45.3
A bundaM vR^itrahA dade jAtaH pR^ichChadvi mAtaram |ka ugrAH ke ha shR^iNvire || 8.45.4
prati tvA shavasI vadadgirAvapso na yodhiShat |yaste shatrutvamAchake || 8.45.5
uta tvaM maghava~nChR^iNu yaste vaShTi vavakShi tat |yadvILayAsi vILu tat || 8.45.6
yadAjiM yAtyAjikR^idindraH svashvayurupa |rathItamo rathInAm || 8.45.7
vi Shu vishvA abhiyujo vajrinviShvagyathA vR^iha |bhavA naH sushravastamaH || 8.45.8
asmAkaM su rathaM pura indraH kR^iNotu sAtaye |na yaM dhUrvanti dhUrtayaH || 8.45.9
vR^ijyAma te pari dviSho.araM te shakra dAvane |gamemedindra gomataH || 8.45.10
shanaishchidyanto adrivo.ashvAvantaH shatagvinaH |vivakShaNA anehasaH || 8.45.11
UrdhvA hi te divedive sahasrA sUnR^itA shatA |jaritR^ibhyo vimaMhate || 8.45.12
vidmA hi tvA dhanaMjayamindra dR^iLhA chidArujam |AdAriNaM yathA gayam || 8.45.13
kakuhaM chittvA kave mandantu dhR^iShNavindavaH |A tvA paNiM yadImahe || 8.45.14
yaste revA.N adAshuriH pramamarSha maghattaye |tasya no veda A bhara || 8.45.15
ima u tvA vi chakShate sakhAya indra sominaH |puShTAvanto yathA pashum || 8.45.16
uta tvAbadhiraM vayaM shrutkarNaM santamUtaye |dUrAdiha havAmahe || 8.45.17
yachChushrUyA imaM havaM durmarShaM chakriyA uta |bhaverApirno antamaH || 8.45.18
yachchiddhi te api vyathirjaganvAMso amanmahi |godA idindra bodhi naH || 8.45.19
A tvA rambhaM na jivrayo rarabhmA shavasaspate |ushmasi tvA sadhastha A || 8.45.20
stotramindrAya gAyata purunR^imNAya satvane |nakiryaM vR^iNvate yudhi || 8.45.21
abhi tvA vR^iShabhA sute sutaM sR^ijAmi pItaye |tR^impA vyashnuhI madam || 8.45.22
mA tvA mUrA aviShyavo mopahasvAna A dabhan |mAkIM brahmadviSho vanaH || 8.45.23
iha tvA goparINasA mahe mandantu rAdhase |saro gauro yathA piba || 8.45.24
yA vR^itrahA parAvati sanA navA cha chuchyuve |tA saMsatsu pra vochata || 8.45.25
apibatkadruvaH sutamindraH sahasrabAhve |atrAdediShTa pauMsyam || 8.45.26
satyaM tatturvashe yadau vidAno ahnavAyyam |vyAnaT turvaNe shami || 8.45.27
taraNiM vo janAnAM tradaM vAjasya gomataH |samAnamu pra shaMsiSham || 8.45.28
R^ibhukShaNaM na vartava uktheShu tugryAvR^idham |indraM some sachA sute || 8.45.29
yaH kR^intadidvi yonyaM trishokAya giriM pR^ithum |gobhyo gAtuM niretave || 8.45.30
yaddadhiShe manasyasi mandAnaH prediyakShasi |mA tatkarindra mR^iLaya || 8.45.31
dabhraM chiddhi tvAvataH kR^itaM shR^iNve adhi kShami |jigAtvindra te manaH || 8.45.32
tavedu tAH sukIrtayo.asannuta prashastayaH |yadindra mR^iLayAsi naH || 8.45.33
mA na ekasminnAgasi mA dvayoruta triShu |vadhIrmA shUra bhUriShu || 8.45.34
bibhayA hi tvAvata ugrAdabhiprabha~NgiNaH |dasmAdahamR^itIShahaH || 8.45.35
mA sakhyuH shUnamA vide mA putrasya prabhUvaso |AvR^itvadbhUtu te manaH || 8.45.36
ko nu maryA amithitaH sakhA sakhAyamabravIt |jahA ko asmadIShate || 8.45.37
evAre vR^iShabhA sute.asinvanbhUryAvayaH |shvaghnIva nivatA charan || 8.45.38
A ta etA vachoyujA harI gR^ibhNe sumadrathA |yadIM brahmabhya iddadaH || 8.45.39
bhindhi vishvA apa dviShaH pari bAdho jahI mR^idhaH |vasu spArhaM tadA bhara || 8.45.40
yadvILAvindra yatsthire yatparshAne parAbhR^itam |vasu spArhaM tadA bhara || 8.45.41
yasya te vishvamAnuSho bhUrerdattasya vedati |vasu spArhaM tadA bhara || 8.45.42

tvAvataH purUvaso vayamindra praNetaH |smasi sthAtarharINAm || 8.46.1
tvAM hi satyamadrivo vidma dAtAramiShAm |vidma dAtAraM rayINAm || 8.46.2
A yasya te mahimAnaM shatamUte shatakrato |gIrbhirgR^iNanti kAravaH || 8.46.3
sunItho ghA sa martyo yaM maruto yamaryamA |mitraH pAntyadruhaH || 8.46.4
dadhAno gomadashvavatsuvIryamAdityajUta edhate |sadA rAyA puruspR^ihA || 8.46.5
tamindraM dAnamImahe shavasAnamabhIrvam |IshAnaM rAya Imahe || 8.46.6
tasminhi santyUtayo vishvA abhIravaH sachA |tamA vahantu saptayaH purUvasuM madAya harayaH sutam || 8.46.7
yaste mado vareNyo ya indra vR^itrahantamaH |ya AdadiH svarnR^ibhiryaH pR^itanAsu duShTaraH || 8.46.8
yo duShTaro vishvavAra shravAyyo vAjeShvasti tarutA |sa naH shaviShTha savanA vaso gahi gamema gomati vraje || 8.46.9
gavyo Shu No yathA purAshvayota rathayA |varivasya mahAmaha || 8.46.10
nahi te shUra rAdhaso.antaM vindAmi satrA |dashasyA no maghavannU chidadrivo dhiyo vAjebhirAvitha || 8.46.11
ya R^iShvaH shrAvayatsakhA vishvetsa veda janimA puruShTutaH |taM vishve mAnuShA yugendraM havante taviShaM yatasruchaH || 8.46.12
sa no vAjeShvavitA purUvasuH puraHsthAtA maghavA vR^itrahA bhuvat || 8.46.13
abhi vo vIramandhaso madeShu gAya girA mahA vichetasam |indraM nAma shrutyaM shAkinaM vacho yathA || 8.46.14
dadI rekNastanve dadirvasu dadirvAjeShu puruhUta vAjinam |nUnamatha || 8.46.15
vishveShAmirajyantaM vasUnAM sAsahvAMsaM chidasya varpasaH |kR^ipayato nUnamatyatha || 8.46.16
mahaH su vo aramiShe stavAmahe mILhuShe araMgamAya jagmaye |yaj~nebhirgIrbhirvishvamanuShAM marutAmiyakShasi gAye tvA namasA girA || 8.46.17
ye pAtayante ajmabhirgirINAM snubhireShAm |yaj~naM mahiShvaNInAM sumnaM tuviShvaNInAM prAdhvare || 8.46.18
prabha~NgaM durmatInAmindra shaviShThA bhara |rayimasmabhyaM yujyaM chodayanmate jyeShThaM chodayanmate || 8.46.19
sanitaH susanitarugra chitra chetiShTha sUnR^ita |prAsahA samrAT sahuriM sahantaM bhujyuM vAjeShu pUrvyam || 8.46.20
A sa etu ya IvadA.N adevaH pUrtamAdade |yathA chidvasho ashvyaH pR^ithushravasi kAnIte.asyA vyuShyAdade || 8.46.21
ShaShTiM sahasrAshvyasyAyutAsanamuShTrAnAM viMshatiM shatA |dasha shyAvInAM shatA dasha tryaruShINAM dasha gavAM sahasrA || 8.46.22
dasha shyAvA R^idhadrayo vItavArAsa AshavaH |mathrA nemiM ni vAvR^ituH || 8.46.23
dAnAsaH pR^ithushravasaH kAnItasya surAdhasaH |rathaM hiraNyayaM dadanmaMhiShThaH sUrirabhUdvarShiShThamakR^ita shravaH || 8.46.24
A no vAyo mahe tane yAhi makhAya pAjase |vayaM hi te chakR^imA bhUri dAvane sadyashchinmahi dAvane || 8.46.25
yo ashvebhirvahate vasta usrAstriH sapta saptatInAm |ebhiH somebhiH somasudbhiH somapA dAnAya shukrapUtapAH || 8.46.26
yo ma imaM chidu tmanAmandachchitraM dAvane |araTve akShe nahuShe sukR^itvani sukR^ittarAya sukratuH || 8.46.27
uchathye vapuShi yaH svarALuta vAyo ghR^itasnAH |ashveShitaM rajeShitaM shuneShitaM prAjma tadidaM nu tat || 8.46.28
adha priyamiShirAya ShaShTiM sahasrAsanam |ashvAnAminna vR^iShNAm || 8.46.29
gAvo na yUthamupa yanti vadhraya upa mA yanti vadhrayaH || 8.46.30
adha yachchArathe gaNe shatamuShTrA.N achikradat |adha shvitneShu viMshatiM shatA || 8.46.31
shataM dAse balbUthe viprastarukSha A dade |te te vAyavime janA madantIndragopA madanti devagopAH || 8.46.32
adha syA yoShaNA mahI pratIchI vashamashvyam |adhirukmA vi nIyate || 8.46.33

mahi vo mahatAmavo varuNa mitra dAshuShe |yamAdityA abhi druho rakShathA nemaghaM nashadanehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.1
vidA devA aghAnAmAdityAso apAkR^itim |pakShA vayo yathopari vyasme sharma yachChatAnehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.2
vyasme adhi sharma tatpakShA vayo na yantana |vishvAni vishvavedaso varUthyA manAmahe.anehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.3
yasmA arAsata kShayaM jIvAtuM cha prachetasaH |manorvishvasya ghedima AdityA rAya Ishate.anehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.4
pari No vR^iNajannaghA durgANi rathyo yathA |syAmedindrasya sharmaNyAdityAnAmutAvasyanehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.5
parihvR^itedanA jano yuShmAdattasya vAyati |devA adabhramAsha vo yamAdityA ahetanAnehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.6
na taM tigmaM chana tyajo na drAsadabhi taM guru |yasmA u sharma sapratha AdityAso arAdhvamanehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.7
yuShme devA api Shmasi yudhyanta iva varmasu |yUyaM maho na enaso yUyamarbhAduruShyatAnehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.8
aditirna uruShyatvaditiH sharma yachChatu |mAtA mitrasya revato.aryamNo varuNasya chAnehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.9
yaddevAH sharma sharaNaM yadbhadraM yadanAturam |tridhAtu yadvarUthyaM tadasmAsu vi yantanAnehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.10
AdityA ava hi khyatAdhi kUlAdiva spashaH |sutIrthamarvato yathAnu no neShathA sugamanehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.11
neha bhadraM rakShasvine nAvayai nopayA uta |gave cha bhadraM dhenave vIrAya cha shravasyate.anehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.12
yadAviryadapIchyaM devAso asti duShkR^itam |trite tadvishvamAptya Are asmaddadhAtanAnehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.13
yachcha goShu duShShvapnyaM yachchAsme duhitardivaH |tritAya tadvibhAvaryAptyAya parA vahAnehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.14
niShkaM vA ghA kR^iNavate srajaM vA duhitardivaH |trite duShShvapnyaM sarvamAptye pari dadmasyanehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.15
tadannAya tadapase taM bhAgamupaseduShe |tritAya cha dvitAya choSho duShShvapnyaM vahAnehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.16
yathA kalAM yathA shaphaM yatha R^iNaM saMnayAmasi |evA duShShvapnyaM sarvamAptye saM nayAmasyanehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.17
ajaiShmAdyAsanAma chAbhUmAnAgaso vayam |uSho yasmAdduShShvapnyAdabhaiShmApa taduchChatvanehaso va UtayaH suUtayo va UtayaH || 8.47.18

svAdorabhakShi vayasaH sumedhAH svAdhyo varivovittarasya |vishve yaM devA uta martyAso madhu bruvanto abhi saMcharanti || 8.48.1
antashcha prAgA aditirbhavAsyavayAtA haraso daivyasya |indavindrasya sakhyaM juShANaH shrauShTIva dhuramanu rAya R^idhyAH || 8.48.2
apAma somamamR^itA abhUmAganma jyotiravidAma devAn |kiM nUnamasmAnkR^iNavadarAtiH kimu dhUrtiramR^ita martyasya || 8.48.3
shaM no bhava hR^ida A pIta indo piteva soma sUnave sushevaH |sakheva sakhya urushaMsa dhIraH pra Na AyurjIvase soma tArIH || 8.48.4
ime mA pItA yashasa uruShyavo rathaM na gAvaH samanAha parvasu |te mA rakShantu visrasashcharitrAduta mA srAmAdyavayantvindavaH || 8.48.5
agniM na mA mathitaM saM didIpaH pra chakShaya kR^iNuhi vasyaso naH |athA hi te mada A soma manye revA.N iva pra charA puShTimachCha || 8.48.6
iShireNa te manasA sutasya bhakShImahi pitryasyeva rAyaH |soma rAjanpra Na AyUMShi tArIrahAnIva sUryo vAsarANi || 8.48.7
soma rAjanmR^iLayA naH svasti tava smasi vratyAstasya viddhi |alarti dakSha uta manyurindo mA no aryo anukAmaM parA dAH || 8.48.8
tvaM hi nastanvaH soma gopA gAtregAtre niShasatthA nR^ichakShAH |yatte vayaM praminAma vratAni sa no mR^iLa suShakhA deva vasyaH || 8.48.9
R^idUdareNa sakhyA sacheya yo mA na riShyeddharyashva pItaH |ayaM yaH somo nyadhAyyasme tasmA indraM pratiramemyAyuH || 8.48.10
apa tyA asthuranirA amIvA niratrasantamiShIchIrabhaiShuH |A somo asmA.N aruhadvihAyA aganma yatra pratiranta AyuH || 8.48.11
yo na induH pitaro hR^itsu pIto.amartyo martyA.N Avivesha |tasmai somAya haviShA vidhema mR^iLIke asya sumatau syAma || 8.48.12
tvaM soma pitR^ibhiH saMvidAno.anu dyAvApR^ithivI A tatantha |tasmai ta indo haviShA vidhema vayaM syAma patayo rayINAm || 8.48.13
trAtAro devA adhi vochatA no mA no nidrA Ishata mota jalpiH |vayaM somasya vishvaha priyAsaH suvIrAso vidathamA vadema || 8.48.14
tvaM naH soma vishvato vayodhAstvaM svarvidA vishA nR^ichakShAH |tvaM na inda UtibhiH sajoShAH pAhi pashchAtAduta vA purastAt || 8.48.15

abhi pra vaH surAdhasamindramarcha yathA vide |yo jaritR^ibhyo maghavA purUvasuH sahasreNeva shikShati || 8.49.1
shatAnIkeva pra jigAti dhR^iShNuyA hanti vR^itrANi dAshuShe |gireriva pra rasA asya pinvire datrANi purubhojasaH || 8.49.2
A tvA sutAsa indavo madA ya indra girvaNaH |Apo na vajrinnanvokyaM saraH pR^iNanti shUra rAdhase || 8.49.3
anehasaM prataraNaM vivakShaNaM madhvaH svAdiShThamIM piba |A yathA mandasAnaH kirAsi naH pra kShudreva tmanA dhR^iShat || 8.49.4
A naH stomamupa dravaddhiyAno ashvo na sotR^ibhiH |yaM te svadhAvansvadayanti dhenava indra kaNveShu rAtayaH || 8.49.5
ugraM na vIraM namasopa sedima vibhUtimakShitAvasum |udrIva vajrinnavato na si~nchate kSharantIndra dhItayaH || 8.49.6
yaddha nUnaM yadvA yaj~ne yadvA pR^ithivyAmadhi |ato no yaj~namAshubhirmahemata ugra ugrebhirA gahi || 8.49.7
ajirAso harayo ye ta Ashavo vAtA iva prasakShiNaH |yebhirapatyaM manuShaH parIyase yebhirvishvaM svardR^ishe || 8.49.8
etAvatasta Imaha indra sumnasya gomataH |yathA prAvo maghavanmedhyAtithiM yathA nIpAtithiM dhane || 8.49.9
yathA kaNve maghavantrasadasyavi yathA pakthe dashavraje |yathA gosharye asanorR^ijishvanIndra gomaddhiraNyavat || 8.49.10

pra su shrutaM surAdhasamarchA shakramabhiShTaye |yaH sunvate stuvate kAmyaM vasu sahasreNeva maMhate || 8.50.1
shatAnIkA hetayo asya duShTarA indrasya samiSho mahIH |girirna bhujmA maghavatsu pinvate yadIM sutA amandiShuH || 8.50.2
yadIM sutAsa indavo.abhi priyamamandiShuH |Apo na dhAyi savanaM ma A vaso dughA ivopa dAshuShe || 8.50.3
anehasaM vo havamAnamUtaye madhvaH kSharanti dhItayaH |A tvA vaso havamAnAsa indava upa stotreShu dadhire || 8.50.4
A naH some svadhvara iyAno atyo na toshate |yaM te svadAvansvadanti gUrtayaH paure Chandayase havam || 8.50.5
pra vIramugraM vivichiM dhanaspR^itaM vibhUtiM rAdhaso mahaH |udrIva vajrinnavato vasutvanA sadA pIpetha dAshuShe || 8.50.6
yaddha nUnaM parAvati yadvA pR^ithivyAM divi |yujAna indra haribhirmahemata R^iShva R^iShvebhirA gahi || 8.50.7
rathirAso harayo ye te asridha ojo vAtasya piprati |yebhirni dasyuM manuSho nighoShayo yebhiH svaH parIyase || 8.50.8
etAvataste vaso vidyAma shUra navyasaH |yathA prAva etashaM kR^itvye dhane yathA vashaM dashavraje || 8.50.9
yathA kaNve maghavanmedhe adhvare dIrghanIthe damUnasi |yathA gosharye asiShAso adrivo mayi gotraM harishriyam || 8.50.10

yathA manau sAMvaraNau somamindrApibaH sutam |nIpAtithau maghavanmedhyAtithau puShTigau shruShTigau sachA || 8.51.1
pArShadvANaH praskaNvaM samasAdayachChayAnaM jivrimuddhitam |sahasrANyasiShAsadgavAmR^iShistvoto dasyave vR^ikaH || 8.51.2
ya ukthebhirna vindhate chikidya R^iShichodanaH |indraM tamachChA vada navyasyA matyariShyantaM na bhojase || 8.51.3
yasmA arkaM saptashIrShANamAnR^ichustridhAtumuttame pade |sa tvimA vishvA bhuvanAni chikradadAdijjaniShTa pauMsyam || 8.51.4
yo no dAtA vasUnAmindraM taM hUmahe vayam |vidmA hyasya sumatiM navIyasIM gamema gomati vraje || 8.51.5
yasmai tvaM vaso dAnAya shikShasi sa rAyaspoShamashnute |taM tvA vayaM maghavannindra girvaNaH sutAvanto havAmahe || 8.51.6
kadA chana starIrasi nendra sashchasi dAshuShe |upopennu maghavanbhUya innu te dAnaM devasya pR^ichyate || 8.51.7
pra yo nanakShe abhyojasA kriviM vadhaiH shuShNaM nighoShayan |yadedastambhItprathayannamUM divamAdijjaniShTa pArthivaH || 8.51.8
yasyAyaM vishva Aryo dAsaH shevadhipA ariH |tirashchidarye rushame parIravi tubhyetso ajyate rayiH || 8.51.9
turaNyavo madhumantaM ghR^itashchutaM viprAso arkamAnR^ichuH |asme rayiH paprathe vR^iShNyaM shavo.asme suvAnAsa indavaH || 8.51.10

yathA manau vivasvati somaM shakrApibaH sutam |yathA trite Chanda indra jujoShasyAyau mAdayase sachA || 8.52.1
pR^iShadhre medhye mAtarishvanIndra suvAne amandathAH |yathA somaM dashashipre dashoNye syUmarashmAvR^ijUnasi || 8.52.2
ya ukthA kevalA dadhe yaH somaM dhR^iShitApibat |yasmai viShNustrINi padA vichakrama upa mitrasya dharmabhiH || 8.52.3
yasya tvamindra stomeShu chAkano vAje vAji~nChatakrato |taM tvA vayaM sudughAmiva goduho juhUmasi shravasyavaH || 8.52.4
yo no dAtA sa naH pitA mahA.N ugra IshAnakR^it |ayAmannugro maghavA purUvasurgorashvasya pra dAtu naH || 8.52.5
yasmai tvaM vaso dAnAya maMhase sa rAyaspoShaminvati |vasUyavo vasupatiM shatakratuM stomairindraM havAmahe || 8.52.6
kadA chana pra yuchChasyubhe ni pAsi janmanI |turIyAditya havanaM ta indriyamA tasthAvamR^itaM divi || 8.52.7
yasmai tvaM maghavannindra girvaNaH shikSho shikShasi dAshuShe |asmAkaM gira uta suShTutiM vaso kaNvavachChR^iNudhI havam || 8.52.8
astAvi manma pUrvyaM brahmendrAya vochata |pUrvIrR^itasya bR^ihatIranUShata stoturmedhA asR^ikShata || 8.52.9
samindro rAyo bR^ihatIradhUnuta saM kShoNI samu sUryam |saM shukrAsaH shuchayaH saM gavAshiraH somA indramamandiShuH || 8.52.10

upamaM tvA maghonAM jyeShThaM cha vR^iShabhANAm |pUrbhittamaM maghavannindra govidamIshAnaM rAya Imahe || 8.53.1
ya AyuM kutsamatithigvamardayo vAvR^idhAno divedive |taM tvA vayaM haryashvaM shatakratuM vAjayanto havAmahe || 8.53.2
A no vishveShAM rasaM madhvaH si~nchantvadrayaH |ye parAvati sunvire janeShvA ye arvAvatIndavaH || 8.53.3
vishvA dveShAMsi jahi chAva chA kR^idhi vishve sanvantvA vasu |shIShTeShu chitte madirAso aMshavo yatrA somasya tR^impasi || 8.53.4
indra nedIya edihi mitamedhAbhirUtibhiH |A shaMtama shaMtamAbhirabhiShTibhirA svApe svApibhiH || 8.53.5
AjituraM satpatiM vishvacharShaNiM kR^idhi prajAsvAbhagam |pra sU tirA shachIbhirye ta ukthinaH kratuM punata AnuShak || 8.53.6
yaste sAdhiShTho.avase te syAma bhareShu te |vayaM hotrAbhiruta devahUtibhiH sasavAMso manAmahe || 8.53.7
ahaM hi te harivo brahma vAjayurAjiM yAmi sadotibhiH |tvAmideva tamame samashvayurgavyuragre mathInAm || 8.53.8

etatta indra vIryaM gIrbhirgR^iNanti kAravaH |te stobhanta UrjamAvanghR^itashchutaM paurAso nakShandhItibhiH || 8.54.1
nakShanta indramavase sukR^ityayA yeShAM suteShu mandase |yathA saMvarte amado yathA kR^isha evAsme indra matsva || 8.54.2
A no vishve sajoShaso devAso gantanopa naH |vasavo rudrA avase na A gama~nChR^iNvantu maruto havam || 8.54.3
pUShA viShNurhavanaM me sarasvatyavantu sapta sindhavaH |Apo vAtaH parvatAso vanaspatiH shR^iNotu pR^ithivI havam || 8.54.4
yadindra rAdho asti te mAghonaM maghavattama |tena no bodhi sadhamAdyo vR^idhe bhago dAnAya vR^itrahan || 8.54.5
Ajipate nR^ipate tvamiddhi no vAja A vakShi sukrato |vItI hotrAbhiruta devavItibhiH sasavAMso vi shR^iNvire || 8.54.6
santi hyarya AshiSha indra AyurjanAnAm |asmAnnakShasva maghavannupAvase dhukShasva pipyuShImiSham || 8.54.7
vayaM ta indra stomebhirvidhema tvamasmAkaM shatakrato |mahi sthUraM shashayaM rAdho ahrayaM praskaNvAya ni toshaya || 8.54.8

bhUrIdindrasya vIryaM vyakhyamabhyAyati |rAdhaste dasyave vR^ika || 8.55.1
shataM shvetAsa ukShaNo divi tAro na rochante |mahnA divaM na tastabhuH || 8.55.2
shataM veNU~nChataM shunaH shataM charmANi mlAtAni |shataM me balbajastukA aruShINAM chatuHshatam || 8.55.3
sudevAH stha kANvAyanA vayovayo vicharantaH |ashvAso na cha~Nkramata || 8.55.4
AditsAptasya charkirannAnUnasya mahi shravaH |shyAvIratidhvasanpathashchakShuShA chana saMnashe || 8.55.5

prati te dasyave vR^ika rAdho adarshyahrayam |dyaurna prathinA shavaH || 8.56.1
dasha mahyaM pautakrataH sahasrA dasyave vR^ikaH |nityAdrAyo amaMhata || 8.56.2
shataM me gardabhAnAM shatamUrNAvatInAm |shataM dAsA.N ati srajaH || 8.56.3
tatro api prANIyata pUtakratAyai vyaktA |ashvAnAminna yUthyAm || 8.56.4
achetyagnishchikiturhavyavAT sa sumadrathaH |agniH shukreNa shochiShA bR^ihatsUro arochata divi sUryo arochata || 8.56.5

yuvaM devA kratunA pUrvyeNa yuktA rathena taviShaM yajatrA |AgachChataM nAsatyA shachIbhiridaM tR^itIyaM savanaM pibAthaH || 8.57.1
yuvAM devAstraya ekAdashAsaH satyAH satyasya dadR^ishe purastAt |asmAkaM yaj~naM savanaM juShANA pAtaM somamashvinA dIdyagnI || 8.57.2
panAyyaM tadashvinA kR^itaM vAM vR^iShabho divo rajasaH pR^ithivyAH |sahasraM shaMsA uta ye gaviShTau sarvA.N ittA.N upa yAtA pibadhyai || 8.57.3
ayaM vAM bhAgo nihito yajatremA giro nAsatyopa yAtam |pibataM somaM madhumantamasme pra dAshvAMsamavataM shachIbhiH || 8.57.4

yamR^itvijo bahudhA kalpayantaH sachetaso yaj~namimaM vahanti |yo anUchAno brAhmaNo yukta AsItkA svittatra yajamAnasya saMvit || 8.58.1
eka evAgnirbahudhA samiddha ekaH sUryo vishvamanu prabhUtaH |ekaivoShAH sarvamidaM vi bhAtyekaM vA idaM vi babhUva sarvam || 8.58.2
jyotiShmantaM ketumantaM trichakraM sukhaM rathaM suShadaM bhUrivAram |chitrAmaghA yasya yoge.adhijaj~ne taM vAM huve ati riktaM pibadhyai || 8.58.3

imAni vAM bhAgadheyAni sisrata indrAvaruNA pra mahe suteShu vAm |yaj~neyaj~ne ha savanA bhuraNyatho yatsunvate yajamAnAya shikShathaH || 8.59.1
niShShidhvarIroShadhIrApa AstAmindrAvaruNA mahimAnamAshata |yA sisratU rajasaH pAre adhvano yayoH shatrurnakirAdeva ohate || 8.59.2
satyaM tadindrAvaruNA kR^ishasya vAM madhva UrmiM duhate sapta vANIH |tAbhirdAshvAMsamavataM shubhaspatI yo vAmadabdho abhi pAti chittibhiH || 8.59.3
ghR^itapruShaH saumyA jIradAnavaH sapta svasAraH sadana R^itasya |yA ha vAmindrAvaruNA ghR^itashchutastAbhirdhattaM yajamAnAya shikShatam || 8.59.4
avochAma mahate saubhagAya satyaM tveShAbhyAM mahimAnamindriyam |asmAnsvindrAvaruNA ghR^itashchutastribhiH sAptebhiravataM shubhaspatI || 8.59.5
indrAvaruNA yadR^iShibhyo manIShAM vAcho matiM shrutamadattamagre |yAni sthAnAnyasR^ijanta dhIrA yaj~naM tanvAnAstapasAbhyapashyam || 8.59.6
indrAvaruNA saumanasamadR^iptaM rAyaspoShaM yajamAneShu dhattam |prajAM puShTiM bhUtimasmAsu dhattaM dIrghAyutvAya pra tirataM na AyuH || 8.59.7

agna A yAhyagnibhirhotAraM tvA vR^iNImahe |A tvAmanaktu prayatA haviShmatI yajiShThaM barhirAsade || 8.60.1
achChA hi tvA sahasaH sUno a~NgiraH sruchashcharantyadhvare |Urjo napAtaM ghR^itakeshamImahe.agniM yaj~neShu pUrvyam || 8.60.2
agne kavirvedhA asi hotA pAvaka yakShyaH |mandro yajiShTho adhvareShvIDyo viprebhiH shukra manmabhiH || 8.60.3
adroghamA vahoshato yaviShThya devA.N ajasra vItaye |abhi prayAMsi sudhitA vaso gahi mandasva dhItibhirhitaH || 8.60.4
tvamitsaprathA asyagne trAtarR^itaskaviH |tvAM viprAsaH samidhAna dIdiva A vivAsanti vedhasaH || 8.60.5
shochA shochiShTha dIdihi vishe mayo rAsva stotre mahA.N asi |devAnAM sharmanmama santu sUrayaH shatrUShAhaH svagnayaH || 8.60.6
yathA chidvR^iddhamatasamagne saMjUrvasi kShami |evA daha mitramaho yo asmadhrugdurmanmA kashcha venati || 8.60.7
mA no martAya ripave rakShasvine mAghashaMsAya rIradhaH |asredhadbhistaraNibhiryaviShThya shivebhiH pAhi pAyubhiH || 8.60.8
pAhi no agna ekayA pAhyuta dvitIyayA |pAhi gIrbhistisR^ibhirUrjAM pate pAhi chatasR^ibhirvaso || 8.60.9
pAhi vishvasmAdrakShaso arAvNaH pra sma vAjeShu no.ava |tvAmiddhi nediShThaM devatAtaya ApiM nakShAmahe vR^idhe || 8.60.10
A no agne vayovR^idhaM rayiM pAvaka shaMsyam |rAsvA cha na upamAte puruspR^ihaM sunItI svayashastaram || 8.60.11
yena vaMsAma pR^itanAsu shardhatastaranto arya AdishaH |sa tvaM no vardha prayasA shachIvaso jinvA dhiyo vasuvidaH || 8.60.12
shishAno vR^iShabho yathAgniH shR^i~Nge davidhvat |tigmA asya hanavo na pratidhR^iShe sujambhaH sahaso yahuH || 8.60.13
nahi te agne vR^iShabha pratidhR^iShe jambhAso yadvitiShThase |sa tvaM no hotaH suhutaM haviShkR^idhi vaMsvA no vAryA puru || 8.60.14
sheShe vaneShu mAtroH saM tvA martAsa indhate |atandro havyA vahasi haviShkR^ita AdiddeveShu rAjasi || 8.60.15
sapta hotArastamidILate tvAgne sutyajamahrayam |bhinatsyadriM tapasA vi shochiShA prAgne tiShTha janA.N ati || 8.60.16
agnimagniM vo adhriguM huvema vR^iktabarhiShaH |agniM hitaprayasaH shashvatIShvA hotAraM charShaNInAm || 8.60.17
ketena sharmansachate suShAmaNyagne tubhyaM chikitvanA |iShaNyayA naH pururUpamA bhara vAjaM nediShThamUtaye || 8.60.18
agne jaritarvishpatistepAno deva rakShasaH |aproShivAngR^ihapatirmahA.N asi divaspAyurduroNayuH || 8.60.19
mA no rakSha A veshIdAghR^iNIvaso mA yAturyAtumAvatAm |parogavyUtyanirAmapa kShudhamagne sedha rakShasvinaH || 8.60.20

ubhayaM shR^iNavachcha na indro arvAgidaM vachaH |satrAchyA maghavA somapItaye dhiyA shaviShTha A gamat || 8.61.1
taM hi svarAjaM vR^iShabhaM tamojase dhiShaNe niShTatakShatuH |utopamAnAM prathamo ni ShIdasi somakAmaM hi te manaH || 8.61.2
A vR^iShasva purUvaso sutasyendrAndhasaH |vidmA hi tvA harivaH pR^itsu sAsahimadhR^iShTaM chiddadhR^iShvaNim || 8.61.3
aprAmisatya maghavantathedasadindra kratvA yathA vashaH |sanema vAjaM tava shiprinnavasA makShU chidyanto adrivaH || 8.61.4
shagdhyU Shu shachIpata indra vishvAbhirUtibhiH |bhagaM na hi tvA yashasaM vasuvidamanu shUra charAmasi || 8.61.5
pauro ashvasya purukR^idgavAmasyutso deva hiraNyayaH |nakirhi dAnaM parimardhiShattve yadyadyAmi tadA bhara || 8.61.6
tvaM hyehi cherave vidA bhagaM vasuttaye |udvAvR^iShasva maghavangaviShTaya udindrAshvamiShTaye || 8.61.7
tvaM purU sahasrANi shatAni cha yUthA dAnAya maMhase |A puraMdaraM chakR^ima vipravachasa indraM gAyanto.avase || 8.61.8
avipro vA yadavidhadvipro vendra te vachaH |sa pra mamandattvAyA shatakrato prAchAmanyo ahaMsana || 8.61.9
ugrabAhurmrakShakR^itvA puraMdaro yadi me shR^iNavaddhavam |vasUyavo vasupatiM shatakratuM stomairindraM havAmahe || 8.61.10
na pApAso manAmahe nArAyAso na jaLhavaH |yadinnvindraM vR^iShaNaM sachA sute sakhAyaM kR^iNavAmahai || 8.61.11
ugraM yuyujma pR^itanAsu sAsahimR^iNakAtimadAbhyam |vedA bhR^imaM chitsanitA rathItamo vAjinaM yamidU nashat || 8.61.12
yata indra bhayAmahe tato no abhayaM kR^idhi |maghava~nChagdhi tava tanna Utibhirvi dviSho vi mR^idho jahi || 8.61.13
tvaM hi rAdhaspate rAdhaso mahaH kShayasyAsi vidhataH |taM tvA vayaM maghavannindra girvaNaH sutAvanto havAmahe || 8.61.14
indraH spaLuta vR^itrahA paraspA no vareNyaH |sa no rakShiShachcharamaM sa madhyamaM sa pashchAtpAtu naH puraH || 8.61.15
tvaM naH pashchAdadharAduttarAtpura indra ni pAhi vishvataH |Are asmatkR^iNuhi daivyaM bhayamAre hetIradevIH || 8.61.16
adyAdyA shvaHshva indra trAsva pare cha naH |vishvA cha no jaritR^Insatpate ahA divA naktaM cha rakShiShaH || 8.61.17
prabha~NgI shUro maghavA tuvImaghaH sammishlo viryAya kam |ubhA te bAhU vR^iShaNA shatakrato ni yA vajraM mimikShatuH || 8.61.18

pro asmA upastutiM bharatA yajjujoShati |ukthairindrasya mAhinaM vayo vardhanti somino bhadrA indrasya rAtayaH || 8.62.1
ayujo asamo nR^ibhirekaH kR^iShTIrayAsyaH |pUrvIrati pra vAvR^idhe vishvA jAtAnyojasA bhadrA indrasya rAtayaH || 8.62.2
ahitena chidarvatA jIradAnuH siShAsati |pravAchyamindra tattava vIryANi kariShyato bhadrA indrasya rAtayaH || 8.62.3
A yAhi kR^iNavAma ta indra brahmANi vardhanA |yebhiH shaviShTha chAkano bhadramiha shravasyate bhadrA indrasya rAtayaH || 8.62.4
dhR^iShatashchiddhR^iShanmanaH kR^iNoShIndra yattvam |tIvraiH somaiH saparyato namobhiH pratibhUShato bhadrA indrasya rAtayaH || 8.62.5
ava chaShTa R^ichIShamo.avatA.N iva mAnuShaH |juShTvI dakShasya sominaH sakhAyaM kR^iNute yujaM bhadrA indrasya rAtayaH || 8.62.6
vishve ta indra vIryaM devA anu kratuM daduH |bhuvo vishvasya gopatiH puruShTuta bhadrA indrasya rAtayaH || 8.62.7
gR^iNe tadindra te shava upamaM devatAtaye |yaddhaMsi vR^itramojasA shachIpate bhadrA indrasya rAtayaH || 8.62.8
samaneva vapuShyataH kR^iNavanmAnuShA yugA |vide tadindrashchetanamadha shruto bhadrA indrasya rAtayaH || 8.62.9
ujjAtamindra te shava uttvAmuttava kratum |bhUrigo bhUri vAvR^idhurmaghavantava sharmaNi bhadrA indrasya rAtayaH || 8.62.10
ahaM cha tvaM cha vR^itrahansaM yujyAva sanibhya A |arAtIvA chidadrivo.anu nau shUra maMsate bhadrA indrasya rAtayaH || 8.62.11
satyamidvA u taM vayamindraM stavAma nAnR^itam |mahA.N asunvato vadho bhUri jyotIMShi sunvato bhadrA indrasya rAtayaH || 8.62.12

sa pUrvyo mahAnAM venaH kratubhirAnaje |yasya dvArA manuShpitA deveShu dhiya Anaje || 8.63.1
divo mAnaM notsadansomapR^iShThAso adrayaH |ukthA brahma cha shaMsyA || 8.63.2
sa vidvA.N a~Ngirobhya indro gA avR^iNodapa |stuShe tadasya pauMsyam || 8.63.3
sa pratnathA kavivR^idha indro vAkasya vakShaNiH |shivo arkasya homanyasmatrA gantvavase || 8.63.4
AdU nu te anu kratuM svAhA varasya yajyavaH |shvAtramarkA anUShatendra gotrasya dAvane || 8.63.5
indre vishvAni vIryA kR^itAni kartvAni cha |yamarkA adhvaraM viduH || 8.63.6
yatpA~nchajanyayA vishendre ghoShA asR^ikShata |astR^iNAdbarhaNA vipo.aryo mAnasya sa kShayaH || 8.63.7
iyamu te anuShTutishchakR^iShe tAni pauMsyA |prAvashchakrasya vartanim || 8.63.8
asya vR^iShNo vyodana uru kramiShTa jIvase |yavaM na pashva A dade || 8.63.9
taddadhAnA avasyavo yuShmAbhirdakShapitaraH |syAma marutvato vR^idhe || 8.63.10
baLR^itviyAya dhAmna R^ikvabhiH shUra nonumaH |jeShAmendra tvayA yujA || 8.63.11
asme rudrA mehanA parvatAso vR^itrahatye bharahUtau sajoShAH |yaH shaMsate stuvate dhAyi pajra indrajyeShThA asmA.N avantu devAH || 8.63.12

uttvA mandantu stomAH kR^iNuShva rAdho adrivaH |ava brahmadviSho jahi || 8.64.1
padA paNI.NrarAdhaso ni bAdhasva mahA.N asi |nahi tvA kashchana prati || 8.64.2
tvamIshiShe sutAnAmindra tvamasutAnAm |tvaM rAjA janAnAm || 8.64.3
ehi prehi kShayo divyAghoSha~ncharShaNInAm |obhe pR^iNAsi rodasI || 8.64.4
tyaM chitparvataM giriM shatavantaM sahasriNam |vi stotR^ibhyo rurojitha || 8.64.5
vayamu tvA divA sute vayaM naktaM havAmahe |asmAkaM kAmamA pR^iNa || 8.64.6
kva sya vR^iShabho yuvA tuvigrIvo anAnataH |brahmA kastaM saparyati || 8.64.7
kasya svitsavanaM vR^iShA jujuShvA.N ava gachChati |indraM ka u svidA chake || 8.64.8
kaM te dAnA asakShata vR^itrahankaM suvIryA |ukthe ka u svidantamaH || 8.64.9
ayaM te mAnuShe jane somaH pUruShu sUyate |tasyehi pra dravA piba || 8.64.10
ayaM te sharyaNAvati suShomAyAmadhi priyaH |ArjIkIye madintamaH || 8.64.11
tamadya rAdhase mahe chAruM madAya ghR^iShvaye |ehImindra dravA piba || 8.64.12

yadindra prAgapAguda~NnyagvA hUyase nR^ibhiH |A yAhi tUyamAshubhiH || 8.65.1
yadvA prasravaNe divo mAdayAse svarNare |yadvA samudre andhasaH || 8.65.2
A tvA gIrbhirmahAmuruM huve gAmiva bhojase |indra somasya pItaye || 8.65.3
A ta indra mahimAnaM harayo deva te mahaH |rathe vahantu bibhrataH || 8.65.4
indra gR^iNISha u stuShe mahA.N ugra IshAnakR^it |ehi naH sutaM piba || 8.65.5
sutAvantastvA vayaM prayasvanto havAmahe |idaM no barhirAsade || 8.65.6
yachchiddhi shashvatAmasIndra sAdhAraNastvam |taM tvA vayaM havAmahe || 8.65.7
idaM te somyaM madhvadhukShannadribhirnaraH |juShANa indra tatpiba || 8.65.8
vishvA.N aryo vipashchito.ati khyastUyamA gahi |asme dhehi shravo bR^ihat || 8.65.9
dAtA me pR^iShatInAM rAjA hiraNyavInAm |mA devA maghavA riShat || 8.65.10
sahasre pR^iShatInAmadhi shchandraM bR^ihatpR^ithu |shukraM hiraNyamA dade || 8.65.11
napAto durgahasya me sahasreNa surAdhasaH |shravo deveShvakrata || 8.65.12

tarobhirvo vidadvasumindraM sabAdha Utaye |bR^ihadgAyantaH sutasome adhvare huve bharaM na kAriNam || 8.66.1
na yaM dudhrA varante na sthirA muro made sushipramandhasaH |ya AdR^ityA shashamAnAya sunvate dAtA jaritra ukthyam || 8.66.2
yaH shakro mR^ikSho ashvyo yo vA kIjo hiraNyayaH |sa Urvasya rejayatyapAvR^itimindro gavyasya vR^itrahA || 8.66.3
nikhAtaM chidyaH purusambhR^itaM vasUdidvapati dAshuShe |vajrI sushipro haryashva itkaradindraH kratvA yathA vashat || 8.66.4
yadvAvantha puruShTuta purA chichChUra nR^iNAm |vayaM tatta indra saM bharAmasi yaj~namukthaM turaM vachaH || 8.66.5
sachA someShu puruhUta vajrivo madAya dyukSha somapAH |tvamiddhi brahmakR^ite kAmyaM vasu deShThaH sunvate bhuvaH || 8.66.6
vayamenamidA hyo.apIpemeha vajriNam |tasmA u adya samanA sutaM bharA nUnaM bhUShata shrute || 8.66.7
vR^ikashchidasya vAraNa urAmathirA vayuneShu bhUShati |semaM naH stomaM jujuShANa A gahIndra pra chitrayA dhiyA || 8.66.8
kadU nvasyAkR^itamindrasyAsti pauMsyam |keno nu kaM shromatena na shushruve januShaH pari vR^itrahA || 8.66.9
kadU mahIradhR^iShTA asya taviShIH kadu vR^itraghno astR^itam |indro vishvAnbekanATA.N ahardR^isha uta kratvA paNI.Nrabhi || 8.66.10
vayaM ghA te apUrvyendra brahmANi vR^itrahan |purUtamAsaH puruhUta vajrivo bhR^itiM na pra bharAmasi || 8.66.11
pUrvIshchiddhi tve tuvikUrminnAshaso havanta indrotayaH |tirashchidaryaH savanA vaso gahi shaviShTha shrudhi me havam || 8.66.12
vayaM ghA te tve idvindra viprA api Shmasi |nahi tvadanyaH puruhUta kashchana maghavannasti marDitA || 8.66.13
tvaM no asyA amateruta kShudho.abhishasterava spR^idhi |tvaM na UtI tava chitrayA dhiyA shikShA shachiShTha gAtuvit || 8.66.14
soma idvaH suto astu kalayo mA bibhItana |apedeSha dhvasmAyati svayaM ghaiSho apAyati || 8.66.15

tyAnnu kShatriyA.N ava AdityAnyAchiShAmahe |sumR^iLIkA.N abhiShTaye || 8.67.1
mitro no atyaMhatiM varuNaH parShadaryamA |AdityAso yathA viduH || 8.67.2
teShAM hi chitramukthyaM varUthamasti dAshuShe |AdityAnAmaraMkR^ite || 8.67.3
mahi vo mahatAmavo varuNa mitrAryaman |avAMsyA vR^iNImahe || 8.67.4

yadvaH shrAntAya sunvate varUthamasti yachChardiH |tenA no adhi vochata || 8.67.6
asti devA aMhorurvasti ratnamanAgasaH |AdityA adbhutainasaH || 8.67.7
mA naH setuH siShedayaM mahe vR^iNaktu naspari |indra iddhi shruto vashI || 8.67.8
mA no mR^ichA ripUNAM vR^ijinAnAmaviShyavaH |devA abhi pra mR^ikShata || 8.67.9
uta tvAmadite mahyahaM devyupa bruve |sumR^iLIkAmabhiShTaye || 8.67.10
parShi dIne gabhIra A.N ugraputre jighAMsataH |mAkistokasya no riShat || 8.67.11
aneho na uruvraja urUchi vi prasartave |kR^idhi tokAya jIvase || 8.67.12

vi Shu dveSho vyaMhatimAdityAso vi saMhitam |viShvagvi vR^ihatA rapaH || 8.67.21

A tvA rathaM yathotaye sumnAya vartayAmasi |tuvikUrmimR^itIShahamindra shaviShTha satpate || 8.68.1
tuvishuShma tuvikrato shachIvo vishvayA mate |A paprAtha mahitvanA || 8.68.2
yasya te mahinA mahaH pari jmAyantamIyatuH |hastA vajraM hiraNyayam || 8.68.3
vishvAnarasya vaspatimanAnatasya shavasaH |evaishcha charShaNInAmUtI huve rathAnAm || 8.68.4

na yuShme vAjabandhavo ninitsushchana martyaH |avadyamadhi dIdharat || 8.68.19

prapra vastriShTubhamiShaM mandadvIrAyendave |dhiyA vo medhasAtaye puraMdhyA vivAsati || 8.69.1
nadaM va odatInAM nadaM yoyuvatInAm |patiM vo aghnyAnAM dhenUnAmiShudhyasi || 8.69.2

abhi pra gopatiM girendramarcha yathA vide |sUnuM satyasya satpatim || 8.69.4
A harayaH sasR^ijrire.aruShIradhi barhiShi |yatrAbhi saMnavAmahe || 8.69.5
indrAya gAva AshiraM duduhre vajriNe madhu |yatsImupahvare vidat || 8.69.6

archata prArchata priyamedhAso archata |archantu putrakA uta puraM na dhR^iShNvarchata || 8.69.8
ava svarAti gargaro godhA pari saniShvaNat |pi~NgA pari chaniShkadadindrAya brahmodyatam || 8.69.9
A yatpatantyenyaH sudughA anapasphuraH |apasphuraM gR^ibhAyata somamindrAya pAtave || 8.69.10

arbhako na kumArako.adhi tiShThannavaM ratham |sa pakShanmahiShaM mR^igaM pitre mAtre vibhukratum || 8.69.15

yo rAjA charShaNInAM yAtA rathebhiradhriguH |vishvAsAM tarutA pR^itanAnAM jyeShTho yo vR^itrahA gR^iNe || 8.70.1

tvaM no agne mahobhiH pAhi vishvasyA arAteH |uta dviSho martyasya || 8.71.1

haviShkR^iNudhvamA gamadadhvaryurvanate punaH |vidvA.N asya prashAsanam || 8.72.1
ni tigmamabhyaMshuM sIdaddhotA manAvadhi |juShANo asya sakhyam || 8.72.2

udIrAthAmR^itAyate yu~njAthAmashvinA ratham |anti ShadbhUtu vAmavaH || 8.73.1

vishovisho vo atithiM vAjayantaH purupriyam |agniM vo duryaM vachaH stuShe shUShasya manmabhiH || 8.74.1

yukShvA hi devahUtamA.N ashvA.N agne rathIriva |ni hotA pUrvyaH sadaH || 8.75.1

imaM nu mAyinaM huva indramIshAnamojasA |marutvantaM na vR^i~njase || 8.76.1

jaj~nAno nu shatakraturvi pR^ichChaditi mAtaram |ka ugrAH ke ha shR^iNvire || 8.77.1

puroLAshaM no andhasa indra sahasramA bhara |shatA cha shUra gonAm || 8.78.1
A no bhara vya~njanaM gAmashvamabhya~njanam |sachA manA hiraNyayA || 8.78.2
uta naH karNashobhanA purUNi dhR^iShNavA bhara |tvaM hi shR^iNviShe vaso || 8.78.3
nakIM vR^idhIka indra te na suShA na sudA uta |nAnyastvachChUra vAghataH || 8.78.4
nakImindro nikartave na shakraH parishaktave |vishvaM shR^iNoti pashyati || 8.78.5
sa manyuM martyAnAmadabdho ni chikIShate |purA nidashchikIShate || 8.78.6
kratva itpUrNamudaraM turasyAsti vidhataH |vR^itraghnaH somapAvnaH || 8.78.7
tve vasUni saMgatA vishvA cha soma saubhagA |sudAtvaparihvR^itA || 8.78.8
tvAmidyavayurmama kAmo gavyurhiraNyayuH |tvAmashvayureShate || 8.78.9
tavedindrAhamAshasA haste dAtraM chanA dade |dinasya vA maghavansambhR^itasya vA pUrdhi yavasya kAshinA || 8.78.10

ayaM kR^itnuragR^ibhIto vishvajidudbhiditsomaH |R^iShirvipraH kAvyena || 8.79.1
abhyUrNoti yannagnaM bhiShakti vishvaM yatturam |premandhaH khyanniH shroNo bhUt || 8.79.2
tvaM soma tanUkR^idbhyo dveShobhyo.anyakR^itebhyaH |uru yantAsi varUtham || 8.79.3
tvaM chittI tava dakShairdiva A pR^ithivyA R^ijIShin |yAvIraghasya chiddveShaH || 8.79.4
arthino yanti chedarthaM gachChAniddaduSho rAtim |vavR^ijyustR^iShyataH kAmam || 8.79.5

nahyanyaM baLAkaraM marDitAraM shatakrato |tvaM na indra mR^iLaya || 8.80.1
yo naH shashvatpurAvithAmR^idhro vAjasAtaye |sa tvaM na indra mR^iLaya || 8.80.2
kima~Nga radhrachodanaH sunvAnasyAvitedasi |kuvitsvindra NaH shakaH || 8.80.3
indra pra No rathamava pashchAchchitsantamadrivaH |purastAdenaM me kR^idhi || 8.80.4
hanto nu kimAsase prathamaM no rathaM kR^idhi |upamaM vAjayu shravaH || 8.80.5
avA no vAjayuM rathaM sukaraM te kimitpari |asmAnsu jigyuShaskR^idhi || 8.80.6
indra dR^ihyasva pUrasi bhadrA ta eti niShkR^itam |iyaM dhIrR^itviyAvatI || 8.80.7
mA sImavadya A bhAgurvI kAShThA hitaM dhanam |apAvR^iktA aratnayaH || 8.80.8
turIyaM nAma yaj~niyaM yadA karastadushmasi |Aditpatirna ohase || 8.80.9
avIvR^idhadvo amR^itA amandIdekadyUrdevA uta yAshcha devIH |tasmA u rAdhaH kR^iNuta prashastaM prAtarmakShU dhiyAvasurjagamyAt || 8.80.10

A tU na indra kShumantaM chitraM grAbhaM saM gR^ibhAya |mahAhastI dakShiNena || 8.81.1
vidmA hi tvA tuvikUrmiM tuvideShNaM tuvImagham |tuvimAtramavobhiH || 8.81.2
nahi tvA shUra devA na martAso ditsantam |bhImaM na gAM vArayante || 8.81.3
eto nvindraM stavAmeshAnaM vasvaH svarAjam |na rAdhasA mardhiShannaH || 8.81.4
pra stoShadupa gAsiShachChravatsAma gIyamAnam |abhi rAdhasA jugurat || 8.81.5
A no bhara dakShiNenAbhi savyena pra mR^isha |indra mA no vasornirbhAk || 8.81.6
upa kramasvA bhara dhR^iShatA dhR^iShNo janAnAm |adAshUShTarasya vedaH || 8.81.7

A pra drava parAvato.arvAvatashcha vR^itrahan |madhvaH prati prabharmaNi || 8.82.1
tIvrAH somAsa A gahi sutAso mAdayiShNavaH |pibA dadhR^igyathochiShe || 8.82.2
iShA mandasvAdu te.araM varAya manyave |bhuvatta indra shaM hR^ide || 8.82.3
A tvashatravA gahi nyukthAni cha hUyase |upame rochane divaH || 8.82.4

devAnAmidavo mahattadA vR^iNImahe vayam |vR^iShNAmasmabhyamUtaye || 8.83.1
te naH santu yujaH sadA varuNo mitro aryamA |vR^idhAsashcha prachetasaH || 8.83.2
ati no viShpitA puru naubhirapo na parShatha |yUyamR^itasya rathyaH || 8.83.3

preShThaM vo atithiM stuShe mitramiva priyam |agniM rathaM na vedyam || 8.84.1

A me havaM nAsatyAshvinA gachChataM yuvam |madhvaH somasya pItaye || 8.85.1

ubhA hi dasrA bhiShajA mayobhuvobhA dakShasya vachaso babhUvathuH |tA vAM vishvako havate tanUkR^ithe mA no vi yauShTaM sakhyA mumochatam || 8.86.1

yuvaM hi ShmA purubhujemamedhatuM viShNApve dadathurvasya{}iShTaye |tA vAM vishvako havate tanUkR^ithe mA no vi yauShTaM sakhyA mumochatam || 8.86.3

dyumnI vAM stomo ashvinA krivirna seka A gatam |madhvaH sutasya sa divi priyo narA pAtaM gaurAviveriNe || 8.87.1

taM vo dasmamR^itIShahaM vasormandAnamandhasaH |abhi vatsaM na svasareShu dhenava indraM gIrbhirnavAmahe || 8.88.1

na tvA bR^ihanto adrayo varanta indra vILavaH |yadditsasi stuvate mAvate vasu nakiShTadA minAti te || 8.88.3

bR^ihadindrAya gAyata maruto vR^itrahantamam |yena jyotirajanayannR^itAvR^idho devaM devAya jAgR^ivi || 8.89.1

abhi pra bhara dhR^iShatA dhR^iShanmanaH shravashchitte asadbR^ihat |arShantvApo javasA vi mAtaro hano vR^itraM jayA svaH || 8.89.4

A no vishvAsu havya indraH samatsu bhUShatu |upa brahmANi savanAni vR^itrahA paramajyA R^ichIShamaH || 8.90.1

kanyA vAravAyatI somamapi srutAvidat |astaM bharantyabravIdindrAya sunavai tvA shakrAya sunavai tvA || 8.91.1

pAntamA vo andhasa indramabhi pra gAyata |vishvAsAhaM shatakratuM maMhiShThaM charShaNInAm || 8.92.1
puruhUtaM puruShTutaM gAthAnyaM sanashrutam |indra iti bravItana || 8.92.2
indra inno mahAnAM dAtA vAjAnAM nR^ituH |mahA.N abhij~nvA yamat || 8.92.3
apAdu shipryandhasaH sudakShasya prahoShiNaH |indorindro yavAshiraH || 8.92.4
tamvabhi prArchatendraM somasya pItaye |tadiddhyasya vardhanam || 8.92.5
asya pItvA madAnAM devo devasyaujasA |vishvAbhi bhuvanA bhuvat || 8.92.6
tyamu vaH satrAsAhaM vishvAsu gIrShvAyatam |A chyAvayasyUtaye || 8.92.7
yudhmaM santamanarvANaM somapAmanapachyutam |naramavAryakratum || 8.92.8
shikShA Na indra rAya A puru vidvA.N R^ichIShama |avA naH pArye dhane || 8.92.9
atashchidindra Na upA yAhi shatavAjayA |iShA sahasravAjayA || 8.92.10
ayAma dhIvato dhiyo.arvadbhiH shakra godare |jayema pR^itsu vajrivaH || 8.92.11
vayamu tvA shatakrato gAvo na yavaseShvA |uktheShu raNayAmasi || 8.92.12

tve su putra shavaso.avR^itrankAmakAtayaH |na tvAmindrAti richyate || 8.92.14
sa no vR^iShansaniShThayA saM ghorayA dravitnvA |dhiyAviDDhi puraMdhyA || 8.92.15
yaste nUnaM shatakratavindra dyumnitamo madaH |tena nUnaM made madeH || 8.92.16
yaste chitrashravastamo ya indra vR^itrahantamaH |ya ojodAtamo madaH || 8.92.17
vidmA hi yaste adrivastvAdattaH satya somapAH |vishvAsu dasma kR^iShTiShu || 8.92.18
indrAya madvane sutaM pari ShTobhantu no giraH |arkamarchantu kAravaH || 8.92.19
yasminvishvA adhi shriyo raNanti sapta saMsadaH |indraM sute havAmahe || 8.92.20
trikadrukeShu chetanaM devAso yaj~namatnata |tamidvardhantu no giraH || 8.92.21
A tvA vishantvindavaH samudramiva sindhavaH |na tvAmindrAti richyate || 8.92.22
vivyaktha mahinA vR^iShanbhakShaM somasya jAgR^ive |ya indra jaThareShu te || 8.92.23
araM ta indra kukShaye somo bhavatu vR^itrahan |araM dhAmabhya indavaH || 8.92.24
aramashvAya gAyati shrutakakSho araM gave |aramindrasya dhAmne || 8.92.25

parAkAttAchchidadrivastvAM nakShanta no giraH |araM gamAma te vayam || 8.92.27
evA hyasi vIrayurevA shUra uta sthiraH |evA te rAdhyaM manaH || 8.92.28
evA rAtistuvImagha vishvebhirdhAyi dhAtR^ibhiH |adhA chidindra me sachA || 8.92.29
mo Shu brahmeva tandrayurbhuvo vAjAnAM pate |matsvA sutasya gomataH || 8.92.30
mA na indrAbhyAdishaH sUro aktuShvA yaman |tvA yujA vanema tat || 8.92.31
tvayedindra yujA vayaM prati bruvImahi spR^idhaH |tvamasmAkaM tava smasi || 8.92.32
tvAmiddhi tvAyavo.anunonuvatashcharAn |sakhAya indra kAravaH || 8.92.33

udghedabhi shrutAmaghaM vR^iShabhaM naryApasam |astArameShi sUrya || 8.93.1
nava yo navatiM puro bibheda bAhvojasA |ahiM cha vR^itrahAvadhIt || 8.93.2
sa na indraH shivaH sakhAshvAvadgomadyavamat |urudhAreva dohate || 8.93.3
yadadya kachcha vR^itrahannudagA abhi sUrya |sarvaM tadindra te vashe || 8.93.4
yadvA pravR^iddha satpate na marA iti manyase |uto tatsatyamittava || 8.93.5
ye somAsaH parAvati ye arvAvati sunvire |sarvA.NstA.N indra gachChasi || 8.93.6
tamindraM vAjayAmasi mahe vR^itrAya hantave |sa vR^iShA vR^iShabho bhuvat || 8.93.7
indraH sa dAmane kR^ita ojiShThaH sa made hitaH |dyumnI shlokI sa somyaH || 8.93.8
girA vajro na sambhR^itaH sabalo anapachyutaH |vavakSha R^iShvo astR^itaH || 8.93.9
durge chinnaH sugaM kR^idhi gR^iNAna indra girvaNaH |tvaM cha maghavanvashaH || 8.93.10
yasya te nU chidAdishaM na minanti svarAjyam |na devo nAdhrigurjanaH || 8.93.11
adhA te apratiShkutaM devI shuShmaM saparyataH |ubhe sushipra rodasI || 8.93.12
tvametadadhArayaH kR^iShNAsu rohiNIShu cha |paruShNIShu rushatpayaH || 8.93.13
vi yadaheradha tviSho vishve devAso akramuH |vidanmR^igasya tA.N amaH || 8.93.14
Adu me nivaro bhuvadvR^itrahAdiShTa pauMsyam |ajAtashatrurastR^itaH || 8.93.15
shrutaM vo vR^itrahantamaM pra shardhaM charShaNInAm |A shuShe rAdhase mahe || 8.93.16
ayA dhiyA cha gavyayA puruNAmanpuruShTuta |yatsomesoma AbhavaH || 8.93.17
bodhinmanA idastu no vR^itrahA bhUryAsutiH |shR^iNotu shakra AshiSham || 8.93.18
kayA tvaM na UtyAbhi pra mandase vR^iShan |kayA stotR^ibhya A bhara || 8.93.19
kasya vR^iShA sute sachA niyutvAnvR^iShabho raNat |vR^itrahA somapItaye || 8.93.20
abhI Shu NastvaM rayiM mandasAnaH sahasriNam |prayantA bodhi dAshuShe || 8.93.21
patnIvantaH sutA ima ushanto yanti vItaye |apAM jagmirnichumpuNaH || 8.93.22
iShTA hotrA asR^ikShatendraM vR^idhAso adhvare |achChAvabhR^ithamojasA || 8.93.23
iha tyA sadhamAdyA harI hiraNyakeshyA |voLhAmabhi prayo hitam || 8.93.24
tubhyaM somAH sutA ime stIrNaM barhirvibhAvaso |stotR^ibhya indramA vaha || 8.93.25
A te dakShaM vi rochanA dadhadratnA vi dAshuShe |stotR^ibhya indramarchata || 8.93.26
A te dadhAmIndriyamukthA vishvA shatakrato |stotR^ibhya indra mR^iLaya || 8.93.27
bhadrambhadraM na A bhareShamUrjaM shatakrato |yadindra mR^iLayAsi naH || 8.93.28
sa no vishvAnyA bhara suvitAni shatakrato |yadindra mR^iLayAsi naH || 8.93.29
tvAmidvR^itrahantama sutAvanto havAmahe |yadindra mR^iLayAsi naH || 8.93.30
upa no haribhiH sutaM yAhi madAnAM pate |upa no haribhiH sutam || 8.93.31
dvitA yo vR^itrahantamo vida indraH shatakratuH |upa no haribhiH sutam || 8.93.32
tvaM hi vR^itrahanneShAM pAtA somAnAmasi |upa no haribhiH sutam || 8.93.33
indra iShe dadAtu na R^ibhukShaNamR^ibhuM rayim |vAjI dadAtu vAjinam || 8.93.34

gaurdhayati marutAM shravasyurmAtA maghonAm |yuktA vahnI rathAnAm || 8.94.1
yasyA devA upasthe vratA vishve dhArayante |sUryAmAsA dR^ishe kam || 8.94.2
tatsu no vishve arya A sadA gR^iNanti kAravaH |marutaH somapItaye || 8.94.3
asti somo ayaM sutaH pibantyasya marutaH |uta svarAjo ashvinA || 8.94.4
pibanti mitro aryamA tanA pUtasya varuNaH |triShadhasthasya jAvataH || 8.94.5
uto nvasya joShamA.N indraH sutasya gomataH |prAtarhoteva matsati || 8.94.6
kadatviShanta sUrayastira Apa iva sridhaH |arShanti pUtadakShasaH || 8.94.7
kadvo adya mahAnAM devAnAmavo vR^iNe |tmanA cha dasmavarchasAm || 8.94.8
A ye vishvA pArthivAni paprathanrochanA divaH |marutaH somapItaye || 8.94.9
tyAnnu pUtadakShaso divo vo maruto huve |asya somasya pItaye || 8.94.10
tyAnnu ye vi rodasI tastabhurmaruto huve |asya somasya pItaye || 8.94.11
tyaM nu mArutaM gaNaM giriShThAM vR^iShaNaM huve |asya somasya pItaye || 8.94.12

A tvA giro rathIrivAsthuH suteShu girvaNaH |abhi tvA samanUShatendra vatsaM na mAtaraH || 8.95.1
A tvA shukrA achuchyavuH sutAsa indra girvaNaH |pibA tvasyAndhasa indra vishvAsu te hitam || 8.95.2
pibA somaM madAya kamindra shyenAbhR^itaM sutam |tvaM hi shashvatInAM patI rAjA vishAmasi || 8.95.3
shrudhI havaM tirashchyA indra yastvA saparyati |suvIryasya gomato rAyaspUrdhi mahA.N asi || 8.95.4
indra yaste navIyasIM giraM mandrAmajIjanat |chikitvinmanasaM dhiyaM pratnAmR^itasya pipyuShIm || 8.95.5
tamu ShTavAma yaM gira indramukthAni vAvR^idhuH |purUNyasya pauMsyA siShAsanto vanAmahe || 8.95.6
eto nvindraM stavAma shuddhaM shuddhena sAmnA |shuddhairukthairvAvR^idhvAMsaM shuddha AshIrvAnmamattu || 8.95.7
indra shuddho na A gahi shuddhaH shuddhAbhirUtibhiH |shuddho rayiM ni dhAraya shuddho mamaddhi somyaH || 8.95.8
indra shuddho hi no rayiM shuddho ratnAni dAshuShe |shuddho vR^itrANi jighnase shuddho vAjaM siShAsasi || 8.95.9

asmA uShAsa Atiranta yAmamindrAya naktamUrmyAH suvAchaH |asmA Apo mAtaraH sapta tasthurnR^ibhyastarAya sindhavaH supArAH || 8.96.1
atividdhA vithureNA chidastrA triH sapta sAnu saMhitA girINAm |na taddevo na martyastuturyAdyAni pravR^iddho vR^iShabhashchakAra || 8.96.2
indrasya vajra Ayaso nimishla indrasya bAhvorbhUyiShThamojaH |shIrShannindrasya kratavo nireka AsanneShanta shrutyA upAke || 8.96.3
manye tvA yaj~niyaM yaj~niyAnAM manye tvA chyavanamachyutAnAm |manye tvA satvanAmindra ketuM manye tvA vR^iShabhaM charShaNInAm || 8.96.4
A yadvajraM bAhvorindra dhatse madachyutamahaye hantavA u |pra parvatA anavanta pra gAvaH pra brahmANo abhinakShanta indram || 8.96.5
tamu ShTavAma ya imA jajAna vishvA jAtAnyavarANyasmAt |indreNa mitraM didhiShema gIrbhirupo namobhirvR^iShabhaM vishema || 8.96.6
vR^itrasya tvA shvasathAdIShamANA vishve devA ajahurye sakhAyaH |marudbhirindra sakhyaM te astvathemA vishvAH pR^itanA jayAsi || 8.96.7
triH ShaShTistvA maruto vAvR^idhAnA usrA iva rAshayo yaj~niyAsaH |upa tvemaH kR^idhi no bhAgadheyaM shuShmaM ta enA haviShA vidhema || 8.96.8
tigmamAyudhaM marutAmanIkaM kasta indra prati vajraM dadharSha |anAyudhAso asurA adevAshchakreNa tA.N apa vapa R^ijIShin || 8.96.9
maha ugrAya tavase suvR^iktiM preraya shivatamAya pashvaH |girvAhase gira indrAya pUrvIrdhehi tanve kuvida~Nga vedat || 8.96.10
ukthavAhase vibhve manIShAM druNA na pAramIrayA nadInAm |ni spR^isha dhiyA tanvi shrutasya juShTatarasya kuvida~Nga vedat || 8.96.11
tadviviDDhi yatta indro jujoShatstuhi suShTutiM namasA vivAsa |upa bhUSha jaritarmA ruvaNyaH shrAvayA vAchaM kuvida~Nga vedat || 8.96.12
ava drapso aMshumatImatiShThadiyAnaH kR^iShNo dashabhiH sahasraiH |AvattamindraH shachyA dhamantamapa snehitIrnR^imaNA adhatta || 8.96.13
drapsamapashyaM viShuNe charantamupahvare nadyo aMshumatyAH |nabho na kR^iShNamavatasthivAMsamiShyAmi vo vR^iShaNo yudhyatAjau || 8.96.14
adha drapso aMshumatyA upasthe.adhArayattanvaM titviShANaH |visho adevIrabhyAcharantIrbR^ihaspatinA yujendraH sasAhe || 8.96.15
tvaM ha tyatsaptabhyo jAyamAno.ashatrubhyo abhavaH shatrurindra |gULhe dyAvApR^ithivI anvavindo vibhumadbhyo bhuvanebhyo raNaM dhAH || 8.96.16
tvaM ha tyadapratimAnamojo vajreNa vajrindhR^iShito jaghantha |tvaM shuShNasyAvAtiro vadhatraistvaM gA indra shachyedavindaH || 8.96.17
tvaM ha tyadvR^iShabha charShaNInAM ghano vR^itrANAM taviSho babhUtha |tvaM sindhU.NrasR^ijastastabhAnAntvamapo ajayo dAsapatnIH || 8.96.18
sa sukratU raNitA yaH suteShvanuttamanyuryo aheva revAn |ya eka innaryapAMsi kartA sa vR^itrahA pratIdanyamAhuH || 8.96.19
sa vR^itrahendrashcharShaNIdhR^ittaM suShTutyA havyaM huvema |sa prAvitA maghavA no.adhivaktA sa vAjasya shravasyasya dAtA || 8.96.20
sa vR^itrahendra R^ibhukShAH sadyo jaj~nAno havyo babhUva |kR^iNvannapAMsi naryA purUNi somo na pIto havyaH sakhibhyaH || 8.96.21

yA indra bhuja AbharaH svarvA.N asurebhyaH |stotAraminmaghavannasya vardhaya ye cha tve vR^iktabarhiShaH || 8.97.1
yamindra dadhiShe tvamashvaM gAM bhAgamavyayam |yajamAne sunvati dakShiNAvati tasmintaM dhehi mA paNau || 8.97.2
ya indra sastyavrato.anuShvApamadevayuH |svaiH Sha evairmumuratpoShyaM rayiM sanutardhehi taM tataH || 8.97.3
yachChakrAsi parAvati yadarvAvati vR^itrahan |atastvA gIrbhirdyugadindra keshibhiH sutAvA.N A vivAsati || 8.97.4
yadvAsi rochane divaH samudrasyAdhi viShTapi |yatpArthive sadane vR^itrahantama yadantarikSha A gahi || 8.97.5
sa naH someShu somapAH suteShu shavasaspate |mAdayasva rAdhasA sUnR^itAvatendra rAyA parINasA || 8.97.6
mA na indra parA vR^iNagbhavA naH sadhamAdyaH |tvaM na UtI tvaminna ApyaM mA na indra parA vR^iNak || 8.97.7
asme indra sachA sute ni ShadA pItaye madhu |kR^idhI jaritre maghavannavo mahadasme indra sachA sute || 8.97.8
na tvA devAsa Ashata na martyAso adrivaH |vishvA jAtAni shavasAbhibhUrasi na tvA devAsa Ashata || 8.97.9
vishvAH pR^itanA abhibhUtaraM naraM sajUstatakShurindraM jajanushcha rAjase |kratvA variShThaM vara AmurimutogramojiShThaM tavasaM tarasvinam || 8.97.10
samIM rebhAso asvarannindraM somasya pItaye |svarpatiM yadIM vR^idhe dhR^itavrato hyojasA samUtibhiH || 8.97.11
nemiM namanti chakShasA meShaM viprA abhisvarA |sudItayo vo adruho.api karNe tarasvinaH samR^ikvabhiH || 8.97.12
tamindraM johavImi maghavAnamugraM satrA dadhAnamapratiShkutaM shavAMsi |maMhiShTho gIrbhirA cha yaj~niyo vavartadrAye no vishvA supathA kR^iNotu vajrI || 8.97.13
tvaM pura indra chikidenA vyojasA shaviShTha shakra nAshayadhyai |tvadvishvAni bhuvanAni vajrindyAvA rejete pR^ithivI cha bhIShA || 8.97.14
tanma R^itamindra shUra chitra pAtvapo na vajrinduritAti parShi bhUri |kadA na indra rAya A dashasyervishvapsnyasya spR^ihayAyyasya rAjan || 8.97.15

indrAya sAma gAyata viprAya bR^ihate bR^ihat |dharmakR^ite vipashchite panasyave || 8.98.1
tvamindrAbhibhUrasi tvaM sUryamarochayaH |vishvakarmA vishvadevo mahA.N asi || 8.98.2
vibhrAja~njyotiShA svaragachCho rochanaM divaH |devAsta indra sakhyAya yemire || 8.98.3
endra no gadhi priyaH satrAjidagohyaH |girirna vishvataspR^ithuH patirdivaH || 8.98.4
abhi hi satya somapA ubhe babhUtha rodasI |indrAsi sunvato vR^idhaH patirdivaH || 8.98.5
tvaM hi shashvatInAmindra dartA purAmasi |hantA dasyormanorvR^idhaH patirdivaH || 8.98.6
adhA hIndra girvaNa upa tvA kAmAnmahaH sasR^ijmahe |udeva yanta udabhiH || 8.98.7
vArNa tvA yavyAbhirvardhanti shUra brahmANi |vAvR^idhvAMsaM chidadrivo divedive || 8.98.8
yu~njanti harI iShirasya gAthayorau ratha uruyuge |indravAhA vachoyujA || 8.98.9
tvaM na indrA bhara.N ojo nR^imNaM shatakrato vicharShaNe |A vIraM pR^itanAShaham || 8.98.10
tvaM hi naH pitA vaso tvaM mAtA shatakrato babhUvitha |adhA te sumnamImahe || 8.98.11
tvAM shuShminpuruhUta vAjayantamupa bruve shatakrato |sa no rAsva suvIryam || 8.98.12

tvAmidA hyo naro.apIpyanvajrinbhUrNayaH |sa indra stomavAhasAmiha shrudhyupa svasaramA gahi || 8.99.1
matsvA sushipra harivastadImahe tve A bhUShanti vedhasaH |tava shravAMsyupamAnyukthyA suteShvindra girvaNaH || 8.99.2
shrAyanta iva sUryaM vishvedindrasya bhakShata |vasUni jAte janamAna ojasA prati bhAgaM na dIdhima || 8.99.3
anarsharAtiM vasudAmupa stuhi bhadrA indrasya rAtayaH |so asya kAmaM vidhato na roShati mano dAnAya chodayan || 8.99.4
tvamindra pratUrtiShvabhi vishvA asi spR^idhaH |ashastihA janitA vishvatUrasi tvaM tUrya taruShyataH || 8.99.5
anu te shuShmaM turayantamIyatuH kShoNI shishuM na mAtarA |vishvAste spR^idhaH shnathayanta manyave vR^itraM yadindra tUrvasi || 8.99.6
ita UtI vo ajaraM prahetAramaprahitam |AshuM jetAraM hetAraM rathItamamatUrtaM tugryAvR^idham || 8.99.7
iShkartAramaniShkR^itaM sahaskR^itaM shatamUtiM shatakratum |samAnamindramavase havAmahe vasavAnaM vasUjuvam || 8.99.8

ayaM ta emi tanvA purastAdvishve devA abhi mA yanti pashchAt |yadA mahyaM dIdharo bhAgamindrAdinmayA kR^iNavo vIryANi || 8.100.1
dadhAmi te madhuno bhakShamagre hitaste bhAgaH suto astu somaH |asashcha tvaM dakShiNataH sakhA me.adhA vR^itrANi ja~NghanAva bhUri || 8.100.2
pra su stomaM bharata vAjayanta indrAya satyaM yadi satyamasti |nendro astIti nema u tva Aha ka IM dadarsha kamabhi ShTavAma || 8.100.3
ayamasmi jaritaH pashya meha vishvA jAtAnyabhyasmi mahnA |R^itasya mA pradisho vardhayantyAdardiro bhuvanA dardarImi || 8.100.4
A yanmA venA aruhannR^itasya.N ekamAsInaM haryatasya pR^iShThe |manashchinme hR^ida A pratyavochadachikrada~nChishumantaH sakhAyaH || 8.100.5
vishvettA te savaneShu pravAchyA yA chakartha maghavannindra sunvate |pArAvataM yatpurusambhR^itaM vasvapAvR^iNoH sharabhAya R^iShibandhave || 8.100.6
pra nUnaM dhAvatA pR^itha~Nneha yo vo avAvarIt |ni ShIM vR^itrasya marmaNi vajramindro apIpatat || 8.100.7
manojavA ayamAna AyasImataratpuram |divaM suparNo gatvAya somaM vajriNa Abharat || 8.100.8
samudre antaH shayata udnA vajro abhIvR^itaH |bharantyasmai saMyataH puraHprasravaNA balim || 8.100.9
yadvAgvadantyavichetanAni rAShTrI devAnAM niShasAda mandrA |chatasra UrjaM duduhe payAMsi kva svidasyAH paramaM jagAma || 8.100.10
devIM vAchamajanayanta devAstAM vishvarUpAH pashavo vadanti |sA no mandreShamUrjaM duhAnA dhenurvAgasmAnupa suShTutaitu || 8.100.11
sakhe viShNo vitaraM vi kramasva dyaurdehi lokaM vajrAya viShkabhe |hanAva vR^itraM riNachAva sindhUnindrasya yantu prasave visR^iShTAH || 8.100.12

R^idhagitthA sa martyaH shashame devatAtaye |yo nUnaM mitrAvaruNAvabhiShTaya Achakre havyadAtaye || 8.101.1
varShiShThakShatrA uruchakShasA narA rAjAnA dIrghashruttamA |tA bAhutA na daMsanA ratharyataH sAkaM sUryasya rashmibhiH || 8.101.2
pra yo vAM mitrAvaruNAjiro dUto adravat |ayaHshIrShA maderaghuH || 8.101.3
na yaH sampR^ichChe na punarhavItave na saMvAdAya ramate |tasmAnno adya samR^iteruruShyataM bAhubhyAM na uruShyatam || 8.101.4
pra mitrAya prAryamNe sachathyamR^itAvaso |varUthyaM varuNe ChandyaM vachaH stotraM rAjasu gAyata || 8.101.5
te hinvire aruNaM jenyaM vasvekaM putraM tisR^INAm |te dhAmAnyamR^itA martyAnAmadabdhA abhi chakShate || 8.101.6
A me vachAMsyudyatA dyumattamAni kartvA |ubhA yAtaM nAsatyA sajoShasA prati havyAni vItaye || 8.101.7
rAtiM yadvAmarakShasaM havAmahe yuvAbhyAM vAjinIvasU |prAchIM hotrAM pratirantAvitaM narA gR^iNAnA jamadagninA || 8.101.8
A no yaj~naM divispR^ishaM vAyo yAhi sumanmabhiH |antaH pavitra upari shrINAno.ayaM shukro ayAmi te || 8.101.9
vetyadhvaryuH pathibhI rajiShThaiH prati havyAni vItaye |adhA niyutva ubhayasya naH piba shuchiM somaM gavAshiram || 8.101.10
baNmahA.N asi sUrya baLAditya mahA.N asi |mahaste sato mahimA panasyate.addhA deva mahA.N asi || 8.101.11
baT sUrya shravasA mahA.N asi satrA deva mahA.N asi |mahnA devAnAmasuryaH purohito vibhu jyotiradAbhyam || 8.101.12
iyaM yA nIchyarkiNI rUpA rohiNyA kR^itA |chitreva pratyadarshyAyatyantardashasu bAhuShu || 8.101.13
prajA ha tisro atyAyamIyurnyanyA arkamabhito vivishre |bR^ihaddha tasthau bhuvaneShvantaH pavamAno harita A vivesha || 8.101.14
mAtA rudrANAM duhitA vasUnAM svasAdityAnAmamR^itasya nAbhiH |pra nu vochaM chikituShe janAya mA gAmanAgAmaditiM vadhiShTa || 8.101.15
vachovidaM vAchamudIrayantIM vishvAbhirdhIbhirupatiShThamAnAm |devIM devebhyaH paryeyuShIM gAmA mAvR^ikta martyo dabhrachetAH || 8.101.16

tvamagne bR^ihadvayo dadhAsi deva dAshuShe |kavirgR^ihapatiryuvA || 8.102.1
sa na ILAnayA saha devA.N agne duvasyuvA |chikidvibhAnavA vaha || 8.102.2
tvayA ha svidyujA vayaM chodiShThena yaviShThya |abhi Shmo vAjasAtaye || 8.102.3
aurvabhR^iguvachChuchimapnavAnavadA huve |agniM samudravAsasam || 8.102.4
huve vAtasvanaM kaviM parjanyakrandyaM sahaH |agniM samudravAsasam || 8.102.5
A savaM savituryathA bhagasyeva bhujiM huve |agniM samudravAsasam || 8.102.6
agniM vo vR^idhantamadhvarANAM purUtamam |achChA naptre sahasvate || 8.102.7
ayaM yathA na AbhuvattvaShTA rUpeva takShyA |asya kratvA yashasvataH || 8.102.8
ayaM vishvA abhi shriyo.agnirdeveShu patyate |A vAjairupa no gamat || 8.102.9
vishveShAmiha stuhi hotR^INAM yashastamam |agniM yaj~neShu pUrvyam || 8.102.10
shIraM pAvakashochiShaM jyeShTho yo dameShvA |dIdAya dIrghashruttamaH || 8.102.11
tamarvantaM na sAnasiM gR^iNIhi vipra shuShmiNam |mitraM na yAtayajjanam || 8.102.12
upa tvA jAmayo giro dedishatIrhaviShkR^itaH |vAyoranIke asthiran || 8.102.13
yasya tridhAtvavR^itaM barhistasthAvasaMdinam |Apashchinni dadhA padam || 8.102.14
padaM devasya mILhuSho.anAdhR^iShTAbhirUtibhiH |bhadrA sUrya ivopadR^ik || 8.102.15
agne ghR^itasya dhItibhistepAno deva shochiShA |A devAnvakShi yakShi cha || 8.102.16
taM tvAjananta mAtaraH kaviM devAso a~NgiraH |havyavAhamamartyam || 8.102.17
prachetasaM tvA kave.agne dUtaM vareNyam |havyavAhaM ni Shedire || 8.102.18
nahi me astyaghnyA na svadhitirvananvati |athaitAdR^igbharAmi te || 8.102.19
yadagne kAni kAni chidA te dArUNi dadhmasi |tA juShasva yaviShThya || 8.102.20
yadattyupajihvikA yadvamro atisarpati |sarvaM tadastu te ghR^itam || 8.102.21
agnimindhAno manasA dhiyaM sacheta martyaH |agnimIdhe vivasvabhiH || 8.102.22

adarshi gAtuvittamo yasminvratAnyAdadhuH |upo Shu jAtamAryasya vardhanamagniM nakShanta no giraH || 8.103.1
