rujA dR^iLhA chidrakShasaH sadAMsi punAna inda UrNuhi vi vAjAn |vR^ishchopariShTAttujatA vadhena ye anti dUrAdupanAyameShAm || 9.91.4
sa pratnavannavyase vishvavAra sUktAya pathaH kR^iNuhi prAchaH |ye duHShahAso vanuShA bR^ihantastA.Nste ashyAma purukR^itpurukSho || 9.91.5
evA punAno apaH svargA asmabhyaM tokA tanayAni bhUri |shaM naH kShetramuru jyotIMShi soma jyo~NnaH sUryaM dR^ishaye rirIhi || 9.91.6

pari suvAno hariraMshuH pavitre ratho na sarji sanaye hiyAnaH |ApachChlokamindriyaM pUyamAnaH prati devA.N ajuShata prayobhiH || 9.92.1
achChA nR^ichakShA asaratpavitre nAma dadhAnaH kavirasya yonau |sIdanhoteva sadane chamUShUpemagmannR^iShayaH sapta viprAH || 9.92.2
pra sumedhA gAtuvidvishvadevaH somaH punAnaH sada eti nityam |bhuvadvishveShu kAvyeShu rantAnu janAnyatate pa~ncha dhIraH || 9.92.3
tava tye soma pavamAna niNye vishve devAstraya ekAdashAsaH |dasha svadhAbhiradhi sAno avye mR^ijanti tvA nadyaH sapta yahvIH || 9.92.4
tannu satyaM pavamAnasyAstu yatra vishve kAravaH saMnasanta |jyotiryadahne akR^iNodu lokaM prAvanmanuM dasyave karabhIkam || 9.92.5
pari sadmeva pashumAnti hotA rAjA na satyaH samitIriyAnaH |somaH punAnaH kalashA.N ayAsItsIdanmR^igo na mahiSho vaneShu || 9.92.6

sAkamukSho marjayanta svasAro dasha dhIrasya dhItayo dhanutrIH |hariH paryadravajjAH sUryasya droNaM nanakShe atyo na vAjI || 9.93.1
saM mAtR^ibhirna shishurvAvashAno vR^iShA dadhanve puruvAro adbhiH |maryo na yoShAmabhi niShkR^itaM yansaM gachChate kalasha usriyAbhiH || 9.93.2
uta pra pipya UdharaghnyAyA indurdhArAbhiH sachate sumedhAH |mUrdhAnaM gAvaH payasA chamUShvabhi shrINanti vasubhirna niktaiH || 9.93.3
sa no devebhiH pavamAna radendo rayimashvinaM vAvashAnaH |rathirAyatAmushatI puraMdhirasmadryagA dAvane vasUnAm || 9.93.4
nU no rayimupa mAsva nR^ivantaM punAno vAtApyaM vishvashchandram |pra vanditurindo tAryAyuH prAtarmakShU dhiyAvasurjagamyAt || 9.93.5

adhi yadasminvAjinIva shubhaH spardhante dhiyaH sUrye na vishaH |apo vR^iNAnaH pavate kavIyanvrajaM na pashuvardhanAya manma || 9.94.1
dvitA vyUrNvannamR^itasya dhAma svarvide bhuvanAni prathanta |dhiyaH pinvAnAH svasare na gAva R^itAyantIrabhi vAvashra indum || 9.94.2
pari yatkaviH kAvyA bharate shUro na ratho bhuvanAni vishvA |deveShu yasho martAya bhUShandakShAya rAyaH purubhUShu navyaH || 9.94.3
shriye jAtaH shriya A niriyAya shriyaM vayo jaritR^ibhyo dadhAti |shriyaM vasAnA amR^itatvamAyanbhavanti satyA samithA mitadrau || 9.94.4
iShamUrjamabhyarShAshvaM gAmuru jyotiH kR^iNuhi matsi devAn |vishvAni hi suShahA tAni tubhyaM pavamAna bAdhase soma shatrUn || 9.94.5

kanikranti harirA sR^ijyamAnaH sIdanvanasya jaThare punAnaH |nR^ibhiryataH kR^iNute nirNijaM gA ato matIrjanayata svadhAbhiH || 9.95.1
hariH sR^ijAnaH pathyAmR^itasyeyarti vAchamariteva nAvam |devo devAnAM guhyAni nAmAviShkR^iNoti barhiShi pravAche || 9.95.2
apAmivedUrmayastarturANAH pra manIShA Irate somamachCha |namasyantIrupa cha yanti saM chA cha vishantyushatIrushantam || 9.95.3
taM marmR^ijAnaM mahiShaM na sAnAvaMshuM duhantyukShaNaM giriShThAm |taM vAvashAnaM matayaH sachante trito bibharti varuNaM samudre || 9.95.4
iShyanvAchamupavakteva hotuH punAna indo vi ShyA manIShAm |indrashcha yatkShayathaH saubhagAya suvIryasya patayaH syAma || 9.95.5

pra senAnIH shUro agre rathAnAM gavyanneti harShate asya senA |bhadrAnkR^iNvannindrahavAnsakhibhya A somo vastrA rabhasAni datte || 9.96.1
samasya hariM harayo mR^ijantyashvahayairanishitaM namobhiH |A tiShThati rathamindrasya sakhA vidvA.N enA sumatiM yAtyachCha || 9.96.2
sa no deva devatAte pavasva mahe soma psarasa indrapAnaH |kR^iNvannapo varShayandyAmutemAmurorA no varivasyA punAnaH || 9.96.3
ajItaye.ahataye pavasva svastaye sarvatAtaye bR^ihate |tadushanti vishva ime sakhAyastadahaM vashmi pavamAna soma || 9.96.4
somaH pavate janitA matInAM janitA divo janitA pR^ithivyAH |janitAgnerjanitA sUryasya janitendrasya janitota viShNoH || 9.96.5
brahmA devAnAM padavIH kavInAmR^iShirviprANAM mahiSho mR^igANAm |shyeno gR^idhrANAM svadhitirvanAnAM somaH pavitramatyeti rebhan || 9.96.6
prAvIvipadvAcha UrmiM na sindhurgiraH somaH pavamAno manIShAH |antaH pashyanvR^ijanemAvarANyA tiShThati vR^iShabho goShu jAnan || 9.96.7
sa matsaraH pR^itsu vanvannavAtaH sahasraretA abhi vAjamarSha |indrAyendo pavamAno manIShyaMshorUrmimIraya gA iShaNyan || 9.96.8
pari priyaH kalashe devavAta indrAya somo raNyo madAya |sahasradhAraH shatavAja indurvAjI na saptiH samanA jigAti || 9.96.9
sa pUrvyo vasuvijjAyamAno mR^ijAno apsu duduhAno adrau |abhishastipA bhuvanasya rAjA vidadgAtuM brahmaNe pUyamAnaH || 9.96.10
tvayA hi naH pitaraH soma pUrve karmANi chakruH pavamAna dhIrAH |vanvannavAtaH paridhI.NraporNu vIrebhirashvairmaghavA bhavA naH || 9.96.11
yathApavathA manave vayodhA amitrahA varivoviddhaviShmAn |evA pavasva draviNaM dadhAna indre saM tiShTha janayAyudhAni || 9.96.12
pavasva soma madhumA.N R^itAvApo vasAno adhi sAno avye |ava droNAni ghR^itavAnti sIda madintamo matsara indrapAnaH || 9.96.13
vR^iShTiM divaH shatadhAraH pavasva sahasrasA vAjayurdevavItau |saM sindhubhiH kalashe vAvashAnaH samusriyAbhiH pratiranna AyuH || 9.96.14
eSha sya somo matibhiH punAno.atyo na vAjI taratIdarAtIH |payo na dugdhamaditeriShiramurviva gAtuH suyamo na voLhA || 9.96.15
svAyudhaH sotR^ibhiH pUyamAno.abhyarSha guhyaM chAru nAma |abhi vAjaM saptiriva shravasyAbhi vAyumabhi gA deva soma || 9.96.16
shishuM jaj~nAnaM haryataM mR^ijanti shumbhanti vahniM maruto gaNena |kavirgIrbhiH kAvyenA kaviH sansomaH pavitramatyeti rebhan || 9.96.17
R^iShimanA ya R^iShikR^itsvarShAH sahasraNIthaH padavIH kavInAm |tR^itIyaM dhAma mahiShaH siShAsansomo virAjamanu rAjati ShTup || 9.96.18
chamUShachChyenaH shakuno vibhR^itvA govindurdrapsa AyudhAni bibhrat |apAmUrmiM sachamAnaH samudraM turIyaM dhAma mahiSho vivakti || 9.96.19
maryo na shubhrastanvaM mR^ijAno.atyo na sR^itvA sanaye dhanAnAm |vR^iSheva yUthA pari koshamarShankanikradachchamvorA vivesha || 9.96.20
pavasvendo pavamAno mahobhiH kanikradatpari vArANyarSha |krILa~nchamvorA visha pUyamAna indraM te raso madiro mamattu || 9.96.21
prAsya dhArA bR^ihatIrasR^igrannakto gobhiH kalashA.N A vivesha |sAma kR^iNvansAmanyo vipashchitkrandannetyabhi sakhyurna jAmim || 9.96.22
apaghnanneShi pavamAna shatrUnpriyAM na jAro abhigIta induH |sIdanvaneShu shakuno na patvA somaH punAnaH kalasheShu sattA || 9.96.23
A te ruchaH pavamAnasya soma yoSheva yanti sudughAH sudhArAH |harirAnItaH puruvAro apsvachikradatkalashe devayUnAm || 9.96.24

asya preShA hemanA pUyamAno devo devebhiH samapR^ikta rasam |sutaH pavitraM paryeti rebhanmiteva sadma pashumAnti hotA || 9.97.1
bhadrA vastrA samanyA vasAno mahAnkavirnivachanAni shaMsan |A vachyasva chamvoH pUyamAno vichakShaNo jAgR^ivirdevavItau || 9.97.2
samu priyo mR^ijyate sAno avye yashastaro yashasAM kShaito asme |abhi svara dhanvA pUyamAno yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 9.97.3
pra gAyatAbhyarchAma devAnsomaM hinota mahate dhanAya |svAduH pavAte ati vAramavyamA sIdAti kalashaM devayurnaH || 9.97.4
indurdevAnAmupa sakhyamAyansahasradhAraH pavate madAya |nR^ibhiH stavAno anu dhAma pUrvamagannindraM mahate saubhagAya || 9.97.5
stotre rAye harirarShA punAna indraM mado gachChatu te bharAya |devairyAhi sarathaM rAdho achChA yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 9.97.6
pra kAvyamushaneva bruvANo devo devAnAM janimA vivakti |mahivrataH shuchibandhuH pAvakaH padA varAho abhyeti rebhan || 9.97.7
pra haMsAsastR^ipalaM manyumachChAmAdastaM vR^iShagaNA ayAsuH |A~NgUShyaM pavamAnaM sakhAyo durmarShaM sAkaM pra vadanti vANam || 9.97.8
sa raMhata urugAyasya jUtiM vR^ithA krILantaM mimate na gAvaH |parINasaM kR^iNute tigmashR^i~Ngo divA harirdadR^ishe naktamR^ijraH || 9.97.9
indurvAjI pavate gonyoghA indre somaH saha invanmadAya |hanti rakSho bAdhate paryarAtIrvarivaH kR^iNvanvR^ijanasya rAjA || 9.97.10
adha dhArayA madhvA pR^ichAnastiro roma pavate adridugdhaH |indurindrasya sakhyaM juShANo devo devasya matsaro madAya || 9.97.11
abhi priyANi pavate punAno devo devAnsvena rasena pR^i~nchan |indurdharmANyR^ituthA vasAno dasha kShipo avyata sAno avye || 9.97.12
vR^iShA shoNo abhikanikradadgA nadayanneti pR^ithivImuta dyAm |indrasyeva vagnurA shR^iNva Ajau prachetayannarShati vAchamemAm || 9.97.13
rasAyyaH payasA pinvamAna IrayanneShi madhumantamaMshum |pavamAnaH saMtanimeShi kR^iNvannindrAya soma pariShichyamAnaH || 9.97.14
evA pavasva madiro madAyodagrAbhasya namayanvadhasnaiH |pari varNaM bharamANo rushantaM gavyurno arSha pari soma siktaH || 9.97.15
juShTvI na indo supathA sugAnyurau pavasva varivAMsi kR^iNvan |ghaneva viShvagduritAni vighnannadhi ShNunA dhanva sAno avye || 9.97.16
vR^iShTiM no arSha divyAM jigatnumiLAvatIM shaMgayIM jIradAnum |stukeva vItA dhanvA vichinvanbandhU.NrimA.N avarA.N indo vAyUn || 9.97.17
granthiM na vi Shya grathitaM punAna R^ijuM cha gAtuM vR^ijinaM cha soma |atyo na krado harirA sR^ijAno maryo deva dhanva pastyAvAn || 9.97.18
juShTo madAya devatAta indo pari ShNunA dhanva sAno avye |sahasradhAraH surabhiradabdhaH pari srava vAjasAtau nR^iShahye || 9.97.19
arashmAno ye.arathA ayuktA atyAso na sasR^ijAnAsa Ajau |ete shukrAso dhanvanti somA devAsastA.N upa yAtA pibadhyai || 9.97.20
evA na indo abhi devavItiM pari srava nabho arNashchamUShu |somo asmabhyaM kAmyaM bR^ihantaM rayiM dadAtu vIravantamugram || 9.97.21
takShadyadI manaso venato vAgjyeShThasya vA dharmaNi kShoranIke |AdImAyanvaramA vAvashAnA juShTaM patiM kalashe gAva indum || 9.97.22
pra dAnudo divyo dAnupinva R^itamR^itAya pavate sumedhAH |dharmA bhuvadvR^ijanyasya rAjA pra rashmibhirdashabhirbhAri bhUma || 9.97.23
pavitrebhiH pavamAno nR^ichakShA rAjA devAnAmuta martyAnAm |dvitA bhuvadrayipatI rayINAmR^itaM bharatsubhR^itaM chArvinduH || 9.97.24
arvA.N iva shravase sAtimachChendrasya vAyorabhi vItimarSha |sa naH sahasrA bR^ihatIriSho dA bhavA soma draviNovitpunAnaH || 9.97.25
devAvyo naH pariShichyamAnAH kShayaM suvIraM dhanvantu somAH |AyajyavaH sumatiM vishvavArA hotAro na diviyajo mandratamAH || 9.97.26
evA deva devatAte pavasva mahe soma psarase devapAnaH |mahashchiddhi Shmasi hitAH samarye kR^idhi suShThAne rodasI punAnaH || 9.97.27
ashvo no krado vR^iShabhiryujAnaH siMho na bhImo manaso javIyAn |arvAchInaiH pathibhirye rajiShThA A pavasva saumanasaM na indo || 9.97.28
shataM dhArA devajAtA asR^igransahasramenAH kavayo mR^ijanti |indo sanitraM diva A pavasva pura/etAsi mahato dhanasya || 9.97.29
divo na sargA asasR^igramahnAM rAjA na mitraM pra minAti dhIraH |piturna putraH kratubhiryatAna A pavasva vishe asyA ajItim || 9.97.30
pra te dhArA madhumatIrasR^igranvArAnyatpUto atyeShyavyAn |pavamAna pavase dhAma gonAM jaj~nAnaH sUryamapinvo arkaiH || 9.97.31
kanikradadanu panthAmR^itasya shukro vi bhAsyamR^itasya dhAma |sa indrAya pavase matsaravAnhinvAno vAchaM matibhiH kavInAm || 9.97.32
divyaH suparNo.ava chakShi soma pinvandhArAH karmaNA devavItau |endo visha kalashaM somadhAnaM krandannihi sUryasyopa rashmim || 9.97.33
tisro vAcha Irayati pra vahnirR^itasya dhItiM brahmaNo manIShAm |gAvo yanti gopatiM pR^ichChamAnAH somaM yanti matayo vAvashAnAH || 9.97.34
somaM gAvo dhenavo vAvashAnAH somaM viprA matibhiH pR^ichChamAnAH |somaH sutaH pUyate ajyamAnaH some arkAstriShTubhaH saM navante || 9.97.35
evA naH soma pariShichyamAna A pavasva pUyamAnaH svasti |indramA visha bR^ihatA raveNa vardhayA vAchaM janayA puraMdhim || 9.97.36
A jAgR^ivirvipra R^itA matInAM somaH punAno asadachchamUShu |sapanti yaM mithunAso nikAmA adhvaryavo rathirAsaH suhastAH || 9.97.37
sa punAna upa sUre na dhAtobhe aprA rodasI vi Sha AvaH |priyA chidyasya priyasAsa UtI sa tU dhanaM kAriNe na pra yaMsat || 9.97.38
sa vardhitA vardhanaH pUyamAnaH somo mIDhvA.N abhi no jyotiShAvIt |yenA naH pUrve pitaraH padaj~nAH svarvido abhi gA adrimuShNan || 9.97.39
akrAnsamudraH prathame vidharma~njanayanprajA bhuvanasya rAjA |vR^iShA pavitre adhi sAno avye bR^ihatsomo vAvR^idhe suvAna induH || 9.97.40
mahattatsomo mahiShashchakArApAM yadgarbho.avR^iNIta devAn |adadhAdindre pavamAna ojo.ajanayatsUrye jyotirinduH || 9.97.41
matsi vAyumiShTaye rAdhase cha matsi mitrAvaruNA pUyamAnaH |matsi shardho mArutaM matsi devAnmatsi dyAvApR^ithivI deva soma || 9.97.42
R^ijuH pavasva vR^ijinasya hantApAmIvAM bAdhamAno mR^idhashcha |abhishrINanpayaH payasAbhi gonAmindrasya tvaM tava vayaM sakhAyaH || 9.97.43
madhvaH sUdaM pavasva vasva utsaM vIraM cha na A pavasvA bhagaM cha |svadasvendrAya pavamAna indo rayiM cha na A pavasvA samudrAt || 9.97.44
somaH suto dhArayAtyo na hitvA sindhurna nimnamabhi vAjyakShAH |A yoniM vanyamasadatpunAnaH samindurgobhirasaratsamadbhiH || 9.97.45
eSha sya te pavata indra somashchamUShu dhIra ushate tavasvAn |svarchakShA rathiraH satyashuShmaH kAmo na yo devayatAmasarji || 9.97.46
eSha pratnena vayasA punAnastiro varpAMsi duhiturdadhAnaH |vasAnaH sharma trivarUthamapsu hoteva yAti samaneShu rebhan || 9.97.47
nU nastvaM rathiro deva soma pari srava chamvoH pUyamAnaH |apsu svAdiShTho madhumA.N R^itAvA devo na yaH savitA satyamanmA || 9.97.48
abhi vAyuM vItyarShA gR^iNAno.abhi mitrAvaruNA pUyamAnaH |abhI naraM dhIjavanaM ratheShThAmabhIndraM vR^iShaNaM vajrabAhum || 9.97.49
abhi vastrA suvasanAnyarShAbhi dhenUH sudughAH pUyamAnaH |abhi chandrA bhartave no hiraNyAbhyashvAnrathino deva soma || 9.97.50
abhI no arSha divyA vasUnyabhi vishvA pArthivA pUyamAnaH |abhi yena draviNamashnavAmAbhyArSheyaM jamadagnivannaH || 9.97.51
ayA pavA pavasvainA vasUni mA.Nshchatva indo sarasi pra dhanva |bradhnashchidatra vAto na jUtaH purumedhashchittakave naraM dAt || 9.97.52
uta na enA pavayA pavasvAdhi shrute shravAyyasya tIrthe |ShaShTiM sahasrA naiguto vasUni vR^ikShaM na pakvaM dhUnavadraNAya || 9.97.53
mahIme asya vR^iShanAma shUShe mA.Nshchatve vA pR^ishane vA vadhatre |asvApayannigutaH snehayachchApAmitrA.N apAchito achetaH || 9.97.54
saM trI pavitrA vitatAnyeShyanvekaM dhAvasi pUyamAnaH |asi bhago asi dAtrasya dAtAsi maghavA maghavadbhya indo || 9.97.55
eSha vishvavitpavate manIShI somo vishvasya bhuvanasya rAjA |drapsA.N IrayanvidatheShvindurvi vAramavyaM samayAti yAti || 9.97.56
induM rihanti mahiShA adabdhAH pade rebhanti kavayo na gR^idhrAH |hinvanti dhIrA dashabhiH kShipAbhiH sama~njate rUpamapAM rasena || 9.97.57
tvayA vayaM pavamAnena soma bhare kR^itaM vi chinuyAma shashvat |tanno mitro varuNo mAmahantAmaditiH sindhuH pR^ithivI uta dyauH || 9.97.58

abhi no vAjasAtamaM rayimarSha puruspR^iham |indo sahasrabharNasaM tuvidyumnaM vibhvAsaham || 9.98.1
pari Shya suvAno avyayaM rathe na varmAvyata |indurabhi druNA hito hiyAno dhArAbhirakShAH || 9.98.2
pari Shya suvAno akShA induravye madachyutaH |dhArA ya Urdhvo adhvare bhrAjA naiti gavyayuH || 9.98.3
sa hi tvaM deva shashvate vasu martAya dAshuShe |indo sahasriNaM rayiM shatAtmAnaM vivAsasi || 9.98.4
vayaM te asya vR^itrahanvaso vasvaH puruspR^ihaH |ni nediShThatamA iShaH syAma sumnasyAdhrigo || 9.98.5
dviryaM pa~ncha svayashasaM svasAro adrisaMhatam |priyamindrasya kAmyaM prasnApayantyUrmiNam || 9.98.6
pari tyaM haryataM hariM babhruM punanti vAreNa |yo devAnvishvA.N itpari madena saha gachChati || 9.98.7
asya vo hyavasA pAnto dakShasAdhanam |yaH sUriShu shravo bR^ihaddadhe svarNa haryataH || 9.98.8
sa vAM yaj~neShu mAnavI indurjaniShTa rodasI |devo devI giriShThA asredhantaM tuviShvaNi || 9.98.9
indrAya soma pAtave vR^itraghne pari Shichyase |nare cha dakShiNAvate devAya sadanAsade || 9.98.10
te pratnAso vyuShTiShu somAH pavitre akSharan |apaprothantaH sanutarhurashchitaH prAtastA.N aprachetasaH || 9.98.11
taM sakhAyaH puroruchaM yUyaM vayaM cha sUrayaH |ashyAma vAjagandhyaM sanema vAjapastyam || 9.98.12

A haryatAya dhR^iShNave dhanustanvanti pauMsyam |shukrAM vayantyasurAya nirNijaM vipAmagre mahIyuvaH || 9.99.1
adha kShapA pariShkR^ito vAjA.N abhi pra gAhate |yadI vivasvato dhiyo hariM hinvanti yAtave || 9.99.2
tamasya marjayAmasi mado ya indrapAtamaH |yaM gAva AsabhirdadhuH purA nUnaM cha sUrayaH || 9.99.3
taM gAthayA purANyA punAnamabhyanUShata |uto kR^ipanta dhItayo devAnAM nAma bibhratIH || 9.99.4
tamukShamANamavyaye vAre punanti dharNasim |dUtaM na pUrvachittaya A shAsate manIShiNaH || 9.99.5
sa punAno madintamaH somashchamUShu sIdati |pashau na reta Adadhatpatirvachasyate dhiyaH || 9.99.6
sa mR^ijyate sukarmabhirdevo devebhyaH sutaH |vide yadAsu saMdadirmahIrapo vi gAhate || 9.99.7
suta indo pavitra A nR^ibhiryato vi nIyase |indrAya matsarintamashchamUShvA ni ShIdasi || 9.99.8

abhI navante adruhaH priyamindrasya kAmyam |vatsaM na pUrva Ayuni jAtaM rihanti mAtaraH || 9.100.1
punAna indavA bhara soma dvibarhasaM rayim |tvaM vasUni puShyasi vishvAni dAshuSho gR^ihe || 9.100.2
tvaM dhiyaM manoyujaM sR^ijA vR^iShTiM na tanyatuH |tvaM vasUni pArthivA divyA cha soma puShyasi || 9.100.3
pari te jigyuSho yathA dhArA sutasya dhAvati |raMhamANA vyavyayaM vAraM vAjIva sAnasiH || 9.100.4
kratve dakShAya naH kave pavasva soma dhArayA |indrAya pAtave suto mitrAya varuNAya cha || 9.100.5
pavasva vAjasAtamaH pavitre dhArayA sutaH |indrAya soma viShNave devebhyo madhumattamaH || 9.100.6
tvAM rihanti mAtaro hariM pavitre adruhaH |vatsaM jAtaM na dhenavaH pavamAna vidharmaNi || 9.100.7
pavamAna mahi shravashchitrebhiryAsi rashmibhiH |shardhantamAMsi jighnase vishvAni dAshuSho gR^ihe || 9.100.8
tvaM dyAM cha mahivrata pR^ithivIM chAti jabhriShe |prati drApimamu~nchathAH pavamAna mahitvanA || 9.100.9

purojitI vo andhasaH sutAya mAdayitnave |apa shvAnaM shnathiShTana sakhAyo dIrghajihvyam || 9.101.1
yo dhArayA pAvakayA pariprasyandate sutaH |indurashvo na kR^itvyaH || 9.101.2
taM duroShamabhI naraH somaM vishvAchyA dhiyA |yaj~naM hinvantyadribhiH || 9.101.3
sutAso madhumattamAH somA indrAya mandinaH |pavitravanto akSharandevAngachChantu vo madAH || 9.101.4
indurindrAya pavata iti devAso abruvan |vAchaspatirmakhasyate vishvasyeshAna ojasA || 9.101.5
sahasradhAraH pavate samudro vAchamI~NkhayaH |somaH patI rayINAM sakhendrasya divedive || 9.101.6
ayaM pUShA rayirbhagaH somaH punAno arShati |patirvishvasya bhUmano vyakhyadrodasI ubhe || 9.101.7
samu priyA anUShata gAvo madAya ghR^iShvayaH |somAsaH kR^iNvate pathaH pavamAnAsa indavaH || 9.101.8
ya ojiShThastamA bhara pavamAna shravAyyam |yaH pa~ncha charShaNIrabhi rayiM yena vanAmahai || 9.101.9
somAH pavanta indavo.asmabhyaM gAtuvittamAH |mitrAH suvAnA arepasaH svAdhyaH svarvidaH || 9.101.10
suShvANAso vyadribhishchitAnA goradhi tvachi |iShamasmabhyamabhitaH samasvaranvasuvidaH || 9.101.11
ete pUtA vipashchitaH somAso dadhyAshiraH |sUryAso na darshatAso jigatnavo dhruvA ghR^ite || 9.101.12
pra sunvAnasyAndhaso marto na vR^ita tadvachaH |apa shvAnamarAdhasaM hatA makhaM na bhR^igavaH || 9.101.13
A jAmiratke avyata bhuje na putra oNyoH |sarajjAro na yoShaNAM varo na yonimAsadam || 9.101.14
sa vIro dakShasAdhano vi yastastambha rodasI |hariH pavitre avyata vedhA na yonimAsadam || 9.101.15
avyo vArebhiH pavate somo gavye adhi tvachi |kanikradadvR^iShA haririndrasyAbhyeti niShkR^itam || 9.101.16

krANA shishurmahInAM hinvannR^itasya dIdhitim |vishvA pari priyA bhuvadadha dvitA || 9.102.1
upa tritasya pAShyorabhakta yadguhA padam |yaj~nasya sapta dhAmabhiradha priyam || 9.102.2
trINi tritasya dhArayA pR^iShTheShverayA rayim |mimIte asya yojanA vi sukratuH || 9.102.3
jaj~nAnaM sapta mAtaro vedhAmashAsata shriye |ayaM dhruvo rayINAM chiketa yat || 9.102.4
asya vrate sajoShaso vishve devAso adruhaH |spArhA bhavanti rantayo juShanta yat || 9.102.5
yamI garbhamR^itAvR^idho dR^ishe chArumajIjanan |kaviM maMhiShThamadhvare puruspR^iham || 9.102.6
samIchIne abhi tmanA yahvI R^itasya mAtarA |tanvAnA yaj~namAnuShagyada~njate || 9.102.7
kratvA shukrebhirakShabhirR^iNorapa vrajaM divaH |hinvannR^itasya dIdhitiM prAdhvare || 9.102.8

pra punAnAya vedhase somAya vacha udyatam |bhR^itiM na bharA matibhirjujoShate || 9.103.1
pari vArANyavyayA gobhira~njAno arShati |trI ShadhasthA punAnaH kR^iNute hariH || 9.103.2
pari koshaM madhushchutamavyaye vAre arShati |abhi vANIrR^iShINAM sapta nUShata || 9.103.3
pari NetA matInAM vishvadevo adAbhyaH |somaH punAnashchamvorvishaddhariH || 9.103.4
pari daivIranu svadhA indreNa yAhi saratham |punAno vAghadvAghadbhiramartyaH || 9.103.5
pari saptirna vAjayurdevo devebhyaH sutaH |vyAnashiH pavamAno vi dhAvati || 9.103.6

sakhAya A ni ShIdata punAnAya pra gAyata |shishuM na yaj~naiH pari bhUShata shriye || 9.104.1
samI vatsaM na mAtR^ibhiH sR^ijatA gayasAdhanam |devAvyaM madamabhi dvishavasam || 9.104.2
punAtA dakShasAdhanaM yathA shardhAya vItaye |yathA mitrAya varuNAya shaMtamaH || 9.104.3
asmabhyaM tvA vasuvidamabhi vANIranUShata |gobhiShTe varNamabhi vAsayAmasi || 9.104.4
sa no madAnAM pata indo devapsarA asi |sakheva sakhye gAtuvittamo bhava || 9.104.5
sanemi kR^idhyasmadA rakShasaM kaM chidatriNam |apAdevaM dvayumaMho yuyodhi naH || 9.104.6

taM vaH sakhAyo madAya punAnamabhi gAyata |shishuM na yaj~naiH svadayanta gUrtibhiH || 9.105.1
saM vatsa iva mAtR^ibhirindurhinvAno ajyate |devAvIrmado matibhiH pariShkR^itaH || 9.105.2
ayaM dakShAya sAdhano.ayaM shardhAya vItaye |ayaM devebhyo madhumattamaH sutaH || 9.105.3
gomanna indo ashvavatsutaH sudakSha dhanva |shuchiM te varNamadhi goShu dIdharam || 9.105.4
sa no harINAM pata indo devapsarastamaH |sakheva sakhye naryo ruche bhava || 9.105.5
sanemi tvamasmadA.N adevaM kaM chidatriNam |sAhvA.N indo pari bAdho apa dvayum || 9.105.6

indramachCha sutA ime vR^iShaNaM yantu harayaH |shruShTI jAtAsa indavaH svarvidaH || 9.106.1
ayaM bharAya sAnasirindrAya pavate sutaH |somo jaitrasya chetati yathA vide || 9.106.2
asyedindro madeShvA grAbhaM gR^ibhNIta sAnasim |vajraM cha vR^iShaNaM bharatsamapsujit || 9.106.3
pra dhanvA soma jAgR^ivirindrAyendo pari srava |dyumantaM shuShmamA bharA svarvidam || 9.106.4
indrAya vR^iShaNaM madaM pavasva vishvadarshataH |sahasrayAmA pathikR^idvichakShaNaH || 9.106.5
asmabhyaM gAtuvittamo devebhyo madhumattamaH |sahasraM yAhi pathibhiH kanikradat || 9.106.6
pavasva devavItaya indo dhArAbhirojasA |A kalashaM madhumAnsoma naH sadaH || 9.106.7
tava drapsA udapruta indraM madAya vAvR^idhuH |tvAM devAso amR^itAya kaM papuH || 9.106.8
A naH sutAsa indavaH punAnA dhAvatA rayim |vR^iShTidyAvo rItyApaH svarvidaH || 9.106.9
somaH punAna UrmiNAvyo vAraM vi dhAvati |agre vAchaH pavamAnaH kanikradat || 9.106.10
dhIbhirhinvanti vAjinaM vane krILantamatyavim |abhi tripR^iShThaM matayaH samasvaran || 9.106.11
asarji kalashA.N abhi mILhe saptirna vAjayuH |punAno vAchaM janayannasiShyadat || 9.106.12
pavate haryato harirati hvarAMsi raMhyA |abhyarShanstotR^ibhyo vIravadyashaH || 9.106.13
ayA pavasva devayurmadhordhArA asR^ikShata |rebhanpavitraM paryeShi vishvataH || 9.106.14

parIto Shi~nchatA sutaM somo ya uttamaM haviH |dadhanvA.N yo naryo apsvantarA suShAva somamadribhiH || 9.107.1
nUnaM punAno.avibhiH pari sravAdabdhaH surabhintaraH |sute chittvApsu madAmo andhasA shrINanto gobhiruttaram || 9.107.2
pari suvAnashchakShase devamAdanaH kraturindurvichakShaNaH || 9.107.3
punAnaH soma dhArayApo vasAno arShasi |A ratnadhA yonimR^itasya sIdasyutso deva hiraNyayaH || 9.107.4
duhAna UdhardivyaM madhu priyaM pratnaM sadhasthamAsadat |ApR^ichChyaM dharuNaM vAjyarShati nR^ibhirdhUto vichakShaNaH || 9.107.5
punAnaH soma jAgR^iviravyo vAre pari priyaH |tvaM vipro abhavo.a~Ngirastamo madhvA yaj~naM mimikSha naH || 9.107.6
somo mIDhvAnpavate gAtuvittama R^iShirvipro vichakShaNaH |tvaM kavirabhavo devavItama A sUryaM rohayo divi || 9.107.7
soma u ShuvANaH sotR^ibhiradhi ShNubhiravInAm |ashvayeva haritA yAti dhArayA mandrayA yAti dhArayA || 9.107.8
anUpe gomAngobhirakShAH somo dugdhAbhirakShAH |samudraM na saMvaraNAnyagmanmandI madAya toshate || 9.107.9
A soma suvAno adribhistiro vArANyavyayA |jano na puri chamvorvishaddhariH sado vaneShu dadhiShe || 9.107.10
sa mAmR^ije tiro aNvAni meShyo mILhe saptirna vAjayuH |anumAdyaH pavamAno manIShibhiH somo viprebhirR^ikvabhiH || 9.107.11
pra soma devavItaye sindhurna pipye arNasA |aMshoH payasA madiro na jAgR^ivirachChA koshaM madhushchutam || 9.107.12
A haryato arjune atke avyata priyaH sUnurna marjyaH |tamIM hinvantyapaso yathA rathaM nadIShvA gabhastyoH || 9.107.13
abhi somAsa AyavaH pavante madyaM madam |samudrasyAdhi viShTapi manIShiNo matsarAsaH svarvidaH || 9.107.14
taratsamudraM pavamAna UrmiNA rAjA deva R^itaM bR^ihat |arShanmitrasya varuNasya dharmaNA pra hinvAna R^itaM bR^ihat || 9.107.15
nR^ibhiryemAno haryato vichakShaNo rAjA devaH samudriyaH || 9.107.16
indrAya pavate madaH somo marutvate sutaH |sahasradhAro atyavyamarShati tamI mR^ijantyAyavaH || 9.107.17
punAnashchamU janayanmatiM kaviH somo deveShu raNyati |apo vasAnaH pari gobhiruttaraH sIdanvaneShvavyata || 9.107.18
tavAhaM soma rAraNa sakhya indo divedive |purUNi babhro ni charanti mAmava paridhI.Nrati tA.N ihi || 9.107.19
utAhaM naktamuta soma te divA sakhyAya babhra Udhani |ghR^iNA tapantamati sUryaM paraH shakunA iva paptima || 9.107.20
mR^ijyamAnaH suhastya samudre vAchaminvasi |rayiM pisha~NgaM bahulaM puruspR^ihaM pavamAnAbhyarShasi || 9.107.21
mR^ijAno vAre pavamAno avyaye vR^iShAva chakrado vane |devAnAM soma pavamAna niShkR^itaM gobhira~njAno arShasi || 9.107.22
pavasva vAjasAtaye.abhi vishvAni kAvyA |tvaM samudraM prathamo vi dhArayo devebhyaH soma matsaraH || 9.107.23
sa tU pavasva pari pArthivaM rajo divyA cha soma dharmabhiH |tvAM viprAso matibhirvichakShaNa shubhraM hinvanti dhItibhiH || 9.107.24
pavamAnA asR^ikShata pavitramati dhArayA |marutvanto matsarA indriyA hayA medhAmabhi prayAMsi cha || 9.107.25
apo vasAnaH pari koshamarShatIndurhiyAnaH sotR^ibhiH |janaya~njyotirmandanA avIvashadgAH kR^iNvAno na nirNijam || 9.107.26

pavasva madhumattama indrAya soma kratuvittamo madaH |mahi dyukShatamo madaH || 9.108.1
yasya te pItvA vR^iShabho vR^iShAyate.asya pItA svarvidaH |sa supraketo abhyakramIdiSho.achChA vAjaM naitashaH || 9.108.2
tvaM hya~Nga daivyA pavamAna janimAni dyumattamaH |amR^itatvAya ghoShayaH || 9.108.3
yenA navagvo dadhya~N~NaporNute yena viprAsa Apire |devAnAM sumne amR^itasya chAruNo yena shravAMsyAnashuH || 9.108.4
eSha sya dhArayA suto.avyo vArebhiH pavate madintamaH |krILannUrmirapAmiva || 9.108.5
ya usriyA apyA antarashmano nirgA akR^intadojasA |abhi vrajaM tatniShe gavyamashvyaM varmIva dhR^iShNavA ruja || 9.108.6
A sotA pari Shi~nchatAshvaM na stomamapturaM rajasturam |vanakrakShamudaprutam || 9.108.7
sahasradhAraM vR^iShabhaM payovR^idhaM priyaM devAya janmane |R^itena ya R^itajAto vivAvR^idhe rAjA deva R^itaM bR^ihat || 9.108.8
abhi dyumnaM bR^ihadyasha iShaspate didIhi deva devayuH |vi koshaM madhyamaM yuva || 9.108.9
A vachyasva sudakSha chamvoH suto vishAM vahnirna vishpatiH |vR^iShTiM divaH pavasva rItimapAM jinvA gaviShTaye dhiyaH || 9.108.10
etamu tyaM madachyutaM sahasradhAraM vR^iShabhaM divo duhuH |vishvA vasUni bibhratam || 9.108.11
vR^iShA vi jaj~ne janayannamartyaH pratapa~njyotiShA tamaH |sa suShTutaH kavibhirnirNijaM dadhe tridhAtvasya daMsasA || 9.108.12
sa sunve yo vasUnAM yo rAyAmAnetA ya iLAnAm |somo yaH sukShitInAm || 9.108.13
yasya na indraH pibAdyasya maruto yasya vAryamaNA bhagaH |A yena mitrAvaruNA karAmaha endramavase mahe || 9.108.14
indrAya soma pAtave nR^ibhiryataH svAyudho madintamaH |pavasva madhumattamaH || 9.108.15
indrasya hArdi somadhAnamA visha samudramiva sindhavaH |juShTo mitrAya varuNAya vAyave divo viShTambha uttamaH || 9.108.16

pari pra dhanvendrAya soma svAdurmitrAya pUShNe bhagAya || 9.109.1
indraste soma sutasya peyAH kratve dakShAya vishve cha devAH || 9.109.2
evAmR^itAya mahe kShayAya sa shukro arSha divyaH pIyUShaH || 9.109.3
pavasva soma mahAnsamudraH pitA devAnAM vishvAbhi dhAma || 9.109.4
shukraH pavasva devebhyaH soma dive pR^ithivyai shaM cha prajAyai || 9.109.5
divo dhartAsi shukraH pIyUShaH satye vidharmanvAjI pavasva || 9.109.6
pavasva soma dyumnI sudhAro mahAmavInAmanu pUrvyaH || 9.109.7
nR^ibhiryemAno jaj~nAnaH pUtaH kSharadvishvAni mandraH svarvit || 9.109.8
induH punAnaH prajAmurANaH karadvishvAni draviNAni naH || 9.109.9
pavasva soma kratve dakShAyAshvo na nikto vAjI dhanAya || 9.109.10
taM te sotAro rasaM madAya punanti somaM mahe dyumnAya || 9.109.11
shishuM jaj~nAnaM hariM mR^ijanti pavitre somaM devebhya indum || 9.109.12
induH paviShTa chArurmadAyApAmupasthe kavirbhagAya || 9.109.13
bibharti chArvindrasya nAma yena vishvAni vR^itrA jaghAna || 9.109.14
pibantyasya vishve devAso gobhiH shrItasya nR^ibhiH sutasya || 9.109.15
pra suvAno akShAH sahasradhArastiraH pavitraM vi vAramavyam || 9.109.16
sa vAjyakShAH sahasraretA adbhirmR^ijAno gobhiH shrINAnaH || 9.109.17
pra soma yAhIndrasya kukShA nR^ibhiryemAno adribhiH sutaH || 9.109.18
asarji vAjI tiraH pavitramindrAya somaH sahasradhAraH || 9.109.19
a~njantyenaM madhvo rasenendrAya vR^iShNa induM madAya || 9.109.20
devebhyastvA vR^ithA pAjase.apo vasAnaM hariM mR^ijanti || 9.109.21
indurindrAya toshate ni toshate shrINannugro riNannapaH || 9.109.22

paryU Shu pra dhanva vAjasAtaye pari vR^itrANi sakShaNiH |dviShastaradhyA R^iNayA na Iyase || 9.110.1
anu hi tvA sutaM soma madAmasi mahe samaryarAjye |vAjA.N abhi pavamAna pra gAhase || 9.110.2
ajIjano hi pavamAna sUryaM vidhAre shakmanA payaH |gojIrayA raMhamANaH puraMdhyA || 9.110.3
ajIjano amR^ita martyeShvA.N R^itasya dharmannamR^itasya chAruNaH |sadAsaro vAjamachChA saniShyadat || 9.110.4
abhyabhi hi shravasA tatardithotsaM na kaM chijjanapAnamakShitam |sharyAbhirna bharamANo gabhastyoH || 9.110.5
AdIM ke chitpashyamAnAsa ApyaM vasurucho divyA abhyanUShata |vAraM na devaH savitA vyUrNute || 9.110.6
tve soma prathamA vR^iktabarhiSho mahe vAjAya shravase dhiyaM dadhuH |sa tvaM no vIra vIryAya chodaya || 9.110.7
divaH pIyUShaM pUrvyaM yadukthyaM maho gAhAddiva A niradhukShata |indramabhi jAyamAnaM samasvaran || 9.110.8
adha yadime pavamAna rodasI imA cha vishvA bhuvanAbhi majmanA |yUthe na niShThA vR^iShabho vi tiShThase || 9.110.9
somaH punAno avyaye vAre shishurna krILanpavamAno akShAH |sahasradhAraH shatavAja induH || 9.110.10
eSha punAno madhumA.N R^itAvendrAyenduH pavate svAdurUrmiH |vAjasanirvarivovidvayodhAH || 9.110.11
sa pavasva sahamAnaH pR^itanyUnsedhanrakShAMsyapa durgahANi |svAyudhaH sAsahvAnsoma shatrUn || 9.110.12

ayA ruchA hariNyA punAno vishvA dveShAMsi tarati svayugvabhiH sUro na svayugvabhiH |dhArA sutasya rochate punAno aruSho hariH |vishvA yadrUpA pariyAtyR^ikvabhiH saptAsyebhirR^ikvabhiH || 9.111.1
tvaM tyatpaNInAM vido vasu saM mAtR^ibhirmarjayasi sva A dama R^itasya dhItibhirdame |parAvato na sAma tadyatrA raNanti dhItayaH |tridhAtubhiraruShIbhirvayo dadhe rochamAno vayo dadhe || 9.111.2
pUrvAmanu pradishaM yAti chekitatsaM rashmibhiryatate darshato ratho daivyo darshato rathaH |agmannukthAni pauMsyendraM jaitrAya harShayan |vajrashcha yadbhavatho anapachyutA samatsvanapachyutA || 9.111.3

nAnAnaM vA u no dhiyo vi vratAni janAnAm |takShA riShTaM rutaM bhiShagbrahmA sunvantamichChatIndrAyendo pari srava || 9.112.1
jaratIbhiroShadhIbhiH parNebhiH shakunAnAm |kArmAro ashmabhirdyubhirhiraNyavantamichChatIndrAyendo pari srava || 9.112.2
kArurahaM tato bhiShagupalaprakShiNI nanA |nAnAdhiyo vasUyavo.anu gA iva tasthimendrAyendo pari srava || 9.112.3
ashvo voLhA sukhaM rathaM hasanAmupamantriNaH |shepo romaNvantau bhedau vArinmaNDUka ichChatIndrAyendo pari srava || 9.112.4

sharyaNAvati somamindraH pibatu vR^itrahA |balaM dadhAna Atmani kariShyanvIryaM mahadindrAyendo pari srava || 9.113.1
A pavasva dishAM pata ArjIkAtsoma mIDhvaH |R^itavAkena satyena shraddhayA tapasA suta indrAyendo pari srava || 9.113.2
parjanyavR^iddhaM mahiShaM taM sUryasya duhitAbharat |taM gandharvAH pratyagR^ibhNantaM some rasamAdadhurindrAyendo pari srava || 9.113.3
R^itaM vadannR^itadyumna satyaM vadansatyakarman |shraddhAM vadansoma rAjandhAtrA soma pariShkR^ita indrAyendo pari srava || 9.113.4
satyamugrasya bR^ihataH saM sravanti saMsravAH |saM yanti rasino rasAH punAno brahmaNA hara indrAyendo pari srava || 9.113.5
yatra brahmA pavamAna ChandasyAM vAchaM vadan |grAvNA some mahIyate somenAnandaM janayannindrAyendo pari srava || 9.113.6
yatra jyotirajasraM yasmi.Nlloke svarhitam |tasminmAM dhehi pavamAnAmR^ite loke akShita indrAyendo pari srava || 9.113.7
yatra rAjA vaivasvato yatrAvarodhanaM divaH |yatrAmUryahvatIrApastatra mAmamR^itaM kR^idhIndrAyendo pari srava || 9.113.8
yatrAnukAmaM charaNaM trinAke tridive divaH |lokA yatra jyotiShmantastatra mAmamR^itaM kR^idhIndrAyendo pari srava || 9.113.9
yatra kAmA nikAmAshcha yatra bradhnasya viShTapam |svadhA cha yatra tR^iptishcha tatra mAmamR^itaM kR^idhIndrAyendo pari srava || 9.113.10
yatrAnandAshcha modAshcha mudaH pramuda Asate |kAmasya yatrAptAH kAmAstatra mAmamR^itaM kR^idhIndrAyendo pari srava || 9.113.11

ya indoH pavamAnasyAnu dhAmAnyakramIt |tamAhuH suprajA iti yaste somAvidhanmana indrAyendo pari srava || 9.114.1
R^iShe mantrakR^itAM stomaiH kashyapodvardhayangiraH |somaM namasya rAjAnaM yo jaj~ne vIrudhAM patirindrAyendo pari srava || 9.114.2
sapta disho nAnAsUryAH sapta hotAra R^itvijaH |devA AdityA ye sapta tebhiH somAbhi rakSha na indrAyendo pari srava || 9.114.3
yatte rAja~nChR^itaM havistena somAbhi rakSha naH |arAtIvA mA nastArInmo cha naH kiM chanAmamadindrAyendo pari srava || 9.114.4

##
Last updated July 2, 2013

Special mention : Initial processing and help by Avinash and Shashi Sathaye, 
Avinash Chopde, Shree Devi Kumar, Sunder Hattangadi, John Gardner.
Reprocessed from Original in final form by Detlef Eichler with additional corrections.
See Detlef's site http://www.detlef108.de/Rigveda.htm
for other details and formats.

The text is shown without accents (Anudattas, dependent Svaritas,
and independent Svaritas including Kampas). Words are connected (agnimILe). 
Ch is doubled as in gachChati according to the rules of Rigveda-Pratishakhya. 
At the end of a word m is replaced by Anusvara M if the initial letter of the
following word is a labial stop consonant (p, ph, b, bh, m).
Visarga H before sh, Sh or s followed by a voiceless consonant has been restored.

Source : The Aufrecht/van Nooten/Holland (Samhita) version
of the Rigveda (http://www.people.fas.harvard.edu/~witzel/onlineRV.htm).
In this text accented vowels have Udatta or 'independent Svarita' markers.
Kampas are not shown. Words are separated (agnim ILe). 
Ch is not doubled as in gaChati. At the end of a word we find m before
a following labial stop consonant (p, ph, b, bh, m).
Visarga H before sh, Sh or s followed by a voiceless consonant has 
been dropped according to a rule of  Rigveda-Pratishakhya.

Send corrections to   : detlefeichler@googlemail.com, sanskrit@cheerful.com

The text is to be used for personal studies and research only.
Any use for commercial purpose is prohibited as a `gentleman's' agreement.


agre bR^ihannuShasAmUrdhvo asthAnnirjaganvAntamaso jyotiShAgAt |agnirbhAnunA rushatA sva~Nga A jAto vishvA sadmAnyaprAH || 10.1.1
sa jAto garbho asi rodasyoragne chArurvibhR^ita oShadhIShu |chitraH shishuH pari tamAMsyaktUnpra mAtR^ibhyo adhi kanikradadgAH || 10.1.2
viShNuritthA paramamasya vidvA~njAto bR^ihannabhi pAti tR^itIyam |AsA yadasya payo akrata svaM sachetaso abhyarchantyatra || 10.1.3
ata u tvA pitubhR^ito janitrIrannAvR^idhaM prati charantyannaiH |tA IM pratyeShi punaranyarUpA asi tvaM vikShu mAnuShIShu hotA || 10.1.4
hotAraM chitrarathamadhvarasya yaj~nasyayaj~nasya ketuM rushantam |pratyardhiM devasyadevasya mahnA shriyA tvagnimatithiM janAnAm || 10.1.5
sa tu vastrANyadha peshanAni vasAno agnirnAbhA pR^ithivyAH |aruSho jAtaH pada iLAyAH purohito rAjanyakShIha devAn || 10.1.6
A hi dyAvApR^ithivI agna ubhe sadA putro na mAtarA tatantha |pra yAhyachChoshato yaviShThAthA vaha sahasyeha devAn || 10.1.7

piprIhi devA.N ushato yaviShTha vidvA.N R^itU.NrR^itupate yajeha |ye daivyA R^itvijastebhiragne tvaM hotR^INAmasyAyajiShThaH || 10.2.1
veShi hotramuta potraM janAnAM mandhAtAsi draviNodA R^itAvA |svAhA vayaM kR^iNavAmA havIMShi devo devAnyajatvagnirarhan || 10.2.2
A devAnAmapi panthAmaganma yachChaknavAma tadanu pravoLhum |agnirvidvAnsa yajAtsedu hotA so adhvarAnsa R^itUnkalpayAti || 10.2.3
yadvo vayaM praminAma vratAni viduShAM devA aviduShTarAsaH |agniShTadvishvamA pR^iNAti vidvAnyebhirdevA.N R^itubhiH kalpayAti || 10.2.4
yatpAkatrA manasA dInadakShA na yaj~nasya manvate martyAsaH |agniShTaddhotA kratuvidvijAnanyajiShTho devA.N R^itusho yajAti || 10.2.5
vishveShAM hyadhvarANAmanIkaM chitraM ketuM janitA tvA jajAna |sa A yajasva nR^ivatIranu kShAH spArhA iShaH kShumatIrvishvajanyAH || 10.2.6
yaM tvA dyAvApR^ithivI yaM tvApastvaShTA yaM tvA sujanimA jajAna |panthAmanu pravidvAnpitR^iyANaM dyumadagne samidhAno vi bhAhi || 10.2.7

ino rAjannaratiH samiddho raudro dakShAya suShumA.N adarshi |chikidvi bhAti bhAsA bR^ihatAsiknImeti rushatImapAjan || 10.3.1
kR^iShNAM yadenImabhi varpasA bhUjjanayanyoShAM bR^ihataH piturjAm |UrdhvaM bhAnuM sUryasya stabhAyandivo vasubhiraratirvi bhAti || 10.3.2
bhadro bhadrayA sachamAna AgAtsvasAraM jAro abhyeti pashchAt |supraketairdyubhiragnirvitiShThanrushadbhirvarNairabhi rAmamasthAt || 10.3.3
asya yAmAso bR^ihato na vagnUnindhAnA agneH sakhyuH shivasya |IDyasya vR^iShNo bR^ihataH svAso bhAmAso yAmannaktavashchikitre || 10.3.4
svanA na yasya bhAmAsaH pavante rochamAnasya bR^ihataH sudivaH |jyeShThebhiryastejiShThaiH krILumadbhirvarShiShThebhirbhAnubhirnakShati dyAm || 10.3.5
asya shuShmAso dadR^ishAnapaverjehamAnasya svanayanniyudbhiH |pratnebhiryo rushadbhirdevatamo vi rebhadbhiraratirbhAti vibhvA || 10.3.6
sa A vakShi mahi na A cha satsi divaspR^ithivyoraratiryuvatyoH |agniH sutukaH sutukebhirashvai rabhasvadbhI rabhasvA.N eha gamyAH || 10.3.7

pra te yakShi pra ta iyarmi manma bhuvo yathA vandyo no haveShu |dhanvanniva prapA asi tvamagna iyakShave pUrave pratna rAjan || 10.4.1
yaM tvA janAso abhi saMcharanti gAva uShNamiva vrajaM yaviShTha |dUto devAnAmasi martyAnAmantarmahA.Nshcharasi rochanena || 10.4.2
shishuM na tvA jenyaM vardhayantI mAtA bibharti sachanasyamAnA |dhanoradhi pravatA yAsi harya~njigIShase pashurivAvasR^iShTaH || 10.4.3
mUrA amUra na vayaM chikitvo mahitvamagne tvama~Nga vitse |shaye vavrishcharati jihvayAdanrerihyate yuvatiM vishpatiH san || 10.4.4
kUchijjAyate sanayAsu navyo vane tasthau palito dhUmaketuH |asnAtApo vR^iShabho na pra veti sachetaso yaM praNayanta martAH || 10.4.5
tanUtyajeva taskarA vanargU rashanAbhirdashabhirabhyadhItAm |iyaM te agne navyasI manIShA yukShvA rathaM na shuchayadbhira~NgaiH || 10.4.6
brahma cha te jAtavedo namashcheyaM cha gIH sadamidvardhanI bhUt |rakShA No agne tanayAni tokA rakShota nastanvo aprayuchChan || 10.4.7

ekaH samudro dharuNo rayINAmasmaddhR^ido bhUrijanmA vi chaShTe |siShaktyUdharniNyorupastha utsasya madhye nihitaM padaM veH || 10.5.1
samAnaM nILaM vR^iShaNo vasAnAH saM jagmire mahiShA arvatIbhiH |R^itasya padaM kavayo ni pAnti guhA nAmAni dadhire parANi || 10.5.2
R^itAyinI mAyinI saM dadhAte mitvA shishuM jaj~naturvardhayantI |vishvasya nAbhiM charato dhruvasya kaveshchittantuM manasA viyantaH || 10.5.3
R^itasya hi vartanayaH sujAtamiSho vAjAya pradivaH sachante |adhIvAsaM rodasI vAvasAne ghR^itairannairvAvR^idhAte madhUnAm || 10.5.4
sapta svasR^IraruShIrvAvashAno vidvAnmadhva ujjabhArA dR^ishe kam |antaryeme antarikShe purAjA ichChanvavrimavidatpUShaNasya || 10.5.5
sapta maryAdAH kavayastatakShustAsAmekAmidabhyaMhuro gAt |Ayorha skambha upamasya nILe pathAM visarge dharuNeShu tasthau || 10.5.6
asachcha sachcha parame vyomandakShasya janmannaditerupasthe |agnirha naH prathamajA R^itasya pUrva Ayuni vR^iShabhashcha dhenuH || 10.5.7

ayaM sa yasya sharmannavobhiragneredhate jaritAbhiShTau |jyeShThebhiryo bhAnubhirR^iShUNAM paryeti parivIto vibhAvA || 10.6.1
yo bhAnubhirvibhAvA vibhAtyagnirdevebhirR^itAvAjasraH |A yo vivAya sakhyA sakhibhyo.aparihvR^ito atyo na saptiH || 10.6.2
Ishe yo vishvasyA devavIterIshe vishvAyuruShaso vyuShTau |A yasminmanA havIMShyagnAvariShTarathaH skabhnAti shUShaiH || 10.6.3
shUShebhirvR^idho juShANo arkairdevA.N achChA raghupatvA jigAti |mandro hotA sa juhvA yajiShThaH sammishlo agnirA jigharti devAn || 10.6.4
tamusrAmindraM na rejamAnamagniM gIrbhirnamobhirA kR^iNudhvam |A yaM viprAso matibhirgR^iNanti jAtavedasaM juhvaM sahAnAm || 10.6.5
saM yasminvishvA vasUni jagmurvAje nAshvAH saptIvanta evaiH |asme UtIrindravAtatamA arvAchInA agna A kR^iNuShva || 10.6.6
adhA hyagne mahnA niShadyA sadyo jaj~nAno havyo babhUtha |taM te devAso anu ketamAyannadhAvardhanta prathamAsa UmAH || 10.6.7

svasti no divo agne pR^ithivyA vishvAyurdhehi yajathAya deva |sachemahi tava dasma praketairuruShyA Na urubhirdeva shaMsaiH || 10.7.1
imA agne matayastubhyaM jAtA gobhirashvairabhi gR^iNanti rAdhaH |yadA te marto anu bhogamAnaDvaso dadhAno matibhiH sujAta || 10.7.2
agniM manye pitaramagnimApimagniM bhrAtaraM sadamitsakhAyam |agneranIkaM bR^ihataH saparyaM divi shukraM yajataM sUryasya || 10.7.3
sidhrA agne dhiyo asme sanutrIryaM trAyase dama A nityahotA |R^itAvA sa rohidashvaH purukShurdyubhirasmA ahabhirvAmamastu || 10.7.4
dyubhirhitaM mitramiva prayogaM pratnamR^itvijamadhvarasya jAram |bAhubhyAmagnimAyavo.ajananta vikShu hotAraM nyasAdayanta || 10.7.5
svayaM yajasva divi deva devAnkiM te pAkaH kR^iNavadaprachetAH |yathAyaja R^itubhirdeva devAnevA yajasva tanvaM sujAta || 10.7.6
bhavA no agne.avitota gopA bhavA vayaskR^iduta no vayodhAH |rAsvA cha naH sumaho havyadAtiM trAsvota nastanvo aprayuchChan || 10.7.7

pra ketunA bR^ihatA yAtyagnirA rodasI vR^iShabho roravIti |divashchidantA.N upamA.N udAnaLapAmupasthe mahiSho vavardha || 10.8.1
mumoda garbho vR^iShabhaH kakudmAnasremA vatsaH shimIvA.N arAvIt |sa devatAtyudyatAni kR^iNvansveShu kShayeShu prathamo jigAti || 10.8.2
A yo mUrdhAnaM pitrorarabdha nyadhvare dadhire sUro arNaH |asya patmannaruShIrashvabudhnA R^itasya yonau tanvo juShanta || 10.8.3
uShauSho hi vaso agrameShi tvaM yamayorabhavo vibhAvA |R^itAya sapta dadhiShe padAni janayanmitraM tanve svAyai || 10.8.4
bhuvashchakShurmaha R^itasya gopA bhuvo varuNo yadR^itAya veShi |bhuvo apAM napAjjAtavedo bhuvo dUto yasya havyaM jujoShaH || 10.8.5
bhuvo yaj~nasya rajasashcha netA yatrA niyudbhiH sachase shivAbhiH |divi mUrdhAnaM dadhiShe svarShAM jihvAmagne chakR^iShe havyavAham || 10.8.6
asya tritaH kratunA vavre antarichChandhItiM piturevaiH parasya |sachasyamAnaH pitrorupasthe jAmi bruvANa AyudhAni veti || 10.8.7
sa pitryANyAyudhAni vidvAnindreShita Aptyo abhyayudhyat |trishIrShANaM saptarashmiM jaghanvAntvAShTrasya chinniH sasR^ije trito gAH || 10.8.8
bhUrIdindra udinakShantamojo.avAbhinatsatpatirmanyamAnam |tvAShTrasya chidvishvarUpasya gonAmAchakrANastrINi shIrShA parA vark || 10.8.9

Apo hi ShThA mayobhuvastA na Urje dadhAtana |mahe raNAya chakShase || 10.9.1
yo vaH shivatamo rasastasya bhAjayateha naH |ushatIriva mAtaraH || 10.9.2
tasmA araM gamAma vo yasya kShayAya jinvatha |Apo janayathA cha naH || 10.9.3
shaM no devIrabhiShTaya Apo bhavantu pItaye |shaM yorabhi sravantu naH || 10.9.4
IshAnA vAryANAM kShayantIshcharShaNInAm |apo yAchAmi bheShajam || 10.9.5
apsu me somo abravIdantarvishvAni bheShajA |agniM cha vishvashambhuvam || 10.9.6
ApaH pR^iNIta bheShajaM varUthaM tanve mama |jyokcha sUryaM dR^ishe || 10.9.7
idamApaH pra vahata yatkiM cha duritaM mayi |yadvAhamabhidudroha yadvA shepa utAnR^itam || 10.9.8
Apo adyAnvachAriShaM rasena samagasmahi |payasvAnagna A gahi taM mA saM sR^ija varchasA || 10.9.9

o chitsakhAyaM sakhyA vavR^ityAM tiraH purU chidarNavaM jaganvAn |piturnapAtamA dadhIta vedhA adhi kShami prataraM dIdhyAnaH || 10.10.1
na te sakhA sakhyaM vaShTyetatsalakShmA yadviShurUpA bhavAti |mahasputrAso asurasya vIrA divo dhartAra urviyA pari khyan || 10.10.2
ushanti ghA te amR^itAsa etadekasya chittyajasaM martyasya |ni te mano manasi dhAyyasme janyuH patistanvamA vivishyAH || 10.10.3
na yatpurA chakR^imA kaddha nUnamR^itA vadanto anR^itaM rapema |gandharvo apsvapyA cha yoShA sA no nAbhiH paramaM jAmi tannau || 10.10.4
garbhe nu nau janitA dampatI kardevastvaShTA savitA vishvarUpaH |nakirasya pra minanti vratAni veda nAvasya pR^ithivI uta dyauH || 10.10.5
ko asya veda prathamasyAhnaH ka IM dadarsha ka iha pra vochat |bR^ihanmitrasya varuNasya dhAma kadu brava Ahano vIchyA nR^In || 10.10.6
yamasya mA yamyaM kAma AgansamAne yonau sahasheyyAya |jAyeva patye tanvaM ririchyAM vi chidvR^iheva rathyeva chakrA || 10.10.7
na tiShThanti na ni miShantyete devAnAM spasha iha ye charanti |anyena madAhano yAhi tUyaM tena vi vR^iha rathyeva chakrA || 10.10.8
rAtrIbhirasmA ahabhirdashasyetsUryasya chakShurmuhurunmimIyAt |divA pR^ithivyA mithunA sabandhU yamIryamasya bibhR^iyAdajAmi || 10.10.9
A ghA tA gachChAnuttarA yugAni yatra jAmayaH kR^iNavannajAmi |upa barbR^ihi vR^iShabhAya bAhumanyamichChasva subhage patiM mat || 10.10.10
kiM bhrAtAsadyadanAthaM bhavAti kimu svasA yannirR^itirnigachChAt |kAmamUtA bahvetadrapAmi tanvA me tanvaM saM pipR^igdhi || 10.10.11
na vA u te tanvA tanvaM saM papR^ichyAM pApamAhuryaH svasAraM nigachChAt |anyena matpramudaH kalpayasva na te bhrAtA subhage vaShTyetat || 10.10.12
bato batAsi yama naiva te mano hR^idayaM chAvidAma |anyA kila tvAM kakShyeva yuktaM pari ShvajAte libujeva vR^ikSham || 10.10.13
anyamU Shu tvaM yamyanya u tvAM pari ShvajAte libujeva vR^ikSham |tasya vA tvaM mana ichChA sa vA tavAdhA kR^iNuShva saMvidaM subhadrAm || 10.10.14

vR^iShA vR^iShNe duduhe dohasA divaH payAMsi yahvo aditeradAbhyaH |vishvaM sa veda varuNo yathA dhiyA sa yaj~niyo yajatu yaj~niyA.N R^itUn || 10.11.1
rapadgandharvIrapyA cha yoShaNA nadasya nAde pari pAtu me manaH |iShTasya madhye aditirni dhAtu no bhrAtA no jyeShThaH prathamo vi vochati || 10.11.2
so chinnu bhadrA kShumatI yashasvatyuShA uvAsa manave svarvatI |yadImushantamushatAmanu kratumagniM hotAraM vidathAya jIjanan || 10.11.3
adha tyaM drapsaM vibhvaM vichakShaNaM virAbharadiShitaH shyeno adhvare |yadI visho vR^iNate dasmamAryA agniM hotAramadha dhIrajAyata || 10.11.4
sadAsi raNvo yavaseva puShyate hotrAbhiragne manuShaH svadhvaraH |viprasya vA yachChashamAna ukthyaM vAjaM sasavA.N upayAsi bhUribhiH || 10.11.5
udIraya pitarA jAra A bhagamiyakShati haryato hR^itta iShyati |vivakti vahniH svapasyate makhastaviShyate asuro vepate matI || 10.11.6
yaste agne sumatiM marto akShatsahasaH sUno ati sa pra shR^iNve |iShaM dadhAno vahamAno ashvairA sa dyumA.N amavAnbhUShati dyUn || 10.11.7
yadagna eShA samitirbhavAti devI deveShu yajatA yajatra |ratnA cha yadvibhajAsi svadhAvo bhAgaM no atra vasumantaM vItAt || 10.11.8
shrudhI no agne sadane sadhasthe yukShvA rathamamR^itasya dravitnum |A no vaha rodasI devaputre mAkirdevAnAmapa bhUriha syAH || 10.11.9

dyAvA ha kShAmA prathame R^itenAbhishrAve bhavataH satyavAchA |devo yanmartAnyajathAya kR^iNvansIdaddhotA pratya~NsvamasuM yan || 10.12.1
devo devAnparibhUrR^itena vahA no havyaM prathamashchikitvAn |dhUmaketuH samidhA bhAR^ijIko mandro hotA nityo vAchA yajIyAn || 10.12.2
svAvR^igdevasyAmR^itaM yadI gorato jAtAso dhArayanta urvI |vishve devA anu tatte yajurgurduhe yadenI divyaM ghR^itaM vAH || 10.12.3
archAmi vAM vardhAyApo ghR^itasnU dyAvAbhUmI shR^iNutaM rodasI me |ahA yaddyAvo.asunItimayanmadhvA no atra pitarA shishItAm || 10.12.4
kiM svinno rAjA jagR^ihe kadasyAti vrataM chakR^imA ko vi veda |mitrashchiddhi ShmA juhurANo devA~nChloko na yAtAmapi vAjo asti || 10.12.5
durmantvatrAmR^itasya nAma salakShmA yadviShurUpA bhavAti |yamasya yo manavate sumantvagne tamR^iShva pAhyaprayuchChan || 10.12.6
yasmindevA vidathe mAdayante vivasvataH sadane dhArayante |sUrye jyotiradadhurmAsyaktUnpari dyotaniM charato ajasrA || 10.12.7
yasmindevA manmani saMcharantyapIchye na vayamasya vidma |mitro no atrAditiranAgAnsavitA devo varuNAya vochat || 10.12.8
shrudhI no agne sadane sadhasthe yukShvA rathamamR^itasya dravitnum |A no vaha rodasI devaputre mAkirdevAnAmapa bhUriha syAH || 10.12.9

yuje vAM brahma pUrvyaM namobhirvi shloka etu pathyeva sUreH |shR^iNvantu vishve amR^itasya putrA A ye dhAmAni divyAni tasthuH || 10.13.1
yame iva yatamAne yadaitaM pra vAM bharanmAnuShA devayantaH |A sIdataM svamu lokaM vidAne svAsasthe bhavatamindave naH || 10.13.2
pa~ncha padAni rupo anvarohaM chatuShpadImanvemi vratena |akShareNa prati mima etAmR^itasya nAbhAvadhi saM punAmi || 10.13.3
devebhyaH kamavR^iNIta mR^ityuM prajAyai kamamR^itaM nAvR^iNIta |bR^ihaspatiM yaj~namakR^iNvata R^iShiM priyAM yamastanvaM prArirechIt || 10.13.4
sapta kSharanti shishave marutvate pitre putrAso apyavIvatannR^itam |ubhe idasyobhayasya rAjata ubhe yatete ubhayasya puShyataH || 10.13.5

pareyivAMsaM pravato mahIranu bahubhyaH panthAmanupaspashAnam |vaivasvataM saMgamanaM janAnAM yamaM rAjAnaM haviShA duvasya || 10.14.1
yamo no gAtuM prathamo viveda naiShA gavyUtirapabhartavA u |yatrA naH pUrve pitaraH pareyurenA jaj~nAnAH pathyA anu svAH || 10.14.2
mAtalI kavyairyamo a~NgirobhirbR^ihaspatirR^ikvabhirvAvR^idhAnaH |yA.Nshcha devA vAvR^idhurye cha devAnsvAhAnye svadhayAnye madanti || 10.14.3
imaM yama prastaramA hi sIdA~NgirobhiH pitR^ibhiH saMvidAnaH |A tvA mantrAH kavishastA vahantvenA rAjanhaviShA mAdayasva || 10.14.4
a~NgirobhirA gahi yaj~niyebhiryama vairUpairiha mAdayasva |vivasvantaM huve yaH pitA te.asminyaj~ne barhiShyA niShadya || 10.14.5
a~Ngiraso naH pitaro navagvA atharvANo bhR^igavaH somyAsaH |teShAM vayaM sumatau yaj~niyAnAmapi bhadre saumanase syAma || 10.14.6
prehi prehi pathibhiH pUrvyebhiryatrA naH pUrve pitaraH pareyuH |ubhA rAjAnA svadhayA madantA yamaM pashyAsi varuNaM cha devam || 10.14.7
saM gachChasva pitR^ibhiH saM yameneShTApUrtena parame vyoman |hitvAyAvadyaM punarastamehi saM gachChasva tanvA suvarchAH || 10.14.8
apeta vIta vi cha sarpatAto.asmA etaM pitaro lokamakran |ahobhiradbhiraktubhirvyaktaM yamo dadAtyavasAnamasmai || 10.14.9
ati drava sArameyau shvAnau chaturakShau shabalau sAdhunA pathA |athA pitR^InsuvidatrA.N upehi yamena ye sadhamAdaM madanti || 10.14.10
yau te shvAnau yama rakShitArau chaturakShau pathirakShI nR^ichakShasau |tAbhyAmenaM pari dehi rAjansvasti chAsmA anamIvaM cha dhehi || 10.14.11
urUNasAvasutR^ipA udumbalau yamasya dUtau charato janA.N anu |tAvasmabhyaM dR^ishaye sUryAya punardAtAmasumadyeha bhadram || 10.14.12
yamAya somaM sunuta yamAya juhutA haviH |yamaM ha yaj~no gachChatyagnidUto araMkR^itaH || 10.14.13
yamAya ghR^itavaddhavirjuhota pra cha tiShThata |sa no deveShvA yamaddIrghamAyuH pra jIvase || 10.14.14
yamAya madhumattamaM rAj~ne havyaM juhotana |idaM nama R^iShibhyaH pUrvajebhyaH pUrvebhyaH pathikR^idbhyaH || 10.14.15
trikadrukebhiH patati ShaLurvIrekamidbR^ihat |triShTubgAyatrI ChandAMsi sarvA tA yama AhitA || 10.14.16

udIratAmavara utparAsa unmadhyamAH pitaraH somyAsaH |asuM ya IyuravR^ikA R^itaj~nAste no.avantu pitaro haveShu || 10.15.1
idaM pitR^ibhyo namo astvadya ye pUrvAso ya uparAsa IyuH |ye pArthive rajasyA niShattA ye vA nUnaM suvR^ijanAsu vikShu || 10.15.2
AhaM pitR^InsuvidatrA.N avitsi napAtaM cha vikramaNaM cha viShNoH |barhiShado ye svadhayA sutasya bhajanta pitvasta ihAgamiShThAH || 10.15.3
barhiShadaH pitara UtyarvAgimA vo havyA chakR^imA juShadhvam |ta A gatAvasA shaMtamenAthA naH shaM yorarapo dadhAta || 10.15.4
upahUtAH pitaraH somyAso barhiShyeShu nidhiShu priyeShu |ta A gamantu ta iha shruvantvadhi bruvantu te.avantvasmAn || 10.15.5
AchyA jAnu dakShiNato niShadyemaM yaj~namabhi gR^iNIta vishve |mA hiMsiShTa pitaraH kena chinno yadva AgaH puruShatA karAma || 10.15.6
AsInAso aruNInAmupasthe rayiM dhatta dAshuShe martyAya |putrebhyaH pitarastasya vasvaH pra yachChata ta ihorjaM dadhAta || 10.15.7
ye naH pUrve pitaraH somyAso.anUhire somapIthaM vasiShThAH |tebhiryamaH saMrarANo havIMShyushannushadbhiH pratikAmamattu || 10.15.8
ye tAtR^iShurdevatrA jehamAnA hotrAvidaH stomataShTAso arkaiH |Agne yAhi suvidatrebhirarvA~NsatyaiH kavyaiH pitR^ibhirgharmasadbhiH || 10.15.9
ye satyAso havirado haviShpA indreNa devaiH sarathaM dadhAnAH |Agne yAhi sahasraM devavandaiH paraiH pUrvaiH pitR^ibhirgharmasadbhiH || 10.15.10
agniShvAttAH pitara eha gachChata sadaHsadaH sadata supraNItayaH |attA havIMShi prayatAni barhiShyathA rayiM sarvavIraM dadhAtana || 10.15.11
tvamagna ILito jAtavedo.avADDhavyAni surabhINi kR^itvI |prAdAH pitR^ibhyaH svadhayA te akShannaddhi tvaM deva prayatA havIMShi || 10.15.12
ye cheha pitaro ye cha neha yA.Nshcha vidma yA.N u cha na pravidma |tvaM vettha yati te jAtavedaH svadhAbhiryaj~naM sukR^itaM juShasva || 10.15.13
ye agnidagdhA ye anagnidagdhA madhye divaH svadhayA mAdayante |tebhiH svarALasunItimetAM yathAvashaM tanvaM kalpayasva || 10.15.14

mainamagne vi daho mAbhi shocho mAsya tvachaM chikShipo mA sharIram |yadA shR^itaM kR^iNavo jAtavedo.athemenaM pra hiNutAtpitR^ibhyaH || 10.16.1
shR^itaM yadA karasi jAtavedo.athemenaM pari dattAtpitR^ibhyaH |yadA gachChAtyasunItimetAmathA devAnAM vashanIrbhavAti || 10.16.2
sUryaM chakShurgachChatu vAtamAtmA dyAM cha gachCha pR^ithivIM cha dharmaNA |apo vA gachCha yadi tatra te hitamoShadhIShu prati tiShThA sharIraiH || 10.16.3
ajo bhAgastapasA taM tapasva taM te shochistapatu taM te archiH |yAste shivAstanvo jAtavedastAbhirvahainaM sukR^itAmu lokam || 10.16.4
ava sR^ija punaragne pitR^ibhyo yasta Ahutashcharati svadhAbhiH |AyurvasAna upa vetu sheShaH saM gachChatAM tanvA jAtavedaH || 10.16.5
yatte kR^iShNaH shakuna Atutoda pipIlaH sarpa uta vA shvApadaH |agniShTadvishvAdagadaM kR^iNotu somashcha yo brAhmaNA.N Avivesha || 10.16.6
agnervarma pari gobhirvyayasva saM prorNuShva pIvasA medasA cha |nettvA dhR^iShNurharasA jarhR^iShANo dadhR^igvidhakShyanparya~NkhayAte || 10.16.7
imamagne chamasaM mA vi jihvaraH priyo devAnAmuta somyAnAm |eSha yashchamaso devapAnastasmindevA amR^itA mAdayante || 10.16.8
kravyAdamagniM pra hiNomi dUraM yamarAj~no gachChatu ripravAhaH |ihaivAyamitaro jAtavedA devebhyo havyaM vahatu prajAnan || 10.16.9
yo agniH kravyAtpravivesha vo gR^ihamimaM pashyannitaraM jAtavedasam |taM harAmi pitR^iyaj~nAya devaM sa gharmaminvAtparame sadhasthe || 10.16.10
yo agniH kravyavAhanaH pitR^InyakShadR^itAvR^idhaH |predu havyAni vochati devebhyashcha pitR^ibhya A || 10.16.11
ushantastvA ni dhImahyushantaH samidhImahi |ushannushata A vaha pitR^InhaviShe attave || 10.16.12
yaM tvamagne samadahastamu nirvApayA punaH |kiyAmbvatra rohatu pAkadUrvA vyalkashA || 10.16.13
shItike shItikAvati hlAdike hlAdikAvati |maNDUkyA su saM gama imaM svagniM harShaya || 10.16.14

tvaShTA duhitre vahatuM kR^iNotItIdaM vishvaM bhuvanaM sameti |yamasya mAtA paryuhyamAnA maho jAyA vivasvato nanAsha || 10.17.1
apAgUhannamR^itAM martyebhyaH kR^itvI savarNAmadadurvivasvate |utAshvinAvabharadyattadAsIdajahAdu dvA mithunA saraNyUH || 10.17.2
pUShA tvetashchyAvayatu pra vidvAnanaShTapashurbhuvanasya gopAH |sa tvaitebhyaH pari dadatpitR^ibhyo.agnirdevebhyaH suvidatriyebhyaH || 10.17.3
AyurvishvAyuH pari pAsati tvA pUShA tvA pAtu prapathe purastAt |yatrAsate sukR^ito yatra te yayustatra tvA devaH savitA dadhAtu || 10.17.4
pUShemA AshA anu veda sarvAH so asmA.N abhayatamena neShat |svastidA AghR^iNiH sarvavIro.aprayuchChanpura etu prajAnan || 10.17.5
prapathe pathAmajaniShTa pUShA prapathe divaH prapathe pR^ithivyAH |ubhe abhi priyatame sadhasthe A cha parA cha charati prajAnan || 10.17.6
sarasvatIM devayanto havante sarasvatImadhvare tAyamAne |sarasvatIM sukR^ito ahvayanta sarasvatI dAshuShe vAryaM dAt || 10.17.7
sarasvati yA sarathaM yayAtha svadhAbhirdevi pitR^ibhirmadantI |AsadyAsminbarhiShi mAdayasvAnamIvA iSha A dhehyasme || 10.17.8
sarasvatIM yAM pitaro havante dakShiNA yaj~namabhinakShamANAH |sahasrArghamiLo atra bhAgaM rAyaspoShaM yajamAneShu dhehi || 10.17.9
Apo asmAnmAtaraH shundhayantu ghR^itena no ghR^itapvaH punantu |vishvaM hi ripraM pravahanti devIrudidAbhyaH shuchirA pUta emi || 10.17.10
drapsashchaskanda prathamA.N anu dyUnimaM cha yonimanu yashcha pUrvaH |samAnaM yonimanu saMcharantaM drapsaM juhomyanu sapta hotrAH || 10.17.11
yaste drapsaH skandati yaste aMshurbAhuchyuto dhiShaNAyA upasthAt |adhvaryorvA pari vA yaH pavitrAttaM te juhomi manasA vaShaTkR^itam || 10.17.12
yaste drapsaH skanno yaste aMshuravashcha yaH paraH sruchA |ayaM devo bR^ihaspatiH saM taM si~nchatu rAdhase || 10.17.13
payasvatIroShadhayaH payasvanmAmakaM vachaH |apAM payasvaditpayastena mA saha shundhata || 10.17.14

paraM mR^ityo anu parehi panthAM yaste sva itaro devayAnAt |chakShuShmate shR^iNvate te bravImi mA naH prajAM rIriSho mota vIrAn || 10.18.1
mR^ityoH padaM yopayanto yadaita drAghIya AyuH prataraM dadhAnAH |ApyAyamAnAH prajayA dhanena shuddhAH pUtA bhavata yaj~niyAsaH || 10.18.2
ime jIvA vi mR^itairAvavR^itrannabhUdbhadrA devahUtirno adya |prA~ncho agAma nR^itaye hasAya drAghIya AyuH prataraM dadhAnAH || 10.18.3
imaM jIvebhyaH paridhiM dadhAmi maiShAM nu gAdaparo arthametam |shataM jIvantu sharadaH purUchIrantarmR^ityuM dadhatAM parvatena || 10.18.4
yathAhAnyanupUrvaM bhavanti yatha R^itava R^itubhiryanti sAdhu |yathA na pUrvamaparo jahAtyevA dhAtarAyUMShi kalpayaiShAm || 10.18.5
A rohatAyurjarasaM vR^iNAnA anupUrvaM yatamAnA yati ShTha |iha tvaShTA sujanimA sajoShA dIrghamAyuH karati jIvase vaH || 10.18.6
imA nArIravidhavAH supatnIrA~njanena sarpiShA saM vishantu |anashravo.anamIvAH suratnA A rohantu janayo yonimagre || 10.18.7
udIrShva nAryabhi jIvalokaM gatAsumetamupa sheSha ehi |hastagrAbhasya didhiShostavedaM patyurjanitvamabhi saM babhUtha || 10.18.8
dhanurhastAdAdadAno mR^itasyAsme kShatrAya varchase balAya |atraiva tvamiha vayaM suvIrA vishvAH spR^idho abhimAtIrjayema || 10.18.9
upa sarpa mAtaraM bhUmimetAmuruvyachasaM pR^ithivIM sushevAm |UrNamradA yuvatirdakShiNAvata eShA tvA pAtu nirR^iterupasthAt || 10.18.10
uchChva~nchasva pR^ithivi mA ni bAdhathAH sUpAyanAsmai bhava sUpava~nchanA |mAtA putraM yathA sichAbhyenaM bhUma UrNuhi || 10.18.11
uchChva~nchamAnA pR^ithivI su tiShThatu sahasraM mita upa hi shrayantAm |te gR^ihAso ghR^itashchuto bhavantu vishvAhAsmai sharaNAH santvatra || 10.18.12
utte stabhnAmi pR^ithivIM tvatparImaM logaM nidadhanmo ahaM riSham |etAM sthUNAM pitaro dhArayantu te.atrA yamaH sAdanA te minotu || 10.18.13
pratIchIne mAmahanIShvAH parNamivA dadhuH |pratIchIM jagrabhA vAchamashvaM rashanayA yathA || 10.18.14

ni vartadhvaM mAnu gAtAsmAnsiShakta revatIH |agnIShomA punarvasU asme dhArayataM rayim || 10.19.1
punarenA ni vartaya punarenA nyA kuru |indra eNA ni yachChatvagnirenA upAjatu || 10.19.2
punaretA ni vartantAmasminpuShyantu gopatau |ihaivAgne ni dhArayeha tiShThatu yA rayiH || 10.19.3
yanniyAnaM nyayanaM saMj~nAnaM yatparAyaNam |AvartanaM nivartanaM yo gopA api taM huve || 10.19.4
ya udAnaDvyayanaM ya udAnaT parAyaNam |AvartanaM nivartanamapi gopA ni vartatAm || 10.19.5
A nivarta ni vartaya punarna indra gA dehi |jIvAbhirbhunajAmahai || 10.19.6
pari vo vishvato dadha UrjA ghR^itena payasA |ye devAH ke cha yaj~niyAste rayyA saM sR^ijantu naH || 10.19.7
A nivartana vartaya ni nivartana vartaya |bhUmyAshchatasraH pradishastAbhya enA ni vartaya || 10.19.8

bhadraM no api vAtaya manaH || 10.20.1
agnimILe bhujAM yaviShThaM shAsA mitraM durdharItum |yasya dharmansvarenIH saparyanti mAturUdhaH || 10.20.2
yamAsA kR^ipanILaM bhAsAketuM vardhayanti |bhrAjate shreNidan || 10.20.3
aryo vishAM gAtureti pra yadAnaDdivo antAn |kavirabhraM dIdyAnaH || 10.20.4
juShaddhavyA mAnuShasyordhvastasthAvR^ibhvA yaj~ne |minvansadma pura eti || 10.20.5
sa hi kShemo haviryaj~naH shruShTIdasya gAtureti |agniM devA vAshImantam || 10.20.6
yaj~nAsAhaM duva iShe.agniM pUrvasya shevasya |adreH sUnumAyumAhuH || 10.20.7
naro ye ke chAsmadA vishvette vAma A syuH |agniM haviShA vardhantaH || 10.20.8
kR^iShNaH shveto.aruSho yAmo asya bradhna R^ijra uta shoNo yashasvAn |hiraNyarUpaM janitA jajAna || 10.20.9
evA te agne vimado manIShAmUrjo napAdamR^itebhiH sajoShAH |gira A vakShatsumatIriyAna iShamUrjaM sukShitiM vishvamAbhAH || 10.20.10

AgniM na svavR^iktibhirhotAraM tvA vR^iNImahe |yaj~nAya stIrNabarhiShe vi vo made shIraM pAvakashochiShaM vivakShase || 10.21.1
tvAmu te svAbhuvaH shumbhantyashvarAdhasaH |veti tvAmupasechanI vi vo mada R^ijItiragna AhutirvivakShase || 10.21.2
tve dharmANa Asate juhUbhiH si~nchatIriva |kR^iShNA rUpANyarjunA vi vo made vishvA adhi shriyo dhiShe vivakShase || 10.21.3
yamagne manyase rayiM sahasAvannamartya |tamA no vAjasAtaye vi vo made yaj~neShu chitramA bharA vivakShase || 10.21.4
agnirjAto atharvaNA vidadvishvAni kAvyA |bhuvaddUto vivasvato vi vo made priyo yamasya kAmyo vivakShase || 10.21.5
tvAM yaj~neShvILate.agne prayatyadhvare |tvaM vasUni kAmyA vi vo made vishvA dadhAsi dAshuShe vivakShase || 10.21.6
tvAM yaj~neShvR^itvijaM chArumagne ni Shedire |ghR^itapratIkaM manuSho vi vo made shukraM chetiShThamakShabhirvivakShase || 10.21.7
agne shukreNa shochiShoru prathayase bR^ihat |abhikrandanvR^iShAyase vi vo made garbhaM dadhAsi jAmiShu vivakShase || 10.21.8

kuha shruta indraH kasminnadya jane mitro na shrUyate |R^iShINAM vA yaH kShaye guhA vA charkR^iShe girA || 10.22.1
iha shruta indro asme adya stave vajryR^ichIShamaH |mitro na yo janeShvA yashashchakre asAmyA || 10.22.2
maho yaspatiH shavaso asAmyA maho nR^imNasya tUtujiH |bhartA vajrasya dhR^iShNoH pitA putramiva priyam || 10.22.3
yujAno ashvA vAtasya dhunI devo devasya vajrivaH |syantA pathA virukmatA sR^ijAnaH stoShyadhvanaH || 10.22.4
tvaM tyA chidvAtasyAshvAgA R^ijrA tmanA vahadhyai |yayordevo na martyo yantA nakirvidAyyaH || 10.22.5
adha gmantoshanA pR^ichChate vAM kadarthA na A gR^iham |A jagmathuH parAkAddivashcha gmashcha martyam || 10.22.6
A na indra pR^ikShase.asmAkaM brahmodyatam |tattvA yAchAmahe.avaH shuShNaM yaddhannamAnuSham || 10.22.7
akarmA dasyurabhi no amanturanyavrato amAnuShaH |tvaM tasyAmitrahanvadhardAsasya dambhaya || 10.22.8
tvaM na indra shUra shUrairuta tvotAso barhaNA |purutrA te vi pUrtayo navanta kShoNayo yathA || 10.22.9
tvaM tAnvR^itrahatye chodayo nR^InkArpANe shUra vajrivaH |guhA yadI kavInAM vishAM nakShatrashavasAm || 10.22.10
makShU tA ta indra dAnApnasa AkShANe shUra vajrivaH |yaddha shuShNasya dambhayo jAtaM vishvaM sayAvabhiH || 10.22.11
mAkudhryagindra shUra vasvIrasme bhUvannabhiShTayaH |vayaMvayaM ta AsAM sumne syAma vajrivaH || 10.22.12
asme tA ta indra santu satyAhiMsantIrupaspR^ishaH |vidyAma yAsAM bhujo dhenUnAM na vajrivaH || 10.22.13
ahastA yadapadI vardhata kShAH shachIbhirvedyAnAm |shuShNaM pari pradakShiNidvishvAyave ni shishnathaH || 10.22.14
pibApibedindra shUra somaM mA riShaNyo vasavAna vasuH san |uta trAyasva gR^iNato maghono mahashcha rAyo revataskR^idhI naH || 10.22.15

yajAmaha indraM vajradakShiNaM harINAM rathyaM vivratAnAm |pra shmashru dodhuvadUrdhvathA bhUdvi senAbhirdayamAno vi rAdhasA || 10.23.1
harI nvasya yA vane vide vasvindro maghairmaghavA vR^itrahA bhuvat |R^ibhurvAja R^ibhukShAH patyate shavo.ava kShNaumi dAsasya nAma chit || 10.23.2
yadA vajraM hiraNyamidathA rathaM harI yamasya vahato vi sUribhiH |A tiShThati maghavA sanashruta indro vAjasya dIrghashravasaspatiH || 10.23.3
so chinnu vR^iShTiryUthyA svA sachA.N indraH shmashrUNi haritAbhi pruShNute |ava veti sukShayaM sute madhUdiddhUnoti vAto yathA vanam || 10.23.4
yo vAchA vivAcho mR^idhravAchaH purU sahasrAshivA jaghAna |tattadidasya pauMsyaM gR^iNImasi piteva yastaviShIM vAvR^idhe shavaH || 10.23.5
stomaM ta indra vimadA ajIjanannapUrvyaM purutamaM sudAnave |vidmA hyasya bhojanaminasya yadA pashuM na gopAH karAmahe || 10.23.6
mAkirna enA sakhyA vi yauShustava chendra vimadasya cha R^iSheH |vidmA hi te pramatiM deva jAmivadasme te santu sakhyA shivAni || 10.23.7

indra somamimaM piba madhumantaM chamU sutam |asme rayiM ni dhAraya vi vo made sahasriNaM purUvaso vivakShase || 10.24.1
tvAM yaj~nebhirukthairupa havyebhirImahe |shachIpate shachInAM vi vo made shreShThaM no dhehi vAryaM vivakShase || 10.24.2
yaspatirvAryANAmasi radhrasya choditA |indra stotR^INAmavitA vi vo made dviSho naH pAhyaMhaso vivakShase || 10.24.3
yuvaM shakrA mAyAvinA samIchI niramanthatam |vimadena yadILitA nAsatyA niramanthatam || 10.24.4
vishve devA akR^ipanta samIchyorniShpatantyoH |nAsatyAvabruvandevAH punarA vahatAditi || 10.24.5
madhumanme parAyaNaM madhumatpunarAyanam |tA no devA devatayA yuvaM madhumataskR^itam || 10.24.6

bhadraM no api vAtaya mano dakShamuta kratum |adhA te sakhye andhaso vi vo made raNangAvo na yavase vivakShase || 10.25.1
hR^idispR^ishasta Asate vishveShu soma dhAmasu |adhA kAmA ime mama vi vo made vi tiShThante vasUyavo vivakShase || 10.25.2
uta vratAni soma te prAhaM minAmi pAkyA |adhA piteva sUnave vi vo made mR^iLA no abhi chidvadhAdvivakShase || 10.25.3
samu pra yanti dhItayaH sargAso.avatA.N iva |kratuM naH soma jIvase vi vo made dhArayA chamasA.N iva vivakShase || 10.25.4
tava tye soma shaktibhirnikAmAso vyR^iNvire |gR^itsasya dhIrAstavaso vi vo made vrajaM gomantamashvinaM vivakShase || 10.25.5
pashuM naH soma rakShasi purutrA viShThitaM jagat |samAkR^iNoShi jIvase vi vo made vishvA sampashyanbhuvanA vivakShase || 10.25.6
tvaM naH soma vishvato gopA adAbhyo bhava |sedha rAjannapa sridho vi vo made mA no duHshaMsa IshatA vivakShase || 10.25.7
tvaM naH soma sukraturvayodheyAya jAgR^ihi |kShetravittaro manuSho vi vo made druho naH pAhyaMhaso vivakShase || 10.25.8
tvaM no vR^itrahantamendrasyendo shivaH sakhA |yatsIM havante samithe vi vo made yudhyamAnAstokasAtau vivakShase || 10.25.9
ayaM gha sa turo mada indrasya vardhata priyaH |ayaM kakShIvato maho vi vo made matiM viprasya vardhayadvivakShase || 10.25.10
ayaM viprAya dAshuShe vAjA.N iyarti gomataH |ayaM saptabhya A varaM vi vo made prAndhaM shroNaM cha tAriShadvivakShase || 10.25.11

pra hyachChA manIShA spArhA yanti niyutaH |pra dasrA niyudrathaH pUShA aviShTu mAhinaH || 10.26.1
yasya tyanmahitvaM vAtApyamayaM janaH |vipra A vaMsaddhItibhishchiketa suShTutInAm || 10.26.2
sa veda suShTutInAmindurna pUShA vR^iShA |abhi psuraH pruShAyati vrajaM na A pruShAyati || 10.26.3
maMsImahi tvA vayamasmAkaM deva pUShan |matInAM cha sAdhanaM viprANAM chAdhavam || 10.26.4
pratyardhiryaj~nAnAmashvahayo rathAnAm |R^iShiH sa yo manurhito viprasya yAvayatsakhaH || 10.26.5
AdhIShamANAyAH patiH shuchAyAshcha shuchasya cha |vAsovAyo.avInAmA vAsAMsi marmR^ijat || 10.26.6
ino vAjAnAM patirinaH puShTInAM sakhA |pra shmashru haryato dUdhodvi vR^ithA yo adAbhyaH || 10.26.7
A te rathasya pUShannajA dhuraM vavR^ityuH |vishvasyArthinaH sakhA sanojA anapachyutaH || 10.26.8
asmAkamUrjA rathaM pUShA aviShTu mAhinaH |bhuvadvAjAnAM vR^idha imaM naH shR^iNavaddhavam || 10.26.9

asatsu me jaritaH sAbhivego yatsunvate yajamAnAya shikSham |anAshIrdAmahamasmi prahantA satyadhvR^itaM vR^ijinAyantamAbhum || 10.27.1
yadIdahaM yudhaye saMnayAnyadevayUntanvA shUshujAnAn |amA te tumraM vR^iShabhaM pachAni tIvraM sutaM pa~nchadashaM ni Shi~ncham || 10.27.2
nAhaM taM veda ya iti bravItyadevayUnsamaraNe jaghanvAn |yadAvAkhyatsamaraNamR^ighAvadAdiddha me vR^iShabhA pra bruvanti || 10.27.3
yadaj~nAteShu vR^ijaneShvAsaM vishve sato maghavAno ma Asan |jinAmi vetkShema A santamAbhuM pra taM kShiNAM parvate pAdagR^ihya || 10.27.4
na vA u mAM vR^ijane vArayante na parvatAso yadahaM manasye |mama svanAtkR^idhukarNo bhayAta evedanu dyUnkiraNaH samejAt || 10.27.5
darshannvatra shR^itapA.N anindrAnbAhukShadaH sharave patyamAnAn |ghR^iShuM vA ye niniduH sakhAyamadhyU nveShu pavayo vavR^ityuH || 10.27.6
abhUrvaukShIrvyu AyurAnaDdarShannu pUrvo aparo nu darShat |dve pavaste pari taM na bhUto yo asya pAre rajaso viveSha || 10.27.7
gAvo yavaM prayutA aryo akShantA apashyaM sahagopAshcharantIH |havA idaryo abhitaH samAyankiyadAsu svapatishChandayAte || 10.27.8
saM yadvayaM yavasAdo janAnAmahaM yavAda urvajre antaH |atrA yukto.avasAtAramichChAdatho ayuktaM yunajadvavanvAn || 10.27.9
atredu me maMsase satyamuktaM dvipAchcha yachchatuShpAtsaMsR^ijAni |strIbhiryo atra vR^iShaNaM pR^itanyAdayuddho asya vi bhajAni vedaH || 10.27.10
yasyAnakShA duhitA jAtvAsa kastAM vidvA.N abhi manyAte andhAm |kataro meniM prati taM muchAte ya IM vahAte ya IM vA vareyAt || 10.27.11
kiyatI yoShA maryato vadhUyoH pariprItA panyasA vAryeNa |bhadrA vadhUrbhavati yatsupeshAH svayaM sA mitraM vanute jane chit || 10.27.12
patto jagAra pratya~nchamatti shIrShNA shiraH prati dadhau varUtham |AsIna UrdhvAmupasi kShiNAti nya~N~NuttAnAmanveti bhUmim || 10.27.13
bR^ihannachChAyo apalAsho arvA tasthau mAtA viShito atti garbhaH |anyasyA vatsaM rihatI mimAya kayA bhuvA ni dadhe dhenurUdhaH || 10.27.14
sapta vIrAso adharAdudAyannaShTottarAttAtsamajagmirante |nava pashchAtAtsthivimanta Ayandasha prAksAnu vi tirantyashnaH || 10.27.15
dashAnAmekaM kapilaM samAnaM taM hinvanti kratave pAryAya |garbhaM mAtA sudhitaM vakShaNAsvavenantaM tuShayantI bibharti || 10.27.16
pIvAnaM meShamapachanta vIrA nyuptA akShA anu dIva Asan |dvA dhanuM bR^ihatImapsvantaH pavitravantA charataH punantA || 10.27.17
vi kroshanAso viShva~ncha AyanpachAti nemo nahi pakShadardhaH |ayaM me devaH savitA tadAha drvanna idvanavatsarpirannaH || 10.27.18
apashyaM grAmaM vahamAnamArAdachakrayA svadhayA vartamAnam |siShaktyaryaH pra yugA janAnAM sadyaH shishnA praminAno navIyAn || 10.27.19
etau me gAvau pramarasya yuktau mo Shu pra sedhIrmuhurinmamandhi |Apashchidasya vi nashantyarthaM sUrashcha marka uparo babhUvAn || 10.27.20
ayaM yo vajraH purudhA vivR^itto.avaH sUryasya bR^ihataH purIShAt |shrava idenA paro anyadasti tadavyathI jarimANastaranti || 10.27.21
vR^ikShevR^ikShe niyatA mImayadgaustato vayaH pra patAnpUruShAdaH |athedaM vishvaM bhuvanaM bhayAta indrAya sunvadR^iShaye cha shikShat || 10.27.22
devAnAM mAne prathamA atiShThankR^intatrAdeShAmuparA udAyan |trayastapanti pR^ithivImanUpA dvA bR^ibUkaM vahataH purISham || 10.27.23
sA te jIvAturuta tasya viddhi mA smaitAdR^igapa gUhaH samarye |AviH svaH kR^iNute gUhate busaM sa pAdurasya nirNijo na muchyate || 10.27.24

vishvo hyanyo arirAjagAma mamedaha shvashuro nA jagAma |jakShIyAddhAnA uta somaM papIyAtsvAshitaH punarastaM jagAyAt || 10.28.1
sa roruvadvR^iShabhastigmashR^i~Ngo varShmantasthau varimannA pR^ithivyAH |vishveShvenaM vR^ijaneShu pAmi yo me kukShI sutasomaH pR^iNAti || 10.28.2
adriNA te mandina indra tUyAnsunvanti somAnpibasi tvameShAm |pachanti te vR^iShabhA.N atsi teShAM pR^ikSheNa yanmaghavanhUyamAnaH || 10.28.3
idaM su me jaritarA chikiddhi pratIpaM shApaM nadyo vahanti |lopAshaH siMhaM pratya~nchamatsAH kroShTA varAhaM niratakta kakShAt || 10.28.4
kathA ta etadahamA chiketaM gR^itsasya pAkastavaso manIShAm |tvaM no vidvA.N R^ituthA vi vocho yamardhaM te maghavankShemyA dhUH || 10.28.5
evA hi mAM tavasaM vardhayanti divashchinme bR^ihata uttarA dhUH |purU sahasrA ni shishAmi sAkamashatruM hi mA janitA jajAna || 10.28.6
evA hi mAM tavasaM jaj~nurugraM karmankarmanvR^iShaNamindra devAH |vadhIM vR^itraM vajreNa mandasAno.apa vrajaM mahinA dAshuShe vam || 10.28.7
devAsa AyanparashU.NrabibhranvanA vR^ishchanto abhi viDbhirAyan |ni sudrvaM dadhato vakShaNAsu yatrA kR^ipITamanu taddahanti || 10.28.8
shashaH kShuraM pratya~nchaM jagArAdriM logena vyabhedamArAt |bR^ihantaM chidR^ihate randhayAni vayadvatso vR^iShabhaM shUshuvAnaH || 10.28.9
suparNa itthA nakhamA siShAyAvaruddhaH paripadaM na siMhaH |niruddhashchinmahiShastarShyAvAngodhA tasmA ayathaM karShadetat || 10.28.10
tebhyo godhA ayathaM karShadetadye brahmaNaH pratipIyantyannaiH |sima ukShNo.avasR^iShTA.N adanti svayaM balAni tanvaH shR^iNAnAH || 10.28.11
ete shamIbhiH sushamI abhUvanye hinvire tanvaH soma ukthaiH |nR^ivadvadannupa no mAhi vAjAndivi shravo dadhiShe nAma vIraH || 10.28.12

vane na vA yo nyadhAyi chAka~nChuchirvAM stomo bhuraNAvajIgaH |yasyedindraH purudineShu hotA nR^iNAM naryo nR^itamaH kShapAvAn || 10.29.1
pra te asyA uShasaH prAparasyA nR^itau syAma nR^itamasya nR^iNAm |anu trishokaH shatamAvahannR^Inkutsena ratho yo asatsasavAn || 10.29.2
kaste mada indra rantyo bhUdduro giro abhyugro vi dhAva |kadvAho arvAgupa mA manIShA A tvA shakyAmupamaM rAdho annaiH || 10.29.3
kadu dyumnamindra tvAvato nR^InkayA dhiyA karase kanna Agan |mitro na satya urugAya bhR^ityA anne samasya yadasanmanIShAH || 10.29.4
preraya sUro arthaM na pAraM ye asya kAmaM janidhA iva gman |girashcha ye te tuvijAta pUrvIrnara indra pratishikShantyannaiH || 10.29.5
mAtre nu te sumite indra pUrvI dyaurmajmanA pR^ithivI kAvyena |varAya te ghR^itavantaH sutAsaH svAdmanbhavantu pItaye madhUni || 10.29.6
A madhvo asmA asichannamatramindrAya pUrNaM sa hi satyarAdhAH |sa vAvR^idhe varimannA pR^ithivyA abhi kratvA naryaH pauMsyaishcha || 10.29.7
vyAnaLindraH pR^itanAH svojA Asmai yatante sakhyAya pUrvIH |A smA rathaM na pR^itanAsu tiShTha yaM bhadrayA sumatyA chodayAse || 10.29.8

pra devatrA brahmaNe gAturetvapo achChA manaso na prayukti |mahIM mitrasya varuNasya dhAsiM pR^ithujrayase rIradhA suvR^iktim || 10.30.1
adhvaryavo haviShmanto hi bhUtAchChApa itoshatIrushantaH |ava yAshchaShTe aruNaH suparNastamAsyadhvamUrmimadyA suhastAH || 10.30.2
adhvaryavo.apa itA samudramapAM napAtaM haviShA yajadhvam |sa vo dadadUrmimadyA supUtaM tasmai somaM madhumantaM sunota || 10.30.3
yo anidhmo dIdayadapsvantaryaM viprAsa ILate adhvareShu |apAM napAnmadhumatIrapo dA yAbhirindro vAvR^idhe vIryAya || 10.30.4
yAbhiH somo modate harShate cha kalyANIbhiryuvatibhirna maryaH |tA adhvaryo apo achChA parehi yadAsi~nchA oShadhIbhiH punItAt || 10.30.5
evedyUne yuvatayo namanta yadImushannushatIretyachCha |saM jAnate manasA saM chikitre.adhvaryavo dhiShaNApashcha devIH || 10.30.6
yo vo vR^itAbhyo akR^iNodu lokaM yo vo mahyA abhishasteramu~nchat |tasmA indrAya madhumantamUrmiM devamAdanaM pra hiNotanApaH || 10.30.7
prAsmai hinota madhumantamUrmiM garbho yo vaH sindhavo madhva utsaH |ghR^itapR^iShThamIDyamadhvareShvApo revatIH shR^iNutA havaM me || 10.30.8
taM sindhavo matsaramindrapAnamUrmiM pra heta ya ubhe iyarti |madachyutamaushAnaM nabhojAM pari tritantuM vicharantamutsam || 10.30.9
AvarvR^itatIradha nu dvidhArA goShuyudho na niyavaM charantIH |R^iShe janitrIrbhuvanasya patnIrapo vandasva savR^idhaH sayonIH || 10.30.10
hinotA no adhvaraM devayajyA hinota brahma sanaye dhanAnAm |R^itasya yoge vi ShyadhvamUdhaH shruShTIvarIrbhUtanAsmabhyamApaH || 10.30.11
Apo revatIH kShayathA hi vasvaH kratuM cha bhadraM bibhR^ithAmR^itaM cha |rAyashcha stha svapatyasya patnIH sarasvatI tadgR^iNate vayo dhAt || 10.30.12
prati yadApo adR^ishramAyatIrghR^itaM payAMsi bibhratIrmadhUni |adhvaryubhirmanasA saMvidAnA indrAya somaM suShutaM bharantIH || 10.30.13
emA agmanrevatIrjIvadhanyA adhvaryavaH sAdayatA sakhAyaH |ni barhiShi dhattana somyAso.apAM naptrA saMvidAnAsa enAH || 10.30.14
AgmannApa ushatIrbarhiredaM nyadhvare asadandevayantIH |adhvaryavaH sunutendrAya somamabhUdu vaH sushakA devayajyA || 10.30.15

A no devAnAmupa vetu shaMso vishvebhisturairavase yajatraH |tebhirvayaM suShakhAyo bhavema taranto vishvA duritA syAma || 10.31.1
pari chinmarto draviNaM mamanyAdR^itasya pathA namasA vivAset |uta svena kratunA saM vadeta shreyAMsaM dakShaM manasA jagR^ibhyAt || 10.31.2
adhAyi dhItirasasR^igramaMshAstIrthe na dasmamupa yantyUmAH |abhyAnashma suvitasya shUShaM navedaso amR^itAnAmabhUma || 10.31.3
nityashchAkanyAtsvapatirdamUnA yasmA u devaH savitA jajAna |bhago vA gobhiraryamemanajyAtso asmai chArushChadayaduta syAt || 10.31.4
iyaM sA bhUyA uShasAmiva kShA yaddha kShumantaH shavasA samAyan |asya stutiM jariturbhikShamANA A naH shagmAsa upa yantu vAjAH || 10.31.5
asyedeShA sumatiH paprathAnAbhavatpUrvyA bhUmanA gauH |asya sanILA asurasya yonau samAna A bharaNe bibhramANAH || 10.31.6
kiM svidvanaM ka u sa vR^ikSha Asa yato dyAvApR^ithivI niShTatakShuH |saMtasthAne ajare ita/UtI ahAni pUrvIruShaso jaranta || 10.31.7
naitAvadenA paro anyadastyukShA sa dyAvApR^ithivI bibharti |tvachaM pavitraM kR^iNuta svadhAvAnyadIM sUryaM na harito vahanti || 10.31.8
stego na kShAmatyeti pR^ithvIM mihaM na vAto vi ha vAti bhUma |mitro yatra varuNo ajyamAno.agnirvane na vyasR^iShTa shokam || 10.31.9
starIryatsUta sadyo ajyamAnA vyathiravyathIH kR^iNuta svagopA |putro yatpUrvaH pitrorjaniShTa shamyAM gaurjagAra yaddha pR^ichChAn || 10.31.10
uta kaNvaM nR^iShadaH putramAhuruta shyAvo dhanamAdatta vAjI |pra kR^iShNAya rushadapinvatodharR^itamatra nakirasmA apIpet || 10.31.11

pra su gmantA dhiyasAnasya sakShaNi varebhirvarA.N abhi Shu prasIdataH |asmAkamindra ubhayaM jujoShati yatsomyasyAndhaso bubodhati || 10.32.1
vIndra yAsi divyAni rochanA vi pArthivAni rajasA puruShTuta |ye tvA vahanti muhuradhvarA.N upa te su vanvantu vagvanA.N arAdhasaH || 10.32.2
tadinme ChantsadvapuSho vapuShTaraM putro yajjAnaM pitroradhIyati |jAyA patiM vahati vagnunA sumatpuMsa idbhadro vahatuH pariShkR^itaH || 10.32.3
taditsadhasthamabhi chAru dIdhaya gAvo yachChAsanvahatuM na dhenavaH |mAtA yanmanturyUthasya pUrvyAbhi vANasya saptadhAturijjanaH || 10.32.4
pra vo.achChA ririche devayuShpadameko rudrebhiryAti turvaNiH |jarA vA yeShvamR^iteShu dAvane pari va UmebhyaH si~nchatA madhu || 10.32.5
nidhIyamAnamapagULhamapsu pra me devAnAM vratapA uvAcha |indro vidvA.N anu hi tvA chachakSha tenAhamagne anushiShTa AgAm || 10.32.6
akShetravitkShetravidaM hyaprAT sa praiti kShetravidAnushiShTaH |etadvai bhadramanushAsanasyota srutiM vindatya~njasInAm || 10.32.7
adyedu prANIdamamannimAhApIvR^ito adhayanmAturUdhaH |emenamApa jarimA yuvAnamaheLanvasuH sumanA babhUva || 10.32.8
etAni bhadrA kalasha kriyAma kurushravaNa dadato maghAni |dAna idvo maghavAnaH so astvayaM cha somo hR^idi yaM bibharmi || 10.32.9

pra mA yuyujre prayujo janAnAM vahAmi sma pUShaNamantareNa |vishve devAso adha mAmarakShanduHshAsurAgAditi ghoSha AsIt || 10.33.1
saM mA tapantyabhitaH sapatnIriva parshavaH |ni bAdhate amatirnagnatA jasurverna vevIyate matiH || 10.33.2
mUSho na shishnA vyadanti mAdhyaH stotAraM te shatakrato |sakR^itsu no maghavannindra mR^iLayAdhA piteva no bhava || 10.33.3
kurushravaNamAvR^iNi rAjAnaM trAsadasyavam |maMhiShThaM vAghatAmR^iShiH || 10.33.4
yasya mA harito rathe tisro vahanti sAdhuyA |stavai sahasradakShiNe || 10.33.5
yasya prasvAdaso gira upamashravasaH pituH |kShetraM na raNvamUchuShe || 10.33.6
adhi putropamashravo napAnmitrAtitherihi |pituShTe asmi vanditA || 10.33.7
yadIshIyAmR^itAnAmuta vA martyAnAm |jIvedinmaghavA mama || 10.33.8
na devAnAmati vrataM shatAtmA chana jIvati |tathA yujA vi vAvR^ite || 10.33.9

prAvepA mA bR^ihato mAdayanti pravAtejA iriNe varvR^itAnAH |somasyeva maujavatasya bhakSho vibhIdako jAgR^ivirmahyamachChAn || 10.34.1
na mA mimetha na jihILa eShA shivA sakhibhya uta mahyamAsIt |akShasyAhamekaparasya hetoranuvratAmapa jAyAmarodham || 10.34.2
dveShTi shvashrUrapa jAyA ruNaddhi na nAthito vindate marDitAram |ashvasyeva jarato vasnyasya nAhaM vindAmi kitavasya bhogam || 10.34.3
anye jAyAM pari mR^ishantyasya yasyAgR^idhadvedane vAjyakShaH |pitA mAtA bhrAtara enamAhurna jAnImo nayatA baddhametam || 10.34.4
yadAdIdhye na daviShANyebhiH parAyadbhyo.ava hIye sakhibhyaH |nyuptAshcha babhravo vAchamakrata.N emIdeShAM niShkR^itaM jAriNIva || 10.34.5
sabhAmeti kitavaH pR^ichChamAno jeShyAmIti tanvA shUshujAnaH |akShAso asya vi tiranti kAmaM pratidIvne dadhata A kR^itAni || 10.34.6
akShAsa ida~Nkushino nitodino nikR^itvAnastapanAstApayiShNavaH |kumAradeShNA jayataH punarhaNo madhvA sampR^iktAH kitavasya barhaNA || 10.34.7
tripa~nchAshaH krILati vrAta eShAM deva iva savitA satyadharmA |ugrasya chinmanyave nA namante rAjA chidebhyo nama itkR^iNoti || 10.34.8
nIchA vartanta upari sphurantyahastAso hastavantaM sahante |divyA a~NgArA iriNe nyuptAH shItAH santo hR^idayaM nirdahanti || 10.34.9
jAyA tapyate kitavasya hInA mAtA putrasya charataH kva svit |R^iNAvA bibhyaddhanamichChamAno.anyeShAmastamupa naktameti || 10.34.10
striyaM dR^iShTvAya kitavaM tatApAnyeShAM jAyAM sukR^itaM cha yonim |pUrvAhNe ashvAnyuyuje hi babhrUnso agnerante vR^iShalaH papAda || 10.34.11
yo vaH senAnIrmahato gaNasya rAjA vrAtasya prathamo babhUva |tasmai kR^iNomi na dhanA ruNadhmi dashAhaM prAchIstadR^itaM vadAmi || 10.34.12
akShairmA dIvyaH kR^iShimitkR^iShasva vitte ramasva bahu manyamAnaH |tatra gAvaH kitava tatra jAyA tanme vi chaShTe savitAyamaryaH || 10.34.13
mitraM kR^iNudhvaM khalu mR^iLatA no mA no ghoreNa charatAbhi dhR^iShNu |ni vo nu manyurvishatAmarAtiranyo babhrUNAM prasitau nvastu || 10.34.14

abudhramu tya indravanto agnayo jyotirbharanta uShaso vyuShTiShu |mahI dyAvApR^ithivI chetatAmapo.adyA devAnAmava A vR^iNImahe || 10.35.1
divaspR^ithivyorava A vR^iNImahe mAtR^InsindhUnparvatA~nCharyaNAvataH |anAgAstvaM sUryamuShAsamImahe bhadraM somaH suvAno adyA kR^iNotu naH || 10.35.2
dyAvA no adya pR^ithivI anAgaso mahI trAyetAM suvitAya mAtarA |uShA uchChantyapa bAdhatAmaghaM svastyagniM samidhAnamImahe || 10.35.3
iyaM na usrA prathamA sudevyaM revatsanibhyo revatI vyuchChatu |Are manyuM durvidatrasya dhImahi svastyagniM samidhAnamImahe || 10.35.4
pra yAH sisrate sUryasya rashmibhirjyotirbharantIruShaso vyuShTiShu |bhadrA no adya shravase vyuchChata svastyagniM samidhAnamImahe || 10.35.5
anamIvA uShasa A charantu na udagnayo jihatAM jyotiShA bR^ihat |AyukShAtAmashvinA tUtujiM rathaM svastyagniM samidhAnamImahe || 10.35.6
shreShThaM no adya savitarvareNyaM bhAgamA suva sa hi ratnadhA asi |rAyo janitrIM dhiShaNAmupa bruve svastyagniM samidhAnamImahe || 10.35.7
pipartu mA tadR^itasya pravAchanaM devAnAM yanmanuShyA amanmahi |vishvA idusrAH spaLudeti sUryaH svastyagniM samidhAnamImahe || 10.35.8
