pratyagne harasA haraH shR^iNIhi vishvataH prati |yAtudhAnasya rakShaso balaM vi ruja vIryam || 10.87.25

haviShpAntamajaraM svarvidi divispR^ishyAhutaM juShTamagnau |tasya bharmaNe bhuvanAya devA dharmaNe kaM svadhayA paprathanta || 10.88.1
gIrNaM bhuvanaM tamasApagULhamAviH svarabhavajjAte agnau |tasya devAH pR^ithivI dyaurutApo.araNayannoShadhIH sakhye asya || 10.88.2
devebhirnviShito yaj~niyebhiragniM stoShANyajaraM bR^ihantam |yo bhAnunA pR^ithivIM dyAmutemAmAtatAna rodasI antarikSham || 10.88.3
yo hotAsItprathamo devajuShTo yaM samA~njannAjyenA vR^iNAnAH |sa patatrItvaraM sthA jagadyachChvAtramagnirakR^iNojjAtavedAH || 10.88.4
yajjAtavedo bhuvanasya mUrdhannatiShTho agne saha rochanena |taM tvAhema matibhirgIrbhirukthaiH sa yaj~niyo abhavo rodasiprAH || 10.88.5
mUrdhA bhuvo bhavati naktamagnistataH sUryo jAyate prAtarudyan |mAyAmU tu yaj~niyAnAmetAmapo yattUrNishcharati prajAnan || 10.88.6
dR^ishenyo yo mahinA samiddho.arochata diviyonirvibhAvA |tasminnagnau sUktavAkena devA havirvishva AjuhavustanUpAH || 10.88.7
sUktavAkaM prathamamAdidagnimAdiddhavirajanayanta devAH |sa eShAM yaj~no abhavattanUpAstaM dyaurveda taM pR^ithivI tamApaH || 10.88.8
yaM devAso.ajanayantAgniM yasminnAjuhavurbhuvanAni vishvA |so archiShA pR^ithivIM dyAmutemAmR^ijUyamAno atapanmahitvA || 10.88.9
stomena hi divi devAso agnimajIjana~nChaktibhI rodasiprAm |tamU akR^iNvantredhA bhuve kaM sa oShadhIH pachati vishvarUpAH || 10.88.10
yadedenamadadhuryaj~niyAso divi devAH sUryamAditeyam |yadA chariShNU mithunAvabhUtAmAditprApashyanbhuvanAni vishvA || 10.88.11
vishvasmA agniM bhuvanAya devA vaishvAnaraM ketumahnAmakR^iNvan |A yastatAnoShaso vibhAtIrapo UrNoti tamo archiShA yan || 10.88.12
vaishvAnaraM kavayo yaj~niyAso.agniM devA ajanayannajuryam |nakShatraM pratnamaminachchariShNu yakShasyAdhyakShaM taviShaM bR^ihantam || 10.88.13
vaishvAnaraM vishvahA dIdivAMsaM mantrairagniM kavimachChA vadAmaH |yo mahimnA paribabhUvorvI utAvastAduta devaH parastAt || 10.88.14
dve srutI ashR^iNavaM pitR^INAmahaM devAnAmuta martyAnAm |tAbhyAmidaM vishvamejatsameti yadantarA pitaraM mAtaraM cha || 10.88.15
dve samIchI bibhR^itashcharantaM shIrShato jAtaM manasA vimR^iShTam |sa pratya~NvishvA bhuvanAni tasthAvaprayuchChantaraNirbhrAjamAnaH || 10.88.16
yatrA vadete avaraH parashcha yaj~nanyoH kataro nau vi veda |A shekuritsadhamAdaM sakhAyo nakShanta yaj~naM ka idaM vi vochat || 10.88.17
katyagnayaH kati sUryAsaH katyuShAsaH katyu svidApaH |nopaspijaM vaH pitaro vadAmi pR^ichChAmi vaH kavayo vidmane kam || 10.88.18
yAvanmAtramuShaso na pratIkaM suparNyo vasate mAtarishvaH |tAvaddadhAtyupa yaj~namAyanbrAhmaNo hoturavaro niShIdan || 10.88.19

indraM stavA nR^itamaM yasya mahnA vibabAdhe rochanA vi jmo antAn |A yaH paprau charShaNIdhR^idvarobhiH pra sindhubhyo ririchAno mahitvA || 10.89.1
sa sUryaH paryurU varAMsyendro vavR^ityAdrathyeva chakrA |atiShThantamapasyaM na sargaM kR^iShNA tamAMsi tviShyA jaghAna || 10.89.2
samAnamasmA anapAvR^idarcha kShmayA divo asamaM brahma navyam |vi yaH pR^iShTheva janimAnyarya indrashchikAya na sakhAyamIShe || 10.89.3
indrAya giro anishitasargA apaH prerayaM sagarasya budhnAt |yo akSheNeva chakriyA shachIbhirviShvaktastambha pR^ithivImuta dyAm || 10.89.4
ApAntamanyustR^ipalaprabharmA dhuniH shimIvA~nCharumA.N R^ijIShI |somo vishvAnyatasA vanAni nArvAgindraM pratimAnAni debhuH || 10.89.5
na yasya dyAvApR^ithivI na dhanva nAntarikShaM nAdrayaH somo akShAH |yadasya manyuradhinIyamAnaH shR^iNAti vILu rujati sthirANi || 10.89.6
jaghAna vR^itraM svadhitirvaneva ruroja puro aradanna sindhUn |bibheda giriM navaminna kumbhamA gA indro akR^iNuta svayugbhiH || 10.89.7
tvaM ha tyadR^iNayA indra dhIro.asirna parva vR^ijinA shR^iNAsi |pra ye mitrasya varuNasya dhAma yujaM na janA minanti mitram || 10.89.8
pra ye mitraM prAryamaNaM durevAH pra saMgiraH pra varuNaM minanti |nyamitreShu vadhamindra tumraM vR^iShanvR^iShANamaruShaM shishIhi || 10.89.9
indro diva indra Ishe pR^ithivyA indro apAmindra itparvatAnAm |indro vR^idhAmindra inmedhirANAmindraH kSheme yoge havya indraH || 10.89.10
prAktubhya indraH pra vR^idho ahabhyaH prAntarikShAtpra samudrasya dhAseH |pra vAtasya prathasaH pra jmo antAtpra sindhubhyo ririche pra kShitibhyaH || 10.89.11
pra shoshuchatyA uShaso na keturasinvA te vartatAmindra hetiH |ashmeva vidhya diva A sR^ijAnastapiShThena heShasA droghamitrAn || 10.89.12
anvaha mAsA anvidvanAnyanvoShadhIranu parvatAsaH |anvindraM rodasI vAvashAne anvApo ajihata jAyamAnam || 10.89.13
karhi svitsA ta indra chetyAsadaghasya yadbhinado rakSha eShat |mitrakruvo yachChasane na gAvaH pR^ithivyA ApR^igamuyA shayante || 10.89.14
shatrUyanto abhi ye nastatasre mahi vrAdhanta ogaNAsa indra |andhenAmitrAstamasA sachantAM sujyotiSho aktavastA.N abhi ShyuH || 10.89.15
purUNi hi tvA savanA janAnAM brahmANi mandangR^iNatAmR^iShINAm |imAmAghoShannavasA sahUtiM tiro vishvA.N archato yAhyarvA~N || 10.89.16
evA te vayamindra bhu~njatInAM vidyAma sumatInAM navAnAm |vidyAma vastoravasA gR^iNanto vishvAmitrA uta ta indra nUnam || 10.89.17
shunaM huvema maghavAnamindramasminbhare nR^itamaM vAjasAtau |shR^iNvantamugramUtaye samatsu ghnantaM vR^itrANi saMjitaM dhanAnAm || 10.89.18

sahasrashIrShA puruShaH sahasrAkShaH sahasrapAt |sa bhUmiM vishvato vR^itvAtyatiShThaddashA~Ngulam || 10.90.1
puruSha evedaM sarvaM yadbhUtaM yachcha bhavyam |utAmR^itatvasyeshAno yadannenAtirohati || 10.90.2
etAvAnasya mahimAto jyAyA.Nshcha pUruShaH |pAdo.asya vishvA bhUtAni tripAdasyAmR^itaM divi || 10.90.3
tripAdUrdhva udaitpuruShaH pAdo.asyehAbhavatpunaH |tato viShva~NvyakrAmatsAshanAnashane abhi || 10.90.4
tasmAdvirALajAyata virAjo adhi pUruShaH |sa jAto atyarichyata pashchAdbhUmimatho puraH || 10.90.5
yatpuruSheNa haviShA devA yaj~namatanvata |vasanto asyAsIdAjyaM grIShma idhmaH sharaddhaviH || 10.90.6
taM yaj~naM barhiShi praukShanpuruShaM jAtamagrataH |tena devA ayajanta sAdhyA R^iShayashcha ye || 10.90.7
tasmAdyaj~nAtsarvahutaH sambhR^itaM pR^iShadAjyam |pashUntA.Nshchakre vAyavyAnAraNyAngrAmyAshcha ye || 10.90.8
tasmAdyaj~nAtsarvahuta R^ichaH sAmAni jaj~nire |ChandAMsi jaj~nire tasmAdyajustasmAdajAyata || 10.90.9
tasmAdashvA ajAyanta ye ke chobhayAdataH |gAvo ha jaj~nire tasmAttasmAjjAtA ajAvayaH || 10.90.10
yatpuruShaM vyadadhuH katidhA vyakalpayan |mukhaM kimasya kau bAhU kA UrU pAdA uchyete || 10.90.11
brAhmaNo.asya mukhamAsIdbAhU rAjanyaH kR^itaH |UrU tadasya yadvaishyaH padbhyAM shUdro ajAyata || 10.90.12
chandramA manaso jAtashchakShoH sUryo ajAyata |mukhAdindrashchAgnishcha prANAdvAyurajAyata || 10.90.13
nAbhyA AsIdantarikShaM shIrShNo dyauH samavartata |padbhyAM bhUmirdishaH shrotrAttathA lokA.N akalpayan || 10.90.14
saptAsyAsanparidhayastriH sapta samidhaH kR^itAH |devA yadyaj~naM tanvAnA abadhnanpuruShaM pashum || 10.90.15
yaj~nena yaj~namayajanta devAstAni dharmANi prathamAnyAsan |te ha nAkaM mahimAnaH sachanta yatra pUrve sAdhyAH santi devAH || 10.90.16

saM jAgR^ivadbhirjaramANa idhyate dame damUnA iShayanniLaspade |vishvasya hotA haviSho vareNyo vibhurvibhAvA suShakhA sakhIyate || 10.91.1
sa darshatashrIratithirgR^ihegR^ihe vanevane shishriye takvavIriva |janaMjanaM janyo nAti manyate visha A kSheti vishyo vishaMvisham || 10.91.2
sudakSho dakShaiH kratunAsi sukraturagne kaviH kAvyenAsi vishvavit |vasurvasUnAM kShayasi tvameka iddyAvA cha yAni pR^ithivI cha puShyataH || 10.91.3
prajAnannagne tava yonimR^itviyamiLAyAspade ghR^itavantamAsadaH |A te chikitra uShasAmivetayo.arepasaH sUryasyeva rashmayaH || 10.91.4
tava shriyo varShyasyeva vidyutashchitrAshchikitra uShasAM na ketavaH |yadoShadhIrabhisR^iShTo vanAni cha pari svayaM chinuShe annamAsye || 10.91.5
tamoShadhIrdadhire garbhamR^itviyaM tamApo agniM janayanta mAtaraH |tamitsamAnaM vaninashcha vIrudho.antarvatIshcha suvate cha vishvahA || 10.91.6
vAtopadhUta iShito vashA.N anu tR^iShu yadannA veviShadvitiShThase |A te yatante rathyo yathA pR^ithakChardhAMsyagne ajarANi dhakShataH || 10.91.7
medhAkAraM vidathasya prasAdhanamagniM hotAraM paribhUtamaM matim |tamidarbhe haviShyA samAnamittaminmahe vR^iNate nAnyaM tvat || 10.91.8
tvAmidatra vR^iNate tvAyavo hotAramagne vidatheShu vedhasaH |yaddevayanto dadhati prayAMsi te haviShmanto manavo vR^iktabarhiShaH || 10.91.9
tavAgne hotraM tava potramR^itviyaM tava neShTraM tvamagnidR^itAyataH |tava prashAstraM tvamadhvarIyasi brahmA chAsi gR^ihapatishcha no dame || 10.91.10
yastubhyamagne amR^itAya martyaH samidhA dAshaduta vA haviShkR^iti |tasya hotA bhavasi yAsi dUtyamupa brUShe yajasyadhvarIyasi || 10.91.11
imA asmai matayo vAcho asmadA.N R^icho giraH suShTutayaH samagmata |vasUyavo vasave jAtavedase vR^iddhAsu chidvardhano yAsu chAkanat || 10.91.12
imAM pratnAya suShTutiM navIyasIM vocheyamasmA ushate shR^iNotu naH |bhUyA antarA hR^idyasya nispR^ishe jAyeva patya ushatI suvAsAH || 10.91.13
yasminnashvAsa R^iShabhAsa ukShaNo vashA meShA avasR^iShTAsa AhutAH |kIlAlape somapR^iShThAya vedhase hR^idA matiM janaye chArumagnaye || 10.91.14
ahAvyagne havirAsye te sruchIva ghR^itaM chamvIva somaH |vAjasaniM rayimasme suvIraM prashastaM dhehi yashasaM bR^ihantam || 10.91.15

yaj~nasya vo rathyaM vishpatiM vishAM hotAramaktoratithiM vibhAvasum |shocha~nChuShkAsu hariNIShu jarbhuradvR^iShA keturyajato dyAmashAyata || 10.92.1
imama~njaspAmubhaye akR^iNvata dharmANamagniM vidathasya sAdhanam |aktuM na yahvamuShasaH purohitaM tanUnapAtamaruShasya niMsate || 10.92.2
baLasya nIthA vi paNeshcha manmahe vayA asya prahutA Asurattave |yadA ghorAso amR^itatvamAshatAdijjanasya daivyasya charkiran || 10.92.3
R^itasya hi prasitirdyaururu vyacho namo mahyaramatiH panIyasI |indro mitro varuNaH saM chikitrire.atho bhagaH savitA pUtadakShasaH || 10.92.4
pra rudreNa yayinA yanti sindhavastiro mahImaramatiM dadhanvire |yebhiH parijmA pariyannuru jrayo vi roruvajjaThare vishvamukShate || 10.92.5
krANA rudrA maruto vishvakR^iShTayo divaH shyenAso asurasya nILayaH |tebhishchaShTe varuNo mitro aryamendro devebhirarvashebhirarvashaH || 10.92.6
indre bhujaM shashamAnAsa Ashata sUro dR^ishIke vR^iShaNashcha pauMsye |pra ye nvasyArhaNA tatakShire yujaM vajraM nR^iShadaneShu kAravaH || 10.92.7
sUrashchidA harito asya rIramadindrAdA kashchidbhayate tavIyasaH |bhImasya vR^iShNo jaTharAdabhishvaso divedive sahuriH stannabAdhitaH || 10.92.8
stomaM vo adya rudrAya shikvase kShayadvIrAya namasA didiShTana |yebhiH shivaH svavA.N evayAvabhirdivaH siShakti svayashA nikAmabhiH || 10.92.9
te hi prajAyA abharanta vi shravo bR^ihaspatirvR^iShabhaH somajAmayaH |yaj~nairatharvA prathamo vi dhArayaddevA dakShairbhR^igavaH saM chikitrire || 10.92.10
te hi dyAvApR^ithivI bhUriretasA narAshaMsashchatura~Ngo yamo.aditiH |devastvaShTA draviNodA R^ibhukShaNaH pra rodasI maruto viShNurarhire || 10.92.11
uta sya na ushijAmurviyA kavirahiH shR^iNotu budhnyo havImani |sUryAmAsA vicharantA divikShitA dhiyA shamInahuShI asya bodhatam || 10.92.12
pra naH pUShA charathaM vishvadevyo.apAM napAdavatu vAyuriShTaye |AtmAnaM vasyo abhi vAtamarchata tadashvinA suhavA yAmani shrutam || 10.92.13
vishAmAsAmabhayAnAmadhikShitaM gIrbhiru svayashasaM gR^iNImasi |gnAbhirvishvAbhiraditimanarvaNamaktoryuvAnaM nR^imaNA adhA patim || 10.92.14
rebhadatra januShA pUrvo a~NgirA grAvANa UrdhvA abhi chakShuradhvaram |yebhirvihAyA abhavadvichakShaNaH pAthaH sumekaM svadhitirvananvati || 10.92.15

mahi dyAvApR^ithivI bhUtamurvI nArI yahvI na rodasI sadaM naH |tebhirnaH pAtaM sahyasa ebhirnaH pAtaM shUShaNi || 10.93.1
yaj~neyaj~ne sa martyo devAnsaparyati |yaH sumnairdIrghashruttama AvivAsatyenAn || 10.93.2
vishveShAmirajyavo devAnAM vArmahaH |vishve hi vishvamahaso vishve yaj~neShu yaj~niyAH || 10.93.3
te ghA rAjAno amR^itasya mandrA aryamA mitro varuNaH parijmA |kadrudro nR^iNAM stuto marutaH pUShaNo bhagaH || 10.93.4
uta no naktamapAM vR^iShaNvasU sUryAmAsA sadanAya sadhanyA |sachA yatsAdyeShAmahirbudhneShu budhnyaH || 10.93.5
uta no devAvashvinA shubhaspatI dhAmabhirmitrAvaruNA uruShyatAm |mahaH sa rAya eShate.ati dhanveva duritA || 10.93.6
uta no rudrA chinmR^iLatAmashvinA vishve devAso rathaspatirbhagaH |R^ibhurvAja R^ibhukShaNaH parijmA vishvavedasaH || 10.93.7
R^ibhurR^ibhukShA R^ibhurvidhato mada A te harI jUjuvAnasya vAjinA |duShTaraM yasya sAma chidR^idhagyaj~no na mAnuShaH || 10.93.8
kR^idhI no ahrayo deva savitaH sa cha stuShe maghonAm |saho na indro vahnibhirnyeShAM charShaNInAM chakraM rashmiM na yoyuve || 10.93.9
aiShu dyAvApR^ithivI dhAtaM mahadasme vIreShu vishvacharShaNi shravaH |pR^ikShaM vAjasya sAtaye pR^ikShaM rAyota turvaNe || 10.93.10
etaM shaMsamindrAsmayuShTvaM kUchitsantaM sahasAvannabhiShTaye |sadA pAhyabhiShTaye medatAM vedatA vaso || 10.93.11
etaM me stomaM tanA na sUrye dyutadyAmAnaM vAvR^idhanta nR^iNAm |saMvananaM nAshvyaM taShTevAnapachyutam || 10.93.12
vAvarta yeShAM rAyA yuktaiShAM hiraNyayI |nemadhitA na pauMsyA vR^itheva viShTAntA || 10.93.13
pra tadduHshIme pR^ithavAne vene pra rAme vochamasure maghavatsu |ye yuktvAya pa~ncha shatAsmayu pathA vishrAvyeShAm || 10.93.14
adhInnvatra saptatiM cha sapta cha |sadyo didiShTa tAnvaH sadyo didiShTa pArthyaH sadyo didiShTa mAyavaH || 10.93.15

praite vadantu pra vayaM vadAma grAvabhyo vAchaM vadatA vadadbhyaH |yadadrayaH parvatAH sAkamAshavaH shlokaM ghoShaM bharathendrAya sominaH || 10.94.1
ete vadanti shatavatsahasravadabhi krandanti haritebhirAsabhiH |viShTvI grAvANaH sukR^itaH sukR^ityayA hotushchitpUrve haviradyamAshata || 10.94.2
ete vadantyavidannanA madhu nyU~Nkhayante adhi pakva AmiShi |vR^ikShasya shAkhAmaruNasya bapsataste sUbharvA vR^iShabhAH premarAviShuH || 10.94.3
bR^ihadvadanti madireNa mandinendraM kroshanto.avidannanA madhu |saMrabhyA dhIrAH svasR^ibhiranartiShurAghoShayantaH pR^ithivImupabdibhiH || 10.94.4
suparNA vAchamakratopa dyavyAkhare kR^iShNA iShirA anartiShuH |nya~Nni yantyuparasya niShkR^itaM purU reto dadhire sUryashvitaH || 10.94.5
ugrA iva pravahantaH samAyamuH sAkaM yuktA vR^iShaNo bibhrato dhuraH |yachChvasanto jagrasAnA arAviShuH shR^iNva eShAM prothatho arvatAmiva || 10.94.6
dashAvanibhyo dashakakShyebhyo dashayoktrebhyo dashayojanebhyaH |dashAbhIshubhyo archatAjarebhyo dasha dhuro dasha yuktA vahadbhyaH || 10.94.7
te adrayo dashayantrAsa AshavasteShAmAdhAnaM paryeti haryatam |ta U sutasya somyasyAndhasoM.ashoH pIyUShaM prathamasya bhejire || 10.94.8
te somAdo harI indrasya niMsateM.ashuM duhanto adhyAsate gavi |tebhirdugdhaM papivAnsomyaM madhvindro vardhate prathate vR^iShAyate || 10.94.9
vR^iShA vo aMshurna kilA riShAthaneLAvantaH sadamitsthanAshitAH |raivatyeva mahasA chAravaH sthana yasya grAvANo ajuShadhvamadhvaram || 10.94.10
tR^idilA atR^idilAso adrayo.ashramaNA ashR^ithitA amR^ityavaH |anAturA ajarAH sthAmaviShNavaH supIvaso atR^iShitA atR^iShNajaH || 10.94.11
dhruvA eva vaH pitaro yugeyuge kShemakAmAsaH sadaso na yu~njate |ajuryAso hariShAcho haridrava A dyAM raveNa pR^ithivImashushravuH || 10.94.12
tadidvadantyadrayo vimochane yAmanna~njaspA iva ghedupabdibhiH |vapanto bIjamiva dhAnyAkR^itaH pR^i~nchanti somaM na minanti bapsataH || 10.94.13
sute adhvare adhi vAchamakratA krILayo na mAtaraM tudantaH |vi ShU mu~nchA suShuvuSho manIShAM vi vartantAmadrayashchAyamAnAH || 10.94.14

haye jAye manasA tiShTha ghore vachAMsi mishrA kR^iNavAvahai nu |na nau mantrA anuditAsa ete mayaskaranparatare chanAhan || 10.95.1
kimetA vAchA kR^iNavA tavAhaM prAkramiShamuShasAmagriyeva |purUravaH punarastaM parehi durApanA vAta ivAhamasmi || 10.95.2
iShurna shriya iShudherasanA goShAH shatasA na raMhiH |avIre kratau vi davidyutannorA na mAyuM chitayanta dhunayaH || 10.95.3
sA vasu dadhatI shvashurAya vaya uSho yadi vaShTyantigR^ihAt |astaM nanakShe yasmi~nchAkandivA naktaM shnathitA vaitasena || 10.95.4
triH sma mAhnaH shnathayo vaitasenota sma me.avyatyai pR^iNAsi |purUravo.anu te ketamAyaM rAjA me vIra tanvastadAsIH || 10.95.5
yA sujUrNiH shreNiH sumna/ApirhradechakShurna granthinI charaNyuH |tA a~njayo.aruNayo na sasruH shriye gAvo na dhenavo.anavanta || 10.95.6
samasmi~njAyamAna Asata gnA utemavardhannadyaH svagUrtAH |mahe yattvA purUravo raNAyAvardhayandasyuhatyAya devAH || 10.95.7
sachA yadAsu jahatIShvatkamamAnuShIShu mAnuSho niSheve |apa sma mattarasantI na bhujyustA atrasanrathaspR^isho nAshvAH || 10.95.8
yadAsu marto amR^itAsu nispR^iksaM kShoNIbhiH kratubhirna pR^i~Nkte |tA Atayo na tanvaH shumbhata svA ashvAso na krILayo dandashAnAH || 10.95.9
vidyunna yA patantI davidyodbharantI me apyA kAmyAni |janiShTo apo naryaH sujAtaH prorvashI tirata dIrghamAyuH || 10.95.10
jaj~niSha itthA gopIthyAya hi dadhAtha tatpurUravo ma ojaH |ashAsaM tvA viduShI sasminnahanna ma AshR^iNoH kimabhugvadAsi || 10.95.11
kadA sUnuH pitaraM jAta ichChAchchakrannAshru vartayadvijAnan |ko dampatI samanasA vi yUyodadha yadagniH shvashureShu dIdayat || 10.95.12
prati bravANi vartayate ashru chakranna krandadAdhye shivAyai |pra tatte hinavA yatte asme parehyastaM nahi mUra mApaH || 10.95.13
sudevo adya prapatedanAvR^itparAvataM paramAM gantavA u |adhA shayIta nirR^iterupasthe.adhainaM vR^ikA rabhasAso adyuH || 10.95.14
purUravo mA mR^ithA mA pra papto mA tvA vR^ikAso ashivAsa u kShan |na vai straiNAni sakhyAni santi sAlAvR^ikANAM hR^idayAnyetA || 10.95.15
yadvirUpAcharaM martyeShvavasaM rAtrIH sharadashchatasraH |ghR^itasya stokaM sakR^idahna AshnAM tAdevedaM tAtR^ipANA charAmi || 10.95.16
antarikShaprAM rajaso vimAnImupa shikShAmyurvashIM vasiShThaH |upa tvA rAtiH sukR^itasya tiShThAnni vartasva hR^idayaM tapyate me || 10.95.17
iti tvA devA ima AhuraiLa yathemetadbhavasi mR^ityubandhuH |prajA te devAnhaviShA yajAti svarga u tvamapi mAdayAse || 10.95.18

pra te mahe vidathe shaMsiShaM harI pra te vanve vanuSho haryataM madam |ghR^itaM na yo haribhishchAru sechata A tvA vishantu harivarpasaM giraH || 10.96.1
hariM hi yonimabhi ye samasvaranhinvanto harI divyaM yathA sadaH |A yaM pR^iNanti haribhirna dhenava indrAya shUShaM harivantamarchata || 10.96.2
so asya vajro harito ya Ayaso harirnikAmo harirA gabhastyoH |dyumnI sushipro harimanyusAyaka indre ni rUpA haritA mimikShire || 10.96.3
divi na keturadhi dhAyi haryato vivyachadvajro harito na raMhyA |tudadahiM harishipro ya AyasaH sahasrashokA abhavaddharimbharaH || 10.96.4
tvaMtvamaharyathA upastutaH pUrvebhirindra harikesha yajvabhiH |tvaM haryasi tava vishvamukthyamasAmi rAdho harijAta haryatam || 10.96.5
tA vajriNaM mandinaM stomyaM mada indraM rathe vahato haryatA harI |purUNyasmai savanAni haryata indrAya somA harayo dadhanvire || 10.96.6
araM kAmAya harayo dadhanvire sthirAya hinvanharayo harI turA |arvadbhiryo haribhirjoShamIyate so asya kAmaM harivantamAnashe || 10.96.7
harishmashArurharikesha Ayasasturaspeye yo haripA avardhata |arvadbhiryo haribhirvAjinIvasurati vishvA duritA pAriShaddharI || 10.96.8
sruveva yasya hariNI vipetatuH shipre vAjAya hariNI davidhvataH |pra yatkR^ite chamase marmR^ijaddharI pItvA madasya haryatasyAndhasaH || 10.96.9
uta sma sadma haryatasya pastyoratyo na vAjaM harivA.N achikradat |mahI chiddhi dhiShaNAharyadojasA bR^ihadvayo dadhiShe haryatashchidA || 10.96.10
A rodasI haryamANo mahitvA navyaMnavyaM haryasi manma nu priyam |pra pastyamasura haryataM gorAviShkR^idhi haraye sUryAya || 10.96.11
A tvA haryantaM prayujo janAnAM rathe vahantu harishipramindra |pibA yathA pratibhR^itasya madhvo haryanyaj~naM sadhamAde dashoNim || 10.96.12
apAH pUrveShAM harivaH sutAnAmatho idaM savanaM kevalaM te |mamaddhi somaM madhumantamindra satrA vR^iSha~njaThara A vR^iShasva || 10.96.13

yA oShadhIH pUrvA jAtA devebhyastriyugaM purA |manai nu babhrUNAmahaM shataM dhAmAni sapta cha || 10.97.1
shataM vo amba dhAmAni sahasramuta vo ruhaH |adhA shatakratvo yUyamimaM me agadaM kR^ita || 10.97.2
oShadhIH prati modadhvaM puShpavatIH prasUvarIH |ashvA iva sajitvarIrvIrudhaH pArayiShNvaH || 10.97.3
oShadhIriti mAtarastadvo devIrupa bruve |saneyamashvaM gAM vAsa AtmAnaM tava pUruSha || 10.97.4
ashvatthe vo niShadanaM parNe vo vasatiShkR^itA |gobhAja itkilAsatha yatsanavatha pUruSham || 10.97.5
yatrauShadhIH samagmata rAjAnaH samitAviva |vipraH sa uchyate bhiShagrakShohAmIvachAtanaH || 10.97.6
ashvAvatIM somAvatImUrjayantImudojasam |Avitsi sarvA oShadhIrasmA ariShTatAtaye || 10.97.7
uchChuShmA oShadhInAM gAvo goShThAdiverate |dhanaM saniShyantInAmAtmAnaM tava pUruSha || 10.97.8
iShkR^itirnAma vo mAtAtho yUyaM stha niShkR^itIH |sIrAH patatriNIH sthana yadAmayati niShkR^itha || 10.97.9
ati vishvAH pariShThAH stena iva vrajamakramuH |oShadhIH prAchuchyavuryatkiM cha tanvo rapaH || 10.97.10
yadimA vAjayannahamoShadhIrhasta Adadhe |AtmA yakShmasya nashyati purA jIvagR^ibho yathA || 10.97.11
yasyauShadhIH prasarpathA~Ngama~NgaM paruShparuH |tato yakShmaM vi bAdhadhva ugro madhyamashIriva || 10.97.12
sAkaM yakShma pra pata chASheNa kikidIvinA |sAkaM vAtasya dhrAjyA sAkaM nashya nihAkayA || 10.97.13
anyA vo anyAmavatvanyAnyasyA upAvata |tAH sarvAH saMvidAnA idaM me prAvatA vachaH || 10.97.14
yAH phalinIryA aphalA apuShpA yAshcha puShpiNIH |bR^ihaspatiprasUtAstA no mu~nchantvaMhasaH || 10.97.15
mu~nchantu mA shapathyAdatho varuNyAduta |atho yamasya paDbIshAtsarvasmAddevakilbiShAt || 10.97.16
avapatantIravadandiva oShadhayaspari |yaM jIvamashnavAmahai na sa riShyAti pUruShaH || 10.97.17
yA oShadhIH somarAj~nIrbahvIH shatavichakShaNAH |tAsAM tvamasyuttamAraM kAmAya shaM hR^ide || 10.97.18
yA oShadhIH somarAj~nIrviShThitAH pR^ithivImanu |bR^ihaspatiprasUtA asyai saM datta vIryam || 10.97.19
mA vo riShatkhanitA yasmai chAhaM khanAmi vaH |dvipachchatuShpadasmAkaM sarvamastvanAturam || 10.97.20
yAshchedamupashR^iNvanti yAshcha dUraM parAgatAH |sarvAH saMgatya vIrudho.asyai saM datta vIryam || 10.97.21
oShadhayaH saM vadante somena saha rAj~nA |yasmai kR^iNoti brAhmaNastaM rAjanpArayAmasi || 10.97.22
tvamuttamAsyoShadhe tava vR^ikShA upastayaH |upastirastu so.asmAkaM yo asmA.N abhidAsati || 10.97.23

bR^ihaspate prati me devatAmihi mitro vA yadvaruNo vAsi pUShA |AdityairvA yadvasubhirmarutvAnsa parjanyaM shaMtanave vR^iShAya || 10.98.1
A devo dUto ajirashchikitvAntvaddevApe abhi mAmagachChat |pratIchInaH prati mAmA vavR^itsva dadhAmi te dyumatIM vAchamAsan || 10.98.2
asme dhehi dyumatIM vAchamAsanbR^ihaspate anamIvAmiShirAm |yayA vR^iShTiM shaMtanave vanAva divo drapso madhumA.N A vivesha || 10.98.3
A no drapsA madhumanto vishantvindra dehyadhirathaM sahasram |ni ShIda hotramR^ituthA yajasva devAndevApe haviShA saparya || 10.98.4
ArShTiSheNo hotramR^iShirniShIdandevApirdevasumatiM chikitvAn |sa uttarasmAdadharaM samudramapo divyA asR^ijadvarShyA abhi || 10.98.5
asminsamudre adhyuttarasminnApo devebhirnivR^itA atiShThan |tA adravannArShTiSheNena sR^iShTA devApinA preShitA mR^ikShiNIShu || 10.98.6
yaddevApiH shaMtanave purohito hotrAya vR^itaH kR^ipayannadIdhet |devashrutaM vR^iShTivaniM rarANo bR^ihaspatirvAchamasmA ayachChat || 10.98.7
yaM tvA devApiH shushuchAno agna ArShTiSheNo manuShyaH samIdhe |vishvebhirdevairanumadyamAnaH pra parjanyamIrayA vR^iShTimantam || 10.98.8
tvAM pUrva R^iShayo gIrbhirAyantvAmadhvareShu puruhUta vishve |sahasrANyadhirathAnyasme A no yaj~naM rohidashvopa yAhi || 10.98.9
etAnyagne navatirnava tve AhutAnyadhirathA sahasrA |tebhirvardhasva tanvaH shUra pUrvIrdivo no vR^iShTimiShito rirIhi || 10.98.10
etAnyagne navatiM sahasrA saM pra yachCha vR^iShNa indrAya bhAgam |vidvAnpatha R^itusho devayAnAnapyaulAnaM divi deveShu dhehi || 10.98.11
agne bAdhasva vi mR^idho vi durgahApAmIvAmapa rakShAMsi sedha |asmAtsamudrAdbR^ihato divo no.apAM bhUmAnamupa naH sR^ijeha || 10.98.12

kaM nashchitramiShaNyasi chikitvAnpR^ithugmAnaM vAshraM vAvR^idhadhyai |kattasya dAtu shavaso vyuShTau takShadvajraM vR^itraturamapinvat || 10.99.1
sa hi dyutA vidyutA veti sAma pR^ithuM yonimasuratvA sasAda |sa sanILebhiH prasahAno asya bhrAturna R^ite saptathasya mAyAH || 10.99.2
sa vAjaM yAtApaduShpadA yansvarShAtA pari ShadatsaniShyan |anarvA yachChatadurasya vedo ghna~nChishnadevA.N abhi varpasA bhUt || 10.99.3
sa yahvyo.avanIrgoShvarvA juhoti pradhanyAsu sasriH |apAdo yatra yujyAso.arathA droNyashvAsa Irate ghR^itaM vAH || 10.99.4
sa rudrebhirashastavAra R^ibhvA hitvI gayamAre/avadya AgAt |vamrasya manye mithunA vivavrI annamabhItyArodayanmuShAyan || 10.99.5
sa iddAsaM tuvIravaM patirdanShaLakShaM trishIrShANaM damanyat |asya trito nvojasA vR^idhAno vipA varAhamayo/agrayA han || 10.99.6
sa druhvaNe manuSha UrdhvasAna A sAviShadarshasAnAya sharum |sa nR^itamo nahuSho.asmatsujAtaH puro.abhinadarhandasyuhatye || 10.99.7
so abhriyo na yavasa udanyankShayAya gAtuM vidanno asme |upa yatsIdadinduM sharIraiH shyeno.ayopAShTirhanti dasyUn || 10.99.8
sa vrAdhataH shavasAnebhirasya kutsAya shuShNaM kR^ipaNe parAdAt |ayaM kavimanayachChasyamAnamatkaM yo asya sanitota nR^iNAm || 10.99.9
ayaM dashasyannaryebhirasya dasmo devebhirvaruNo na mAyI |ayaM kanIna R^itupA avedyamimItAraruM yashchatuShpAt || 10.99.10
asya stomebhiraushija R^ijishvA vrajaM darayadvR^iShabheNa piproH |sutvA yadyajato dIdayadgIH pura iyAno abhi varpasA bhUt || 10.99.11
evA maho asura vakShathAya vamrakaH paDbhirupa sarpadindram |sa iyAnaH karati svastimasmA iShamUrjaM sukShitiM vishvamAbhAH || 10.99.12

indra dR^ihya maghavantvAvadidbhuja iha stutaH sutapA bodhi no vR^idhe |devebhirnaH savitA prAvatu shrutamA sarvatAtimaditiM vR^iNImahe || 10.100.1
bharAya su bharata bhAgamR^itviyaM pra vAyave shuchipe krandadiShTaye |gaurasya yaH payasaH pItimAnasha A sarvatAtimaditiM vR^iNImahe || 10.100.2
A no devaH savitA sAviShadvaya R^ijUyate yajamAnAya sunvate |yathA devAnpratibhUShema pAkavadA sarvatAtimaditiM vR^iNImahe || 10.100.3
indro asme sumanA astu vishvahA rAjA somaH suvitasyAdhyetu naH |yathAyathA mitradhitAni saMdadhurA sarvatAtimaditiM vR^iNImahe || 10.100.4
indra ukthena shavasA parurdadhe bR^ihaspate pratarItAsyAyuShaH |yaj~no manuH pramatirnaH pitA hi kamA sarvatAtimaditiM vR^iNImahe || 10.100.5
indrasya nu sukR^itaM daivyaM saho.agnirgR^ihe jaritA medhiraH kaviH |yaj~nashcha bhUdvidathe chArurantama A sarvatAtimaditiM vR^iNImahe || 10.100.6
na vo guhA chakR^ima bhUri duShkR^itaM nAviShTyaM vasavo devaheLanam |mAkirno devA anR^itasya varpasa A sarvatAtimaditiM vR^iNImahe || 10.100.7
apAmIvAM savitA sAviShannyagvarIya idapa sedhantvadrayaH |grAvA yatra madhuShuduchyate bR^ihadA sarvatAtimaditiM vR^iNImahe || 10.100.8
Urdhvo grAvA vasavo.astu sotari vishvA dveShAMsi sanutaryuyota |sa no devaH savitA pAyurIDya A sarvatAtimaditiM vR^iNImahe || 10.100.9
UrjaM gAvo yavase pIvo attana R^itasya yAH sadane koshe a~Ngdhve |tanUreva tanvo astu bheShajamA sarvatAtimaditiM vR^iNImahe || 10.100.10
kratuprAvA jaritA shashvatAmava indra idbhadrA pramatiH sutAvatAm |pUrNamUdhardivyaM yasya siktaya A sarvatAtimaditiM vR^iNImahe || 10.100.11
chitraste bhAnuH kratuprA abhiShTiH santi spR^idho jaraNiprA adhR^iShTAH |rajiShThayA rajyA pashva A gostUtUrShati paryagraM duvasyuH || 10.100.12

udbudhyadhvaM samanasaH sakhAyaH samagnimindhvaM bahavaH sanILAH |dadhikrAmagnimuShasaM cha devImindrAvato.avase ni hvaye vaH || 10.101.1
mandrA kR^iNudhvaM dhiya A tanudhvaM nAvamaritraparaNIM kR^iNudhvam |iShkR^iNudhvamAyudhAraM kR^iNudhvaM prA~nchaM yaj~naM pra NayatA sakhAyaH || 10.101.2
yunakta sIrA vi yugA tanudhvaM kR^ite yonau vapateha bIjam |girA cha shruShTiH sabharA asanno nedIya itsR^iNyaH pakvameyAt || 10.101.3
sIrA yu~njanti kavayo yugA vi tanvate pR^ithak |dhIrA deveShu sumnayA || 10.101.4
nirAhAvAnkR^iNotana saM varatrA dadhAtana |si~nchAmahA avatamudriNaM vayaM suShekamanupakShitam || 10.101.5
iShkR^itAhAvamavataM suvaratraM suShechanam |udriNaM si~nche akShitam || 10.101.6
prINItAshvAnhitaM jayAtha svastivAhaM rathamitkR^iNudhvam |droNAhAvamavatamashmachakramaMsatrakoshaM si~nchatA nR^ipANam || 10.101.7
vrajaM kR^iNudhvaM sa hi vo nR^ipANo varma sIvyadhvaM bahulA pR^ithUni |puraH kR^iNudhvamAyasIradhR^iShTA mA vaH susrochchamaso dR^iMhatA tam || 10.101.8
A vo dhiyaM yaj~niyAM varta Utaye devA devIM yajatAM yaj~niyAmiha |sA no duhIyadyavaseva gatvI sahasradhArA payasA mahI gauH || 10.101.9
A tU Shi~ncha harimIM drorupasthe vAshIbhistakShatAshmanmayIbhiH |pari ShvajadhvaM dasha kakShyAbhirubhe dhurau prati vahniM yunakta || 10.101.10
ubhe dhurau vahnirApibdamAno.antaryoneva charati dvijAniH |vanaspatiM vana AsthApayadhvaM ni ShU dadhidhvamakhananta utsam || 10.101.11
kapR^innaraH kapR^ithamuddadhAtana chodayata khudata vAjasAtaye |niShTigryaH putramA chyAvayotaya indraM sabAdha iha somapItaye || 10.101.12

pra te rathaM mithUkR^itamindro.avatu dhR^iShNuyA |asminnAjau puruhUta shravAyye dhanabhakSheShu no.ava || 10.102.1
utsma vAto vahati vAso.asyA adhirathaM yadajayatsahasram |rathIrabhUnmudgalAnI gaviShTau bhare kR^itaM vyachedindrasenA || 10.102.2
antaryachCha jighAMsato vajramindrAbhidAsataH |dAsasya vA maghavannAryasya vA sanutaryavayA vadham || 10.102.3
udno hradamapibajjarhR^iShANaH kUTaM sma tR^iMhadabhimAtimeti |pra muShkabhAraH shrava ichChamAno.ajiraM bAhU abharatsiShAsan || 10.102.4
nyakrandayannupayanta enamamehayanvR^iShabhaM madhya AjeH |tena sUbharvaM shatavatsahasraM gavAM mudgalaH pradhane jigAya || 10.102.5
kakardave vR^iShabho yukta AsIdavAvachItsArathirasya keshI |dudheryuktasya dravataH sahAnasa R^ichChanti ShmA niShpado mudgalAnIm || 10.102.6
uta pradhimudahannasya vidvAnupAyunagvaMsagamatra shikShan |indra udAvatpatimaghnyAnAmaraMhata padyAbhiH kakudmAn || 10.102.7
shunamaShTrAvyacharatkapardI varatrAyAM dArvAnahyamAnaH |nR^imNAni kR^iNvanbahave janAya gAH paspashAnastaviShIradhatta || 10.102.8
imaM taM pashya vR^iShabhasya yu~njaM kAShThAyA madhye drughaNaM shayAnam |yena jigAya shatavatsahasraM gavAM mudgalaH pR^itanAjyeShu || 10.102.9
Are aghA ko nvitthA dadarsha yaM yu~njanti tamvA sthApayanti |nAsmai tR^iNaM nodakamA bharantyuttaro dhuro vahati pradedishat || 10.102.10
parivR^ikteva patividyamAnaT pIpyAnA kUchakreNeva si~nchan |eShaiShyA chidrathyA jayema suma~NgalaM sinavadastu sAtam || 10.102.11
tvaM vishvasya jagatashchakShurindrAsi chakShuShaH |vR^iShA yadAjiM vR^iShaNA siShAsasi chodayanvadhriNA yujA || 10.102.12

AshuH shishAno vR^iShabho na bhImo ghanAghanaH kShobhaNashcharShaNInAm |saMkrandano.animiSha ekavIraH shataM senA ajayatsAkamindraH || 10.103.1
saMkrandanenAnimiSheNa jiShNunA yutkAreNa dushchyavanena dhR^iShNunA |tadindreNa jayata tatsahadhvaM yudho nara iShuhastena vR^iShNA || 10.103.2
sa iShuhastaiH sa niSha~NgibhirvashI saMsraShTA sa yudha indro gaNena |saMsR^iShTajitsomapA bAhushardhyugradhanvA pratihitAbhirastA || 10.103.3
bR^ihaspate pari dIyA rathena rakShohAmitrA.N apabAdhamAnaH |prabha~njansenAH pramR^iNo yudhA jayannasmAkamedhyavitA rathAnAm || 10.103.4
balavij~nAyaH sthaviraH pravIraH sahasvAnvAjI sahamAna ugraH |abhivIro abhisatvA sahojA jaitramindra rathamA tiShTha govit || 10.103.5
gotrabhidaM govidaM vajrabAhuM jayantamajma pramR^iNantamojasA |imaM sajAtA anu vIrayadhvamindraM sakhAyo anu saM rabhadhvam || 10.103.6
abhi gotrANi sahasA gAhamAno.adayo vIraH shatamanyurindraH |dushchyavanaH pR^itanAShALayudhyo.asmAkaM senA avatu pra yutsu || 10.103.7
indra AsAM netA bR^ihaspatirdakShiNA yaj~naH pura etu somaH |devasenAnAmabhibha~njatInAM jayantInAM maruto yantvagram || 10.103.8
indrasya vR^iShNo varuNasya rAj~na AdityAnAM marutAM shardha ugram |mahAmanasAM bhuvanachyavAnAM ghoSho devAnAM jayatAmudasthAt || 10.103.9
uddharShaya maghavannAyudhAnyutsatvanAM mAmakAnAM manAMsi |udvR^itrahanvAjinAM vAjinAnyudrathAnAM jayatAM yantu ghoShAH || 10.103.10
asmAkamindraH samR^iteShu dhvajeShvasmAkaM yA iShavastA jayantu |asmAkaM vIrA uttare bhavantvasmA.N u devA avatA haveShu || 10.103.11
amIShAM chittaM pratilobhayantI gR^ihANA~NgAnyapve parehi |abhi prehi nirdaha hR^itsu shokairandhenAmitrAstamasA sachantAm || 10.103.12
pretA jayatA nara indro vaH sharma yachChatu |ugrA vaH santu bAhavo.anAdhR^iShyA yathAsatha || 10.103.13

asAvi somaH puruhUta tubhyaM haribhyAM yaj~namupa yAhi tUyam |tubhyaM giro vipravIrA iyAnA dadhanvira indra pibA sutasya || 10.104.1
apsu dhUtasya harivaH pibeha nR^ibhiH sutasya jaTharaM pR^iNasva |mimikShuryamadraya indra tubhyaM tebhirvardhasva madamukthavAhaH || 10.104.2
progrAM pItiM vR^iShNa iyarmi satyAM prayai sutasya haryashva tubhyam |indra dhenAbhiriha mAdayasva dhIbhirvishvAbhiH shachyA gR^iNAnaH || 10.104.3
UtI shachIvastava vIryeNa vayo dadhAnA ushija R^itaj~nAH |prajAvadindra manuSho duroNe tasthurgR^iNantaH sadhamAdyAsaH || 10.104.4
praNItibhiShTe haryashva suShToH suShumnasya pururucho janAsaH |maMhiShThAmUtiM vitire dadhAnAH stotAra indra tava sUnR^itAbhiH || 10.104.5
upa brahmANi harivo haribhyAM somasya yAhi pItaye sutasya |indra tvA yaj~naH kShamamANamAnaDdAshvA.N asyadhvarasya praketaH || 10.104.6
sahasravAjamabhimAtiShAhaM suteraNaM maghavAnaM suvR^iktim |upa bhUShanti giro apratItamindraM namasyA jarituH pananta || 10.104.7
saptApo devIH suraNA amR^iktA yAbhiH sindhumatara indra pUrbhit |navatiM srotyA nava cha sravantIrdevebhyo gAtuM manuShe cha vindaH || 10.104.8
apo mahIrabhishasteramu~ncho.ajAgarAsvadhi deva ekaH |indra yAstvaM vR^itratUrye chakartha tAbhirvishvAyustanvaM pupuShyAH || 10.104.9
vIreNyaH kraturindraH sushastirutApi dhenA puruhUtamITTe |ArdayadvR^itramakR^iNodu lokaM sasAhe shakraH pR^itanA abhiShTiH || 10.104.10
shunaM huvema maghavAnamindramasminbhare nR^itamaM vAjasAtau |shR^iNvantamugramUtaye samatsu ghnantaM vR^itrANi saMjitaM dhanAnAm || 10.104.11

kadA vaso stotraM haryata Ava shmashA rudhadvAH |dIrghaM sutaM vAtApyAya || 10.105.1
harI yasya suyujA vivratA verarvantAnu shepA |ubhA rajI na keshinA patirdan || 10.105.2
apa yorindraH pApaja A marto na shashramANo bibhIvAn |shubhe yadyuyuje taviShIvAn || 10.105.3
sachAyorindrashcharkR^iSha A.N upAnasaH saparyan |nadayorvivratayoH shUra indraH || 10.105.4
adhi yastasthau keshavantA vyachasvantA na puShTyai |vanoti shiprAbhyAM shipriNIvAn || 10.105.5
prAstaudR^iShvaujA R^iShvebhistatakSha shUraH shavasA |R^ibhurna kratubhirmAtarishvA || 10.105.6
vajraM yashchakre suhanAya dasyave hirImasho hirImAn |arutahanuradbhutaM na rajaH || 10.105.7
ava no vR^ijinA shishIhyR^ichA vanemAnR^ichaH |nAbrahmA yaj~na R^idhagjoShati tve || 10.105.8
UrdhvA yatte tretinI bhUdyaj~nasya dhUrShu sadman |sajUrnAvaM svayashasaM sachAyoH || 10.105.9
shriye te pR^ishnirupasechanI bhUchChriye darvirarepAH |yayA sve pAtre si~nchasa ut || 10.105.10
shataM vA yadasurya prati tvA sumitra itthAstauddurmitra itthAstaut |Avo yaddasyuhatye kutsaputraM prAvo yaddasyuhatye kutsavatsam || 10.105.11

ubhA u nUnaM tadidarthayethe vi tanvAthe dhiyo vastrApaseva |sadhrIchInA yAtave premajIgaH sudineva pR^ikSha A taMsayethe || 10.106.1
uShTAreva pharvareShu shrayethe prAyogeva shvAtryA shAsurethaH |dUteva hi ShTho yashasA janeShu mApa sthAtaM mahiShevAvapAnAt || 10.106.2
sAkaMyujA shakunasyeva pakShA pashveva chitrA yajurA gamiShTam |agniriva devayordIdivAMsA parijmAneva yajathaH purutrA || 10.106.3
ApI vo asme pitareva putrogreva ruchA nR^ipatIva turyai |iryeva puShTyai kiraNeva bhujyai shruShTIvAneva havamA gamiShTam || 10.106.4
vaMsageva pUSharyA shimbAtA mitreva R^itA shatarA shAtapantA |vAjevochchA vayasA gharmyeShThA meSheveShA saparyA purIShA || 10.106.5
sR^iNyeva jarbharI turpharItU naitosheva turpharI parpharIkA |udanyajeva jemanA maderU tA me jarAyvajaraM marAyu || 10.106.6
pajreva charcharaM jAraM marAyu kShadmevArtheShu tartarItha ugrA |R^ibhU nApatkharamajrA kharajrurvAyurna parpharatkShayadrayINAm || 10.106.7
gharmeva madhu jaThare sanerU bhagevitA turpharI phArivAram |patareva chacharA chandranirNi~NmanaR^i~NgA mananyA na jagmI || 10.106.8
bR^ihanteva gambhareShu pratiShThAM pAdeva gAdhaM tarate vidAthaH |karNeva shAsuranu hi smarAthoM.asheva no bhajataM chitramapnaH || 10.106.9
Ara~Ngareva madhverayethe sAragheva gavi nIchInabAre |kInAreva svedamAsiShvidAnA kShAmevorjA sUyavasAtsachethe || 10.106.10
R^idhyAma stomaM sanuyAma vAjamA no mantraM sarathehopa yAtam |yasho na pakvaM madhu goShvantarA bhUtAMsho ashvinoH kAmamaprAH || 10.106.11

AvirabhUnmahi mAghonameShAM vishvaM jIvaM tamaso niramochi |mahi jyotiH pitR^ibhirdattamAgAduruH panthA dakShiNAyA adarshi || 10.107.1
uchchA divi dakShiNAvanto asthurye ashvadAH saha te sUryeNa |hiraNyadA amR^itatvaM bhajante vAsodAH soma pra tiranta AyuH || 10.107.2
daivI pUrtirdakShiNA devayajyA na kavAribhyo nahi te pR^iNanti |athA naraH prayatadakShiNAso.avadyabhiyA bahavaH pR^iNanti || 10.107.3
shatadhAraM vAyumarkaM svarvidaM nR^ichakShasaste abhi chakShate haviH |ye pR^iNanti pra cha yachChanti saMgame te dakShiNAM duhate saptamAtaram || 10.107.4
dakShiNAvAnprathamo hUta eti dakShiNAvAngrAmaNIragrameti |tameva manye nR^ipatiM janAnAM yaH prathamo dakShiNAmAvivAya || 10.107.5
tameva R^iShiM tamu brahmANamAhuryaj~nanyaM sAmagAmukthashAsam |sa shukrasya tanvo veda tisro yaH prathamo dakShiNayA rarAdha || 10.107.6
dakShiNAshvaM dakShiNA gAM dadAti dakShiNA chandramuta yaddhiraNyam |dakShiNAnnaM vanute yo na AtmA dakShiNAM varma kR^iNute vijAnan || 10.107.7
na bhojA mamrurna nyarthamIyurna riShyanti na vyathante ha bhojAH |idaM yadvishvaM bhuvanaM svashchaitatsarvaM dakShiNaibhyo dadAti || 10.107.8
bhojA jigyuH surabhiM yonimagre bhojA jigyurvadhvaM yA suvAsAH |bhojA jigyurantaHpeyaM surAyA bhojA jigyurye ahUtAH prayanti || 10.107.9
bhojAyAshvaM saM mR^ijantyAshuM bhojAyAste kanyA shumbhamAnA |bhojasyedaM puShkariNIva veshma pariShkR^itaM devamAneva chitram || 10.107.10
bhojamashvAH suShThuvAho vahanti suvR^idratho vartate dakShiNAyAH |bhojaM devAso.avatA bhareShu bhojaH shatrUnsamanIkeShu jetA || 10.107.11

kimichChantI saramA predamAnaDdUre hyadhvA jaguriH parAchaiH |kAsmehitiH kA paritakmyAsItkathaM rasAyA ataraH payAMsi || 10.108.1
indrasya dUtIriShitA charAmi maha ichChantI paNayo nidhInvaH |atiShkado bhiyasA tanna AvattathA rasAyA ataraM payAMsi || 10.108.2
kIdR^i~N~NindraH sarame kA dR^ishIkA yasyedaM dUtIrasaraH parAkAt |A cha gachChAnmitramenA dadhAmAthA gavAM gopatirno bhavAti || 10.108.3
nAhaM taM veda dabhyaM dabhatsa yasyedaM dUtIrasaraM parAkAt |na taM gUhanti sravato gabhIrA hatA indreNa paNayaH shayadhve || 10.108.4
imA gAvaH sarame yA aichChaH pari divo antAnsubhage patantI |kasta enA ava sR^ijAdayudhvyutAsmAkamAyudhA santi tigmA || 10.108.5
asenyA vaH paNayo vachAMsyaniShavyAstanvaH santu pApIH |adhR^iShTo va etavA astu panthA bR^ihaspatirva ubhayA na mR^iLAt || 10.108.6
ayaM nidhiH sarame adribudhno gobhirashvebhirvasubhirnyR^iShTaH |rakShanti taM paNayo ye sugopA reku padamalakamA jagantha || 10.108.7
eha gamannR^iShayaH somashitA ayAsyo a~Ngiraso navagvAH |ta etamUrvaM vi bhajanta gonAmathaitadvachaH paNayo vamannit || 10.108.8
evA cha tvaM sarama Ajagantha prabAdhitA sahasA daivyena |svasAraM tvA kR^iNavai mA punargA apa te gavAM subhage bhajAma || 10.108.9
nAhaM veda bhrAtR^itvaM no svasR^itvamindro vidura~Ngirasashcha ghorAH |gokAmA me achChadayanyadAyamapAta ita paNayo varIyaH || 10.108.10
dUramita paNayo varIya udgAvo yantu minatIrR^itena |bR^ihaspatiryA avindannigULhAH somo grAvANa R^iShayashcha viprAH || 10.108.11

te.avadanprathamA brahmakilbiShe.akUpAraH salilo mAtarishvA |vILuharAstapa ugro mayobhUrApo devIH prathamajA R^itena || 10.109.1
somo rAjA prathamo brahmajAyAM punaH prAyachChadahR^iNIyamAnaH |anvartitA varuNo mitra AsIdagnirhotA hastagR^ihyA ninAya || 10.109.2
hastenaiva grAhya AdhirasyA brahmajAyeyamiti chedavochan |na dUtAya prahye tastha eShA tathA rAShTraM gupitaM kShatriyasya || 10.109.3
devA etasyAmavadanta pUrve saptaR^iShayastapase ye niSheduH |bhImA jAyA brAhmaNasyopanItA durdhAM dadhAti parame vyoman || 10.109.4
brahmachArI charati veviShadviShaH sa devAnAM bhavatyekama~Ngam |tena jAyAmanvavindadbR^ihaspatiH somena nItAM juhvaM na devAH || 10.109.5
punarvai devA adaduH punarmanuShyA uta |rAjAnaH satyaM kR^iNvAnA brahmajAyAM punardaduH || 10.109.6
punardAya brahmajAyAM kR^itvI devairnikilbiSham |UrjaM pR^ithivyA bhaktvAyorugAyamupAsate || 10.109.7

samiddho adya manuSho duroNe devo devAnyajasi jAtavedaH |A cha vaha mitramahashchikitvAntvaM dUtaH kavirasi prachetAH || 10.110.1
tanUnapAtpatha R^itasya yAnAnmadhvA sama~njansvadayA sujihva |manmAni dhIbhiruta yaj~namR^indhandevatrA cha kR^iNuhyadhvaraM naH || 10.110.2
AjuhvAna IDyo vandyashchA yAhyagne vasubhiH sajoShAH |tvaM devAnAmasi yahva hotA sa enAnyakShIShito yajIyAn || 10.110.3
prAchInaM barhiH pradishA pR^ithivyA vastorasyA vR^ijyate agre ahnAm |vyu prathate vitaraM varIyo devebhyo aditaye syonam || 10.110.4
vyachasvatIrurviyA vi shrayantAM patibhyo na janayaH shumbhamAnAH |devIrdvAro bR^ihatIrvishvaminvA devebhyo bhavata suprAyaNAH || 10.110.5
A suShvayantI yajate upAke uShAsAnaktA sadatAM ni yonau |divye yoShaNe bR^ihatI surukme adhi shriyaM shukrapishaM dadhAne || 10.110.6
daivyA hotArA prathamA suvAchA mimAnA yaj~naM manuSho yajadhyai |prachodayantA vidatheShu kArU prAchInaM jyotiH pradishA dishantA || 10.110.7
A no yaj~naM bhAratI tUyametviLA manuShvadiha chetayantI |tisro devIrbarhiredaM syonaM sarasvatI svapasaH sadantu || 10.110.8
ya ime dyAvApR^ithivI janitrI rUpairapiMshadbhuvanAni vishvA |tamadya hotariShito yajIyAndevaM tvaShTAramiha yakShi vidvAn || 10.110.9
upAvasR^ija tmanyA sama~njandevAnAM pAtha R^ituthA havIMShi |vanaspatiH shamitA devo agniH svadantu havyaM madhunA ghR^itena || 10.110.10
sadyo jAto vyamimIta yaj~namagnirdevAnAmabhavatpurogAH |asya hotuH pradishyR^itasya vAchi svAhAkR^itaM haviradantu devAH || 10.110.11

manIShiNaH pra bharadhvaM manIShAM yathAyathA matayaH santi nR^iNAm |indraM satyairerayAmA kR^itebhiH sa hi vIro girvaNasyurvidAnaH || 10.111.1
R^itasya hi sadaso dhItiradyautsaM gArShTeyo vR^iShabho gobhirAnaT |udatiShThattaviSheNA raveNa mahAnti chitsaM vivyAchA rajAMsi || 10.111.2
indraH kila shrutyA asya veda sa hi jiShNuH pathikR^itsUryAya |AnmenAM kR^iNvannachyuto bhuvadgoH patirdivaH sanajA apratItaH || 10.111.3
indro mahnA mahato arNavasya vratAminAda~NgirobhirgR^iNAnaH |purUNi chinni tatAnA rajAMsi dAdhAra yo dharuNaM satyatAtA || 10.111.4
indro divaH pratimAnaM pR^ithivyA vishvA veda savanA hanti shuShNam |mahIM chiddyAmAtanotsUryeNa chAskambha chitkambhanena skabhIyAn || 10.111.5
vajreNa hi vR^itrahA vR^itramastaradevasya shUshuvAnasya mAyAH |vi dhR^iShNo atra dhR^iShatA jaghanthAthAbhavo maghavanbAhvojAH || 10.111.6
sachanta yaduShasaH sUryeNa chitrAmasya ketavo rAmavindan |A yannakShatraM dadR^ishe divo na punaryato nakiraddhA nu veda || 10.111.7
dUraM kila prathamA jagmurAsAmindrasya yAH prasave sasrurApaH |kva svidagraM kva budhna AsAmApo madhyaM kva vo nUnamantaH || 10.111.8
sR^ijaH sindhU.NrahinA jagrasAnA.N AdidetAH pra vivijre javena |mumukShamANA uta yA mumuchre.adhedetA na ramante nitiktAH || 10.111.9
sadhrIchIH sindhumushatIrivAyansanAjjAra AritaH pUrbhidAsAm |astamA te pArthivA vasUnyasme jagmuH sUnR^itA indra pUrvIH || 10.111.10

indra piba pratikAmaM sutasya prAtaHsAvastava hi pUrvapItiH |harShasva hantave shUra shatrUnukthebhiShTe vIryA pra bravAma || 10.112.1
yaste ratho manaso javIyAnendra tena somapeyAya yAhi |tUyamA te harayaH pra dravantu yebhiryAsi vR^iShabhirmandamAnaH || 10.112.2
haritvatA varchasA sUryasya shreShThai rUpaistanvaM sparshayasva |asmAbhirindra sakhibhirhuvAnaH sadhrIchIno mAdayasvA niShadya || 10.112.3
yasya tyatte mahimAnaM madeShvime mahI rodasI nAviviktAm |tadoka A haribhirindra yuktaiH priyebhiryAhi priyamannamachCha || 10.112.4
yasya shashvatpapivA.N indra shatrUnanAnukR^ityA raNyA chakartha |sa te puraMdhiM taviShImiyarti sa te madAya suta indra somaH || 10.112.5
idaM te pAtraM sanavittamindra pibA somamenA shatakrato |pUrNa AhAvo madirasya madhvo yaM vishva idabhiharyanti devAH || 10.112.6
vi hi tvAmindra purudhA janAso hitaprayaso vR^iShabha hvayante |asmAkaM te madhumattamAnImA bhuvansavanA teShu harya || 10.112.7
pra ta indra pUrvyANi pra nUnaM vIryA vochaM prathamA kR^itAni |satInamanyurashrathAyo adriM suvedanAmakR^iNorbrahmaNe gAm || 10.112.8
ni Shu sIda gaNapate gaNeShu tvAmAhurvipratamaM kavInAm |na R^ite tvatkriyate kiM chanAre mahAmarkaM maghava~nchitramarcha || 10.112.9
abhikhyA no maghavannAdhamAnAnsakhe bodhi vasupate sakhInAm |raNaM kR^idhi raNakR^itsatyashuShmAbhakte chidA bhajA rAye asmAn || 10.112.10

tamasya dyAvApR^ithivI sachetasA vishvebhirdevairanu shuShmamAvatAm |yadaitkR^iNvAno mahimAnamindriyaM pItvI somasya kratumA.N avardhata || 10.113.1
tamasya viShNurmahimAnamojasAMshuM dadhanvAnmadhuno vi rapshate |devebhirindro maghavA sayAvabhirvR^itraM jaghanvA.N abhavadvareNyaH || 10.113.2
vR^itreNa yadahinA bibhradAyudhA samasthithA yudhaye shaMsamAvide |vishve te atra marutaH saha tmanAvardhannugra mahimAnamindriyam || 10.113.3
jaj~nAna eva vyabAdhata spR^idhaH prApashyadvIro abhi pauMsyaM raNam |avR^ishchadadrimava sasyadaH sR^ijadastabhnAnnAkaM svapasyayA pR^ithum || 10.113.4
AdindraH satrA taviShIrapatyata varIyo dyAvApR^ithivI abAdhata |avAbharaddhR^iShito vajramAyasaM shevaM mitrAya varuNAya dAshuShe || 10.113.5
indrasyAtra taviShIbhyo virapshina R^ighAyato araMhayanta manyave |vR^itraM yadugro vyavR^ishchadojasApo bibhrataM tamasA parIvR^itam || 10.113.6
yA vIryANi prathamAni kartvA mahitvebhiryatamAnau samIyatuH |dhvAntaM tamo.ava dadhvase hata indro mahnA pUrvahUtAvapatyata || 10.113.7
vishve devAso adha vR^iShNyAni te.avardhayansomavatyA vachasyayA |raddhaM vR^itramahimindrasya hanmanAgnirna jambhaistR^iShvannamAvayat || 10.113.8
bhUri dakShebhirvachanebhirR^ikvabhiH sakhyebhiH sakhyAni pra vochata |indro dhuniM cha chumuriM cha dambhaya~nChraddhAmanasyA shR^iNute dabhItaye || 10.113.9
tvaM purUNyA bharA svashvyA yebhirmaMsai nivachanAni shaMsan |sugebhirvishvA duritA tarema vido Shu Na urviyA gAdhamadya || 10.113.10

gharmA samantA trivR^itaM vyApatustayorjuShTiM mAtarishvA jagAma |divaspayo didhiShANA aveShanvidurdevAH sahasAmAnamarkam || 10.114.1
tisro deShTrAya nirR^itIrupAsate dIrghashruto vi hi jAnanti vahnayaH |tAsAM ni chikyuH kavayo nidAnaM pareShu yA guhyeShu vrateShu || 10.114.2
chatuShkapardA yuvatiH supeshA ghR^itapratIkA vayunAni vaste |tasyAM suparNA vR^iShaNA ni Shedaturyatra devA dadhire bhAgadheyam || 10.114.3
ekaH suparNaH sa samudramA vivesha sa idaM vishvaM bhuvanaM vi chaShTe |taM pAkena manasApashyamantitastaM mAtA reLhi sa u reLhi mAtaram || 10.114.4
suparNaM viprAH kavayo vachobhirekaM santaM bahudhA kalpayanti |ChandAMsi cha dadhato adhvareShu grahAnsomasya mimate dvAdasha || 10.114.5
ShaTtriMshA.Nshcha chaturaH kalpayantashChandAMsi cha dadhata AdvAdasham |yaj~naM vimAya kavayo manISha R^iksAmAbhyAM pra rathaM vartayanti || 10.114.6
chaturdashAnye mahimAno asya taM dhIrA vAchA pra Nayanti sapta |ApnAnaM tIrthaM ka iha pra vochadyena pathA prapibante sutasya || 10.114.7
sahasradhA pa~nchadashAnyukthA yAvaddyAvApR^ithivI tAvadittat |sahasradhA mahimAnaH sahasraM yAvadbrahma viShThitaM tAvatI vAk || 10.114.8
kashChandasAM yogamA veda dhIraH ko dhiShNyAM prati vAchaM papAda |kamR^itvijAmaShTamaM shUramAhurharI indrasya ni chikAya kaH svit || 10.114.9
bhUmyA antaM paryeke charanti rathasya dhUrShu yuktAso asthuH |shramasya dAyaM vi bhajantyebhyo yadA yamo bhavati harmye hitaH || 10.114.10

chitra ichChishostaruNasya vakShatho na yo mAtarAvapyeti dhAtave |anUdhA yadi jIjanadadhA cha nu vavakSha sadyo mahi dUtyaM charan || 10.115.1
agnirha nAma dhAyi dannapastamaH saM yo vanA yuvate bhasmanA datA |abhipramurA juhvA svadhvara ino na prothamAno yavase vR^iShA || 10.115.2
taM vo viM na druShadaM devamandhasa induM prothantaM pravapantamarNavam |AsA vahniM na shochiShA virapshinaM mahivrataM na sarajantamadhvanaH || 10.115.3
vi yasya te jrayasAnasyAjara dhakShorna vAtAH pari santyachyutAH |A raNvAso yuyudhayo na satvanaM tritaM nashanta pra shiShanta iShTaye || 10.115.4
sa idagniH kaNvatamaH kaNvasakhAryaH parasyAntarasya taruShaH |agniH pAtu gR^iNato agniH sUrInagnirdadAtu teShAmavo naH || 10.115.5
vAjintamAya sahyase supitrya tR^iShu chyavAno anu jAtavedase |anudre chidyo dhR^iShatA varaM sate mahintamAya dhanvanedaviShyate || 10.115.6
evAgnirmartaiH saha sUribhirvasuH ShTave sahasaH sUnaro nR^ibhiH |mitrAso na ye sudhitA R^itAyavo dyAvo na dyumnairabhi santi mAnuShAn || 10.115.7
Urjo napAtsahasAvanniti tvopastutasya vandate vR^iShA vAk |tvAM stoShAma tvayA suvIrA drAghIya AyuH prataraM dadhAnAH || 10.115.8
iti tvAgne vR^iShTihavyasya putrA upastutAsa R^iShayo.avochan |tA.Nshcha pAhi gR^iNatashcha sUrInvaShaDvaShaLityUrdhvAso anakShannamo nama ityUrdhvAso anakShan || 10.115.9

pibA somaM mahata indriyAya pibA vR^itrAya hantave shaviShTha |piba rAye shavase hUyamAnaH piba madhvastR^ipadindrA vR^iShasva || 10.116.1
asya piba kShumataH prasthitasyendra somasya varamA sutasya |svastidA manasA mAdayasvArvAchIno revate saubhagAya || 10.116.2
mamattu tvA divyaH soma indra mamattu yaH sUyate pArthiveShu |mamattu yena varivashchakartha mamattu yena niriNAsi shatrUn || 10.116.3
A dvibarhA amino yAtvindro vR^iShA haribhyAM pariShiktamandhaH |gavyA sutasya prabhR^itasya madhvaH satrA khedAmarushahA vR^iShasva || 10.116.4
ni tigmAni bhrAshayanbhrAshyAnyava sthirA tanuhi yAtujUnAm |ugrAya te saho balaM dadAmi pratItyA shatrUnvigadeShu vR^ishcha || 10.116.5
vyarya indra tanuhi shravAMsyojaH sthireva dhanvano.abhimAtIH |asmadryagvAvR^idhAnaH sahobhiranibhR^iShTastanvaM vAvR^idhasva || 10.116.6
idaM havirmaghavantubhyaM rAtaM prati samrALahR^iNAno gR^ibhAya |tubhyaM suto maghavantubhyaM pakvo.addhIndra piba cha prasthitasya || 10.116.7
addhIdindra prasthitemA havIMShi chano dadhiShva pachatota somam |prayasvantaH prati haryAmasi tvA satyAH santu yajamAnasya kAmAH || 10.116.8
prendrAgnibhyAM suvachasyAmiyarmi sindhAviva prerayaM nAvamarkaiH |ayA iva pari charanti devA ye asmabhyaM dhanadA udbhidashcha || 10.116.9

na vA u devAH kShudhamidvadhaM dadurutAshitamupa gachChanti mR^ityavaH |uto rayiH pR^iNato nopa dasyatyutApR^iNanmarDitAraM na vindate || 10.117.1
ya AdhrAya chakamAnAya pitvo.annavAnsanraphitAyopajagmuShe |sthiraM manaH kR^iNute sevate puroto chitsa marDitAraM na vindate || 10.117.2
sa idbhojo yo gR^ihave dadAtyannakAmAya charate kR^ishAya |aramasmai bhavati yAmahUtA utAparIShu kR^iNute sakhAyam || 10.117.3
na sa sakhA yo na dadAti sakhye sachAbhuve sachamAnAya pitvaH |apAsmAtpreyAnna tadoko asti pR^iNantamanyamaraNaM chidichChet || 10.117.4
pR^iNIyAdinnAdhamAnAya tavyAndrAghIyAMsamanu pashyeta panthAm |o hi vartante rathyeva chakrAnyamanyamupa tiShThanta rAyaH || 10.117.5
moghamannaM vindate aprachetAH satyaM bravImi vadha itsa tasya |nAryamaNaM puShyati no sakhAyaM kevalAgho bhavati kevalAdI || 10.117.6
kR^iShannitphAla AshitaM kR^iNoti yannadhvAnamapa vR^i~Nkte charitraiH |vadanbrahmAvadato vanIyAnpR^iNannApirapR^iNantamabhi ShyAt || 10.117.7
ekapAdbhUyo dvipado vi chakrame dvipAttripAdamabhyeti pashchAt |chatuShpAdeti dvipadAmabhisvare sampashyanpa~NktIrupatiShThamAnaH || 10.117.8
samau chiddhastau na samaM viviShTaH sammAtarA chinna samaM duhAte |yamayoshchinna samA vIryANi j~nAtI chitsantau na samaM pR^iNItaH || 10.117.9

agne haMsi nyatriNaM dIdyanmartyeShvA |sve kShaye shuchivrata || 10.118.1
uttiShThasi svAhuto ghR^itAni prati modase |yattvA sruchaH samasthiran || 10.118.2
sa Ahuto vi rochate.agnirILenyo girA |sruchA pratIkamajyate || 10.118.3
ghR^itenAgniH samajyate madhupratIka AhutaH |rochamAno vibhAvasuH || 10.118.4
jaramANaH samidhyase devebhyo havyavAhana |taM tvA havanta martyAH || 10.118.5
taM martA amartyaM ghR^itenAgniM saparyata |adAbhyaM gR^ihapatim || 10.118.6
adAbhyena shochiShAgne rakShastvaM daha |gopA R^itasya dIdihi || 10.118.7
sa tvamagne pratIkena pratyoSha yAtudhAnyaH |urukShayeShu dIdyat || 10.118.8
taM tvA gIrbhirurukShayA havyavAhaM samIdhire |yajiShThaM mAnuShe jane || 10.118.9

iti vA iti me mano gAmashvaM sanuyAmiti |kuvitsomasyApAmiti || 10.119.1
pra vAtA iva dodhata unmA pItA ayaMsata |kuvitsomasyApAmiti || 10.119.2
unmA pItA ayaMsata rathamashvA ivAshavaH |kuvitsomasyApAmiti || 10.119.3
upa mA matirasthita vAshrA putramiva priyam |kuvitsomasyApAmiti || 10.119.4
ahaM taShTeva vandhuraM paryachAmi hR^idA matim |kuvitsomasyApAmiti || 10.119.5
nahi me akShipachchanAchChAntsuH pa~ncha kR^iShTayaH |kuvitsomasyApAmiti || 10.119.6
nahi me rodasI ubhe anyaM pakShaM chana prati |kuvitsomasyApAmiti || 10.119.7
abhi dyAM mahinA bhuvamabhImAM pR^ithivIM mahIm |kuvitsomasyApAmiti || 10.119.8
hantAhaM pR^ithivImimAM ni dadhAnIha veha vA |kuvitsomasyApAmiti || 10.119.9
oShamitpR^ithivImahaM ja~NghanAnIha veha vA |kuvitsomasyApAmiti || 10.119.10
divi me anyaH pakSho.adho anyamachIkR^iSham |kuvitsomasyApAmiti || 10.119.11
ahamasmi mahAmaho.abhinabhyamudIShitaH |kuvitsomasyApAmiti || 10.119.12
gR^iho yAmyaraMkR^ito devebhyo havyavAhanaH |kuvitsomasyApAmiti || 10.119.13

tadidAsa bhuvaneShu jyeShThaM yato jaj~na ugrastveShanR^imNaH |sadyo jaj~nAno ni riNAti shatrUnanu yaM vishve madantyUmAH || 10.120.1
vAvR^idhAnaH shavasA bhUryojAH shatrurdAsAya bhiyasaM dadhAti |avyanachcha vyanachcha sasni saM te navanta prabhR^itA madeShu || 10.120.2
tve kratumapi vR^i~njanti vishve dviryadete trirbhavantyUmAH |svAdoH svAdIyaH svAdunA sR^ijA samadaH su madhu madhunAbhi yodhIH || 10.120.3
iti chiddhi tvA dhanA jayantaM mademade anumadanti viprAH |ojIyo dhR^iShNo sthiramA tanuShva mA tvA dabhanyAtudhAnA durevAH || 10.120.4
tvayA vayaM shAshadmahe raNeShu prapashyanto yudhenyAni bhUri |chodayAmi ta AyudhA vachobhiH saM te shishAmi brahmaNA vayAMsi || 10.120.5
stuSheyyaM puruvarpasamR^ibhvaminatamamAptyamAptyAnAm |A darShate shavasA sapta dAnUnpra sAkShate pratimAnAni bhUri || 10.120.6
ni taddadhiShe.avaraM paraM cha yasminnAvithAvasA duroNe |A mAtarA sthApayase jigatnU ata inoShi karvarA purUNi || 10.120.7
imA brahma bR^ihaddivo vivaktIndrAya shUShamagriyaH svarShAH |maho gotrasya kShayati svarAjo durashcha vishvA avR^iNodapa svAH || 10.120.8
evA mahAnbR^ihaddivo atharvAvochatsvAM tanvamindrameva |svasAro mAtaribhvarIrariprA hinvanti cha shavasA vardhayanti cha || 10.120.9

hiraNyagarbhaH samavartatAgre bhUtasya jAtaH patireka AsIt |sa dAdhAra pR^ithivIM dyAmutemAM kasmai devAya haviShA vidhema || 10.121.1
ya AtmadA baladA yasya vishva upAsate prashiShaM yasya devAH |yasya ChAyAmR^itaM yasya mR^ityuH kasmai devAya haviShA vidhema || 10.121.2
yaH prANato nimiShato mahitvaika idrAjA jagato babhUva |ya Ishe asya dvipadashchatuShpadaH kasmai devAya haviShA vidhema || 10.121.3
yasyeme himavanto mahitvA yasya samudraM rasayA sahAhuH |yasyemAH pradisho yasya bAhU kasmai devAya haviShA vidhema || 10.121.4
yena dyaurugrA pR^ithivI cha dR^iLhA yena svaH stabhitaM yena nAkaH |yo antarikShe rajaso vimAnaH kasmai devAya haviShA vidhema || 10.121.5
yaM krandasI avasA tastabhAne abhyaikShetAM manasA rejamAne |yatrAdhi sUra udito vibhAti kasmai devAya haviShA vidhema || 10.121.6
Apo ha yadbR^ihatIrvishvamAyangarbhaM dadhAnA janayantIragnim |tato devAnAM samavartatAsurekaH kasmai devAya haviShA vidhema || 10.121.7
yashchidApo mahinA paryapashyaddakShaM dadhAnA janayantIryaj~nam |yo deveShvadhi deva eka AsItkasmai devAya haviShA vidhema || 10.121.8
mA no hiMsIjjanitA yaH pR^ithivyA yo vA divaM satyadharmA jajAna |yashchApashchandrA bR^ihatIrjajAna kasmai devAya haviShA vidhema || 10.121.9
prajApate na tvadetAnyanyo vishvA jAtAni pari tA babhUva |yatkAmAste juhumastanno astu vayaM syAma patayo rayINAm || 10.121.10

vasuM na chitramahasaM gR^iNIShe vAmaM shevamatithimadviSheNyam |sa rAsate shurudho vishvadhAyaso.agnirhotA gR^ihapatiH suvIryam || 10.122.1
juShANo agne prati harya me vacho vishvAni vidvAnvayunAni sukrato |ghR^itanirNigbrahmaNe gAtumeraya tava devA ajanayannanu vratam || 10.122.2
sapta dhAmAni pariyannamartyo dAshaddAshuShe sukR^ite mAmahasva |suvIreNa rayiNAgne svAbhuvA yasta AnaT samidhA taM juShasva || 10.122.3
yaj~nasya ketuM prathamaM purohitaM haviShmanta ILate sapta vAjinam |shR^iNvantamagniM ghR^itapR^iShThamukShaNaM pR^iNantaM devaM pR^iNate suvIryam || 10.122.4
tvaM dUtaH prathamo vareNyaH sa hUyamAno amR^itAya matsva |tvAM marjayanmaruto dAshuSho gR^ihe tvAM stomebhirbhR^igavo vi ruruchuH || 10.122.5
iShaM duhansudughAM vishvadhAyasaM yaj~napriye yajamAnAya sukrato |agne ghR^itasnustrirR^itAni dIdyadvartiryaj~naM pariyansukratUyase || 10.122.6
tvAmidasyA uShaso vyuShTiShu dUtaM kR^iNvAnA ayajanta mAnuShAH |tvAM devA mahayAyyAya vAvR^idhurAjyamagne nimR^ijanto adhvare || 10.122.7
ni tvA vasiShThA ahvanta vAjinaM gR^iNanto agne vidatheShu vedhasaH |rAyaspoShaM yajamAneShu dhAraya yUyaM pAta svastibhiH sadA naH || 10.122.8

ayaM venashchodayatpR^ishnigarbhA jyotirjarAyU rajaso vimAne |imamapAM saMgame sUryasya shishuM na viprA matibhI rihanti || 10.123.1
samudrAdUrmimudiyarti veno nabhojAH pR^iShThaM haryatasya darshi |R^itasya sAnAvadhi viShTapi bhrAT samAnaM yonimabhyanUShata vrAH || 10.123.2
samAnaM pUrvIrabhi vAvashAnAstiShThanvatsasya mAtaraH sanILAH |R^itasya sAnAvadhi chakramANA rihanti madhvo amR^itasya vANIH || 10.123.3
jAnanto rUpamakR^ipanta viprA mR^igasya ghoShaM mahiShasya hi gman |R^itena yanto adhi sindhumasthurvidadgandharvo amR^itAni nAma || 10.123.4
apsarA jAramupasiShmiyANA yoShA bibharti parame vyoman |charatpriyasya yoniShu priyaH sansIdatpakShe hiraNyaye sa venaH || 10.123.5
nAke suparNamupa yatpatantaM hR^idA venanto abhyachakShata tvA |hiraNyapakShaM varuNasya dUtaM yamasya yonau shakunaM bhuraNyum || 10.123.6
Urdhvo gandharvo adhi nAke asthAtpratya~NchitrA bibhradasyAyudhAni |vasAno atkaM surabhiM dR^ishe kaM svarNa nAma janata priyANi || 10.123.7
drapsaH samudramabhi yajjigAti pashyangR^idhrasya chakShasA vidharman |bhAnuH shukreNa shochiShA chakAnastR^itIye chakre rajasi priyANi || 10.123.8

imaM no agna upa yaj~namehi pa~nchayAmaM trivR^itaM saptatantum |aso havyavALuta naH purogA jyogeva dIrghaM tama AshayiShThAH || 10.124.1
adevAddevaH prachatA guhA yanprapashyamAno amR^itatvamemi |shivaM yatsantamashivo jahAmi svAtsakhyAdaraNIM nAbhimemi || 10.124.2
pashyannanyasyA atithiM vayAyA R^itasya dhAma vi mime purUNi |shaMsAmi pitre asurAya shevamayaj~niyAdyaj~niyaM bhAgamemi || 10.124.3
bahvIH samA akaramantarasminnindraM vR^iNAnaH pitaraM jahAmi |agniH somo varuNaste chyavante paryAvardrAShTraM tadavAmyAyan || 10.124.4
nirmAyA u tye asurA abhUvantvaM cha mA varuNa kAmayAse |R^itena rAjannanR^itaM vivi~nchanmama rAShTrasyAdhipatyamehi || 10.124.5
idaM svaridamidAsa vAmamayaM prakAsha urvantarikSham |hanAva vR^itraM nirehi soma haviShTvA santaM haviShA yajAma || 10.124.6
kaviH kavitvA divi rUpamAsajadaprabhUtI varuNo nirapaH sR^ijat |kShemaM kR^iNvAnA janayo na sindhavastA asya varNaM shuchayo bharibhrati || 10.124.7
tA asya jyeShThamindriyaM sachante tA ImA kSheti svadhayA madantIH |tA IM visho na rAjAnaM vR^iNAnA bIbhatsuvo apa vR^itrAdatiShThan || 10.124.8
bIbhatsUnAM sayujaM haMsamAhurapAM divyAnAM sakhye charantam |anuShTubhamanu charchUryamANamindraM ni chikyuH kavayo manIShA || 10.124.9

ahaM rudrebhirvasubhishcharAmyahamAdityairuta vishvadevaiH |ahaM mitrAvaruNobhA bibharmyahamindrAgnI ahamashvinobhA || 10.125.1
ahaM somamAhanasaM bibharmyahaM tvaShTAramuta pUShaNaM bhagam |ahaM dadhAmi draviNaM haviShmate suprAvye yajamAnAya sunvate || 10.125.2
ahaM rAShTrI saMgamanI vasUnAM chikituShI prathamA yaj~niyAnAm |tAM mA devA vyadadhuH purutrA bhUristhAtrAM bhUryAveshayantIm || 10.125.3
mayA so annamatti yo vipashyati yaH prANiti ya IM shR^iNotyuktam |amantavo mAM ta upa kShiyanti shrudhi shruta shraddhivaM te vadAmi || 10.125.4
ahameva svayamidaM vadAmi juShTaM devebhiruta mAnuShebhiH |yaM kAmaye taMtamugraM kR^iNomi taM brahmANaM tamR^iShiM taM sumedhAm || 10.125.5
ahaM rudrAya dhanurA tanomi brahmadviShe sharave hantavA u |ahaM janAya samadaM kR^iNomyahaM dyAvApR^ithivI A vivesha || 10.125.6

na tamaMho na duritaM devAso aShTa martyam |sajoShaso yamaryamA mitro nayanti varuNo ati dviShaH || 10.126.1

te nUnaM no.ayamUtaye varuNo mitro aryamA |nayiShThA u no neShaNi parShiShThA u naH parShaNyati dviShaH || 10.126.3
yUyaM vishvaM pari pAtha varuNo mitro aryamA |yuShmAkaM sharmaNi priye syAma supraNItayo.ati dviShaH || 10.126.4
AdityAso ati sridho varuNo mitro aryamA |ugraM marudbhI rudraM huvemendramagniM svastaye.ati dviShaH || 10.126.5

rAtrI vyakhyadAyatI purutrA devyakShabhiH |vishvA adhi shriyo.adhita || 10.127.1

niru svasAramaskR^itoShasaM devyAyatI |apedu hAsate tamaH || 10.127.3
sA no adya yasyA vayaM ni te yAmannavikShmahi |vR^ikShe na vasatiM vayaH || 10.127.4
ni grAmAso avikShata ni padvanto ni pakShiNaH |ni shyenAsashchidarthinaH || 10.127.5

mamAgne varcho vihaveShvastu vayaM tvendhAnAstanvaM puShema |mahyaM namantAM pradishashchatasrastvayAdhyakSheNa pR^itanA jayema || 10.128.1

mahyaM yajantu mama yAni havyAkUtiH satyA manaso me astu |eno mA ni gAM katamachchanAhaM vishve devAso adhi vochatA naH || 10.128.4
devIH ShaLurvIruru naH kR^iNota vishve devAsa iha vIrayadhvam |mA hAsmahi prajayA mA tanUbhirmA radhAma dviShate soma rAjan || 10.128.5
agne manyuM pratinudanpareShAmadabdho gopAH pari pAhi nastvam |pratya~ncho yantu nigutaH punaste.amaiShAM chittaM prabudhAM vi neshat || 10.128.6
dhAtA dhAtR^INAM bhuvanasya yaspatirdevaM trAtAramabhimAtiShAham |imaM yaj~namashvinobhA bR^ihaspatirdevAH pAntu yajamAnaM nyarthAt || 10.128.7
uruvyachA no mahiShaH sharma yaMsadasminhave puruhUtaH purukShuH |sa naH prajAyai haryashva mR^iLayendra mA no rIriSho mA parA dAH || 10.128.8
ye naH sapatnA apa te bhavantvindrAgnibhyAmava bAdhAmahe tAn |vasavo rudrA AdityA uparispR^ishaM mograM chettAramadhirAjamakran || 10.128.9

nAsadAsInno sadAsIttadAnIM nAsIdrajo no vyomA paro yat |kimAvarIvaH kuha kasya sharmannambhaH kimAsIdgahanaM gabhIram || 10.129.1
na mR^ityurAsIdamR^itaM na tarhi na rAtryA ahna AsItpraketaH |AnIdavAtaM svadhayA tadekaM tasmAddhAnyanna paraH kiM chanAsa || 10.129.2
tama AsIttamasA gULhamagre.apraketaM salilaM sarvamA idam |tuchChyenAbhvapihitaM yadAsIttapasastanmahinAjAyataikam || 10.129.3
kAmastadagre samavartatAdhi manaso retaH prathamaM yadAsIt |sato bandhumasati niravindanhR^idi pratIShyA kavayo manIShA || 10.129.4
tirashchIno vitato rashmireShAmadhaH svidAsI3dupari svidAsI3t |retodhA AsanmahimAna AsansvadhA avastAtprayatiH parastAt || 10.129.5
ko addhA veda ka iha pra vochatkuta AjAtA kuta iyaM visR^iShTiH |arvAgdevA asya visarjanenAthA ko veda yata AbabhUva || 10.129.6

yo yaj~no vishvatastantubhistata ekashataM devakarmebhirAyataH |ime vayanti pitaro ya AyayuH pra vayApa vayetyAsate tate || 10.130.1

kAsItpramA pratimA kiM nidAnamAjyaM kimAsItparidhiH ka AsIt |ChandaH kimAsItpra{}ugaM kimukthaM yaddevA devamayajanta vishve || 10.130.3
agnergAyatryabhavatsayugvoShNihayA savitA saM babhUva |anuShTubhA soma ukthairmahasvAnbR^ihaspaterbR^ihatI vAchamAvat || 10.130.4
virANmitrAvaruNayorabhishrIrindrasya triShTubiha bhAgo ahnaH |vishvAndevA~njagatyA vivesha tena chAkL^ipra R^iShayo manuShyAH || 10.130.5

apa prAcha indra vishvA.N amitrAnapApAcho abhibhUte nudasva |apodIcho apa shUrAdharAcha urau yathA tava sharmanmadema || 10.131.1
kuvida~Nga yavamanto yavaM chidyathA dAntyanupUrvaM viyUya |ihehaiShAM kR^iNuhi bhojanAni ye barhiSho namovR^iktiM na jagmuH || 10.131.2
nahi sthUryR^ituthA yAtamasti nota shravo vivide saMgameShu |gavyanta indraM sakhyAya viprA ashvAyanto vR^iShaNaM vAjayantaH || 10.131.3

tasya vayaM sumatau yaj~niyasyApi bhadre saumanase syAma |sa sutrAmA svavA.N indro asme ArAchchiddveShaH sanutaryuyotu || 10.131.7

IjAnamiddyaurgUrtAvasurIjAnaM bhUmirabhi prabhUShaNi |IjAnaM devAvashvinAvabhi sumnairavardhatAm || 10.132.1
tA vAM mitrAvaruNA dhArayatkShitI suShumneShitatvatA yajAmasi |yuvoH krANAya sakhyairabhi ShyAma rakShasaH || 10.132.2
adhA chinnu yaddidhiShAmahe vAmabhi priyaM rekNaH patyamAnAH |dadvA.N vA yatpuShyati rekNaH samvArannakirasya maghAni || 10.132.3
asAvanyo asura sUyata dyaustvaM vishveShAM varuNAsi rAjA |mUrdhA rathasya chAkannaitAvatainasAntakadhruk || 10.132.4

pro Shvasmai purorathamindrAya shUShamarchata |abhIke chidu lokakR^itsaMge samatsu vR^itrahAsmAkaM bodhi choditA nabhantAmanyakeShAM jyAkA adhi dhanvasu || 10.133.1
tvaM sindhU.NravAsR^ijo.adharAcho ahannahim |ashatrurindra jaj~niShe vishvaM puShyasi vAryaM taM tvA pari ShvajAmahe nabhantAmanyakeShAM jyAkA adhi dhanvasu || 10.133.2
vi Shu vishvA arAtayo.aryo nashanta no dhiyaH |astAsi shatrave vadhaM yo na indra jighAMsati yA te rAtirdadirvasu nabhantAmanyakeShAM jyAkA adhi dhanvasu || 10.133.3
yo na indrAbhito jano vR^ikAyurAdideshati |adhaspadaM tamIM kR^idhi vibAdho asi sAsahirnabhantAmanyakeShAM jyAkA adhi dhanvasu || 10.133.4
yo na indrAbhidAsati sanAbhiryashcha niShTyaH |ava tasya balaM tira mahIva dyauradha tmanA nabhantAmanyakeShAM jyAkA adhi dhanvasu || 10.133.5
vayamindra tvAyavaH sakhitvamA rabhAmahe |R^itasya naH pathA nayAti vishvAni duritA nabhantAmanyakeShAM jyAkA adhi dhanvasu || 10.133.6
asmabhyaM su tvamindra tAM shikSha yA dohate prati varaM jaritre |achChidrodhnI pIpayadyathA naH sahasradhArA payasA mahI gauH || 10.133.7

ubhe yadindra rodasI ApaprAthoShA iva |mahAntaM tvA mahInAM samrAjaM charShaNInAM devI janitryajIjanadbhadrA janitryajIjanat || 10.134.1
ava sma durhaNAyato martasya tanuhi sthiram |adhaspadaM tamIM kR^idhi yo asmA.N Adideshati devI janitryajIjanadbhadrA janitryajIjanat || 10.134.2
ava tyA bR^ihatIriSho vishvashchandrA amitrahan |shachIbhiH shakra dhUnuhIndra vishvAbhirUtibhirdevI janitryajIjanadbhadrA janitryajIjanat || 10.134.3
ava yattvaM shatakratavindra vishvAni dhUnuShe |rayiM na sunvate sachA sahasriNIbhirUtibhirdevI janitryajIjanadbhadrA janitryajIjanat || 10.134.4
ava svedA ivAbhito viShvakpatantu didyavaH |dUrvAyA iva tantavo vyasmadetu durmatirdevI janitryajIjanadbhadrA janitryajIjanat || 10.134.5
dIrghaM hya~NkushaM yathA shaktiM bibharShi mantumaH |pUrveNa maghavanpadAjo vayAM yathA yamo devI janitryajIjanadbhadrA janitryajIjanat || 10.134.6
nakirdevA minImasi nakirA yopayAmasi mantrashrutyaM charAmasi |pakShebhirapikakShebhiratrAbhi saM rabhAmahe || 10.134.7

yasminvR^ikShe supalAshe devaiH sampibate yamaH |atrA no vishpatiH pitA purANA.N anu venati || 10.135.1
purANA.N anuvenantaM charantaM pApayAmuyA |asUyannabhyachAkashaM tasmA aspR^ihayaM punaH || 10.135.2
yaM kumAra navaM rathamachakraM manasAkR^iNoH |ekeShaM vishvataH prA~nchamapashyannadhi tiShThasi || 10.135.3

keshyagniM keshI viShaM keshI bibharti rodasI |keshI vishvaM svardR^ishe keshIdaM jyotiruchyate || 10.136.1
munayo vAtarashanAH pisha~NgA vasate malA |vAtasyAnu dhrAjiM yanti yaddevAso avikShata || 10.136.2
unmaditA mauneyena vAtA.N A tasthimA vayam |sharIredasmAkaM yUyaM martAso abhi pashyatha || 10.136.3
antarikSheNa patati vishvA rUpAvachAkashat |munirdevasyadevasya saukR^ityAya sakhA hitaH || 10.136.4

uta devA avahitaM devA unnayathA punaH |utAgashchakruShaM devA devA jIvayathA punaH || 10.137.1

A tvAgamaM shaMtAtibhiratho ariShTatAtibhiH |dakShaM te bhadramAbhArShaM parA yakShmaM suvAmi te || 10.137.4
trAyantAmiha devAstrAyatAM marutAM gaNaH |trAyantAM vishvA bhUtAni yathAyamarapA asat || 10.137.5

tava tya indra sakhyeShu vahnaya R^itaM manvAnA vyadardirurvalam |yatrA dashasyannuShaso riNannapaH kutsAya manmannahyashcha daMsayaH || 10.138.1
avAsR^ijaH prasvaH shva~nchayo girInudAja usrA apibo madhu priyam |avardhayo vanino asya daMsasA shushocha sUrya R^itajAtayA girA || 10.138.2
vi sUryo madhye amuchadrathaM divo vidaddAsAya pratimAnamAryaH |dR^iLhAni piprorasurasya mAyina indro vyAsyachchakR^ivA.N R^ijishvanA || 10.138.3
anAdhR^iShTAni dhR^iShito vyAsyannidhI.NradevA.N amR^iNadayAsyaH |mAseva sUryo vasu puryamA dade gR^iNAnaH shatrU.NrashR^iNAdvirukmatA || 10.138.4

sUryarashmirharikeshaH purastAtsavitA jyotirudayA.N ajasram |tasya pUShA prasave yAti vidvAnsampashyanvishvA bhuvanAni gopAH || 10.139.1
nR^ichakShA eSha divo madhya Asta ApaprivAnrodasI antarikSham |sa vishvAchIrabhi chaShTe ghR^itAchIrantarA pUrvamaparaM cha ketum || 10.139.2

agne tava shravo vayo mahi bhrAjante archayo vibhAvaso |bR^ihadbhAno shavasA vAjamukthyaM dadhAsi dAshuShe kave || 10.140.1
pAvakavarchAH shukravarchA anUnavarchA udiyarShi bhAnunA |putro mAtarA vicharannupAvasi pR^iNakShi rodasI ubhe || 10.140.2
Urjo napAjjAtavedaH sushastibhirmandasva dhItibhirhitaH |tve iShaH saM dadhurbhUrivarpasashchitrotayo vAmajAtAH || 10.140.3
irajyannagne prathayasva jantubhirasme rAyo amartya |sa darshatasya vapuSho vi rAjasi pR^iNakShi sAnasiM kratum || 10.140.4
iShkartAramadhvarasya prachetasaM kShayantaM rAdhaso mahaH |rAtiM vAmasya subhagAM mahImiShaM dadhAsi sAnasiM rayim || 10.140.5
R^itAvAnaM mahiShaM vishvadarshatamagniM sumnAya dadhire puro janAH |shrutkarNaM saprathastamaM tvA girA daivyaM mAnuShA yugA || 10.140.6

agne achChA vadeha naH pratya~NnaH sumanA bhava |pra no yachCha vishaspate dhanadA asi nastvam || 10.141.1
pra no yachChatvaryamA pra bhagaH pra bR^ihaspatiH |pra devAH prota sUnR^itA rAyo devI dadAtu naH || 10.141.2
somaM rAjAnamavase.agniM gIrbhirhavAmahe |AdityAnviShNuM sUryaM brahmANaM cha bR^ihaspatim || 10.141.3
indravAyU bR^ihaspatiM suhaveha havAmahe |yathA naH sarva ijjanaH saMgatyAM sumanA asat || 10.141.4
aryamaNaM bR^ihaspatimindraM dAnAya chodaya |vAtaM viShNuM sarasvatIM savitAraM cha vAjinam || 10.141.5
tvaM no agne agnibhirbrahma yaj~naM cha vardhaya |tvaM no devatAtaye rAyo dAnAya chodaya || 10.141.6

ayamagne jaritA tve abhUdapi sahasaH sUno nahyanyadastyApyam |bhadraM hi sharma trivarUthamasti ta Are hiMsAnAmapa didyumA kR^idhi || 10.142.1
pravatte agne janimA pitUyataH sAchIva vishvA bhuvanA nyR^i~njase |pra saptayaH pra saniShanta no dhiyaH purashcharanti pashupA iva tmanA || 10.142.2
uta vA u pari vR^iNakShi bapsadbahoragna ulapasya svadhAvaH |uta khilyA urvarANAM bhavanti mA te hetiM taviShIM chukrudhAma || 10.142.3
yadudvato nivato yAsi bapsatpR^ithageShi pragardhinIva senA |yadA te vAto anuvAti shochirvapteva shmashru vapasi pra bhUma || 10.142.4
pratyasya shreNayo dadR^ishra ekaM niyAnaM bahavo rathAsaH |bAhU yadagne anumarmR^ijAno nya~N~NuttAnAmanveShi bhUmim || 10.142.5
utte shuShmA jihatAmutte archirutte agne shashamAnasya vAjAH |uchChva~nchasva ni nama vardhamAna A tvAdya vishve vasavaH sadantu || 10.142.6
apAmidaM nyayanaM samudrasya niveshanam |anyaM kR^iNuShvetaH panthAM tena yAhi vashA.N anu || 10.142.7
Ayane te parAyaNe dUrvA rohantu puShpiNIH |hradAshcha puNDarIkANi samudrasya gR^ihA ime || 10.142.8

tyaM chidatrimR^itajuramarthamashvaM na yAtave |kakShIvantaM yadI punA rathaM na kR^iNutho navam || 10.143.1
tyaM chidashvaM na vAjinamareNavo yamatnata |dR^iLhaM granthiM na vi ShyatamatriM yaviShThamA rajaH || 10.143.2
narA daMsiShThAvatraye shubhrA siShAsataM dhiyaH |athA hi vAM divo narA punaH stomo na vishase || 10.143.3
chite tadvAM surAdhasA rAtiH sumatirashvinA |A yannaH sadane pR^ithau samane parShatho narA || 10.143.4
yuvaM bhujyuM samudra A rajasaH pAra I~Nkhitam |yAtamachChA patatribhirnAsatyA sAtaye kR^itam || 10.143.5
A vAM sumnaiH shaMyU iva maMhiShThA vishvavedasA |samasme bhUShataM narotsaM na pipyuShIriShaH || 10.143.6

ayaM hi te amartya induratyo na patyate |dakSho vishvAyurvedhase || 10.144.1
ayamasmAsu kAvya R^ibhurvajro dAsvate |ayaM bibhartyUrdhvakR^ishanaM madamR^ibhurna kR^itvyaM madam || 10.144.2
ghR^iShuH shyenAya kR^itvana Asu svAsu vaMsagaH |ava dIdhedahIshuvaH || 10.144.3
yaM suparNaH parAvataH shyenasya putra Abharat |shatachakraM yo.ahyo vartaniH || 10.144.4
yaM te shyenashchArumavR^ikaM padAbharadaruNaM mAnamandhasaH |enA vayo vi tAryAyurjIvasa enA jAgAra bandhutA || 10.144.5
evA tadindra indunA deveShu chiddhArayAte mahi tyajaH |kratvA vayo vi tAryAyuH sukrato kratvAyamasmadA sutaH || 10.144.6

imAM khanAmyoShadhiM vIrudhaM balavattamAm |yayA sapatnIM bAdhate yayA saMvindate patim || 10.145.1
uttAnaparNe subhage devajUte sahasvati |sapatnIM me parA dhama patiM me kevalaM kuru || 10.145.2
uttarAhamuttara uttareduttarAbhyaH |athA sapatnI yA mamAdharA sAdharAbhyaH || 10.145.3
nahyasyA nAma gR^ibhNAmi no asminramate jane |parAmeva parAvataM sapatnIM gamayAmasi || 10.145.4
ahamasmi sahamAnAtha tvamasi sAsahiH |ubhe sahasvatI bhUtvI sapatnIM me sahAvahai || 10.145.5
upa te.adhAM sahamAnAmabhi tvAdhAM sahIyasA |mAmanu pra te mano vatsaM gauriva dhAvatu pathA vAriva dhAvatu || 10.145.6

araNyAnyaraNyAnyasau yA preva nashyasi |kathA grAmaM na pR^ichChasi na tvA bhIriva vindatI3.N || 10.146.1
vR^iShAravAya vadate yadupAvati chichchikaH |AghATibhiriva dhAvayannaraNyAnirmahIyate || 10.146.2
uta gAva ivAdantyuta veshmeva dR^ishyate |uto araNyAniH sAyaM shakaTIriva sarjati || 10.146.3
gAma~NgaiSha A hvayati dArva~NgaiSho apAvadhIt |vasannaraNyAnyAM sAyamakrukShaditi manyate || 10.146.4
na vA araNyAnirhantyanyashchennAbhigachChati |svAdoH phalasya jagdhvAya yathAkAmaM ni padyate || 10.146.5
A~njanagandhiM surabhiM bahvannAmakR^iShIvalAm |prAhaM mR^igANAM mAtaramaraNyAnimashaMsiSham || 10.146.6

shratte dadhAmi prathamAya manyave.ahanyadvR^itraM naryaM viverapaH |ubhe yattvA bhavato rodasI anu rejate shuShmAtpR^ithivI chidadrivaH || 10.147.1
tvaM mAyAbhiranavadya mAyinaM shravasyatA manasA vR^itramardayaH |tvAminnaro vR^iNate gaviShTiShu tvAM vishvAsu havyAsviShTiShu || 10.147.2
aiShu chAkandhi puruhUta sUriShu vR^idhAso ye maghavannAnashurmagham |archanti toke tanaye pariShTiShu medhasAtA vAjinamahraye dhane || 10.147.3
sa innu rAyaH subhR^itasya chAkananmadaM yo asya raMhyaM chiketati |tvAvR^idho maghavandAshvadhvaro makShU sa vAjaM bharate dhanA nR^ibhiH || 10.147.4
tvaM shardhAya mahinA gR^iNAna uru kR^idhi maghava~nChagdhi rAyaH |tvaM no mitro varuNo na mAyI pitvo na dasma dayase vibhaktA || 10.147.5

suShvANAsa indra stumasi tvA sasavAMsashcha tuvinR^imNa vAjam |A no bhara suvitaM yasya chAkantmanA tanA sanuyAma tvotAH || 10.148.1
R^iShvastvamindra shUra jAto dAsIrvishaH sUryeNa sahyAH |guhA hitaM guhyaM gULhamapsu bibhR^imasi prasravaNe na somam || 10.148.2
aryo vA giro abhyarcha vidvAnR^iShINAM vipraH sumatiM chakAnaH |te syAma ye raNayanta somairenota tubhyaM rathoLha bhakShaiH || 10.148.3
imA brahmendra tubhyaM shaMsi dA nR^ibhyo nR^iNAM shUra shavaH |tebhirbhava sakraturyeShu chAkannuta trAyasva gR^iNata uta stIn || 10.148.4
shrudhI havamindra shUra pR^ithyA uta stavase venyasyArkaiH |A yaste yoniM ghR^itavantamasvArUrmirna nimnairdravayanta vakvAH || 10.148.5

savitA yantraiH pR^ithivImaramNAdaskambhane savitA dyAmadR^iMhat |ashvamivAdhukShaddhunimantarikShamatUrte baddhaM savitA samudram || 10.149.1
yatrA samudraH skabhito vyaunadapAM napAtsavitA tasya veda |ato bhUrata A utthitaM rajo.ato dyAvApR^ithivI aprathetAm || 10.149.2
pashchedamanyadabhavadyajatramamartyasya bhuvanasya bhUnA |suparNo a~Nga saviturgarutmAnpUrvo jAtaH sa u asyAnu dharma || 10.149.3
gAva iva grAmaM yUyudhirivAshvAnvAshreva vatsaM sumanA duhAnA |patiriva jAyAmabhi no nyetu dhartA divaH savitA vishvavAraH || 10.149.4
hiraNyastUpaH savitaryathA tvA~Ngiraso juhve vAje asmin |evA tvArchannavase vandamAnaH somasyevAMshuM prati jAgarAham || 10.149.5

samiddhashchitsamidhyase devebhyo havyavAhana |Adityai rudrairvasubhirna A gahi mR^iLIkAya na A gahi || 10.150.1
imaM yaj~namidaM vacho jujuShANa upAgahi |martAsastvA samidhAna havAmahe mR^iLIkAya havAmahe || 10.150.2
tvAmu jAtavedasaM vishvavAraM gR^iNe dhiyA |agne devA.N A vaha naH priyavratAnmR^iLIkAya priyavratAn || 10.150.3
agnirdevo devAnAmabhavatpurohito.agniM manuShyA R^iShayaH samIdhire |agniM maho dhanasAtAvahaM huve mR^iLIkaM dhanasAtaye || 10.150.4
agniratriM bharadvAjaM gaviShThiraM prAvannaH kaNvaM trasadasyumAhave |agniM vasiShTho havate purohito mR^iLIkAya purohitaH || 10.150.5

shraddhayAgniH samidhyate shraddhayA hUyate haviH |shraddhAM bhagasya mUrdhani vachasA vedayAmasi || 10.151.1
priyaM shraddhe dadataH priyaM shraddhe didAsataH |priyaM bhojeShu yajvasvidaM ma uditaM kR^idhi || 10.151.2
yathA devA asureShu shraddhAmugreShu chakrire |evaM bhojeShu yajvasvasmAkamuditaM kR^idhi || 10.151.3

shraddhAM prAtarhavAmahe shraddhAM madhyaMdinaM pari |shraddhAM sUryasya nimruchi shraddhe shraddhApayeha naH || 10.151.5

shAsa itthA mahA.N asyamitrakhAdo adbhutaH |na yasya hanyate sakhA na jIyate kadA chana || 10.152.1
svastidA vishaspatirvR^itrahA vimR^idho vashI |vR^iShendraH pura etu naH somapA abhayaMkaraH || 10.152.2
vi rakSho vi mR^idho jahi vi vR^itrasya hanU ruja |vi manyumindra vR^itrahannamitrasyAbhidAsataH || 10.152.3

I~NkhayantIrapasyuva indraM jAtamupAsate |bhejAnAsaH suvIryam || 10.153.1
tvamindra balAdadhi sahaso jAta ojasaH |tvaM vR^iShanvR^iShedasi || 10.153.2

soma ekebhyaH pavate ghR^itameka upAsate |yebhyo madhu pradhAvati tA.NshchidevApi gachChatAt || 10.154.1
tapasA ye anAdhR^iShyAstapasA ye svaryayuH |tapo ye chakrire mahastA.NshchidevApi gachChatAt || 10.154.2
ye yudhyante pradhaneShu shUrAso ye tanUtyajaH |ye vA sahasradakShiNAstA.NshchidevApi gachChatAt || 10.154.3

arAyi kANe vikaTe giriM gachCha sadAnve |shirimbiThasya satvabhistebhiShTvA chAtayAmasi || 10.155.1
chatto itashchattAmutaH sarvA bhrUNAnyAruShI |arAyyaM brahmaNaspate tIkShNashR^iNgodR^iShannihi || 10.155.2

agniM hinvantu no dhiyaH saptimAshumivAjiShu |tena jeShma dhanaMdhanam || 10.156.1

imA nu kaM bhuvanA sIShadhAmendrashcha vishve cha devAH || 10.157.1

sUryo no divaspAtu vAto antarikShAt |agnirnaH pArthivebhyaH || 10.158.1
joShA savitaryasya te haraH shataM savA.N arhati |pAhi no didyutaH patantyAH || 10.158.2

udasau sUryo agAdudayaM mAmako bhagaH |ahaM tadvidvalA patimabhyasAkShi viShAsahiH || 10.159.1
ahaM keturahaM mUrdhAhamugrA vivAchanI |mamedanu kratuM patiH sehAnAyA upAcharet || 10.159.2
mama putrAH shatruhaNo.atho me duhitA virAT |utAhamasmi saMjayA patyau me shloka uttamaH || 10.159.3
yenendro haviShA kR^itvyabhavaddyumnyuttamaH |idaM tadakri devA asapatnA kilAbhuvam || 10.159.4
asapatnA sapatnaghnI jayantyabhibhUvarI |AvR^ikShamanyAsAM varcho rAdho astheyasAmiva || 10.159.5
samajaiShamimA ahaM sapatnIrabhibhUvarI |yathAhamasya vIrasya virAjAni janasya cha || 10.159.6

tIvrasyAbhivayaso asya pAhi sarvarathA vi harI iha mu~ncha |indra mA tvA yajamAnAso anye ni rIramantubhyamime sutAsaH || 10.160.1
tubhyaM sutAstubhyamu sotvAsastvAM giraH shvAtryA A hvayanti |indredamadya savanaM juShANo vishvasya vidvA.N iha pAhi somam || 10.160.2
ya ushatA manasA somamasmai sarvahR^idA devakAmaH sunoti |na gA indrastasya parA dadAti prashastamichchArumasmai kR^iNoti || 10.160.3
anuspaShTo bhavatyeSho asya yo asmai revAnna sunoti somam |niraratnau maghavA taM dadhAti brahmadviSho hantyanAnudiShTaH || 10.160.4
ashvAyanto gavyanto vAjayanto havAmahe tvopagantavA u |AbhUShantaste sumatau navAyAM vayamindra tvA shunaM huvema || 10.160.5

mu~nchAmi tvA haviShA jIvanAya kamaj~nAtayakShmAduta rAjayakShmAt |grAhirjagrAha yadi vaitadenaM tasyA indrAgnI pra mumuktamenam || 10.161.1
yadi kShitAyuryadi vA pareto yadi mR^ityorantikaM nIta eva |tamA harAmi nirR^iterupasthAdaspArShamenaM shatashAradAya || 10.161.2
sahasrAkSheNa shatashAradena shatAyuShA haviShAhArShamenam |shataM yathemaM sharado nayAtIndro vishvasya duritasya pAram || 10.161.3
shataM jIva sharado vardhamAnaH shataM hemantA~nChatamu vasantAn |shatamindrAgnI savitA bR^ihaspatiH shatAyuShA haviShemaM punarduH || 10.161.4
AhArShaM tvAvidaM tvA punarAgAH punarnava |sarvA~Nga sarvaM te chakShuH sarvamAyushcha te.avidam || 10.161.5

brahmaNAgniH saMvidAno rakShohA bAdhatAmitaH |amIvA yaste garbhaM durNAmA yonimAshaye || 10.162.1
yaste garbhamamIvA durNAmA yonimAshaye |agniShTaM brahmaNA saha niShkravyAdamanInashat || 10.162.2

yastvA svapnena tamasA mohayitvA nipadyate |prajAM yaste jighAMsati tamito nAshayAmasi || 10.162.6

akShIbhyAM te nAsikAbhyAM karNAbhyAM ChubukAdadhi |yakShmaM shIrShaNyaM mastiShkAjjihvAyA vi vR^ihAmi te || 10.163.1
grIvAbhyasta uShNihAbhyaH kIkasAbhyo anUkyAt |yakShmaM doShaNyamaMsAbhyAM bAhubhyAM vi vR^ihAmi te || 10.163.2

UrubhyAM te aShThIvadbhyAM pArShNibhyAM prapadAbhyAm |yakShmaM shroNibhyAM bhAsadAdbhaMsaso vi vR^ihAmi te || 10.163.4
mehanAdvanaMkaraNAllomabhyaste nakhebhyaH |yakShmaM sarvasmAdAtmanastamidaM vi vR^ihAmi te || 10.163.5
